Matthew1:1 Ekitabo ky'olulyo lwa Yezu Kristu omwana wa Dawudi, omwana wa Yiburayimu:" 
Matthew1:2 Yiburayimu yazaala Yizaake, Yizaake n'azaala Yakobo, Yakobo n'azaala Yuda ne baganda be," 
Matthew1:3 Yuda n'azaala Perezi ne Zera mu Tamari, Perezi n'azaala Kezuroni, Kezuroni n'azaala Aramu," 
Matthew1:4 Aramu n'azaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu n'azaala Nakusoni, Nakusoni n'azaala Salumoni," 
Matthew1:5 Salumoni n'azaala Bowazi mu Rakabu, Bowazi n'azaala Obedi mu Ruusi, Obedi n'azaala Yesse," 
Matthew1:6 Yesse n'azaala Dawudi kabaka. Dawudi yazaala Solomoni mu yali muka Wuriya. 
Matthew1:7 Solomoni n'azaala Rekobowamu, Rekobowamu n'azaala Abiya, Abiya n'azaala Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa n'azaala Yosafati, Yosafati n'azaala Yoramu, Yoramu n'azaala Wuzziya," 
Matthew1:9 Wuzziya n'azaala Yotamu, Yotamu n'azaala Akazi, Akazi n'azaala Kezekiya," 
Matthew1:10 Kezekiya n'azaala Manasse, Manasse n'azaala Amosi, Amosi n'azaala Yosiya." 
Matthew1:11 Yosiya n'azaala Yekoniya ne baganda be, mu budde obw'okutwalibwa mu busibe mu Babiloni." 
Matthew1:12 Oluvannyuma lw'obusibe mu Babiloni, Yekoniya yazaala Seyalutyeli, Seyalutyeli n'azaala Zerubabbeli," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabbeli n'azaala Abiyudi, Abiyudi n'azaala Eliyakimu, Eliyakimu n'azaala Azori," 
Matthew1:14 Azori n'azaala Zadoki, Zadoki n'azaala Akimu, Akimu n'azaala Eliyudi," 
Matthew1:15 Eliyudi n'azaala Eleyazari, Eleyazari n'azaala Mattani, Mattani n'azaala Yakobo," 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo n'azaala Yozefu bba Mariya, Mariya ono ye yazaala Yezu ayitibwa Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Amazadde bwe gatyo: okuva ku Yiburayimu okutuuka ku Dawudi, gaali kkumi n'ana, okuva ku Dawudi okutuusa ku kutwalibwa mu busibe mu Babiloni gaali kkumi n'ana, ate okuva ku busibe mu Babiloni okutuuka ku Kristu, nago amazadde gaali kkumi n'ana." 
Matthew1:18 Okuzaalibwa kwa Yezu Kristu kwali bwe kuti: Mariya nnyina ng'amaze okwogerezebwa Yozefu, nga tebannaba kubeera wamu, n'alabika ng'ali lubuto ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Matthew1:19 Naye Yozefu bba, kubanga yali mutuukirivu era nga tayagala kumuswaza, n'ateesa okumugoba mu kyama." 
Matthew1:20 Yali akyalowoolereza ekyo, malayika w'Omukama n'amulabikira mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti: “Yozefu, mutabani wa Dawudi, totya kuyingiza mumwo Mariya mukazi wo, kubanga olubuto lw'alina yalufuna ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Matthew1:21 Ajja kuzaala omwana wa bulenzi, ggwe onoomutuuma Yezu, kubanga alirokola abantu be mu bibi byabwe.”" 
Matthew1:22 Ebyo byonna byaba bityo Omukama kye yayogera ng'ayita mu mulanzi kituukirire nti: 
Matthew1:23 “Laba, omuwala embeerera anaaba olubuto n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi; erinnya lye balimuyita Emmanweli,” ekivvuunulwa nti: 'Katonda ali naffe'." 
Matthew1:24 Yozefu bwe yazuukuka mu tulo, n'akola nga malayika w'Omukama bwe yali amulagidde, n'atwala mukazi we," 
Matthew1:25 n'atamumanyira ddala okutuusa lwe yazaala omwana, n'amutuuma Yezu." 
Matthew2:1 Awo Yezu bwe yazaalibwa e Beteleemu ekya Yuda, mu mirembe gya kabaka Erode, abasajja bakalimagezi ne bava e Buvanjuba ne bajja e Yeruzaalemu nga bagamba nti:" 
Matthew2:2 “Kabaka w'Abayudaaya oyo azaaliddwa ali ludda wa! Kubanga twalaba emmunyeenye ye mu Buvanjuba ne tujja okumusinza.” 
Matthew2:3 Kabaka Erode bwe yawulira, ne yeeraliikirira, ne Yeruzaalemu kyonna ne kyeraliikirira wamu naye." 
Matthew2:4 N'akuŋŋaanya bakabona abakulu bonna n'abawandiisi b'abantu, n'ababuuliriza ku Kristu gy'alizaalibwa." 
Matthew2:5 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Mu Beteleemu eky'omu Yuda; kubanga bwe kiti bwe kyawandiikibwa omulanzi nti: 
Matthew2:6 ‘Naawe Beteleemu, ensi ya Yuda, ddala si ggwe asingayo obutene mu bafuzi b'omu Buyudaaya, kubanga mu ggwe mwe muliva omufuzi alifuga abantu bange Yisirayeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Awo Erode n'ayita abasajja bakalimagezi mu kyama, n'ababuuliriza amanye ebbanga emmunyeenye lye yalabikiramu." 
Matthew2:8 N'abasindika e Beteleemu nga bw'abagamba nti: “Mugende munoonyereze bulungi ku mwana oyo; bwe mubanga mumulabye, mumbuulire, nange nzije mmusinze.”" 
Matthew2:9 Bwe baamala okuwulira ebya kabaka, ne bagenda. Amangu ago emmunyeenye gye baalaba e Buvanjuba n'ebakulemberamu okutuusa lwe yatuuka n'eyimirira waggulu omwana we yali." 
Matthew2:10 Bwe baalaba emmunyeenye, ne bajaguza n'essanyu lingi nnyo." 
Matthew2:11 Bwe baayingira mu nyumba, ne balabamu omwana wamu ne Mariya nnyina, ne bavunnama, ne bamusinza. Ne basumulula amakula gaabwe, ne bamutonera ebirabo: zaabu, obubaani ne mirra." 
Matthew2:12 Naye bwe baalabulibwa mu kirooto obutadda wa Erode, ne badda mu nsi yaaboobwe nga bayitira mu kkubo eddala." 
Matthew2:13 Bwe baamala okugenda, malayika w'Omukama n'alabikira Yozefu mu kirooto, n'amugamba nti: “Golokoka otwale omwana ne nnyina, oddukire e Misiri, obeere eyo okutuusa lwe ndikugamba, kubanga Erode wuuyo agenda kunoonya omwana okumutta.”" 
Matthew2:14 N'agolokoka, n'atwala omwana ne nnyina ekiro, n'asitula okulaga e Misiri." 
Matthew2:15 N'abeera eyo okutuusa Erode lwe yafa, Omukama kye yagamba ng'ayita mu mulanzi kituukirire, nti: “Nayita mutabani wange okuva mu Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Erode bwe yalaba ng'abasajja bakalimagezi bamuguumaazizza, n'akalala nnyo; n'atuma n'atta mu Beteleemu ne mu byalo ebiriraanyeewo abaana bonna ab'obulenzi abaakamala emyaka ebiri n'okukka wansi, ng'alabira mu biro byennyini bye yabuulirizaamu abasajja bakalimagezi." 
Matthew2:17 Omulanzi Yeremiya kye yalanga ne kituukirira, nti:" 
Matthew2:18 “Eddoboozi lyawulirwa mu Rama; okulira n'emiranga eminene; Rakeli ng'akaabira abaana be; tayagala na kukubagizibwa, kubanga tewakyali n'omu.”" 
Matthew2:19 Awo Erode bwe yamala okufa, malayika w'Omukama n'alabikira Yozefu mu kirooto e Misiri, n'amugamba nti:" 
Matthew2:20 “Golokoka, kwata omwana ne nnyina, ogende mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, kubanga abaali banoonya omwana okumutta baafa.”" 
Matthew2:21 N'agolokoka, n'akwata omwana ne nnyina, n'agenda mu nsi ya Yisirayeli." 
Matthew2:22 Naye bwe yawulira nga Arikelawo y'afuga Buyudaaya mu kifo kya kitaawe Erode, n'atya okugenda eyo; bwe yalabulibwa mu kirooto, n'adda mu ssaza ly'e Galilaaya." 
Matthew2:23 Bwe yatuuka eyo, n'asenga mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Nazareti; bwe kityo abalanzi kye baayogera kituukirire, nti: “Aliyitibwa Munazareewo.”" 
Matthew3:1 Mu nnaku ezo Yowanna Batista n'ajja ng'ayigiriza mu ddungu ly'e Buyudaaya," 
Matthew3:2 ng'agamba nti: “Mubonerere kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.” 
Matthew3:3 Anti ono ye wuuyo eyayoogerwako Yisaaya omulanzi nti: “Eddoboozi ery'oyo aleekaana mu ddungu nti: ‘Mutegeke ekkubo ly'Omukama, muluŋŋamye obukubo bwe.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Kati nno Yowanna yalina ekyambalo eky'ebyoya by'eŋŋamiya n'omusipi ogw'olukoba mu kiwato kye; emmere ye yabanga nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ogw'oku ttale. 
Matthew3:5 Yeruzaalemu ne Buyudaaya yenna n'ensi yonna ekoota Yorudani ne bagendanga gy'ali," 
Matthew3:6 n'ababatiza mu mugga Yorudani nga baatula ebibi byabwe. 
Matthew3:7 Bwe yalaba nga bangi mu Bafarisaayo ne mu Basaddukaayo bajja gy'ali okubatizibwa, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe abaana b'amasalambwa, ani abalabudde okudduka obusungu obugenda okujja?" 
Matthew3:8 Kale nno mulage ebibala ebiva mu kubonerera kwammwe. 
Matthew3:9 Temulowooza nga mwegamba nti: ‘Tulina kitaffe Yiburayimu,’ kubanga, ka mbabuulire, mu mayinja gano gennyini Katonda ayinza okuggyiramu Yiburayimu abaana." 
Matthew3:10 Na kati embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo ky'emiti. Buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gujja kutemebwa gusuulibwe mu muliro. 
Matthew3:11 Weewaawo nze mbatiza na mazzi olw'okwenenya, naye oyo ananziririra y'ansinga amaanyi, gwe sisaanira na kukwatira ngatto ze; oyo alibabatiza ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'omuliro." 
Matthew3:12 Olugali lwe lumuli mu ngalo, ajja okulongoosa egguuliro lye, eŋŋano ye agikuŋŋaanyize mu byagi bye, byo ebisusunku abyokye n'omuliro ogutayinza kuzikira.”" 
Matthew3:13 Awo Yezu n'ava mu Galilaaya n'agenda ku Yorudani eri Yowanna amubatize. 
Matthew3:14 Yowanna yali amutangira, ng'agamba nti: “Nze nsaanye ggwe ombatize; ate ggwe n'ojja gye ndi?”" 
Matthew3:15 Yezu n'ayanukula n'amugamba nti: “Mala gakkiriza kati; kubanga tugwanye okutuukiriza buli butuukirivu bwonna.” Awo n'amuleka. 
Matthew3:16 Yezu olwamala okubatizibwa, amangu ago n'ava mu mazzi. Awo eggulu ne libikkuka, n'alaba Mwoyo wa Katonda ng'akkirira ng'enjiibwa, n'amukkako." 
Matthew3:17 Awo eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa, gwe neesiimiramu.”" 
Matthew4:1 Awo Yezu n'ayambusibwa Mwoyo mu ddungu okukemebwa Sitaani. 
Matthew4:2 N'asiiba emisana amakumi ana n'ebiro amakumi ana, oluvannyuma enjala n'emuluma." 
Matthew4:3 Omukemi n'asembera n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, gamba amayinja gano gafuuke emigaati.”" 
Matthew4:4 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Omuntu taabenga mulamu lwa mugaati gwokka, naye na lwa buli kigambo ekifuluma mu kamwa ka Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Awo Sitaani n'amutwala ku kibuga ekitukuvu, n'amuteeka ku kitikkiro ky'Ekiggwa," 
Matthew4:6 n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, weesuule wansi, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “ ‘Aliragira bamalayika be ku ggwe, era balikutwalira mu mikono gyabwe oleme kukoona kigere kyo ku jjinja.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Era kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.’ ” 
Matthew4:8 Sitaani n'amuddira ate, n'amutwala ku lusozi oluwanvu, n'amwoleka amawanga gonna ag'ensi n'ekitiibwa kyago," 
Matthew4:9 n'amugamba nti: “Ebyo byonna nnaabikuwa bw'onoovunnama omala onsinza.” 
Matthew4:10 Awo Yezu kwe kumugamba nti: “Vvaawo, Sitaani, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “ ‘Osinzanga Omukama Katonda wo, era yekka gw'oweerezanga.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Awo Sitaani n'amuleka; laba, amangu ago bamalayika ne basembera ne bamuweereza." 
Matthew4:12 Yezu bwe yawulira nga Yowanna bamusibye, n'addayo mu Galilaaya;" 
Matthew4:13 n'ava e Nazareti, n'agenda abeeranga e Kafarunawumu eky'oku nnyanja, ku nsalo za Zebuluni ne Nafutali," 
Matthew4:14 omulanzi Yisaaya kye yalanga kituukirire nti: 
Matthew4:15 “Ensi ya Zebuluni n'ensi ya Nafutali; Ekkubo ery'oku Nnyanja, emitala wa Yorudani; Galilaaya ey'Amawanga;" 
Matthew4:16 abantu abaali batudde mu kizikiza, balabye ekitangaala ekinene; n'abaali batudde mu nsi ne mu kisiikirize eky'olumbe ekitangaala kibaakidde.”" 
Matthew4:17 Okuva ku olwo Yezu n'asooka okuyigiriza, ng'agamba nti: “Mwenenye, kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.”" 
Matthew4:18 Bwe yali atambula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja y'e Galilaaya, n'alaba ab'oluganda babiri: Simoni ayitibwa Petero ne Andureya muganda we, nga basuula akatimba mu nnyanja, kubanga baali bavubi," 
Matthew4:19 n'abagamba nti: “Mungoberere, ndibafuula abavubi b'abantu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Amangu ago ne baleka obutimba bwabwe, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew4:21 Bwe yatambulako okuva awo, n'alaba ab'oluganda abalala babiri: Yakobo mutabani wa Zebedaayo ne Yowanna muganda we, nga bali mu lyato wamu ne kitaabwe Zebedaayo, nga basanirira obutimba bwabwe, n'abayita." 
Matthew4:22 Amangu ago ne baleka obutimba bwabwe ne kitaabwe, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew4:23 Awo Yezu n'atalaaga Galilaaya yonna ng'ayigiriza mu sinaagooga zaabwe, ng'ababuulira Evangili y'obwakabaka ate ng'awonya buli bulwadde bwonna na buli nkenyera mu bantu." 
Matthew4:24 Ettutumu lye ne lituuka wonna mu Siriya; ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna, abaalina endwadde eza buli ngeri, n'abalumizibwa, n'abakwatiddwa emyoyo emibi, n'ab'ensimbu, n'abakonzibye, n'abawonya." 
Matthew4:25 Ebibiina bingi ne bimugoberera okuva mu Galilaaya, mu Dekapoli, mu Yeruzaalemu, mu Buyudaaya n'emitala wa Yorudani." 
Matthew5:1 Bwe yalaba ebibiina, n'ayambuka ku lusozi, n'atuula, abayigirizwa be ne bamusemberera." 
Matthew5:2 N'ayasamya akamwa ke n'abayigiriza nti: 
Matthew5:3 “Beesiimye abaavu mu mwoyo, kubanga obwakabaka bw'omu ggulu bwabwe." 
Matthew5:4 Beesiimye abasinda, kubanga balikubagizibwa." 
Matthew5:5 Beesiimye abateefu, kubanga balirya ensi." 
Matthew5:6 Beesiimye abalumwa enjala n'ennyonta eby'obutuukirivu, kubanga balikkuta." 
Matthew5:7 Beesiimye ab'ekisa, kubanga baligirirwa ekisa." 
Matthew5:8 Beesiimye ab'omutima omulongoofu, kubanga baliraba Katonda." 
Matthew5:9 Beesiimye abaleeta emirembe, kubanga baliyitibwa baana ba Katonda." 
Matthew5:10 Beesiimye abayigganyizibwa olw'obutuukirivu, kubanga obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bwabwe." 
Matthew5:11 Mwesiimye bwe banaabavumanga, bwe banaabayigganyanga, bwe baboogerera buli kigambo kibi kyonna okubeera nze, nga balimba." 
Matthew5:12 Musanyuke, mujaguze, kubanga empeera yammwe mu ggulu nnene. Anti bwe batyo bwe baayigganya abalanzi abaabasooka." 
Matthew5:13 “Mmwe munnyo gw'ensi. Kale omunnyo bwe gusaabulukuka, gunazzikamu gutya ensa? Guba tegukyalina kye gugasa, wabula okumansibwa ebweru, ne gulinnyirirwa abantu." 
Matthew5:14 “Mmwe kitangaala ky'ensi. Ekibuga ekikubiddwa ku lusozi, tekiyinza kukisibwa." 
Matthew5:15 Era tebakoleeza ttawaaza ne bagissa mu kibbo, wabula ku kikondo, n'emulisa bonna abali mu nnyumba." 
Matthew5:16 Ekitangaala kyammwe kyakire bwe kityo abantu, balabe ebikolwa byammwe ebirungi, balyoke bagulumize Kitammwe ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew5:17 “Muleke kulowooza nga najja kudibya Tteeka oba Abalanzi; sajja kudibya wabula okutuukiriza. 
Matthew5:18 Mazima mbagamba nti okutuusa eggulu n'ensi lwe biriggwaawo, mpaawo kanyukuta, yadde akatonnyeze, biriva mu Tteeka okutuusa nga byonna bituukiridde." 
Matthew5:19 Awo nno oyo yenna alimenya wadde ekimu ku biragiro bino ebisinga obutono, aliyitibwa asinga obutene mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. Sso alibikwata n'abiyigiriza, aliyitibwa mukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu," 
Matthew5:20 kubanga, ka mbabuulire, obutuukirivu bwammwe bwe butalikira bwa bawandiisi na Bafarisaayo, temuliyingira mu bwakabaka bwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew5:21 “Mwawulira ng'ab'edda baabagamba nti: ‘Tottanga; alitta alisalirwa omusango.’ 
Matthew5:22 Naye nze mbagamba nti buli yenna alisunguwalira muganda we, alisalirwa omusango. Aligamba muganda we nti: ‘Oli kintuntu!’ alisalirwa omusango mu Lukiiko. Ate aligamba muganda we nti: ‘Oli musiru!’ alisalirwa omusango gw'omuliro gwa Geyenna." 
Matthew5:23 Awo nno, bw'obanga otwala ekitone kyo ku mwaliiro, n'ojjuukirira awo nga muganda wo akulinako ekigambo," 
Matthew5:24 leka awo ekitone kyo mu maaso g'omwaliiro, osooke ogende otabagane ne muganda wo; awo olyoke odde oweereze ekitone kyo." 
Matthew5:25 “Tabagana mangu ne gw'owoza naye nga mukyali mu kkubo, gw'owoza naye aleme kukutwala wa mulamuzi; omulamuzi aleme kukuwa mukuumi, n'osibibwa mu kkomera." 
Matthew5:26 Mazima, ka nkubuulire, omwo tolivaamu, okutuusa ng'omaze okusasula akasente akasembayo." 
Matthew5:27 “Mwawulira nga baagamba nti: ‘Toyendanga,’" 
Matthew5:28 naye nze mbagamba nti buli atunuulira omukazi ng'amwegomba, ng'amwenzeeko muli mu mutima gwe." 
Matthew5:29 Obanga eriiso lyo erya ddyo likwesittaza, linokolemu olisuule eri, kubanga kisingako ekitundu ekimu ku ggwe okukufa okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna okusuulibwa mu Geyenna." 
Matthew5:30 Obanga omukono gwo ogwa ddyo gukwesittaza, gutemeko ogusuule eri; kubanga kisingako okufiirwa ekitundu ekimu ku ggwe okusinga omubiri gwo gwonna okugenda mu Geyenna." 
Matthew5:31 “Baagamba era nti: ‘Anaagobanga mukazi we, amuwanga ebbaluwa ey'obugobe.’" 
Matthew5:32 Naye nze mbagamba nti buli agoba mukazi we, wabula mpozzi olw'obwenzi, aba amusudde mu bwenzi; n'oyo awasa omukazi agobeddwa, aba ayenze." 
Matthew5:33 “Era mwawulira ng'ab'edda baabagamba nti: ‘Tolayiriranga bya bulimba; by'olayidde obituukirizanga ew'Omukama.’ 
Matthew5:34 Naye nze, ka mbabuulire, temulayiranga n'akatono, newandibadde okulayira eggulu, kubanga ye ntebe ya Katonda;" 
Matthew5:35 newandibadde ensi, kubanga ke katebe k'ebigere bye; n'ewandibadde Yeruzaalemu, kubanga kye kibuga kya Kabaka omukulu;" 
Matthew5:36 newandibadde omutwe gwo, kubanga oluviiri olumu toyinza kulufuula lweru yadde oluddugavu." 
Matthew5:37 Wabula kye mwogera kibenga ‘Yee’ aweetaagisa yee, oba ‘Nedda,’ aweetaagisa nedda; ekisinga ku ebyo kiva mu mubi." 
Matthew5:38 “Mwawulira nga baagamba nti: ‘Liiso olw'eriiso, linnyo olw'erinnyo,’" 
Matthew5:39 Naye nze mbagamba nti teweereeganga na mubi; oli bw'akukubanga ku ttama erya ddyo, omukyusizanga n'eddala." 
Matthew5:40 Oli bw'ayagalanga okukutwala mu mbuga okubowa ekkanzu yo, mulekere n'omunagiro," 
Matthew5:41 na buli akuwalirizanga okugenda naye ebigere olukumi, genda naye enkumi bbiri," 
Matthew5:42 Akusabanga, omuwanga; ne kw'oli ayagala okukwewolako tokyukiranga eri." 
Matthew5:43 “Mwawulira nga baagamba nti: ‘Oyagalanga munno, n'okyawa omulabe wo.’" 
Matthew5:44 Naye nze mbagamba nti mwagalenga abalabe bammwe, musabirenga ababayigganya," 
Matthew5:45 lwe mulibeera abaana ba Kitammwe ali mu ggulu, ayasiza enjuba ye ababi n'abalungi, n'atonnyeseza enkuba ye abatuukirivu n'abatali batuukirivu." 
Matthew5:46 Obanga mwagala babaagala, mufunamu mpeera ki? Abasolooza b'omusolo nabo si bakola kye kimu?" 
Matthew5:47 Obanga mulamusa baganda bammwe bokka, kiki kye mukola kye musinza abalala? Ne bannamawanga si bwe bakola?" 
Matthew5:48 Awo nno mube batuufu nga Kitammwe ow'omu ggulu bw'ali omutuufu.” 
Matthew6:1 “Mwekkaanyenga, ebikolwa byammwe eby'obutuukirivu obutabikolanga mu maaso g'abantu nga mugoberera babalabe; kubanga olwo temulifuna mpeera ewa Kitammwe ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew6:2 “Awo nno ggwe bw'ogabanga, tokulembezangamu kkondeere ng'abakuusa bwe bakola mu sinaagooga ne mu mbuga, abantu balyoke babawe ekitiibwa. Mazima mbagamba nti empeera yaabwe yonna bagifunye." 
Matthew6:3 Naye ggwe bw'ogabanga, omukono gwo ogwa kkono togulekanga kumanya gwa ddyo kye gukoze," 
Matthew6:4 bwe kityo ky'ogabye kibeere kya kyama; ye Kitaawo alaba ebiri mu kyama alikuweera. 
Matthew6:5 “Bwe mwegayiriranga, temubeeranga ng'abakuusa abaagala okwegayirira nga bayimiridde mu sinaagooga ne mu masaŋŋanzira g'enguudo, abantu balyoke babalabe. Mazima mbagamba nti empeera yaabwe yonna bagifunye." 
Matthew6:6 Naye ggwe nga weegayirira, oyingiranga mu nnyumba yo, n'oggalawo oluggi n'olyoka weegayirira Kitaawo ali mu kyama. Kitaawo alaba ebiri mu kyama alikuweera." 
Matthew6:7 Ate nga mwegayirira, temubujjabujjananga ng'abakafiiri bwe bakola; balowooza nti mu kutontoma ebingi mwe banaawulirirwa." 
Matthew6:8 Temubafaanana, anti Kitammwe kye mwetaaga muba temunnaba na kukimusaba, ng'akimanyi." 
Matthew6:9 Kale nno mwegayiriranga bwe muti: “Kitaffe ali mu ggulu, erinnya lyo litiibwe." 
Matthew6:10 Obwakabaka bwo bujje; by'oyagala bikolebwe mu nsi nga bwe bikolebwa mu ggulu. 
Matthew6:11 Tuwe leero emmere yaffe eya buli lunaku. 
Matthew6:12 Tusonyiwe amabanja gaffe, nga naffe bwe tusonyiye be tubanja." 
Matthew6:13 Totutwala mu kukemebwa, naye tuwonye mu bubi." 
Matthew6:14 “Kubanga bwe munaasonyiwanga abantu ensobi zaabwe, nammwe ne Kitammwe ow'omu ggulu anaabasonyiwanga." 
Matthew6:15 Naye bwe mutaasonyiwenga bantu, ne Kitammwe taabasonyiwenga nsobi zammwe." 
Matthew6:16 “Bwe musiibanga, temwenakuwazanga ng'abakuusa bwe bakola; bafumyafumya amaaso gaabwe abantu balyoke babalabe nti basiiba; ka mbabuulire, empeera yaabwe yonna bagifunye." 
Matthew6:17 Naye ggwe ng'osiiba, omutwe gwo ogusiiganga omuzigo, amaaso go n'oganaaba," 
Matthew6:18 abantu baleme kukulaba nti osiiba, wabula Kitaawo ali mu nkiso y'aba akulaba; oyo Kitaawo alaba ebiri mu nkiso alikuweera." 
Matthew6:19 “Temwekuŋŋaanyirizanga bya bugagga kuno ku nsi ennyenje n'obutalagge mwe bibwonoonera, n'ababbi gye bamenya ne babubba," 
Matthew6:20 wabula obugagga bwammwe mubwekuŋŋaanyirizenga mu ggulu eyo ennyenje n'obutalagge gye bitabwonoonera n'ababbi gye batamenya kububba," 
Matthew6:21 kubanga awabeera obugagga bwo, eyo era n'omutima gwo gye gulibeera." 
Matthew6:22 “Eriiso ye ttawaaza y'omubiri. Awo nno eriiso lyo bwe liba eddamu, n'omubiri gwo gwonna gutangaala." 
Matthew6:23 Naye eriiso lyo bwe liba eddwadde, omubiri gwo gwonna gujja kubeera mu nzikiza. Kale obanga ekitangaala ekikulimu nzikiza, enzikiza eyo nga nnyingi!" 
Matthew6:24 “Mpaawo ayinza kuweereza baami babiri; kubanga oba alikyawako omu n'ayagala omulala, oba alyesiba ku omu omulala n'amunyooma. Temuyinza kuweereza Katonda na byabugagga." 
Matthew6:25 “Kyenva mbagamba nti temweraliikiriranga bulamu bwammwe, nti munaalya ki, oba nti munaanywa ki, newandibadde omubiri gwammwe nti munaayambala ki. Obulamu si bwe bukira emmere n'omubiri si gwe gukira ekyokwambala?" 
Matthew6:26 Mutunuulire ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga, tebisiga wadde okukungula wadde okukuŋŋaanyiza mu byagi, sso Kitammwe ali mu ggulu abiriisa. Mmwe temuli ba muwendo okubisinga?" 
Matthew6:27 Ani mu mmwe, ne bwe yeeraliikirira atya, ayinza okwongera omukono ogumu ku buwanvu bwe?" 
Matthew6:28 N'ebyokwambala lwaki mubyeraliikirira? Mwetegereze amalanga g'okuttale, tegakola wadde okulanga engoye," 
Matthew6:29 naye, ka mbabuulire, newandibadde Solomoni mu kitiibwa kye kyonna, teyayambalanga ng'erimu ku go." 
Matthew6:30 Kale obanga omuddo ogw'oku ttale oguliwo leero enkya ne gusuulibwa mu kabiga, Katonda agwambaza bw'atyo, talisingawo nnyo okubambaza, mmwe ab'okukkiriza okutono?" 
Matthew6:31 Awo nno temweraliikiriranga, nga mugamba nti: ‘Tunaalya ki?’ oba nti: ‘Tunaanywa ki?’ oba nti: ‘Tunaayambala ki?’" 
Matthew6:32 Ab'amawanga bettanira ebyo byonna; ye Kitammwe ow'omu ggulu amanyi ng'ebyo byonna mubyetaaga. 
Matthew6:33 Musookenga kunoonya bwakabaka bwe na butuukirivu bwe, n'ebyo byonna biribongerwako." 
Matthew6:34 Awo nno mulekenga kweraliikirira lwa nkya; olw'enkya lulyeraliikirira ebyalwo. Olunaku lubeera n'emitawaana gyalwo egirumala.” 
Matthew7:1 “Temulamulanga, muleme kulamulibwa." 
Matthew7:2 Kubanga nga bwe mulamula, nammwe bwe munaalamulibwanga; n'ekipimo kye mugera, nammwe kye kiribagererwa." 
Matthew7:3 “Lwaki olaba akasubi akali mu liiso lya muganda wo, ggwe n'otolaba kisiki kiri mu liryo?" 
Matthew7:4 Oba kale, ogamba otya muganda wo nti: ‘Ka nkuggye akasubi mu liiso lyo,’ sso nga mu liryo mulimu kisiki?" 
Matthew7:5 Mukuusa ggwe, sooka weggye ekisiki mu liiso lyo, awo lw'onoolaba obulungi n'oggya akasubi mu liiso lya muganda wo." 
Matthew7:6 “Ebitukuvu temubiwanga mbwa; n'amalulu gammwe temugasuuliranga mbizzi, sikulwa nga zigalinnyirira n'ebigere byazo ate ne zibakyukira ne zibataagulataagula." 
Matthew7:7 “Musabe, muliweebwa; munoonye, mulizuula; mukonkone, muliggulirwawo." 
Matthew7:8 kubanga buli asaba afuna, buli anoonya azuula, na buli akonkona aliggulirwawo." 
Matthew7:9 Kale ani mu mmwe awa mutabani we ejjinja ng'amusabye omugaati? 
Matthew7:10 Obanga amusabye ekyennyanja, n'amuwa omusota?" 
Matthew7:11 Kale oba mmwe ababi mumanyi okuwa abaana bammwe ebirungi, Kitammwe ali mu ggulu talisinzaawo okuwa ebirungi ababa bamusabye?" 
Matthew7:12 “Kale nno kyonna kye mwagala abantu babakolere, nammwe kye mubanga mubakolera. Anti eryo lye Tteeka n'Abalanzi." 
Matthew7:13 “Muyingirire mu mulyango omufunda; kubanga omulyango mugazi n'ekkubo lyangu eritwala mu kuzikirira, n'abo abalikwata bangi." 
Matthew7:14 Naye omulyango ogutwala mu bulamu gwa kanyigo, n'ekkubo erituusaayo zzibu, n'abaliggukamu batono." 
Matthew7:15 “Mwerinde abalanzi ab'obulimba abajja gye muli mu byambalo eby'endiga, sso nga munda gye misege emikwakkuzi." 
Matthew7:16 Ku bibala byabwe kwe mulibategeerera. Kazzi emizabbibu baginoga ku maggwa n'emikunyu ku matovu? 
Matthew7:17 Anti omuti omulungi, gubala ebibala birungi, n'omuti omubi gubala ebibala bibi." 
Matthew7:18 Omuti omulungi teguyinza kubala bibala bibi, era ng'omuti omubi bwe gutayinza kubala bibala birungi." 
Matthew7:19 Buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gutemebwa, ne gukanyugwa mu muliro." 
Matthew7:20 Bwe kityo nno, ku bibala byabwe kwe mulibategeerera." 
Matthew7:21 “Si buli muntu aŋŋamba nti: ‘Mukama, Mukama,’ y'aliyingira mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu, wabula oyo akola Kitange ali mu ggulu ky'ayagala." 
Matthew7:22 “Ku lunaku luli, bangi baliŋŋamba nti: ‘Mukama, Mukama, tetwalanganga mu linnya lyo, tetwagobanga emyoyo emibi mu linnya lyo, tetwakolanga ebikolwa eby'amaanyi bingi mu linnya lyo?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ndibaatulira nti: ‘Sibamanyangako n'akamu; munnyamuke mmwe abakola ebibi.’ 
Matthew7:24 “Buli awulira ebigambo byange bino n'abissa mu nkola, alifaanaanyirizibwa omuntu omugezi eyazimba ennyumba ye ku lwazi;" 
Matthew7:25 enkuba yafukumuka, mukoka n'ajja, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne byebundula ku nnyumba eyo, sso n'etegwa, kubanga yali ezimbiddwa ku lwazi." 
Matthew7:26 “Ate buli awulira ebigambo byange bino n'atabissa mu nkola, alifaanaanyirizibwa omuntu omusiru eyazimba ennyumba ye ku musenyu;" 
Matthew7:27 enkuba yafukumuka, mukoka n'ajja, kibuyaga n'akunta, ne byebundula ku nnyumba eyo, n'egwa, ate ekigwo kyayo ne kiba kinene.”" 
Matthew7:28 Yezu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, ebibiina ne biwuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye," 
Matthew7:29 kubanga yali abayigiriza ng'alina obuyinza, sso si ng'abawandiisi baabwe." 
Matthew8:1 Awo Yezu bwe yava ku lusozi, ebibiina bingi ne bimugoberera." 
Matthew8:2 Omusajja omugenge n'ajja gy'ali, n'amuvunnamira ng'agamba nti: “Mukama, bw'oyagala, osobola okunnongoosa.”" 
Matthew8:3 N'agolola omukono gwe, n'amukwatako, n'agamba nti: “Njagala, longooka.” Amangu ago ekigenge kye ne kirongooka." 
Matthew8:4 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Laba nti tobaako gw'obuulira; wabula genda weeyoleke ewa kabona, oweeyo ekitone Musa kye yalagira, ng'obukakafu gye bali.”" 
Matthew8:5 Bwe yali ayingira mu Kafarunawumu, senturiyo omu n'ajja gy'ali, n'amwegayirira" 
Matthew8:6 ng'agamba nti: “Mukama, omuweereza wange eka akonzibidde wansi, alumizibwa ekiyitiridde.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Kale, ka nzije ntuukeyo, mmuwonye.”" 
Matthew8:8 Senturiyo n'addamu n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, sisaanidde ggwe kuyingira mu nnyumba yange, wabula yogera bwogezi kigambo, omuweereza wange anaawona," 
Matthew8:9 kubanga nange ndi muntu mutwalibwa, nnina n'abaserikale be ntwala. Bwe ŋŋamba omu nti: ‘Genda,’ ng'agenda; n'omulala nti: ‘Jjangu,’ ng'ajja; n'omuddu wange nti: ‘Kino kikole’ ng'akikola.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yezu bwe yawulira ebyo, ne yeewuunya, n'agamba abaali bamugoberera nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti yadde mu Yisirayeli, sinnasanga kukkiriza kuli ng'okwo." 
Matthew8:11 Ka mbabuulire: Bangi baliva ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba ne batuula wamu ne Yiburayimu, Yizaake ne Yakobo mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu;" 
Matthew8:12 bo abaana b'obwakabaka ne bagoberwa ebweru mu nzikiza omuliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.” 
Matthew8:13 Yezu n'agamba senturiyo nti: “Genda, kikukolerwe nga bw'okkiriza.” Mu kaseera ako kennyini omuweereza n'awona." 
Matthew8:14 Yezu bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Petero, n'alaba nnyina mukazi we ng'agalamidde wansi alina omusujja;" 
Matthew8:15 n'amukwata ku mukono, omusujja ne gumuta; n'agolokoka n'amuweereza." 
Matthew8:16 Obudde nga buwungedde, ne bamuleetera bangi abakwatiddwa emyoyo emibi; emyoyo n'agigoba na kigambo bugambo, n'awonya bonna abaali abalwadde." 
Matthew8:17 Yisaaya omulanzi kye yayogera kituukirire nti: “Yatwala obuyongobevu bwaffe, ne yeetikka endwadde zaffe.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yezu bwe yalaba ebibiina ebinene ebimwebunguludde, n'alagira baveewo bagende emitala." 
Matthew8:19 Awo omuwandiisi omu n'asembera, n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, nzija kukugobereranga yonna gy'onoogendanga.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ebibe birina ebinnya n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga birina ebisu byabyo, naye Omwana w'Omuntu talina w'awunzika mutwe.”" 
Matthew8:21 Omulala mu bayigirizwa be n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, nzikiriza nsooke ŋŋende nziike kitange.”" 
Matthew8:22 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ngoberera; leka abafu baziike abafu baabwe.” 
Matthew8:23 Awo n'asaabala mu lyato, abayigirizwa be ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew8:24 Awo omuyaga mungi ne gusituka ku nnyanja, ng'eryato amayengo galibuutikira. Ye yali yeebase." 
Matthew8:25 Ne basembera w'ali ne bamuzuukusa, nga bagamba nti: “Mukama, tuwonye; tusaanawo.”" 
Matthew8:26 N'abagamba nti: “Mutya biki, mmwe ab'okukkiriza okutono?” N'agolokoka, omuyaga n'ennyanja n'abikomako; ne guba mulaala nnyo." 
Matthew8:27 Abantu ne beewuunya nga bagamba nti: “Muntu wa kika ki ono okuba nti omuyaga n'ennyanja bimuwulira?” 
Matthew8:28 Bwe yatuuka emitala mu nsi y'Abagadara, abantu babiri abakwatiddwa emyoyo emibi ne bajja okumusisinkana nga bava mu biggya; baali bakambwe nnyo nga tewali na muntu ayinza kusala kkubo eryo." 
Matthew8:29 Ne bawowoggana nga bagamba nti: “Otwagaza ki ggwe, Omwana wa Katonda? Ozze wano okutubonyaabonya ng'obudde tebunnatuuka?”" 
Matthew8:30 Kati nno waaliwo eggana ly'embizzi nnyingi nga lirya ewalako okuva we baali. 
Matthew8:31 Emyoyo emibi ne gimusaba nti: “Bw'otugobamu, tusindike mu ggana ly'embizzi.”" 
Matthew8:32 N'agigamba nti: “Mugende.” Ne gibamaamukako, ne gyefubitika mu mbizzi. Awo eggana lyonna ne lifubutuka okuva waggulu ku bbanga, ne lyesolessa mu nnyanja, ne lifiira mu mazzi." 
Matthew8:33 Abaali bazirunda ne badduka, ne bagenda mu kibuga, ne banyumya byonna, n'ebya bali abaali bakwatiddwa emyoyo emibi." 
Matthew8:34 Awo ekibuga kyonna ne kifuluma okusisinkana Yezu. Bwe baamulaba, ne bamwegayirira ave mu kitundu kyabwe." 
Matthew9:1 Bwe yasaabala eryato n'awunguka, n'atuuka mu kibuga kyabowo." 
Matthew9:2 Awo ne bamuleetera omulwadde akonzibye nga bamugalamizza ku lunnyo. Yezu bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe, n'agamba akonzibye nti: “Guma, mwana wange; ebibi byo bisonyiyiddwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Awo abamu ku bawandiisi ne bagamba munda yaabwe nti: “Ono avuma Katonda.” 
Matthew9:4 Yezu bwe yalaba bye balowooza, n'agamba nti: “Mulowooleza ki obubi mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Matthew9:5 Ekisinga obwangu kiruwa, okugamba nti: ‘Ebibi byo bisonyiyiddwa,’ nandiki okugamba nti: ‘Situka otambule?’" 
Matthew9:6 Kale mmwe okumanya ng'Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi obw'okusonyiwa ebibi,” - awo n'agamba akonzimbye nti: “Situka, kwata olunnyo lwo ogende ewammwe.”" 
Matthew9:7 N'asituka n'agenda ewaabwe. 
Matthew9:8 Ebibiina bwe byalaba, ne bitya, ne bigulumiza Katonda eyawa abantu obuyinza obwenkana awo." 
Matthew9:9 Yezu bwe yali ayita ng'ava eyo, n'alaba omusajja ng'atudde mu ggwoolezo, erinnya lye ye Matayo, n'amugamba nti: “Ngoberera.” N'asituka, n'amugoberera." 
Matthew9:10 Bwe yali mu nnyumba ng'atudde ku lujjuliro okulya, abasolooza b'omusolo bangi n'aboonoonyi ne bajja ne batuula wamu ne Yezu n'abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarisaayo bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Omuyigiriza wammwe lwaki alya n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yezu bwe yawulira, n'agamba nti: “Abalamu si be beetaaga omusawo, wabula abalwadde." 
Matthew9:13 Kale mugende muyige kino kye kitegeeza, nti: ‘Njagala kisa sso si kitambiro.’ Abatuukirivu si be najja okuyita, wabula aboonoonyi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Abayigirizwa ba Yowanna ne bajja gy'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki ffe n'Abafarisaayo tusiiba, sso ng'abayigirizwa bo tebasiiba?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ddala abagenyi ku mbaga y'obugole bayinza okukungubaga ng'awasizza akyali nabo? Ennaku zirituuka, awasizza n'abaggyibwako, olwo balisiiba." 
Matthew9:16 Mpaawo assa kiwero kiggya ku kyambalo kikadde; kubanga ekiraka kyeyuza ku kyambalo, okuyulika ne kweyongera bweyongezi." 
Matthew9:17 N'evviini ensu tefukibwa mu nsawo nkadde; bwe bakola batyo, ensawo tezirema kutulika, evviini n'eyiika n'ensawo ne zoonooneka. Evviini ensu efukibwa mu nsawo mpya; byombi lwe bikuumibwa obulungi.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yezu yali akyayogera nabo ebigambo ebyo, ne wajjawo omukungu, n'amuvunnamira, n'agamba nti: “Muwala wange yaakakutuka; naye jjangu omusseeko omukono gwo, alamuke.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yezu n'asituka n'agenda naye wamu n'abayigirizwa be. 
Matthew9:20 Awo omukazi eyali alwadde ekikulukuto ekya ggerenge okumala emyaka kkumi n'ebiri, n'afuluma emabega, n'akwata ku mukugiro gw'ekyambalo kye," 
Matthew9:21 kubanga yali agamba mu mwoyo gwe nti: “Ne bwe nnaakoma obukomi ku kyambalo kye, nzija kuwona.”" 
Matthew9:22 Yezu n'akebuka, n'amulaba, n'amugamba nti: “Guma, muwala, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” Omukazi n'awona mu kaseera ako." 
Matthew9:23 Yezu bwe yatuuka mu nnyumba y'omukungu, n'alaba abafuuwa emirere n'ekibiina nga kiyogaana, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew9:24 “Muveewo, omuwala tafudde, yeebase bwebasi.” Ne bamusekerera." 
Matthew9:25 Ekibiina bwe kyamala okugobebwawo, n'ayingira, n'amukwata omukono, omuwala n'ayimirira." 
Matthew9:26 Amawulire ne gabuna mu nsi eyo yonna. 
Matthew9:27 Bwe yali ayita ng'ava eyo, bamuzibe babiri ne bamugoberera nga bakoowoola nti: “Tusaasire, Omwana wa Dawudi.”" 
Matthew9:28 Bwe yatuuka eka, bamuzibe ne basembera w'ali. Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mukkiriza nga kino nnyinza okukikola?” Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Yee, Mukama.”" 
Matthew9:29 Awo n'akwata ku maaso gaabwe, n'agamba nti: “Kale, kibakolerwe nga bwe mukkiriza.”" 
Matthew9:30 Amaaso gaabwe ne gazibuka. Yezu n'abakuutira ng'agamba nti: “Mulabe nga tewaba kino akimanyaako.” 
Matthew9:31 Naye bo olwafuluma, ne bamulaalaasa mu nsi eyo yonna." 
Matthew9:32 Bwe baali bafuluma, ne bamuleetera omuntu kasiru akwatiddwa omwoyo omubi." 
Matthew9:33 Omwoyo omubi bwe gwamala okugobwamu, kasiru n'ayogera; ekibiina ne kyewuunya, abantu ne bagamba nti: “Ekifaanana kiti tekirabikangako mu Yisirayeli.”" 
Matthew9:34 Naye Abafarisaayo bo ne bagamba nti: “Emyoyo emibi agigoba ku bwa mukulu w'emyoyo emibi.” 
Matthew9:35 Awo Yezu ne yeetooloola ebibuga byonna n'ebyalo, ng'ayigiriza mu sinaagooga zaabwe, era ng'alangirira Evangili y'obwakabaka, era ng'awonya buli bulwadde na buli buyongobevu bwonna." 
Matthew9:36 Naye bwe yalaba ebibiina by'abantu, ne bamukwasa ekisa, kubanga baali bakabiriddwa nga basaasaanye ng'endiga ezitaliiko musumba." 
Matthew9:37 Awo n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Amakungula mangi, naye abakozi batono." 
Matthew9:38 Mwegayirire nno Omukama nnannyini makungula asindike abakozi mu makungula ge.” 
Matthew10:1 Awo n'ayita abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri, n'abawa obuyinza ku myoyo emigwagwa, bagigobe era bawonye buli bulwadde na buli buyongobevu." 
Matthew10:2 Amannya g'Abatume ekkumi n'ababiri ge gano: Omubereberye Simoni, ayitibwa Petero, ne Andureya muganda we; Yakobo mutabani wa Zebedaayo ne Yowanna muganda we;" 
Matthew10:3 Filippo ne Barutolomaawo; Toma ne Matayo omusolooza w'omusolo; Yakobo mutabani wa Alufayo ne Taddewo; 
Matthew10:4 Simoni Omukanaani ne Yuda Yisikariyoti eyamulyamu olukwe. 
Matthew10:5 Ekkumi n'ababiri bano Yezu yabatuma, n'abalagira nti: “Temukwata makubo gagenda mu b'amawanga, temuyingira mu bibuga bya Basamariya;" 
Matthew10:6 wabula mugende eri endiga ezaabula ez'omu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli. 
Matthew10:7 Bwe mugenda, mulangirire nga mugamba nti: ‘Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu busembedde.’" 
Matthew10:8 Abalwadde mubawonye, abafu mubazuukize, abagenge mubalongoose, emyoyo emibi mugigobe; mwaweebwa buweebwa, nammwe muwe buwi." 
Matthew10:9 “Temubeera na zaabu newandibadde ffeeza, newandibadde ensimbi ez'ekikomo mu misipi gyammwe;" 
Matthew10:10 newandibadde ensawo ey'entanda, newandibadde ekkanzu ebbiri, newandibadde engatto, newandibadde omuggo, kubanga omukozi asaanira okuweebwa ekyokulya." 
Matthew10:11 “Buli kibuga na buli kyalo kye muyingiramu, mubuuze ani alimu asaanye, awo we muba musula okutuusa lwe muvaayo." 
Matthew10:12 Nga muyingira mu nnyumba eyo, mulamusenga abalimu." 
Matthew10:13 Ennyumba eyo bw'eneebanga esaanidde, omukisa gwammwe gugijjengako; naye bw'eneebanga tesaanidde, omukisa gwammwe gubaddirenga." 
Matthew10:14 “Yenna ataabaanirize oba okukkiriza ebigambo byammwe, bwe mubanga muva mu nnyumba eyo oba mu kibuga ekyo, mukunkumulanga enfuufu y'ebigere byammwe." 
Matthew10:15 Ka mbabuulire, ekirituukirira ensi y'e Sodoma n'ey'e Gomorra ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa kiriba kigumiikirizika okusinga ekirituukirira ekibuga ekyo." 
Matthew10:16 “Wuuno nze mbatumye kyenkana ng'endiga mu misege wakati; awo nno mubeere balabufu ng'emisota, ate nga temuliiko kibavunaanibwa ng'enjiibwa." 
Matthew10:17 “Mwerinde abantu; kubanga balibawaayo mu nkiiko, era banaabaswanyuliranga mu sinaagooga zaabwe;" 
Matthew10:18 mulitwalibwa mu maaso g'abaamasaza n'aga bakabaka okubeera nze, okujulira gye bali n'eri ab'amawanga." 
Matthew10:19 Bwe babawangayo, temweraliikiriranga bwe munaayogera oba kye munaagamba; kye munaayogeranga kiribaweebwanga mu kabanga ako." 
Matthew10:20 Kubanga si mmwe munaabanga mwogera, wabula Mwoyo wa Kitammwe y'anaayogeranga mu mmwe." 
Matthew10:21 “Ow'oluganda aliwaayo muganda we okuttibwa, ne kitaawe w'omwana omwana we; abaana balisitukira mu babazaala ne babawaayo battibwe." 
Matthew10:22 Mulikyayibwa mwenna olw'okubeera erinnya lyange. Naye aligumiikiriza okutuusa ku nkomerero, y'alirokoka." 
Matthew10:23 Bwe babayigganyanga mu kibuga ekimu, muddukiranga mu kirala. Kubanga nze mbagambira ddala nti temulibuna byalo bya nsi ya Yisirayeli ng'Omwana w'Omuntu tannajja." 
Matthew10:24 “Omuyigirizwa takira muyigiriza, n'omuweereza takira mukama we." 
Matthew10:25 Kimala kasita omuyigirizwa abeera ng'omuyigiriza we, n'omuweereza nga mukama we. Kale obanga nnannyinimu bamuyise Beelizebuli, tebaasinzeewo bye banaayita ab'omu maka ge?" 
Matthew10:26 “Awo nno temubatya; kubanga tewali kibikkiddwa kitalibikkulibwa; tewali kikisiddwa kitalimanyibwa. 
Matthew10:27 Kye mbagamba mu nzikiza, mukyogeranga mu kitangaala; ate kye muwulira mu kaama mukirangiriranga ku ntikko z'ennyumba." 
Matthew10:28 Temutyanga abo abatta omubiri obubiri, naye nga tebayinza kutta mwoyo; wabula mutyenga oyo asobola okuzikiriza omwoyo n'omubiri mu Geyenna." 
Matthew10:29 “Kale enkazaluggya ebbiri tezitundibwa ssente emu? Sso ku ezo tewali egwa ku ttaka nga Kitammwe tayagadde. 
Matthew10:30 N'enviiri zennyini ku mitwe gyammwe mbale. 
Matthew10:31 Awo nno temutya; muli ba muwendo okusinga enkazaluggya enkumu. 
Matthew10:32 “Buli alinjatula mu maaso g'abantu, nange ndimwatula mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew10:33 Naye alinneegaana mu maaso g'abantu nange ndimwegaana mu maaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu. 
Matthew10:34 “Temulowooza nga najja kuleeta mirembe ku nsi; sajja kuleeta mirembe, wabula ekitala." 
Matthew10:35 Anti najja okukyawaganya omuntu ne kitaawe, omuwala ne nnyina, mukaamwana ne nnyazaala we;" 
Matthew10:36 oli abalabe be baliba abo ab'omu maka ge. 
Matthew10:37 “Ayagala kitaawe ne nnyina okusinga nze, tansaanidde; n'ayagala mutabani we oba muwala we okusinga nze, tansaanidde." 
Matthew10:38 N'oli atakwata musaalaba gwe n'angoberera, tansaanidde." 
Matthew10:39 Asanga obulamu bwe, alibubuza, naye oli abubuza okubeera nze, alibusanga." 
Matthew10:40 “Abaaniriza ng'ayanirizza nze; ate ayaniriza nze ng'ayanirizza Oli eyantuma. 
Matthew10:41 Ayaniriza omulanzi kubanga mulanzi, alifuna ku mpeera y'obulanzi; n'oli ayaniriza omutuukirivu olw'obutuukirivu bwe, alifuna ku mpeera ey'omutuukirivu;" 
Matthew10:42 na buli omu aliwa omu ku bato abo ekikopo ky'amazzi amannyogovu ku lw'okuba nti muyigirizwa, mazima ka mbabuulire, talibulwa mpeera ye.”" 
Matthew11:1 Awo Yezu bwe yamala okukuutira abayigirizwa be ekkumi n'ababiri, n'avaayo, n'agenda okusomesa n'okuyigiriza mu bibuga byabwe." 
Matthew11:2 Yowanna bwe yali mu kkomera, n'awulira Kristu by'akola; n'ayita mu bayigirizwa be be yatuma" 
Matthew11:3 n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe wuuyo ow'okujja, nandiki tulindirireyo omulala?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yezu n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Muddeeyo mubuulire Yowanna bye muwulira ne bye mulaba: 
Matthew11:5 Bamuzibe baddamu okulaba, abalema batambula, abagenge balongoosebwa, abaggavu b'amatu bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa n'abaavu babuulirwa amawulire amalungi." 
Matthew11:6 Yeesiimye oyo atanneesittalako.” 
Matthew11:7 Awo bwe baali bagenda, Yezu n'asooka okugamba abantu ku Yowanna nti: “Mwagenda mu ddungu kulaba ki? Olumuli oluyuuyuzibwa empewo?" 
Matthew11:8 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Omuntu ayambadde ebitonnya? Mbadde abayambala ebitonnya baba mu nnyumba za bakabaka. 
Matthew11:9 Awo nno mwagenda kulaba ki? Mulanzi? Weewaawo! Ka mbabuulire, n'okusinga asinga omulanzi." 
Matthew11:10 Ye wuuyo eyawandiikibwako nti: “ ‘Laba, ntuma omubaka wange mu maaso go, anaakutegekera ekkubo lyo mu maaso go.’" 
Matthew11:11 Mazima, mbagamba nti mu baali bazaaliddwa abakazi temusibukangamu akira Yowanna Batista; kyokka asinga obutene mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu amukira." 
Matthew11:12 Okuva mu biro bya Yowanna Batista okutuusa kati, obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bukwasiddwa na lyanyi, era ab'eryanyi babutwala na lyanyi." 
Matthew11:13 Anti abalanzi bonna n'Amateeka okutuusiza ddala ku Yowanna baalanganga; 
Matthew11:14 oba mwagala okukikkiriza, oyo ye Eliya ow'okujja." 
Matthew11:15 Alina amatu, awulire.”" 
Matthew11:16 “Naye ezzadde lino nnaaligeranya ku ki? Liri ng'abaana abato abatudde mu mbuga abalaamiriza bali abalala nga bagamba nti: 
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Twabafuuyira endere, naye temwazina; twabakubira ebiwoobe, naye temwakaaba.’" 
Matthew11:18 Kubanga Yowanna yajja nga talya, nga tanywa, ne bagamba nti: ‘Alimu omwoyo omubi;’" 
Matthew11:19 Omwana w'Omuntu n'ajja ng'alya era ng'anywa, ne bagamba nti: ‘Mulabe omuntu ono, wa mulugube, mutamiivu, mukwano gwa basolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi!’ Kyokka amagezi ebikolwa byago bye bigejjeereza.”" 
Matthew11:20 Awo n'asooka okukolimira ebibuga omwakolerwa ebikolwa bye ebingi eby'amaanyi kubanga byagaana okwenenya: 
Matthew11:21 “Zikusanze ggwe Korazini! Zikusanze ggwe Betisayida! Kubanga ebikolwa eby'amaanyi ebyakolerwa mu mmwe singa byali bikoleddwa mu Tiiro ne mu Sidoni, singa baabonerera dda mu bikutiya ne mu vvu." 
Matthew11:22 Naye mbagamba nti ekirituukirira ensi ya Tiiro ne Sidoni ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa, kiriba kigumiikirizika okusinga ekiribatuukirira." 
Matthew11:23 Ate ggwe Kafarunawumu, oligulumizibwa kutuuka ku ggulu? Ojja kussibwa okutuuka wansi mu magombe. Kubanga ebikolwa eby'amaanyi ebyakolerwa mu ggwe singa byakolerwa mu Sodoma, singa kikyaliwo n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Matthew11:24 Ka mbabuulire, ekirituukirira ensi y'e Sodoma ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa, kiriba kigumiikirizika okusinga ekirikutuukirira.”" 
Matthew11:25 Mu kaseera ako, Yezu n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Taata, Omukama w'eggulu n'ensi, nkutendereza, kubanga ebyo wabikisa abagezi n'abategeevu, n'obibikkulira abato." 
Matthew11:26 Weewaawo, Taata, bw'otyo bwe wasiima." 
Matthew11:27 Byonna Taata yabinkwasa; tewali amanyi Mwana wabula Taata; ne Taata tewali amumanyi, wabula Mwana n'oyo Mwana gw'aba ayagadde okumumanyisaako." 
Matthew11:28 “Mujje gye ndi mmwe mwenna abategana n'abazitoowereddwa, nzija kubawa ekiwummulo." 
Matthew11:29 Mwetikke ekikoligo kyange era munjigireko, kubanga ndi muteefu era mwetoowaze mu mutima, olwo mulyezuulira ekiwummulo," 
Matthew11:30 kubanga ekikoligo kyange kyangu, n'omugugu gwange muwewufu.”" 
Matthew12:1 Awo mu budde obwo, Yezu yayita mu nnimiro z'eŋŋano ku Sabbaato; abayigirizwa be enjala yali ebaluma, ne batandika okunuula ebirimba by'eŋŋano nga balya." 
Matthew12:2 Abafarisaayo bwe baabalaba, ne bamugamba nti: “Laba, abayigirizwa bo bakola ekitakkirizibwa kukola ku Sabbaato.”" 
Matthew12:3 N'abagamba nti: “Temusomanga Dawudi kye yakola, bwe yalumwa enjala, ye n'abaali naye," 
Matthew12:4 nga bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda, n'alya Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa egyali gimuzira okulya, ye n'abaali naye, wabula bakabona bokka?" 
Matthew12:5 Oba temusomanga mu tteeka nga ku Sabbaato bakabona mu Kiggwa boonoona Sabbaato ne bataba na musango? 
Matthew12:6 Ka mbabuulire, wano waliwo n'akira Ekiggwa ekitiibwa." 
Matthew12:7 Naye muba kumanya kino kye kitegeeza, nti: ‘Njagala kisa sso si kitambiro,’ temwandinenyezza bataliiko musango," 
Matthew12:8 kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu ye mukama wa Sabbaato.” 
Matthew12:9 Awo Yezu n'ava awo, n'ayingira mu sinaagooga yaabwe." 
Matthew12:10 Mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono omukalu. Ne bamubuuza nti: “Kisaanye okuwonya ku Sabbaato?”, balyoke bamuwawaabire." 
Matthew12:11 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Ani muntu mu mmwe abeera n'endiga n'egwa mu bunnya ku Sabbaato, atagikwata n'agiggyamu?" 
Matthew12:12 Omuntu ng'asingira wala endiga omuwendo! Awo nno kisaanye okukolera obulungi ku Sabbaato.” 
Matthew12:13 Awo n'agamba omusajja nti: “Golola omukono gwo.” N'agugolola; ne guddirawo ddala, gwonna omulamba ng'omulala." 
Matthew12:14 Abafarisaayo ne bafuluma, ne bagenda ne bamuteesaako nga bwe banaamuzikiriza." 
Matthew12:15 Yezu bwe yakimanya, n'avaawo. Bangi ne bamugoberera, n'abawonya bonna." 
Matthew12:16 N'abakomako obutamwatuukiriza. 
Matthew12:17 Yisaaya omulanzi kye yalanga kituukirire nti: 
Matthew12:18 “Wuuno omuweereza wange gwe nalonda, omwagalwa wange, omwoyo gwange gwe gwesiimiramu. Ndimussaako Mwoyo wange, alibuulira amawanga obutuukirivu." 
Matthew12:19 Talikaayana wadde okuleekaana, era tewaliba awulira ddoboozi lye mu nguudo;" 
Matthew12:20 olumuli olumenyese talirukutula, n'enfuuzi enyooka taligizikiza, okutuusa lw'alituusa obutuukirivu ku buwanguzi;" 
Matthew12:21 n'amawanga mu linnya lye mwe galisuubirira.” 
Matthew12:22 Awo ne bamuleetera omuntu akwatiddwa omwoyo omubi, nga muzibe wa maaso ate nga kasiru, n'amuwonya, kasiru n'asobola okwogera n'okulaba n'alaba." 
Matthew12:23 Abantu bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono teyandiba Omwana wa Dawudi?”" 
Matthew12:24 Naye Abafarisaayo bwe baakiwulira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono emyoyo emibi tagigoba ku bwa mulala, okuggyako Beelizebuli, omukulu w'emyoyo emibi.”" 
Matthew12:25 Bwe yamanya bye balowooza, n'abagamba nti: “Buli bwakabaka obwetemamu bwa kuzikirira; tewali kibuga oba ennyumba ebyetemamu bijja kunywera." 
Matthew12:26 Oba Sitaani agoba Sitaani, awo nno yeetemyemu; obwakabaka bwe bunaanywera butya?" 
Matthew12:27 Oba nze ngoba emyoyo emibi ku bwa Beelizebuli, abaana bammwe bagigoba ku bw'ani? Olwekyo kyebaliva babeera abalamuzi bammwe." 
Matthew12:28 Naye obanga ngoba emyoyo emibi ku lwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, awo nno obwakabaka bwa Katonda bubatuuseeko." 
Matthew12:29 Oba omuntu ayinza atya okuyingira mu nnyumba y'omuntu ow'amaanyi n'anyaga ebibye, wabula ng'asoose okusiba ow'amaanyi? Olwo anaasobola okunyagulula ennyumba ye." 
Matthew12:30 Ataba nange, aba mulabe wange; atakuŋŋaanya nange, asaasaanya." 
Matthew12:31 Ka mbabuulire, Buli kibi na buli kuvuma Katonda birisonyiyibwa, naye alivuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, talisonyiyibwa." 
Matthew12:32 Na buli muntu alyogera ekigambo ku Mwana w'Omuntu, kirimusonyiyibwa, naye alyogera ku Mwoyo Mutuukirivu talisonyiyibwa, kibeere mu mirembe gino oba mu mirembe egirijja." 
Matthew12:33 “Omuti mugukole nga mulungi, n'ekibala kyagwo kiba kirungi; omuti mugukole nga mubi, n'ekibala kyagwo kiba kibi; kubanga omuti gutegeererwa ku kibala kyagwo." 
Matthew12:34 Mmwe ezzadde ly'amasalambwa, muyinza mutya okwogera obulungi sso nga muli babi? Anti ku bijjudde mu mutima akamwa kwe kaggya bye koogera." 
Matthew12:35 Omuntu omulungi, ku birungi by'aterese kw'atoola ebirungi. N'omuntu omubi, ku bibi by'aterese kw'atoola ebibi." 
Matthew12:36 “Ka mbabuulire, ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa abantu balibitebya olwa buli kigambo ekyensumattu kye boogera," 
Matthew12:37 kubanga olyejjeerezebwa okusinziira ku bigambo byo, oba olisalirwa omusango okukusinga okusinziira ku bigambo byo.”" 
Matthew12:38 Awo abamu ku bawandiisi ne ku Bafarisaayo ne bamuddamu nga bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, twagala okulaba akabonero okuva gy'oli.”" 
Matthew12:39 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Ezzadde ebbi era esseegu lisaba akabonero; naye tewali kabonero kajja kuliweebwa, wabula akabonero ka Yona omulanzi," 
Matthew12:40 kubanga nga Yona bwe yabeera mu lubuto lw'ekyennyanja ekinene ennaku essatu n'ebiro bisatu, n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliba atyo wansi mu ttaka ennaku essatu n'ebiro ebisatu." 
Matthew12:41 “Ab'e Nineve ku kulamulibwa balisituka ne basalira ezzadde lino omusango okulisinga, kubanga bo baabonerera nga Yona ababuulidde; sso nga wano waliwo asinga Yona." 
Matthew12:42 Nnaabakyala ow'emaserengeta ku kulamulibwa alisituka wamu n'abantu b'ezzadde lino, n'abasalira omusango okubasinga, kubanga yava ku nkingi z'ensi okuwulira amagezi ga Solomoni, sso nga wano waliwo akira Solomoni." 
Matthew12:43 “Omwoyo omugwagwa bwe guva mu muntu, gutambulatambula mu bifo ebikalukalu, nga gunoonya we gunaawummulira, naye ne gubulwa." 
Matthew12:44 Awo ne gugamba nti: ‘Nzija kudda mu nnyumba yange mwe nava.’ Bwe gujja, gugisanga nga njereere, eyereddwa, etereezeddwa." 
Matthew12:45 Awo ne gugenda guleeta emyoyo emirala musanvu egigukira obubi, ne giyingira ne gisula omwo. Awo embeera y'omuntu ey'oluvannyuma n'eba mbi okukira ey'olubereberye. Bwe kityo bwe kiriba ne ku zzadde lino ebbi.”" 
Matthew12:46 Yali akyayogera eri ebibiina, nnyina ne baganda be ne bayimirira ebweru nga baagala okwogera naye." 
Matthew12:47 Awo oli n'amugamba nti: “Nnyoko ne baganda bo bayimiridde wabweru baagala okwogera naawe.” 
Matthew12:48 Eyali amugambye n'amwanukula nti: “Mmange ate ye ani, ne baganda bange be baani?”" 
Matthew12:49 Awo n'agololera omukono gwe eri abayigirizwa be, n'agamba nti: “Bano ye mmange, be baganda bange," 
Matthew12:50 kubanga buli alikola Kitange ali mu ggulu ky'ayagala, ye muganda wange, ye mwannyinaze, ye mmange.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ku lunaku olwo Yezu yava mu nnyumba, n'agenda n'atuula ku mabbali g'ennyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Ebibiina binene ne bimukuŋŋaanirako, ye kwe kusaabala mu lyato n'atuula omwo, ekibiina kyonna ne kiyimirira ku lubalama," 
Matthew13:3 n'ababuulira bingi mu ngero; n'agamba nti: “Omusizi yafuluma okusiga ensigo. 
Matthew13:4 Yali asiga, ensigo ezimu ne zigwa ku kkubo, ebinyonyi by'omu bbanga ne bijja ne bizirya." 
Matthew13:5 Endala ne zigwa ku luyinjayinja we zitaalina ttaka lingi; amangu ago ne zimera, kubanga tezaalina ttaka ggwanvu;" 
Matthew13:6 enjuba bwe yavaayo, ne ziwotoka; olw'obutaba na mirandira, ne zikala." 
Matthew13:7 Endala ne zigwa mu maggwa; amaggwa ne gaduuma, ne gazifuuwa." 
Matthew13:8 Endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eddungi, ne zissaako ebirimba: ekimu nga kirimu kikumi, ekirala nkaaga n'ekirala asatu." 
Matthew13:9 Alina amatu awulire.” 
Matthew13:10 Awo abayigirizwa be ne basembera w'ali, ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki oyogera nabo mu ngero?”" 
Matthew13:11 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Mmwe mwaweebwa okumanya ebyama by'obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu; naye bali tekyabaweebwa," 
Matthew13:12 kubanga buli alina alyongerwako n'aba na biyitirivu; naye atalina, ne ky'alina kirimuggyibwako." 
Matthew13:13 Kyenva njogera nabo mu ngero, kubanga balaba, naye tebalaba; bawulira, naye tebawulira wadde okutegeera." 
Matthew13:14 Yisaaya kye yalanga kituukiridde bulungi ku bo, bwe yagamba nti: “ ‘Okuwulira muliwulira, naye temulitegeera; n'okulaba muliraba, naye temulyetegereza;" 
Matthew13:15 kubanga omutima gw'abantu bano gugubye, n'amatu gaabwe gazibuwaliddwa okuwulira, n'amaaso gaabwe bagazibirizza; baleme kulaba n'amaaso gaabwe, na kuwulira n'amatu gaabwe, baleme na kutegeera na mutima gwabwe, ne badda ne mbawonya.’" 
Matthew13:16 Naye amaaso agammwe geesiimye kubanga galaba, n'amatu gammwe kubanga gawulira." 
Matthew13:17 Mazima mbagamba nti bangi abalanzi n'abantu abatuukirivu beegomba okulaba bye mulaba ne batabiraba, n'okuwulira bye muwulira ne batabiwulira." 
Matthew13:18 Kale nno mmwe muwulire olugero lw'omusizi: 
Matthew13:19 “Buli awulira ekigambo ky'obwakabaka n'atakitegeera, omubi ajja n'akwakkula ekisigiddwa mu mutima gwe; oyo ye nsigo eyagwa ku kkubo." 
Matthew13:20 Naye eyasigibwa mu luyinjayinja; y'oyo awulira ekigambo n'akikkiriza mangu n'essanyu," 
Matthew13:21 kyokka talina mu ye mirandira, abeerawo akabanga katono; naye bwe wagwawo ennaku n'okuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo, yeesittala mangu." 
Matthew13:22 Ate eyasigibwa mu maggwa, y'oyo awulira ekigambo, naye nno okweraliikirira okw'ensi n'okuguya okw'obugagga, bituga ekigambo ne kitabala." 
Matthew13:23 Eyasigibwa mu ttaka eddungi, y'oyo awulira ekigambo n'akitegeera; oyo nno abalira ddala ebibala, n'aleeta mu kimu kikumi, ne mu kirala nkaaga, ne mu kirala amakumi asatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 N'abaleetera n'olugero olulala: n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaananyirizibwa omuntu eyasiga ensigo ennungi mu nnimiro ye. 
Matthew13:25 Abantu bwe baali beebase, omulabe we n'ajja, n'amansa zizaniya mu ŋŋano, n'agenda." 
Matthew13:26 Eŋŋano bwe yagenda ekula, ng'essizzaako n'ebirimba, zizaniya nayo n'erabika." 
Matthew13:27 Abaweereza ba nnannyinimu ne bajja, ne bamugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, mu nnimiro tewasigamu nsigo nnungi, ate erina etya zizaniya?’" 
Matthew13:28 Ye n'abagamba nti: ‘Omulabe ye yakola ekyo.’ Abaweereza ne bamugamba nti: ‘Oyagala tugende tugikuŋŋaanyeemu?’ 
Matthew13:29 Ye n'agamba nti: ‘Nedda; kubanga mu kukuŋŋaanyaamu zizaniya, mwandikuuliramu n'eŋŋano." 
Matthew13:30 Muleke byombi bikulire wamu okutuusa ku makungula. Kale nno ku makungula, ndigamba abakunguzi nti: “Musooke mukuŋŋaanyeemu zizaniya, mugisibe ebinywa, egende eyokebwe; yo eŋŋano mugikuŋŋaanyize mu byagi byange.” ’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 N'abaleetera n'olugero olulala, n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'empeke ya kaladaali, omuntu gye yaddira n'agisiga mu nnimiro ye." 
Matthew13:32 Weewaawo ntono okusinga ensigo zonna, naye bw'ekula eba mpanvu okusinga emiddo gyonna, efuuka muti, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga ne bijja ne bisula mu matabi gaagwo.”" 
Matthew13:33 N'abaleetera n'olugero olulala nti: “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'ekizimbulukusa omukazi kye yaddira n'akitabula mu bipimo by'obutta bisatu, okutuusa bwonna lwe bwazimbulukuka.”" 
Matthew13:34 Ebyo byonna Yezu yabibuulira ebibiina mu ngero; teyabagambanga kintu wabula mu ngero. 
Matthew13:35 Omulanzi kye yayogera kituukirire nti: “Nzija kwasamya akamwa kange mu ngero; ndyatula ebyakisibwa okuva ensi lwe yabangibwawo.” 
Matthew13:36 Awo Yezu n'asiibula ekibiina, n'ayingira mu nnyumba; abayigirizwa be ne basembera w'ali ne bamugamba nti: “Tuvvuunule olugero lwa zizaniya ey'omu nnimiro.”" 
Matthew13:37 Ye n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Asiga ensigo ennungi ye Mwana w'Omuntu; 
Matthew13:38 ate ennimiro ye nsi; ensigo ennungi be baana b'obwakabaka; zizaniya be baana b'omubi; 
Matthew13:39 omulabe asiga zizaniya ye Sitaani; amakungula ye nkomerero y'ensi; abakunguzi be bamalayika. 
Matthew13:40 “Awo nno, nga zizaniya bw'ekuŋŋaanyizibwa n'eyokebwa omuliro, bwe guliba ne ku nkomerero y'ensi." 
Matthew13:41 Omwana w'Omuntu alituma bamalayika be, ne bakuŋŋaanyaamu mu bwakabaka bwe ebyesittazo byonna n'abo bonna abakola ebibi," 
Matthew13:42 ne babasuula mu kabiga ak'omuliro, omuliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji." 
Matthew13:43 Bo abatuukirivu baliyakaayakana ng'enjuba mu bwakabaka bwa Kitaabwe. Alina amatu, awulire." 
Matthew13:44 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'ekyobugagga ekikusike mu nnimiro. Omuntu bw'akizuula, akikweka; ate olw'essanyu, agenda n'atunda byonna by'aba nabyo, n'agula ennimiro eyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Era obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'omuntu omusuubuzi anoonya amalulu amalungi; 
Matthew13:46 bw'asanga eddulu erimu ery'omuwendo omunene, agenda n'atunda byonna by'alina, n'aligula." 
Matthew13:47 “Era obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'ekiragala ekisuulibwa mu nnyanja, ne kikukumbiriza ebyennyanja ebya buli ngeri." 
Matthew13:48 Bwe kimala okujjula, ne bakisika, ne batuula ku lubalama, ne balondamu ebirungi nga babissa mu nkanga, naye ebibi ne babisuula ebbali." 
Matthew13:49 Bwe guliba gutyo ne ku nkomerero y'emirembe; bamalayika balijja ne baawula ababi mu batuukirivu," 
Matthew13:50 ne babasuula mu kabiga ak'omuliro, omuliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji." 
Matthew13:51 “Ebyo byonna mubitegedde?” Ne bamugamba nti “Yee.” 
Matthew13:52 N'abagamba nti: “Awo nno buli muwandiisi atendekeddwa mu by'obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu afaanana nga nnannyinimu aggya mu tterekero lye ebiggya n'ebikadde.” 
Matthew13:53 Yezu bwe yamala okusirissa engero ezo, n'ava awo;" 
Matthew13:54 n'ajja mu nsi yaboobwe, nabayigiriza mu sinaagooga zaabwe. Ne bawuniikirira, ne bagamba nti: “Omuntu ono yaggya wa amagezi gati, n'ebikolwa bino eby'amaanyi?" 
Matthew13:55 Ono si ye mutabani w'omubazzi? Nnyina tayitibwa Mariya? Baganda be si ye Yakobo ne Yozefu, ne Simoni ne Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Bannyina bonna tebali kwaffe? Ebyo byonna kale yabiggya wa?” 
Matthew13:57 Ne bamwesittalako. Naye Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Omulanzi tabulwa kitiibwa, wabula mu kyalo kyaboobwe ne mu nnyumba y'ewaabwe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Eyo teyakolerayo bikolwa bya maanyi bingi olw'obutakkiriza bwabwe. 
Matthew14:1 Mu budde obwo, Erode omufuzi atwala ekitundu yawulira ettutumu lya Yezu," 
Matthew14:2 n'agamba abaweereza be nti: “Ono ye Yowanna Batista; azuukidde mu bafu, amaanyi ago kyegava gakola mu ye.”" 
Matthew14:3 Kubanga Erode yali akutte Yowanna n'amusiba, n'amuteeka mu kkomera, olw'okubeera Erodiya muka Filippo muganda we," 
Matthew14:4 kubanga Yowanna yamugambanga nti: “Tokkirizibwa kumwezza.” 
Matthew14:5 Yayagalanga okumutta, naye n'atya abantu, kubanga baali bamutwala ng'omulanzi." 
Matthew14:6 Naye olunaku olw'amazaalibwa ga Erode bwe lwatuuka, muwala wa Erodiya n'azina mu ddiiro, n'asanyusa Erode." 
Matthew14:7 Erode n'atuuka n'okumusuubiza nga bw'alayira nti ajja kumuwa kyonna ky'anaasaba. 
Matthew14:8 Ng'afukuutiriddwa nnyina, n'agamba nti: “Mpa wano kati omutwe gwa Yowanna Batista ku ssowaani.”" 
Matthew14:9 Kabaka n'anakuwala. Naye olw'okubeera ebirayiro bye yali alayidde n'olw'okubeera abagenyi be, n'alagira gumuweebwe." 
Matthew14:10 N'atuma, n'atemako Yowanna omutwe mu kkomera," 
Matthew14:11 omutwe gwe ne guleetebwa ku ssowaani, ne guweebwa omuwala, ye n'agutwalira nnyina." 
Matthew14:12 Abayigirizwa be ne bajja, ne batwala omulambo ne baguziika; ne bagenda ne babuulira Yezu." 
Matthew14:13 Yezu bwe yawulira ebyo, eyo n'avaayo mu lyato, n'agenda mu kifo eky'esuddeko ebbali yekka. Naye ebibiina bwe byawulira, abantu ne bamugoberera ku bigere nga bava mu bibuga." 
Matthew14:14 Bwe yagoba ku mwalo, n'alaba ekibiina kinene; ne bamukwasa ekisa, n'awonya abalwadde baabwe." 
Matthew14:15 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, abayigirizwa be ne bamusemberera ne bagamba nti: “Ekifo kino kyesudde n'obudde buyise; siibula ekibiina abantu bagende mu bibuga beegulireyo emmere gye banaalya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Naye Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Tewali kibatwala; mmwe mubawe kye banaalya.” 
Matthew14:17 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Tetulinaawo kantu wano okuggyako emigaati etaano gyokka, n'ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Matthew14:18 N'abagamba nti: “Mubindeetere wano.” 
Matthew14:19 Awo n'alagira abantu okubatuuza wansi ku muddo; n'atoola emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'atunula ku ggulu, ne yeebaza, emigaati n'agimenyamu, n'agiwa abayigirizwa be, abayigirizwa ne bagigabira abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Ne bakuŋŋaanya ebisero kkumi na bibiri ebijjudde obutundutundu obwalema. 
Matthew14:21 Abaalya bonna baali abasajja enkumi ttaano, obutabala bakazi na baana." 
Matthew14:22 Amangu ago n'awaliriza abayigirizwa be okusaabala mu lyato, bamukulemberemu, balage emitala w'eri, ye nga bw'asiibula ekibiina." 
Matthew14:23 Bwe yamala okusiibula ekibiina, n'ayambuka ku lusozi n'abeera eyo yekka nga yeegayirira. Obudde ne buwungeera ng'akyali eyo yekka." 
Matthew14:24 Lyo eryato kati lyali sitadiyo nnyingi okuva ku lukalu, amayengo nga galisunda, kubanga empewo yali ebafuluma mu maaso." 
Matthew14:25 Mu kisisimuka ekyokuna n'ajja gye bali ng'atambula ku nnyanja. 
Matthew14:26 Abayigirizwa bwe baamulaba ng'atambula ku nnyanja, ne beesisiwala, ne bagamba nti: “Ogwo muzimu!” ne bawowoggana olw'okutya." 
Matthew14:27 Amangu ago Yezu n'ayogera gye bali, n'abagamba nti: “Mugume; ye Nze. Temutya.”" 
Matthew14:28 Petero n'ayanukula nti: “Mukama, oba ggwe wuuyo, ndagira nzije gy'oli ku mazzi.”" 
Matthew14:29 N'agamba nti: “Jjangu.” Petero n'ava mu lyato, n'atambula ku mazzi, n'agenda eri Yezu." 
Matthew14:30 Naye bwe yalaba empewo nga nnyingi, n'atya; n'atandika okukka; n'aleekaana ng'agamba nti: “Mukama, mponya.”" 
Matthew14:31 Amangu ago Yezu n'agolola omukono n'amukwata, n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe ow'okukkiriza okutono, lwaki obuusizzabuusizza?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bwe baamala okusaabala mu lyato, empewo n'ekoma." 
Matthew14:33 Abaali mu lyato ne bamusinza nga bagamba nti: “Mazima, oli Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew14:34 Bwe baawunguka, ne batuuka mu nsi y'e Gennesareti." 
Matthew14:35 Ab'omu nsi eyo olwamutegeera, ne batuma buli wantu wonna mu nsi eyo, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna." 
Matthew14:36 Ne bamwegayirira waakiri bakome ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye; bonna abaalukomako ne bawonyezebwa. 
Matthew15:1 Awo Abafarisaayo n'abawandiisi ne bava e Yeruzaalemu, ne bajja awali Yezu, ne bagamba nti:" 
Matthew15:2 “Abayigirizwa bo ekibamenyesa empisa z'abakadde kiki! Kubanga tebanaaba mu ngalo nga bagenda okulya emmere.” 
Matthew15:3 N'abaanukula nti: “Nammwe ekibamenyesa ekiragiro kya Katonda okubeera empisa zammwe kiki? 
Matthew15:4 Kale Katonda yagamba nti: ‘Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa.’ Ate nti: ‘Avumanga kitaawe oba nnyina, wa kuttibwanga.’" 
Matthew15:5 Sso mmwe mugamba nti: ‘Oli bw'agambanga kitaawe oba nnyina nti: “Kye wandinfunyeeko kati kitone,” oyo teyeetaaga kuwa kitaawe oba nnyina kitiibwa.’" 
Matthew15:6 Ne mudibya mutyo ekigambo kya Katonda olw'okubeera empisa zammwe. 
Matthew15:7 Bakuusa mmwe, Yisaaya yalanga bulungi ku mmwe bwe yagamba nti:" 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Abantu bano bampa ekitiibwa kya ku mumwa bumwa; emitima gyabwe gindi wala. 
Matthew15:9 Okusinza kwe bansinzaamu temuli kantu; enjigiriza gye bayigiriza mateeka g'abantu.’ ” 
Matthew15:10 Awo n'ayita ekibiina w'ali n'agamba nti: “Muwulire era mutegeere. 
Matthew15:11 Ekiyingira mu kamwa si kye kyonoona omuntu, wabula ekifuluma mu kamwa; ekyo kye kyonoona omuntu.”" 
Matthew15:12 Awo abayigirizwa be ne basembera ne bamugamba nti: “Omanyi ng'Abafarisaayo banyiize bwe bawulidde ekigambo ekyo?” 
Matthew15:13 Ye n'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Buli muti Kitange ali mu ggulu, gw'atasimba, gulisimbulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Mubaleke abo; bakulembeze abazibe b'amaaso. Sso muzibe bw'akulembera muzibe munne, bombi bagwa mu bunnya.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petero n'addamu nti: “Tuvvuunule olugero luno.” 
Matthew15:16 N'agamba nti: “Nammwe temunnaba kutegeera? 
Matthew15:17 Temulaba nga buli kintu ekiyingira mu kamwa, kigenda mu lubuto, ne kisuulibwa ebweru mu kiyigo?" 
Matthew15:18 Sso ebifuluma mu kamwa biva mu mutima; ebyo bye byonoona omuntu. 
Matthew15:19 Kubanga mu mutima mwe muva ebirowoozo ebibi, obutemu, obwenzi, obukaba, obubbi, okulimba mu kujulira, n'okuwaayiriza." 
Matthew15:20 Ebyo bye byonoona omuntu; naye okulya n'engalo ezitali nnaabe tekyonoona muntu.” 
Matthew15:21 Yezu n'ava awo n'alaga mu bitundu by'e Tiiro ne Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Awo omukazi Omukanaani okuva erudda eyo, n'ajja, n'akoowoola ng'agamba nti: “Nsaasira, Mukama, Omwana wa Dawudi; muwala wange ajoonyesebwa nnyo omwoyo omubi.”" 
Matthew15:23 Naye ye n'atamunyega kigambo. Abayigirizwa be ne basembera ne bamwegayirira nga bagamba nti: “Mugobe; ajja atuleekaanira.” 
Matthew15:24 Ye n'ayanukula nti: “Saatumirwa balala, wabula endiga ez'omu nnyumba ya Yisirayeli ezaabula.”" 
Matthew15:25 Omukazi n'ajja n'amuvunnamira n'agamba nti: “Mukama, nnyamba.”" 
Matthew15:26 N'ayanukula n'agamba nti: “Si kirungi kuddira mmere y'abaana n'ogikasukira embwa.” 
Matthew15:27 Omukazi n'agamba nti: “Weewaawo, Mukama, naye era n'embwa zirya obukunkumuka obuva ku mmeeza ya bakama baazo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Awo Yezu n'ayanukula nti: “Mukazi ggwe, okukkiriza kwo nga kunene! Kale kikukolerwe nga bw'oyagala.” Amangu ago omuwala n'awona." 
Matthew15:29 Yezu n'ava awo, n'ayitira ku nnyanja y'e Galilaaya. N'ayambuka mu nsozi, n'atuula eyo." 
Matthew15:30 Ebibiina binene ne bijja w'ali nga baleese abalema, abagongobavu, bamuzibe, bakasiru, n'abalala bangi. Ne babassa ku bigere bye n'abawonya;" 
Matthew15:31 ebibiina ne byewuunya ng'abantu balaba bakasiru bayogera, abagongobavu nga bazzeewo, abalema nga batambula, ne bamuzibe nga balaba. Ne bagulumiza Katonda wa Yisirayeli." 
Matthew15:32 Awo Yezu n'ayita abayigirizwa be w'ali, n'abagamba nti: “Ekibiina kino kinkwasa ekisa; kubanga babadde nange kati ennaku ssatu, ate nga tebalina kye balya. Saagala kubasiibula njala, sikulwa nga bagwa ku kkubo.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Tunaggya wa mu ddungu muno emigaati emingi bwe gityo eginakkusa ekibiina ekinene bwe kiti?” 
Matthew15:34 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mulinawo emigaati emeka?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Musanvu n'obwennyanja butono.” 
Matthew15:35 Awo n'alagira ekibiina okukkalira wansi. 
Matthew15:36 N'akwata emigaati omusanvu n'ebyennyanja, ne yeebaza, n'abimenyamu, n'akwasa abayigirizwa, abayigirizwa ne bagabira ekibiina." 
Matthew15:37 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Ne bakuŋŋaanya ebisero musanvu ebijjudde obutundutundu obwalema. 
Matthew15:38 Abaalya baawera abasajja enkumi nnya, obutabala bakazi na baana." 
Matthew15:39 Bwe yamala okusiibula ekibiina, n'asaabala mu lyato n'agenda mu kitundu ky'e Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Awo Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo ne basembera; okumugeza, ne bamusaba abalage akabonero okuva mu ggulu." 
Matthew16:2 N'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Obudde buba buwungeera, mugamba nti: ‘Bunaaba bulungi, kubanga eggulu limyukiridde.’" 
Matthew16:3 Bwe bukya, nti: ‘Olwa leero kikunta, kubanga eggulu limyukiridde ate likutte.’ Bwe kityo, mumanyi okusoma enfaanana y'eggulu, naye temusobola kusoma bubonero bwa biseera." 
Matthew16:4 Ezzadde ebbi era esseegu linoonya akabonero; naye tewali kabonero kajja kuliweebwa, wabula aka Yona.” N'abaleka, n'agenda." 
Matthew16:5 Abayigirizwa be bwe bajja emitala w'eri, baali beerabidde okuleeta emigaati." 
Matthew16:6 N'abagamba nti: “Mwegendereze, mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo n'eky'Abasaddukaayo.”" 
Matthew16:7 Ne beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka nti: “Tetwaleese migaati.” 
Matthew16:8 Yezu n'ategeera, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe ab'okukkiriza okutono, lwaki mwebuuzaganya nti temulina migaati?" 
Matthew16:9 Temunnaba kutegeera? Temujjukira emigaati etaano olw'abantu enkumi ettaano, ebisero bimeka bye mwakuŋŋaanya?" 
Matthew16:10 Oba n'emigaati omusanvu olw'abantu enkumi ennya, ebisero bimeka bye mwakuŋŋaanya?" 
Matthew16:11 Ekibalobedde okutegeera nga soogedde ku migaati bugaati kiki? Mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo n'eky'Abasaddukaayo.” 
Matthew16:12 Ne balyoka bategeera nga tabagambye kwekuuma kizimbulukusa kya migaati, wabula enjigiriza y'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo." 
Matthew16:13 Awo Yezu n'alaga mu kitundu ky'e Kayisariya ekya Filippo, n'abuuza abayigirizwa be nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu abantu bagamba ye ani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Bo ne bagamba nti: “Abamu nti ye Yowanna Batista, abalala nti ye Eliya, ate abalala nti ye Yeremiya oba omu ku balanzi.”" 
Matthew16:15 N'abagamba nti: “Naye nga mmwe mugamba nze ani?” 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero n'ayanukula nti: “Ggwe Kristu, Omwana wa Katonda omulamu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Simoni mutabani wa Yona, weesiimye, kubanga omubiri n'omusaayi si bye byakubikkulidde ekyo, wabula Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew16:18 Nange ka nkubuulire, oli Lwazi, ku lwazi okwo kwe ndizimba Ekleziya wange; n'emiryango gy'emagombe tegirimusobola." 
Matthew16:19 Era ndikuwa ebisumuluzo by'obwakabaka bw'omu ggulu; kyonna ky'olisiba ku nsi, nga ne mu ggulu kisibiddwa; kyonna ky'olisumulula ku nsi, nga ne mu ggulu kisumuluddwa.”" 
Matthew16:20 Awo n'akuutira nnyo abayigirizwa be obutabuulirako muntu nti ye Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Okuva olwo Yezu n'asooka okutegeeza abayigirizwa be nti yalina okugenda e Yeruzaalemu, n'okubonyaabonyezebwa abakadde, abawandiisi n'abakulu b'abakabona, n'okuttibwa, n'okuzuukizibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu." 
Matthew16:22 Petero n'amuddira, n'atandika okumukomako, ng'amugamba nti: “Kikafuuwe! Mukama, ekyo tekigenda kukutuukirira.”" 
Matthew16:23 Ye n'akyuka n'agamba Petero nti: “Nva mu maaso, Sitaani! Onfuukidde kyesittazo, kubanga by'olowooza si bya Katonda, wabula by'abantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Awo Yezu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Obanga oli ayagala okungoberera, yeerese, yeetikke omusaalaba gwe, angoberere." 
Matthew16:25 Kubanga buli alyagala okuwonya obulamu bwe, alibubuza; naye buli alibuza obulamu bwe okubeera nze, alibusanga." 
Matthew16:26 Kale omuntu kirimugasa ki okulya ensi yonna, sso n'afiirwa obulamu bwe? Ye omuntu aliwaayo ki okununula obulamu bwe?" 
Matthew16:27 Kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kujjira mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe wamu ne bamalayika be; olwo aliweera buli muntu okusinziira ku bikolwa bye. 
Matthew16:28 Mazima mbagamba nti waliwo abamu ku bayimiridde wano abatalirega ku lumbe okutuusa nga balabye Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ajja mu bwakabaka bwe.” 
Matthew17:1 Nga wayise ennaku mukaaga, Yezu n'atoola Petero ne Yakobo ne Yowanna muganda we, n'abambusa ku lusozi oluwanvu ku bbali bokka," 
Matthew17:2 n'afuuka mu maaso gaabwe; amaaso ge ne gayakaayakana ng'enjuba, ebyambalo bye nga byeru ng'ekitangaala." 
Matthew17:3 Awo ne balabikirwa Musa ne Eliya; baali boogera naye. 
Matthew17:4 Awo Petero n'agamba Yezu nti: “Mukama, kirungi ffe okubeera wano; obanga oyagala, nzija kukola wano ensiisira ssatu: emu yiyo, emu ya Musa n'emu ya Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Yali akyayogera atyo, ekire ekitangalijja ne kibabuutikira; eddoboozi ne liva mu kire, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa gwe neesiimiramu, mumuwulirenga.”" 
Matthew17:6 Abayigirizwa bwe baawulira, ne bagwa ku maaso gaabwe, ne batya nnyo." 
Matthew17:7 Yezu n'asembera n'abakwatako, n'abagamba nti: “Musituke, muleke kutya.”" 
Matthew17:8 Bwe baayimusa amaaso, nga tebakyalabawo mulala, wabula Yezu yekka." 
Matthew17:9 Bwe baali baserengeta olusozi, Yezu n'abalagira nti: “Kye mulabye temukibuulirangako muntu okutuusa Omwana w'Omuntu ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu.”" 
Matthew17:10 Awo abayigirizwa ne bamubuuza ne bamugamba nti: “Ate lwaki abawandiisi bagamba nti Eliya alina okusooka okujja?” 
Matthew17:11 N'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Kituufu Eliya ajja, era ajja kutereeza byonna." 
Matthew17:12 Naye nze mbagamba nti Eliya yajja dda, ne batamutegeera, wabula ne bamukola kyonna kye baayagala. N'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'atyo bw'agenda okubonaabonera mu mikono gyabwe.”" 
Matthew17:13 Awo abayigirizwa be ne bategeera nga yali ayogera ku Yowanna Batista. 
Matthew17:14 Bwe baatuuka awali ekibiina, omusajja n'ajja w'ali, n'amufukaamirira, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew17:15 “Mukama, saasira mutabani wange, kubanga agwa ensimbu, mulwadde nnyo; agwa lutata mu muliro, ne mu mazzi lunye." 
Matthew17:16 Abayigirizwa bo namubaleetera, ne batasobola kumuwonya.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yezu n'ayanakula n'agamba nti: “Owa, ezzadde lino eritakkiriza, eryonoonefu! Ndituusa wa okubeera nammwe? Ndituusa wa okubagumiikiriza? Mumundeetere wano.”" 
Matthew17:18 Awo Yezu n'akabukira omwoyo omubi, ne gumuvaako; omulenzi n'awonera ddala okuva mu kaseera ako." 
Matthew17:19 Abayigirizwa be ne bajja gy'ali mu kyama, ne bagamba nti: “Lwaki ffe tetwasobodde kugugoba?”" 
Matthew17:20 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Lwa kubeera kukkiriza kwammwe okutono. Mazima mbagamba nti singa muba n'okukkiriza okwenkana ng'empeke ya kaladaali, mwandigambye olusozi luno nti: ‘Vva wano, genda eri,’ ne lugenda; tewaliba kantu ke mutalisobola.”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Bwe baali bakyakuŋŋaana mu Galilaaya, Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu;" 
Matthew17:23 balimutta, kyokka ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukizibwa.” Ne banakuwala nnyo." 
Matthew17:24 Bwe baatuuka e Kafarunawumu, abasolooza b'ekitundu kya sekeli ne bajja eri Petero, ne bamugamba nti: “Mukama wammwe tawa kitundu kya sekeli?”" 
Matthew17:25 Ye n'addamu nti: “Awa.” Bwe yayingira mu nnyumba, Yezu n'amwesooka n'amugamba nti: “Simoni, olowooza otya? Bakabaka b'ensi bawooza ku baani empooza oba omusolo? Ku baana baabwe bennyini nandiki ku balala?”" 
Matthew17:26 N'agamba nti: “Ku balala.” Awo Yezu n'amugamba nti “Awo nno abaana ba ddembe. 
Matthew17:27 Kyokka obutabeesittaza, genda mu nnyanja osuulemu eddobo, ekyennyanja ekinaasooka okwambuka kikwate; bw'onooyasamya akamwa kaakyo, onoosangamu sekeli; gitwale ogibawe ku lwange ne ku lulwo.”" 
Matthew18:1 Mu kaseera ako, abayigirizwa bajja eri Yezu, ne bagamba nti: “Ani asinga obukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu?”" 
Matthew18:2 Awo Yezu n'ayita omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza mu makkati gaabwe," 
Matthew18:3 n'agamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti bwe muteefuula ne mufaanana ng'abaana abato, temuliyingira mu bwakabaka bwa mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:4 Awo nno buli eyeetoowaza ng'omwana ono omuto, y'asinga obukulu mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu." 
Matthew18:5 Ate era, buli ayaniriza omwana omuto ng'ono mu linnya lyange, aba ayanirizza nze." 
Matthew18:6 “Kyokka buli eyeesittaza omu ku bato bano abanzikiriza, ekyandisinze obulungi ku ye, lwe lubengo olunene okusibibwa mu bulago bwe n'abbikibwa mu ddubi mu nnyanja." 
Matthew18:7 Ensi zigisanze olw'ebyesittazo! Weewaawo ebyesittazo tebirema kujja, naye zimusanze oyo eyeesittaza!" 
Matthew18:8 Obanga omukono gwo gukwesittaza, yadde ekigere kyo, bitemeko, obisuule wala; waakiri oyingire mu bulamu ng'oli wa kikuggu, mulema, n'otosuulibwa mu muliro ogutazikira ng'olina emikono gyombi n'ebigere byombi." 
Matthew18:9 Era obanga eriiso lyo likwesittaza, liggyeemu olikasuke eri, waakiri oyingire mu bulamu ng'oli wa ttulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu lukonko olw'omuliro ng'olina amaaso gombi." 
Matthew18:10 Mwegendereze obutagayanga n'omu ku bato bano; ka mbabuulire, mu ggulu bamalayika baabwe ennaku zonna balaba amaaso ga Kitange ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 “Mmwe mulowooza mutya? Omuntu bw'abeera n'endiga ekikumi, emu ku zo n'ewaba, taleka awo ku nsozi ekyenda mu omwenda, n'agenda anoonya ebuze?" 
Matthew18:13 Ate singa agizuuula, mazima ka mbabuulire, agisanyukira okusinga ziri ekyenda mu omwenda ezitaawaba." 
Matthew18:14 Bwe kityo ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu tayagalangako omu ku bato bano azikirire. 
Matthew18:15 “Muganda wo bw'abangako ky'akusobezzaamu, genda omukomeko, nga muli bwababiri mwekka. Bw'akuwuliranga, muganda wo oliba omuzzizza." 
Matthew18:16 Naye bw'atakuwuliranga, ddira munno omu oba babiri ogende nabo, anti buli kigambo kyonna kikakasibwa n'obujulizi bw'abajulizi babiri oba basatu." 
Matthew18:17 Abo bw'agaana okubawulira, n'olyoka obuulira Ekleziya. N'Ekleziya bw'atagiwulira, mutwalenga ng'omukafiiri oba ng'omusolooza w'omusolo." 
Matthew18:18 “Mazima mbagamba nti byonna bye munaasibanga ku nsi, ne mu ggulu nga bisibiddwa; era byonna bye munaasumululanga ku nsi, ne mu ggulu nga bisumuluddwa." 
Matthew18:19 Era mazima mbagamba nti ababiri mu mmwe bwe munassanga ekimu ku nsi okusaba ekintu, Kitange ali mu ggulu agendanga kukibakolera," 
Matthew18:20 kubanga ababiri oba abasatu we bakuŋŋaanira mu linnya lyange, nange mbeerawo mu makkati gaabwe.”" 
Matthew18:21 Awo Petero n'amusemberera, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, muganda wange anansobyanga emirundi emeka nga musonyiwa? Kutuusa ku mirundi musanvu?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Sikugamba nti kutuusa ku mirundi musanvu, naye kutuusa ku nsanvu emirundi musanvu." 
Matthew18:23 Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu kyebuva bufaanaanyirizibwa omuntu kabaka eyayagala okutereeza ebibye n'abaweereza be. 
Matthew18:24 Yali asoose okubawozesa, ne bamuleetera omu alina ebbanja lye lya talenta kakumi." 
Matthew18:25 Naye kubanga yali tasobola kuzisasula, mukama we n'alagira okumutunda, ne mukazi we n'abaana be na byonna by'alina, alyoke asasulibwe." 
Matthew18:26 Omuweereza n'avunnama mu maaso ge n'amugamba nti: ‘Nkwata mpola; ndikusasula byonna.’ 
Matthew18:27 Mukama w'omuweereza n'akwatibwa ekisa, n'amuta, n'amusonyiwa n'ebbanja." 
Matthew18:28 “Naye omuweereza ye omu bwe yafuluma, n'asanga muweereza munne eyamulinako ebbanja lya dinaari kikumi. N'amukwata, n'amukka mu bulago ng'agamba nti: ‘Nsasula ebbanja’" 
Matthew18:29 Muweereza munne n'avunnama, n'amwegayirira n'agamba nti: ‘Nkwata mpola, ndikusasula.’" 
Matthew18:30 Ye n'agaana, n'agenda amuggalira mu kkomera okutuusa lw'alimusasula ebbanja." 
Matthew18:31 “Baweereza banne bwe baalaba ekibaddewo, ne banakuwala nnyo; banne ne bajja babuulira mukama waabwe byonna ebifuddeyo." 
Matthew18:32 Mukama we n'amuyita, n'amugamba nti: ‘Muweereza ggwe omubi! Nakusonyiye ebbanja lyonna, kubanga wanneegayiridde," 
Matthew18:33 kale naawe obadde tolagiddwa okusaasira muweereza munno nga nze bwe nakusaasidde?’ 
Matthew18:34 Mukama we n'akalala, n'amukwasa abakuumi b'ekkomera okutuusa lw'alimala okusasula ebbanja lye lyonna." 
Matthew18:35 Ne Kitange ali mu ggulu bw'alibakola atyo obanga buli omu tasonyiwa munne na mutima gwonna.” 
Matthew19:1 Awo Yezu bwe yasirissa ebigambo ebyo, n'avaayo e Galilaaya, n'ajja mu bitundu bya Buyudaaya, emitala wa Yorudani." 
Matthew19:2 Ebibiina bingi ne bimugoberera, n'abawonyeza eyo." 
Matthew19:3 Abafarisaayo ne basembera w'ali ne bamukema, ne bamubuuza nti: “Omusajja akkirizibwa okugoba mukazi we ng'amulanga buli nsonga yonna?”" 
Matthew19:4 N'abaanukula nti: “Temusomanga nti eyabakola okuva mu masooka yabakola omusajja n'omukazi?” 
Matthew19:5 Era n'agamba nti: “Olw'ekyo omusajja kyaliva alirekanga kitaawe ne nnyina n'agattibwa ne mukazi we; ababiri balifuuka omubiri gumu. 
Matthew19:6 Olwo nga tebakyali babiri, wabula omuntu omu. Awo nno Katonda ky'aggasse awamu, omuntu takigattululanga.”" 
Matthew19:7 Ne bamugamba nti: “Ate Musa yalagirira ki okuwandiika ebbaluwa ey'obugobe n'okumusiibula?” 
Matthew19:8 N'abagamba nti: “Musa yabakkiriza okugoba bakazi bammwe olw'okubeera obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyammwe, sso ng'olubereberye si bwe kyali." 
Matthew19:9 Awo nno nze mbagamba nti buli agoba mukazi we, wabula mpozzi olw'obwenzi, amala awasa omulala, aba ayenze.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Obanga ensonga bwe ziri zityo ku musajja ne mukazi we, tekigwana kuwasa.”" 
Matthew19:11 Naye ye n'abagamba nti: “Si bonna nti bategeera ekigambo kino, wabula abo abakiweereddwa," 
Matthew19:12 kubanga waliwo abalaawo abaazaalibwa bwe batyo, ne wabaawo abalaawo abaalaayibwa abantu, ate ne wabaawo n'abalaawo abeeraawa bokka olw'okubeera obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu. Kino ayinza okukitegeera, ategeere.”" 
Matthew19:13 Awo abaana ne baleetebwa w'ali abasseeko emikono asabe. Abayigirizwa ne babakomako. 
Matthew19:14 Naye Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Muleke abaana abato bajje gye ndi, temubaziyiza; kubanga abafaanana nga bano be bannannyini bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu.”" 
Matthew19:15 N'abassaako emikono, n'agenda." 
Matthew19:16 Awo ne wajjawo omu w'ali, n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, nnaakola kirungi ki okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?” Ye n'amugamba nti:" 
Matthew19:17 “Ombuuliza ki ku kirungi? Anti omulungi ali omu; naye obanga oyagala okuyingira mu bulamu, kwata ebiragiro.”" 
Matthew19:18 N'amugamba nti: “Biri wa?” Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Tottanga; Toyendanga; Tobbanga; Tojuliranga bya bulimba; 
Matthew19:19 Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa; Oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.” 
Matthew19:20 Omuvubuka n'amugamba nti: “Ebyo byonna nabikwata; nkyabulwako ki ate?” 
Matthew19:21 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Obanga oyagala okutuukirira, genda, tunda by'olina owe abaavu, olwo obugagga olibeera nabwo mu ggulu; ojje ongoberere.”" 
Matthew19:22 Omuvubuka bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'agenda nga munakuwavu, kubanga yalina eby'obugagga bingi." 
Matthew19:23 Yezu n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti nga kiriba kizibu abalina obugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka obw'omu ggulu! 
Matthew19:24 Ka mbabuulire era, kiba kyangu eŋŋamiya okuyita mu nnyindo y'empiso, okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Matthew19:25 Abayigirizwa bwe baawulira ebyo, ne bawuniikirira nnyo; ne bagamba nti: “Awo nno ani asobola okulokoka?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yezu n'abatunuulira, n'abagamba nti: “Ku bantu kino tekisoboka, naye ku Katonda byonna bisoboka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Awo Petero n'addamu, n'amugamba nti: “Kale ffe twaleka byonna ne tukugoberera, kale tulifuna ki?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti mmwe abangoberera, ensi bw'eriba ezziddwa obuggya, Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alituula ku nnamulondo ey'obukulu bwe, nammwe mulituula ku nnamulondo kkumi na bbiri nga mulamula ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebya Yisirayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Ate buli muntu eyaleka amayumba, oba baganda be, oba bannyina, oba kitaawe, oba nnyina, oba abaana, oba ebibanja olw'okubeera erinnya lyange, alifuna emirundi kikumi ko n'okusikira obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Matthew19:30 Naye bangi ab'olubereberye baliba ab'oluvannyuma, n'ab'oluvannyuma baliba ab'olubereberye.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Kale nno obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanana ng'omuntu ssemaka eyakeera ku makya okupakasisa abakozi bakole mu mizabbibu gye. 
Matthew20:2 Bwe yamala okuteesa n'abakozi okubawa dinaari emu ng'olunaku luwedde, n'abasindika mu mizabbibu gye." 
Matthew20:3 Nafuluma ate ku ssaawa eyookusatu, n'alaba abalala abayimiridde mu mbuga nga balendera bulendezi,"
