Matthew20:4 n'abagamba nti: ‘Nammwe mugende mu nnimiro yange ey'emizabbibu, nnaabawa kyonna ekinaaba kigwanidde.’ Ne bagenda." 
Matthew20:5 N'afuluma era nga ku ssaawa eyoomukaga n'eyoomwenda, n'akola kye kimu." 
Matthew20:6 N'afuluma era ku ssaawa nga kkumi n'emu, n'asangayo abalala abayimiridde, n'abagamba nti: ‘Ekibayimirizza awo omusana gwonna, nga mulendera bulendezi kiki?’" 
Matthew20:7 Ne bamugamba nti: ‘Kubanga tewali atupakasizza.’ N'abagamba nti: ‘Nammwe mugende mu nnimiro yange ey'emizabbibu.’ 
Matthew20:8 “Naye obudde bwe bwawungeera, nnannyini mizabbibu nagamba nnampala nti: ‘Yita abakozi, obasasule empeera yaabwe ng'osookera ku bazze oluvannyuma okutuusa ku baasoose.’" 
Matthew20:9 Abajja nga ku ssaawa ey'ekkumi n'emu bwe baatuuka, ne bafuna dinaari emu buli omu." 
Matthew20:10 Abaasooka okukola bwe baasembera, ne balowooza nga banaafuna ekisingako; naye era nabo ne bafuna dinaari emu." 
Matthew20:11 Bwe baagifuna, ne beemulugunyiza ssemaka," 
Matthew20:12 ne bagamba nti: ‘Ab'oluvannyuma bano abakoledde essaawa emu yokka obenkanyizza naffe abattunse n'omulimu olunaku lwonna n'olubabu lw'omusana?’ 
Matthew20:13 N'addamu omu ku bo nti: ‘Munnange, sikukoze bubi; kale tetwalagaanye naawe dinaari emu?" 
Matthew20:14 Kwako ekikyo ogende. Njagadde okuwa ono omuvannyuma nga ggwe bwe nkuwadde. 
Matthew20:15 Ebyange sikkirizibwa kukola nabyo nga bwe njagala? Nandiki nze okubeera omulungi kye kikuleetera eriiso ebbi?’ 
Matthew20:16 Ab'oluvannyuma bwe balibeera batyo ab'olubereberye, n'ab'olubereberye ne baba ab'oluvannyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yezu bwe yali ayambuka e Yeruzaalemu n'azza ebbali abayigirizwa ekkumi n'ababiri bokka, ku kkubo n'abagamba nti:" 
Matthew20:18 “Tuutuno twambuka e Yeruzaalemu; Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo mu bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi; balimusalira ogw'okufa," 
Matthew20:19 ne bamuwaayo mu b'amawanga okuduulirwa, okuswanyuulibwa, n'okukomererwa ku musaalaba; ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukizibwa.”" 
Matthew20:20 Awo nnyina w'abatabani ba Zebedaayo n'ajja w'ali n'abaana be, n'amuvunnamira, n'abaako ky'amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Ye n'amugamba nti: “Oyagala ki?” N'amugamba nti: “Lagira abaana bange bano bombi batuule omu ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo n'omulala ku mukono gwo ogwa kkono mu bwakabaka bwo.” 
Matthew20:22 Naye Yezu n'addamu nti: “Kye musaba temukimanyi. Muyinza okunywa ekikompe kye ŋŋenda okunywa?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Tuyinza” 
Matthew20:23 N'abagamba nti: “Weewaawo, ekikompe kyange mulikinywa, naye okutuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo oba ku mukono gwange ogwa kkono okukibawa si mulimu gwange; wabula ky'abo be kyategekerwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ekkumi bwe baawulira, ne banyiigira ab'oluganda abo bombi." 
Matthew20:25 Awo Yezu n'abayita w'ali, n'agamba nti: “Mumanyi abakulembera amawanga bagalaga obuyinza, n'abakulu baabwe babafuza maanyi." 
Matthew20:26 Sso mu mmwe si bwe kiriba; buli ayagala okuba omukulu mu mmwe abeere muweereza wammwe," 
Matthew20:27 na buli ayagala okubeera omubereberye mu mmwe, abeere muweereza wammwe." 
Matthew20:28 N'omwana w'Omuntu bw'atyo, teyajja kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza, n'okuwaayo obulamu bwe ng'omutango ku lw'abangi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Bwe baafuluma e Yeriko, ekibiina kinene ne kimugoberera." 
Matthew20:30 Laba, bamuzibe babiri baali batudde ku kkubo, ne bawulira nga Yezu ayita, ne bakoowoola nga bagamba nti: “Tusaasire, Omwana wa Dawudi!”" 
Matthew20:31 Ekibiina ne kibakomako basirike; naye bo ne baleekaana n'okusingawo nti: “Mukama, Omwana wa Dawudi, tusaasire!”" 
Matthew20:32 Yezu n'ayimirira, n'abayita, n'agamba nti: “Mwagala mbakolere ki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Bo ne bagamba nti: “Mukama, amaaso gaffe gazibulwe.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yezu n'akwatibwa ekisa, n'akwata ku maaso gaabwe; amangu ago ne baddamu okulaba, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew21:1 Bwe baasemberera Yeruzaalemu nga batuuse e Betifage, ku Lusozi lw'Oliva, Yezu n'atuma abayigirizwa be babiri," 
Matthew21:2 n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu kyalo ekibali mu maaso, mangu awo mujja kusanga endogoyi esibiddwa ng'erina omwana gwayo; muziyimbule, muzindeetere." 
Matthew21:3 Bwe wabaawo aliko ky'abagamba, muddamu nti: Omukama azeetaaga, ajja kuzisindika mangu.”" 
Matthew21:4 Ebyo byonna byaba bityo omulanzi kye yayogera kituukirire, nti:" 
Matthew21:5 “Mugambe muwala wa Siyoni nti: ‘Wuuno kabaka wo ajja gy'oli, muteefu, yeebagadde endogoyi, ne ku kalogoyi, omwana gw'endogoyi.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Awo abayigirizwa ne bagenda, ne bakola nga Yezu bwe yali abalagidde," 
Matthew21:7 ne baleeta endogoyi n'omwana gwayo, ne bassaako ebyambalo byabwe, ye n'akeebagala." 
Matthew21:8 Bangi mu kibiina ne baaliira ebyambalo byabwe mu kkubo, abamu ne bamenya amatabi ku miti ne bagaaliirira mu kkubo." 
Matthew21:9 Ebibiina ebyali bimukulembeddemu n'ebyo ebyali bimugoberera ne biyoogaana nti: “Hosanna eri Omwana wa Dawudi! Agulumizibwe oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama! Hosanna waggulu eyo!” 
Matthew21:10 Bwe yayingira mu Yeruzaalemu, ekibuga kyonna ne kiyuuguuma, nga bagamba nti: “Ani oyo?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ebibiina nga bigamba nti: “ Ono ye Yezu omulanzi ow'e Nazareti ekya Galilaaya.” 
Matthew21:12 Yezu n'ayingira mu Kiggwa, n'agobamu abatunda n'abagulira mu Kiggwa, n'avuunika emmeeza z'abawaanyisa ensimbi n'entebe z'abatunda enjiibwa," 
Matthew21:13 n'abagamba nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kwegayiririramu;’ sso mmwe mugifudde mpuku ya banyazi.” 
Matthew21:14 Bamuzibe n'abalema ne bajja gy'ali mu Kiggwa, n'abawonya." 
Matthew21:15 Bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi bwe baalaba ebyewuunyisa bye yakola n'abaana nga baleekaana mu Kiggwa nga bagamba nti: “Hosanna eri Omwana wa Dawudi!” ne banyiiga," 
Matthew21:16 ne bamugamba nti: “Owulira abo kye bagamba?” Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Yee; mmwe temusomangako nti: “ ‘Mu kamwa k'abawere n'abayonka mwe waggya ettendo ettuufu’?” 
Matthew21:17 N'abaleka, n'ava mu kibuga, n'alaga e Betaniya, n'asula eyo." 
Matthew21:18 Ku makya bwe yali addayo mu kibuga, enjala n'emuluma;" 
Matthew21:19 n'alaba omukunyu ogumu ku bbali w'oluguudo, n'agenda gye guli, naye n'atasangako kantu, wabula amakoola gokka. N'agugamba nti: “Ku ggwe tekuvangako kibala emirembe gyonna!” Amangu ago omukunyu ne gukala." 
Matthew21:20 Abayigirizwa bwe baalaba, ne beewuunya, ne bagamba nti: “Omukunyu gukaze gutya amangu gati?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yezu n'ayanukula nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti bwe munaabeera n'okukkiriza nga temubuusabuusa, ekikoleddwa ku mukunyu si kye munaakolanga kyokka, naye ne bwe muligamba olusozi nga luno nti: ‘Weesitule, weesuule mu nnyanja,’ bwe kiriba." 
Matthew21:22 Na byonna bye munaasabanga nga mwegayirira, mulibifuna, bwe munaabanga n'okukkiriza.”" 
Matthew21:23 Bwe yajja mu Kiggwa, bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu ne bajja w'ali bwe yali ayigiriza, ne bagamba nti: “Ebyo obikozesa buyinza ki? Ani yakuwa obuyinza obwo?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yezu n'ayanukula, n'abagamba nti: “Nange nzija kubabuuza ekigambo kimu; bwe munanziramu, nange ne ndyoka mbabuulira obuyinza obunkoza ebyo." 
Matthew21:25 Kale, batismu ya Yowanna yava wa? Yava mu ggulu, nandiki mu bantu?” Ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti:" 
Matthew21:26 “Ate bwe tugamba nti: ‘Yava mu ggulu,’ ajja kutubuuza nti: ‘Awo nno lwaki temwamukkiriza?’ Bwe tugamba nti: ‘Yava mu bantu,’ tutya ekibiina, kubanga bonna Yowanna bamuyita mulanzi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Kwe kuddamu Yezu nti: “Tetumanyi.” Naye n'abagamba nti: “Nange sijja kubabuulira buyinza bunkoza ebyo. 
Matthew21:28 “Kino mukiraba mutya? Waaliwo omusajja ng'alina batabani be babiri, n'agenda eri omu n'amugamba nti: ‘Mutabani, olwa leero genda okole mu mizabbibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 N'ayanukula nti: ‘Sijja kugenda.’ Naye oluvannyuma ne yeddamu, n'agenda." 
Matthew21:30 Ate n'agenda eri owookubiri, n'amugamba kyenkana. Ye n'ayanukula nti: ‘Nzija kugenda, ssebo,’ naye ate n'atagenda." 
Matthew21:31 Kale ku bombi ani yakola kitaawe kye yalagira?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Omubereberye.” Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti abasolooza b'omusolo ne bamalaaya bagenda okubasooka mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda. 
Matthew21:32 Kubanga Yowanna yajja gye muli ng'akutte ekkubo ery'obutuukirivu, ne mutamukkiriza; sso abasolooza b'omusolo ne bamalaaya baamukkiriza; mmwe ekyo ne bwe mwakiraba, oluvannyuma temweddamu mumukkirize." 
Matthew21:33 “Ate muwulire olugero olulala: Waaliwo omuntu ssemaka eyasimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu, n'agisibako olukomera, n'asimamu essogolero, n'azimbamu omunaala, n'agikwasa abalimi, n'agenda ku ggwanga." 
Matthew21:34 Obudde obw'ebibala bwe bwasembera, n'atuma abaweereza abalimi banone ku bibala bye." 
Matthew21:35 Naye abalimi ne bakwata abaweereza be omu ne bamukuba, n'omulala ne bamutta, n'omundi ne bamukuba amayinja." 
Matthew21:36 N'abatumira ate abaweereza abalala, abangi n'okusinga abaasooka, nabo ne babakola kyenkana." 
Matthew21:37 Oluvannyuma n'abatumira mutabani we, ng'agamba nti: ‘Omwana wange banaamutya.’" 
Matthew21:38 Naye abalimi bwe baalaba ku mutabani we ne bagambagana nti: ‘Ono ye musika; mugire tumutte, obusika bwe tubutwale.’" 
Matthew21:39 Ne bamukwata, ne bamugobera ebweru w'ennimiro y'emizabbibu, ne bamutta." 
Matthew21:40 Kale nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu bw'alijja, abalimi abo alibakola atya?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ne bamugamba nti: “Bakafulu abo ababi alibazikiriza, ennimiro ye ey'emizabbibu n'agikwasa abalimi abalala, abalimuwa ebibala mu budde bwabyo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Awo Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Temusomanga mu Biwandiiko nti: “ ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana lye lyafuuka lukulwe mu nsonda; ekyo Omukama ye yakikola, kya kyewuunyo mu maaso gaffe’?" 
Matthew21:43 Kyenva mbagamba nti obwakabaka bwa Katonda bulibaggyibwako ne buweebwa eggwanga eriribala ebibala byabwo.” 
Matthew21:44  
Matthew21:45 Bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira engero ze, ne bategeera ng'ayogera ku bo." 
Matthew21:46 Naye bwe baanoonya okumukwata, ne batya ebibiina, kubanga abantu baali bamutwala ng'omulanzi." 
Matthew22:1 Awo Yezu n'addamu okwogera nabo mu ngero, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew22:2 “Obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bufaanaanyirizibwa kabaka eyakolera mutabani we embaga ey'obugole," 
Matthew22:3 n'atuma abaweereza be okunona abaayitiddwa ku mbaga, naye bo ne bagaana okujja." 
Matthew22:4 N'atuma abaweereza abalala, n'abagamba nti: ‘Mugambe abayitiddwa nti nteeseteese embaga yange, nzise zisseddume zange ko n'ente ensava; byonna biwedde okuteekateeka; mujje ku mbaga.’" 
Matthew22:5 Naye bali ne bateefiirayo, ne beetambulira; omu n'agenda mu nnimiro ye, omulala mu byamaguzi bye;" 
Matthew22:6 abaasigalawo ne bakwata abaweereza be ne babajolonga, n'okubatta ne babatta." 
Matthew22:7 Kabaka n'akalala n'asindika amagye ge, n'azikiriza abatemu abo, ekibuga kyabwe n'akyokya omuliro." 
Matthew22:8 “Awo n'agamba abaweereza be nti: ‘Embaga yiino ewedde okuteekateeka, naye ababadde bayitiddwa tebasaanidde." 
Matthew22:9 Kale nno mugende mu masaŋŋanzira muyite ku mbaga bonna be munaasanga.’ 
Matthew22:10 Abaweereza ne bagenda mu nguudo ne mu makubo ne bakuŋŋaanya bonna be baasaangiriza: ababi n'abalungi, ekisenge omwali embaga ne kijjula abagenyi." 
Matthew22:11 Kabaka bwe yayingira okulaba abagenyi, n'asangamu omuntu atayambadde kyambalo kya mbaga;" 
Matthew22:12 n'amugamba nti: ‘Munnange, oyingidde otya muno nga tolina kyambalo kya mbaga?’ Oli n'asirika busirisi." 
Matthew22:13 Awo kabaka n'agamba abaweereza be nti: ‘Mumusibe emikono n'amagulu, mumusuule ebweru mu kizikiza, eyo awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji’" 
Matthew22:14 Kubanga abayitiddwa bangi, naye abalondemu batono.”" 
Matthew22:15 Awo Abafarisaayo ne bagenda ne bateesa amagezi bamutege mu bigambo. 
Matthew22:16 Ne bamusindikira abayigirizwa baabwe wamu n'ab'ekibiina kya Erode, nga bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, tumanyi ng'oli wa mazima era ng'oyigiriza mu mazima ekkubo lya Katonda, ate nga teweeguya muntu, kubanga obukulu bw'omuntu si bw'otunuulira." 
Matthew22:17 Kale tubuulire ky'olowooza: kisaanye okuwa Kayisari omusolo, nandiki tekisaanye?”" 
Matthew22:18 Yezu n'ategeera omutima gwabwe omubi, n'abagamba nti: “Bakuusa mmwe, munkemera ki?" 
Matthew22:19 Mundage dinaari ey'omusolo.” Bo ne bamuleetera dinaari. 
Matthew22:20 N'abagamba nti: “Ekifaanaanyi kino n'ekiwandiiko ebiriko by'ani?” 
Matthew22:21 Ne bamugamba nti: “Bya Kayisari.” N'abagamba nti: “Awo nno ebya Kayisari mubiddize Kayisari, n'ebya Katonda mubiddize Katonda.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bwe baawulira ebyo ne beewuunya, ne bamuleka, ne bagenda." 
Matthew22:23 Ku lunaku olwo Abasaddukaayo ne bajja gy'ali, abo abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bamubuuza nti:" 
Matthew22:24 “Muyigiriza, Musa yagamba nti: ‘Omuntu bw'afanga nga talina baana, muganda we awasanga mukazi we n'asibusiza muganda we ezzadde.’" 
Matthew22:25 Kale nno mu ffe waaliwo ab'oluganda musanvu: omubereberye yawasa, n'afa nga tazadde mwana; mukazi we n'amulekera muganda we." 
Matthew22:26 N'owookubiri bw'atyo, n'owookusatu, okutuusa ku woomusanvu." 
Matthew22:27 Oluvannyuma lwa bonna n'omukazi n'afa. 
Matthew22:28 Kale mu mazuukira ku abo omusanvu aliba muka ani? Anti bonna omusanvu baamuwasaako.” 
Matthew22:29 Awo Yezu n'addamu nti: “Musobya obutamanya Biwandiiko n'obuyinza bwa Katonda. 
Matthew22:30 Ndaba mu mazuukira tebagenda kuwasa yadde okufumbirwa, wabula baliba nga bamalayika mu ggulu." 
Matthew22:31 Ku kuzuukira kw'abafu, temusomanga Katonda kye yabagamba nti:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Nze Katonda wa Yiburayimu, Katonda wa Yizaake ne Katonda wa Yakobo?’ Katonda taba wa bafu, wabula wa balamu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ekibiina bwe kyawulira, ne bawuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye." 
Matthew22:34 Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira ng'asirisizza Abasaddukaayo ne beekuŋŋaanya. 
Matthew22:35 Munnaabwe omu omuyigiriza w'amateeka n'amubuuza ng'amukema nti: 
Matthew22:36 “Muyigiriza, kiragiro ki ekikulu mu Tteeka?”" 
Matthew22:37 N'amugamba nti: “Oyagalanga Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, n'emmeeme yo yonna." 
Matthew22:38 Ekyo kye kiragiro ekikulu era ekisooka. 
Matthew22:39 Ekyokubiri kifaanana ng'ekyo: ‘Oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.’ 
Matthew22:40 Ku biragiro bino ebibiri kwe kwesigamye Etteeka lyonna n'Abalanzi.” 
Matthew22:41 Awo Abafarisaayo ne beekuŋŋaanya. Yezu n'ababuuza 
Matthew22:42 n'agamba nti: “Mmwe Kristu mumulowoozaako mutya? Mwana w'ani?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Wa Dawudi.” 
Matthew22:43 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Kiri kitya nno Dawudi ku bwa Mwoyo okumuyita Mukama bw'agamba nti: 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Omukama yagamba Mukama wange, nti: “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo” okutuusa abalabe bo lwe ndibassa wansi w'ebigere byo’?" 
Matthew22:45 Kale, obanga Dawudi amuyita Mukama, ate abeera atya omwana we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Ne wataba muntu yaguma kumwanukula kigambo; era okuva ku olwo, tewaali n'omu aguma kumubuuza nate." 
Matthew23:1 Awo Yezu n'ayogera eri ebibiina n'abayigirizwa be, n'agamba nti:" 
Matthew23:2 “Abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo batudde ku ntebe ya Musa," 
Matthew23:3 byonna bye bagamba mubikwate, mubikole, naye temuyisa nga bo bwe bayisa, kubanga bye bagamba bo tebabikola." 
Matthew23:4 Basiba emigugu emizito, egiteetikkika, ne bagissa ku bibegabega by'abantu, sso nga bo tebaagala kuginyeenyako n'akatono na ngalo yaabwe." 
Matthew23:5 Mu byonna bye bakola bagenderera abantu babalabe; kyebava beekolera filakiteriya engazi n'ebituttwa ebiwanvu. 
Matthew23:6 Baagala ebifo ebisinga ekitiibwa ku bijjulo n'entebe ez'oku mwanjo mu sinaagooga," 
Matthew23:7 n'okulamusibwa mu mbuga n'abantu okubayita Rabbi. 
Matthew23:8 Mmwe muleke kuyitibwa Rabbi, kubanga omuyigiriza wammwe ali omu, ate mwenna muli ba luganda." 
Matthew23:9 Ku nsi temubangako na gwe muyita kitammwe, kubanga mulina Kitammwe omu yekka, ali mu ggulu." 
Matthew23:10 Temuyitibwanga Bayigisa, kubanga mulina Omuyigisa omu, Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Asinga obukulu mu mmwe abeerenga muweereza wammwe; 
Matthew23:12 kubanga buli eyeegulumiza alitoowazibwa; ate buli eyeetoowaza, aligulumizibwa." 
Matthew23:13 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Kubanga muggalira abantu obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu; mmwe mwennyini temuyingira, n'abandyagadde okuyingira temubaganya kuyingira." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Kubanga mutalaaga ennyanja n'olukalu okukyusa omuntu omu mu kiyudaaya, bw'amala okukyuka ne mumusaanyiza Geyenna emirundi ebiri okusinga mmwe." 
Matthew23:16 Zibasanze mmwe abakulembeze abazibe b'amaaso! Mugamba nti: ‘Buli alayidde Ekiggwa, ekyo si kantu, naye alayidde zaabu aweerezebwa Ekiggwa, ateekwa okutuukiriza ky'alayidde.’" 
Matthew23:17 Basiru mmwe abazibe b'amaaso! Ekisinga obukulu kiruwa, zaabu, nandiki Ekiggwa ekitukuza zaabu?" 
Matthew23:18 “Era mugamba nti: ‘Buli aba alayidde omwaliiro, ekyo si kantu, naye alayidde ekitone ekiriko, ateekwa okutuukiriza ky'alayidde.’" 
Matthew23:19 Bamuzibe mmwe, ekisinga obukulu kiruwa? Ekitone, nandiki omwaliiro ogutukuza ekitone?" 
Matthew23:20 Awo nno alayira omwaliiro, agulayira n'alayirirako na byonna ebiguliko." 
Matthew23:21 Na buli alayira Ekiggwa, akirayira n'alayiririramu n'oyo akisulamu." 
Matthew23:22 Na buli alayira eggulu, alayira nnamulondo ya Katonda n'oyo agituulako." 
Matthew23:23 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Mutona ekyekkumi ekya nnabbugira, n'eky'aneta n'ekya kontamiiri, ne muleka ebisinga obukulu ebiragirwa mu mateeka: obutuukirivu, ekisa n'okukkiriza; sso ebyo mwanditeekeddwa okubikola nga na biri temubirese." 
Matthew23:24 Bakulembeze mmwe abazibe b'amaaso, musengejjako akabu obubu, eŋŋamiya ne mugimira." 
Matthew23:25 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Kubanga ebikopo n'essowaani mubitukuza kungulu, naye nga munda bijjudde obunyazi n'omululu." 
Matthew23:26 Mufarisaayo ggwe omuzibe w'amaaso, sooka otukuze ekikopo n'essowaani munda, kungulu kw'abyo kulyoke nakwo kutukule." 
Matthew23:27 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Kubanga mufaanana ng'amalaalo amatukuze n'ennoni, agalabika obulungi kungulu, sso nga munda gajjudde eŋŋumbagumba z'abafu, na buli bujama." 
Matthew23:28 Nammwe bwe mutyo bwe muli; kungulu abantu mubalabikira ng'abatuukirivu, sso nga munda mujjudde obukuusa n'obugwenyufu." 
Matthew23:29 “Zibasanze, mmwe abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo, bakuusa mmwe! Kubanga muzimba amalaalo g'abalanzi, ne munyiriza ebiggya by'abatuukirivu," 
Matthew23:30 ne mugamba nti: ‘Singa twaliwo mu nsangi za bajjajjaffe, tetwandyetabye nabo kuyiwa musaayi gwa balanzi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Awo nno mwennyini mwerumiriza nga bwe muli abaana ba bali abattanga abalanzi. 
Matthew23:32 Kale, mmwe mujjuulirize bajjajjammwe we baalekera." 
Matthew23:33 Misota mmwe, abaana b'amasalambwa, mulisobola okudduka okusalirwa omusango gwa Geyenna?" 
Matthew23:34 “Kale nno nzija kubatumira abalanzi, n'ab'amagezi, n'abawandiisi; abamu mujja kubatta mubakomerere ku misaalaba; abalala mujja kubaswanyuulira mu sinaagooga zammwe, mubayigganye okuva mu kibuga ekimu okudda mu kirala." 
Matthew23:35 Awo nno omusaayi gubaddeko ogw'abatuukirivu gwonna ogwali guyiiyiddwa mu nsi okuviira ddala ku musaayi gwa Abeli ataaliko musango, okutuuka ku musaayi gwa Zakariya mutabani wa Barakiya, gwe mwatemulira wakati w'Ekiggwa n'Omwaliiro." 
Matthew23:36 Mazima mbagamba nti ebyo byonna birijjira ab'ezzadde lino. 
Matthew23:37 “Yeruzaalemu, Yeruzaalemu, ggwe atta abalanzi n'abakutumirwa n'obakuba amayinja! Emirundi emeka gye nayagala okukuŋŋaanya abaana bo ng'enkoko bw'ekumiriza obwana bwayo wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byayo, n'otaganya?" 
Matthew23:38 Laba, ennyumba yammwe ebalekeddwa ttayo." 
Matthew23:39 Ka mbabuulire, temulindaba okutuusa lwe muligamba nti: ‘Atenderezebwe oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Awo Yezu n'ava mu Kiggwa; aba agenda, abayigirizwa be ne basembera w'ali okumulaga enzimba y'Ekiggwa." 
Matthew24:2 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Ebyo byonna mubirabye? Mazima mbagamba nti wano tewalisigala jjinja liri ku linnaalyo litalisuulibwa wansi.” 
Matthew24:3 Bwe yali atudde ku Lusozi lw'Oliva, abayigirizwa be ne basembera w'ali ebbali yekka, ne bagamba nti: “Tubuulire, ebyo biribeerawo ddi, kaluwa akaliba akabonero k'okujja kwo n'ak'enkomerero y'emirembe?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yezu n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Mwekkaanye, tewabaawo abawubisa." 
Matthew24:5 Kubanga bangi balijja mu linnya lyange nga bagamba nti: ‘Nze Kristu,’ era baliwubisa bangi." 
Matthew24:6 Muliwulira entalo, n'eŋŋambo z'entalo. Mwekuume, temwekanganga. Ebyo tebirirema kubaawo; naye yo enkomerero eriba tennatuuka." 
Matthew24:7 Kubanga eggwanga lirisitukira mu linnaalyo, n'obwakabaka mu bunnaabwo; walibaawo enjala ne musisi mu bifo ebimu;" 
Matthew24:8 naye ebyo byonna kwe kusookereza kw'okulumwa. 
Matthew24:9 “Balibawaayo okubabonyaabonya ne babatta. Amawanga gonna galibakyawa olw'okubeera erinnya lyange. 
Matthew24:10 Bangi baliterebuka, ne balyaŋŋanamu enkwe, ne bakyawagana." 
Matthew24:11 Abalanzi ab'obulimba bangi balisituka ne bawubisa bangi. 
Matthew24:12 Olw'obugwenyufu okugenda nga bweyongera, bangi okwagala kwabwe kulinnyogoga." 
Matthew24:13 Naye aligumiikiriza okutuusa ku nkomerero alirokoka. 
Matthew24:14 N'Evangili eno ey'obwakabaka eribuulirwa mu nsi yonna, ng'obukakafu eri amawanga gonna; olwo nno enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka." 
Matthew24:15 “Awo nno bwe muliraba ekyenyinyalwa ekizikiriza, Danyeli omulanzi kye yayogerako, nga kiri mu Kifo Ekitukuvu, asoma bino ategeeranga." 
Matthew24:16 Olwo abaliba mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga mu nsozi; 
Matthew24:17 aliba ku kasolya waggulu takkanga kuggyamu kantu mu nnyumba ye," 
Matthew24:18 n'alibeera mu nnimiro, taddanga kutwala munagiro gwe." 
Matthew24:19 Zibasanze abo abaliba embuto n'abayonsa mu nnaku ezo! 
Matthew24:20 Mwegayirire okudduka kwammwe kuleme kutuuka mu budde bwa butiti oba ku Sabbaato. 
Matthew24:21 Kubanga mu nnaku ezo mulibaamu ebibonoobono bingi ebitabangawo okuva mu masooka g'ensi n'okutuusa kati, era tebiribaawo nate." 
Matthew24:22 Era singa ennaku tezaakendeezebwako, tewandiwonye muntu n'omu; naye, olw'okubeera abalondemu, ennaku ezo zirikendeezebwako." 
Matthew24:23 “Awo nno bwe wabangawo abagamba nti: ‘Laba, Kristu wuuno wano,’ oba nti: ‘Wuuli wali!’ temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:24 Kubanga Bakristu ab'obulimba n'abalanzi ab'obulimba bagenda kusituka; balikola obubonero obunene n'ebyewuunyisa okuwubisa n'ewandibadde abalondemu, singa kiyinzika." 
Matthew24:25 Laba, mbalabuliddewo." 
Matthew24:26 Awo nno ne bwe babagambanga nti: ‘Wuuli mu ddungu,’ temugendangayo; oba nti: ‘Wuuno wano mu nnyumba,’ temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:27 Kubanga ng'ekimyanso bwe kimyansiza ebuvanjuba ne kyaka okutuuka ebugwanjuba, n'okutuuka kw'Omwana w'Omuntu bwe kuliba kutyo." 
Matthew24:28 Omulambo we gubeera, n'ensega we zirikuŋŋaanira." 
Matthew24:29 “Amangu ng'ebibonoobono eby'ennaku ezo byakaggwa, enjuba eriddugala, omwezi gulirekayo okwaka, n'emmunyeenye zirigwa okuva ku ggulu, n'amaanyi ag'omu ggulu galinyeenyezebwa." 
Matthew24:30 Awo akabonero k'Omwana w'Omuntu kalirabika ku ggulu; ebika byonna eby'oku nsi ne biryoka bitema ebiwoobe; baliraba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ajjira ku bire eby'oku ggulu, n'amaanyi mangi, n'ekitiibwa kinene." 
Matthew24:31 Alituma bamalayika be n'okuvuga kw'ekkondeere okw'amaanyi ne bakuŋŋaanya abalonde be okuva mu njuyi ennya, okuva ku nsonda emu ey'eggulu okutuuka ku ndala." 
Matthew24:32 “Mulabire ku mukunyu; ettabi lyagwo bwe lidda obuto, ne lissaako amakoola, mutegeera ng'obudde obw'ekyeya bunaatera okutuuka." 
Matthew24:33 Nammwe nno, bwe mulabanga ebyo byonna, mumanyanga nti ali kumpi, ku miryango kwennyini." 
Matthew24:34 Mazima mbagamba nti ezzadde lino teririggwaawo ebyo byonna nga tebinnatuukirira. 
Matthew24:35 Eggulu n'ensi biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange tebiriggwaawo." 
Matthew24:36 “Kyokka olunaku lwennyini oba akadde tewali abimanyi, newandibadde bamalayika mu ggulu, yadde Mwana, wabula Taata yekka." 
Matthew24:37 Ng'obudde bwa Nowa bwe bwali, bwe guliba ne mu kujja kw'Omwana w'Omuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Nga bwe gwali mu nnaku ezaakulembera omujjuzi: abantu baali balya, baali banywa, nga bawasa, nga bafumbiza, okutuusa olunaku Nowa lwe yayingira mu kyombo," 
Matthew24:39 ne batamanya, okutuusa omujjuzi lwe gwajja ne gubeerawo bonna, n'okujja kw'Omwana w'Omuntu bwe kuliba bwe kutyo." 
Matthew24:40 “Abasajja babiri balibeera mu nnimiro, omu alitwalibwa, omulala n'alekebwa." 
Matthew24:41 Abakazi babiri baliba basa ku lubengo, omu alitwalibwa, omulala n'alekebwa." 
Matthew24:42 Awo nno mutunule, kubanga temumanyi lunaku ki Mukama wammwe lw'alituukirako." 
Matthew24:43 Mumanye na kino nti singa nnannyinimu yali ategedde akaseera omubbi k'anajjiramu, yanditunudde, n'ataganya nnyumba ye kumenyebwa." 
Matthew24:44 Nammwe nno mwetegekenga, kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu alijja mu kaseera ke mutalowooza." 
Matthew24:45 “Awo nno ye ani oyo omuweereza omwesigwa era omwegendereza mukama we gwe yassa ku b'omu nnyumba ye okubawa emmere akadde nga katuuse? 
Matthew24:46 Omuweereza oyo yeesiimye mukama we bw'alijja amala amusanga ng'akola bw'atyo! 
Matthew24:47 Mazima mbagamba nti alimussa ku bibye byonna. 
Matthew24:48 Naye singa omuweereza omubi oyo agamba mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Mukama wange aludde,’" 
Matthew24:49 n'asooka okukuba baweereza banne, n'alya, n'anywa n'abatamiivu," 
Matthew24:50 mukama w'omuweereza oyo alijja ku lunaku lw'atamusuubira ne mu kaseera k'atamanyi. 
Matthew24:51 Alimubonereza nnyo, n'amuteeka n'abakuusa, eyo awaliba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Olwo obwakabaka obw'omu ggulu bulifaanaanyirizibwa abawala ekkumi abaakwata ettawaaza zaabwe ne bagenda okwaniriza awasizza. 
Matthew25:2 Abataano ku bo baali babuyabuya, naye abalala abataano nga balabufu." 
Matthew25:3 Kubanga abataano ababuyabuya, bwe baakwata ettawaaza zaabwe, tebaatwalirako muzigo." 
Matthew25:4 Abalabufu bo ne batwala omuzigo mu ccupa wamu n'ettawaaza zaabwe. 
Matthew25:5 Awasa bwe yalwawo okutuuka, bonna ne basumagira, ne beebaka." 
Matthew25:6 Eyo mu ttumbi, ne wabaawo obuluulu nti: ‘Awasa wuuyo! Mufulume mumusisinkane.’" 
Matthew25:7 Abawala bali bonna ne basituka, ne balongoosa ettawaaza zaabwe." 
Matthew25:8 Ababuyabuya ne bagamba abalabufu nti: ‘Mutuwe ku muzigo gwammwe, kubanga ettawaaza zaffe zizikira.’" 
Matthew25:9 Abalabufu ne baddamu nga bagamba nti: ‘Oba oli awo ne gutatumala, ffe nammwe. Ekisinga mugende mu batunzi mwegulireyo.’" 
Matthew25:10 Baali bagenze okwegulira, awasa n'atuuka; abaali beetegese ne bayingira wamu naye ku mbaga, omulyango ne guggalibwa." 
Matthew25:11 Oluvannyuma abawala abaasigalira ne bajja, nga bagamba nti: ‘Ssebo, ssebo, tuggulirewo.’" 
Matthew25:12 Ye n'ayanukula nti: ‘Mazima mbagamba nti nze sibamanyi.’ 
Matthew25:13 Awo nno mwekuumenga, kubanga temumanyi lunaku na kaseera.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Era kiriba ng'omuntu eyali agenda olugendo, eyayita abaweereza be, n'abakwasa ebintu bye," 
Matthew25:15 omu n'amukwasa talenta ttaano, omulala bbiri, n'omulala emu ng'alabira ku busobozi bwa buli omu. N'agenda." 
Matthew25:16 Eyaweebwa talenta ettaano n'agenda mangu, n'azisuubuza, n'aviisaamu talenta endala ttaano." 
Matthew25:17 Eyaweebwa ebbiri naye bwe yakola, naviisaamu endala bbiri." 
Matthew25:18 Naye eyaweebwa talenta emu, n'agenda n'asima mu ttaka, n'akukulira omwo ensimbi za mukama we." 
Matthew25:19 Oluvannyuma lw'ebbanga ddene, mukama w'abaweereza abo n'atuuka, n'atereeza nabo ebibye." 
Matthew25:20 Eyafuna talenta ettaano n'asembera, n'aleeta talenta endala ttaano, n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, wankwasa talenta ttaano; laba, naviisaamu endala ttaano.’" 
Matthew25:21 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: ‘Weebale, omuweereza omulungi omwesigwa, kubanga wali mwesigwa mu bitono, nzija kukukwasa ebingi. Kale yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:22 Eyaweebwa talenta ebbiri n'asembera n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, wankwasa talenta bbiri; laba naviisaamu endala bbiri.’" 
Matthew25:23 Mukama we n'amugamba nti: ‘Weebale omuweereza omulungi, omwesigwa; kubanga wali mwesigwa mu bitono, nzija kukukwasa ebingi. Kale yingira mu ssanyu lya mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:24 N'eyafuna talenta emu n'asembera, n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, nkumanyi ng'oli muntu mukalubo; okungula gy'otaasiga, okuŋŋaanya gy'otaawewera." 
Matthew25:25 Natya; kwe kugenda talenta yo ne ngikukulira mu ttaka; kwata ekikyo.’ 
Matthew25:26 Mukama we n'addamu n'amugamba nti: ‘Muweereza ggwe omubi, engajaba! Wamanya nga nkungula gye saasiga, nkuŋŋaanya gye saawewera," 
Matthew25:27 wali nno oteekwa ensimbi zange okuziwa abawaanyisa b'ensimbi; bwe nandikomyewo, ne nfuna ekyange ko n'amagoba." 
Matthew25:28 Kale, talenta mugimuggyeeko, mugiwe oli alina ekkumi," 
Matthew25:29 Kubanga buli alina aliweebwa n'afuna na biyitirivu; naye atalina ne ky'alina kirimuggyibwako. 
Matthew25:30 Omuweereza ono entagasa mumukasuke ebweru mu nzikiza, eyo eriba okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alijja mu kitiibwa kye, wamu ne bamalayika be bonna, olwo alituula ku nnamulondo ye ey'ekitiibwa." 
Matthew25:32 Amawanga gonna ne gakuŋŋaanira mu maaso ge, n'abaawulamu kinnoomu ng'omusumba bw'ayawula endiga mu mbuzi." 
Matthew25:33 Alissa endiga ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, naye embuzi ku gwa kkono." 
Matthew25:34 Awo kabaka aligamba abo abalimubeera ku mukono ogwa ddyo, nti: ‘Mujje mmwe Kitange be yawa omukisa, musikire obwakabaka obwabategekerwa okuva ensi lwe yabangibwawo." 
Matthew25:35 Kubanga bwe nali nnumwa enjala, mwampa ku kyokulya; bwe nali nnumwa ennyonta, mwampa ku kyokunywa; bwe nali omugenyi mwannyaniriza;" 
Matthew25:36 bwe nali obwereere, mwannyambaza; bwe nali omulwadde, mwannambula; bwe nali mu kkomera, mwantuukako.’" 
Matthew25:37 Awo abatuukirivu balimuddamu nti: ‘Mukama, twakulaba ddi ng'olumwa enjala, ne tukuliisa; ng'olumwa ennyonta, ne tukuwa ekyokunywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Twakulaba ddi ng'oli mugenyi ne tukwaniriza; ng'oli bwereere ne tukwambaza? 
Matthew25:39 Era twakulaba ddi ng'oli mulwadde, oba omusibe mu kkomera, ne tukulambula?’" 
Matthew25:40 Kabaka alibaddamu nti: ‘Mazima mbagamba nti nga bwe mwakikolera omu ku baganda bange bano abasingayo obuto, mwakikolera nze.’" 
Matthew25:41 Awo aligamba abo abalibeera ku mukono gwe ogwa kkono nti: ‘Bavumirire mmwe, muve we ndi, mugende mu muliro ogutaggwaawo ogwategekerwa Sitaani ne bamalayika be;" 
Matthew25:42 Kubanga nali nnumwa enjala, ne mutampa kyakulya, nali nnumwa ennyonta, ne mutampa kyakunywa;" 
Matthew25:43 nali mugenyi ne mutannyaniriza, nali bukunya ne mutannyambaza; nali mulwadde ne mu kkomera, ne mutannambula.’" 
Matthew25:44 Awo nabo balimuddamu nti: ‘Mukama, twakulaba ddi ng'olumwa enjala, oba ng'olumwa ennyonta, oba ng'oli mugenyi, oba ng'oli bwereere, oba ng'oli mulwadde, oba ng'oli mu kkomera ne tutakuweereza?’" 
Matthew25:45 Alibaddamu ng'abagamba nti: ‘Mazima mbagamba nti nga bwe mwagaana okukikolera omu ku basingayo obuto bano, mwagaana kukikolera nze.’" 
Matthew25:46 Abo nno baligenda mu kibonerezo ekitaggwaawo; abatuukirivu bo mu bulamu obutaggwaawo.” 
Matthew26:1 Yezu bwe yasirissa ebigambo ebyo byonna n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: 
Matthew26:2 “Mumanyi nga Pasika ejja mu nnaku bbiri, n'Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kuweebwayo okukomererwa ku musaalaba.”" 
Matthew26:3 Awo bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu ne bakuŋŋaana mu nnyumba ya kabona omukulu eyali ayitibwa Kayafa," 
Matthew26:4 ne bateesa amagezi ag'okukwata Yezu nga bamusoonookereza, bamutte." 
Matthew26:5 Kyokka ne bagamba nti: “Si ku mbaga enkulu, sikulwa ng'akeegugungo kagwawo mu kibiina.”" 
Matthew26:6 Yezu bwe yali e Betaniya mu nnyumba ya Simoni omugenge," 
Matthew26:7 omukazi n'ajja w'ali n'akasumbi k'alabasiteri ak'omuzigo ogw'akawoowo ogw'omuwendo, n'agumufuka ku mutwe ng'atudde alya." 
Matthew26:8 Abayigirizwa bwe baalaba, ne banyiiga, ne bagamba nti: “Gufudde ki guno?" 
Matthew26:9 Kubanga guno gubadde guyinza okutundibwa omuwendo omunene ensimbi ne zigabirwa abaavu.” 
Matthew26:10 Yezu n'ategeera, n'abagamba nti: “Omukazi ono mumutawaanyiza ki? Ankoledde ekintu kirungi;" 
Matthew26:11 abaavu muli nabo bulijjo; sso nze temujja kubeeranga nange bulijjo. 
Matthew26:12 Bw'afuse omuzigo ogw'akawoowo ku mubiri gwange, akikoze kuntegekera maziika." 
Matthew26:13 Mazima mbagamba nti: wonna Evangili eno gy'eribuulirwa mu nsi yonna, ky'akoze kiryogerwangako okumujjukira.”" 
Matthew26:14 Awo omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri eyali ayitibwa Yuda Yisikariyoti, n'agenda eri bakabona abakulu," 
Matthew26:15 n'abagamba nti: “Mwagala kumpa ki nze bwe nnaabamukwasa?” Bo ne bamusasula ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu. 
Matthew26:16 Okuva mu kaseera ako n'anoonya akakisa amuweeyo. 
Matthew26:17 Awo ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku ez'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse abayigirizwa ne basembera awali Yezu, ne bagamba nti: “Oyagala tugende tukutegekere wa gy'onooliira Pasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Mugende mu kibuga ewa gundi, mumugambe nti: ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti: Obudde bwange buli kumpi; ewuwo gye nnaakolera Pasika wamu n'abayigirizwa bange.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abayigirizwa ne bakola nga Yezu bwe yali abalagidde, ne bateekateeka Pasika." 
Matthew26:20 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, n'atuula ku mmeeza wamu n'Ekkumi n'Ababiri." 
Matthew26:21 Bwe baali balya, n'agamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti munnammwe omu ajja kumpaayo.”" 
Matthew26:22 Bo ne banakuwala nnyo; ne basooka okumubuuza kinnoomu nti: “Mukama, ye nze?”" 
Matthew26:23 Ye n'addamu nti: “Akoza nange mu kibya y'anampaayo. 
Matthew26:24 Weewaawo Omwana w'Omuntu agenda nga bwe kyamuwandiikibwako, kyokka zimusanze oyo anaawaayo Omwana w'Omuntu! Singa omuntu oyo teyazaalibwa, kyandibadde kirungi gy'ali.”" 
Matthew26:25 Ne Yuda eyamuwaayo n'agamba nti: “Rabbi, ye nze?” Ye n'agamba nti: “Oyogedde.”" 
Matthew26:26 Bwe baali balya, Yezu n'akwata omugaati, ne yeebaza, n'agumenyamu, n'awa abayigirizwa be ng'agamba nti: “Mukwate, mulye; kino mubiri gwange.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ate n'akwata ekikompe, ne yeebaza n'akibawa, n'agamba nti: “Munywe ku kino mwenna;" 
Matthew26:28 Kubanga kino musaayi gwange ogw'endagaano, oguyiibwa ku lw'abangi, olw'okusonyiyisa ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Ka mbabuulire, okuva kati siriddamu kunywa ku kibala kino eky'omuzabbibu, okutuusa olunaku olwo lwe ndikinywa obuggya wamu nammwe mu bwakabaka bwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew26:30 Bwe baamala okuyimba oluyimba, ne bafuluma, ne bagenda ku Lusozi olw'Oliva." 
Matthew26:31 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwenna mujja kunneesittalako ekiro kino, kubanga baawandiika nti: ‘Ndikuba omusumba, endiga ze ggana ne zibuna emiwabo.’" 
Matthew26:32 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukira, ndibeesooka mu Galilaaya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Petero n'amuddamu nti: “Abalala bonna ne bwe banaakwesittalako, nze sijja kwesittala n'akatono.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Mazima nkugamba nti mu kiro kino enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, onooba onneegaanyi emirundi esatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Ne bwe nnaaba ndi wa kufa wamu naawe, sijja kukwegaana.” Na bonna abayigirizwa ne boogera bwe batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Awo Yezu n'agenda nabo mu kafo akayitibwa Getisemani, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mutuule wano ngira ŋŋenda eri neegayirire.”" 
Matthew26:37 N'atoolako Petero ne batabani ba Zebedaayo bombi, n'asooka okuwulira ennaku n'okukabirirwa." 
Matthew26:38 N'abagamba nti: “Omwoyo gwange guliko ennaku nnyingi ezaagala n'okunzita; mubeere wano, mutunule wamu nange.”" 
Matthew26:39 N'abaawukanako katono, n'agwa wansi ku maaso ge, ne yeegayirira ng'agamba nti: “Kitange, obanga kiyinzika, ekikompe kino kimpiteko; naye si nga nze bwe njagala, wabula nga ggwe bw'oyagala.”" 
Matthew26:40 N'adda eri abayigirizwa, n'abasanga nga beebase; n'agamba Petero nti: “Abaffe, temuyinza kutunula nange wadde essaawa emu eti?" 
Matthew26:41 Mutunule, mwegayirire, muleme kutwalibwa mu kukemebwa; kubanga omwoyo gwagala, naye omubiri munafu.”" 
Matthew26:42 Era omulundi ogwokubiri ne yeegayirira n'agamba nti: “Kitange, oba ekikompe kino tekiyinza kuyitawo, wabula nga nkinywedde, kikolebwe nga bw'oyagala.”" 
Matthew26:43 N'adda ogwokubiri, era n'abasanga nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaali gabakambagga." 
Matthew26:44 N'abaleka, era n'agenda, ne yeegayirira ogwokusatu ng'ayogera ebigambo bye bimu." 
Matthew26:45 Awo n'ajja eri abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti: “Mukyebase, mukyawummuddeko? Kaakano akadde katuuse, Omwana w'Omuntu agenda okuweebwayo mu mikono gy'aboonoonyi." 
Matthew26:46 Musituke tugende, kubanga anampaayo ali kumpi.”" 
Matthew26:47 Yali akyayogera, Yuda, omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri, n'atuuka ng'ali n'ekibiina kinene eky'abakutte ebitala n'emiggo okuva mu bakabona abakulu n'abakadde b'abantu." 
Matthew26:48 Eyamuwaayo yali abawadde akabonero, ng'agambye nti: “Gwe nnaanywegera, nga ye wuuyo; mumukwate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Amangu ago n'asemberera Yezu, n'amugamba nti: “Mirembe, Rabbi.” N'amunywegera." 
Matthew26:50 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Munnange, ogukuleese wano?” Awo bali ne basembera, ne bamussaako engalo, ne bamukwata." 
Matthew26:51 Naye omu ku abo abaali ne Yezu, n'agolola omukono, n'asowola ekitala kye, n'atema omuddu wa kabona omukulu, n'amusalako okutu." 
Matthew26:52 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ekitala kyo kizze mu kifo kyakyo, kubanga bonna abakwata ekitala, balizikirira na kitala." 
Matthew26:53 Nandiki olowooza nga siyinza kusaba Kitange amangu ago n'ampeereza ebitongole by'eggye lya bamalayika kkumi na bibiri n'okusoba? 
Matthew26:54 Ebiwandiiko ebitukuvu binaatuukirizibwa bitya nti bwe bityo bwe birina okuba?” 
Matthew26:55 Mu kaseera ako, Yezu n'agamba ekibiina nti: “Muvuddeyo n'ebitala n'emiggo okunkwata ng'abajjirira omunyazi? Buli lunaku natuulanga nga njigiriza mu Kiggwa naye temwankwata." 
Matthew26:56 Bino byonna biguddewo ebiwandiiko by'abalanzi bituukirire.” Awo abayigirizwa bonna ne bamwabulira, ne badduka." 
Matthew26:57 Naye abo bwe baakwata Yezu, ne bamutwala ewa Kayafa kabona omukulu, abawandiisi n'abakadde gye baali bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Matthew26:58 Ye Petero n'amugoberera ng'ayima walako okutuukira ddala ku luggya lwa kabona omukulu, n'ayingira n'atuula n'abakuumi, alabe enkomerero yaabyo." 
Matthew26:59 Bakabona abakulu n'Olukiiko lwonna ne banoonya obujulizi obw'obulimba obulumiriza Yezu kwe banaasinziira okumutta," 
Matthew26:60 naye ne batabuzuula newandibadde ng'abajulizi ab'obulimba bajja bangi. Oluvannyuma ne wajjawo babiri, ne bagamba nti:" 
Matthew26:61 “Ono yagamba nti: ‘Nnyinza okumenya Ekiggwa kya Katonda, ate ne nkizzaawo mu nnaku ssatu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Awo kabona omukulu n'ayimirira, n'abuuza nti: “Tolina ky'oyanukula? Kiki kino abantu bano kye bakulumiriza?”" 
Matthew26:63 Naye Yezu n'asirika busirisi. Kabona omukulu n'amugamba nti: “Nkulayiza Katonda omulamu, tutegeeze obanga ggwe Kristu Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Oyogedde; era nkugamba nti n'okuva kati Omwana w'Omuntu mulimulaba ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'Obuyinza era ng'ajjira mu bire eby'omu ggulu.” 
Matthew26:65 Awo kabona omukulu n'ayuza ebyambalo bye, n'agamba nti: “Avumye Katonda. Tukyetaagira ki abajulizi, anti mwewuliridde ekivumo kye." 
Matthew26:66 Mmwe mulowooza ki?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Agwanidde kufa.” 
Matthew26:67 Ne bamufujjira amalusu mu maaso, ne bamukuba, ate abamu ne bamukuba empi" 
Matthew26:68 nga bagamba nti: “Tulagule, Kristu, ani akukubye?”" 
Matthew26:69 Petero ye yali atudde bweru mu luggya. Omuzaana omu n'asembera w'ali n'agamba nti: “Naawe wali ne Yezu Omugalilaaya.” 
Matthew26:70 Ye ne yeegaana mu maaso ga bonna, n'agamba nti: “Simanyi ky'ogamba.”" 
Matthew26:71 Aba afuluma ati ku kifugi, omuzaana omulala n'amulaba, n'agamba abaali awo nti: “N'ono yali ne Yezu ow'e Nazareti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Era ne yeegaana ogwokubiri nga bw'alayira nti: “Omusajja simumanyi.” 
Matthew26:73 Nga wayiseewo akabanga, abaali bayimiridde awo ne basembera, ne bagamba Petero nti: “Kya mazima naawe oli omu ku bo, kubanga n'enjogera yo ekuloopa.”" 
Matthew26:74 Ye n'asooka okuvumirira n'okulayira nga bw'agamba nti: “Omuntu oyo simumanyi.” Amangu ago enkoko n'ekookolima. 
Matthew26:75 Petero n'ajjukira ekigambo Yezu kye yali amugambye nti: “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, onooba onneegaanye emirundi esatu.” N'afuluma ebweru, n'akaaba n'okunyolwa kungi." 
Matthew27:1 Obudde bwe bwakya, bakabona abakulu bonna n'abakadde b'abantu ne bateesa batte Yezu." 
Matthew27:2 Ne bamusiba, ne bamutwala, ne bamukwasa Pilato owessaza." 
Matthew27:3 Yuda eyamuwaayo, bwe yalaba nga Yezu asaliddwa ogw'okufa, ne yejjusa; ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu n'abikomyawo ewa bakabona abakulu n'abakadde" 
Matthew27:4 ng'agamba nti: “Nnyonoonye okuwaayo omusaayi gw'ataliiko musango.” Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Ekyo ffe kitukwatako? Ggwe onoolaba.” 
Matthew27:5 Ye n'asuula ebitundu bya ffeeza mu Kiggwa, n'avaawo, n'agenda ne yeetuga." 
Matthew27:6 Bakabona abakulu ne batwala ebitundu bya ffeeza, ne bagamba nti: “Tekisaanira kubiteeka mu ggwanika lya Kiggwa, kubanga zino nsimbi za musaayi.”" 
Matthew27:7 Ne bateesa, ne babigulamu ennimiro y'omubumbi, balyoke baziikengamu abagwira." 
Matthew27:8 Ennimiro eyo kwe kuyitibwa 'Ennimiro y'Omusaayi' n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero. 
Matthew27:9 Awo omulanzi Yeremiya kye yalanga ne kituukirira nti: “Ne batoola ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu, omuwendo gw'oyo abaana ba Yisirayeli abamu gwe baali bagereseeko omuwendo," 
Matthew27:10 ne babiwaayo okugula ennimiro y'omubumbi, nga Katonda bwe yantegeeza.”" 
Matthew27:11 Awo Yezu n'ayimirira mu maaso g'owessaza. Owessaza n'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Oyogedde.” 
Matthew27:12 Naye bwe yawawaabirwa bakabona abakulu n'abakadde, teyaliiko ky'addamu," 
Matthew27:13 Pilato kwe kumugamba nti: “Bye bakulumiriza ebingi bityo tobiwulira?” 
Matthew27:14 Ye n'atamwanukula ku byonna ebyali bimuvunaanibwa; owessaza kwe kwewuunya. 
Matthew27:15 Ku mbaga enkulu owessaza yateeranga ekibiina omusibe gwe kyayagalanga. 
Matthew27:16 Mu budde obwo yalina omusibe amanyiddwa, erinnya lye Barabba." 
Matthew27:17 Abantu bwe baamala okukuŋŋaana, Pilato n'ababuuza nti: “Mwagala mbateere ani, Barabba nandiki Yezu ayitibwa Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Kubanga yali amanyi nga baali bamuleesezza buggya. 
Matthew27:19 Bwe yali atudde ku ntebe ey'obulamuzi, mukazi we n'amutumira ng'agamba nti: “Omutuukirivu oyo tobaako ky'omukolako, kubanga olwa leero nabonyeebonye bingi mu kirooto olw'okubeera ye.”" 
Matthew27:20 Naye bakabona abakulu n'abakadde ne bafukuutirira ekibiina, basabe Barabba, Yezu bamuzikirize." 
Matthew27:21 Owessaza n'addamu okubagamba nti: “Ku babiri mwagala mbateere ani?” Ne bamuddamu nti: “Barabba,”" 
Matthew27:22 Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Yezu ayitibwa Kristu mmukole ntya?” Bonna ne bagamba nti: “Akomererwe ku musaalaba.” 
Matthew27:23 N'abagamba nti: “Ddala yakola kibi ki?” Bo ne beeyongera okukaalaama nga bagamba nti: “Akomererwe ku musaalaba.” 
Matthew27:24 Pilato yalaba talina ky'atuukako, wabula ng'akeegugungo ke katandiikiriza, n'akwata amazzi, n'anaaba mu ngalo mu maaso g'ekibiina, n'agamba nti: “Nze sirina kye nvunaanibwa ku musaayi gw'omuntu ono; mmwe munaalaba.”" 
Matthew27:25 Abantu bonna ne bagamba nti: “Omusaayi gwe gubeere ku ffe ne ku baana baffe.” 
Matthew27:26 Awo n'abateera Barabba; Yezu bwe yamala okumukuba enkoba n'amuwaayo akomererwe ku musaalaba. 
Matthew27:27 Awo abaserikale b'owessaza ne bakwata Yezu ne bamutwala mu Purayitoriyo, ne bamukuŋŋaanyirizaako ekibinja ky'abaserikale kyonna." 
Matthew27:28 Ne bamwambula, ne bamussaako omunagiro omumyufu," 
Matthew27:29 ne bazinga omuge ogw'amaggwa, ne bagumussa ku mutwe, ne bamukwasa olumuli mu mukono ogwa ddyo, ne bamufukaamirira nga bamuduulira, nga bagamba nti: “Mirembe, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ne bamufujjira amalusu mu maaso, ne bakwata olumuli, ne balumukuba mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Bwe baamala okumuduulira, ne bamwambulamu omunagiro, ne bamwambaza engoye ze, ne bamutwala okumukomerera ku musaalaba." 
Matthew27:32 Bwe baali bafuluma, ne basanga omusajja ow'e Kureni, erinnya lye Simoni; ono ne bamuwaliriza okwetikka omusaalaba gwe." 
Matthew27:33 Ne batuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Golugota, kwe kugamba, 'ekifo ky'akawanga'," 
Matthew27:34 ne bamuwa evviini entabulemu endulwe; naye bwe yakombako, n'atayagala kunywa." 
Matthew27:35 Bwe baamala okumukomerera, ebyambalo bye ne babigabanyaamu nga babikubako akalulu;" 
Matthew27:36 ne batuula, ne basigala awo nga bamukuuma." 
Matthew27:37 Ne bassa waggulu w'omutwe gwe omusango gwe, nti: ONO YE YEZU, KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA." 
Matthew27:38 Abanyazi babiri baakomererwa wamu naye, omu ku ddyo n'omulala ku kkono." 
Matthew27:39 Abayise ne bamusekerera, ne bamunyeenyeza omutwe" 
Matthew27:40 nga bagamba nti: “Ggwe amenya Ekiggwa kya Katonda n'okizimba mu nnaku ssatu? Weewonye! Obanga ggwe Mwana wa Katonda, kka ove ku musaalaba.”" 
Matthew27:41 Ne bakabona abakulu, n'abawandiisi, n'abakadde ne bamuduulira nga bagamba nti:" 
Matthew27:42 “Yawonyanga balala, ye tayinza kwewonya. Anti ye kabaka wa Yisirayeli, kaakano nno akke ave ku musaalaba, tujja kumukkiriza." 
Matthew27:43 Anti yeesiga Katonda, kaakano Katonda amuwonye obanga amwetaaga, anti yagamba nti: ‘Ndi Mwana wa Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 N'abanyazi abaali bakomereddwa naye, ne bamuvuma." 
Matthew27:45 Okuva ku ssaawa eyoomukaga ekizikiza ne kibikka ensi yonna okutuusa ku ssaawa eyoomwenda. 
Matthew27:46 Nga ku ssaawa eyoomwenda Yezu n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Eli, Eli, lama sabakitani?” kwe kugamba nti: “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde?”" 
Matthew27:47 Abamu ku baali bayimiridde awo ne bamuwulira, ne bagamba nti: “Ono ayita Eliya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Awo omu ku bo n'ayanguwa mangu n'addira ekyangwe n'akinnyika mu nkaatu, n'akitunga ku lumuli, n'amuwa anywe." 
Matthew27:49 Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Leka, ka tulabe oba Eliya anajja okumuwonya.”" 
Matthew27:50 Ate Yezu n'addamu okukoowoola n'eddoboozi eddene, n'awaayo omwoyo gwe." 
Matthew27:51 Awo olutimbe lw'omu Kiggwa ne luyulikamu wabiri, okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi; ensi n'ekankana, enjazi ne ziryeryebuka," 
Matthew27:52 n'entaana ne zaasama, n'emibiri mingi egy'abatuukirivu abaali bafudde ne gizuukira." 
Matthew27:53 Bwe yamala okuzuukira, baava mu ntaana ne bagenda mu kibuga ekitukuvu, ne balabikira bangi." 
Matthew27:54 Senturiyo n'abaali naye nga bakuuma Yezu, bwe baalaba ensi ng'ekankana n'ebyo byonna ebyabaawo, ne batya nnyo, ne bagamba nti: “Ggwe wamma ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew27:55 N'abakazi bangi abaali bagoberedde Yezu okuva mu Galilaaya nga bamuweereza baali balengera nga bayima walako. 
Matthew27:56 Mu bo mwalimu Mariya Magudalena ne Mariya nnyina Yakobo ne Yozefu, ne nnyina w'abatabani ba Zebedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Awo obudde bwe bwawungeera, ne wajjawo omusajja naggagga ow'e Arimateya, erinnya lye Yozefu; naye yali muyigirizwa wa Yezu." 
Matthew27:58 N'agenda eri Pilato n'amusaba omubiri gwa Yezu. Pilato n'alagira okugumuwa. 
Matthew27:59 Awo Yozefu n'addira omubiri n'aguzinga mu ssuuka ennyonjo," 
Matthew27:60 n'aguteeka mu ntaana ye empya gye yali asimye mu lwazi; n'ayiringisiza ejjinja eddene ku mulyango gw'entaana, n'agenda." 
Matthew27:61 Mariya Magudalena ne Mariya omulala baali awo nga batudde mu maaso g'entaana. 
Matthew27:62 Ku lunaku olwaddako, oluvannyuma lw'Olunaku olw'Okuteekateeka, bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo ne bakuŋŋaanira ewa Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 ne bagamba nti: “Ssebo, tujjukidde ng'omulimba oyo, bwe yali akyali mulamu, yagamba nti: ‘Nga wayise ennaku ssatu ndizuukira;’" 
Matthew27:64 kale nno lagira bakuume entaana okutuusa olw'essatu; abayigirizwa sikulwa nga bajja ne bamubbamu, ne bagamba abantu nti: ‘Azuukidde mu bafu.’ Olwo obulimba obw'oluvannyuma bujja kubeera bubi okusinga obw'olubereberye.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Mufune abakuumi, mugende mukuumire ddala bulungi nga bwe musobola.”" 
Matthew27:66 Ne bagenda ne banyweza entaana, ejjinja ne balissaako envumbo, ne bassaawo n'abakuumi." 
Matthew28:1 Sabbaato bwe yaggwa, mu matulutulu ku lusooka mu wiiki, Mariya Magudalena ne Mariya omulala ne bajja okulaba entaana." 
Matthew28:2 Ne wasituka musisi ow'amaanyi, kubanga malayika w'Omukama yakka n'ava mu ggulu n'ajja n'ayiringisaawo ejjinja, n'alituulako." 
Matthew28:3 Yali afaanana ng'ekimyanso, n'ekyambalo kye nga kyeru ng'omuzira." 
Matthew28:4 Abakuumi ne batekemuka olw'okumutya, ne baba ng'abafudde." 
Matthew28:5 Malayika n'agamba abakazi nti: “Muleke kutya; mmanyi nga munoonya Yezu eyakomererwa ku musaalaba. 
Matthew28:6 Muno taliimu; anti azuukidde, nga bwe yagamba. Mujje mulabe ekifo mwe yabadde agalamidde." 
Matthew28:7 Mugende mangu mubuulire abayigirizwa be nti azuukidde, abeesooseeyo mu Galilaaya; eyo gye mulimulabira. Kale mbabuulidde.”" 
Matthew28:8 Ne bafuluma mangu mu ntaana n'ensisi ate n'essanyu lingi, ne baddukanako okubuulira abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew28:9 Yezu n'abasisinkana, n'agamba nti: “Mirembe!” Bo ne bajja ne bavumbagira ebigere bye ne bamusinza." 
Matthew28:10 Awo Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Temutya mugende mubuulire baganda bange, bagende e Galilaaya, eyo gye balindabira.”" 
Matthew28:11 Abakazi baba bakyagenda, abamu ku bakuumi ne bagenda mu kibuga, ne babuulira bakabona abakulu byonna ebyali bifuddeyo." 
Matthew28:12 Bakabona abakulu ne bakuŋŋaana wamu n'abakadde, ne bateesa, ne bawa abaserikale omuwendo gw'ensimbi," 
Matthew28:13 ne babagamba nti: “Mugambe nti: ‘Abayigirizwa be bazze ekiro ne bamubbamu ffe nga twebase.’ 
Matthew28:14 Ekyo bwe kinaatuuka ku wessaza, ffe tujja kumumatiza, mmwe tubawonye emitawaana.”" 
Matthew28:15 Bo ne batwala ensimbi, ne bakola nga bwe baabalagira. Olugambo olwo ne lulaalaasibwa mu Bayudaaya n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Matthew28:16 Awo abayigirizwa ekkumi n'omu ne bagenda e Galilaaya, ku lusozi Yezu lwe yabalagira." 
Matthew28:17 Bwe baamulaba ne bamusinza; naye abamu ne babuusabuusa. 
Matthew28:18 Yezu n'abasemberera, n'abagamba nti: “Obuyinza bwonna mu ggulu ne mu nsi bwampeebwa." 
Matthew28:19 Kale nno mugende muyigirize amawanga gonna, nga mubabatiza mu linnya lya Taata n'erya Mwana n'erya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Matthew28:20 Mubayigirize okukwata byonna bye nabalagira. Nange ndi nammwe ennaku zonna okutuusa ku nkomerero y'emirembe.” 
Mark1:1 Amatandika g'Evangili ya Yezu Kristu, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Mark1:2 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu Yisaaya omulanzi nti: “Laba, ntuma omubaka wange mu maaso go, anaakutegekera ekkubo lyo;" 
Mark1:3 eddoboozi ery'oyo aleekaana mu ddungu nti: ‘Mutegeke ekkubo ly'Omukama, muluŋŋamye obukubo bwe.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Yowanna yalinga abatiza mu ddungu ng'ayigiriza batismu ey'okubonerera olw'okusonyiyibwa ebibi. 
Mark1:5 Ensi yonna eya Buyudaaya n'abantu bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu ne bagendanga gy'ali n'ababatiza mu mugga Yorudani nga baatula ebibi byabwe. 
Mark1:6 Yowanna yayambalanga ekyambalo eky'ebyoya by'eŋŋamiya, n'omusipi ogw'olukoba mu kiwato kye; yalyanga nzige n'omubisi gw'enjuki ogw'oku ttale." 
Mark1:7 Yayigirizanga ng'agamba nti: “Emabega wange wajjayo ansinga amaanyi, gwe sisaanira na kufukamira kusumulula lukoba lwa ngatto ze." 
Mark1:8 Nze mbabatizza na mazzi, naye oyo alibabatiza ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Mark1:9 Mu nnaku ezo, Yezu n'ava e Nazareti eky'omu Galilaaya, n'abatizibwa Yowanna mu Yorudani." 
Mark1:10 Amangu ago, olwava bw'ati mu mazzi, n'alaba eggulu nga libikkuse ne Mwoyo ng'akka ku ye ng'enjiibwa." 
Mark1:11 Eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu ne ligamba nti: “Ggwe mwana wange omwagalwa; nkwesiimiramu.” 
Mark1:12 Amangu ago Mwoyo n'amusindika mu ddungu; 
Mark1:13 n'abeera mu ddungu ennaku amakumi ana, n'akemebwa Sitaani; yabeeranga wamu n'ebisolo by'oku ttale, bamalayika nga bamuweereza." 
Mark1:14 Yowanna bwe yamala okusibibwa, Yezu n'ajja mu Galilaaya n'alangirira Evangili ya Katonda," 
Mark1:15 ng'agamba nti: “Obudde butuukiridde; obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde; mubonerere, mukkirize Evangili.”" 
Mark1:16 Bwe yali atambula ku lubalama lw'ennyanja y'e Galilaaya, n'alaba Simoni ne Andureya muganda we nga basuula akatimba mu nnyanja, kubanga baali bavubi." 
Mark1:17 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mungoberere; nzija kubafuula mubeere abavubi b'abantu.” 
Mark1:18 Amangu ago, ne baleka obutimba bwabwe, ne bamugoberera." 
Mark1:19 Bwe yatambulako akabanga, n'alaba Yakobo mutabani wa Zebedaayo ne Yowanna muganda we nga basanirira obutimba mu lyato;" 
Mark1:20 nabo n'abayita amangu ago. Ne baleka kitaabwe Zebedaayo mu lyato wamu n'abakozi be, ne bamugoberera." 
Mark1:21 Awo ne bajja mu Kafarunawumu, amangu ago n'ayingira mu sinaagooga ku lwa Sabbaato n'ayigiriza." 
Mark1:22 Ne bawuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye; kubanga yali abayigiriza ng'alina obuyinza, sso si ng'abawandiisi." 
Mark1:23 Mu sinaagooga yaabwe mwalimu omuntu aliko omwoyo omugwagwa, amangu ago n'aleekaana nti:" 
Mark1:24 “Otwagaza ki ggwe Yezu ow'e Nazareti? Ozze okutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi ggwe ani, Omutuukirivu wa Katonda.”" 
Mark1:25 Yezu n'agukabukira nti: “Sirika ate muveemu.” 
Mark1:26 Omwoyo omugwagwa ne gumusikaasikanya, ne gumuvaamu nga guwowoggana mu ddoboozi ddene." 
Mark1:27 Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti: “Kino kiki? Enjigiriza eno empya ate ey'obuyinza! Kubanga newandibadde emyoyo emigwagwa agiragira ne gimuwulira.”" 
Mark1:28 Amangu ago ettutumu lye ne libuna mu nsi yonna eyetooloddewo ey'omu Galilaaya. 
Mark1:29 Amangu ago n'ava mu sinaagooga, n'agenda mu nnyumba ya Simoni ne Andureya, ng'ali wamu ne Yakobo ne Yowanna." 
Mark1:30 Nnyina wa muka Simoni yali ku ndiri ng'alina omusujja; amangu ago ne bamubuulira. 
Mark1:31 Ye n'asembera, n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amugolokosa; omusujja ne gumuta, n'abaweereza." 
Mark1:32 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, enjuba ng'egwa, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna n'abakwatiddwa emyoyo emibi." 
Mark1:33 Ekibuga kyonna kyali kikuŋŋaanidde awo ku mulyango. 
Mark1:34 N'awonya bangi abaali bakwatiddwa endwadde ezitali zimu, era n'agoba n'emyoyo emibi mingi, naye nga taganya myoyo mibi kwogera, kubanga gyali gimumanyi." 
Mark1:35 Ku makya mu matulutulu n'agolokoka, n'afuluma n'agenda mu kifo ekyesudde n'abeera eyo nga yeegayirira." 
Mark1:36 Simoni n'amugoberera ne banne bwe baali. 
Mark1:37 Bwe baamuggukako, ne bamugamba nti: “Abantu bonna bakunoonya.”" 
Mark1:38 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Tugende n'awalala mu bibuga ebituliraanye, namwo njigirizeemu, anti ekyo kye najjirira.”" 
Mark1:39 N'agenda ng'ayigiriza mu sinaagooga zaabwe mu Galilaaya yonna, ng'agoba n'emyoyo emibi." 
Mark1:40 Awo omugenge n'ajja gy'ali n'amwegayirira, n'amufukaamirira, n'agamba nti: “Bw'oyagala, osobola okunnongoosa.”" 
Mark1:41 Yezu ekisaasaazi ne kimukwata, n'agolola omukono gwe n'amukwatako, n'amugamba nti: “Njagala, longooka.”" 
Mark1:42 Amangu ago ebigenge ne bimuta, n'alongooka." 
Mark1:43 N'amukuutira, n'amusiibula amangu ago nga bw'amugamba nti:" 
Mark1:44 “Laba nti tobaako gw'obuulira, wabula genda weeyoleke ewa kabona, oweeyo ekitone olw'okulongoosebwa kwo Musa kye yalagira ng'obukakafu gye bali.”" 
Mark1:45 Naye ye olwafuluma, ekigambo n'atandika okukyogerako kyere n'okukiralaasa, Yezu nga takyayinza kuyingira mu lwatu mu kibuga, wabula yabeeranga bbali mu bifo ebyesudde. Abantu baagendanga gy'ali nga bava mu buli nsonda." 
Mark2:1 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku nga ziizo bwe yakomawo mu Kafarunawumu, ne bawulira ng'ali waka," 
Mark2:2 ne bakuŋŋaana bangi nga tewakyali na kafo wadde mu mulyango; yali abayigiriza ekigambo. 
Mark2:3 Awo ne wajjawo abaaleeta omulwadde akonzibye, ng'asituddwa abantu bana." 
Mark2:4 Bwe baalemwa okumusembeza w'ali olw'ekibiina, ne basereekulula ku kasolya waggulu ne Yezu we yali; bwe baafunawo omwagaanya, ne bakkiririzaawo olunnyo omulwadde kwe yali agalamidde." 
Mark2:5 Yezu bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe, n'agamba akonzibye nti: “Mwana wange, ebibi byo bisonyiyiddwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Naye waali watuddewo abamu ku bawandiisi; ne beebuuza mu mitima gyabwe nti: 
Mark2:7 “Ono ekimwogeza atyo kiki? Avuma Katonda. Ani ayinza okusonyiwa ebibi wabula Katonda yekka?” 
Mark2:8 Amangu ago, Yezu mu mwoyo gwe bwe yategeera bye beebuuza munda yaabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki mwebuuza mutyo mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Mark2:9 Ekisinga obwangu okugamba akonzibye kiruwa: okugamba nti: ‘Ebibi byo bisonyiyiddwa?’ nandiki okugamba nti: ‘Situka, otwale olunnyo lwo, otambule?’" 
Mark2:10 Kale mmwe okumanya ng'Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi obw'okusonyiwa ebibi,” - awo n'agamba akonzibye nti:" 
Mark2:11 “Nkugamba: situka, kwata olunnyo lwo ogende ewammwe.”" 
Mark2:12 Ye n'asituka amangu ago, n'akwata olunnyo lwe, n'afuluma ebweru bonna nga balaba. Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne bagulumiza Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Tetulabanga kiringa kino!”" 
Mark2:13 N'afuluma ate n'agenda ku nnyanja; ekibiina kyonna ne kijja gy'ali, n'abayigiriza." 
Mark2:14 Naye yali ayita, n'alaba Leevi, mutabani wa Alufayo; yali atudde mu ggwoolezo, n'amugamba nti: “Ngoberera.” N'asituka n'amugoberera." 
Mark2:15 Bwe yali atudde mu nnyumba y'oyo okulya, abasolooza b'omusolo bangi n'aboonoonyi nabo ne batuula ne Yezu n'abayigirizwa be, kubanga bangi mu bo baali bamugoberera." 
Mark2:16 Abawandiisi b'Abafarisaayo bwe baalaba ng'alya n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Lwaki alya n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi?”" 
Mark2:17 Yezu bwe yawulira, n'abagamba nti: “Abalamu si be beetaaga omusawo, wabula abalwadde. Abatuukirivu si be najja okuyita, wabula aboonoonyi.”" 
Mark2:18 Kale nno abayigirizwa ba Yowanna n'Abafarisaayo baasiibanga; awo abantu abamu ne bajja, ne bamugamba nti: “Abayigirizwa ba Yowanna Baptista n'abayigirizwa b'Abafarisaayo basiiba, naye lwaki abayigirizwa bo tebasiiba?”" 
Mark2:19 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ddala abagenyi ku mbaga y'obugole ng'awasizza akyali nabo bayinza okusiiba? Ng'awasizza akyali nabo tebasobola kusiiba. 
Mark2:20 Ennaku zirituuka, awasizza n'abaggyibwako, olwo ku lunaku olwo balisiiba." 
Mark2:21 Tewali muntu atunga kiwero kiggya ku kyambalo kikadde; bw'akola atyo, ekiraka kyeyuza ku kyambalo, ekiggya ne kiva ku kikadde, okuyulika ne kweyongera bweyongezi." 
Mark2:22 Era tewali afuka vviini nsu mu nsawo nkadde; bw'akola atyo, evviini eyabya ensawo, evviini n'efiira bwereere, n'ensawo ne zifa. Naye evviini ensu eteekebwa mu nsawo mpya.”" 
Mark2:23 Awo ku Sabbaato emu bwe yali ayita mu nnimiro z'eŋŋano, abayigirizwa be ne batandika okunuula ebirimba by'eŋŋano." 
Mark2:24 Abafarisaayo ne bamugamba nti: “Laba, lwaki bakola ekitakkirizibwa ku Sabbaato?”" 
Mark2:25 N'abagamba nti: “Temusomanga Dawudi kye yakola lwe yali mu bwetaavu ng'enjala emuluma, ye n'abaali naye," 
Mark2:26 nga bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda mu mirembe gya Abiyatari kabona omukulu, n'alya Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa egyaziranga okuliibwa omuntu omulala yenna, wabula bakabona bokka, n'awaako n'abo abaali naye?”" 
Mark2:27 Era n'abagamba nti: “Sabbaato yassibwawo kubeera muntu; sso si muntu kubeera Sabbaato; 
Mark2:28 bw'atyo Omwana w'Omuntu ye mukama era n'owa Sabbaato.” 
Mark3:1 Era n'ayingira mu sinaagooga; omwo mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono ogwakala. 
Mark3:2 Ne bamwekaliriza balabe oba anaamuwonya ku Sabbaato balyoke bamuwawaabire. 
Mark3:3 Ye n'agamba oli eyalina omukono omukalu nti: “Situka ojje wakati.” 
Mark3:4 Awo n'abagamba nti: “Kisaanye kukolera obulungi ku Sabbaato nandiki kukolera bubi, kuwonya bulamu oba kutta?” Bo ne basirika busirisi." 
Mark3:5 N'abeebunguluza amaaso ng'akaladde n'obunakuwavu nga munakuwavu olw'obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyabwe; n'agamba omusajja nti: “Golola omukono gwo.” N'agugolola; omukono gwe ne guddirawo ddala. 
Mark3:6 Abafarisaayo ne bafuluma, amangu ago ne bamuteesaako n'ab'ekibiina kya Erode nga bwe banaamuzikiriza." 
Mark3:7 Yezu n'avaayo n'abayigirizwa be n'adda ku nnyanja. Ekibiina kinene ne kimugoberera okuva mu Galilaaya era n'okuva mu Buyudaaya," 
Mark3:8 n'okuva mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Yidumeya n'emitala wa Yorudani, ne mu miriraano gya Tiiro ne Sidoni; bwe baawulira bye yali akola, ne bajja gy'ali, ekibiina ekinene obulala!" 
Mark3:9 N'alagira abayigirizwa be okumulabira akaato olw'okubeera ekibiina, baleme kumunyigiriza." 
Mark3:10 Kubanga yawonyanga bangi, abalina endwadde, kyebaavanga bamwesuulako bamukwateko." 
Mark3:11 N'emyoyo emigwagwa bwe gyamulabanga nga gimuvunnamira nga giwowoggana nti: “Ggwe oli Mwana wa Katonda,”" 
Mark3:12 naye ye ng'agikomako n'amaanyi obutamwatuukiriza. 
Mark3:13 Awo n'alinnya ku lusozi, n'ayita w'ali be yayagala, ne bajja w'ali." 
Mark3:14 N'alonda kkumi na babiri babeerenga naye, abatumenga okuyigiriza," 
Mark3:15 nga balina n'obuyinza obw'okugoba emyoyo emibi: 
Mark3:16 Simoni gwe yayongerako erinnya erya Petero; 
Mark3:17 Yakobo mutabani wa Zebedaayo ne Yowanna muganda wa Yakobo, be yayongerako erinnya erya 'Bowanerige', kwe kugamba nti: 'Abaana b'enjota';" 
Mark3:18 ne Andureya ne Filippo, ne Barutolomaawo, ne Matayo, ne Tomasi, ne Yakobo mutabani wa Alufayo, ne Taddewo, ne Simoni Omukanaani," 
Mark3:19 ne Yuda Yisikariyoti eyamulyamu olukwe. 
Mark3:20 Ne bagenda mu nnyumba, ekibiina ne kikuŋŋaana nate, nga tebakyayinza newandibadde okulya ku mmere." 
Mark3:21 Ababe bwe baawulira, ne bajja okumukwata; baali bagamba nti: “Agudde eddalu.”" 
Mark3:22 Abawandiisi abaali bavudde e Yeruzaalemu ne bagamba nti: “Alimu Beelizebuli, n'emyoyo emibi agigoba ku bwa mukulu w'emyoyo emibi.”" 
Mark3:23 Awo n'abayita w'ali, n'abagamba mu ngero nti: “Kale Sitaani ayinza atya okugoba Sitaani?" 
Mark3:24 Obanga obwakabaka bwetemyemu, obwakabaka obwo tebusobola kunywera." 
Mark3:25 Ennyumba bwe yeetemamu, eyo nga tekyanywedde." 
Mark3:26 Obanga Sitaani yeerwanyisa bw'atyo, aba yeetemyemu, talisobola kunywera; atuuse ku nkomerero." 
Mark3:27 Tewali ayinza kuyingira mu nnyumba ya w'amaanyi n'anyaga ebibye, wabula ng'asoose okusiba ow'amaanyi, olwo anaasobola okunyagulula ennyumba ye." 
Mark3:28 Mazima mbagamba nti ebibi byonna birisonyiyibwa, na buli bivumo bye bavumamu Katonda;" 
Mark3:29 naye buli alivuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu talisonyiyibwa emirembe gyonna; wabula aliko omusango gw'ekibi eky'emirembe gyonna.” 
Mark3:30 Anti baali bagamba nti: “Alimu omwoyo omugwagwa.” 
Mark3:31 Awo nnyina ne baganda be ne bajja ne bayimirira ebweru, ne bamutumira nga bamuyita." 
Mark3:32 Ekibiina kyali kitudde nga kimwetoolodde, abantu ne bamugamba nti: “Nnyoko ne baganda bo baabano wabweru bakunoonya.”" 
Mark3:33 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmange ye ani ne baganda bange be baani?” 
Mark3:34 Awo ne yeebunguluza amaaso abaali batudde awo nga bamwetoolodde, n'abagamba nti: “Bano ye mmange, be baganda bange." 
Mark3:35 Kubanga buli akola Katonda ky'ayagala, oyo ye muganda wange, ye mwannyinaze, ye mmange.”" 
Mark4:1 N'atandika ate okuyigiriza ku mabbali g'ennyanja; ekibiina kinene ne kimukuŋŋaanirako, ye kwe kusaabala mu lyato n'atuula omwo ku nnyanja, ekibiina kyonna ne kibeera emitala ku lubalama." 
Mark4:2 N'abayigiriza bingi mu ngero; mu kubayigiriza n'abagamba nti: 
Mark4:3 “Muwulirize; omusizi yafuluma okusiga ensigo. 
Mark4:4 Yali asiga, ensigo emu n'egwa ku kkubo, ebinyonyi ne bijja ne bigirya." 
Mark4:5 Endala n'egwa ku luyinjayinja w'etaalina ttaka lingi; amangu ago n'emeruka, olw'obutaba na ttaka ggwanvu;" 
Mark4:6 enjuba bwe yavaayo, n'ewotoka; olw'obutaba na mirandira, n'ekala." 
Mark4:7 Endala n'egwa mu maggwa, amaggwa ne gaduuma, ne gagifuuwa, n'etabala." 
Mark4:8 Endala ne zigwa mu ttaka eddungi, ne zireeta ebibala; zaameruka, ne zikula, ne zibala, emu n'ebalamu asatu, endala nkaaga n'endala kikumi.”" 
Mark4:9 N'agamba nti: “Alina amatu okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:10 Bwe yali asigadde yekka, ekkumi n'ababiri abaali naye ne bamubuuza ku ngero." 
Mark4:11 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwaweebwa ekyama ky'obwakabaka bwa Katonda; naye bali abali ebweru byonna bibabuulirwa mu ngero; 
Mark4:12 “okutunula batunule naye nga tebalaba, okuwulira bawulire naye nga tebategeera; baleme kudda nate basonyiyibwe.”" 
Mark4:13 N'abagamba nti: “Olugero olwo temulutegedde? Kale engero endala zonna munaazitegeera mutya? 
Mark4:14 Omusizi asiga ekigambo. 
Mark4:15 Bano be bali ku kkubo, ekigambo kwe kisigibwa, beebo bwe bawulira, naye mangu ago Sitaani ajja n'akwakkula ekigambo ekibasigiddwamu." 
Mark4:16 Mu ngeri ye emu abaasigibwa mu ttaka ery'oluyinjayinja beebo bwe bawulira ekigambo, bakikkiriza mangu n'essanyu," 
Mark4:17 naye kubanga tebalina mirandira mu bo, bagumiikiriza akabanga, naye bwe wagwawo ennaku n'okuyigganyizibwa olw'ekigambo, beesittala mangu." 
Mark4:18 Abalala beebo abasigibwa mu maggwa: beebo abawulira ekigambo," 
Mark4:19 naye okweraliikirira okw'ensi n'okuguya okw'obugagga, n'okwegomba ebirala, bwe bibayingiramu, bituga ekigambo ne kitabala." 
Mark4:20 Abaasigibwa mu ttaka eddungi beebo abawulira ekigambo ne bakikkiriza, ne baleeta ebibala: ekimu ne kibala asatu, ekirala nkaaga, n'ekirala kikumi.”" 
Mark4:21 Era n'abagamba nti: “Ettawaaza ereetebwa mu nnyumba kussibwa mu kibbo, yadde wansi mu kitanda, oba ku kikondo?" 
Mark4:22 Kubanga mpaawo kyakisibwa, wabula nga lwa kwolesebwa; wadde kyakwekebwa, wabula nga lwa kujja mu kitangaala." 
Mark4:23 Oba oli alina amatu okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:24 Era n'abagamba nti: “Mwekkaanye bye muwulira. Ekipimo kye mugera nammwe kye kiribagererwa, n'okwongerwa ne mwongerwa." 
Mark4:25 Kubanga alina alyongerwako; ate buli atalina, ne ky'alina kirimuggyibwako.”" 
Mark4:26 Era n'abagamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda buli ng'omuntu bw'amansa ensigo ku ttaka," 
Mark4:27 ne yeebaka, n'agolokoka ekiro n'emisana; yo ensigo n'emeruka, n'ekula, ye nga tamanyi bw'ekikola." 
Mark4:28 Kubanga ettaka libaza ku bwalyo; okusooka lireeta olusubi, ne kuddako ekirimba, oluvannyuma empeke mu kirimba." 
Mark4:29 Ate ekibala bwe kituuka, amangu ago n'assaako ekiwabyo, anti ng'okukungula kutuuse.”" 
Mark4:30 Era n'abagamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tunaabugeranya ku ki? Lugero ki lwe tunaabuleetera? 
Mark4:31 Tunaabugeza ku mpeke ya kaladaali; bw'esigibwa mu ttaka, y'eba esingayo obutono mu nsigo eziri ku nsi;" 
Mark4:32 naye bw'esigibwa, ekula n'egejja okusinga emiddo gyonna; esuula amatabi amanene, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga ne bisobola okusula mu kisiikirize kyayo.”" 
Mark4:33 N'abayigiriza era ekigambo mu ngero nnyingi ezifaananako ng'ezo, nga bwe baayinzanga okukiwulira." 
Mark4:34 Teyabagambanga kintu wabula mu ngero; kyokka bwe yabanga n'abayigirizwa be, ng'abannyonnyola byonna bokka." 
Mark4:35 Ate ku lunaku olwo, obudde bwe bwawungeera, Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Tusomoke, tulage emitala.”" 
Mark4:36 Bwe baaleka ekibiina, ne bamutwala mu lyato nga bwe yali, n'amaato amalala gaali naye." 
Mark4:37 Awo omuyaga gw'empewo mungi ne gusituka, amayengo nga gayiika mu lyato, eryato ne libula okujjula amazzi." 
Mark4:38 Ye yali yeebase mu kiwenda ku kigugu; ne bamuzuukusa, ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, ggwe tofaayo oba tusaanawo?”" 
Mark4:39 N'agolokoka, empewo n'agikomako, n'ennyanja n'agiragira nti: “Sirika, towuuna.” Empewo n'ekoma, ne guba mulaala nnyo." 
Mark4:40 N'abagamba nti: “Mutidde ki? Temulina kukkiriza?” 
Mark4:41 Entiisa n'ebakwata, ne bagambagana nti: “Ono ye ani, okuba nti empewo n'ennyanja bimuwulira?”" 
Mark5:1 Ne bagenda emitala w'ennyanja mu nsi y'Abagerasa. 
Mark5:2 Bwe yava mu lyato, amangu ago omuntu aliko omwoyo omugwagwa, n'ajja okumusisinkana ng'ava mu biggya." 
Mark5:3 Yali asula mu biggya, nga tewali akyayinza kumusiba, newandibadde n'enjegere;" 
Mark5:4 emirundi mingi yateekebwako mu masamba ne mu njegere, enjegere n'azikutulakutula, n'amasamba n'agamenyaamenya; tewaali ayinza kumusobola." 
Mark5:5 Bulijjo emisana n'ekiro yabeeranga mu biggya ne mu nsozi ng'awowoggana, ne yeesalaasala n'amayinja." 
Mark5:6 Olwalengera Yezu eri, n'addukanako n'amusinza," 
Mark5:7 n'awowoggana n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Onjagaza ki ggwe Yezu Omwana wa Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala? Nkulabidde Katonda, tombonyaabonya.”" 
Mark5:8 Kubanga yali amugamba nti: “Mwoyo ggwe omugwagwa, vva mu muntu ono.”" 
Mark5:9 N'amubuuza nti: “Erinnya lyo ggwe ani?” N'amugamba nti: “Ggye, lye linnya lyange, kubanga tuli nkumu.”" 
Mark5:10 N'amwegayirira nnyo aleme kumugoba mu nsi eyo. 
Mark5:11 Awo okumpi n'olusozi waaliwo eggana ly'embizzi nga lirya; 
Mark5:12 emyoyo ne gimusaba nti: “Tusindike mu ggana ly'embizzi, tuleke tudde omwo.”" 
Mark5:13 N'agikkiriza. Awo emyoyo emigwagwa ne givaamu, ne giyingira mu mbizzi; eggana eriweza embizzi ng'enkumi bbiri ne lifubutuka okuva waggulu ku bbanga, ne lyesolessa mu nnyanja, ne lisaanawo mu mazzi." 
Mark5:14 Abaali bazirunda ne badduka, ne bagenda babuulira ab'omu kibuga n'ab'omu byalo. Ne bavaayo ne bagenda okulaba kiki ekyali kiguddewo." 
Mark5:15 Ne bajja awali Yezu, ne balaba omuntu oyo eyali akwatiddwa emyoyo emibi ng'atudde, ayambadde era ng'ategeera bulungi, oyo omusajja eyalimu eggye; ne batya." 
Mark5:16 Abaali balabye ne babanyumiza ebyali bigudde ku yali akwatiddwa emyoyo emibi ne ku mbizzi. 
Mark5:17 Ne batandika okumwegayirira ave mu kitundu kyabwe. 
Mark5:18 Bwe yali asaabala mu lyato, eyali akwatiddwa emyoyo emibi n'amwegayirira abeerenga naye." 
Mark5:19 Naye ye n'atamukkiriza, wabula n'amugamba nti: “Genda ewammwe eri ababo obanyumize Omukama by'akukoledde, nga bw'akusaasidde.”" 
Mark5:20 N'agenda, n'atandika okulangirira eri ab'e Dekapoli ebyo Yezu bye yali amukoledde. Bonna ne beewuunya." 
Mark5:21 Yezu bwe yawunguka nate mu lyato, n'ajja emitala, ekibiina ekinene ne kikuŋŋaanira w'ali era ng'ali ku lubalama lw'ennyanja." 
Mark5:22 Awo ne wajjawo omu ku bakulu ba sinaagooga, erinnya lye Yayiro, bwe yamulaba, n'agwa ku bigere bye," 
Mark5:23 n'amwegayirira ng'agamba nti: “Kawala kange kaliko kateetera; jjangu okasseeko emikono gyo kawone, kalamuke.”" 
Mark5:24 N'agenda naye. Ekibiina ekinene ne kimugoberera, nga bagenda bamunyigiriza." 
Mark5:25 Waaliwo omukazi eyali alwadde endwadde eya ggerenge emyaka kkumi n'ebiri," 
Mark5:26 ng'abonyaabonyezeddwa nnyo abasawo bangi; yali awaddeyo ebibye byonna, naye nga talungiwako, wabula nga yeeyongera kubeera bubi." 
Mark5:27 Bwe yawulira ebyogerwa ku Yezu, n'ajjira mu kibiina emabega, n'akomako ku kyambalo kye." 
Mark5:28 Kubanga yali agamba nti: “Ne bwe nnaakoma obukomi ku byambalo bye, nzija kuwona.”" 
Mark5:29 Amangu ago omusaayi ogwajjanga ne gukalira, n'awulira muli mu mubiri gwe ng'awonye endwadde." 
Mark5:30 Ne Yezu n'awulira nga waliwo amaanyi agamuvuddemu, n'akyukira ekibiina, n'abagamba nti: “Ani akomye ku byambalo byange?”" 
Mark5:31 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Naawe olaba ekibiina kikusindiikiriza, n'ogamba nti: ‘Ani ankomyeko?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 N'amagamaga alabe ani eyali akikoze. 
Mark5:33 Omukazi bwe yategeera ekikoleddwa mu ye, n'ajja ng'atidde, ng'akankana, n'avunnama ku bigere bye n'amutegeeza amazima gonna." 
Mark5:34 Awo Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Muwala, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza; genda mirembe, owonere ddala endwadde yo.”" 
Mark5:35 Yali akyayogera, ne wabaawo abajja okuva ew'omukulu wa sinaagooga, ne bagamba nti: “Muwala wo afudde; omuyigiriza okyamuteganyiza ki ate?”" 
Mark5:36 Naye Yezu bwe yawulira ekigambo kye boogedde, n'agamba omukulu wa sinaagooga nti: “Totya, kkiriza bukkiriza.”" 
Mark5:37 N'ataganya muntu mulala yenna kumugoberera, okuggyako Petero ne Yakobo ne Yowanna muganda wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Bwe baatuuka ku nnyumba y'omukulu wa sinaagooga, n'alaba oluyoogaano n'abantu abakaaba n'abakuba ebiwoobe ebinene." 
Mark5:39 N'ayingira, n'abagamba nti: “Muyoogaanira ki? Mukaabira ki? Omuwala tafudde, yeebase bwebasi.” Ne bamusekerera." 
Mark5:40 N'abagobera bonna ebweru, awo n'atwala kitaawe w'omuwala ne nnyina na bali abaali naye, n'ayingira omuwala mwe yali." 
Mark5:41 N'akwata omukono gw'omuwala n'amugamba nti: “Talita, kumi,” kwe kugamba nti: “Kawala, nkugamba golokoka.”" 
Mark5:42 Amangu ago omuwala n'asituka n'atambula, kubanga yali wa myaka nga kkumi n'ebiri. Amangu ago ne bawuniikirira nnyo." 
Mark5:43 N'abakuutira nnyo wabulewo omuntu akimanyaako; n'abagamba okumuwa ekyokulya. 
Mark6:1 Ate n'ava awo n'agenda mu nsi yaboobwe; abayigiriza be ne bamugoberera. 
Mark6:2 Ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato n'atandika okuyigiriza mu sinaagooga; bangi bwe baawulira, ne bawuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye, ne bagamba nti: “Omuntu ono yaggya wa ebintu bino? Magezi ki agaamuweebwa? Bikolwa bya maanyi ki bino ebikolebwa n'emikono gye?" 
Mark6:3 Ono si ye mubazzi, mutabani wa Mariya, era muganda wa Yakobo ne Yoze ne Yuda ne Simoni? Bannyina bonna tebali kwaffe?” Ne bamwesittalako." 
Mark6:4 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Omulanzi tabulwa kitiibwa wabula mu kyalo kyaboobwe, mu b'oluganda lwe ne mu nnyumba y'ewaabwe.”" 
Mark6:5 Teyasobola kukolerayo bikolwa bya maanyi; wabula yassa emikono ku balwadde abatonotono n'abawonya. 
Mark6:6 Ne yeewuunya obutakkiriza bwabwe. Ne yeetooloola mu byalo ng'ayigiriza. 
Mark6:7 Awo n'ayita Ekkumi n'Ababiri, n'atandika okubatuma kinnababirye, n'abawa obuyinza ku myoyo emigwagwa." 
Mark6:8 N'abalagira obutatwala kantu mu kkubo, wabula omuggo gwokka; si nsawo, newandibadde omugaati, newandibadde ffeeza mu misipi gyabwe;" 
Mark6:9 wabula bambale musaasaane, era baleme kwambala kkanzu bbiri." 
Mark6:10 Ate n'abagamba nti: “We muyingiranga mu nnyumba, mubeeranga omwo okutuusa lwe muvaayo." 
Mark6:11 Ekifo kyonna we banaagaananga okubaaniriza, ne bagaana okubawuliriza, bwe mubanga muvaayo, mukunkumulanga enfuufu eri ku bigere byammwe ng'obujulizi obubalumiriza.”" 
Mark6:12 Ne bagenda ne balangirira abantu beenenye. 
Mark6:13 Ne bagoba emyoyo emibi, abalwadde bangi ne babasiiga omuzigo ne babawonya." 
Mark6:14 Awo Erode kabaka n'awulira, kubanga erinnya lya Yezu lyali lyatiikiridde. Abamu baali bagamba nti “Yowanna eyabatizanga azuukiziddwa mu bafu; amaanyi g'okukola ebikolwa eby'amaanyi kyegava gakola mu ye.”" 
Mark6:15 Abalala ne bagamba nti: “Ye Eliya” Ko abalala nti: “Ye mulanzi, ng'omu ku balanzi.”" 
Mark6:16 Ye Erode bwe yawulira ebyo, n'agamba nti: “Yowanna gwe natemako omutwe azuukidde.”" 
Mark6:17 Kubanga Erode yali atumye bakwate Yowanna, n'amussa mu kkomera olw'okubeera Erodiya muka Filippo muganda we gwe yali awasizza." 
Mark6:18 Kubanga Yowanna yagambanga Erode nti: “Tokkirizibwa kwezza muka muganda wo.” 
Mark6:19 Erodiya yamulinako ekkonda ng'ayagala okumutta, naye n'atasobola," 
Mark6:20 Kubanga Erode yali atya Yowanna, ng'amumanyi bw'ali omuntu omutuufu era omutuukirivu; n'amukuumanga. Bwe yamuwuliranga, ng'asoberwa nnyo, kyokka ng'asanyuka okumuwulira." 
Mark6:21 Naye olunaku olw'akakisa ne lutuuka: Erode ku mazaalibwa ge n'afumbira abakungu be embaga, n'abakulu b'eggye lye n'abaami mu Galilaaya." 
Mark6:22 Muwala wa Erodiya n'ayingira n'azina, n'asanyusa Erode n'abaali batudde naye. Kabaka n'agamba omuwala nti: “Nsaba kyonna ky'oyagala, nzija kukikuwa.”" 
Mark6:23 N'amulayirira n'okumulayirira nti: “Kyonna ky'onoosaba nnaakikuwa, yadde ekitundu ky'obwakabaka bwange.”" 
Mark6:24 Omuwala n'afuluma, n'agamba nnyina nti: “Nsabe ki?” Nnyina n'amugamba nti: “Omutwe gwa Yowanna eyabatizanga.”" 
Mark6:25 Amangu ago n'ayanguwako okudda eri kabaka, n'asaba ng'agamba nti: “Njagala ompe kati wano ku ssowaani omutwe gwa Yowanna Batista.”" 
Mark6:26 Kabaka n'anakuwala nnyo; naye okubeera ebirayiro bye, n'okubeera abagenyi be, n'atayagala kumenyawo kye yamusuubiza." 
Mark6:27 Amangu ago n'atumya omumbowa, n'amulagira okuleeta omutwe gwa Yowanna. Omusajja n'agenda n'amutemako omutwe mu kkomera," 
Mark6:28 n'aleeta omutwe gwe ku ssowaani, n'aguwa omuwala, omuwala ye n'aguwa nnyina." 
Mark6:29 Abayigirizwa be bwe baawulira, ne bajja, ne batwala omulambo gwe, ne bagussa mu ntaana." 
Mark6:30 Abatume ne badda awali Yezu, ne bamunyumiza byonna bye baakola ne bye baayigiriza." 
Mark6:31 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mujje ku mabbali, mu kifo ekyesudde, muwummuleko katono.” Kubanga bangi baali bajja nga bwe bagenda, nga tebalina na bbanga lya kulya." 
Mark6:32 Ne basaabala mu lyato, ne bagenda mu kifo ekyesuddeko ebbali bokka." 
Mark6:33 Abantu ne babalaba nga bagenda, bangi ne bamanya; ne bava mu byalo byonna, be baddukira ku bigere, ne babeesookayo." 
Mark6:34 Yezu bwe yagoba ku mwalo, n'alaba ekibiina kinene; ne bamukwasa ekisa, kubanga baali ng'endiga ezitaliiko musumba; n'atandika okubayigiriza ebintu bingi." 
Mark6:35 Obudde bwe bwagenda bweyerawo, abayigirizwa be ne bamusemberera ne bagamba nti: “Ekifo kino kyesudde, n'obudde buyise;" 
Mark6:36 basiibule bagende mu nnimiro ezitwetoolodde ne mu byalo beegulireyo kye banaalya.” 
Mark6:37 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Mmwe mubawe kye banaalya.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Tugende tugule emigaati egiweza dinaari ebibiri tugibawe balye?” 
Mark6:38 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mulinawo emigaati emeka? Mugende mulabe.” Bwe baazuula, ne bamugamba nti: “Etaano, ko n'ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Mark6:39 N'abalagira babatuuze bonna mu bibinja ku muddo. 
Mark6:40 Ne batuula mu bibinja bya kikumi kikumi n'ataano ataano. 
Mark6:41 Awo n'atoola emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'atunula ku ggulu, ne yeebaza, emigaati n'agimenyamu, n'agikwasa abayigirizwa be bagigabire abantu; n'ebyennyanja n'abigabira bonna." 
Mark6:42 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. 
Mark6:43 Ne baggyawo ebisero kkumi na bibiri ebijjudde obutundutundu n'ebyennyanja. 
Mark6:44 Abaalya emigaati baali abasajja enkumi ttaano. 
Mark6:45 Amangu ago n'awaliriza abayigirizwa be okusaabala mu lyato, bakulemberemu, balage emitala w'eri e Betisayida, ye nga bw'asiibula ekibiina." 
Mark6:46 Bwe yamala okubasiibula, n'ayambuka ku lusozi okwegayirira." 
Mark6:47 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, eryato lyali likyali mu buziba, ye ng'ali yekka ku ttale." 
Mark6:48 N'alaba nga bategana okuvuga, kubanga empewo yali ebafuluma mu maaso. Mu kisisimuka ekyokuna, n'ajja gye bali ng'atambula ku nnyanja; n'aba ng'ayagala okubayitako." 
Mark6:49 Naye bo bwe baamulaba ng'atambula ku nnyanja, ne balowooza nti muzimu, ne bawowoggana," 
Mark6:50 Kubanga bonna baamulaba, ne batya. Amangu ago n'ayogera gye bali, n'abagamba nti: “Mugume; ye Nze. Temutya.”" 
Mark6:51 N'asaabala mu lyato mwe baali; empewo n'ekoma; ne bongera nnyo okuwuniikirira," 
Mark6:52 Kubanga n'eky'emigaati baali tebakitegedde; emitima gyabwe gyali gigubye. 
Mark6:53 Bwe baawunguka, ne batuuka mu nsi y'e Gennesareti, ne bagoba." 
Mark6:54 Bwe baava mu lyato, abantu ne bamutegeera mangu." 
Mark6:55 Ne bayitaayita mangu mu nsi eyo yonna, ne batandika okusombera abalwadde ku nnyinyo wonna we baamuwuliranga." 
Mark6:56 Buli we yalaganga, mu mayumba oba mu byalo, oba mu bibuga, nga bateeka abalwadde mu mbuga ne bamwegayirira yadde bakome ku lukugiro lw'ekyambalo kye; bonna abaalukomako ne bawona." 
Mark7:1 Awo Abafarisaayo wamu n'abawandiisi abamu abaava e Yeruzaalemu ne bajja w'ali; 
Mark7:2 bwe baalaba abamu ku bayigirizwa be nga balya emmere n'engalo ezitali nnongoofu, kwe kugamba, ezitali nnaabe, ne bamunenya." 
Mark7:3 Kubanga Abafarisaayo n'Abayudaaya bonna tebalya wabula nga bamaze kunaaba ngalo okutuukiriza empisa z'abakadde. 
Mark7:4 Era bwe bava mu katale, tebalya wabula nga bamaze kunaaba. Waaliwo n'ebirala bingi bye balagirwa okukwata: ng'okunaaza ebikopo n'ensumbi n'ebibya eby'ekikomo." 
Mark7:5 Awo Abafarisaayo n'abawandiisi ne bamubuuza nti: “Abayigirizwa bo lwaki tebayisa mpisa z'abakadde, ne balya emmere n'engalo ezitali nnongoofu?”" 
Mark7:6 N'abagamba nti: “Yisaaya yalanga bulungi ku mmwe abakuusa, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “ ‘Abantu bano bampa ekitiibwa kya ku mumwa bumwa; emitima gyabwe gindi wala." 
Mark7:7 Okusinza kwe bansinzaamu temuli kantu; enjigiriza gye bayigiriza mateeka g'abantu.’ 
Mark7:8 Kale muleka ekiragiro kya Katonda, ne mukwata empisa z'abantu.”" 
Mark7:9 Era n'abagamba nti: “Nga mugaana bulungi ekiragiro kya Katonda mukwate empisa yammwe! 
Mark7:10 Kale Musa yabagamba nti: ‘Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa.’ Ate nti: ‘Avumanga kitaawe oba nnyina, wa kuttibwanga.’" 
Mark7:11 Sso mmwe mugamba nti: ‘Oli bw'agambanga kitaawe oba nnyina nti: Kye wandifunyeeko kati korubani’ - kwe kugamba nti ‘kitone’," 
Mark7:12 olwo nga temukyamuganya kukolera kantu kitaawe oba nnyina. 
Mark7:13 Ne mudibya mutyo ekigambo kya Katonda olw'empisa yammwe gye mugenda muyigiriza; n'ebirala bingi eby'engeri eyo bye mukola.” 
Mark7:14 Awo n'ayita nate ekibiina w'ali n'agamba abantu nti: “Mumpulire mwenna, era mutegeere." 
Mark7:15 Teri kiva bweru ne kiyingira mu muntu kiyinza kumwonoona; wabula ebifuluma mu muntu bye byonoona omuntu.” 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ng'avudde mu kibiina, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza ku lugero olwo." 
Mark7:18 N'abagamba nti: “Nammwe, bwe mutyo, temunnategeera? Temumanyi nga buli kintu ekiyingira munda nga kiva ebweru tekiyinza kumwonoona," 
Mark7:19 kubanga tekiyingira mu mutima gwe, wabula kigenda mu lubuto, ate ne kifulumira mu kiyigo?” Awo n'akakasa nti emmere yonna nnungi." 
Mark7:20 N'agamba nti: “Ebifuluma mu muntu bye byonoona omuntu. 
Mark7:21 Kubanga mu mitima gy'abantu mwe muva ebirowoozo ebibi, obukaba, obubbi, obutemu,"
