Mark7:22 obwenzi, omululu gw'ebintu, omutima omubi, obulimba, obugwenyufu, eriiso ebbi, okukonjera, olunkulu n'obusirusiru." 
Mark7:23 Ebibi ebyo byonna bifuluma munda ne byonoona omuntu.” 
Mark7:24 Bwe yava awo, n'alaga mu bitundu by'e Tiiro, n'ayingira mu nnyumba nga tayagala wabeerewo amumanya; naye n'atasobola kwekisa." 
Mark7:25 Amangu ago omukazi ayalina omwana eyaliko omwoyo omugwagwa n'amuwulirako, n'ayingira, n'avunnama ku bigere bye." 
Mark7:26 Yali mukazi Mugereeki, nga muzaaliranwa wa mu Sirofenisiya; n'amusaba agobe mu kawala ke omwoyo omubi." 
Mark7:27 N'amugamba nti: “Leka abaana bamale okukkuta; kubanga si kirungi kuddira mmere y'abaana n'ogikasukira embwa.” 
Mark7:28 Omukazi n'amuddamu nti: “Weewaawo, Mukama, naye era n'embwa eziri wansi w'emmeeza zirya obukunkumuka bw'abaana.”" 
Mark7:29 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Olw'ekigambo ekyo, genda; omwana wo omwoyo omubi gumuvuddemu.”" 
Mark7:30 Bwe yaddayo eka, yasanga muwala we agalamidde ku kitanda, n'omwoyo omubi nga gumuvuddemu." 
Mark7:31 Ate n'ava mu bitundu by'e Tiiro n'akutulira mu Sidoni okujja ku nnyanja y'e Galilaaya ng'ayitira mu Dekapoli wakati. 
Mark7:32 Ne bamuleetera omuggavu w'amatu ng'alina n'obuzibu mu kwogera. Ne bamwegayirira amusseeko omukono. 
Mark7:33 Ye n'amuggya mu kibiina, n'amuzza ku bbali, n'amussa engalo mu matu, n'awandula eddusu, n'amukwata ku lulimi," 
Mark7:34 n'atunula ku ggulu, n'assa ekikkowe, n'agamba nti: “Effatta,” kwe kugamba nti: “Zibuka”" 
Mark7:35 Amangu ago amatu ne gagguka, enkolo y'olulimi n'esumulukuka, n'ayogera bulungi." 
Mark7:36 N'abakuutira obutabuulirako muntu; naye gye yakomya okubakuutira, bo gye baakomya okukiralaasa." 
Mark7:37 Ne bawuniikirira ebitayogerekeka, ne bagamba nti: “Byonna abikoze bulungi; abaggavu b'amatu abawuliza, ne bakasiru aboogeza.”" 
Mark8:1 Mu nnaku ezo, era ekibiina ekinene kyali kikuŋŋaanye ng'abantu tebalina kye balya; n'ayita abayigirizwa be w'ali n'abagamba nti:" 
Mark8:2 “Ekibiina kino kinkwasa ekisa, kubanga babadde nange kati ennaku ssatu, ate nga tebalina kye balya." 
Mark8:3 Bwe mbasiibula bamala badda eka nga bayala, bajja kugwa ku kkubo; kubanga abamu mu bo bavudde wala.”" 
Mark8:4 Abayigirizwa be ne bamuddamu nti: “Ani anaasobola okubaliisa n'emigaati mu ddungu muno?” 
Mark8:5 N'ababuuza nti: “Mulinawo emigaati emeka?” Ne baddamu nti: “Musanvu.” 
Mark8:6 N'alagira abantu okukkalira wansi; n'akwata emigaati omusanvu, ne yeebaza, n'agimenyamu, n'akwasa abayigirizwa be; ne bagabira ekibiina." 
Mark8:7 Baali balina n'obwennyanja butono, n'abuwa omukisa, nabwo n'alagira okubugaba." 
Mark8:8 Ne balya, ne bakkuta; ne bakuŋŋaanya obutundutundu obwalema, ne buwera ebisero musanvu ebijjuvu." 
Mark8:9 Abaali balidde baali bawera abasajja enkumi nnya. 
Mark8:10 N'abasiibula; amangu ago n'asaabala mu lyato wamu n'abayigirizwa be, n'agenda mu kitundu ky'e Dalumanuta." 
Mark8:11 Abafarisaayo ne bajja, ne basooka okumuwakanya; ne bamwagaza akabonero okuva mu ggulu nga bamukema." 
Mark8:12 N'assa ekikkowe ekiva ddala ku mutima, n'abagamba nti: “Ezzadde lino ekiryagaza akabonero kiki? Mazima mbagamba nti tewali kabonero kajja kuweebwa zzadde lino.”" 
Mark8:13 N'abavaako, n'asaabala ate mu lyato, n'alaga emitala." 
Mark8:14 Kati nno baali beerabidde okuleeta emigaati; mu lyato baalinamu omugaati gumu gwokka. 
Mark8:15 N'abakuutira nti: “Mwegendereze, mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo n'ekizimbulukusa kya Erode.”" 
Mark8:16 Ne beebuuzaganya kubanga tebaalina migaati. 
Mark8:17 Yezu n'ategeera, n'abagamba nti: “Lwaki mwebuuzaganya nti temulina migaati? Temunnaba kumanya na kutegeera? Omutima gwammwe gukyagugubye?" 
Mark8:18 Mulina amaaso ne mutalaba? Mulina amatu ne mutawulira? Temujjukira? 
Mark8:19 Kale emigaati etaano bwe nagimenyera abantu enkumi ettaano mwaggyawo ebisero bimeka ebijjudde obutundutundu?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Kkumi na bibiri” 
Mark8:20 Era n'abagamba nti: “Ate emigaati omusanvu, bwe nagimenyera abantu enkumi ennya, mwaggyawo ebibbo bimeka eby'obutundutundu?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:21 Kwe kubagamba nti: “Era temunnaba kutegeera?” 
Mark8:22 Awo ne bajja e Betisayida; ne bamuleetera muzibe, ne bamwegayirira amukwateko." 
Mark8:23 N'akwata muzibe ku mukono, n'amuggya mu kyalo, n'amufujjira amalusu ku maaso, n'amussaako emikono, n'amubuuza nti: “Oliko ky'osobola okulaba?”" 
Mark8:24 Ye n'atunula waggulu n'agamba nti: “Ndaba abantu batambulatambula, naye bali ng'emiti.”" 
Mark8:25 Ate n'ayongera okumussaako emikono ku maaso, n'atunuulira ddala, n'addawo ng'edda, n'alabira ddala bulungi byonna." 
Mark8:26 N'amusindika ewaabwe n'amugamba nti: “Ne mu kyalo toyingiramu.” 
Mark8:27 Yezu n'avaayo n'abayigirizwa be, n'alaga mu byalo eby'e Kayisariya-Filippo; mu kkubo n'abuuza abayigirizwa be nti: “Abantu bagamba nze ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Bagamba nti Yowanna Batista, abalala nti Eliya, ate abandi nti omu ku balanzi.”" 
Mark8:29 Awo n'ababuuza nti: “Naye nga mmwe mugamba nze ani?” 
Mark8:30 Petero n'ayanukula nti: “Ggwe Kristu.” N'abakuutira obutabuulirako muntu ku ye. 
Mark8:31 N'asooka okubayigiriza ng'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alina okubonyaabonyezebwa ebingi, n'okugaanibwa abakadde, bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi, n'okuttibwa, n'okuzuukira nga wayiseewo ennaku ssatu." 
Mark8:32 Ekigambo ekyo n'akyogerera ddala kyere. Petero n'amuddira, n'atandika okumukomako." 
Mark8:33 Naye ye n'akyuka, bwe yalaba abayigirizwa be, n'akabukira Petero, n'agamba nti: “Nva mu maaso, Sitaani! Kubanga by'olowooza si bya Katonda, wabula bya bantu.”" 
Mark8:34 Awo n'ayita gy'ali ekibiina wamu n'abayigirizwa be n'abagamba nti: “Obanga oli ayagala okungoberera, yeerese, yeetikke omusaalaba gwe, angoberere." 
Mark8:35 Kubanga buli alyagala okuwonya obulamu bwe, alibubuza; naye buli alibuza obulamu bwe okubeera nze n'okubeera Evangili, alibuwonya." 
Mark8:36 Kale omuntu kimugasa ki okulya ensi yonna, sso n'afiirwa obulamu bwe?" 
Mark8:37 Ye omuntu ayinza kuwa ki okununula obulamu bwe? 
Mark8:38 Kubanga buli akwatirwa nze n'ebigambo byange ensonyi mu zzadde lino esseegu era eryonoonyi, oyo Omwana w'Omuntu naye alimukwatirwa ensonyi lw'alijja mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe wamu ne bamalayika abatuukirivu.”" 
Mark9:1 N'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti waliwo abamu ku bayimiridde wano, abatalirega ku lumbe okutuusa nga balabye obwakabaka bwa Katonda nga bujja n'amaanyi.”" 
Mark9:2 Nga wayise ennaku mukaaga, Yezu n'atoola Petero ne Yakobo ne Yowanna, n'abambusa ku lusozi oluwanvu ku bbali bokka, n'afuuka mu maaso gaabwe." 
Mark9:3 Ebyambalo bye ne bimasamasa, nga byeru nnyo, nga tewali na mwozi mu nsi ayinza kubitukuza bw'atyo." 
Mark9:4 Ne balabikirwa Eliya ne Musa; baali boogera ne Yezu. 
Mark9:5 Petero n'agamba Yezu nti: “Rabbi, kirungi ffe okubeera wano; ka tukole wano ensiisira ssatu: emu yiyo, emu ya Musa n'emu ya Eliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Yali tamanyi ky'ayogera, kubanga baali batidde nnyo." 
Mark9:7 Ekire ne kijja kibabuutikira; eddoboozi ne liva mu kire, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa, mumuwulirenga.”" 
Mark9:8 Amangu ago bwe baamagamaga, nga tebakyalaba muntu mulala ali nabo, wabula Yezu yekka." 
Mark9:9 Bwe baali baserengeta olusozi, n'abakuutira obutabuulirako muntu kye balabye, okutuusa Omwana w'Omuntu ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu." 
Mark9:10 Ekigambo ne bakyekuumira bokka, naye nga beebuuza 'kiki ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu' kye kitegeeza." 
Mark9:11 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Lwaki abawandiisi bagamba nti Eliya alina okusooka okujja?” 
Mark9:12 N'ayanukula nti: “Kituufu Eliya ajja, atereeze byonna; ate kyawandiikibwa kitya ku Mwana w'Omuntu nti: ‘Wa kulaba ennaku nnyingi n'okujolongebwa’?" 
Mark9:13 Naye nze mbagamba nti Eliya yajja, wabula ne bamukola kyonna kye baagala nga bwe kyali kimuwandiikiddwako.”" 
Mark9:14 Bwe baatuuka awali abayigirizwa be, n'alaba ekibiina kinene ekibeebunguludde, n'abawandiisi nga bawakana nabo." 
Mark9:15 Era amangu ago ekibiina olwalaba Yezu, ne basamaalirira, ne balinnimukira gy'ali, ne bamwaniriza." 
Mark9:16 N'ababuuza nti: “Muwakana ki nabo?” 
Mark9:17 Omu okuva mu kibiina n'ayanukula nti: “Muyigiriza, nkuleetedde mutabani wange aliko omwoyo gukasiru," 
Mark9:18 buli lwe gumukwata, gumukuba ebigwo, n'abimba ejjovu, n'aluma amannyo, n'alambaala. Nasaba abayigirizwa bo bagugobe, ne batayinza.”" 
Mark9:19 N'abaddamu nti: “Owa, ezzadde lino eritakkiriza! Ndituusa wa okubeera nammwe? Ndituusa wa okubagumiikiriza? Mumundeetere.”" 
Mark9:20 Ne bamumuleetera. Omwoyo bwe gwamulaba, amangu ago ne gumusikaasikanya, n'agwa ku ttaka, ne yeeziribanga, n'abimba ejjovu mu kamwa." 
Mark9:21 Awo n'abuuza kitaawe nti: “Yaakamala bbanga ki nga kino kimujjira?” Ye n'agamba nti: “Okuva mu buto; 
Mark9:22 ate gumusuula lunye mu muliro ne mu mazzi, gumuzikirize. Naye obanga olina ky'oyinza okukola, tusaasire, otuyambe.”" 
Mark9:23 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Obanga osobola! Byonna bisoboka eri oyo akkiriza.” 
Mark9:24 Amangu ago kitaawe w'omwana n'agamba nti: “Nzikiriza, yamba obutakkiriza bwange.”" 
Mark9:25 Yezu bwe yalaba ekibiina nga kikuŋŋaana, n'akabukira omwoyo omubi nti: “Mwoyo ggwe omuggavu gw'amatu, ogutayogera, nze nkulagira, mumaamukeko, ate togezanga kumuddamu.”" 
Mark9:26 Ne guwowoggana, ne gumusikaasikanya nnyo, ne gumuvaako, n'aba ng'afudde. Bangi ne bagamba nti: “Afudde.”" 
Mark9:27 Naye Yezu n'amukwata ku mukono, n'amugolokosa, n'asituka." 
Mark9:28 Yezu bwe yayingira mu nnyumba, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti: “Lwaki ffe tetwasobodde kugugoba?”" 
Mark9:29 N'abaddamu nti: “Engeri eno tegobeka, wabula na kwegayirira.”" 
Mark9:30 Ne bava eyo, ne basalira mu Galilaaya, nga tayagala wabeerewo akimanya," 
Mark9:31 Kubanga yali ayigiriza abayigirizwa be, ng'abagamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu, balimutta; bw'alimala okuttibwa, nga wayise ennaku ssatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark9:32 Naye bo ne batategeera kigambo ekyo, ate baali batya okumubuuza." 
Mark9:33 Ne batuuka e Kafarunawumu. Bwe yali mu nnyumba, n'ababuuza nti: “Mu kkubo mubadde mwogera ku ki?”" 
Mark9:34 Bo ne basirika, kubanga mu kkubo baali bawakana bokka na bokka ku ani asinga obukulu mu bo." 
Mark9:35 N'atuula, n'ayita Ekkumi n'Ababiri, n'abagamba nti: “Buli ayagala okubeera omubereberye, abeere muvannyuma mu bonna, era muweereza wa bonna.”" 
Mark9:36 Awo n'akwata omwana omuto n'amuyimiriza mu makkati gaabwe, n'amukwata mu mikono gye, n'abagamba nti:" 
Mark9:37 “Buli ayaniriza omwana omuto ng'ono mu linnya lyange, aba ayanirizza nze; na buli annyaniriza, tayaniriza nze, wabula ayaniriza oli eyantuma.”" 
Mark9:38 Awo Yowanna n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, twalaba omuntu ng'agoba emyoyo emibi mu linnya lyo, ne tumuziyiza, kubanga yali tayita naffe.”" 
Mark9:39 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Muleke kumuziyiza; kubanga tewali akola kikolwa kya maanyi mu linnya lyange ate ayinza amangu ago okunjogerako obubi. 
Mark9:40 Kubanga oyo atatuwakanya, aba ku ludda lwaffe." 
Mark9:41 “Buli alibawa ekikopo ky'amazzi olw'erinnya nti muli ba Kristu, mazima ka mbabuulire, talibulwa mpeera ye." 
Mark9:42 Naye buli alyesittaza omu ku bato bano abanzikiriza, ekyandisinze obulungi ku ye, lwe lubengo olunene okusibibwa mu bulago bwe n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja." 
Mark9:43 Era obanga omukono gwo gukwesittaza, gutemeko; waakiri oyingire mu bulamu ng'oli wa kikuggu, n'otosuulibwa mu Geyenna ng'olina emikono gyombi, mu muliro ogutazikira." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Era obanga ekigere kyo kikwesittaza, kitemeko; waakiri oyingire mu bulamu obutaggwaawo ng'oli mulema n'otogenda mu Geyenna ng'olina ebigere byombi." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Era obanga eriiso lyo likwesittaza, linokolemu; waakiri oyingire mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda ng'oli wa ttulu, okusinga okusuulibwa mu Geyenna ng'olina amaaso gombi," 
Mark9:48 eyo envunyu yaabwe mw'etefiira, n'omuliro mwe gutazikira." 
Mark9:49 Kubanga buli omu alungwamu omuliro. 
Mark9:50 Omunnyo guba mulungi, naye omunnyo bwe gusaabulukuka, munaagulunga naki? Mubeere n'omunnyo mu mmwe, n'emirembe mubeere nagyo mwekka na mwekka.”" 
Mark10:1 Eyo n'avaayo, n'ajja mu bitundu bya Buyudaaya n'emitala wa Yorudani; ebibiina ne bikuŋŋaanira w'ali nate, era n'abayigiriza nga bwe yali amanyidde okukola." 
Mark10:2 Abafarisaayo ne basembera w'ali ne bamubuuza nti: “Omusajja akkirizibwa okugoba mukazi we?” 
Mark10:3 N'abaanukula nti: “Musa yabalagira ki?” 
Mark10:4 Ne bagamba nti: “Musa yakkiriza omusajja okumuwandiikira ebbaluwa ey'obugobe n'okumusiibula.” 
Mark10:5 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Musa yalagira ekiwandiiko ekyo olw'okubeera obukakanyavu bw'emitima gyammwe; 
Mark10:6 naye okuva mu masooka g'okutondebwa Katonda yabakola omusajja n'omukazi. 
Mark10:7 Olw'ekyo omusajja kyaliva alirekanga kitaawe ne nnyina n'agattibwa ne mukazi we," 
Mark10:8 ababiri balifuuka omubiri gumu. Olwo nga tebakyali babiri, wabula omuntu omu." 
Mark10:9 Awo nno Katonda ky'aggasse awamu, omuntu takigattululanga.”" 
Mark10:10 Mu nnyumba abayigirizwa be ne baddamu okumubuuza ku kigambo ekyo. 
Mark10:11 N'abagamba nti: “Buli agoba mukazi we n'awasa omulala, aba ayenze eri mukazi we;" 
Mark10:12 n'omukazi singa anoba ku bba, n'afumbirwa omulala, aba ayenze.”" 
Mark10:13 Awo ne bamuleetera abaana abato abakwateko, naye abayigirizwa be ne babakomako." 
Mark10:14 Yezu bwe yabalaba, n'anyiiga, n'abagamba nti: “Muleke abaana abato bajje gye ndi, temubaziyiza; kubanga abafaanana nga bano be bannannyini bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Mark10:15 Mazima mbagamba nti yenna atayaniriza bwakabaka bwa Katonda nga mwana muto, talibuyingiramu n'akamu.”" 
Mark10:16 N'abakwata mu mikono gye, n'abawa omukisa ng'abassaako emikono." 
Mark10:17 Bwe yali yaakessa mu kkubo, omu n'amweyuna, n'amufukaamirira, n'amubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza omulungi, nkole ki okusikira obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Mark10:18 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ompitidde ki omulungi? Teri mulungi okuggyako Katonda yekka. 
Mark10:19 Ebiragiro obimanyi: ‘Tottanga; Toyendanga; Tobbanga; Tojuliranga bya bulimba; Tolyakulanga; Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa.’ ” 
Mark10:20 Ye n'ayanukula, n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, ebyo byonna nabikwata okuva mu buto bwange.”" 
Mark10:21 Yezu n'amwekaliriza, n'amwagala, n'amugamba nti: “Okyabulwako kimu: genda, tunda by'olina owe abaavu, obugagga olibeera nabwo mu ggulu, ojje ongoberere.”" 
Mark10:22 Naye oli ne yennyika olw'ekigambo ekyo; n'agenda nga munakuwavu, kubanga yalina eby'obugagga bingi." 
Mark10:23 Awo Yezu ne yeebunguluza amaaso, n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Nga kiriba kizibu abalina obugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!”" 
Mark10:24 Abayigirizwa ne beewuunya ebigambo ebyo. Yezu era n'addamu n'abagamba nti: “Obwana, nga kizibu okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!" 
Mark10:25 Kiba kyangu eŋŋamiya okuyita mu nnyindo y'empiso okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Mark10:26 Bo ne bawuniikirira n'okusingawo ne bagambagana nti: “Awo nno ani asobola okulokoka?” 
Mark10:27 Yezu n'abatunuulira, n'abagamba nti: “Ku bantu kino tekisoboka, naye si ku Katonda; kubanga ku Katonda byonna bisoboka.”" 
Mark10:28 Petero n'asooka okumugamba nti: “Kale ffe twaleka byonna ne tukugoberera.” 
Mark10:29 Yezu n'ayanukula nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti tewali muntu yaleka nnyumba, oba baganda be, oba bannyina, oba nnyina, oba kitaawe, oba baana, oba bibanja okubeera nze n'okubeera Evangili," 
Mark10:30 atalifuna mu nsi muno mirundi kikumi nnyumba, baganda be, bannyina, bazadde abakazi, abaana ko n'okuyigganyizibwa, ate mu mirembe egirijja obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Mark10:31 Naye bangi ab'olubereberye baliba ab'oluvannyuma, n'ab'oluvannyuma baliba ab'olubereberye.”" 
Mark10:32 Awo baali mu kkubo, nga bambuka e Yeruzaalemu, Yezu nga y'abakulembedde; nga bawuniikirivu, abamugoberera nga batya. N'azza ebbali Ekkumi n'Ababiri n'asooka okubabuulira ebigenda okumujjira," 
Mark10:33 n'agamba nti: “Tuutuno twambuka e Yeruzaalemu; Omwana w'Omuntu ajja kuweebwayo mu bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi; balimusalira ogw'okufa ne bamukwasa ab'amawanga; 
Mark10:34 balimuduulira ne bamufujjira amalusu, balimuswanyuula era balimutta, naye oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ssatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark10:35 Awo Yakobo ne Yowanna batabani ba Zebedaayo ne basembera w'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, twagala otukolere kyonna kye tunaakusaba.”" 
Mark10:36 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mwagala mbakolere ki?” 
Mark10:37 Ne bagamba nti: “Tuwe tutuule omu ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo n'omulala ku mukono gwo ogwa kkono mu kitiibwa kyo.” 
Mark10:38 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Kye musaba temukimanyi. Muyinza okunywa ekikompe kye nnywa oba okubatizibwa batismu gye mbatizibwa?” 
Mark10:39 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Tuyinza.” Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Weewaawo ekikompe kye nnywa nammwe mulikinywa, ne batismu gye mbatizibwa nammwe muligibatizibwa," 
Mark10:40 naye okutuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo oba ku mukono gwange ogwa kkono okukibawa si mulimu gwange, wabula kiriweebwa abo be kyategekerwa.”" 
Mark10:41 Ekkumi bwe baawulira, ne basooka okunyiigira ab'oluganda Yakobo ne Yowanna." 
Mark10:42 Yezu n'abayita w'ali, n'abagamba nti: “Mumanyi ng'abo abalowoozebwa okuba abafuzi b'amawanga bagalaga obuyinza, n'abakulu baabwe babafuza maanyi;" 
Mark10:43 sso mu mmwe si bwe kiri. Buli ayagala okubeera omukulu mu mmwe, abeere muweereza wammwe;" 
Mark10:44 ayagala okubeera omubereberye mu mmwe, abeere muddu wa bonna." 
Mark10:45 Era ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, teyajja kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza n'okuwaayo obulamu bwe ng'omutango ku lw'abangi.”" 
Mark10:46 Ne batuuka e Yeriko. Bwe yali ava mu Yeriko ng'ali n'abayigirizwa be n'ekibiina kinene, Barutimayo mutabani wa Timayo, omusabiriza muzibe, yali atudde ku kkubo." 
Mark10:47 Bwe yawulira nti yali Yezu ow'e Nazareti, n'atandika okukoowoola nti: “Yezu, Omwana wa Dawudi, nsaasira!”" 
Mark10:48 Bangi ne bamukomako, ne bamugamba asirike, naye ye n'aleekaana nnyo n'okusingawo nti: “Omwana wa Dawudi, nsaasira!”" 
Mark10:49 Yezu n'ayimirira, n'agamba nti: “Mumuyite.” Ne bayita muzibe, ne bamugamba nti: “Guma omwoyo, situka, akuyita.”" 
Mark10:50 Ye n'asuula eri omunagiro gwe, n'asituka n'ajja gy'ali." 
Mark10:51 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Oyagala nkukolere ki?” Muzibe n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, ndabe.”" 
Mark10:52 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Weetambulire, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” Amangu ago n'addamu okulaba, n'agenda ng'amugoberera mu kkubo." 
Mark11:1 Bwe baasemberera Yeruzaalemu, nga batuuse e Betifage ne Betaniya, kumpi n'Olusozi lw'Oliva, n'atuma babiri ku bayigirizwa be," 
Mark11:2 n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu kyalo ekibali mu maaso; mangu awo nga mwakayingira, mujja kusanga akalogoyi akasibiddwa, akateebagalwangako muntu n'omu, mukayimbule mukaleete." 
Mark11:3 Bwe wabaawo abagamba nti: ‘Mukola ki?’ mugamba nti: ‘Omukama akeetaaga; ajja kukasindika wano mangu.’ ” 
Mark11:4 Awo ne bagenda, ne basanga akalogoyi nga kasibiddwa ebweru ku mulyango mu masaŋŋanzira, ne bakasumulula." 
Mark11:5 Abamu ku baali bayimiridde awo ne babagamba nti: “Mukola ki, abasumulula akalogoyi?”" 
Mark11:6 Bo ne babagamba nga Yezu bwe yali abagambye; bali ne babaleka. 
Mark11:7 Ne batwalira Yezu akalogoyi, ne bakasuulako ebyambalo byabwe; n'akeebagala." 
Mark11:8 Awo bangi ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu kkubo, n'abalala amatabi okuli amakoola ge baali bamenye ku ttale." 
Mark11:9 Abaali bakulembeddemu n'abaali bagoberera ne bakuba emizira nga bagamba nti: “Hosanna! Agulumizibwe oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama! 
Mark11:10 Obwakabaka bwa kitaffe Dawudi obujja bugulumizibwe omukisa. Hosanna waggulu ddala eyo!” 
Mark11:11 Bwe yayingira mu Yeruzaalemu, n'agenda mu Kiggwa; bwe yamala byonna okubyebunguluza amaaso; obudde nga bwe bwali buwungedde, n'afuluma n'agenda e Betaniya wamu n'Ekkumi n'Ababiri." 
Mark11:12 Ku lunaku olwaddako, bwe baali bava e Betaniya, enjala n'emuluma." 
Mark11:13 Bwe yalengera omukunyu ewalako, ogwaliko amakoola, n'alaga gye guli ng'asuubira okusangako akantu; naye bwe yagutuukako, n'atasangako kantu wabula amakoola gokka, kubanga tebwali budde bwa mikunyu." 
Mark11:14 N'agugamba nti: “Tewabanga akulyako kibala emirembe gyonna!” Abayigirizwa be ne bakiwulira. 
Mark11:15 Ne batuuka e Yeruzaalemu. Bwe yayingira mu Kiggwa, n'atandika okugobamu abatunda n'abagulira mu Kiggwa; n'avuunika emmeeza z'abawaanyisa ensimbi n'entebe z'abatunda enjiibwa." 
Mark11:16 N'ataganya muntu kuyisa mu Kiggwa kantu na kamu. 
Mark11:17 N'abayigiriza ng'abagamba nti: “Tekyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kwegayiririramu eri amawanga gonna?’ Sso mmwe mugifudde mpuku ya banyazi.” 
Mark11:18 Bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi bwe baawulira, ne banoonya amagezi ag'okumuzikiriza, kubanga baali bamutya, kubanga ekibiina kyonna kyali kiwuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye." 
Mark11:19 Ate bwe bwawungeera, n'ava mu kibuga." 
Mark11:20 Bwe baali bayitawo enkeera, ne balaba omukunyu nga gukaze okutuuka ku mirandira." 
Mark11:21 Petero n'ajjukira, n'amugamba nti: “Rabbi, omukunyu gwe wavumiridde guugwo gukaze.”" 
Mark11:22 Yezu n'abaanukula nti: “Mube n'okukkiriza mu Katonda. 
Mark11:23 Mazima mbagamba nti buli aligamba olusozi luno nti: ‘Siguukulukuka, weesuule mu nnyanja,’ nga tabuusabuusa mu mutima gwe, wabula ng'akkiriza nga kyonna ky'anaagamba kinaatuukirira, kirimukolerwa." 
Mark11:24 Kyenva mbagamba nti byonna bye munaasabanga nga mwegayirira, mukkirizenga nga mujja kubifuna; era mulibifuna." 
Mark11:25 Bwe muyimiriranga okwegayirira, oba waliwo gwe mulinako ekigambo, mumusonyiwenga, ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu alyoke abasonyiwe ensobi zammwe.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Ne batuuka ate mu Yeruzaalemu. Bwe yali atambula mu Kiggwa, bakabona abakulu, abawandiisi n'abakadde ne basembera w'ali," 
Mark11:28 ne bamugamba nti: “Ebyo obikozesa buyinza ki? Ani yakuwa obuyinza obw'okukola ebyo by'okola?” 
Mark11:29 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Nzija kubabuuzaayo ekigambo kimu; munziremu, nange ndyoke mbabuulire obuyinza obunkoza ebyo." 
Mark11:30 Kale, batismu ya Yowanna yava mu ggulu, nandiki mu bantu?”" 
Mark11:31 Ne beebuuzaganya bokka na bokka, ne bagamba nti: “Bwe tugamba nti: ‘Yava mu ggulu,’ ajja kubuuza nti: ‘Awo nno lwaki temwamukkiriza?’" 
Mark11:32 Tugambe nti: ‘Yava mu bantu?’ ” Naye nno baali batya abantu, kubanga bonna baali bakkiriza nga Yowanna yali mulanzi ddala." 
Mark11:33 Kwe kuddamu Yezu nti: “Tetumanyi.” Ne Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Nange siibabuulire buyinza bunkoza ebyo.” 
Mark12:1 Awo n'atandika okwogera nabo mu ngero nti: “Omuntu omu yasimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu, n'agisibako olukomera, n'asimamu ekinnya ky'essogolero, n'azimbamu omunaala, n'agikwasa abalimi, n'agenda ku ggwanga." 
Mark12:2 Obudde bwe bwatuuka, n'atumira abakozi omuweereza anone ku bakozi ebibala by'ennimiro ye ey'emizabbibu." 
Mark12:3 Bo ne bamukwata, ne bamukuba, ne bamugoba ngalo nsa." 
Mark12:4 N'abatumira ate omuweereza omulala; n'oyo ne bamukuba olubale, ne bamuvumaavuma." 
Mark12:5 Era n'atuma omulala; ne bamutta; n'abalala bangi, abamu ne babaweweenyula, abandi ne babattira ddala." 
Mark12:6 Naye nno yalinayo omulala, mutabani we omu omwagalwa, n'amubatumira ng'agamba nti: ‘Omwana wange banaamutya.’" 
Mark12:7 Naye abakozi ne bagambagana nti: ‘Ono ye musika; mugire tumutte, obusika butuddire.’" 
Mark12:8 Ne bamukwata, ne bamutta, ne bamusuula ebweru w'ennimiro y'emizabbibu." 
Mark12:9 Kale nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu alikola ki? Alijja n'azikiriza abalimi abo n'ennimiro ye ey'emizabbibu n'agiwa abalala. 
Mark12:10 Ekyawandiikibwa kino temukisomanga nti: “ ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka lukulwe mu nsonda;" 
Mark12:11 ekyo Omukama ye yakikola; kya kyewuunyo mu maaso gaffe’?” 
Mark12:12 Baali banoonya okumukwata, naye ne batya ekibiina; kubanga baategeera ng'olugero aluyisizza ku bo bennyini; ne bamuleka, ne bagenda." 
Mark12:13 Ne bamutumira abamu ku Bafarisaayo n'abamu ku b'ekibiina kya Erode, bamukwate mu bigambo." 
Mark12:14 Ne bajja, ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, tumanyi ng'oli wa mazima, nga teweeguya muntu; obukulu bw'omuntu si bw'otunuulira, wabula ng'oyigiriza mu mazima ekkubo lya Katonda. Kale nno, kisaanye okuwa Kayisari omusolo, nandiki tekisaanye?" 
Mark12:15 Tuwe oba tetuwa?” N'ategeera enkwe zaabwe, n'abagamba nti: “Munkemera ki? Mundeetere dinaari ndabe.”" 
Mark12:16 Ne bagireeta. N'abagamba nti: “Ekifaananyi kino n'ekiwandiiko ebiriko by'ani?” Ne bamugamba nti: “Bya Kayisari.” 
Mark12:17 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ebya Kayisari mubiddize Kayisari; n'ebya Katonda mubiddize Katonda.” Ne bamwewuunya. 
Mark12:18 Abasaddukaayo, abo abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bajja gy'ali, ne bamubuuza nti:" 
Mark12:19 “Muyigiriza, Musa yaleka atuwandiikidde nti singa muganda w'omuntu afanga n'aleka omukazi, naye n'ataleka baana, muganda we awasanga omukazi oyo n'asibusiza muganda we ezzadde." 
Mark12:20 Waaliwo ab'oluganda musanvu: omubereberye yawasa omukazi, n'afa nga talese mwana." 
Mark12:21 N'owookubiri n'amuwasa, era naye n'afa nga talese mwana. N'owookusatu bw'atyo." 
Mark12:22 Bonna omusanvu ne bataleka baana. N'oluvannyuma lwa bonna omukazi n'afa. 
Mark12:23 Kale mu mazuukira, aliba muka ani? Anti bonna omusanvu baamuwasaako.”" 
Mark12:24 Awo Yezu n'abaanukula nti: “Si kyemuva musobya olw'obutamanya Biwandiiko yadde obuyinza bwa Katonda? 
Mark12:25 Kubanga bwe balimala okuzuukira mu bafu, tebagenda kuwasa yadde okufumbirwa, wabula baliba nga bamalayika mu ggulu." 
Mark12:26 Okumanya ng'abafu balizuukizibwa, temusomangako mu kitabo kya Musa, we boogerera ku kisaka, Katonda nga bwe yamugamba nti: ‘Nze Katonda wa Yiburayimu, Katonda wa Yizaake, ne Katonda wa Yakobo’?" 
Mark12:27 Katonda taba wa bafu, wabula wa balamu. Musobya nnyo.”" 
Mark12:28 Awo omu ku bawandiisi eyali awulidde bwe bawakana, bwe yalaba abazzeemu bulungi, n'amubuuza nti: “Kiragiro ki ekisooka mu byonna?”" 
Mark12:29 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Ekiragiro ekisooka kye kino: ‘Wulira Yisirayeli, Omukama Katonda waffe yekka ye Mukama." 
Mark12:30 Oyagalanga Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, n'emmeeme yo yonna, n'amaanyi go gonna.’" 
Mark12:31 Ate ekyokubiri kye kino: ‘Oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.’ Teri kiragiro kirala kikira ebyo.” 
Mark12:32 Omuwandiisi n'amugamba nti: “Ky'ekyo, Muyigiriza; oyogedde mazima, nti ali omu, teri mulala okuggyako ye;" 
Mark12:33 ate nti okumwagala n'omutima gwonna, n'amagezi gonna, n'amaanyi gonna, era nti n'oli okwagala munne nga bwe yeeyagala yennyini, kye kisinga ebitambiro byonna ebyokye n'ebyonziira.”" 
Mark12:34 Yezu bwe yalaba ng'azzeemu na magezi, n'amugamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tobuli wala.” Era tewali n'omu yageza nate kumubuuza kibuuzo kirala." 
Mark12:35 Bwe yali ayigiriza mu Kiggwa, Yezu n'agamba nti: “Abawandiisi basobola batya okugamba nti: Kristu mwana wa Dawudi?" 
Mark12:36 Kubanga Dawudi yennyini, ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu agamba nti: “ ‘Omukama yagamba Mukama wange, nti: “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa abalabe bo lwe ndibassa wansi w'ebigere byo.” ’" 
Mark12:37 Dawudi yennyini amuyita Mukama, ate abeera atya omwana we?” Ekibiina ekinene ne kimuwulira n'essanyu." 
Mark12:38 Era mu njigiriza ye n'abagamba nti: “Mwekengere abawandiisi, abaagala okukumbira mu matanvuuwa, n'okulamusibwa mu mbuga," 
Mark12:39 n'entebe ez'oku mwanjo mu sinaagooga, n'ebifo ebisinga ekitiibwa ku bijjulo;" 
Mark12:40 abakaliza ennyumba za bannamwandu, ne beefukuutiriza essaala empanvu. Balifuna ekibonerezo ekisingako obukambwe.”" 
Mark12:41 Yezu yali atudde mu maaso g'eggwanika ng'atunuulide ekibiina bwe kisuula ensimbi mu ggwanika; abagagga bangi nga basuulamu nnyingi. 
Mark12:42 Ne wajjawo nnamwandu omwavu, n'asuulamu obusente bubiri obuweza ekyokuna ky'ennusu." 
Mark12:43 Awo n'ayita abayigirizwa be n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti nnamwandu oyo omwavu asuddemu kingi okusinga bonna abasuula mu ggwanika," 
Mark12:44 kubanga bonna basuddemu nga baggya ku bibafikkiridde, sso ng'ono mu bwavu bwe ataddemu kyonna ky'abadde nakyo, kyonna ekibadde eky'okumuliisa.”" 
Mark13:1 Bwe yali afuluma mu Kiggwa, omu ku bayigirizwa be n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, laba amayinja amakula! Laba ebizimbe amakula!”" 
Mark13:2 Yezu n'ayanukula, n'amugamba nti: “Olaba ebizimbe bino gaggadde? Wano tewalisigala jjinja liri ku linnaalyo litalisuulibwa wansi.”" 
Mark13:3 Bwe yali atudde ku Lusozi lw'Oliva, emitala w'Ekiggwa, Petero, Yakobo, Yowanna ne Andureya ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti:" 
Mark13:4 “Tubuulire, ebyo birituuka ddi, ate kabonero ki akalyoleka ng'ebyo byonna binaatera okutuukirizibwa?”" 
Mark13:5 Yezu n'asooka okubagamba nti: “Mwekkaanye, tewabaawo abawubisa;" 
Mark13:6 Bangi balijja mu linnya lyange nga bagamba nti: ‘Nze nzuuyo!’ era baliwubisa bangi. 
Mark13:7 Kale bwe muwuliranga entalo n'eŋŋambo z'entalo, temwekanganga. Ebyo tebirirema kubaawo; naye yo enkomerero eriba tennatuuka." 
Mark13:8 Kubanga eggwanga lirisitukira mu linnaalyo, n'obwakabaka mu bunnaabwo; walibaawo musisi mu bifo ebimu, n'enjala erigwa; naye ebyo byonna kwe kusookereza kw'okulumwa." 
Mark13:9 Awo nno mwerinde, kubanga balibawaayo mu nkiiko, balibakubira mu sinaagooga; mulisimbibwa mu maaso g'abalamuzi n'aga bakabaka okubeera nze mujulire mu maaso gaabwe." 
Mark13:10 Anti Evangili eteekwa okusooka okubuulirwa amawanga gonna. 
Mark13:11 Ate bwe babatwalanga ne babawaayo, temweraliikiriranga kye munaagamba. Mwogere kye munaaweebwanga mu kaseera ako, kubanga si mmwe munaabanga mwogera, wabula Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Mark13:12 Ow'oluganda aliwaayo muganda we okuttibwa, ne kitaawe w'omwana, omwana we; abaana balisitukira mu babazaala ne babawaayo battibwe." 
Mark13:13 Mulikyayibwa bonna olw'okubeera erinnya lyange. Naye aligumiikiriza okutuusa ku nkomerero, alirokoka." 
Mark13:14 “Era bwe muliraba ekyenyinyalwa ekizikiriza nga kiri we kitasaanidde kubeera, asoma bino ategeere, olwo abaliba mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga mu nsozi," 
Mark13:15 aliba ku kasolya waggulu takkanga kuyingira mu nnyumba ye kuggyamu kantu; 
Mark13:16 n'alibeera mu nnimiro, taddanga kutwala munagiro gwe." 
Mark13:17 Zibasanze abo abaliba embuto n'abayonsa mu nnaku ezo! 
Mark13:18 Kyokka mwegayirire ebyo bireme kubaawo mu budde bwa butiti. 
Mark13:19 Kubanga mu nnaku ezo mulibaamu ebibonoobono bingi, ebitabangawo okuva mu masooka g'okutondebwa Katonda lwe yatonda n'okutuusa kati, era tebiribaawo nate." 
Mark13:20 Era singa Omukama teyakendeeza ku nnaku ezo, tewandiwonye muntu n'omu; naye olw'okubeera abalondemu abo be yeeroboza, ennaku ezo yazikendezaako." 
Mark13:21 “Awo nno bwe wabangawo abagamba nti: ‘Laba, Kristu wuuno wano,’ oba nti: ‘Laba, wuuli wali!’ temukkirizanga." 
Mark13:22 Kubanga Bakristu ab'obulimba n'abalanzi ab'obulimba bagenda kusituka; balikola obubonero n'ebyewuunyisa okuwubisa newandibadde abalondemu, singa kiyinzika." 
Mark13:23 Mmwe nno mwerinde; byonna mbibabuuliriddewo. 
Mark13:24 “Mu nnaku ezo, ebibonoobono bwe biriba byakaggwa, enjuba eriddugala, omwezi gulirekayo okwaka," 
Mark13:25 emmunyeenye ez'omu ggulu zirigwa okuva ku ggulu, n'amaanyi ag'omu ggulu galinyeenyezebwa." 
Mark13:26 Awo baliraba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'ajjira mu bire n'amaanyi mangi n'ekitiibwa. 
Mark13:27 Alituma bamalayika be ne bakuŋŋaanya abalonde be okuva mu njuyi ennya, okuva ensi gy'ekoma okutuuka eggulu gye likoma." 
Mark13:28 “Mulabire ku mukunyu: ettabi lyagwo bwe lidda obuto, ne lissaako amakoola, mutegeera ng'obudde obw'ekyeya bunaatera okutuuka." 
Mark13:29 Nammwe nno bwe mulabanga ebyo byonna bibaawo, mumanyanga nti ali kumpi, ku miryango kwennyini." 
Mark13:30 Mazima mbagamba nti ezzadde lino teririggwaawo ebyo byonna nga tebinnatuukirira. 
Mark13:31 Eggulu n'ensi biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange tebiriggwaawo." 
Mark13:32 “Kyokka olunaku lwennyini oba akadde tewali abimanyi, newandibadde bamalayika mu ggulu, yadde Mwana, wabula Taata yekka." 
Mark13:33 Mubeere bulindaala, mutunule, kubanga temumanyi kaseera." 
Mark13:34 Kiri ng'omuntu eyali agenda olugendo, bwe yali ava awaka, obuvunaanyizibwa n'abukwasa abaweereza be, buli omu omulimu gwe, n'omuggazi n'amulagira okutunula." 
Mark13:35 Mutunule nno, kubanga temumanyi nnannyinimu w'alituukira, oba kawungeezi, oba ttumbi, oba mu nkoko, oba ku makya;" 
Mark13:36 bw'alibagwako, aleme kusanga nga mwebase." 
Mark13:37 Kye ŋŋamba mmwe, nkigamba bonna: Mutunule.”" 
Mark14:1 Ennaku zaali zisigadde bbiri zokka okutuuka ku Pasika ne ku mbaga enkulu ey'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse; bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi baali banoonya engeri y'okumukwata nga bamusoonookereza, bamutte." 
Mark14:2 Naye ne bagamba nti: “Kyokka si ku mbaga enkulu, sikulwa nga wabaawo akeegugungo k'abantu.”" 
Mark14:3 Bwe yali e Betaniya mu nnyumba ya Simoni omugenge, ng'atudde alya, omukazi n'ajja ng'alina n'akasumbi k'alabasiteri ak'omuzigo ogwa narudo omwereere, ogw'omuwendo; n'ayasa akasumbi k'alabasiteri, omuzigo n'agumufuka ku mutwe." 
Mark14:4 Ne wabaawo abanyiiga ne bagambagana nti: “Omuzigo ogwo gufudde ki? 
Mark14:5 Kubanga omuzigo guno gubadde guyinza okutundibwa ku muwendo gwa dinaari ebikumi bisatu n'okusoba, ne zigabirwa abaavu.” Ne banyiigira omukazi." 
Mark14:6 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Mumuleke, mumutawaanyiza ki? Ankoledde ekintu kirungi." 
Mark14:7 Abaavu muli nabo bulijjo, muyinza okubakolera obulungi buli lwe mwagadde; sso nze temujja kubeeranga nange bulijjo." 
Mark14:8 Ye akoze ky'ayinzizza; asiigiddewo omubiri gwange omuzigo olw'okunziika. 
Mark14:9 Mazima mbagamba nti wonna Evangili eno gy'eribuulirwa mu nsi yonna, ky'akoze kiryogerwangako okumujjukira.”" 
Mark14:10 Awo Yuda Yisikariyoti, omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri, n'agenda eri bakabona abakulu, amuweeyo gye bali." 
Mark14:11 Bo bwe baawulira, ne basanyuka, ne bamulazaanya okumuwa ensimbi. Ye n'anoonya akakisa amuweeyo." 
Mark14:12 Ku lunaku olusooka olw'Emigaati Egitazimbulukuse, akaliga ka Pasika lwe kaatambirwa, abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti: “Oyagala tugende tuteeketeeke wa gy'onooliira Pasika?”" 
Mark14:13 N'asindika babiri ku bayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu kibuga, omuntu eyeetisse ensuwa y'amazzi anaabasisinkana; mumugoberere;" 
Mark14:14 wonna w'anaaba ayingidde, mugambe nnannyinimu nti: ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti: “Eddiiro liri wa mwe nnaaliira Pasika wamu n'abayigirizwa bange?” ’" 
Mark14:15 Ajja kubalaga ekisenge ekya waggulu ekyaliiriddwa, ekiwedde okuteeekateeka; omwo mwe muba mututegekera.”" 
Mark14:16 Abayigirizwa be ne bagenda, ne batuuka mu kibuga; ne basanga nga bwe yali abagambye, ne bateekateeka Pasika." 
Mark14:17 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, n'atuuka n'Ekkumi n'Ababiri." 
Mark14:18 Bwe baali batudde nga balya, Yezu n'agamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti munnammwe omu, alya nange, ajja kumpaayo.”" 
Mark14:19 Bo ne basooka okunakuwala, n'okumubuuza kinnoomu nti: “Ye nze?”" 
Mark14:20 N'abagamba nti: “Omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri, oyo akoza nange mu kibya." 
Mark14:21 Weewaawo Omwana w'Omuntu agenda nga bwe kyamuwandiikibwako, kyokka zimusanze oyo anaawaayo Omwana w'Omuntu! Singa omuntu oyo teyazaalibwa, kyandibadde kirungi gy'ali.”" 
Mark14:22 Bwe baali balya, Yezu n'akwata omugaati, ne yeebaza, n'agumenyamu, n'agubawa, ng'agamba nti: “Mukwate, kino mubiri gwange.”" 
Mark14:23 N'akwata ekikompe, ne yeebaza, n'akibawa, ne banywako bonna." 
Mark14:24 N'abagamba nti: “Kino musaayi gwange ogw'endagaano, oguyiibwa ku lw'abangi." 
Mark14:25 Mazima ka mbabulire, siriddayo kunywa ate ku kibala kya muzabbibu okutuusa ku lunaku olwo lwe ndikinywa obuggya mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Mark14:26 Bwe baamala okuyimba oluyimba, ne bafuluma, ne bagenda ku Lusozi olw'Oliva." 
Mark14:27 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwenna ekiro kino mujja kwesittala, kubanga baawandiika nti: ‘Ndikuba omusumba, endiga ne zibuna emiwabo.’" 
Mark14:28 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukira, ndibeesooka mu Galilaaya.”" 
Mark14:29 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Abalala bonna ne bwe baneesittala, nze nedda.”" 
Mark14:30 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Mazima nkugamba nti mu kiro kino enkoko eneeba tennakookolima emirundi ebiri, onooba onneegaanyi emirundi esatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Naye ye n'ayogera ng'akaalaamuse nti: “Ne bwe nnaaba ndi wa kufa wamu naawe, sijja kukwegaana.” Na bonna ne boogera bwe batyo." 
Mark14:32 Ne bagenda mu kifo ekiyitibwa Getisemani; n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mutuule wano, nze nga bwe neegayirira.”" 
Mark14:33 N'atoolako Petero, Yakobo ne Yowanna, n'agenda nabo. N'asooka okutya n'okukabirirwa." 
Mark14:34 N'abagamba nti: “Omwoyo gwange guliko ennaku nnyingi ezaagala n'okunzita; mubeere wano, mutunule.”" 
Mark14:35 Ne yeeyongerayo akabanga, n'agwa ku ttaka ne yeegayirira, oba kiyinzika, akadde ako kamuyiteko." 
Mark14:36 N'agamba nti: “Abba, Taata, anti byonna ku ggwe bisoboka; ekikompe kino kimpiteko; naye si nze kye njagala, wabula ggwe ky'oyagala.”" 
Mark14:37 N'ajja, n'abasanga nga beebase, n'agamba Petero nti: “Simoni, weebase, toyinzizza kutunula yadde essaawa emu eti?" 
Mark14:38 Mutunule, mwegayirire, muleme kugwa mu kukemebwa; kubanga omwoyo gwagala, naye omubiri munafu.”" 
Mark14:39 Era n'agenda, ne yeegayirira ng'ayogera ebigambo bye bimu." 
Mark14:40 N'ajja era, n'abasanga nga beebase; kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gakambagga; ne batalaba kye bamuddamu." 
Mark14:41 N'ajja ogwokusatu, n'abagamba nti: “Mukyebase, mukyawummuddeko? Kimala, akadde katuuse; Omwana w'Omuntu agenda okuweebwayo mu mikono gy'aboonoonyi." 
Mark14:42 Musituke, tugende; anampaayo wuuyo ali kumpi.”" 
Mark14:43 Amangu ago, yali akyayogera, Yuda Yisikariyoti, omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri, n'atuuka n'ekibiina kinene eky'abakutte ebitala n'emiggo okuva mu bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi n'abakadde." 
Mark14:44 Eyamuwaayo yali abawadde akabonero, ng'agambye nti: “Gwe nnaanywegera, nga ye wuuyo; mumukwate, mumutwale nga mumukuuma.”" 
Mark14:45 Bwe yatuuka, amangu ago n'amusemberera, n'agamba nti: “Rabbi!” n'amunywegera." 
Mark14:46 Awo bali ne bamussaako engalo, ne bamukwata." 
Mark14:47 Omu ku baali bayimiridde awo, n'asowola ekitala, n'atema omuddu wa kabona omukulu, n'amusalako okutu." 
Mark14:48 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Muvuddeyo n'ebitala n'emiggo okunkwata ng'abajjirira omunyazi? 
Mark14:49 Buli lunaku nabeeranga nammwe nga njigiriza mu Kiggwa, naye temwankwata. Kale, ebiwandiiko ka bituukirizibwe.”" 
Mark14:50 Awo bonna ne bamwabulira, ne badduka." 
Mark14:51 Waaliwo omulenzi eyali amugoberera nga ku mubiri gwe omwereere yeezingiriddeko ssuuka, ne bamukwata;" 
Mark14:52 naye ye n'abalekera essuuka, n'adduka bwereere." 
Mark14:53 Awo ne batwala Yezu ewa kabona omukulu; bakabona abakulu bonna, abawandiisi n'abakadde ne bakuŋŋaana." 
Mark14:54 Petero n'amugoberera ng'ayima walako okutuukira ddala mu luggya lwa kabona omukulu, n'atuula n'abakuumi ng'ayota omuliro." 
Mark14:55 Bakabona abakulu n'Olukiiko lwonna ne banoonya obujulizi obulumiriza Yezu kwe banaasinziira okumutta, naye ne batabuzuula." 
Mark14:56 Bangi ne bamuleetako obujulizi obw'obulimba, naye obujulizi bwabwe nga tebukwanagana." 
Mark14:57 Abalala ne bayimirira, ne bamulumiriza n'obujulizi obw'obulimba nga bagamba nti:" 
Mark14:58 “Ffe twamuwulira ng'agamba nti: ‘Nnyinza okumenyawo Ekiggwa kino ekyakolebwa n'emikono, mu nnaku ssatu ne nzizaawo ekirala ekitakoleddwa na mikono.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Naye ng'obujulizi bwabwe nabwo tebukwanagana. 
Mark14:60 Awo kabona omukulu n'ayimirira wakati, n'abuuza Yezu nti: “Tolina ky'oyanukula? Kiki kino abantu bano kye bakulumiriza?”" 
Mark14:61 Ye n'asirika busirisi, n'atabaako ky'addamu. Kabona omukulu n'amubuuza ogwokubiri nti: “Ggwe Kristu, Omwana w'Eyaweebwa Omukisa?”" 
Mark14:62 N'amugamba nti: “Ye nze! Era muliraba Omwana w'Omuntu ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'Obuyinza era ng'ajjira ku bire eby'oku ggulu.” 
Mark14:63 Awo kabona omukulu n'ayuza ekkanzu ye n'agamba nti: “Tukyetaagira ki abajulizi? 
Mark14:64 Anti mwewuliridde ekivumo kye. Mmwe mukiraba mutya?” Bonna ne bamusalira omusango nti asaanidde kufa. 
Mark14:65 Abamu ne basooka okumufujjira amalusu, ne bamubikka mu maaso, ne bamukuba, ne bagamba nti: “Lagula!” N'abaweereza ne bamukuba empi." 
Mark14:66 Petero bwe yali wansi mu luggya, omuzaana wa kabona omukulu n'ajja;" 
Mark14:67 bwe yalaba Petero ng'ayota, n'amutunuulira, n'agamba nti: “Naawe wali ne Yezu ow'e Nazareti.”" 
Mark14:68 Ye ne yeegaana, n'agamba nti: “Simanyi, n'okutegeera sitegeera ky'ogamba.” N'afuluma, n'agenda mu luggya olw'omu maaso. Awo enkoko n'ekookolima." 
Mark14:69 Naye omuzaana bwe yamulaba, n'addamu n'agamba abaali bayimiridde awo nti: “Ono, omu ku bo.”" 
Mark14:70 Ne yeegaana nate. Ate nga wayiseewo akabanga, abaali bayimiridde awo ne bagamba Petero nti: “Kya mazima oli omu ku bo, kubanga oli Mugalilaaya.”" 
Mark14:71 Naye ye n'asooka okuvumirira n'okulayira nti: “Omuntu oyo gwe mwogerako simumanyi.” 
Mark14:72 Amangu ago enkoko n'ekookolima ogwokubiri. Awo Petero n'ajjukira ekigambo Yezu kye yali amugambye nti: “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima mirundi ebiri, onooba onneegaanye emirundi esatu.” N'atulika n'akaaba." 
Mark15:1 Amangu ago obudde nga bwakakya, bakabona abakulu, abakadde, abawandiisi n'olukiiko lwonna ne bateesa, ne basiba Yezu, ne bamutwala, ne bamukwasa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Awo Pilato n'amubuuza nti: “Ggwe kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” N'addamu nti: “Oyogedde.” 
Mark15:3 Awo bakabona abakulu ne bamuwawaabira ebintu bingi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato n'amubuuza ogwokubiri nti: “Toliiko ky'oddamu? Laba bye bakulumiriza nga bwe biri ebingi!” 
Mark15:5 Naye Yezu era teyamwanukula kigambo; Pilato ne yeewuunya. 
Mark15:6 Naye ku mbaga enkulu yabateeranga omu ku basibe gwe baasabanga. 
Mark15:7 Waaliwo omu eyali ayitibwa Barabba, ng'asibiddwa mu kkomera wamu n'abajeemu abaali batemudde abantu mu kasambattuko." 
Mark15:8 Ekibiina bwe kyamala okwambuka, ne basaba abakolere nga bw'abakolera bulijjo." 
Mark15:9 Awo Pilato n'addamu n'abagamba nti: “Kale, mwagala mbateere kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
Mark15:10 Kubanga yali amanyi nga bakabona abakulu baali bamuleesezza buggya. 
Mark15:11 Naye bakabona abakulu ne bavujjuula ekibiina waakiri abateere Barabba. 
Mark15:12 Pilato n'addamu okubagamba nti: “Kale, ono gwe muyita kabaka w'Abayudaaya mmukole ntya?”" 
Mark15:13 Bo ne bayoogaana buggya nti: “Mukomerere ku musaalaba.” 
Mark15:14 Pilato n'agamba nti: “Ddala yakola kibi ki?” Bo ne beeyongera okukaalaama nti: “Mukomerere ku musaalaba.” 
Mark15:15 Awo Pilato olw'okwagala okusanyusa ekibiina, n'abateera Barabba. Yezu n'amukuba enkoba, n'amuwaayo akomererwe ku musaalaba." 
Mark15:16 Awo abaserikale ne bamutwala mu lubiri munda, ye Purayitoriyo, ne bakuŋŋaanyizaayo ekibinja ky'abaserikale kyonna," 
Mark15:17 ne bamwambaza omunagiro ogwa kakobe, ne bazinga omuge ogw'amaggwa, ne bagumussaako;" 
Mark15:18 ne batandika okumulamusa nti: “Mirembe, kabaka w'Abayudaaya.”" 
Mark15:19 Ne bamukuba mu mutwe n'olumuli, ne bamufujjira amalusu, ne bamufukaamirira ne bamusinza." 
Mark15:20 Bwe baamala okumuduulira, ne bamwambulamu omunagiro ogwa kakobe, ne bamwambaza engoye ze, ne bamufulumya bamutwale okumukomerera ku musaalaba." 
Mark15:21 Ne bawaliriza omusajja omuyise, Simoni ow'e Kureni, eyali ava mu kyalo, ye kitaawe wa Alekisanduro ne Rufo, ne bamuwaliriza okwetikka omusaalaba gwe." 
Mark15:22 Ne bamuleeta mu kifo ekiyitibwa Golugota, ekitegeeza 'ekifo ky'akawanga'." 
Mark15:23 Ne bamuwa evviini okunywa ng'etabuddwamu mirra; naye n'atanywa. 
Mark15:24 Ne bamukomerera ku musaalaba, ne bagabanyaamu ebyambalo bye nga babikubako akalulu balabe buli omu ky'anaatwala." 
Mark15:25 Essaawa yali ya kusatu we baamukomererera ku musaalaba; 
Mark15:26 n'ekiwandiiko ky'omusango gwe ne kiwandiikibwa nti: KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA. 
Mark15:27 Ne bamukomerera n'abanyazi babiri omu ku ddyo, omulala ku kkono." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Abayise ne bamusekerera, ne bamunyeenyeza omutwe nga bagamba nti: “Ha, ggwe amenya Ekiggwa kya Katonda n'okizimba mu nnaku ssatu?" 
Mark15:30 Weewonye! kka ove ku musaalaba.” 
Mark15:31 Ne bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi nabo ne bamuduulira nga bagamba nti: “Yawonyanga balala; ye tayinza kwewonya. 
Mark15:32 Kristu Kabaka wa Yisirayeli, akke ave ku musaalaba tulyoke tumukkirize.” N'abanyazi abaali bakomereddwa naye, ne bamuvuma." 
Mark15:33 Essaawa bwe zaawera mukaaga, enzikiza n'ebikka ensi yonna okutuusa ku ssaawa eyoomwenda." 
Mark15:34 Ku ssaawa eyoomwenda, Yezu n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabakitani?” ekitegeeza nti: “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde?”" 
Mark15:35 Abamu ku baali bayimiridde awo bwe baawulira, ne bagamba nti: “Wulira ayita Eliya.”" 
Mark15:36 Awo omu n'adduka, n'annyika ekyangwe mu nkaatu, n'akitunga ku lumuli, n'amuwa anywe, nga bw'agamba nti: “Muleke, ka tulabe oba Eliya anajja okumuwanulayo.”" 
Mark15:37 Naye Yezu n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ddene, n'assa omukka omuvannyuma." 
Mark15:38 Awo olutimbe lw'omu Kiggwa ne luyulikamu wabiri, okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi." 
Mark15:39 Senturiyo eyali ayimiridde awo mu maaso bwe yalaba bw'akoowodde atyo ng'assa omukka omuvannyuma, n'agamba nti: “Omuntu ono mazima abadde Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Mark15:40 Era waaliwo n'abakazi abaali balengera nga bayima walako; mu bo mwalimu Mariya ow'e Magudalena ne Mariya nnyina Yakobo omuto ne Yoze, ne Salome," 
Mark15:41 abaayitanga naye ng'akyali mu Galilaaya, nga bamuweereza. Waaliwo n'abakazi abalala bangi abaali bambuse naye e Yeruzaalemu." 
Mark15:42 Bwe bwawungeera, ate olunaku olwo nga lwe lw'Okuteekateeka, kwe kugamba, olunaku olukulembera Sabbaato," 
Mark15:43 ne wajjawo Yozefu ow'e Arimateya, omukiise mu Lukiiko assibwamu ekitiibwa, era naye yali alindirira obwakabaka bwa Katonda, n'aguma, n'agenda eri Pilato, n'asaba omubiri gwa Yezu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato ne yeewuunya okulaba nga yafudde dda; n'ayita Senturiyo n'amubuuza obanga yafudde dda. 
Mark15:45 Senturiyo bwe yamala okukakasa, omulambo n'aguwa Yozefu." 
Mark15:46 Yozefu n'agula essuuka, n'amuwanulayo, n'amuzinga mu ssuuka, n'amuteeka mu ntaana eyali ensime mu lwazi, n'ayiringisiza ejjinja ku mulyango gw'entaana." 
Mark15:47 Mariya Magudalena ne Mariya owa Yoze baalaba we yali ateekeddwa. 
Mark16:1 Sabbaato ng'emaze okuyita, Mariya ow'e Magudala ne Mariya owa Yakobo ne Salome ne bagula ebyakaloosa bagende bamuzirage." 
Mark16:2 Mu matulutulu, ku lusooka mu wiiki, ne batuuka ku ntaana, enjuba ng'evuddeyo." 
Mark16:3 Baali bagambagana nti: “Ani anaatuyiringisizaawo ejjinja ku mulyango gw'entaana?” 
Mark16:4 Bwe baatunula, ne balaba ng'ejjinja lyayiringisiddwawo; kubanga lyali ddene nnyo." 
Mark16:5 Ne bayingira mu ntaana, ne balaba omuvubuka ng'atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo, ng'ayambadde ekkanzu enjeru. Ne bawuniikirira." 
Mark16:6 Ye n'abagamba nti: Muleke kusamaalirira nnyo; munoonya Yezu ow'e Nazareti eyakomererwa ku musaalaba, azuukidde, muno taliimu; mulabe ekifo mwe yabadde ateekeddwa." 
Mark16:7 Kale mugende, mubuulire abayigirizwa be ne Petero nti: “Abeesooseeyo mu Galilaaya; eyo gye mulimulabira, nga bwe yabagamba.”" 
Mark16:8 Ne bafuluma, ne badduka mu ntaana; kubanga baali bakankana nga bawuniikiridde; ne batabuulira n'omu kintu; kubanga baali batidde." 
Mark16:9 Bwe yazuukira ku makya ku olwo olusooka mu wiiki, yasooka kulabikira Mariya ow'e Magudala gwe yali agobyemu emyoyo emibi omusanvu." 
Mark16:10 Ye n'agenda n'abuulira abaabeeranga naye, abaali mu kunyolwa ne mu kukaaba." 
Mark16:11 Naye bo bwe baawulira nti mulamu n'okumulaba amulabyeko, ne batakikkiriza." 
Mark16:12 Oluvannyuma, n'alabikira mu nfaanana endala bannaabwe babiri abaali batambula nga bagenda mu kyalo." 
Mark16:13 Era n'abo ne bagenda babuulira abalala, naye ne batabakkiriza." 
Mark16:14 Oluvannyuma, n'alabikira bennyini ekkumi n'omu nga batudde balya. N'abavunaana obutakkiriza bwabwe n'obukakanyavu bw'emitima, kubanga baali bagaanyi okukkiriza bali abaali bamulabye ng'azuukidde." 
Mark16:15 Era n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mu nsi yonna, mulangirire Evangili eri buli kitonde." 
Mark16:16 Alikkiriza n'abatizibwa alirokoka; aligaana okukkiriza alisalirwa omusango okumusinga. 
Mark16:17 Abalikkiriza obubonero buno bulibagenderako: mu linnya lyange baligoba emyoyo emibi, balyogera ennimi engwira;" 
Mark16:18 balikwata emisota, ne bwe balinywa obutwa, tebulibakola kabi, balissa emikono ku balwadde ne bawona.”" 
Mark16:19 Omukama Yezu bwe yamala okwogera nabo, n'alinnyisibwa mu ggulu, n'atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Mark16:20 Bo ne bagenda ne bayigiriza buli wantu, Omukama ng'akolera wamu nabo, ebigambo byabwe ng'abikakasa n'obubonero obwabigenderangako." 
Luke1:1 Nga bangi bwe bagezezzaako okuwandiika ekyafaayo ky'ebyo byonna ebyagwawo ebyatuukirizibwa mu ffe," 
Luke1:2 nga bwe byatuweebwa abo okuva mu masooka abaabirabirako ddala era abaali abaweereza b'ekigambo," 
Luke1:3 nange nno, ayi Omutiibwa Tewofilo, oluvannyuma lw'okwekenneenya obulungi ebintu byonna nga nviira ddala ku ntandikwa, njagadde mbikuwandiikire nga mbisengese," 
Luke1:4 olyoke onnyonnyoke bulungi obutuufu obuli mu bigambo bye wasomesebwa. 
Luke1:5 Mu mirembe gya Erode kabaka w'e Buyudaaya, waaliwo kabona erinnya lye Zakariya, ow'omu kisanja kya Abiya, mukazi we erinnya lye nga ye Elizabeti, nga wa mu bawala ba Aroni." 
Luke1:6 Bombi baali batuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda, nga tebaliiko kibavunaanibwa, nga batambulira mu biragiro by'Omukama byonna ne mu mateeka ge." 
Luke1:7 Baali tebalina mwana, kubanga Elizabeti yali mugumba, ate bombi nga bayise mu myaka." 
Luke1:8 Olumu Zakariya bwe yali ng'akola omulimu gw'obwakabona mu maaso ga Katonda, mu kisanja kye," 
Luke1:9 ng'empisa ey'obwakabona bwe yali, akalulu ne kagwa ku ye, n'ayingira mu Kiggwa ky'Omukama okunyookeza obubaani." 
Luke1:10 Mu budde obw'okunyookeza obubaani, ekibiina ky'abantu kyali bweru, ng'abantu beegayirira." 
Luke1:11 Awo malayika w'Omukama n'amulabikira; yali ayimiridde ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'omwaliiro gw'obubaani. 
Luke1:12 Zakariya bwe yamulaba n'asoberwa, ensisi n'emukwata." 
Luke1:13 Malayika n'amugamba nti: “Zakariya, leka kutya, kubanga essaala zo ziwuliddwa, ne Elizabeti mukazi wo ajja kukuzaalira omwana ow'obulenzi n'omutuuma erinnya lye Yowanna." 
Luke1:14 Olisanyuka n'ojaguza, era bangi balisanyuka olw'okuzaalibwa kwe." 
Luke1:15 Kubanga aliba mukulu mu maaso g'Omukama; talinywa vviini, newandibadde buli ekitamiiza kyonna, era alijjuzibwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ng'akyali na mu lubuto lwa nnyina." 
Luke1:16 Alizza bangi mu baana ba Yisirayeli eri Omukama Katonda waabwe; 
Luke1:17 era y'alimukulemberamu mu mwoyo ne mu maanyi ebya Eliya, emitima gya bakitaabwe alyoke agizze ku baana baabwe, n'abatawulira abazze mu magezi g'abatuukirivu, bw'atyo Omukama amussizeewo abantu abeetegefu.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakariya n'agamba malayika nti: “Ekyo nnaakitegeerera ku ki? Anti ndi mukadde, ne mukazi wange ayise mu myaka.”" 
Luke1:19 Malayika n'ayanukula nti: “Nze Gaburyeli, ayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda; nsindikiddwa njogere naawe, nkubuulire amawulire amalungi ago." 
Luke1:20 Kale nno ojja kusirika nga tosobola kwogera, okutuusa ku lunaku ebyo lwe birituukirira, kubanga tokkirizza bigambo byange ebirituukirira mu budde bwabyo.”" 
Luke1:21 Bo abantu baali balindirira Zakariya nga beewuunya nga bw'aludde mu Kiggwa. 
Luke1:22 Bwe yafuluma, n'alemwa okwogera gye bali; ne bategeera nga waliwo ekimulabikidde mu Kiggwa; n'aye yennyini yagezaako okukibategeeza mu bubonero, n'asigala atyo nga kasiru." 
Luke1:23 Ennaku ez'omulimu bwe zaggwaako, n'addayo ewaabwe." 
Luke1:24 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo Elizabeti mukazi we, n'abeera olubuto; ne yeekisiza emyezi etaano ng'agamba nti:" 
Luke1:25 “Omukama bw'ankoze ati mu nnaku ze yantekerako eriiso okunzigyako okuswala kwe mbadde nakwo mu bantu.” 
Luke1:26 Mu mwezi ogwomukaaga, malayika Gaburyeli Katonda n'amutuma mu kibuga ky'e Galilaaya, erinnya lyakyo Nazareti," 
Luke1:27 ew'omuwala embeerera eyali ayogerezeddwa omusajja ow'omu kika kya Dawudi, erinnya lye Yozefu, ate erinnya ly'omuwala embeerera nga ye Mariya." 
Luke1:28 Malayika bwe yayingira gy'ali, n'amugamba nti: “Mirembe, ggwe eyagirirwa ekisa, Omukama ali naawe.”" 
Luke1:29 Bwe yawulira, n'asoberwa nnyo olw'ebigambo ebyo, n'alowooza ennamusa eyo bw'ebadde." 
Luke1:30 Malayika n'amugamba nti: “Mariya, leka kutya, kubanga osanze ekisa ewa Katonda." 
Luke1:31 Laba, onoofuna olubuto n'ozaala omwana wa bulenzi, n'omutuuma erinnya lye Yezu." 
Luke1:32 Aliba wa kitiibwa era aliyitibwa Mwana w'Oli Ali Waggulu Ddala; n'Omukama Katonda alimuwa entebe ya Dawudi jjajjaawe," 
Luke1:33 n'ennyumba ya Yakobo aligifuga emirembe gyonna, n'obwakabaka bwe si bwa kuggwaawo.”" 
Luke1:34 Awo Mariya n'agamba malayika nti: “Kinaaba kitya ekyo, anti simanyi musajja?”" 
Luke1:35 Malayika n'amuddamu nti: “Mwoyo Mutuukirivu anajja ku ggwe, n'amaanyi g'Oli Ali Waggulu Ddala ganaakubikkirira. Omwana alizaalibwa kyaliva ayitibwa omutukuvu, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Luke1:36 Kale laba, Elizabeti muganda wo ali lubuto lwa mwana mulenzi, sso nga mukadde; era guno gwe mwezi ogwomukaaga ogw'oyo gwe baayitanga omugumba," 
Luke1:37 Kubanga tewali kintu kitayinzika eri Katonda.” 
Luke1:38 Awo Mariya n'agamba nti: “Nzuuno Omuzaana w'Omukama, kinkolebwe nga bw'ogambye.” Awo malayika n'ava w'ali." 
Luke1:39 Mu nnaku ezo, Mariya n'asituka n'agenda bunnambiro mu nsi ey'ensozi, mu kibuga ky'omu Buyudaaya;" 
Luke1:40 n'ayingira mu nnyumba ya Zakariya n'alamusa Elizabeti. 
Luke1:41 Elizabeti olwawulira ng'amulamusa, omwana n'asambagala mu lubuto lwe; Elizabeti n'ajjula Mwoyo mutuukirivu," 
Luke1:42 n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Oli wa mukisa mu bakazi, n'omwana w'olubuto lwo wa mukisa." 
Luke1:43 Kale kinvudde ku ki nnyina mukama wange okujja gye ndi? 
Luke1:44 Kubanga oluwulidde eddoboozi lyo ng'onnamusa, omwana n'asambagala mu lubuto lwange olw'essanyu." 
Luke1:45 Wamma wa mukisa oyo eyakkiririzaawo nti ebyamugambibwa okuva ew'Omukama birituukirira.” 
Luke1:46 Mariya n'agamba nti: “Emmeeme yange egulumiza Omukama," 
Luke1:47 n'omwoyo gwange gujaguliza mu Katonda mulokozi wange. 
Luke1:48 Kubanga yatunuulira obutene bw'omuzaana we. Laba, n'okuva kati amazadde gonna ganampitanga wa mukisa." 
Luke1:49 Kubanga Omuyinza yankolera ebinene, n'erinnya lye ttukuvu." 
Luke1:50 Ekisa kye kiri ku bamutya mu mazadde n'amazadde. 
Luke1:51 Akoze eby'amaanyi n'omukono gwe; abaali beekuza mu mitima gyabwe yabasaasaanya. 
Luke1:52 Ab'obuyinza yabaggya ku ntebe zaabwe, n'agulumiza abatene." 
Luke1:53 Abayala yabajjuza ebirungi, abagagga n'abagobera eri ngalo nsa." 
Luke1:54 Yalyowa Yisirayeli omuweereza we, ng'ajjukira ekisa kye," 
Luke1:55 nga bwe yagamba bajjajjaffe okukigirira Yiburayimu n'ezzadde lye emirembe gyonna.” 
Luke1:56 Mariya n'amala emyezi ng'esatu ng'ali ne Elizabeti, oluvannyuma naddayo ewaabwe." 
Luke1:57 Ennaku za Elizabeti ez'okuzaala ne zituuka, n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi." 
Luke1:58 Baliraanwa be n'ab'ekika kye ne bawulira ng'Omukama amugiridde ekisa, ne bamusanyukirako." 
Luke1:59 Olunaku olwomunaana ne bajja okutayirira omwana. Baali ba kumuyita erinnya lya kitaawe Zakariya," 
Luke1:60 naye nnyina n'agamba nti: “Nedda, ajja kuyitibwa Yowanna.”" 
Luke1:61 Ne bamugamba nti: “Nga mu kika kyo temuli ayitibwa linnya eryo?” 
Luke1:62 Ne bakolera kitaawe obubonero nga bamubuuza bw'ayagala bamuyite. 
Luke1:63 Ye n'asaba ekipande, n'awandiika nti: “Erinnya lye ye Yowanna.” Bonna ne beewuunya." 
Luke1:64 Amangu ago akamwa ke ne kazibuka, n'olulimi lwe ne lusumulukuka, n'ayogera ng'agulumiza Katonda." 
Luke1:65 Baliraanwa baabwe ne bajjula okutya; ebigambo ebyo byonna ne byogerwako mu nsozi zonna ez'omu Buyudaaya. 
Luke1:66 Bonna abaabiwulira, ne babirowoozalowooza mu mitima gyabwe nga bagamba nti: “Omwana ono aliba atya?” kubanga omukono gwa Katonda gwamuliko." 
Luke1:67 Ne Zakariya kitaawe, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'amujjula, n'alanga, n'agamba nti:" 
Luke1:68 “Omukama Katonda wa Yisirayeli atenderezebwe; kubanga alambudde abantu be n'abanunula. 
Luke1:69 Atusitulidde Omulokozi ow'obuyinza, mu nnyumba ya Dawudi omuweereza we," 
Luke1:70 nga bwe yayogera mu kamwa k'abatuukirivu be, abalanzi be okuva mu mirembe egy'edda," 
Luke1:71 nti tujja kuwonyezebwa abalabe baffe ne mu mikono gya bonna abatukyawa," 
Luke1:72 agirire ekisa bajjajjaffe, ajjukire n'endagaano ye entukuvu;" 
Luke1:73 okulayira kwe yalayiriramu Yiburayimu jjajjaffe," 
Luke1:74 ng'ajja kutuwa, nga tumaze okuwonyezebwa mu mikono gy'abalabe baffe, tumuweereze awatali kutya," 
Luke1:75 mu butuukirivu ne mu butuufu mu maaso ge ennaku zaffe zonna. 
Luke1:76 Naawe omwana oliyitibwa mulanzi w'Oli Ali Waggulu Ddala, kubanga olikulemberamu Omukama okumutegekera amakubo ge;" 
Luke1:77 n'abantu be obamanyise obulokofu, basonyiyibwe ebibi byabwe," 
Luke1:78 olw'okusaasira okunene okwa Katonda waffe, enjuba lw'erivaayo waggulu eyo n'ejja etulambula," 
Luke1:79 emulise abatudde mu nzikiza ne mu kisiikirize eky'olumbe, erambike ebigere byaffe mu kkubo ery'eddembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana n'agenda ng'asuumuka, nga yeeyongera amaanyi mu mwoyo, n'abeeranga mu ddungu okutuusa olunaku lwe yeeyoleka Yisirayeli." 
Luke2:1 Awo mu nnaku ezo ekiragiro ne kiva ewa Kayisari Agusto, okuwandiisa abantu ab'ensi yonna." 
Luke2:2 Kuno kwe kwali okuwandiisa okubereberye, Kwiriniyo bwe yali nga ye wessaza lya Siriya." 
Luke2:3 Bonna ne bagenda okwewandiisa buli muntu mu kibuga kyaboobwe. 
Luke2:4 Ne Yozefu n'ava e Galilaaya, mu kibuga ky'e Nazareti, n'ayambuka mu Buyudaaya, mu kibuga kya Dawudi kye bayita Beteleemu, kubanga yali wa mu nnyumba ya Dawudi na wa mu lunyiriri lwe;" 
Luke2:5 alyoke awandiikibwe wamu ne Mariya gwe yali ayogerezza eyali olubuto. 
Luke2:6 Bwe baali bali eyo, ennaku ez'okuzaala kwe ne zituuka." 
Luke2:7 N'azaala omwana we omuggulanda wa bulenzi, n'amuzingazinga mu bugoye, n'amuzazika mu mmanvu; kubanga baali tebafunye kifo mu nnyumba y'abatambuze." 
Luke2:8 Mu kitundu ekyo mwalimu abasumba nga bali eyo ku ttale, nga bakuuma eggana lyabwe ekiro." 
Luke2:9 Awo malayika w'Omukama n'abalabikira; ekitangaala kya Katonda ne kibabuna, ne bajjula okutya." 
Luke2:10 Malayika n'abagamba nti: “Muleke kutya, kubanga anti mbaleetera amawulire amalungi ag'essanyu eringi erinaakwata abantu bonna;" 
Luke2:11 Kubanga olwa leero, Omulokozi, ye Kristu Omukama, abazaaliddwa mu kibuga kya Dawudi." 
Luke2:12 Kano ke kanaaba akabonero gye muli: munaasanga omwana omuwere, azingiddwazingiddwa mu bugoye, ng'azazikiddwa mu mmanvu.”" 
Luke2:13 Amangu ago awaali malayika oyo ne wajjawo ekibiina kinene eky'eggye ery'omu ggulu, nga batendereza Katonda, nga bagamba nti:" 
Luke2:14 “Ekitiibwa kibeere eri Katonda waggulu ddala eyo, n'emirembe gibeere ku nsi mu bantu ab'omwoyo omulungi.”" 
Luke2:15 Bamalayika bwe baamala okubaawukanako ne baddayo mu ggulu, abasumba ne bagambagana nti: “Tugende e Beteleemu, tulabe ekigambo ekyo ekifuddeyo Omukama ky'atumanyisizzaako.”" 
Luke2:16 Ne bagendayo bunnambiro, ne basanga Mariya ne Yozefu n'Omwana omuwere azazikiddwa mu mmanvu." 
Luke2:17 Bwe baalaba, ne bategeeza ekigambo kye baali babuuliddwa ku mwana oyo." 
Luke2:18 Na bonna abaawulira ne beewuunya ebigambo abasumba bye baabanyumizanga. 
Luke2:19 Mariya ye ebigambo ebyo byonna yabitereka, ng'abirowoozalowooza mu mutima gwe." 
Luke2:20 Abasumba ne baddayo nga bagulumiza n'okutendereza Katonda olw'ebyo byonna bye baali balabye ne bye baali bawulidde nga bwe byali bibagambiddwa. 
Luke2:21 Oluvannyuma lw'ennaku omunaana, bwe yatayirirwa, n'ayitibwa erinnya Yezu, malayika lye yamuwa nga tannaba kugwa mu lubuto." 
Luke2:22 Ennaku ez'okutukuzibwa kwabwe bwe zaatuuka, nga bwe kiri mu tteeka lya Musa, ne bamutwala e Yeruzaalemu okumusingira Omukama," 
Luke2:23 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu tteeka ly'Omukama nti: “Buli kiggulanda ekisajja kinaayitibwanga kitukuvu eri Omukama,”" 
Luke2:24 n'okuwaayo ekitambiro, nga bwe kiri mu tteeka ly'Omukama: amayiba abiri oba obuyiibwa bubiri." 
Luke2:25 Mu Yeruzaalemu mwalimu omusajja erinnya lye Simewoni, omuntu oyo nga mutuukirivu era nga musomi; yali alindirira okukubagizibwa kwa Yisirayeli, ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yabanga naye." 
Luke2:26 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yali amubikkuliddeko nti yali tagenda kufa nga talabye ku Musiige wa Mukama. 
Luke2:27 N'ajja mu Kiggwa ng'afuuyiriddwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. Abazadde bwe baali bayingiza omwana mu Kiggwa, balyoke bamukole ng'empisa ey'etteeka bwe yali," 
Luke2:28 n'amukwata mu mikono gye, n'agulumiza Katonda, n'agamba nti:" 
Luke2:29 “Kati leka omuweereza wo, ayi Mukama, agende mirembe, nga bwe wayogera;" 
Luke2:30 kubanga amaaso gange galabye obulokozi bwo," 
Luke2:31 bwe wategekera mu maaso g'amawanga gonna; 
Luke2:32 ekitangaala eky'okumulisa amawanga, n'ekitiibwa ky'abantu bo Abayisirayeli.”" 
Luke2:33 Kitaawe ne nnyina ne beewuunya ebigambo ebimwogeddwako. 
Luke2:34 Simewoni n'abaagaliza omukisa; ate n'agamba Mariya nnyina nti: “Ono ateekeddwawo ku lw'okuzikirira ne ku lw'okuzuukira kw'abangi mu Yisirayeli; era aliba akabonero ke banaawakanyanga; 
Luke2:35 naawe ekitala kirisoya omutima gwo, ebirowoozo by'emitima gy'abangi byerulwe.”" 
Luke2:36 Era waaliwo ne Anna omulanzi omukazi, muwala wa Fanuweli, ow'omu kika kya Aseri; yali ayise mu myaka. Yamala ne bba emyaka musanvu okuva ku bubeererevu bwe," 
Luke2:37 n'aba nnamwandu okutuusa ku myaka kinaana mu ena. Teyavanga mu Kiggwa, ng'asiiba, yeegayirira n'okuweereza emisana n'ekiro." 
Luke2:38 Naye n'atuukira ddala mu kaseera ako kennyini, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'ayogera ku mwana oyo eri abantu bonna abaali basuubira okununulibwa kwa Yeruzaalemu." 
Luke2:39 Bwe baamala okutuukiriza byonna nga bwe biri mu tteeka ly'Omukama, ne baddayo e Galilaaya mu kibuga kyabwe Nazareti." 
Luke2:40 Awo omwana n'agenda ng'asuumuka, ng'akakata, ng'ajjudde amagezi n'ekisa kya Katonda nga kimuliko." 
Luke2:41 Buli mwaka bakadde be baagendanga e Yeruzaalemu ku mbaga enkulu eya Pasika. 
Luke2:42 Bwe yaweza emyaka ekkumi n'ebiri, ne bambuka naye e Yeruzaalemu ng'empisa bwe yali." 
Luke2:43 Embaga enkulu bwe yaggwa, bwe baali baddayo, omwana Yezu n'asigala mu Yeruzaalemu; bakadde be ne batamanya." 
Luke2:44 Baalowoozanga nti bali naye mu kisinde; ne batambula olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba; ne bamumagamaga mu beŋŋanda ne mu bamanyi. 
Luke2:45 Bwe baalaba ababuze, ne baddayo e Yeruzaalemu, nga bamunoonyanoonya." 
Luke2:46 Nga wayiseewo ennaku ssatu, ne bamuggukako mu Kiggwa ng'atudde wakati mu bayigiriza, ng'abawuliriza ate ng'ababuuza ebibuuzo." 
Luke2:47 Bonna abaali bamuwulira bawuniikirira olw'amagezi ge n'okwanukula kwe. 
Luke2:48 Bwe baamulaba, ne bawuniikirira; nnyina n'amugamba nti: “Mwana wange, ekyatukoza otyo kiki? Kale laba kitaawo nange tubadde tukunoonya nga tuli beeraliikirivu.”" 
Luke2:49 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Kira munnoonyeza ki? Mubadde temumanyi nga nteekwa okubeera ku bya Kitange?” 
Luke2:50 Bo ne batategeera kigambo kye yabagamba. 
Luke2:51 N'aserengeta nabo, n'agenda e Nazareti, n'abawuliranga. Nnyina ebigambo ebyo n'abitereka mu mutima gwe." 
Luke2:52 Yezu ne yeeyongeranga amagezi n'okukula era n'okuganja eri Katonda ne mu bantu. 
Luke3:1 Awo mu mwaka ogw'ekkumi n'etaano ogw'obufuzi bwa Tiberiyo Kayisari, Ponsiyo Pilato nga ye wessaza ly'e Buyudaaya, Erode nga ye mufuzi atwala ekitundu ky'e Galilaaya, Filippo muganda we nga ye mufuzi atwala ekitundu ky'e Yitureya ne Turakoniti, Lisaniya nga ye mufuzi atwala ekitundu ky'e Abilene," 
Luke3:2 Anna ne Kayafa we baabeerera bakabona abakulu, ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kijjira Yowanna mutabani wa Zakariya mu ddungu." 
Luke3:3 N'ayitanga mu nsi yonna ekoota Yorudani ng'ayigiriza batismu ey'okubonerera olw'okusonyiyibwa ebibi," 
Luke3:4 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'ebigambo bya Yisaaya omulanzi nti: “Eddoboozi ery'oyo aleekaana mu ddungu nti: ‘Mutegeke ekkubo ly'Omukama, muluŋŋamye obukubo bwe." 
Luke3:5 Buli kawonvu kajjuzibwe, buli lusozi na kasozi biseeteezebwe; amakubo ageenyooleza galuŋŋamizibwe," 
Luke3:6 n'agalimu ebisirikko gatandaazibwe; olwo buli muntu aliraba obulokozi bwa Katonda.’ ” 
Luke3:7 N'agamba ebibiina by'abantu abajjanga gy'ali okubatizibwa nti: “Mmwe abaana b'amasalambwa, ani abalabudde okudduka obusungu obugenda okujja?" 
Luke3:8 Kale nno mulage ebibala ebiva mu kubonerera kwammwe; temutandika kwegamba nti: ‘Tulina kitaffe Yiburayimu,’ kubanga, ka mbabuulire, mu mayinja gano gennyini Katonda ayinza okuggyiramu Yiburayimu abaana." 
Luke3:9 Na kati embazzi eteekeddwa ku kikolo ky'emiti. Buli muti ogutabala bibala birungi gujja kutemebwa gusuulibwe mu muliro.” 
Luke3:10 Ebibiina ne bimubuuza nti: “Awo ffe tukole ki?” 
Luke3:11 Okubaddamu n'abagamba nti: “Alina ekkanzu ebbiri aweeko atalina; alina emmere naye akole bw'atyo.” 
Luke3:12 Abasolooza b'omusolo nabo ne bajja okubatizibwa; ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza ffe tukole ki?” 
Luke3:13 N'abagamba nti: “Temusukkirizanga ku ebyo ebyabalagirwa.” 
Luke3:14 N'abaserikale nabo ne bamubuuza, ne bagamba nti: “Naffe tukole ki?” Ye n'abagamba nti: “Temulyazaamaanya muntu n'omu era temuwaayiriza; mubeere bamativu n'empeera yammwe.”" 
Luke3:15 Eggwanga lyali lirindirira na bonna nga beebuuza muli munda ku Yowanna nti: “Teyandiba Kristu?” 
Luke3:16 Yowanna n'ayanukula bonna n'abagamba nti: “Weewaawo nze mbatiza na mazzi, naye wajja kujjayo ansinga amaanyi; gwe sisaanira na kusumulula lukoba lwa ngatto ze; oyo alibabatiza ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'omuliro." 
Luke3:17 Olugali lwe lumuli mu ngalo okulongoosa egguuliro lye, eŋŋano ye agikuŋŋaanyize mu byagi bye, ebisusunku ajja kubyokya n'omuliro ogutayinza kuzikira.”" 
Luke3:18 N'abuuliranga bw'atyo abantu amawulire amalungi n'abakubiriza n'ebirala bingi. 
Luke3:19 Naye Erode omufuzi atwala ekitundu, oluvannyuma lw'okugambwako Yowanna olwa Erodiya muka muganda we, n'olw'ebibi byonna Erode bye yali akoze," 
Luke3:20 ku ebyo byonna yayongerako na kino, yaggalira Yowanna mu kkomera." 
Luke3:21 Awo abantu bonna bwe baamala okubatizibwa, Yezu naye ng'abatiziddwa, nga yeegayirira, eggulu ne libikkuka," 
Luke3:22 Mwoyo Mutuukirivu n'akka ku ye mu kifaananyi ekirabika, ng'ali ng'enjiibwa. Eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu nti: “Ggwe mwana wange omwagalwa, nkwesiimiramu.”" 
Luke3:23 Yezu bwe yatandika okuyigiriza yali nga wa myaka asatu egy'obukulu, nga mutabani wa Yozefu (nga bwe baalowoozanga), mutabani wa Eli," 
Luke3:24 mutabani wa Mattati, mutabani wa Leevi, mutabani wa Meluki, mutabani wa Yannayi, mutabani wa Yozefu," 
Luke3:25 mutabani wa Mattatiya, mutabani wa Amosi, mutabani wa Nakumu, mutabani wa Esuli, mutabani wa Naggayi," 
Luke3:26 mutabani wa Maati, mutabani wa Mattatiya, mutabani wa Semeyini, mutabani wa Yoseki, mutabani wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 mutabani wa Yokanani, mutabani wa Resa, mutabani wa Zerubabbeli, mutabani wa Seyalutyeli, mutabani wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 mutabani wa Meluki, mutabani wa Addi, mutabani wa Kosamu, mutabani wa Elumadamu, mutabani wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 mutabani wa Yoswa, mutabani wa Eliyezeri, mutabani wa Yorimu, mutabani wa Mattati, mutabani wa Leevi," 
Luke3:30 mutabani wa Simewoni, mutabani wa Yuda, mutabani wa Yozefu, mutabani wa Yonamu, mutabani wa Eliyakimu," 
Luke3:31 mutabani wa Meleya, mutabani wa Menna, mutabani wa Mattata, mutabani wa Natani, mutabani wa Dawudi," 
Luke3:32 mutabani wa Yesse, mutabani wa Obedi, mutabani wa Bowazi, mutabani wa Sala, mutabani wa Nakusoni," 
Luke3:33 mutabani wa Amminadabu, mutabani wa Adumini, mutabani wa Aruni, mutabani wa Kezuroni, mutabani wa Perezi, mutabani wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 mutabani wa Yakobo, mutabani wa Yizaake, mutabani wa Yiburayimu, mutabani wa Tera, mutabani wa Nakori," 
Luke3:35 mutabani wa Serugi, mutabani wa Ragawu, mutabani wa Pelegi, mutabani wa Eberi, mutabani wa Sala," 
Luke3:36 mutabani wa Kayinamu, mutabani wa Arupakusadi, mutabani wa Semu, mutabani wa Nowa, mutabani wa Lameki," 
Luke3:37 mutabani wa Metusela, mutabani wa Enoki, mutabani wa Yaredi, mutabani wa Maalaleeli, mutabani wa Kayinamu," 
Luke3:38 mutabani wa Enosi, mutabani wa Seti, mutabani wa Adamu, mutabani wa Katonda." 
Luke4:1 Yezu ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'adda okuva ku Yorudani, n'atwalibwa Mwoyo mu ddungu" 
Luke4:2 ennaku amakumi ana, n'akemebwa Sitaani. Mu nnaku ezo teyaliiko k'alya; bwe zaggwaako, enjala n'emuluma." 
Luke4:3 Sitaani n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, gamba ejjinja lino lifuuke omugaati.”" 
Luke4:4 Yezu n'amwanukula nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Omuntu taabenga mulamu lwa mugaati gwokka.’ ” 
Luke4:5 Sitaani n'amutwala waggulu, n'amwoleka amawanga gonna ag'ensi mu kabanga bubanga." 
Luke4:6 Sitaani n'amugamba nti: “Obuyinza bwonna n'ekitiibwa kyago nnaabikuwa, kubanga byampeebwa, gwe njagala gwe mbiwa." 
Luke4:7 Kale nno ggwe omala onsinza, ebyo byonna binaaba bibyo.”" 
Luke4:8 Yezu n'ayanukula nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: “ ‘Osinzanga Omukama Katonda wo, era yekka gw'oweerezanga.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Era n'amutwala e Yeruzaalemu, n'amussa ku kitikkiro ky'Ekiggwa, n'amugamba nti: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, weesuule wansi okuva wano; kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti:" 
Luke4:10 “ ‘Aliragira bamalayika be ku ggwe bakukuume;’ 
Luke4:11 Era nti: “ ‘Balikutwalira mu mikono gyabwe, oleme kukoona kigere kyo ku jjinja.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Yezu n'ayanukula n'amugamba nti: “Baagamba nti: ‘Tokemanga Mukama Katonda wo.’ ” 
Luke4:13 Sitaani ng'amaze okumukema mu buli ngeri, n'amusegulira okutuusa ku kadde." 
Luke4:14 Awo Yezu n'addayo mu Galilaaya ng'ajjudde amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. Amawulire ku ye ne gabuna wonna mu nsi eyeetoolodde awo. 
Luke4:15 N'ayigiriza mu sinaagooga zaabwe, bonna nga bamutendereza." 
Luke4:16 Awo n'ajja e Nazareti, gye yakulira; ku lunaku lwa Sabbaato n'ayingira mu sinaagooga nga bwe yali amanyidde, n'asituka okusoma." 
Luke4:17 Ne bamukwasa ekitabo kya Yisaaya omulanzi, n'abikkula ekitabo, n'asanga ekifo awaawandiikibwa bino nti:" 
Luke4:18 “Omwoyo gw'Omukama gundiko, kubanga yansiiga omuzigo, yantuma okubuulira abaavu amawulire amalungi, okulangirira okuteebwa eri abasibe, n'eri bamuzibe nti ba kulaba; n'okuleka abatulugunyizibwa bagende mu ddembe," 
Luke4:19 n'okulangirira omwaka gw'ekisa ky'Omukama.” 
Luke4:20 Bwe yamala okubikakko ekitabo, n'akiddiza omuweereza, n'atuula. Bonna abaali mu sinaagooga ne bamwegeka amaaso." 
Luke4:21 Ye n'atandika okubagamba nti: “Olwa leero ekyawandiikibwa ekyo kye muwulidde mu matu gammwe, kituukiridde.”" 
Luke4:22 Bonna ne bamwogerako bulungi, ne beewuunya ebigambo ebiwoomerevu ebyali biva mu kamwa ke; ne bagamba nti: “Ono si ye mutabani wa Yozefu?”" 
Luke4:23 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mujja kungerera olugero luno nti: ‘Musawo weewonye! Bye twawulira bye wakola e Kafarunawumu, bikole na wano ewaabommwe.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 N'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti tewali mulanzi n'omu akkirizibwa kwa boobwe. 
Luke4:25 Mazima mbagamba nti mu mirembe gya Eliya, bannamwandu baali bangi mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, eggulu lwe lyesibira emyaka esatu n'emyezi omukaaga, enjala n'egwa nnyingi mu nsi eyo yonna;" 
Luke4:26 naye ku bo tewali n'omu Eliya gye yasindikibwa, wabula ew'omukazi nnamwandu ow'e Sareputa ekya Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Era mu mirembe gya Elisa omulanzi abagenge baali bangi mu nsi ya Yisirayeli, sso tewali mu bo yalongoosebwa, wabula Naamani Omusiriya.”" 
Luke4:28 Bonna abaali mu sinaagooga, bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo, ne bajjula obusungu." 
Luke4:29 Ne basituka, ne bamufulumya mu kibuga, ne bamutwala okutuuka ku ntikko y'olusozi ekibuga kyabwe kwe kyazimbibwa, bamusulinke mu lukonko;" 
Luke4:30 naye ye n'abayitamu wakati, n'agenda." 
Luke4:31 Awo n'aserengeta e Kafarunawumu, ekibuga ky'omu Galilaaya, n'abayigiriza ku Sabbaato." 
Luke4:32 Ne bawuniikirira olw'enjigiriza ye, kubanga ekigambo kye kyalina obuyinza." 
Luke4:33 Mu sinaagooga mwalimu omuntu aliko omwoyo omubi omugwagwa, n'aleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene nti:" 
Luke4:34 “Owa! otwagaza ki, ggwe Yezu ow'e Nazareti? Ozze okutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi ggwe ani, Omutuukirivu wa Katonda.”" 
Luke4:35 Naye Yezu n'amukomako, n'agamba nti: “Sirika, ate muveemu.” Awo omwoyo omubi ne gumulindiggula wakati, ne gumuvaamu nga tegumukoze kabi." 
Luke4:36 Bonna ne batya, ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti: “Kigambo ki kino! Kubanga alagira n'obuyinza n'amaanyi emyoyo emigwagwa ne givaamu.”" 
Luke4:37 Amawulire ku ye ne gatuuka mu buli kifo mu nsi eyetooloddewo. 
Luke4:38 Awo Yezu naasituka, n'ava mu sinaagooga, n'ayingira mu nnyumba ya Simoni. Nnyina muka Simoni Petero yali alwadde omusujja mungi; ne bamwegayirira ku lulwe." 
Luke4:39 N'ayimirira w'ali, n'akoma ku musujja, ne gumuta; amangu ago n'agolokoka n'abaweereza." 
Luke4:40 Enjuba bwe yali egwa, bonna abaali balina abalwadde aba buli nkenyera, ne babaleeta w'ali. N'abassaako emikono kinnoomu, n'abawonya." 
Luke4:41 Emyoyo emibi ne giva mu bangi nga gireekaana nti: “Oli Mwana wa Katonda!” Ye n'agikomako, n'atagiganya kwogera; kubanga gyali gimanyi nga ye Kristu." 
Luke4:42 Bwe bwakya enkya, n'afuluma, n'agenda mu kifo ekyesudde; abantu ne bamunoonya ne bamuggukako; ne bamusibaasiba aleme kubavaako." 
Luke4:43 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Ne mu bibuga ebirala nteekwa okuyigirizaayo amawulire amalungi ag'obwakabaka bwa Katonda, anti ekyo kye natumirwa.”" 
Luke4:44 Yayigirizanga mu sinaagooga z'omu Buyudaaya. 
Luke5:1 Ekibiina bwe kyali kirinnimukira gy'ali nga kyagala okuwulira ekigambo kya Katonda, ye yali ayimiridde ku nnyanja y'e Gennesareti," 
Luke5:2 n'alaba amaato abiri nga gali ku nnyanja; abavubi baali bavuddemu nga banaaza obutimba bwabwe. 
Luke5:3 N'asaabala mu lyato erimu, erya Simoni, n'amusaba asembezeeyo katono eryato okuva ku ttale. N'atuula n'ayigiriza ng'ayima mu lyato." 
Luke5:4 Bwe yasirissa enjigiriza ye, n'agamba Simoni nti: “Twala mu buziba, musuule obutimba bwammwe mukwase.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni n'ayanukula n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, twamaze ekiro kyonna nga tutegana, tetwakwasizza kantu. Naye olw'ekigambo kyo, nnaasuula akatimba.”" 
Luke5:6 Bwe baakola ekyo, ne bakwasa ebyennyanja kafukunya, n'akatimba kaabwe nga kajula kuyulika." 
Luke5:7 Ne bawenya ku bannaabwe abaali mu lyato eddala bajje babayambe. Ne bajja, ne bajjuza amaato gombi, ne gajula okusaana." 
Luke5:8 Simoni Petero bwe yalaba ekyo, n'agwa ku maviivi ga Yezu, n'amugamba nti: “Ndeka, ayi Mukama, kubanga nze ndi muntu mwonoonyi.”" 
Luke5:9 Anti yali mu kusamaalirira, ye na bonna abaali naye, ku lw'ebyennyanja bye baali bakwasizza," 
Luke5:10 kye kimu ne Yakobo ne Yowanna batabani ba Zebedaayo abaali banne ba Simoni. Yezu n'agamba Simoni nti: “Leka kutya, n'okuva kati ojjanga kukwasanga bantu.”" 
Luke5:11 Bwe baamala okugolomola amaato gaabwe ku ttale, ne baleka byonna, ne bamugoberera." 
Luke5:12 Bwe yali mu kimu ku bibuga, ne wajjayo omusajja abunye ebigenge; bwe yalaba Yezu, ne yeeyala wansi ku maaso ge, n'amwegayirira nti: “Mukama, bw'oyagala osobola okunnongoosa.”" 
Luke5:13 Ye n'agolola omukono, n'amukwatako, n'agamba nti: “Njagala, longooka.” Amangu ago ebigenge ne bimuta." 
Luke5:14 N'amukomereza obutabuulira muntu; n'amugamba nti: “Genda weeyoleke ewa kabona, oweeyo ekitone olw'okulongoosebwa kwo, nga Musa bwe yalagira, ng'obukakafu gye bali.”" 
Luke5:15 Naye amawulire ku ye ne geeyongera okubuna, n'ebibiina bingi ne byesombera w'ali bawulirize era bawonyezebwe n'endwadde zaabwe." 
Luke5:16 Ye ne yeewungula n'alaga mu ddungu, ne yeegayirira." 
Luke5:17 Awo olumu mu nnaku ezo, yali ayigiriza, Abafarisaayo n'abayigiriza b'amateeka nabo nga batudde awo; baali bavudde mu buli kyalo kyonna eky'e Galilaaya, Buyudaaya, ne mu Yeruzaalemu. Amaanyi g'Omukama gaamuliko okuwonya." 
Luke5:18 Awo ne wajja abasajja nga beetisse ku lunnyo omulwadde akonzibye; ne banoonyereza aw'okumuyingiriza bamuteeke mu maaso ga Yezu. 
Luke5:19 Olw'ekibiina, Ne babulwa we bayita okumuyingiza olw'ekibiina. Awo ne balinnya ku kasolya waggulu, ne bamuyisa mu mategula wamu n'olunnyo ne bamukkiriza mu makkati mu maaso ga Yezu." 
Luke5:20 Bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe, n'agamba nti: “Musajja, ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Luke5:21 Abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo ne batandika okwebuuza nga bagamba nti: “Ani ono ayogera ebivuma Katonda? Ani ayinza okusonyiwa ebibi wabula Katonda yekka?” 
Luke5:22 Yezu bwe yategeera bye beebuuza, n'abagamba nti: “Mwebuuza ki mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Luke5:23 Ekisinga obwangu kiruwa, okugamba nti: ‘Ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa?’ nandiki okugamba nti: ‘Situka otambule?’" 
Luke5:24 Kale mmwe okumanya ng'Omwana w'Omuntu alina obuyinza ku nsi obw'okusonyiwa ebibi,” - awo n'agamba eyali akonzibye nti: “Nkugamba: situka, kwata olunnyo lwo ogende ewammwe.”" 
Luke5:25 Amangu ago n'asituka mu maaso gaabwe, n'akwata kye yali agalamiddeko, n'agenda ewaabwe ng'agulumiza Katonda." 
Luke5:26 Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne batendereza Katonda; ne bajjula okutya, ne bagamba nti: “Olwa leero tulabye ebikuuno.”" 
Luke5:27 Oluvannyuma, n'afuluma; n'alaba omusolooza w'omusolo erinnya lye Leevi ng'atudde mu ggwoolezo, n'amugamba nti: “Ngoberera.”" 
Luke5:28 N'aleka byonna, n'asituka n'amugoberera." 
Luke5:29 Awo Leevi n'amufumbira embaga nnene mu nnyumba ye; waaliwo ekibinja kinene eky'abasolooza b'omusolo n'abalala bwe baali naye ku mbaga nga balya. 
Luke5:30 Abafarisaayo n'abawandiisi baabwe ne beemulugunyiza abayigirizwa be nti: “Lwaki mmwe mulya ne munywa n'abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi?” 
Luke5:31 Yezu n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Abalamu si be beetaaga omusawo, wabula abalwadde." 
Luke5:32 Abatuukirivu si be najja okuyita, wabula aboonoonyi, beenenye.”" 
Luke5:33 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Abayigirizwa ba Yowanna basiiba emirundi mingi era beegayirira, era n'abayigirizwa b'Abafarisaayo bakola kye kimu, sso ng'ababo balya ne banywa.”" 
Luke5:34 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ddala abagenyi ku mbaga y'obugole muyinza okubasiibya ng'awasizza akyali nabo? 
Luke5:35 Ennaku zirituuka, awasizza n'abaggyibwako; olwo nno mu nnaku ezo balisiiba.”" 
Luke5:36 Era n'abaleetera olugero nti: “Tewali muntu ayuza kiwero ku kyambalo kiggya n'akissa ku kyambalo kikadde; bw'akola atyo, ekiggya akiyuza, n'ekiwero ekiggyiddwa ku kiggya tekigendana na kikadde." 
Luke5:37 Era tewali muntu addira vviini nsu n'agifuka mu nsawo nkadde; bw'akola atyo, evviini ensu eyabya ensawo, n'eyiika, n'ensawo ne zifa." 
Luke5:38 Evviini ensu efukibwa mu nsawo mpya. 
Luke5:39 Era tewali anywa ku vviini nkadde, ate n'addayo n'ayagala ensu; kubanga agamba nti: ‘Enkadde nnungi.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Awo olumu ku Sabbaato bwe yali ayita mu nnimiro z'eŋŋano, abayigirizwa be ne bagenda nga banuula ebirimba by'eŋŋano, ne babikunya mu ngalo, ne balya." 
Luke6:2 Abafarisaayo abamu ne babagamba nti: “Lwaki mukola ekitakkirizibwa kukola ku Sabbaato?” 
Luke6:3 Yezu n'abaanukula nti: “Temusomanga Dawudi kye yakola bwe yalumwa enjala, ye n'abaali naye:" 
Luke6:4 nga bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda, n'atoola Emigaati gy'Okwolesebwa, n'alya, n'awaako n'abo abaali naye, egyali gizira okuliibwa omuntu omulala yenna, wabula bakabona bokka?”" 
Luke6:5 Era n'abagamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu ye mukama wa Sabbaato.” 
Luke6:6 Ate ku Sabbaato endala, n'ayingira mu sinaagooga, n'ayigiriza. Omwo mwalimu omuntu omukono gwe ogwa ddyo nga mukalu." 
Luke6:7 Abawandiisi n'Abafarisaayo ne bamwekaliriza balabe oba anaamuwonya ku Sabbaato, bafune ensonga okumuwaawabira." 
Luke6:8 Yezu n'amanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n'agamba oli eyalina omukono omukalu nti: “Situka oyimirire wakati.” N'asituka n'ayimirira." 
Luke6:9 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mbuuza, ku Sabbaato kisaanye kukolera bubi oba kukolera bulungi? Kuwonya bulamu oba kubuzikiriza?”" 
Luke6:10 N'abeebunguluza amaaso bonna, n'agamba oli nti: “Golola omukono gwo.” N'akikola, omukono gwe ne guddirawo ddala." 
Luke6:11 Bo bali ne bajjula empiiga, ne beebuuzaganya kye banaakola Yezu." 
Luke6:12 Mu nnaku ezo, n'alaga ku lusozi okwegayirira, n'akeesa obudde ng'ali mu kwegayirira Katonda." 
Luke6:13 Bwe bwakya, n'ayita abayigirizwa be, n'alondamu kkumi na babiri, be yayita Abatume:" 
Luke6:14 Simoni gwe yatuuma Petero, ne Andureya muganda we; Yakobo ne Yowanna, Filippo ne Barutolomaawo," 
Luke6:15 Matayo ne Toma, Yakobo mutabani wa Alufayo ne Simoni ayitibwa Omutakabanyi;" 
Luke6:16 ne Yuda owa Yakobo, ne Yuda Yisikariyoti eyamulyamu olukwe." 
Luke6:17 N'aserengeta nabo, n'ayimirira ku museetwe, wamu n'ekibiina kinene eky'abayigirizwa be, n'abantu abalala nkumu abaava mu Buyudaaya yonna n'e Yeruzaalemu, ne ku lubalama lw'ennyanja y'e Tiiro ne Sidoni, abaali bazze okumuwulira n'okuwonyezebwa endwadde zaabwe." 
Luke6:18 Abajeezebwajeezebwa emyoyo emigwagwa ne bawonyezebwa. 
Luke6:19 Ekibiina kyonna kyafubanga okumukwatako, kubanga amaanyi gaamuvangamu ne gawonya bonna." 
Luke6:20 Awo n'asitulira amaaso ge eri abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti: “Mwesiimye, mmwe abaavu, kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda bwammwe." 
Luke6:21 “Mwesiimye, mmwe abalumwa enjala kaakano, kubanga mulikkuta. “Mwesiimye, mmwe abakaaba kaakano, kubanga muliseka." 
Luke6:22 “Mwesiimye, bwe banaabakyawanga, bwe banaabagobaganyanga, bwe banaabavumanga, bwe banaasambajjanga erinnya lyammwe nga baliyita ebbi olw'okubeera Omwana w'Omuntu."
