Luke6:23 Musanyukanga ku lunaku olwo ne mwebuukiza olw'essanyu, kubanga empeera yammwe mu ggulu nnene; anti bajjajjaabwe bwe batyo bwe baakola abalanzi." 
Luke6:24 “Kyokka zibasanze, mmwe abagagga, kubanga mmwe mufunye ekikubagizo kyammwe kyonna." 
Luke6:25 “Zibasanze, mmwe abakkufu kaakano, kubanga mulirumwa enjala. “Zibasanze, mmwe abaseka kaakano, kubanga muliwooba, mulikaaba." 
Luke6:26 “Zibasanze, abantu bonna bwe banaaboogerangako obulungi, kubanga bajjajjaabwe bwe baakolanga batyo abalanzi ab'obulimba." 
Luke6:27 “Naye nze mbagamba mmwe abawuliriza: Mwagalenga abalabe bammwe; mukolerenga bulungi ababakyaye. 
Luke6:28 Mwagalizenga bulungi ababavumirira; musabirenga ababavuma. 
Luke6:29 Oli akukubanga ku ttama erimu, mukyusize n'eddala; n'oli atwalanga omunagiro gwo, mulekere n'ekkanzu." 
Luke6:30 Buli akusabanga, omuwanga; n'oli akututteko ebibyo, tobimusabanga." 
Luke6:31 Nga bwe mwagalanga abantu babakolere, nammwe bwe mubanga mubakolera." 
Luke6:32 Obanga mwagala babaagala, ekinaabasiimisa kiruwa? Anti n'aboonoonyi baagala ababaagala." 
Luke6:33 Obanga mukolera bulungi ababakolera obulungi, ekinaabasiimisa kiruwa! Kubanga n'aboonoonyi bwe bakola batyo." 
Luke6:34 Obanga muwola abo bokka be musuubira okufunako, ekinaabasiimisa kiruwa! Kubanga n'aboonoonyi nabo bawola boonoonyi bannaabwe, balyoke baddizibwe kyenkana." 
Luke6:35 Naye mmwe mwagalenga ababakyaye; mukolerenga bulungi; muwolenga nga temulina kye musuubirayo, olwo empeera yammwe eriba nnene; mulibeera baana b'Oli Ali Waggulu Ddala, kubanga agirira ekisa entasiima n'ababi." 
Luke6:36 Mubeerenga ba kisa nga Kitammwe bw'ali ow'ekisa. 
Luke6:37 “Temulamulanga, nammwe lwe mutaliramulibwa. Temusaliranga bantu misango, nammwe lwe gitalibasalirwa kubasinga. Musonyiwenga, nammwe lwe munaasonyiyibwanga." 
Luke6:38 Mugabenga, nammwe lwe muligabirwa; ekipimo ekituufu, ekikkaatiriziddwa, ne kisuukundwa, ne kibooga, balikibayiwa mu kikondoolo. Kubanga ekipimo kye mugera, nammwe kye kiribagererwa.”" 
Luke6:39 Era n'abagerera olugero nti: “Kale, muzibe ayinza okukulembera muzibe munne? Bombi tebagwa mu bunnya?" 
Luke6:40 Omuyigirizwa takira muyigiriza; wabula buli aba ayigiriziddwa obulungi afaanana n'omuyigiriza we. 
Luke6:41 Lwaki olaba akasubi akali mu liiso lya muganda wo, ggwe n'otolaba kisiki kiri mu liryo?" 
Luke6:42 Oba kale, ogamba otya muganda wo nti: ‘Muganda wange, ka nkuggye akasubi mu liiso lyo,’ sso nga tolaba kisiki kiri mu liiso lyo? Mukuusa ggwe, sooka weggye ekisiki mu liiso lyo, awo lw'onoolaba obulungi, n'oggya akasubi mu liiso lya muganda wo." 
Luke6:43 “Anti tewali muti mulungi gubala bibala bibi; oba omuti omubi ogubala ebibala ebirungi. 
Luke6:44 Buli muti nno gutegeererwa ku bibala byagwo. Kubanga entontogolo z'omukunyu tezinogebwa ku maggwa; n'emizabbibu teginogebwa ku kirobo. 
Luke6:45 Omuntu omulungi ku birungi by'aterese mu mutima gwe kw'aggya ebirungi; n'omuntu omubi ku bibi by'aterese kw'aggya ebibi; anti ku bijjudde mu mutima akamwa ke kwe kaggya bye koogera. 
Luke6:46 “Lwaki mumpita Mukama, Mukama, sso ga temukola bye ŋŋamba?" 
Luke6:47 Buli ajja gye ndi n'awulira ebigambo byange, n'abissa mu nkola, nzija kubalaga gw'afaanana." 
Luke6:48 Afaanana omuntu mu kuzimba ennyumba, eyasima n'akka wansi, omusingi n'agutandikira ku lwazi; omujjuzi bwe gwajja, mukoka n'akuluggukira ku nnyumba eyo, naye n'atayinza kugimenya, kubanga yazimbibwa bulungi." 
Luke6:49 Naye buli awulira n'atassa mu nkola, afaanana omuntu eyazimba ennyumba ku ttaka nga tasimyewo musingi; mukoka bwe yagikuluggukirako, amangu ago n'egwa, n'ekigwo kyayo ne kiba kinene.”" 
Luke7:1 Bwe yamala enjigiriza ye yonna eri abantu, n'ayingira mu Kafarunawumu." 
Luke7:2 Kati eyo waaliyo Senturiyo eyalina omuddu we omu nga mulwadde ng'ajula kufa, sso nga yali muganzi gy'ali." 
Luke7:3 Bwe yawulira ebifa ku Yezu, n'atuma gy'ali abakadde b'Abayudaaya ng'amwegayirira ajje awonye omuddu we." 
Luke7:4 Bwe baatuuka awali Yezu ne banyiikira okumusaba, ne bamugamba nti: “Asaanye okukolerwa ekyo," 
Luke7:5 Kubanga ayagala eggwanga lyaffe, era yennyini yatuzimbira ne sinaagooga.”" 
Luke7:6 Yezu n'agenda nabo; yali esigadde ebbanga ttono okutuuka ku nnyumba, Senturiyo n'amutumira banne, n'amugamba nti: “Ssebo, leka kweteganya, kubanga sisaanidde ggwe kuyingira mu nnyumba yange." 
Luke7:7 Kyennavudde ndowooza nti nange nzennyini sisaanidde kujja gy'oli; wabula yogera bwogezi kigambo, omuweereza wange anaawona." 
Luke7:8 Kubanga nange ndi muntu mutwalibwa, nnina n'abaserikale be ntwala. Bwe ŋŋamba omu nti: ‘Genda,’ ng'agenda; n'omulala nti: ‘Jjangu,’ ng'ajja; n'omuddu wange nti: ‘Kino kikole,’ ng'akikola.”" 
Luke7:9 Yezu bwe yawulira ebyo, ne yeewuunya, n'akyukira ekibiina ekyali kimugoberera, n'abagamba nti: “Ka mbabuulire, newandibadde mu Yisirayeli, sinnasanga kukkiriza kwenkana wano.”" 
Luke7:10 Abaali batumiddwa bwe baddayo eka, ne basanga ng'omuddu mulamu." 
Luke7:11 Awo oluvannyumako, n'agenda mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Nayini, abayigirizwa be ne bagenda naye ko n'ekibiina kinene." 
Luke7:12 Naye bwe yali asemberera omulyango gw'ekibuga, ne wabaawo omufu gwe baali batwala, omutabani omu yekka owa nnyina, omukazi nnamwandu. Abantu ab'ekibuga bangi baali naye." 
Luke7:13 Omukama bwe yamulaba, n'amukwatirwa ekisa, n'amugamba nti: “Leka kulira.”" 
Luke7:14 N'asembera kumpi, n'akwata ku lunnyo; abaali beetisse ne bayimirira. N'agamba nti: “Mulenzi, nkugamba golokoka.”" 
Luke7:15 Omufu, n'atuula, n'atandika okwogera. Ye n'amuddiza nnyina." 
Luke7:16 Entiisa n'ekwata bonna, ne batendereza Katonda nga bagamba nti: “Mu ffe musituseemu omulanzi omukulu, Katonda alambudde eggwanga lye.”" 
Luke7:17 Ekigambo ekyo ku ye ne kibuna mu Buyudaaya bwonna ne mu nsi yonna eriraanyeewo. 
Luke7:18 Abayigirizwa ba Yowanna ne bamunyumiza ebyo byonna. 
Luke7:19 Awo ye Yowanna n'ayita babiri ku bayigirizwa be n'abatuma eri Omukama, ng'agamba nti: “Ggwe wuuyo ow'okujja, nandiki tulindirireyo omulala?”" 
Luke7:20 Abasajja bwe baatuuka gy'ali, ne bagamba nti: “Yowanna Batista atutumye gy'oli ng'agamba nti: ‘Ggwe wuuyo ow'okujja, nandiki tulindirireyo omulala?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Awo mu kaseera ako kennyini n'awonyezaamu bangi abaalina endwadde, obukosefu n'emyoyo emibi, n'abazibe b'amaaso bangi n'abawa okulaba," 
Luke7:22 n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Muddeeyo mubuulire Yowanna bye mulabye ne bye muwulidde: Bamuzibe baddamu okulaba, abalema batambula, abagenge balongoosebwa, abaggavu b'amatu bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa, n'abaavu babuulirwa amawulire amalungi." 
Luke7:23 Yeesiimye oyo atanneesittalako.” 
Luke7:24 Yowanna be yatuma bwe baamala okugenda, n'asooka okwogera eri ekibiina ku Yowanna nti: “Mwagenda mu ddungu kulaba ki? Olumuli oluyuuyuzibwa empewo?" 
Luke7:25 Kale mwagenda kulaba ki? Omuntu ayambadde eminagiro egitonnya? Mbadde ababa mu byambalo eby'omuwendo ne mu kwejalabya baba mu mbiri za bakabaka. 
Luke7:26 Awo nno mwagenda kulaba ki? Mulanzi? Weewaawo! Ka mbabuulire, n'okusinga asinga omulanzi." 
Luke7:27 Ye wuuyo eyawandiikibwako nti: “ ‘Laba, ntuma omubaka wange mu maaso go, anaakutegekera ekkubo lyo mu maaso go.’" 
Luke7:28 Mbagamba nti mu baali bazaaliddwa abakazi, mpaawo mulanzi akira Yowanna. Kyokka asinga obutene mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda amukira.”" 
Luke7:29 Abantu bonna n'abasolooza b'omusolo bwe baawulira, ne batendereza Katonda kubanga baali baabatiziddwa mu batismu ya Yowanna." 
Luke7:30 Naye Abafarisaayo n'abakugu mu mateeka baagaana entegeka ya Katonda kubanga tebaamuganya kubabatiza. 
Luke7:31 “Kale, abantu b'ezzadde lino nnaabageranya ku ki? Bafaanana ki?" 
Luke7:32 Bali ng'abaana abato abatudde mu mbuga, bano nga balaamiriza bannaabwe nti: “ ‘Twabafuuyira endere, naye temwazina; twabakubira ebiwoobe, naye temwakaaba.’" 
Luke7:33 Kubanga Yowanna Batista yajja nga talya mmere wadde okunywa evviini, ne mugamba nti: ‘Alimu omwoyo omubi,’" 
Luke7:34 Omwana w'Omuntu n'ajja ng'alya era ng'anywa, ne mugamba nti: ‘Mulabe, omuntu ono wa mulugube, mutamiivu, mukwano gwa basolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi.’" 
Luke7:35 Naye amagezi abaana baago bonna be bagejjeereza.” 
Luke7:36 Awo omu mu Bafarisaayo n'ayita Yezu okulya ewuwe. Ye n'ayingira mu nnyumba y'Omufarisaayo n'atuula okulya. 
Luke7:37 Awo omukazi omwonoonyi ow'omu kibuga ekyo, bwe yawulira ng'atudde mu nnyumba y'Omufarisaayo, n'aleeta akasumbi k'alabasiteri akalimu omuzigo ogw'akawoowo," 
Luke7:38 n'ayimirira emabega we kumpi n'ebigere bye ng'akaaba, n'atandika okutobya ebigere bye n'amaziga ge, n'abisiimuuza enviiri ez'omutwe gwe, n'anywegera ebigere bye, n'abisiiga n'omuzigo." 
Luke7:39 Naye Omufarisaayo eyamuyita, bwe yalaba, n'alowooza munda ye nti: “Singa ono abadde mulanzi, ggwe wamma yanditegedde ani era mukazi wa ngeri ki oyo amukwatako, kubanga mwonoonyi.”" 
Luke7:40 Awo Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Simoni, nnina kye nkugamba.” Ye n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, yogera.”" 
Luke7:41 “Omuwozi omu yalina b'abanja babiri, omu yali abanjibwa dinaari ebikumi bitaano, n'omulala amakumi ataano." 
Luke7:42 Bwe baalemwa okusasula, bombi n'abasonyiwa. Kale ani anaasinga okumwagala?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni n'addamu nti: “Ndowooza ng'oli gwe yasonyiwa ezisinga.” Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Osaze bulungi.” 
Luke7:44 Awo n'akyukira omukazi, n'agamba Simoni nti: “Omukazi ono omulaba? Kale bwe nayingidde mu nnyumba yo, tewampadde mazzi ga kunaaba bigere; sso ng'oyo atobezza ebigere byange n'amaziga ge, n'abisiimuula n'enviiri ze." 
Luke7:45 Era tewannywegedde; sso nga kaayingirira wano oyo tannata kunywegera bigere byange. 
Luke7:46 Tewansiize muzigo mu mutwe; sso ng'oyo ansiize ebigere omuzigo. 
Luke7:47 Olw'ekyo, ka mbabuulire, asonyiyiddwa ebibi bye ebingi, kubanga alina okwagala kungi. Asonyiyibwa ebitono aba n'okwagala kutono.”" 
Luke7:48 Awo n'agamba omukazi, nti: “Ebibi bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Luke7:49 Abaali batudde naye okulya ne batandika okulowooza mu myoyo gyabwe nti: “Ono ani asonyiwa n'ebibi?” 
Luke7:50 Ye n'agamba omukazi nti: “Okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza; genda mirembe.” 
Luke8:1 Awo oluvannyumako n'ayitaayita mu bibuga n'ebyalo ng'ayigiriza, era ng'ababuulira amawulire amalungi ag'obwakabaka bwa Katonda; n'Ekkumi n'Ababiri nga bali naye," 
Luke8:2 n'abakazi abamu abaali bawonyezeddwa emyoyo emibi n'endwadde: Mariya ayitibwa Magudalena eyagobebwamu emyoyo emibi musanvu," 
Luke8:3 ne Yowannina muka Kuza omuwanika wa Erode, ne Suzanna, n'abalala bangi, abaabalabiriranga nga batoola ku byabwe." 
Luke8:4 Awo ebibiina binene ne bikuŋŋaana, abantu ne bava mu bibuga n'ebibuga ne bajja w'ali, n'ayogera mu ngero nti:" 
Luke8:5 “Omusizi yafuluma okusiga ensigo ye. Yali asiga, ensigo emu n'egwa mu kkubo, n'erinnyirirwa ebigere, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga ne bigirya." 
Luke8:6 Endala n'egwa ku lwazi; n'emeruka, n'ekala, kubanga teyalina mazzi." 
Luke8:7 Endala n'egwa mu maggwa; amaggwa ne gamera wamu nayo ne gagifuuwa. 
Luke8:8 Endala n'egwa mu ttaka eddungi, n'ekula, n'ereetako ebibala kikumi.” Bwe yasirissa ebyo, n'akoowoola nti: “Alina amatu okuwulira, awulire.”" 
Luke8:9 Awo abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza ku lugero olwo bwe luli. 
Luke8:10 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwaweebwa okumanya ebyama by'obwakabaka bwa Katonda; abalala bo kibabuulirwa mu ngero, bwe balaba baleme kulaba, bwe bawulira baleme kutegeera." 
Luke8:11 Kale olugero lwe luno: Ensigo kye kigambo kya Katonda. 
Luke8:12 Ensigo ey'oku kkubo, be baabo abawulira, oluvannyuma Sitaani n'ajja n'akwakkula ekigambo mu myoyo gyabwe, baleme kukkiriza na kulokoka." 
Luke8:13 Ate eyagwa ku lwazi, be baabo, bwe bawulira ekigambo, bakyaniriza n'essanyu; naye obutabaako mirandira, bakkiriza akabanga, ate mu budde obw'okukemebwa, nga beeseebulula." 
Luke8:14 Eyagwa mu maggwa, be baabo abawulira; naye bwe bagenda, okweraliikirira n'obugagga, n'amasanyu ag'obulamu ne bibatuga ne batabala bibala." 
Luke8:15 Eyagwa ey'omu ttaka eddungi, be baabo abawulira ekigambo ne bakitereka mu mutima omulungi, omwesimbu, ne baleeta ebibala mu kugumiikiriza.”" 
Luke8:16 “Tewali akoleeza ttawaaza n'agisaanikirako nsuwa, oba n'agissa wansi wa kitanda; naye agiwanika ku kikondo abayingira balyoke balabe ekitangaala." 
Luke8:17 Kubanga tewali kyakisibwa ekitalibikkulibwa, era n'ekyakwekebwa ekitalimanyibwa ne kijja mu kitangaala." 
Luke8:18 Mwekkaanye engeri gye muwuliramu. Kubanga alina alyongerwako; ate buli atalina, ne ky'alowooza nti akirina kirimuggyibwako.”" 
Luke8:19 Awo nnyina ne baganda be ne bajja gy'ali; ne batasobola kumutuukako olw'ekibiina. 
Luke8:20 Ne bamutumira nti: “Nnyoko ne baganda bo bayimiridde wano ebweru baagala okukulabako.” 
Luke8:21 Ye n'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Mmange ne baganda bange be baabo abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakissa mu nkola.” 
Luke8:22 Awo olumu n'asaabala mu lyato wamu n'abayigirizwa be, n'abagamba nti: “Tusomoke, tulage emitala w'ennyanja.” Ne basitula." 
Luke8:23 Bwe baali bawunguka, ne yeebaka. Omuyaga ogw'empewo ne gukka ku nnyanja, ne bajjula amazzi, ne baba mu kabi." 
Luke8:24 Ne basembera w'ali ne bamuzuukusa nga bagamba nti: “Muyigiriza, Muyigiriza, tusaanawo!” Ye n'agolokoka, omuyaga n'ennyanja eyali esiikuuse n'abikomako, ne bikoma, ne guba mulaala." 
Luke8:25 N'abagamba nti: “Okukkiriza kwammwe kuli wa?” Ne batya, ne beewuunya, ne bagambagana nti: “Ono ye ani, alagira empewo n'amazzi ne bimuwulira?”" 
Luke8:26 Ne basaabala, ne bagoba mu nsi y'Abagerasa emitala wa Galilaaya." 
Luke8:27 Bwe yagoba ku ttale, n'ajjirwa omuntu okuva mu kibuga eyalimu emyoyo emibi. Ebiro bingi yali takyayambala, nga tasula na mu nnyumba, wabula ng'abeera eyo mu biggya." 
Luke8:28 Olwalengera ku Yezu, n'awowoggana, n'ajja agwa mu maaso ge, n'ayogera n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Onjagaza ki ggwe Yezu Omwana wa Katonda Ali Waggulu Ddala? Nkwegayiridde tombonyaabonya.”" 
Luke8:29 Kubanga yali alagidde omwoyo omugwagwa guve mu musajja. Anti ebbanga lyali ddene bukya gumukwata; baamukuumiranga mu masamba ne mu njegere, naye ebyamusibanga ng'abikutula, omwoyo omubi ne gumutwala mu ddungu." 
Luke8:30 Yezu n'amubuuza nti: “Erinnya lyo ggwe ani?” n'amugamba nti: “Ggye,” kubanga emyoyo emibi gyali gimuyingiddemu mingi." 
Luke8:31 Ne gimwegayirira aleme kugiragira kugenda mu nnyanga. 
Luke8:32 Eggana ly'embizzi ddene lyali lirya awo ku lusozi; ne gimusaba agireke giyingire omwo. N'agikkiriza. 
Luke8:33 Awo emyoyo emibi ne giva mu muntu, ne giyingira mu mbizzi; eggana lyonna ne lifubutuka, ne lyesolessa mu nnyanja okuva waggulu ku bbanga, ne lisaanawo." 
Luke8:34 Abaali bazirunda bwe baalaba ekyali kiguddewo, ne badduka, ne bagenda boogera mu kibuga ne mu byalo." 
Luke8:35 Bo ne bavaayo okulaba ekibaddewo; ne bajja eri Yezu, ne basanga omuntu emyoyo emibi gwe gyavaamu ng'atudde ku bigere bya Yezu, ayambadde era ng'ategeera bulungi; ne batya." 
Luke8:36 Abaali balabye ne babanyumiza eyali akwatiddwa emyoyo emibi nga bwe yali awonyezeddwa. 
Luke8:37 Ekibiina kyonna eky'ab'omu nsi ey'Abagerasa ekyetooloddewo ne kimwegayirira abaviire; kubanga entiisa yali ebakutte nnene. Awo kwe kusaabala mu lyato n'addayo. 
Luke8:38 Eyalimu emyoyo emibi n'amusaba amukkirize abeerenga naye; Yezu ye n'amusiibula, n'amugamba nti:" 
Luke8:39 “Genda ewammwe, obuulire Katonda by'akukoledde.” N'agenda n'ayitaayita mu kibuga kyonna ng'alangirira obunene bw'ebyo Yezu bye yali amukoledde." 
Luke8:40 Awo Yezu n'akomawo, ekibiina ne kimwaniriza; kubanga bonna baali bamulinda." 
Luke8:41 Ne wajjawo omusajja erinnya lye Yayiro, eyali omukulu wa sinaagooga; n'agwa ku bigere bya Yezu, n'amwegayirira ayingire mu nnyumba ye," 
Luke8:42 Kubanga yali alina omwana we ow'obuwala omu yekka nga wa myaka kkumi n'ebiri, yali afa. N'agenda, naye ekibiina nga kimusindiikiriza." 
Luke8:43 Awo omukazi eyali alwadde endwadde eya ggerenge okumala emyaka kkumi n'ebiri ne watabaawo amuwonya," 
Luke8:44 n'afuluma emabega, n'akoma ku matanvuuwa g'ekyambalo kye, amangu ago okukulukuta kw'omusaayi ne kukoma." 
Luke8:45 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Ani oyo ankomyeko?” Bonna ne beegaana. Awo Petero n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, abantu bakwetoolodde, bakusindiikiriza.”" 
Luke8:46 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Waliwo ankomyeko, kubanga mpulidde ng'amaanyi ganvaamu.”" 
Luke8:47 Omukazi bwe yalaba nga tasobola kwekweka, n'ajja ng'akankana, n'avunnama ku bigere bye n'ayatula mu maaso g'abantu bonna ensonga eyamumukomezzaako, era nga bw'awonye amangu ago." 
Luke8:48 Awo Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Muwala, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza; genda mirembe.”" 
Luke8:49 Yali akyayogera, ne wabaawo ajja okuva ew'omukulu wa sinaagooga ng'agamba nti: “Muwala wo afudde; omuyigiriza toyongera kumuteganya.”" 
Luke8:50 Yezu bwe yawulira ekigambo ekyo, n'amugamba nti: “Totya, kkiriza bukkiriza, ajja kuwona.”" 
Luke8:51 Bwe yatuuka ku nnyumba, n'ataganya muntu mulala yenna kuyingira naye, okuggyako Petero ne Yakobo ne Yowanna muganda wa Yakobo, ne kitaawe w'omuwala ne nnyina." 
Luke8:52 Bonna baali awo nga bakaaba, nga bamukubira ebiwoobe; naye ye n'agamba nti: “Muleke kukaaba; kubanga tafudde, yeebase bwebasi.”" 
Luke8:53 Ne bamusekerera, kubanga baali bamanyi ng'afudde." 
Luke8:54 Awo n'akwata omukono gw'omuwala n'ayogerera waggulu, n'agamba nti: “Muwala, golokoka.”" 
Luke8:55 Omwoyo gwe ne gumuddamu, amangu ago n'agolokoka. N'alagira okumuwa ekyokulya." 
Luke8:56 Bakadde be ne bawuniikirira; ye n'abakuutira obutabuulirako muntu kyali kibaddewo. 
Luke9:1 Awo n'ayita Ekkumi n'Ababiri wamu n'abawa amaanyi n'obuyinza ku myoyo emibi gyonna era n'okuwonya endwadde. 
Luke9:2 N'abatuma okuyigiriza obwakabaka bwa Katonda n'okuwonya. 
Luke9:3 N'abagamba nti: “Temutwalanga kantu mu lugendo, newandibadde omuggo, newandibadde ensawo, newandibadde omugaati, newandibadde ffeeza, era temubeeranga na kkanzu bbiri." 
Luke9:4 Buli nnyumba gye muyingiramu, mubeeranga omwo era wo we muvanga." 
Luke9:5 Yonna gye bagaananga okubaaniriza, bwe mubanga muva mu kibuga ekyo mukunkumulanga enfuufu ku bigere byammwe ng'obujulizi obubalumiriza.”" 
Luke9:6 Bo ne bagenda, ne bayitaayita mu bibuga nga bayigiriza Evangili n'okuwonya buli wantu." 
Luke9:7 Awo Erode omufuzi atwala ekitundu n'awulira byonna ebyakolebwa, n'asoberwa, kubanga abamu baagambanga nti Yowanna Batista azuukidde mu bafu;" 
Luke9:8 n'abalala nti Eliya alabise, ate abandi nti omu ku balanzi ab'edda azuukidde." 
Luke9:9 Erode n'agamba nti: “Yowanna nze namutemako omutwe; ate oyo gwe mpulirako ebyenkana awo ye ani?” N'ayagala okumulaba. 
Luke9:10 Awo abatume ne badda, ne bamunyumiza byonna bye baakola. Ye n'abatwala, n'ava awo nagenda ebbaliko yekka mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Betisayida." 
Luke9:11 Naye abantu bwe baamanya, ne bamugoberera; n'abasanyukira, era n'ababuulira ku bwakabaka bwa Katonda, n'abaali beetaaga okuwonyezebwa n'abawonya." 
Luke9:12 Obudde bwe bwagenda buziba, Ekkumi n'Ababiri ne bamusemberera ne bagamba nti: “Abantu basiibule, bagende mu bibuga ne mu byalo ebyetoolodde basule eyo, bafune ne kye banaalya, kubanga wano we tuli kifo kyesudde.”" 
Luke9:13 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mubawe kye banaalya.” Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Tetulina kirala, okuggyako emigaati etaano gyokka n'ebyennyanja bibiri; mpozzi tugende tugulire abantu bano bonna emmere.”" 
Luke9:14 Kubanga abasajja baali bawera ng'enkumi ttaano. N'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Mubatuuze ebibinja nga by'amakumi ataano kinna kimu.” 
Luke9:15 Ne bakola batyo; ne babatuuza bonna. 
Luke9:16 Awo n'atoola emigaati etaano n'ebyennyanja ebibiri, n'atunula ku ggulu, ne yeebaza, n'abimenyamu, n'abikwasa abayigirizwa be babigabire abantu." 
Luke9:17 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. Ne bakuŋŋaanya ebyalema, ebisero kkumi na bibiri eby'obutundutundu." 
Luke9:18 Olwatuuka, yali ali yekka nga yeegayirira, n'abayigirizwa be nga bali naye, n'ababuuza nti: “Abantu bagamba nze ani?”" 
Luke9:19 Bo ne bayanukula ne bagamba nti: “Yowanna Batista, naye abalala nti Eliya, n'abandi nti omulanzi omu ku b'edda azuukidde.”" 
Luke9:20 Awo n'abagamba nti: “Naye nga mmwe mugamba nze ani?” Petero n'ayanukula nti: “Kristu wa Katonda.” 
Luke9:21 Naye ye n'abakuutira, n'abalagira ekyo obutakibuulirako muntu." 
Luke9:22 N'abagamba nti: “Omwana w'Omuntu yalina okubonyaabonyezebwa ebingi n'okwegaanibwa abakadde ne bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi n'okuttibwa, n'okuzuukizibwa ku lunaku olwokusatu.”" 
Luke9:23 Awo bonna n'abagamba nti: “Obanga oli ayagala okungoberera, yeerese, yeetikke omusaalaba gwe buli lukya, angoberere." 
Luke9:24 Kubanga buli alyagala okuwonya obulamu bwe, alibubuza; naye buli alibuza obulamu bwe okubeera nze, oyo alibuwonya." 
Luke9:25 Kale omuntu kimugasa ki okulya ensi yonna, sso ye n'azaawa oba n'afiirwa?" 
Luke9:26 Kubanga buli akwatirwa nze n'ebigambo byange ensonyi, oyo Omwana w'Omuntu alimukwatirwa ensonyi lw'alijja mu kitiibwa kye n'ekya Taata n'ekya bamalayika abatuukirivu." 
Luke9:27 Mazima mbagamba nti waliwo abamu ku bayimiridde wano abatalirega ku lumbe okutuusa nga balabye obwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Luke9:28 Oluvannyuma lw'ebigambo bino nga wayise ennaku nga munaana, n'atoola Petero ne Yakobo ne Yowanna, n'alinnya nabo ku lusozi okwegayirira." 
Luke9:29 Bwe yali yeegayirira, enfaanana y'amaaso ge n'efuuka, ebyambalo bye ne byeruka, ne bimasamasa." 
Luke9:30 Awo ne walabikawo abasajja babiri nga boogera naye; baali Musa ne Eliya; 
Luke9:31 baalabikira mu kitiibwa; baali boogera ku kugenda kwe kwe yali agenda okutuukiriza mu Yeruzaalemu. 
Luke9:32 Petero n'abaali naye otulo twali tubali bubi, naye baasigala batunula, ne balaba ekitiibwa kye n'abasajja bali ababiri abaali bayimiridde naye." 
Luke9:33 Awo bali bwe baali bava w'ali, Petero n'agamba Yezu nti: “Muyigiriza, kirungi ffe okubeera wano; ka tukole wano ensiisira ssatu, emu yiyo, emu ya Musa n'emu ya Eliya.” Yali tamanyi ky'ayogera." 
Luke9:34 Yali akyayogera ebyo, ekire ne kijja, ne kibabuutikira; ne batya nga balaba bayingirira ekire." 
Luke9:35 Awo eddoboozi ne liva mu kire, ne ligamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange, Omulondemu wange, mumuwulirenga.”" 
Luke9:36 Eddoboozi lyagenda okusirika, nga Yezu yekka y'aliwo. Bo ne basirika; mu nnaku ezo ebyo bye baalaba ne wataba gwe baabibuulirako." 
Luke9:37 Ku lunaku olwaddako, bwe baali baserengeta olusozi, ekibiina kinene ne kibasisinkana." 
Luke9:38 Omusajja n'aleekaana okuva mu kibiina ng'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, nkwegayiridde, tunuulira mutabani wange; ono ye muzaale yekka gwe nnina." 
Luke9:39 Omwoyo gumukwata, amangu ago n'awowoggana; ne gumusambagaza, n'abimba ejjovu; gumuta na buwaze, ate gumumenyaamenya." 
Luke9:40 Neegayiridde abayigirizwa bo bagugobe, ne batasobola.”" 
Luke9:41 Awo Yezu n'ayanukula, n'agamba nti: “Owa ezzadde lino eritakkiriza, eryonoonefu! Ndituusa wa okubeera nammwe n'okubagumiikiriza? Kale mutabani wo muleete wano.”" 
Luke9:42 Bwe yali asembera, omwoyo omubi ne gumutaagulataagula ne gumusambagaza. Naye Yezu n'akabukira omwoyo omugwagwa, omulenzi n'amuwonya, n'amuddiza kitaawe." 
Luke9:43 Abantu bonna ne beewuunya obukulu bwa Katonda. Bonna baali bakyewuunya byonna by'akola," 
Luke9:44 n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Ebigambo bino biyingire mu matu gaamwe: kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu agenda kuweebwayo mu mikono gy'abantu.” 
Luke9:45 Bo ne batategeera kigambo ekyo; kyali kibakwekeddwa baleme kukitegeera; ate baali batya okumubuuza ku kigambo ekyo. 
Luke9:46 Awo enkaayana ne zisituka mu bo ku ani asinga obukulu mu bo. 
Luke9:47 Yezu bwe yalaba ebirowoozo ebyali mu mitima gyabwe, n'akwata omwana omuto, n'amuyimiriza ku lusegere lwe," 
Luke9:48 n'abagamba nti: “Buli ayaniriza omwana omuto ono, mu linnya lyange, aba ayanirizza nze; na buli annyaniriza, aba ayanirizza oli eyantuma. Kubanga asinga obutene mu mmwe mwenna, y'asinga obukulu.”" 
Luke9:49 Yowanna n'ayanukula nti: “Muyigiriza, twalaba omuntu ng'agoba emyoyo emibi mu linnya lyo, ne tumuziyiza; kubanga yali tayita naffe.”" 
Luke9:50 Naye Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Muleke kumuziyiza; kubanga oyo atatuwakanya, aba ku ludda lwammwe.”" 
Luke9:51 Olwatuuka, ennaku ez'okulinnyisibwa kwe bwe zaali ziri kumpi, amaaso ge n'agasimbira ddala ku kulaga e Yeruzaalemu. N'asindika ababaka bamukulemberemu." 
Luke9:52 Ne bagenda, ne bayingira mu kyalo ky'Abasamariya bamutegekere." 
Luke9:53 Naye abantu ne batamwaniriza kubanga amaaso ge yali agasimbye ku kulaga Yeruzaalemu. 
Luke9:54 Abayigirizwa be, Yakobo ne Yowanna, bwe baalaba ekyo, ne bagamba nti: “Mukama, oyagala tulagire omuliro guve mu ggulu gubazikirize?”" 
Luke9:55 Naye ye n'akyuka n'abakomako. 
Luke9:56 Ne bagenda mu kibuga ekirala. 
Luke9:57 Bwe baali batambula mu kkubo, ne wajjawo amugamba nti: “Nzija kukugobereranga yonna gy'onoogendanga.”" 
Luke9:58 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ebibe birina ebinnya n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga birina ebisu, naye Omwana w'Omuntu talina w'awunzika mutwe.”" 
Luke9:59 Ate n'agamba omulala nti: “Ngoberera.” Naye ye n'agamba nti: “Mukama, nzikiriza nsooke ŋŋende nziike kitange.”" 
Luke9:60 N'amugamba nti: “Leka abafu baziike abafu baabwe; ggwe genda olangirire obwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Luke9:61 Omulala n'agamba nti: “Ssebo, nzija kukugoberera; kyokka, nzikiriza ŋŋende nsiibule ab'eka.”" 
Luke9:62 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Mpaawo oyo akwata ku nkumbi erima n'akebuka mabega asaanidde bwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Luke10:1 Oluvannyuma, Omukama n'alonda abalala nsanvu mu babiri, n'abatuma kinnababirye bamukulembere mu byalo byonna ne mu buli bifo gye yali agenda okutuuka." 
Luke10:2 N'abagamba nti: “Amakungula mangi, naye abakozi batono. Mwegayirire nno Omukama nnannyini makungula asindike abakozi mu makungula ge." 
Luke10:3 Mugende; nzuuno mbatumye kyenkana ng'obuliga mu misege wakati. 
Luke10:4 Temwambaliranga ndyanga wadde ensawo ya ssente, newandibadde musaasaane, ne mu kkubo temulamusanga muntu." 
Luke10:5 Buli nnyumba mwe muyingiranga, musookenga kugamba nti: ‘Emirembe gibeere ku nnyumba eno.’" 
Luke10:6 Bwe munaabangamu omwana w'emirembe, emirembe gyammwe ginaamujjangako; bw'ataabengamu, emirembe gyammwe nga gibaddira." 
Luke10:7 Mubeeranga mu nyumba eyo nga mulya era nga munywa ku bye babawa, kubanga omukozi asaanira empeera ye. Temugezanga kuva mu nnyumba emu kudda mu ndala." 
Luke10:8 Bwe muyingiranga mu kibuga ne babaaniriza, mulyenga ku bye babaleetera;" 
Luke10:9 muwonyanga abalwadde abalimu, ne mubagamba nti: ‘Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bubasemberedde.’" 
Luke10:10 Naye bwe muyingiranga mu kibuga ne batabaaniriza, mugendanga mu mpya zaakyo," 
Luke10:11 ne mugamba nti: ‘N'enfuufu y'ekibuga kyammwe ekwatidde ku bigere byaffe, tugibakunkumulidde; kyokka mumanye ng'obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde.’" 
Luke10:12 Ka mbabuulire, ekirituukirira Sodoma ku lunaku luli kiriba kigumiikirizika okusinga ekirituukirira ekibuga ekyo." 
Luke10:13 “Zikusanze, ggwe Korazini! Zikusanze, ggwe Betisayida! Kubanga ebikolwa eby'amaanyi ebyakolerwa mu mmwe, singa byali bibadde mu Tiiro ne mu Sidoni, singa baabonerera dda mu bikutiya nga batudde mu vvu." 
Luke10:14 Ekirituukirira Tiiro ne Sidoni ku kulamulibwa, kiriba kigumiikirizika okusinga ekiribatuukirira." 
Luke10:15 Ate ggwe Kafarunawumu, oligulumizibwa kutuuka ku ggulu? Ojja kussibwa okutuuka wansi mu magombe." 
Luke10:16 “Abawulira, ng'awulidde nze; abagaya, ng'agaye nze; ate buli angaya, aba agaye Oli eyantuma.”" 
Luke10:17 Awo abayigirizwa ensanvu mu ababiri ne bakomawo nga basanyufu, nga bagamba nti: “Mukama, emyoyo emibi gituwulira mu linnya lyo.”" 
Luke10:18 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Nalaba Sitaani ng'awanuka mu ggulu ng'enjota. 
Luke10:19 Mulabye, nabawa obuyinza obw'okulinnyirira emisota, n'enjaba, ne ku maanyi gonna ag'omulabe; tewali kintu na kimu kiribakolera bubi." 
Luke10:20 Naye muleme kusanyuka olwa kino nti emyoyo emibi gibawulira, wabula musanyuke kubanga amannya gammwe gaawandiikibwa mu ggulu.”" 
Luke10:21 Mu kaseera ako, n'ajaguliza mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'agamba nti: “Taata, Omukama w'eggulu n'ensi, nkutendereza, kubanga ebyo wabikisa abagezi n'abategeevu n'obibikkulira abato. Weewaawo, Taata, bw'otyo bwe wasiima." 
Luke10:22 Byonna Taata yabinkwasa; tewali amanyi Mwana, wabula Taata, ne Taata tewali amumanyi, wabula Mwana, n'oyo Mwana gw'aba ayagadde okumumanyisaako.”" 
Luke10:23 Awo n'akebukira abayigirizwa be n'abagamba bo bokka nti: “Amaaso agalaba mmwe bye mulaba galina omukisa; 
Luke10:24 Ka mbabuulire, abalanzi bangi ne bakabaka bangi beegomba okulaba mmwe bye mulaba ne batabiraba; okuwulira mmwe bye muwulira ne batabiwulira.”" 
Luke10:25 Awo omuyigiriza w'amateeka omu n'asituka okumukema, n'agamba nti: “Muyigiriza, nkole ki okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Luke10:26 Ye n'amugamba nti: “Mu mateeka baawandiikamu ki? Osomamu otya?” 
Luke10:27 Oli n'ayanukula nti: “Oyagalanga Omukama Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonna, n'omwoyo gwo gwonna, n'amaanyi go gonna, n'emmeeme yo yonna; ne munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.”" 
Luke10:28 N'amugamba nti: “Oyanukudde bulungi. Kola bw'otyo oliba mulamu.” 
Luke10:29 Naye oli olw'okwagala okulaga nti yalina ensonga, n'agamba Yezu nti: “Munnange oyo ye ani?”" 
Luke10:30 Awo Yezu okumwanukula n'agamba nti: “Omuntu omu yali ava e Yeruzaalemu ng'aserengeta e Yeriko, n'agwa mu batemu, ne bamwambula, ne bamukuba, ne bagenda, ne bamuleka ng'aliko kateetera." 
Luke10:31 Mu butanwa ne wabaawo kabona naye eyali aserengeta mu kkubo eryo; n'amulaba, kyokka n'ayita buyisi." 
Luke10:32 Mu ngeri ye emu n'Omuleevi bwe yatuuka mu kifo ekyo, n'amulaba, naye ne yeetambulira." 
Luke10:33 Naye Omusamariya eyali ku lugendo lwe, n'ajja we yali, bwe yamulaba, n'amukwatirwa ekisa;" 
Luke10:34 n'agenda w'ali n'amusiba ebiwundu ng'amaze okubifukamu omuzigo n'evviini, n'amussa ku nsolo ye, n'amutwala mu nnyumba y'abatambuze, n'amujjanjaba." 
Luke10:35 Ku lunaku olwaddako, n'atoola dinaari bbiri, n'aziwa nnannyini nnyumba, n'amugamba nti: ‘Mujjanjabe; ate kyonna ky'oliba osussizzaako, nze ndikikusasula amadda.’" 
Luke10:36 Kale ku abo abasatu, ggwe ogamba ani eyali munne w'oli eyagwa mu batemu?”" 
Luke10:37 Ye n'agamba nti: “Oli eyamukwatirwa ekisa.” Yezu n'agamba nti: “Genda naawe okolenga bw'otyo.” 
Luke10:38 Awo bwe baali batambula, n'ayingira mu kyalo ekimu; omukazi, gwe bayita Marita, n'amwaniriza mu nnyumba ye." 
Luke10:39 Yali alina muganda we, nga bamuyita Mariya, oyo yatuula kumpi n'ebigere by'Omukama ng'awulira ekigambo kye." 
Luke10:40 Marita yali yeetawula mu mirimo mingi egy'okuweereza; n'ajja gy'ali, n'agamba nti: “Mukama, tofaayo nga muganda wange andese okuweereza nzekka? Muŋŋambireko annyambe.”" 
Luke10:41 Naye Omukama n'ayanukula nti: “Marita, Marita, weeraliikirira era otawaanyizibwa bingi. Naye ekitalekeka kiri kimu kyokka." 
Luke10:42 Mariya yeerobozezza ekitundu ekirungi, ekitagenda kumuggyibwako.”" 
Luke11:1 Yali mu kifo ekimu nga yeegayirira, bwe yamala, omu ku bayigirizwa be n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, tuyigirize okwegayirira nga Yowanna bwe yayigiriza abayigirizwa be.”" 
Luke11:2 N'amugamba nti: “Bwe mubanga mwegayirira, mugambanga nti: “ ‘Taata, erinnya lyo litiibwe; obwakabaka bwo bujje." 
Luke11:3 Tuwe leero emmere yaffe eya buli lunaku. 
Luke11:4 Tusonyiwe ebibi byaffe, anti nga naffe tusonyiwa buli atulinako ebbanja. Totutwala mu kukemebwa.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Era n'abagamba nti: “Ani mu mmwe aliba ne mukwano gwe, n'agenda gy'ali ettumbi ly'obudde, n'amugamba nti: ‘Munnange, mpolaayo emigaati esatu," 
Luke11:6 kubanga mukwano gwange yaakatuuka okuva mu lugendo; sirina kaakulya ka kumuwa,’" 
Luke11:7 oli n'ayima mu nnyumba n'ayanukula nti: ‘Tontawaanya; neggalidde dda; nze n'abaana bange tuli mu buliri; sisobola kugolokoka kujja kukuwa kantu.’? 
Luke11:8 Ka mbabuulire, newandibadde nga taagolokoke kumuwa kantu kubanga mukwano gwe, naye olw'oli okumuteeteza, ajja kugolokoka amuwe kye yeetaaga." 
Luke11:9 “Nange kyenvudde mbagamba nti musabe, muliweebwa; munoonye, mulizuula; mukonkone muliggulirwawo." 
Luke11:10 Kubanga buli asaba afuna; buli anoonya azuula, na buli akonkona aliggulirwawo." 
Luke11:11 Kale muzadde ani mu mmwe mutabani we ng'amusabye ekyennyanja, mu kifo ky'ekyennyanja n'amuwa omusota?" 
Luke11:12 Obanga amusabye eggi, amuwa enjaba?" 
Luke11:13 Kale oba mmwe ababi mumanyi okuwa abaana bammwe ebirungi, alabisa Taata ali mu ggulu; talisinzaawo okuwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ababa bamusabye?”" 
Luke11:14 Awo yali agoba omwoyo omubi era nga gukasiru, omwoyo omubi bwe gwamala okumuvaamu, kasiru n'ayogera, abantu ne beewuunya." 
Luke11:15 Naye abamu ne bagamba nti: “Emyoyo emibi agigoba ku lwa Beelizebuli omukulu w'emyoyo emibi.” 
Luke11:16 N'abalala, okumugeza, ne bamusaba akabonero okuva mu ggulu." 
Luke11:17 Naye ye bwe yamanya bye balowooza, n'abagamba nti: “Buli bwakabaka obwetemamu, buzikirira; n'ennyumba egwa ku ginnaayo." 
Luke11:18 Kale nno, oba Sitaani yeetemyemu bw'atyo, obwakabaka bwe bunaanywera butya! Kubanga mmwe mugambye nti emyoyo emibi ngigoba ku bwa Beelizebuli." 
Luke11:19 Kale oba nze emyoyo emibi ngigoba ku bwa Beelizebuli, abaana bammwe bo bagigoba ku bw'ani?” Olwekyo kyebaliva babeera abalamuzi bammwe." 
Luke11:20 Naye obanga emyoyo emibi ngigoba na lugalo lwa Katonda, awo nno obwakabaka bwa Katonda butuuse mu mmwe." 
Luke11:21 Ow'amaanyi abagalidde ebyokulwanyisa bw'akuuma oluggya lwe, ebibye biba mu ddembe." 
Luke11:22 Naye amusinga amaanyi bw'amulumba, n'amala amugoba, ebyokulwanyisa byonna bye yali yeesiga abimuggyako n'eby'omunyago n'abigereka." 
Luke11:23 Ataba nange, aba mulabe wange; era atakuŋŋaanya nange asaasaanya." 
Luke11:24 “Omwoyo omugwagwa bwe guva mu muntu, gutambulatambula mu bifo ebikalukalu, nga gunoonya we gunaawummulira. Bwe gubulwa, ne gugamba nti: ‘Nzija kudda mu nnyumba yange mwe nava.’" 
Luke11:25 Bwe gujja, gugisanga eyereddwa, etereezeddwa." 
Luke11:26 Awo ne gugenda, ne guleeta emyoyo emirala musanvu egigukira obubi, ne giyingira ne gisula omwo. Awo embeera y'omuntu ey'oluvannyuma n'eba mbi okukira ey'olubereberye.”" 
Luke11:27 Bwe yali akyayogera ebyo, omukazi omu n'ayima mu kibiina n'akangula eddoboozi, n'agamba nti: “Olubuto olwakuzaala lwa mukisa, ko n'amabeere ge wayonka.”" 
Luke11:28 Naye ye n'agamba nti: “Abasinga omukisa beebo abawulira ekigambo kya Katonda ne bakikwata.” 
Luke11:29 Ebibiina bwe byali byeyongera obunene, n'atandika okugamba nti: “Ezzadde lino zzadde bbi; lisaba akabonero, naye tewali kabonero kajja kuliweebwa, wabula akabonero ka Yona." 
Luke11:30 Kubanga nga Yona bwe yabeera akabonero eri abantu b'e Nineve, n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliba eri ezzadde lino." 
Luke11:31 Nnaabakyala ow'emaserengeta ku kulamulibwa alisituka wamu n'abantu b'ezzadde lino, n'abasalira omusango okubasinga, kubanga yava ku nkingi z'ensi okujja okuwulira amagezi ga Solomoni; sso nga wano waliwo akira ne Solomoni." 
Luke11:32 Abasajja b'e Nineve, ku kulamulibwa balisituka wamu n'abantu b'ezzadde lino ne babasalira omusango okubasinga, kubanga bo Yona bwe yababuulira, baabonerera; sso nga wano waliwo asinga Yona." 
Luke11:33 “Tewali akoleeza ttawaaza n'agissa buziizi, oba n'agivuunikirako kibbo; wabula agiwanika ku kikondo kyayo, abayingira balyoke balabe ekitangaala." 
Luke11:34 Eriiso lyo y'ettawaaza y'omubiri gwo; eriiso lyo bwe liba eddamu, omubiri gwo gwonna gutangaala; naye bwe liba eddwadde, era n'omubiri gwo guba mu nzikiza." 
Luke11:35 Awo nno wekkaanye, sikulwa ng'ekitangaala ekiri mu ggwe kiba nzikiza." 
Luke11:36 Obanga omubiri gwo gwonna gutangaala, nga tewali kitundu na kimu kiri mu nzikiza, gwonna gulitangaala ne gukutangaaza ng'ettawaaza bw'ekutangaaza n'okwaka kwayo.”" 
Luke11:37 Yali akyayogera, Omufarisaayo n'amusaba okulya ewuwe. N'ayingira n'atuula okulya." 
Luke11:38 Awo Omufarisaayo n'atandika okwewuunya okulaba nga teyamala kunaaba ng'agenda okulya. 
Luke11:39 Awo Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Kale mmwe Abafarisaayo mutukuza ebikopo n'entamu ku ngulu, sso munda mujjudde obunyazi n'obugwenyufu." 
Luke11:40 Babuyabuya mmwe! Eyakola eky'okungulu si ye yakola n'ekiri munda? 
Luke11:41 Awo nno mugabire abaavu kye mulina munda, byonna bwe bityo lwe biribabeerera ebitukuvu." 
Luke11:42 “Zibasanze mmwe Abafarisaayo! Kubanga muwa ekyekkumi ekya nnabbugira n'eky'akakubansiri, n'ekya buli kiddo, ne mutafa ku bwenkanya na ku kwagala Katonda; sso ebyo mwanditeekeddwa okubikola nga na biri temubirese." 
Luke11:43 Zibasanze, mmwe Abafarisaayo! Kubanga mwagala entebe ez'oku mwanjo mu sinaagooga n'okulamusibwa mu mbuga." 
Luke11:44 Zibasanze mmwe! Kubanga muli ng'entaana ezitalabika, abantu ne bazitambulirako nga tebamanyi.”" 
Luke11:45 Awo omu ku bayigiriza b'amateeka n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, bw'oyogera otyo nga naffe otuvumye.”" 
Luke11:46 N'amugamba nti: “Nammwe abayigiriza b'amateeka, zibasanze! Kubanga abantu mubabinika emigugu emizibu okwetikka; sso nga mmwe temugikwata nako wadde n'olugalo lwammwe olumu luti." 
Luke11:47 Zibasanze mmwe! Kubanga muzimba amalaalo g'abalanzi bajjajjammwe be batta; 
Luke11:48 ne mujulira era ne mukkiriza ebikolwa bya bajjajjammwe; anti bo baabatta ate mmwe ne mubazimbira amalaalo. 
Luke11:49 Amagezi ga Katonda kyegaava gagamba nti: ‘Ndibatumira abalanzi n'abatume, abamu ku bo balibatta n'okubayigganya,’" 
Luke11:50 ezzadde lino liryoke libuuzibwe omusaayi ogw'abalanzi bonna ogwali guyiiyiddwa okuva ensi lwe yabangibwawo," 
Luke11:51 okuva ku musaayi gwa Abeli okutuuka ku gwa Zakariya eyazikiririra wakati w'omwaliiro n'Ekiggwa. Yee! ka mbabuulire, gulibuuzibwa ezzadde lino." 
Luke11:52 Zibasanze mmwe abayigiriza b'amateeka! Kubanga mwakwata ekisumuluzo ky'okumanya, naye mmwe mwennyini temwayingira, ate ne muziyiza n'abandiyingidde.”" 
Luke11:53 Bwe yavaawo n'agenda, Abafarisaayo n'abayigiriza b'amateeka ne batandika okumukambuwalira n'okumusimaasima ku bintu bingi," 
Luke11:54 nga bamulindiridde okumukwasa mu by'anaaba ayogedde. 
Luke12:1 Mu bbanga eryo ebibiina by'abantu nkumi na nkumi bwe byali bikuŋŋaana, ng'abantu balinnyaganako na bulinnyaganyi, n'atandika okugamba ng'asookera ku bayigirizwa be nti: “Mwekuume ekizimbulukusa ky'Abafarisaayo, anti bwe bukuusa." 
Luke12:2 Kubanga tewali kikisiddwa kitalibikkulibwa; era tewali kikisiddwa kitalimanyibwa. 
Luke12:3 Awo nno bye mwayogeranga mu nzikiza biriwulirwa mu kitangaala; ne kye mwayogeranga mu nkukutu mu kisenge, kirirangirirwa ku ntikko z'ennyumba." 
Luke12:4 Naye mmwe, mikwano gyange, ka mbabuulire, temutyanga abo abatta omubiri obubiri, bwe bamala ekyo nga tebakyaliko kye bayinza kirala." 
Luke12:5 Ka mbategeeze gwe mubanga mutya: mutyenga oyo amala okutta, ate n'asobola n'okusuula mu Geyenna; yee, mbagamba, oyo mumutyanga." 
Luke12:6 Kale enkazaluggya ttaano, tezitundibwa ssente bbiri? Sso ku ezo tewali n'emu yeerabirwa mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Luke12:7 Mulabe eno, enviiri zammwe ez'oku mutwe, zonna mbale. Temutya; muli ba muwendo okusinga enkazaluggya enkumu." 
Luke12:8 “Ka mbabuulire, buli alinjatula mu maaso g'abantu, n'Omwana w'Omuntu alimwatula mu maaso ga bamalayika ba Katonda." 
Luke12:9 Naye alinneegaana mu maaso g'abantu, naye alyegaanibwa mu maaso g'abamalayika ba Katonda." 
Luke12:10 “Buli yenna alyogera ekigambo ku Mwana w'omuntu, kirimusonyiyibwa; naye alivuma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, talisonyiyibwa." 
Luke12:11 Awo nno mmwe bwe babatwalanga mu sinaagooga, oba mu maaso g'abafuzi n'ag'ab'obuyinza, temweraliikiriranga nti munaayanukula mutya oba kiki, oba nti kiki kye munaayogera," 
Luke12:12 Kubanga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu y'alibategeeza mu bbanga eryo kye mugwanye okwogera.” 
Luke12:13 Awo omu mu kibiina n'amugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, ŋŋambira ku muganda wange aŋŋabanyize ku by'obusika.”" 
Luke12:14 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Musajja wattu, ani yanteekawo okubalamula n'okubasalirawo ensonga zammwe?”" 
Luke12:15 Ate n'abagamba nti: “Mwekkaanye, era mwekuumenga omululu gw'ebintu; kubanga obulamu bw'omuntu tebuli mu buyitirivu bw'ebintu by'alina.”" 
Luke12:16 N'alyoka abagerera olugero, n'agamba nti: “Ennimiro y'omusajja omugagga omu yamubaliza ebibala bingi." 
Luke12:17 N'alowooza mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Nkole ntya? Siriiko we nkuŋŋaanyiza bye mbazizza.’ 
Luke12:18 N'agamba nti: ‘Nzija kukola bwe nti: nzija kwabya amawanika gange, nzimbe agasingawo obunene, omwo mwe mba nkuŋŋaanyiza eŋŋano yange n'ebintu byange." 
Luke12:19 Ndyoke ŋŋambe omwoyo gwange nti: Mwoyo gwange, ofunye ebirungi nkumu, ebyakuŋŋaanyizibwa okumala emyaka emingi; wummula, olye, onywe, oyagaayagane.’" 
Luke12:20 Naye Katonda n'amugamba nti: ‘Musiru ggwe! Mu kiro kino omwoyo gwo bajja kugukutwalako; kale bye weekuŋŋaanyiza binaaba by'ani?’ 
Luke12:21 N'eyeekuŋŋaanyiza eby'ensi sso nga mu bya Katonda si mugagga, bw'aba.”" 
Luke12:22 Awo n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Kyenva mbagamba nti: temweraliikiriranga bulamu bwammwe, nti munaalya ki, newandibadde omubiri, nti munaayambala ki?" 
Luke12:23 Kubanga obulamu bwe bukira emmere, n'omubiri gwe gukira ekyokwambala." 
Luke12:24 Mwekkaanye binnamuŋŋoona: tebisiga wadde okukungula, tebirina materekero wadde ebyagi; sso Katonda abiriisa. Nga muli ba muwendo okusinga ebinyonyi!" 
Luke12:25 Ani mu mmwe ne bwe yeeraliikirira atya, ayinza okwongera omukono ogumu ku buwanvu bwe?" 
Luke12:26 Kale nno obanga akatono ng'ako kabalema, ebirala mubyeraliikiririra ki?" 
Luke12:27 Mwekkaanye amalanga nga bwe gakula: tegalanga wuzi wadde okuluka; naye, ka mbabuulire, newandibadde Solomoni mu kitiibwa kye kyonna, teyayambalanga ng'erimu ku go." 
Luke12:28 Kale obanga omuddo ku ttale oguliwo leero jjo ne gusuulibwa mu kabiga, Katonda agwambaza bw'atyo, talibasinzaawo mmwe ab'okukkiriza okutono?" 
Luke12:29 Kale nno mulekenga kunoonya kye munaalya oba kye munaanywa; temweraliikiriranga. 
Luke12:30 Ebyo byonna amawanga gonna ag'ensi bye gettanira. Kitammwe amanyi ng'ebyo byonna mubyetaaga. 
Luke12:31 Kale musookenga kunoonya bwakabaka bwe, n'ebyo byonna biribongerwako." 
Luke12:32 Muleke kutya, mmwe eggana ettono, kubanga Kitammwe yasiima okubawa obwakabaka." 
Luke12:33 “Mutunde bye mulina, mugabire abaavu, mwefunire ensawo ezitakaddiwa, obugagga obutaggwaawo mu ggulu, omubbi gyatasembera n'ennyenje gye zitabwonoonera." 
Luke12:34 Kubanga awabeera obugagga bwammwe, eyo n'omutima gwammwe gye gulibeera." 
Luke12:35 “Mube nga mwesibye emisipi n'ettawaaza zammwe nga zaaka; 
Luke12:36 mufaanane abantu abalindirira mukama waabwe lw'anaava ku mbaga ey'obugole; bw'atuuka n'akonkona ku luggi, bamuggulirewo mangu." 
Luke12:37 Abaweereza abo beesiimye mukama waabwe bw'alijja n'amala abasanga nga batunula. Mazima mbagamba nti agenda kwesiba abatuuze ku lujjuliro, ayiteeyite ng'agenda abaweereza." 
Luke12:38 Ne bw'alituuka mu kisisimuka ekyokubiri oba ekyokusatu, amala abasanga bw'atyo, abaweereza abo baliba ba mukisa." 
Luke12:39 Mumanye na kino, nti singa nnannyinimu yali ategedde akaseera omubbi k'anajjiramu, teyandiremye kwetegeka n'ataganya nnyumba ye kumenyebwa." 
Luke12:40 Nammwe nno mwetegekenga, kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu alijja mu kaseera ke mutalowooza.”" 
Luke12:41 Awo Petero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, olugero olwo olugeredde ffe, nandiki bonna?”" 
Luke12:42 Omukama n'amugamba nti: “Awo nno ye ani oyo omuwanika omwesigwa era omwegendereza, mukama we gw'alissa ku bakozi b'omu nnyumba ye okubagereranga ekipimo ky'eŋŋano akadde nga katuuse?" 
Luke12:43 Omuweereza oyo yeesiimye, mukama we bw'alijja amala amusanga ng'akola bw'atyo!" 
Luke12:44 Mazima mbagamba nti alimussa ku bibye byonna. 
Luke12:45 Naye singa omuweereza oyo agamba mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Mukama wange aludde okutuuka,’ n'asooka okukuba abaweereza n'abazaana, okulya, okunywa n'okutamiira," 
Luke12:46 mukama w'omuweereza oyo alijja ku lunaku lw'atamusuubira ne mu kaseera k'atamanyi; alimubonereza nnyo n'amubalira mu batakkiriza. 
Luke12:47 Kyokka omuweereza oyo eyamanya mukama we ky'ayagala n'atabaako ky'ateekateeka, n'atakola nga bwe yalagira, aliweweenyulwa nnyo." 
Luke12:48 Naye ataamanya, n'amala akola ebimusaanyiza okukubwa, aliweweenyulwa katono. Kubanga buli eyaweebwa ebingi alibuuzibwa bingi; era oyo eyasingirwa ebingi, balimubuuza na bingi okusingawo. Yezu aleese muliro na njawukana" 
Luke12:49 “Najja kuleeta muliro ku nsi, ate njagala ki, wabula gubeere nga gwakoleera na dda!" 
Luke12:50 Ninayo ne batismu gye ŋŋenda okubatizibwamu; nga nkabiriddwa okutuusa ng'etuukiridde! 
Luke12:51 “Mulowooza nti najja kuleeta mirembe mu nsi? Busa! Ka mbabuulire, wabula enjawukana;" 
Luke12:52 Kubanga n'okuva kati, abataano abali mu nnyumba emu balibaamu enjawukana: abasatu balyawukana n'ababiri, n'ababiri balyawukana n'abasatu." 
Luke12:53 Balyawukana: kitaawe w'omwana ne mutabani we, n'omwana ne kitaawe; nnyina w'omwana ne muwala we, n'omuwala ne nnyina; nnyazaala ne mukaamwana we, ne mukaamwana ne nnyazaala we.”" 
Luke12:54 Ate n'agamba ebibiina nti: “Bwe mulaba ekire nga kyambuka okuva ebugwanjuba, amangu ago mugamba nti: ‘Enkuba ejja,’ era bwe kiba." 
Luke12:55 Ate empewo bw'eva emaserengeta, mugamba nti: ‘Bujja kubeera bwa bbugumu,’ era bwe kiba." 
Luke12:56 Bakuusa mmwe! Mumanyi okusoma enfaanana y'ensi n'ey'eggulu, naye lwaki temumanyi kusoma budde buno?" 
Luke12:57 “Lwaki mmwe temweramulira kituufu? 
Luke12:58 Bw'oba oyambuka ew'omwami n'oli gw'owoza naye, gezaako okutabagana naye nga mukyali mu kkubo, aleme kukutwala wa mulamuzi, omulamuzi aleme kukuwa muserikale, omuserikale akusuule mu kkomera." 
Luke12:59 Ka nkubuulire, omwo tolivaamu okutuusa ng'omaze n'okusasula akasente akasembayo.”" 
Luke13:1 Mu kiseera ekyo ne wabaawo abamunyumiza ku Bagalilaaya omusaayi gwabwe Pilato gwe yatabula n'ebitambiro byabwe. 
Luke13:2 N'ayanukula nti: “Mulowooza nti Abagalilaaya abo ekyo okubagwako kityo be baali aboonoonyi okusinga Abagalilaaya abalala bonna? 
Luke13:3 Nze mbagamba nti si bwe kiri; kyokka bwe muteenenya, nammwe bwe mutyo bwe mulizikirira mwenna." 
Luke13:4 Na bali ekkumi n'omunaana omunaala gw'e Silowamu be gwagwira ne gubatta, mulowooza nti be baali basingayo obwonoonyi mu bantu bonna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Nze mbagamba nti si bwe kiri; kyokka bwe muteenenya, nammwe bwe mutyo bwe mulizikirira mwenna.”" 
Luke13:6 Awo n'aleeta olugero luno nti: “Waaliwo omuntu ng'alina omukunyu mu nnimiro ye ey'emizabbibu; yagendanga n'anoonyaako ebibala, nga tasangako." 
Luke13:7 Kwe kugamba omulimi w'ennimiro eyo nti: ‘Laba kati gino emyaka esatu nga nzija ne nnoonya ekibala ku mukunyu guno, naye sisangako kantu. Guteme nno, guliira ki ettaka ery'obwereere!’" 
Luke13:8 Naye oli n'ayanukula n'amugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, guleke, ne mu mwaka guno; ka ngutemeretemere, nteekeko n'obusa." 
Luke13:9 Bwe gunaabala omwaka ogujja, awo kale; bwe gutaabale, oyinza okugutema.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Yali ayigiriza mu sinaagooga emu ku Sabbaato," 
Luke13:11 waaliwo omukazi eyali alina omwoyo ogw'obuyongobevu okumala emyaka kkumi na munaana; yali abenduse omugongo nga tayinza kwesimba n'akatono. 
Luke13:12 Yezu bwe yamulaba, n'amuyita, n'amugamba nti: “Mukazi wattu, osumuluddwa mu buyongobevu bwo.”" 
Luke13:13 N'amussaako omukono, amangu ago ne yeesimba, n'atendereza Katonda." 
Luke13:14 Omukulu wa sinaagooga n'anyiiga olw'okubanga Yezu amuwonyezza ku Sabbaato; n'agamba ekibiina nti: “Ennaku ezigwanidde okukolerwamu emirimo ziri mukaaga; mujjenga mu ezo muwonyezebwe; naye temujjanga ku Sabbaato.” 
Luke13:15 Omukama n'amwanukula, n'agamba nti: “Bakuusa mmwe! Buli omu mu mmwe tayimbula nte ye oba ndogoyi ye ku mmanvu yaayo ku Sabbaato n'agitwala okunywa?" 
Luke13:16 Kale omukazi ono muwala wa Yiburayimu, Sitaani gw'asibidde emyaka ekkumi n'omunaana emiramba, abadde tasaanye kutemwa mu nvuba ezo ku Sabbaato?”" 
Luke13:17 Bwe yayogera ebyo abaali bamuvunaana ne bakwatibwa ensonyi; abantu bonna ne basanyuka olw'ebyettendo bye yali akola. 
Luke13:18 Awo kwe kugamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bufaanana ki? Nnaabugeranya ku ki? 
Luke13:19 Bufaanana ng'empeke ya kaladaali omuntu gye yaddira n'agisiga mu nnimiro ye; yakula n'efuuka omuti, n'ebinyonyi eby'omu bbanga ne bisula mu matabi gaagwo.”" 
Luke13:20 Era n'agamba nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda nnaabugeranya ku ki? 
Luke13:21 Bufaanana ng'ekizimbulukusa, omukazi kye yaddira n'akitabula mu bipimo by'obutta bisatu okutuusa bwonna lwe bwazimbulukuka.”" 
Luke13:22 N'ayongera olugendo lwe mu maaso ng'ayita mu byalo ne mu bibuga ng'ayigiriza, nga bw'alaga e Yeruzaalemu." 
Luke13:23 Ne wajjawo omu n'amubuuza nti: “Mukama, abalirokoka be batono?” Yezu n'abagamba nti:" 
Luke13:24 “Mwefubirire okuyingirira mu muzigo omufunda; kubanga, ka mbabuulire, bangi baligeza okuyingira ne batasobola." 
Luke13:25 Olwo nnannyinimu bw'alisituka n'aggala oluggi, mmwe mulitandika okuyimirira ebweru n'okukonkona ku luggi, nga mugamba nti: ‘Mukama, tuggulirewo.’ Alibaddamu nti: ‘Simanyi gye muva!’" 
Luke13:26 Olwo mulitandika okugamba nti: ‘Twaliiranga ne tunywera mu maaso go, era wayigirizanga mu mbuga zaffe.’" 
Luke13:27 Ye alibagamba nti: ‘Mbagamba, simanyi gye muva! Munnyamuke mwenna abakozi b'obubi.’" 
Luke13:28 Eyo walibaayo okukaaba n'okuluma obujiji bwe muliraba Yiburayimu ne Yizaake ne Yakobo n'abalanzi bonna mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda, ate nga mmwe mugobeddwa ebweru." 
Luke13:29 Abantu baliva ebuvanjuba n'ebugwanjuba, baliva emambuka n'emaserengeta, ne batuula ku mbaga mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Luke13:30 Kale mulabe: waliwo ab'oluvannyuma abaliba ab'olubereberye, ate n'ab'olubereberye abaliba ab'oluvannyuma.”" 
Luke13:31 Mu ssaawa eyo yennyini Abafarisaayo abamu bajja gy'ali ne bamugamba nti: “Dduka ove wano, kubanga Erode ayagala kukutta.”" 
Luke13:32 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mugende mugambe ekibe ekyo nti: ‘Nzuuno olwa leero n'enkya ngoba emyoyo emibi ne mponya n'endwadde; olw'essatu ne mmaliriza omulimu gwange. 
Luke13:33 Kyokka olwa leero n'enkya n'oluddirira sirema kutambula, kubanga omulanzi tayinza kufiira bweru wa Yeruzaalemu.’" 
Luke13:34 “Yeruzaalemu, Yeruzaalemu, ggwe atta abalanzi n'abakutumirwa n'obakuba amayinja! Emirundi emeka gye nayagala okukuŋŋaanya abaana bo ng'enkoko bw'ekumiriza obwana bwayo wansi w'ebiwaawaatiro byayo, n'otaganya!" 
Luke13:35 Laba, ennyumba yammwe ebalekeddwa ttayo. Ka mbabuulire, temulindaba okutuusa lwe muligamba nti: ‘Atenderezebwe oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ku Sabbaato emu yayingira mu nnyumba y'omukulu w'Abafarisaayo omu okulya emmere; bo ne bamwekaliriza. 
Luke14:2 Mu maaso ge awo waaliwo alwadde entumbi. 
Luke14:3 Awo Yezu n'ayogera n'abayigiriza b'amateeka n'Abafarisaayo, n'agamba nti: “Kisaanye okuwonya ku Sabbaato, nandiki?”" 
Luke14:4 Bo ne basirika busirisi. Ye n'amukwata, n'amuwonya, n'amusiibula." 
Luke14:5 Awo n'abagamba nti: “Ani mu mmwe alina endogoyi oba ente, n'egwa mu luzzi, atagiggyamu mangu ago newandibadde ku Sabbaato?”" 
Luke14:6 Ne batabaako kye bayinza kumwanukula. 
Luke14:7 Abayitiddwa ku mbaga, bwe yalaba nga bagobereza ebifo eby'ekitiibwa, n'abagerera olugero, n'abagamba nti:" 
Luke14:8 “Bw'obanga oliko akuyise ku mbaga y'obugole, totuulanga mu kifo kisinga kitiibwa, sikulwa nga waliwo omulala gw'ayise akusinga ekitiibwa," 
Luke14:9 oli eyabayise mwembi n'ajja akugamba nti: ‘Segulira ono mu kifo,’ olwo n'odda mu kifo eky'ennyuma ng'osonyiwadde." 
Luke14:10 Bw'oyitibwanga, ogendanga n'otuula mu kifo eky'emabega, oli eyakuyita ng'azze alyoke akugambe nti: ‘Munnange, weyongereyo waggulu,’ olwo n'ofuna ekitiibwa mu maaso ga bonna abatudde naawe." 
Luke14:11 Kubanga buli eyeekuza alitoowazibwa, na buli eyeetoowaza, aligulumizibwa.”" 
Luke14:12 Awo n'agamba oli eyali amuyise nti: “Bw'ofumbanga ekyemisana oba ekyeggulo, toyitanga mikwano gyo, oba baganda bo, oba abeŋŋanda zo, yadde baliraanwa bo abagagga, oboolyawo nabo ne bakuyita ne bakuddiza bwe batyo." 
Luke14:13 Wabula ggwe bw'ofumbanga embaga, oyitanga baavu, balema, bakateeyamba, bamuzibe," 
Luke14:14 lw'olibeera n'omukisa, kubanga bano tebayinza kukuddiza. Oliddizibwa ku kuzuukira kw'abatuukirivu.”" 
Luke14:15 Awo omu ku baali batudde okulya, bwe yawulira ebyo, n'amugamba nti: “Yeesiimye alirya emmere mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke14:16 Naye ye n'amugamba nti: “Omuntu omu yafumba embaga nnene, n'ayita bangi." 
Luke14:17 Obudde obw'embaga bwe bwatuuka, n'atuma omuweereza we agambe abayitiddwa nti: ‘Mujje, byonna biwedde okuteekateeka.’" 
Luke14:18 Buli omu okufaanana munne ne basooka okuwampanya; eyasooka n'amugamba nti: ‘Naguze ennimiro; nnina okugenda okugirambula; nkwegayiridde, mala gansonyiwa.’" 
Luke14:19 Omulala n'agamba nti: ‘Naguze emigongo gy'ente ezirima etaano, ŋŋenda kugigeza; nkwegayiridde, mala gansonyiwa.’" 
Luke14:20 Omundi n'agamba nti: ‘Nawasizza omukazi; olw'ekyo siyinza kujja.’ 
Luke14:21 Omuweereza n'ajja, ebyo n'abibuulira mukama we. Ssemaka mu busungu n'agamba omuweereza we nti: ‘Genda mangu mu nguudo ne mu nkuubo z'ekibuga, oyingize wano abaavu, abalema, bamuzibe ne bakateeyamba.’" 
Luke14:22 Omuweereza n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, nkoze nga bwe walagidde, naye era ekifo kikyaliwo.’" 
Luke14:23 Mukama we n'agamba omuweereza we nti: ‘Genda ku makubo ne ku bukubo obawalirize okuyingira, ennyumba yange ejjule." 
Luke14:24 Kyokka ka mbabuulire; ku basajja abo ababadde bayitiddwa, mpaawo anaakomba ku mbaga yange.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Ebibiina binene byali bitambula wamu naye, n'akyukira gye biri, n'abigamba nti:" 
Luke14:26 “Oli bw'ajja gye ndi n'amala takyawa kitaawe na nnyina, na mukazi we, na baana be, na baganda be, na bannyina, newandibadde obulamu bwe bwennyini, tayinza kubeera muyigirizwa wange." 
Luke14:27 N'oli ateetikka musaalaba gwe n'angoberera, tayinza kubeera muyigirizwa wange." 
Luke14:28 “Ani mu mmwe ng'ayagala okuzimba omunaala, atasooka kutuula n'abalirira muwendo oguligendako alabe oba alina eby'okugumaliriza?" 
Luke14:29 Sikulwa ng'amala okuyiwa omusingi, n'alemwa okumaliriza; bonna abagulaba ne bamusekerera, nga bagamba nti:" 
Luke14:30 ‘Omuntu nno yatandika okuzimba, n'atayinza kumaliriza.’" 
Luke14:31 Oba kale, kabaka ki ayagala okutabaala kabaka omulala, atasooka kutuula ne yeebuuza oba ayinza okutalira oli amujjira n'abantu obukumi obubiri, sso ye ng'alina kakumi kamu." 
Luke14:32 Obanga taasobole, oli ng'akyali wala ddala n'amutumira ababaka bateesaganye emirembe." 
Luke14:33 Bwe kityo nno buli muntu mu mmwe ataleka byonna by'alina, tayinza kubeera muyigirizwa wange." 
Luke14:34 “Omunnyo mulungi; naye omunnyo bwe gusaabulukuka, gunaalungwa naki?" 
Luke14:35 Guba tegukyagasa ttaka wadde olubungo, bagusuula eri. Alina amatu agawulira, awulire.”" 
Luke15:1 Abasolooza b'omusolo n'aboonoonyi baali bamusemberera okumuwulira," 
Luke15:2 Abafarisaayo n'abawandiisi ne beemulugunya, ne bagamba nti: “Ono ayaniriza aboonoonyi n'okulya n'alya nabo.”" 
Luke15:3 Ye kwe kubagerera okugero luno, n'agamba nti:" 
Luke15:4 “Ani mu mmwe abeera n'endiga ekikumi, emu ku zo emala emubulako, ataleka ekyenda mu omwenda mu ddungu n'agoberera eri ebuze, okutuusa lw'agiraba?" 
Luke15:5 Ng'agizudde, agissa ku kibegabega nga musanyufu." 
Luke15:6 Bw'atuuka eka, n'ayita mikwano gye n'ab'omuliraano, n'abagamba nti: ‘Munsanyukireko, kubanga endiga yange eyali ebuze ngizudde.’" 
Luke15:7 Ka mbabuulire, essanyu bwe liriba lityo mu ggulu olw'omwonoonyi omu eyeenenya okusinga abatuukirivu ekyenda mu omwenda abateetaaga kwenenya." 
Luke15:8 “Oba kale mukazi ki abeera ne durakima ze ekkumi, bw'amala abulwako emu, atakoleeza ttawaaza, n'ayera ennyumba ye, n'anoonya n'obwegendereza okutuusa lw'agiraba?" 
Luke15:9 Bw'agiraba, n'ayita banne n'ab'omuliraano, n'abagamba nti: ‘Munsanyukireko, kubanga durakima yange eyali ebuze ngizudde.’" 
Luke15:10 Ka mbabuulire, essanyu bwe liriba lityo mu bamalayika ba Katonda okubeera omwonoonyi omu eyeenenya.”" 
Luke15:11 Ate n'abagamba nti: “Waaliwo omusajja ng'alina batabani be babiri; 
Luke15:12 asingako obuto ku bombi n'agamba kitaawe nti: ‘Kitange, ekitundu ky'obusika ekyandibadde omugabo gwange kimpe.’ Naye ebintu n'abibagabanyizaamu." 
Luke15:13 Ennaku sizaayita nnyingi, mutabani we asinga obuto n'akuŋŋaanya byonna, n'asengukira mu nsi ey'ewala; ng'ali eyo byonna bye yalina n'abiyiwaayiwa mu bulamu obw'okusaasaanya." 
Luke15:14 Bwe yamala okuggwesa byonna, enjala n'egwa nnyingi mu nsi eyo; n'asooka okujeera." 
Luke15:15 N'agenda yeerimbika ku munnansi omu mu nsi eyo; ye n'amusindika mu nnimiro ye alunde embizzi. 
Luke15:16 Ne yeegombanga okusembekera olubuto lwe ebikuta embizzi bye zaali zirya, nabyo nga tewali abimuwa." 
Luke15:17 Ne yeddamu muli, n'agamba nti: ‘Mu nnyumba ya kitange abakozi bali bameka abalya emmere n'okulemwa ne balemwa? Wuuno ndi wano nfa enjala!" 
Luke15:18 Ka nsituke ŋŋende eri kitange; nzija kumugamba nti: Ssebo, nayonoona eri eggulu ne mu maaso go;" 
Luke15:19 sikyasaana na kuyitibwa mwana wo; mala ganfuula ng'omu ku bakozi bo.’ 
Luke15:20 “N'ayimuka n'alaga eri kitaawe. Naye bwe yali akyali walako, kitaawe n'amulengera, n'akwatibwa ekisa, n'addukanako, n'amugwa mu kifuba, n'amunywegera." 
Luke15:21 Mutabani we n'amugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, nayonoona eri eggulu ne mu maaso go; sikyasaana na kuyitibwa mwana wo.’" 
Luke15:22 Naye kitaawe n'agamba abaweereza be nti: ‘Muleete omunagiro ogusinga obulungi mumwambaze, mumunaanike n'empeta ku ngalo, n'engatto mu bigere;" 
Luke15:23 muleete n'ennyana ensava, mugitte; mugire tulye, tusanyuke," 
Luke15:24 kubanga omwana wange ono yali afudde, azzeemu obulamu; yali azaaye, azaawuse.’ Ne batandika ekinyumu." 
Luke15:25 Naye mutabani we omukulu yali mu nnimiro; bwe yali akomawo ng'ali kumpi n'ennyumba, n'awulira okuyimba, n'okuzina." 
Luke15:26 N'ayita omu ku baweereza, n'abuuza ogubadde." 
Luke15:27 Ye n'amugamba nti: ‘Muganda wo akomyewo; kitaawo kwe kutta ennyana ensava; kubanga amufunye ng'akyali mulamu.’ 
Luke15:28 Naye ye n'asunguwala, n'agaana okuyingira. Awo kitaawe n'afuluma, n'amwegayirira;" 
Luke15:29 naye ye n'ayanukula kitaawe nti: ‘Laba, emyaka gino gyonna nkuweerezza, sikutenguwangako mu by'ondagira; sso tompanga yadde akabuzi nsanyuke ne bannange!" 
Luke15:30 Naye mutabani wo ono eyalya ebibyo ne bamalaaya bw'akomyewo, ggwe n'omuttira ennyana ensava!’" 
Luke15:31 Ye n'amugamba nti: ‘Mwana wange, bulijjo ggwe oli wamu nange; byonna ebyange bibyo." 
Luke15:32 Naye kibadde kisaana okusanyuka n'okujaguza, kubanga muganda wo oyo, yali afudde, kati mulamu; yali azaaye, azaawuse.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Era n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Waaliwo omuntu omugagga ng'alina omuwanika we; ne bamumuloopera nti yali ayiwaayiwa ebibye. 
Luke16:2 N'amuyita, n'amugamba nti: ‘Kye mpulidde ku ggwe kiri kitya? Kale woza obuwanika bwo, kubanga tokyayinza kubeera muwanika.’" 
Luke16:3 Awo omuwanika ne yeebuuza munda muli nti: ‘Nnaakola ntya, anti mukama wange obuwanika buubuno abunzigyako? Okulima sikusobola, n'okusabiriza kunkwasa ensonyi." 
Luke16:4 Ntegedde kye nzija okukola, abantu balyoke bansuze mu mayumba gaabwe bwe nnaaba ngobeddwa mu buwanika.’" 
Luke16:5 Awo n'ayita buli alina ebbanja lya mukama we kinnoomu. N'agamba eyasooka nti: ‘Mukama wange akubanja ki?’ 
Luke16:6 Ye n'agamba nti: ‘Amatogero g'omuzigo kikumi.’ N'amugamba nti: ‘Kwako ekiwandiiko kyo, tuula mangu owandiike amakumi ataano.’" 
Luke16:7 Ate n'agamba omulala nti: ‘Ate nga ggwe, obanjibwa ki?’ Ye n'agamba nti: ‘Ensawo z'eŋŋano kikumi.’ N'amugamba nti: ‘Kwako ekiwandiiko, owandiike kinaana.’" 
Luke16:8 Omwami n'atenda omuwanika omulyazaamaanyi olw'obukujjukujju bwe. Kubanga abaana b'ensi mu luse lwabwe babeera bakalabakalaba okusinga abaana b'ekitangaala. 
Luke16:9 “Nange mbagamba nti: Mwegunjire emikwano nga mukozesa obugagga obubi, bwe bulimala okubaggwaako, balyoke babaanirize mu bisulo eby'olubeerera." 
Luke16:10 N'abeera omwesigwa mu bitono aba mwesigwa ne mu bingi; n'aba omulyazaamaanyi mu bitono aba mulyazaamaanyi ne mu bingi. 
Luke16:11 Kale oba temwali beesigwa mu bugagga obubi, obugagga ddala ani alibubakwasa?" 
Luke16:12 Obanga temwali beesigwa ku bya beene, ebyammwe ddala ani alibibakwasa?" 
Luke16:13 Mpaawo muweereza asobola kuweereza baami babiri; kubanga oba alikyawako omu, n'ayagala omulala, oba alyesiba ku omu, omulala n'amunyooma. Temuyinza kuweereza Katonda na byabugagga.”" 
Luke16:14 Abafarisaayo, abaali abaagazi b'essente, ebyo byonna baabiwulira, naye ne bamusekerera." 
Luke16:15 N'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mwesaanyiriza mu maaso g'abantu; kyokka Katonda emitima gyammwe agimanyi; anti abantu kye batenda, mu maaso ga Katonda kyenyinyalwa.”" 
Luke16:16 “Amateeka n'abalanzi byaliwo okutuuka ku Yowanna; okuva olwo amawulire amalungi ag'obwakabaka bwa Katonda gabuulirwa; buli muntu abuyingiramu na lyanyi. 
Luke16:17 “Kyokka eggulu n'ensi kyangu okuggwaawo okusinga akatonnyeze akamu kati okuva mu Tteeka. 
Luke16:18 “Buli agoba mukazi we n'awasa omulala, aba ayenze; n'oyo awasa omukazi agobeddwa ku bba, aba ayenze." 
Luke16:19 “Waaliwo omugagga, eyayambalanga eminagiro egya kakobe n'engoye ezinekaaneka, era buli lunaku ng'aliira mu kinyumu." 
Luke16:20 Ate omusajja omu omunkuseere, erinnya lye Lazaro, yassibwanga awo ku wankaaki we, ng'ajjudde amabwa;" 
Luke16:21 yeegombanga okukkuta n'obukunkumuka obwagwanga okuva ku mmeeza y'omugagga; ate n'embwa zajjanga ne zimukomberera amabwa. 
Luke16:22 “Olwatuuka, omunkuseere oyo n'afa, bamalayika ne bamutwala ku mubiri gwa Yiburayimu. Omugagga naye n'afa, n'aziikibwa." 
Luke16:23 Bwe yali mu magombe mu bibonoobono, n'ayimusa amaaso ge, n'alengera Yiburayimu ewalako, nga Lazaro amutudde ku mubiri," 
Luke16:24 n'akoowoola nti: ‘Kitange Yiburayimu, nsaasira otume Lazaro annyike mu mazzi akasammambiro k'engalo ye avubirize olulimi lwange, kubanga nnumwa mu muliro guno.’" 
Luke16:25 Yiburayimu n'amugamba nti: ‘Mwana wange, jjukira nga wafuna ebirungi byo mu bulamu bwo, ye Lazaro bibi byereere; kati ye akubagizibwa, ate ggwe oli mu kulumwa." 
Luke16:26 Ye ate naddala, wakati waffe nammwe waateekebwawo olukonko olunene, abandyagadde okuva eno okujja gye muli balemwe, n'ewaandibadde ab'eyo okujja gye tuli.’" 
Luke16:27 Ye n'agamba nti: ‘Kale nno, kitange, nkwegayiridde, mutume mu nnyumba ya ssebo;" 
Luke16:28 Kubanga nnina baganda bange bataano; abalabule baleme kujja mu kifo kino eky'ebibonoobono.’ 
Luke16:29 Yiburayimu n'amugamba nti: ‘Balina Musa n'abalanzi; babawulirenga.’ 
Luke16:30 Ye n'agamba nti: ‘Nedda, kitange Yiburayimu; wabula omu bw'anaabatuukako okuva mu bafu, bajja kwenenya.’" 
Luke16:31 N'amuddamu nti: ‘Bwe batawulira Musa na balanzi, oli ne bw'anaazuukira okuva mu bafu, tebagenda kukkiriza.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Ate n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Ebyesittazo tebirirema kujja; naye alibireeta zimusanze! 
Luke17:2 Ekyandisinze obulungi ku ye, lwe lubengo okussibwa mu bulago bwe n'asuulibwa mu nnyanja, aleme kuleetera kyesittazo omu ku bato bano." 
Luke17:3 “Mwegendereze; muganda wo bw'asobyanga mukomeko; ate bw'amala n'abonerera, musonyiwenga." 
Luke17:4 Ate bw'asobyanga gy'oli emirundi musanvu mu lunaku lumu, emirundi omusanvu egyo n'ajja gy'oli ng'agamba nti: ‘Mmoneredde,’ omusonyiwanga.”" 
Luke17:5 Awo abatume ne bagamba Omukama nti: “Yongera ku kukkiriza kwaffe.” 
Luke17:6 Omukama n'agamba nti: “Singa mwalina okukkiriza okwenkana ng'empeke ya kaladaali, mwandigambye omuti gw'omukunyu guno nti: ‘Weesindule, weesimbe mu nnyanja,’ ne gubawulira.”" 
Luke17:7 “Ani mu mmwe, bw'abeera n'omuweereza alima oba alunda, amugamba nga yaakava mu nnimiro nti: ‘Yingira mangu, otuule, olye?’" 
Luke17:8 n'atamugamba nti: ‘Ntegekera ekyeggulo, weesibe ompeereze, mmale okulya n'okunywa, awo naawe olyoke olye n'okunywa?’" 
Luke17:9 Omuweereza oyo amwebaza olw'okukola ky'amulagidde? 
Luke17:10 Nammwe nno bwe mutyo; bwe mumalanga okukola byonna ebibalagiddwa, mugambanga nti: ‘Tuli baweereza ntagasa; bye tubadde tulagirwa okukola bye tukoze.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Awo bwe yali agenda e Yeruzaalemu, n'ayita mu nsi ekoota Samariya ne Galilaaya." 
Luke17:12 Bwe yali ayingira mu kyalo ekimu, abagenge kkumi ne bamusisinkana, ne bayimirira walako," 
Luke17:13 ne bayogerera waggulu nga bagamba nti: “Yezu, Muyigiriza, tusaasire.”" 
Luke17:14 Bwe yabalaba, n'agamba nti: “Mugende mweyoleke bakabona.” Bwe baali bagenda, ne balongoosebwa." 
Luke17:15 Awo omu ku bo bwe yalaba ng'awonye, n'afunyamu ng'atendereza Katonda n'eddoboozi ddene," 
Luke17:16 n'agwa ku maaso ge ku bigere bya Yezu nga yeebaza, sso nga yali Musamariya." 
Luke17:17 Yezu kwe kugamba nti: “Abalongooseddwa tebabadde kkumi? Kale omwenda bali luuyi wa? 
Luke17:18 Tewabadde akomawo kuwa Katonda kitiibwa, wabula munnaggwanga ono?”" 
Luke17:19 Kwe kumugamba nti: “Yimuka ogende, kubanga okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.”" 
Luke17:20 Awo Abafarisaayo ne bamubuuza obwakabaka bwa Katonda we bulituukira; n'abaddamu nti: “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebujja mu ngeri erabika; 
Luke17:21 wadde tebaligamba nti: ‘Buubuno wano,’ oba nti: ‘Buubuli wali,’ kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda buli mu mmwe munda.”" 
Luke17:22 Era n'agamba abayigirizwa nti: “Ennaku zijja ze mulyegomberamu okulaba olunaku olumu olw'Omwana w'Omuntu, ne mutalulaba." 
Luke17:23 Era balibagamba nti: ‘Laba, wuuli,’ oba nti: ‘Laba, wuuno;’ temugezanga kugendayo, temubagobereranga." 
Luke17:24 Kubanga ng'ekimyanso bwe kimyansa ne kimulisa olubaale okuva ku luuyi olumu okutuusa ku lulala, bw'atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu ku lunaku lwe bw'alibeera." 
Luke17:25 Kyokka ateekwa okusooka okubonyaabonyezebwa mu bingi, n'okugaanibwa ezzadde lino." 
Luke17:26 Nga bwe gwali mu budde bwa Nowa, era bwe guliba ne mu budde bw'Omwana w'Omuntu." 
Luke17:27 Baali balya nga banywa, nga bawasa, nga bafumbizibwa, okutuusa olunaku Nowa lwe yayingira mu kyombo; omujjuzi ne gujja ne gubazikiriza bonna." 
Luke17:28 Era nga bwe gwali mu budde bwa Loti: baali balya nga banywa, nga bagula nga batunda, nga basimba nga bazimba," 
Luke17:29 naye Loti lwe yava mu Sodoma, ne watonnya omuliro n'ebibiriiti nga biva mu ggulu, bonna ne bibazikiriza." 
Luke17:30 Bwe gutyo bwe guliba ku lunaku Omwana w'Omuntu lw'alyorekerwako. 
Luke17:31 “Mu kaseera ako, aliba ku kasolya waggulu, ebintu bye nga biri mu nnyumba, takkanga kubitwala; era n'abeeranga mu nnimiro naye bw'atyo; taddanga mabega." 
Luke17:32 Mujjukire muka Loti. 
Luke17:33 Buli awatanya okuwonya obulamu bwe alibubuza; naye buli abuza obulamu bwe, alibuwa okulama." 
Luke17:34 Ka mbabuulire, mu kiro kiri abasajja babiri balibeera mu kitanda kimu, omu alitwalibwa omulala n'alekebwa." 
Luke17:35 Abakazi ababiri baliba basa wamu ku lubengo, omu alitwalibwa, omulala n'alekebwa.”" 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Awo bo kwe kumubuuza nti: “Ludda wa, Mukama?” Ye n'abagamba nti: “Omulambo we gubeera n'ensega we zikuŋŋaanira.”" 
Luke18:1 Awo n'abagerera olugero nga bwe bateekwa okwegayirira buli kakedde n'obutakoowa. 
Luke18:2 N'abagamba nti: “Mu kibuga ekimu mwalimu omulamuzi nga tatya Katonda, era n'abantu nga tabafaako." 
Luke18:3 Mu kibuga ekyo era mwalimu ne nnamwandu eyajjanga gy'ali olutata ng'agamba nti: ‘Ntaasa omulabe wange.’ 
Luke18:4 Ye n'alwawo ng'akyagaanyi; kyaddaaki n'agamba mu mutima munda nti: ‘Newandibadde Katonda simutya, n'abantu sibafaako," 
Luke18:5 naye kubanga omukazi ono antawaanya, nzija kumutaasa, aleme kunkooya ng'ajjirira olutata.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Awo Omukama n'agamba nti: “Muwulire omulamuzi omubi oyo ky'agamba. 
Luke18:7 Kale nno Katonda talitaasa ababe be yeerondeddemu abakoowoola gy'ali emisana n'ekiro? Alibalwisa? 
Luke18:8 Ka mbabuulire, agenda kubataasa mangu. Naye Omwana w'Omuntu bw'alijja, alisanga okukkiriza ku nsi?”" 
Luke18:9 Era yagerera abantu abamu olugero abaali beemanyi obutuukirivu nga banyooma abalala, n'agamba nti:" 
Luke18:10 “Abantu babiri baayambuka mu Kiggwa okwegayirira, omu nga Mufarisaayo omulala nga musolooza wa musolo." 
Luke18:11 Omufarisaayo n'ayimirira n'asoma munda ye nti: ‘Ayi Katonda, nkwebaza, kubanga siri ng'abantu abalala, abalyazaamaanyi, ababi, abenzi; era siri ng'omusolooza w'omusolo oyo." 
Luke18:12 Buli wiiki nsiiba emirundi ebiri; buli kye nfuna kyonna ntonako ekyekkumi.’ 
Luke18:13 Omusolooza w'omusolo ye n'ayimirira wala, nga tageza na kuyimusa maaso eri ggulu, ne yeekuba ekifuba ng'agamba nti: ‘Ayi Katonda, nsaasira nze omwonoonyi.’" 
Luke18:14 Ka mbabuulire, oyo yaddayo ewuwe ng'atukudde, naye oli nedda. Kubanga buli eyeekuza alitoowazibwa; naye eyeetoowaza, aligulumizibwa.”" 
Luke18:15 Baali bamuleetera abaana abawere abakwateko; naye abayigirizwa bwe baalaba ekyo, ne babakomako." 
Luke18:16 Naye Yezu n'abayita w'ali, n'abagamba nti: “Muleke abaana abato bajje gye ndi; temubaziyiza; kubanga abafaanana nga bano be bannannyini bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Luke18:17 Mazima mbagamba nti yenna atayaniriza bwakabaka bwa Katonda nga mwana muto, talibuyingiramu n'akamu.”" 
Luke18:18 Awo omwami omu n'amubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza omulungi, nnaakola ki okusikira obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Luke18:19 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ompitidde ki omulungi? Teri mulungi okuggyako Katonda yekka. 
Luke18:20 Ebiragiro obimanyi: ‘Toyendanga; Tottanga; Tobbanga; Tojuliranga bya bulimba; Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa.’ ” 
Luke18:21 Ye n'agamba nti: “Ebyo byonna nabikwata okuva obuto bwange.” 
Luke18:22 Yezu bwe yawulira ekyo, n'amugamba nti: “Okyabulwako kimu: Tunda by'olina owe abaavu, obugagga olibeera nabwo mu ggulu, ojje ongoberere.”" 
Luke18:23 Bwe yawulira ebyo, n'anakuwala, kubanga yali mugagga nnyo." 
Luke18:24 Yezu n'amutunuulira, n'agamba nti: “Nga kizibu abalina obugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!" 
Luke18:25 Kiba kyangu eŋŋamiya okuyita mu nnyindo y'empiso okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Luke18:26 Awo abaali bawulira ne bagamba nti: “Awo nno ani asobola okulokoka?” 
Luke18:27 Naye ye n'abagamba nti: “Ekitasoboka ku bantu, ku Katonda kisoboka.”" 
Luke18:28 Awo Petero n'agamba nti: “Kale ffe twaleka ebyaffe ne tukugoberera.” 
Luke18:29 Ye n'abagamba nti: “Mazima mbagamba nti mpaawo yaleka nnyumba ye, oba mukazi we, oba baganda be, oba baana be okubeera obwakabaka bwa Katonda," 
Luke18:30 atalifuna n'asinzaawo emirundi mingi mu nsi muno, ssaako n'obulamu obutaggwaawo mu mirembe egirijja.”" 
Luke18:31 Awo Yezu n'azza ebbali Ekkumi n'Ababiri n'abagamba nti: “Tuutuno twambuka e Yeruzaalemu, byonna abalanzi bye baawandiika ku Mwana w'omuntu bijja kutuukirira." 
Luke18:32 Kubanga balimuwaayo mu b'amawanga n'aduulirwa, n'aweebuulwa, n'affujjirwa amalusu;" 
Luke18:33 balimuswanyuula ne bamutta; ate ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.” 
Luke18:34 Naye bo ne batabaako kye bategeera mu ebyo; ekigambo ekyo kyali kibakwekeddwa; ebyayogerwa tebaabitegeera. 
Luke18:35 Bwe yali asemberera Yeriko, waaliwo muzibe eyali atudde ku kkubo ng'asabiriza." 
Luke18:36 Bwe yawulira ekibiina nga kiyitawo, n'abuuza ogubadde." 
Luke18:37 Ne bamugamba nti: “Yezu ow'e Nazareti y'ayita.” 
Luke18:38 Awo n'akoowoola ng'agamba nti: “Yezu, Omwana wa Dawudi, nsaasira!”" 
Luke18:39 Abaali bakulembedde ne bamukomako, ne bamugamba asirike; naye ye n'aleekaana nnyo n'okusingawo nti: “Omwana wa Dawudi, nsaasira.”" 
Luke18:40 Yezu n'ayimirira, n'alagira okumuleeta w'ali." 
Luke18:41 Bwe yasembera n'amubuuza nti: “Oyagala nkukolere ki?” N'agamba nti: “Mukama, ndabe.”" 
Luke18:42 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ddamu okulaba; okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” 
Luke18:43 Amangu ago n'addamu okulaba n'amugoberera ng'atendereza Katonda. N'abantu bonna bwe baalaba, ne batendereza Katonda." 
Luke19:1 Awo Yezu n'ayingira mu Yeriko, n'akiyitamu." 
Luke19:2 Kati nno waaliwo omusajja, erinnya lye Zakkayo, omukulu w'abasolooza b'omusolo, yali mugagga," 
Luke19:3 n'ayagala okulaba Yezu ye ani; naye n'atasobola olw'okubeera ekibiina, kubanga yali mumpi." 
Luke19:4 N'adduka, n'amwesooka mu maaso, n'alinnya mu muti gw'omukunyu asobole okumulaba; kubanga yali wa kukwata eryo." 
Luke19:5 Yezu bwe yatuukawo, n'atunula waggulu, n'amugamba nti: “Zakkayo, kka mangu, kubanga olwa leero ndi wa kusigala mu nnyumba yo." 
Luke19:6 N'akka mangu, n'amwaniriza n'essanyu.”" 
Luke19:7 Bwe baalaba, bonna ne beemulugunya nga bagamba nti: “Akyadde ew'omwonoonyi.”" 
Luke19:8 Awo Zakkayo n'ayimirira, n'agamba Omukama nti: “Laba, Mukama, ekyokubiri eky'ebintu byange nkigabira abaavu; ate obanga waliwo gwe nalyazaamaanya ekintu, mmuddizaawo emirundi ena.”" 
Luke19:9 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Olwa leero obulokofu butuukiridde ennyumba eno, anti n'ono naye mwana wa Yiburayimu." 
Luke19:10 Kubanga Omwana w'Omuntu yajja okunoonya n'okulokola ekyali kibuze.” 
Luke19:11 Baali bakyawuliriza ebyo, Yezu n'abagerera olugero, kubanga yali ayambuka e Yeruzaalemu, na bonna nga balowooza nti obwakabaka bwa Katonda bwali buli kumpi okulabika." 
Luke19:12 Awo kwe kubagamba nti: “Omusajja omu omukungu yagenda mu nsi ey'ewala alye obwakabaka ate akomewo. 
Luke19:13 N'ayita abaweereza be, n'abawa mina kkumi, n'abagamba nti: ‘Muzisuubuze okutuusa lwe ndidda.’" 
Luke19:14 Kyokka abantu be, bannansi, baali bamukyaye; ne bamugobereza ababaka nga bagamba nti: ‘Oyo tetwagala atufuge.’" 
Luke19:15 “Bwe yadda ng'amaze okufuna obwakabaka, n'alagira okumuyitira abaweereza be yawa ensimbi ze, ategeere amagoba ge baggya mu kuzisuubuza." 
Luke19:16 Omubereberye n'ajja, n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo mina yo yavaamu mina kkumi.’" 
Luke19:17 N'amugamba nti: ‘Weebale, omuweereza omulungi; kubanga wabeera mwesigwa mu bitono, onoofuga ebibuga kkumi.’" 
Luke19:18 N'owookubiri n'ajja, n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, mina yo yazaala mina ttaano.’" 
Luke19:19 N'oyo n'amugamba nti: ‘Naawe onoofuga ebibuga bitaano.’ 
Luke19:20 N'omulala n'ajja n'agamba nti: ‘Ssebo, mina yo gye wampa yiiyo; nagitereka eyo mu kiwero," 
Luke19:21 Kubanga nakutya, kubanga oli muntu wa lukaali; oyanula ky'otaayanika, okungula ky'otaasiga.’" 
Luke19:22 N'amugamba nti: ‘Muweereza ggwe omubi, by'ogambye kwe nnaayima okukusalira omusango. Wali omanyi bwe ndi ow'olukaali, nga nnyanula kye saayanika, nga nkungula kye saasiga;" 
Luke19:23 Lwaki tewassa nsimbi zange mu bawaanyisa baazo? Bwe nandikomyewo, nandizikuŋŋaanyizza wamu n'amagoba gaakwo.’" 
Luke19:24 N'agamba abaali awo nti: ‘Mina mugimuggyeeko, mugiwe oli alina mina ekkumi.’" 
Luke19:25 Ne bamugamba nti: ‘Ssebo, alina ekkumi!’" 
Luke19:26 Ka mbabuulire, buli alina aliweebwa; naye atalina, ne ky'alina kirimuggyibwako." 
Luke19:27 Bo nno bano abalabe bange, abaali batayagala mbafuge, mubaleete wano, mubatte nga ndaba.”" 
Luke19:28 Bwe yasirissa ebyo, n'abakulemberamu ng'ayambuka e Yeruzaalemu." 
Luke19:29 Bwe baasemberera Betifage ne Betaniya, kumpi n'olusozi oluyitibwa olw'Oliva, n'atuma babiri ku bayigirizwa be," 
Luke19:30 n'agamba nti: “Mugende mu kyalo ekibali mu maaso; nga mwakayingira, mujja kusanga akalogoyi akasibiddwa, akateebagalwangako muntu n'omu; mukayimbule, mukaleete." 
Luke19:31 Bwe wabaawo ababuuza nti: ‘Mukayimbulira ki?’ muddamu nti: ‘Omukama akeetaaga.’ ” 
Luke19:32 Abaatumibwa ne bagenda, ne basanga ng'ebintu biri nga bwe yali abagambye." 
Luke19:33 Bwe baali basumulula akalogoyi, bannyiniko ne babagamba nti: “Lwaki musumulula akalogoyi?”" 
Luke19:34 Bo ne bagamba nti: “Omukama akeetaaga.” 
Luke19:35 Awo ne bakaleeta eri Yezu. Ne basuula ebyambalo byabwe ku kalogoyi, ne beebagazaako Yezu." 
Luke19:36 Yali agenda, ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu kkubo." 
Luke19:37 Bwe yali asembera, ku kaserengeto k'Olusozi lw'Oliva, ekibiina ky'abayigirizwa kyonna ne kitandika okutendereza Katonda n'eddoboozi eddene nga bwe basanyuka olw'okubeera ebikolwa eby'amaanyi byonna bye baali balabye;" 
Luke19:38 ne bagamba nti: “Agulumizibwe oyo Kabaka, oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama; emirembe mu ggulu, n'ekitiibwa waggulu ddala eyo.”" 
Luke19:39 Abafarisaayo abamu mu kibiina ekyo ne bamugamba nti: “Muyigiriza, koma ku bayigirizwa bo.”" 
Luke19:40 N'abaddamu nti: “Ka mbabuulire, singa bano basirika, amayinja gennyini gajja kuleekaana.”" 
Luke19:41 Bwe yasembera, n'alaba ekibuga, n'akikaabira," 
Luke19:42 n'agamba nti: “Singa nno otegeera yadde ku lwa leero luno ebiyinza okuleeta emirembe! 
Luke19:43 Naye kaakano bikisiddwa amaaso go, kubanga ennaku zigenda kukujjira, n'abalabe bo lwe balikwetoolooza embibiro, ne bakutaayiza, ne bakunyigiriza ku njuyi zonna," 
Luke19:44 era ne bakuwuula ku ttaka ko n'abaana bo abakulimu; tebalireka ku ggwe jjinja ku linnaalyo, kubanga tewamanya budde bwe walambulirwamu.”" 
Luke19:45 Bwe yayingira mu Kiggwa, n'atandika okugobamu abatunda;" 
Luke19:46 n'abagamba nti: “Kyawandiikibwa nti: ‘Ennyumba yange eneebanga nnyumba ya kwegayiririramu;’ sso mmwe mugifudde mpuku ya banyazi.” 
Luke19:47 Era yabeeranga bulijjo mu Kiggwa. Bakabona abakulu, abawandiisi n'abakulu b'abantu ne banyoonya amagezi ag'okumuzikiriza;" 
Luke19:48 ne babulwa kye banaakola, kubanga abantu bonna baali banyweredde ku bigambo bye." 
Luke20:1 Olumu bwe yali ayigiriza abantu mu Kiggwa, ng'ababuulira amawulire amalungi, bakabona abakulu, abawandiisi n'abakadde," 
Luke20:2 ne bamulumba, ne bamugamba nti: “Tutegeeze ebyo obikozesa buyinza ki, oba ani yakuwa obuyinza obwo?”" 
Luke20:3 N'ayanukula n'abagamba nti: “Nange nzija kubabuuza ekigambo kimu, munziremu:" 
Luke20:4 Kale batismu ya Yowanna yava mu ggulu nandiki mu bantu?” 
Luke20:5 Ne beebuuzaganya nga bagamba nti: “Bwe tunaagamba nti: ‘Yava mu ggulu,’ ajja kubuuza nti: ‘Lwaki temwamukkiriza?’" 
Luke20:6 Ate bwe tugamba nti: ‘Yava mu bantu,’ abantu bajja kutukuba amayinja, kubanga bakakasa nti Yowanna yali mulanzi.”" 
Luke20:7 Kwe kuddamu nti: “Tetumanyi gye yava.” 
Luke20:8 Ne Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Nange siibabuulire buyinza bunkoza ebyo.” 
Luke20:9 Awo n'atandika okugerera ekibiina olugero luno, nti: “Waaliwo omuntu eyasimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu, n'agikwasa abalimi, ye n'agenda ku ggwanga ebbanga ggwanvu." 
Luke20:10 Obudde bwe bwatuuka, n'atuma omuweereza eri abalimi nti bamuwe ku bibala by'ennimiro y'emizabbibu. Naye abalimi ne bamukuba, ne bamugoba ngalo nsa." 
Luke20:11 N'ayongera ate okutuma omuweereza omulala, naye ne bamukuba, ne bamuvumaavuma, ne bamugoba ngalo nsa." 
Luke20:12 Era n'atuma owookusatu; n'oyo ne bamussaako ebiwundu, ne bamugobera ebweru." 
Luke20:13 Nnyini nnimiro kwe kugamba nti: ‘Nkole ntya? Ka mbatumire omwana wange omwagalwa, oboolyawo banaamutya.’" 
Luke20:14 Abakozi bwe baamulaba, ne bagambagana nti: ‘Ono ye musika, ka tumutte, obusika butuddire.’" 
Luke20:15 Ne bamugobera ebweru w'ennimiro y'emizabbibu ne bamutta. Kale nnannyini nnimiro y'emizabbibu abo alibakola ki? 
Luke20:16 Alijja n'azikiriza abalimi abo n'ennimiro ye ey'emizabbibu n'agikwasa abalala.” Olwawulira ekyo, ne bagamba nti: “Kikafuuwe!”" 
Luke20:17 Awo Yezu n'abeekaliriza, n'abagamba nti: “Kale ekyawandiikibwa kino kitegeeza ki: “ ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka lukulwe mu nsonda’?" 
Luke20:18 “Buli aligwa ku jjinja eryo alisesebbuka; buli yenna gwe lirigwaako, lirimubetenta.”" 
Luke20:19 Bakabona abakulu n'abawandiisi ne banoonya okumukwata mu kaseera ako kennyini, naye ne batya abantu, anti baali bategedde nti olugero olwo yali aluyisizza ku bo." 
Luke20:20 Ne bongera okumulondoola, ne batuma abakessi nga beeryanyizza ng'abalungi, bamukwate mu bigambo bye, balyoke bamuweeyo mu mbuga ne mu buyinza bw'owessaza." 
Luke20:21 Ne bamubuuza nti: “Muyigiriza, tumanyi ng'oyogera era oyigiriza mu butuufu, ate nga teweeguya muntu, wabula ng'oyigiriza mu mazima ekkubo lya Katonda." 
Luke20:22 Kale nno tusaanidde okuwa Kayisari omusolo oba nedda?” 
Luke20:23 Ye n'ategeera enkwe zaabwe, n'abagamba nti:" 
Luke20:24 “Munjoleke dinaari. Ekifaananyi n'ekiwandiiko ebiriko by'ani?” Bo ne baddamu nti: “Bya Kayisari.” 
Luke20:25 N'alyoka abagamba nti: “Awo nno ebya Kayisari mubiddize Kayisari, n'ebya Katonda mubiddize Katonda.”" 
Luke20:26 Ne batasobola kumukwasa mu bigambo bye awo mu maaso g'abantu; ne beewuunya nga bw'azzeemu, ne basirika busirisi." 
Luke20:27 Ne wajjawo Abasaddukaayo abamu, abo abawakana nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bamubuuza nti:" 
Luke20:28 “Muyigiriza, Musa yaleka atuwandiikidde nti: singa muganda w'omuntu afanga ng'abadde n'omukazi naye nga tabadde na baana, muganda we awasanga omukazi oyo n'asibusiza muganda we ezzadde." 
Luke20:29 Waaliwo ab'oluganda musanvu: omubereberye yawasa omukazi n'afa nga talina mwana; 
Luke20:30 era n'owookubiri; 
Luke20:31 n'owookusatu n'amuwasa; bonna omusanvu bwe batyo, naye ne bafa nga tebalese baana." 
Luke20:32 Oluvannyuma n'omukazi n'afa. 
Luke20:33 Kale mu mazuukira aliba muka ani? Anti bonna omusanvu baamuwasaako.” 
Luke20:34 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Abaana ab'omu mirembe gino bawasa n'okufumbizibwa; 
Luke20:35 naye abalimala okusaanira emirembe giri n'okuzuukira mu bafu, tebagenda kuwasa yadde okufumbirwa," 
Luke20:36 manyanga tebakyayinza kuddamu kufa, kubanga baliba nga bamalayika na baana ba Katonda, anti nga baana ba kuzuukira." 
Luke20:37 Era okumanya ng'abafu bazuukira, Musa naye yakyolesa bulungi we boogerera ku kisaka w'ayitira Omukama Katonda wa Yiburayimu, Katonda wa Yizaake, ne Katonda wa Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Awo nno Katonda taba wa bafu, wabula wa balamu, anti bonna ku ye baba balamu.”" 
Luke20:39 Abawandiisi abamu ne baddamu nti: “Muyigiriza, oyogedde bulungi.”" 
Luke20:40 Batyo tebaddayo ate kumubuuza kibuuzo kirala. 
Luke20:41 Naye ye n'abagamba nti: “Kale bayinza batya okugamba nti Kristu mwana wa Dawudi,"
