John11:37 Naye abamu mu bo ne bagamba nti: “Ono eyazibula amaaso omusajja eyazaalibwa nga muzibe, abadde tayinza kulobera ono kufa?”" 
John11:38 Yezu n'addamu okutenguka emmeeme; n'atuuka ku ntaana; yali mpuku ng'eteekeddwako ejjinja. 
John11:39 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Ejjinja muliggyeko.” Marita mwannyina w'omufu n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, kati awunya, kubanga luno lwa kuna ng'afudde.”" 
John11:40 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Saakugambye nti bw'onokkiriza, onoolaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda?”" 
John11:41 Awo ne baggyako ejjinja. Yezu n'ayimusa amaaso n'atunula waggulu, n'agamba nti: “Taata, nkwebaza kubanga ompulidde." 
John11:42 Mmanyi ng'ompulira bulijjo, naye ebyo mbyogedde olw'okubeera ekibiina ekyetoolodde wano, balyoke bakkirize nga ggwe wantuma.”" 
John11:43 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Lazaro, jjangu ebweru.”" 
John11:44 Eyali afudde n'avaayo ng'ebigere bye n'emikono bisibiddwa ebiwero, n'amaaso nga gazingiddwa mu kiremba. Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mumuzingulule, mumuleke atambule.”" 
John11:45 Bangi mu Bayudaaya abaali bazze ewa Mariya bwe baalaba ky'akoze, ne bamukkiriza." 
John11:46 Naye abamu ku bo ne bagenda eri Abafarisaayo ne bababuulira Yezu ky'akoze. 
John11:47 Bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo ne bakuŋŋaanya olukiiko, ne bagamba nti: “Tunaakola ki! Kubanga omuntu ono akola obubonero bungi." 
John11:48 Bwe tumuleka bwe tutyo, abantu bonna bajja kumukkiriza, n'Abaroma bajja kujja bazikirize ekifo kyaffe ekitukuvu n'eggwanga lyaffe.”" 
John11:49 Naye omu ku bo erinnya lye Kayafa, eyali kabona omukulu mu mwaka ogwo, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe temuliiko kye mumanyi." 
John11:50 Temulaba nga ffe tusinga okugasirwa omuntu omu okufiirira abantu, eggwanga lyonna lireme kuzikirira?”" 
John11:51 Ekyo teyakyogera ku bubwe, wabula nga bwe yali kabona omukulu mu mwaka ogwo, yalanga bulanzi nti Yezu yali agenda kufiirira ggwanga," 
John11:52 ate si ggwanga lyokka, naye n'okukuŋŋaanya awamu abaana ba Katonda abaali basaasaanye." 
John11:53 Okuva ku lunaku olwo ne bateeseza ddala okumutta. 
John11:54 Olw'ekyo Yezu nga takyatambula lwatu mu Bayudaaya; kwe kuvaayo n'agenda mu nsi eriraanye eddungu, mu kibuga ekiyitibwa Efurayimu, n'abeera eyo wamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
John11:55 Pasika y'Abayudaaya yali kumpi n'okutuuka, abantu bangi ne bava mu byalo eyo ne bambuka e Yeruzaalemu nga Pasika tennatuuka beetukuze." 
John11:56 Ne bamagamaga Yezu; ne bagambagana nga bayimiridde awo mu Kiggwa nti: “Mulowooza mutya, ono anajja ku mbaga enkulu oba tajje?”" 
John11:57 Kubanga bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo baali balagidde nti buli muntu amanyi w'ali abategeeze, balyoke bamukwate." 
John12:1 Waali wasigadde ennaku mukaaga Pasika okutuuka, Yezu n'ajja e Betaniya, Lazaro Yezu gwe yazuukiza mu bafu gye yali," 
John12:2 ne bamufumbirayo ekyeggulo. Marita n'aweereza; Lazaro yali omu ku baali batudde naye ku lujjuliro. 
John12:3 Awo Mariya n'akwata laatiri emu ey'omuzigo narudo ogw'omuwendo omunene, n'agusiiga ebigere bya Yezu, n'abisiimuuza n'enviiri ze. Ennyumba n'ebuna akawoowo k'omuzigo." 
John12:4 Naye Yuda Yisikariyoti omu ku bayigirizwa be, eyali agenda okumulyamu olukwe, n'agamba nti:" 
John12:5 “Omuzigo ogwo lwaki tegutundiddwa dinaari ebikumi bisatu ne zigabirwa abaavu?” 
John12:6 Ekyo yakyogera si lwa kubeera ng'abaavu yali abassaako omwoyo, wabula kubanga yali mubbi; ye yayitanga n'ensawo; bye baasuulangamu ng'abitwala." 
John12:7 Yezu n'agamba nti: “Mumuleke, k'agukuume okutuusa olunaku lwe ndiziikirwako." 
John12:8 Abaavu muli nabo bulijjo, sso nze temujja kubeeranga nange bulijjo.”" 
John12:9 Ekibiina kinene eky'Abayudaaya ne kitegeera ng'ali awo, ne bajja, si lwa kubeera Yezu yekka, naye n'okulaba Lazaro Yezu gwe yali azuukizza mu bafu." 
John12:10 Bakabona abakulu ne bateesa okutta ne Lazaro," 
John12:11 kubanga Abayudaaya bangi baali basinziira ku ye okubavaako n'okukkiriza Yezu. 
John12:12 Naye ku lunaku olwaddako, abantu bangi abaali bazze ku mbaga enkulu ne bawulira nga Yezu yali ajja e Yeruzaalemu," 
John12:13 ne baddira ensansa ez'enkindu ne bagenda okumusisinkana nga baleekaana nti: “Hosanna! Agulumizibwe oyo ajja mu linnya ly'Omukama, Kabaka wa Yisirayeli!" 
John12:14 Awo Yezu n'asanga akalogoyi, n'akeebagala, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti:" 
John12:15 “Muwala wa Siyoni, leka kutya. Wuuyo kabaka wo ajja nga yeebagadde omwana gw'endogoyi.”" 
John12:16 Ebyo abayigirizwa tebaabitegeererawo; naye Yezu bwe yamala okugulumizibwa, awo ne bajjukira ng'ebyo byali bimuwandiikiddwako era byamukolwako." 
John12:17 Ekibiina ekyali naye luli lwe yakoowoola Lazaro okuva mu ntaana n'amuzuukiza mu bafu, ne kiwa obujulizi." 
John12:18 N'ekibiina okujja okumusisinkana, kubanga baali bawulidde nga yakola akabonero ako." 
John12:19 Abafarisaayo ne bagambagana nti: “Mulabe nga bwe mutalina kye mufunyeemu; yiino ensi eggweredde gy'ali.” 
John12:20 Mu abo abaali bambuse okusoma ku mbaga enkulu mwalimu Abagereeki abamu. 
John12:21 Abo baagenda eri Filippo eyali ow'e Betisayida mu Galilaaya ne bamusaba nga bagamba nti: “Ssebo, twagala kulaba Yezu.”" 
John12:22 Filippo n'agenda abuulira Andureya, ate Andureya ne Filippo ne babuulira Yezu." 
John12:23 Yezu n'abaddamu nti: “Akadde katuuse Omwana w'Omuntu agulumizibwe. 
John12:24 Mbagambira ddala mazima nti empeke y'eŋŋano bw'etegwa mu ttaka n'efa, esigala yokka; naye bw'efa, ereeta ebibala bingi." 
John12:25 Ayagala obulamu bwe, alibubuza; naye akyawa obulamu bwe mu nsi, abweterekera mu bulamu obutaggwaawo." 
John12:26 Ampeereza, angoberere; nze we ndi n'omuweereza wange w'alibeera. Buli aliba ampeerezza Taata alimuwa ekitiibwa." 
John12:27 “Kaakano omutima gwange gutabanguse. Nkyagamba ki? Taata, mponya akadde kano? Nedda, anti akadde kano kyenvudde nkatuukako." 
John12:28 Taata, gulumiza erinnya lyo.” Eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu nti: “Naligulumiza dda, era ndiddamu okuligulumiza.”" 
John12:29 Ekibiina ekyali kiyimiridde awo ne kiwulira, ne kigamba nti enjota y'ebwatuse; abalala ne bagamba nti: “Malayika y'abadde ayogera naye.”" 
John12:30 Yezu n'abaddamu nti: “Eddoboozi eryo terizze kubeera nze, wabula kubeera mmwe." 
John12:31 Kaakano ensi etuuse okulamulibwa; kaakano omufuzi w'ensi eno agenda okugoberwa ebweru. 
John12:32 Nange bwe ndimala okuwanikibwa okuva ku nsi, byonna ndibyesembereza. ”" 
John12:33 Ekyo yakyogera okutegeeza enfa gye yali agenda okufaamu. 
John12:34 Ekibiina ne kimuddamu nti: “Ffe mu tteeka twawulira nga Kristu alibeera wa lubeerera. Kale ggwe ekikugambya nti Omwana w'Omuntu ateekeddwa okuwanikibwa waggulu kiki? Omwana w'Omuntu oyo ye ani?” 
John12:35 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ekitangaala kikyali nammwe akabanga katono; mutambule nga mukyalina ekitangaala, ekizikiza kireme kubakwata; anti atambulira mu kizikiza tamanya gy'agenda." 
John12:36 Nga mukyalina ekitangaala, mukkirize ekitangaala, mulyoke mubeere abaana b'ekitangaala.” Yezu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'agenda n'abeekweka." 
John12:37 Newandibadde yali akoze obubonero bungi mu maaso gaabwe, era bo baagaana okumukkiriza." 
John12:38 Ekigambo Yisaaya kye yayogera kiryoke kituukirire nti: “Ayi Mukama, ani yakkiriza bye baawulira okuva gye tuli? N'omukono gw'Omukama ani gwe gwayolekebwa?”" 
John12:39 Kyebaava balema okutegeera, kubanga Yisaaya yagamba era nti:" 
John12:40 “Amaaso gaabwe yagaziba n'omutima gwabwe yagugugubya; baleme kulaba na maaso gaabwe, na kuwulira na mitima gyabwe, baleme kukyukira gye ndi mbawonye.”" 
John12:41 Ebyo Yisaaya yabyogera luli kubanga yalaba ekitiibwa kye n'amwogerako. 
John12:42 Sso era bangi, nandibadde mu bakungu, ne bamukkiriza; naye nga tebakyatula olw'okutya Abayudaaya, sikulwa nga bagobebwa mu sinaagooga," 
John12:43 kubanga baayagala ekitiibwa ky'abantu okusinga ekitiibwa kya Katonda. 
John12:44 Awo Yezu n'ayogerera waggulu, n'agamba nti: “Anzikiriza, takkiriza nze, wabula akkiriza oli eyantuma." 
John12:45 Era alaba nze alaba oli eyantuma. 
John12:46 Najja mu nsi ng'ekitangaala, buli anzikiriza aleme kusigala mu nzikiza." 
John12:47 Ate buli awulira ebigambo byange n'atabikwata, si nze mmulamula, kubanga sajja kulamula nsi, wabula okulokola ensi." 
John12:48 Buli angaya n'atakkiriza bigambo byange, alina alimulamula; ekigambo kye njogedde kye kirimulamula ku lunaku olw'oluvannyuma." 
John12:49 Kubanga nze soogedde ku bwange, wabula Taata eyantuma yennyini ye yandagira kye mba ŋŋamba ne kye mba njogera." 
John12:50 Era mmanyi ng'ekiragiro kye bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo. Awo nno bye njogera, mbyogera nga Taata bwe yabiŋŋamba.”" 
John13:1 Ku lukulembera embaga enkulu eya Pasika, Yezu ng'amanyi akadde ke bwe katuuse ave mu nsi muno addeyo ewa Taata, ng'ayagadde ababe abaali mu nsi, n'abaagalira ddala okukomekkereza." 
John13:2 Bwe baali ku kyeggulo, Sitaani ng'amaze okusenseza mu mutima gwa Yuda Yisikariyoti mutabani wa Simoni eky'okumulyamu olukwe," 
John13:3 Yezu ng'amanyi byonna Taata bwe yabimukwasa mu mikono gye, ate ng'amanyi bwe yava ewa Katonda ate bw'adda eri Katonda," 
John13:4 n'ayimuka ku lujjuliro, n'ayambulamu ebyambalo bye, ne yeesiba ekiremba." 
John13:5 Awo n'afuka amazzi mu kinaabiro, n'atandika okunaaza ebigere by'abayigirizwa be n'okubisiimuuza ekiremba kye yali yeesibye." 
John13:6 N'atuuka ku Simoni Petero; Petero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ggwe onaaze nze ebigere?”" 
John13:7 Yezu n'addamu nti: “Kye nkola kaakano ggwe tokitegeera; olikitegeera oluvannyuma.” 
John13:8 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Tolinnaaza bigere ennaku zonna.” Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Bwe sikunaaza, mu nze tolinaamu mugabo.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Petero n'amuddamu nti: “Mukama, si bigere byange byokka, naye n'emikono n'omutwe.”" 
John13:10 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Anaabye teyeetaaga kirala, wabula mpozzi okunaaza ebigere byokka; anti aba mulongoofu yenna. Nammwe muli balongoofu, sso si mwenna.”" 
John13:11 Kubanga yali amanyi ajja okumulyamu olukwe, kyeyava agamba nti: “Muli balongoofu, naye si mmwenna.”" 
John13:12 Bwe yamala okubanaaza ebigere n'okuddira ebyambalo bye, n'addamu okutuula, n'abagamba nti: “Kye mbakoze mukitegedde?" 
John13:13 Mmwe mumpita Muyigiriza, Mukama; mwogera kituufu, anti bwe ndi." 
John13:14 Kale nno obanga nze Omukama, Omuyigiriza, mbanaazizza ebigere, nammwe kibagwanidde buli omu okunaaza munne ebigere;" 
John13:15 kubanga mbawadde kyakulabirako; nga nze bwe nkoze, nammwe bwe muba mukola." 
John13:16 Mbagambira ddala mazima nti omuweereza takira mukama we, n'omutumibwa tasinga yamutuma." 
John13:17 Obanga bino mubimanyi, mwesiimye mumala mubituukiriza." 
John13:18 Kyokka soogera ku mmwe mwenna; nze be nalonda mbamanyi; naye Ebiwandiiko kye bigamba kituukirire nti: “ ‘Oyo eyagabana ku mugaati gwange anneefuulidde.’ 
John13:19 “Ekyo nkibagambye kati nga tekinnabaawo; bwe kinaagwawo mulyoke mukkirize nti nze nzuuyo. 
John13:20 Mbagambira ddala mazima nti ayaniriza buli yenna gwe mba ntumye, aba ayanirizza nze; ate buli annyaniriza aba ayanirizza Oli eyantuma.”" 
John13:21 Yezu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'atabanguka mu mwoyo, n'ayatulira ddala nti: “Mazima, mazima mbagamba nti omu ku mmwe ajja kumpaayo.”" 
John13:22 Abatume ne beetunulaganako nga basobeddwa ani gw'ayogerako. 
John13:23 Omu ku bayigirizwa be, Yezu gwe yali ayagala, yali atudde kumpi ddala ne Yezu;" 
John13:24 Simoni Petero n'amusunyaako, n'amugamba nti: “Tubuulire ani oyo gw'ayogerako.”" 
John13:25 Ye ne yeewunzikira kumpi ddala ne Yezu, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ani oyo?”" 
John13:26 Yezu n'addamu nti: “Ye oyo gwe nnaakoleza ekitundu ky'omugaati ne nkimuwa.” Bwe yakoza ekitundu ky'omugaati, n'akiwa Yuda mutabani wa Simoni Yisikariyoti." 
John13:27 Oluvannyuma lw'okulya ekitundu ky'omugaati, Sitaani n'amuyingiramu. Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Ky'okola kikole mangu.”" 
John13:28 Abaali ku lujjuliro tewaali yategeera nsonga yamumugambya ekyo. 
John13:29 Abamu baalowooza nti nga Yuda bwe yabanga n'ensawo, Yezu yali amugamba nti: “Gula bye twetaaga ku mbaga enkulu;” oba nti abeeko ky'agabira abaavu." 
John13:30 Yuda bwe yamala okulya ekitundu ky'omugaati, amangu ago n'afuluma; obudde bw'ali kiro." 
John13:31 Yali ky'ajje afulume, Yezu n'agamba nti: “Kaakano Omwana w'Omuntu agulumiziddwa ne Katonda agulumiziddwa mu ye;" 
John13:32 ate obanga Katonda agulumiziddwa mu ye, ne Katonda alimugulumiza mu ye yennyini, ate ajja kumugulumiza mangu." 
John13:33 Bwana bwange, nkyali nammwe akabanga katono. Mulinnoonya, naye nga bwe nagamba Abayudaaya nti: ‘Nze gye ŋŋenda temuyinza kutuukayo,’ era nammwe bwe mbagamba kaakano." 
John13:34 Mbawa ekiragiro ekiggya, nti mwagalanenga; nga nze bwe nnabaagala, nammwe bwe muba mwagalana bwe mutyo." 
John13:35 Bwe mulyagalana, olwo bonna kwe banaategeereranga nga muli bayigirizwa bange.”" 
John13:36 Simoni Petero n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ogenda wa?” Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Nze gye ŋŋenda ggwe toyinza kungoberera kaakano, naye olingoberera edda.”" 
John13:37 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Lwaki sisobola kukugoberera kaakano? Nzija kuwaayo obulamu bwange ku lulwo.” 
John13:38 Yezu n'addamu nti: “Onoowaayo obulamu bwo okubeera nze? Nkugambira ddala mazima nti olwa leero enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, onooba onneegaanye emirundi esatu." 
John14:1 “Emitima gyammwe gireme kweraliikirira. Mukkiriza Katonda, nange munzikirize." 
John14:2 Mu nnyumba ya Kitange mulimu ebisenge bingi. Singa si bwe kiri, nandibagambye nti ŋŋenda okubategekera ekifo?" 
John14:3 Bwe ndiba mmaze okugenda, nga mmaze n'okubategekera ekifo, ndidda nate ne mbatwala ewange; nze gye ndi nammwe gye muba mubeera." 
John14:4 Gye ŋŋenda, ekkubo mulimanyi.”" 
John14:5 Toma kwe kumugamba nti: “Mukama, gy'ogenda tetumanyiiyo; tuyinza tutya okumanya ekkubo?”" 
John14:6 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Nze kkubo, nze mazima, nze bulamu. Tewali atuuka eri Taata, wabula ng'ayise mu nze." 
John14:7 Singa nze mummanyi, ne Kitange mwandimumanye. Era n'okuva kati mumumanyi n'okumulaba mumulabye.”" 
John14:8 Filippo kwe kumugamba nti: “Mukama, tulage ku Taata, kinaatumala.”" 
John14:9 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Filippo, mbadde nammwe ebbanga lino lyonna era temunnammanya? Anti alaba nze ng'alabye Taata; obadde otya okuŋŋamba nti: ‘Tulage ku Taata?’" 
John14:10 Temukkiriza nga ndi mu Taata ne Taata ng'ali mu nze? Ebigambo nze bye njogera sibyogera ku bwange. Taata ali mu nze yennyini y'akola ebikolwa. 
John14:11 Mukkirize nga ndi mu Taata ne Taata ng'ali mu nze. Waakiri mukkirize olw'ebikolwa byennyini. 
John14:12 Mbagambira ddala mazima nti anzikiriza ebikolwa bye nkola naye alibikola, era alikola n'ebisingawo; kubanga nze ŋŋenda ewa Taata." 
John14:13 Na buli kye munaasabanga Taata mu linnya lyange, ndikikola, Kitange alyoke agulumizibwe mu Mwana." 
John14:14 Bwe munaasabanga ekintu mu linnya lyange, ndikikola." 
John14:15 “Obanga munjagala, mulikwata ebiragiro byange." 
John14:16 Nange ndisaba Taata, n'abawa Omuwolereza omulala, abeerere ddala nammwe emirembe gyonna;" 
John14:17 ye Mwoyo ow'amazima ensi gw'eteyinza kufuna, kubanga temulaba n'okumumanya temumanyi. Mmwe mumumanyi, kubanga asula mu mmwe, alibabeeramu." 
John14:18 “Sijja kubaleka nga bamulekwa; ndikomawo gye muli. 
John14:19 Mu bbanga ttono ensi eneeba tekyandaba, naye mmwe mulindaba; kubanga nze ndi mulamu, nammwe muliba balamu." 
John14:20 Ku lunaku olwo mulimanya nga bwe ndi mu Kitange, nammwe mu nze, ate nange mu mmwe." 
John14:21 Alina ebiragiro byange n'abikwata, oyo y'anjagala. Ate anjagala, ne Kitange alimwagala, nange ndimwagala, era ndimweyoleka.”" 
John14:22 Yuda, atali oli Yisikariyoti, n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ffe olitweyoleka otya n'oteeyoleka nsi?”" 
John14:23 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Oba oli anjagala, alikwata ekigambo kyange, ne Kitange alimwagala; tulijja gy'ali ne tukuba ekisulo kyaffe mu ye." 
John14:24 Atanjagala, ebigambo byange tabikwata; ekigambo kye mwawulira si kyange, wabula kya Taata oli eyantuma." 
John14:25 “Ebyo mbibabuulidde nga nkyali nammwe," 
John14:26 naye Omuwolereza, ye Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, Taata gw'alituma mu linnya lyange, alibayigiriza byonna n'abajjukiza byonna bye mbagambye." 
John14:27 Mbalekedde emirembe, mbawadde emirembe gyange; sigibawadde ng'ensi bw'egiwa. Emitima gyammwe gireke kweraliikirira na kutya." 
John14:28 Muwulidde nga bwe mbagambye nti: ‘Ŋŋenda ate ndikomawo gye muli.’ Singa mubadde munjagala, mwandisanyuse, kubanga ŋŋenda ewa Taata; anti Taata mukulu okunsinga." 
John14:29 Kale nno ekyo nkibagambye tekinnatuuka; bwe kirituuka, mulyoke mukkirize." 
John14:30 Sikyayogedde bingi nammwe, kubanga omufuzi w'ensi eno ajja; nze tandiiko buyinza." 
John14:31 Naye ensi etegeere nga njagala Taata, era nga nkola nga bwe yandagira. Musituke, mugire tuve wano." 
John15:1 “Nze muzabbibu gwennyini; Kitange ye mulimi. 
John15:2 Buli ttabi eriri ku nze eritabala bibala, aliwawaagulako; ate buli ttabi eribala ebibala alisalira liryoke lyongere okubala ebibala." 
John15:3 Kaakano mmwe muli balongoofu olw'okubeera ekigambo kye nababuulira. 
John15:4 Mubeere mu nze nange mbeere mu mmwe. Ng'ettabi bwe litayinza kubala bibala ku bwalyo, wabula nga liri ku muzabbibu, nammwe bwe mutayinza, wabula nga muli ku nze." 
John15:5 Nze muzabbibu, mmwe matabi. Abeera mu nze, nange mu ye, oyo y'abala ebibala ebingi; kubanga nga temuli nange, temuliiko kye muyinza kukola." 
John15:6 Oli atabeera mu nze, akanyugibwa ebweru ng'ettabi n'akala; amatabi ago gakuŋŋaanyizibwa ne gasuulibwa mu muliro, ne gookebwa." 
John15:7 Bwe mubeera mu nze, n'ekigambo kyange ne kibeera mu mmwe, musabanga kyonna kye mwagala, kiribakolerwa." 
John15:8 Bwe mubala ebibala ebingi, ne mufuukira ddala abayigirizwa bange, Taata lw'afuna ekitiibwa." 
John15:9 Nga Taata bwe yanjagala, nange bwe mbaagadde bwe ntyo. Musigale nno mu kwagala kwange." 
John15:10 Bwe munaakwata ebiragiro byange, mujja kusigala nga mbaagala, nga nze bwe nkwata ebiragiro bya Kitange ne nsigala ng'anjagala." 
John15:11 Ebyo mbibagambye essanyu lyange libeere ne mummwe, ate essanyu lyammwe lituukirire." 
John15:12 “Kino kye kiragiro kyange: mwagalanenga nga nze bwe mbaagadde. 
John15:13 Tewali alina kwagala kusinga kuno, oli okuwaayo obulamu bwe okubeera mikwano gye." 
John15:14 Mmwe kasita munaakolanga kye mbalagira, munaabanga mikwano gyange." 
John15:15 Sikyabayita baddu, kubanga omuddu tamanyi mukama we ky'akola. Naye nze mbayita mikwano gyange, kubanga byonna bye nawulira ewa Kitange nabibamanyisa." 
John15:16 Si mmwe mwalonda nze, wabula nze nalonda mmwe, ne mbateekawo mugende mubale ebibala, ebibala byammwe bibeerere, na buli kyonna kye muliba musabye Taata mu linnya lyange, akibawe." 
John15:17 Kino kye mbalagira: mwagalanenga. 
John15:18 “Ensi bw'ebakyawanga, mumanyanga nga yasooka kukyawa nze mmwe nga tennabakyawa." 
John15:19 Singa mubadde ba nsi, ensi yandyagadde ekyayo; naye kubanga temuli ba nsi, anti nga nabalonda ne mbaggya mu nsi, ensi kyeva ebakyawa." 
John15:20 Mujjukire ekigambo kye nabagamba nti: ‘Omuweereza takira mukama we.’ Obanga nze banjigganya, nammwe balibayigganya; obanga baakwata ekigambo kyange, n'ekyammwe balikikwata." 
John15:21 Ebyo byonna balibibakola olw'okubeera erinnya lyange, kubanga eyantuma tebamumanyi." 
John15:22 Singa sajja ne mbagamba, tebandibadde na kibi. Naye kati tebalina we bawampanyiza kibi kyabwe." 
John15:23 Ankyaye aba akyaye ne Kitange. 
John15:24 Singa saabakoleramu bikolwa omuntu omulala by'atakola, tebandibadde na kibi; naye kati baabiraba, ne bankyawa ko ne Kitange." 
John15:25 Kwali kutuukiriza ekyawandiikibwa mu tteeka lyabwe nti: ‘Bankyayira bwereere.’ 
John15:26 Naye Omuwolereza bw'alijja, oyo gwe ndibatumira okuva ewa Taata, ye Mwoyo ow'amazima, asibuka mu Taata, oyo alinjulira." 
John15:27 Era nammwe muli bajulirwa, kubanga mubadde nange okuva olubereberye." 
John16:1 “Ebyo mbibagambye, muleme okwesittala." 
John16:2 Balibagoba mu sinaagooga; n'obudde bujja buli abatta lw'alirowooza nti mu ky'akola aweereza Katonda. 
John16:3 Balibakola bwe batyo kubanga Taata tebamumanyi, newandibadde nze." 
John16:4 Ebyo mbibagambye kati akadde kaabyo bwe kalituuka, mujjukire nga nabibagamba. “Bino saabibagambirawo olubereberye kubanga nali nkyali nammwe." 
John16:5 Kaakano ŋŋenda eri oli eyantuma; ate mu mmwe temuli ambuuza nti: ‘Ogenda wa?’ 
John16:6 Naye kubanga bino mbibagambye emitima gyammwe gijjudde ennaku. 
John16:7 Kyokka nze mbabuulira amazima nti kibagasa nze okugenda; kubanga bwe sigenda, Omuwolereza talijja gye muli; naye bwe ŋŋenda, ndimubatumira." 
John16:8 Oyo bw'alijja, alinenya ensi olw'ekibi, n'olw'obutuukirivu, n'olw'okulamulibwa:" 
John16:9 olw'ekibi, kubanga tebanzikiriza;" 
John16:10 olw'obutuukirivu, kubanga ŋŋenda ewa Kitange, temuliddamu na kundaba;" 
John16:11 ate n'olw'okulamulibwa, kubanga omufuzi w'ensi eno yamala dda okulamulibwa." 
John16:12 “Nkyalina bingi eby'okubabuulira, kyokka temuyinza kubikwata kati." 
John16:13 Naye Mwoyo oyo ow'amazima bw'alituuka, alibatuusa ku mazima gonna, kubanga talyogera ku bubwe yekka, naye by'anaawuliranga anaabyogeranga, n'ebirijja alibibabuulira." 
John16:14 Alingulumiza, kubanga alitoolanga ku byange n'ababuulira." 
John16:15 Byonna Kitange by'alina byange; kyenvudde ŋŋamba nti alitoolanga ku byange n'ababuulira. 
John16:16 “Mu kabanga katono munaaba temukyandaba, ate mu kabanga katono muliddamu ne mundaba.”" 
John16:17 Awo abamu ku bayigirizwa be ne bagambagana nti: “Atugamba ki ekyo nti: ‘Mu kabanga katono munaaba temukyandaba, ate mu kabanga katono muliddamu ne mundaba,’ ate nti: ‘Ŋŋenda ewa Taata’?”" 
John16:18 Ne bagamba nti: “Kiki ekyo ky'agamba nti: ‘Akabanga katono’? Tetumanyi ky'agamba.” 
John16:19 Yezu n'amanya nga baagala okumubuuza; n'abagamba nti: “Ekyo kye mwebuuzaganya kubanga ŋŋambye nti: ‘Mu kabanga katono munaaba temukyandaba, ate mu kabanga katono muliddamu ne mundaba’?" 
John16:20 Mbagambira ddala mazima nti mulikaaba, mulikuba ebiwoobe, ensi yo ng'esanyuka; mulikabirirwa, naye okukabirirwa kwammwe kulifuuka essanyu." 
John16:21 Omukazi ng'azaala alumwa, kubanga entuuko ze zituuse; naye bw'amala okuzaala omwana, nga takyajjukira bulumi olw'essanyu, kubanga omuntu azaaliddwa ku nsi." 
John16:22 Nammwe nno kaakano mukabiriddwa, naye ndibalaba ogwokubiri, olwo emitima gyammwe girisanyuka, n'essanyu lyammwe tewaliba alibaggyako." 
John16:23 Ku lunaku olwo temulimbuuza kantu. Mbagambira ddala mazima nti bwe munaabangako kye musaba Taata, alikibawa mu linnya lyange." 
John16:24 N'okutuusa kati mubadde temunnasaba kantu mu linnya lyange; musabe, mujja kufuna, essanyu lyammwe lituukirire." 
John16:25 “Ebyo mbibagambye mu ngero. Akadde kajja nga sikyayogera nammwe mu ngero, wabula nga mbabuulira kyere ku Taata." 
John16:26 Ku lunaku olwo mulisaba mu linnya lyange; sso sibagamba nti ndibasabira ewa Taata; 
John16:27 anti Taata abaagala, kubanga nammwe mwanjagala ne mukkiriza nga nava wa Taata." 
John16:28 Nava ewa Taata ne nzija mu nsi; era ate ndeka ensi, ŋŋenda ewa Taata.”" 
John16:29 Abayigirizwa be ne bamugamba nti: “Ggwe wamma kaakano oyogera kyere, sso si mu ngero n'akatono." 
John16:30 Kaakano tutegedde ng'omanyi byonna; teweetaaga muntu akubuuze. Olwa kino kyetuva tukkiriza nga wava wa Katonda.” 
John16:31 Yezu n'abaddamu nti: “Kaakano mukkiriza? 
John16:32 Kale akadde kajja, n'okutuuka katuuse, mubune emiwabo, buli omu adde ewuwe, mundeke bw'omu. Sso era siri bw'omu, kubanga Taata ali wamu nange." 
John16:33 Bino mbibagambye, mulyoke mubeere n'emirembe mu nze. Ku nsi mulisanga ebizibu; naye mubeere bagumu, nze ensi ngiwangudde.”" 
John17:1 Yezu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'ayimusa amaaso ku ggulu, n'agamba nti: “Taata, akadde katuuse; gulumiza Omwana wo n'Omwana wo alyoke akugulumize," 
John17:2 kubanga anti wamuwa obuyinza ku buli muntu yenna; alyoke awe obulamu obutaggwaawo be wamuwa. 
John17:3 Obulamu obutaggwaawo bwe buno: bonna okukumanya nga ggwe Katonda wekka ow'amazima ne Yezu Kristu gwe watuma. 
John17:4 Nze nakugulumiza ku nsi; omulimu gwe wampa okukola ngumalirizza. 
John17:5 Kaakano nno, Taata, ngulumiza gy'oli n'ekitiibwa kye nalimu w'oli ensi nga tennaba kubaawo." 
John17:6 “Erinnya lyo nalimanyisa abantu be wampa ng'obaggya mu nsi. Baali babo, n'obampa, era bakutte ebigambo byo." 
John17:7 Kaakano bategedde nga byonna bye wampa byava gy'oli; 
John17:8 kubanga nababuulira ebigambo bye wampa, ne babikwata, ne bamanya mu mazima bwe nava gy'oli, ne bakkiriza nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:9 Nze abo be nsabira; sinnasabira ba nsi, wabula abo be wampa, kubanga babo;" 
John17:10 byonna ebyange bibyo, n'ebibyo byange, era ngulumiziddwa mu byo." 
John17:11 Kaakano nze sikyali ku nsi, sso bo bakyali ku nsi; nze nzija gy'oli. Taata Omutuukirivu, bakuumire mu linnya lyo lye wampa, balyoke babeere kimu nga ffe bwe tuli ekimu." 
John17:12 Bwe nali nga nkyali nabo, nabakuumira mu linnya lyo lye wali ompadde; nabakuuma, era ku bo tewali yabula, wabula omwana w'okuzikirira, Ebiwandiiko biryoke bituukirire." 
John17:13 Kaakano nzija gy'oli; bino mbyogedde kati mu nsi, essanyu lyange lituukirire mu bo." 
John17:14 Mbawadde ekigambo kyo, ensi n'ebakyawa, kubanga si ba nsi, nga nze bwe siri wa nsi." 
John17:15 Sisaba obaggye mu nsi, wabula nti obatalize omubi." 
John17:16 Bo si ba nsi, nga nze bwe siri wa nsi." 
John17:17 Batukuze mu mazima; ekigambo kyo ge mazima. 
John17:18 Nga nze bwe wantuma mu nsi, nange bwe ntyo bwe mbatumye mu nsi." 
John17:19 Olw'okubeera bo neetukuza, nabo balyoke beetukuze mu mazima." 
John17:20 “Sisabira abo bokka, naye nsabira n'abalinzikiriza ku lw'ekigambo kyabwe," 
John17:21 bonna balyoke babeere kimu, nga ggwe Taata bw'oli mu nze nange bwe ndi mu ggwe, balyoke babeere mu ffe, ensi ekkirize nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:22 Ekitiibwa kye wampa nange nkibawadde, balyoke babeere kimu, nga ffe bwe tuli ekimu;" 
John17:23 nze mu bo naawe mu nze, bafuukire ddala kimu, ensi etegeere nga ggwe wantuma, ate nga wabaagala nga nze bwe wanjagala." 
John17:24 Taata, njagala abo be wampa nabo babe nange awo we ndi, balabe ekitiibwa kyange kye wampa, kubanga wanjagala nga n'ensi tennabangibwawo." 
John17:25 Ayi Taata Omutuukirivu, ensi teyakumanya, naye nze nakumanya, na bano baamanya nga ggwe wantuma." 
John17:26 Nabamanyisa erinnya lyo, era nzija kwongera okulimanyisa, okwagala kwe wanjagalamu kulyoke kubabeeremu, nange mbeere mu bo.”" 
John18:1 Yezu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo, n'afuluma n'abayigirizwa be, n'alaga emitala w'akagga Kiduroni, awaali ennimiro, n'ayingira omwo n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:2 Ne Yuda eyamuwaayo, yali amanyi ekifo ekyo, kubanga Yezu yagendangayo emirundi mingi wamu n'abayigirizwa be." 
John18:3 Awo Yuda n'afuna ekibinja ky'abaserikale n'abaweereza okuva ewa bakabona abakulu n'Abafarisaayo, n'ajja eyo n'ettawaaza n'emimuli n'ebyokulwanyisa." 
John18:4 Yezu yali amanyi byonna ebigenda okumutuukirira, n'abeeyuna, n'abagamba nti: “Munoonya ani?”" 
John18:5 Ne bamuddamu nti: “Yezu ow'e Nazareti.” Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Ye nze.” Ne Yuda eyamulyamu olukwe yali ayimiridde nabo. 
John18:6 Olw'abagamba nti: “Ye nze,” ne badda ekyennyumannyuma, ne bagwa ku ttaka." 
John18:7 N'ababuuza omulundi omulala nti: “Munoonya ani?” Bo ne baddamu nti: “Yezu ow'e Nazareti.” 
John18:8 Yezu n'abaddamu nti: “Mbagambye nti: ‘Ye nze;’ oba nno nze gwe munoonya, bano mubaleke bagende.”" 
John18:9 Ekigambo kye yagamba kiryoke kituukirire, nti: “Be wampa saabulwako n'omu.”" 
John18:10 Simoni Petero yalina ekitala; n'akisowola, n'atema omuddu w'akabona omukulu, n'amusalako okutu okwa ddyo, erinnya ly'omuddu nga ye Maluko." 
John18:11 Yezu n'agamba Petero nti: “Zza ekitala kyo mu kiraato; ekikompe Kitange ky'ampadde siikinywe?” 
John18:12 Awo ekibinja ky'abaserikale n'omukulu waabwe n'abaweereza b'Abayudaaya ne bakwata Yezu, ne bamusiba." 
John18:13 Ne bamusookeza ewa Anna, kubanga ye yali mukoddomi wa Kayafa, eyali kabona omukulu mu mwaka ogwo." 
John18:14 Kayafa oyo ye wuuyo eyali awadde Abayudaaya amagezi nti: “Kisaanye omuntu omu afiirire bonna.” 
John18:15 Simoni Petero n'agoberera Yezu, era n'omuyigirizwa omulala. Omuyigirizwa oyo ye nga bwe yali omumanye ewa kabona omukulu, n'ayingira ne Yezu mu luggya lwa kabona omukulu." 
John18:16 Ye Petero yali ayimiridde bweru ku mulyango. Omuyigirizwa oli eyali omumanye ewa kabona omukulu naafuluma n'agamba omuzaana omuggazi, ye n'ayingiza Petero." 
John18:17 Omuzaana omuggazi n'agamba Petero nti: “Kazzi naawe oli omu ku bayigirizwa b'omuntu ono.” Ye n'addamu nti: “Nedda, siri.”" 
John18:18 Abaddu n'abaweereza baali bakumye ekyoto, kubanga obudde bwali bunnyogoga, nga bayimiridde boota; ne Petero yali ayimiridde ng'ayota." 
John18:19 Awo kabona omukulu n'abuuza Yezu ku bayigirizwa be ne ku njirigiriza ye. 
John18:20 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Nayogera mu lwatu eri ensi; bulijjo nayigirizanga mu sinaagooga ne mu Kiggwa Abayudaaya bonna gye bakuŋŋaanira; soogeranga kantu mu kyama; 
John18:21 ombuuliza ki? Buuza abo abaawuliranga bye nabagambanga; abo bamanyi bye nabagambanga.” 
John18:22 Yali ky'ajje ayogere ebyo, omu ku baweereza eyali ayimiridde awo, n'akuba Yezu oluyi nga bw'agamba nti: “Ggwe oddamu otyo kabona omukulu?”" 
John18:23 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Oba njogedde bubi, nnumiriza ekibi ekyo; oba njogedde bulungi, onkubidde ki?”" 
John18:24 Awo Anna n'amuweereza nga musibe ewa Kayafa kabona omukulu. 
John18:25 Simoni Petero yali ayimiridde ng'ayota. Ne bamugamba nti: “Kazzi naawe oli omu ku bayigirizwa be?” Ye ne yeegaana; n'agamba nti: “Nedda, siri.”" 
John18:26 Awo omu ku baweereza ba kabona omukulu, ow'oluganda n'oli Petero gwe yasalako okutu, n'amugamba nti: “Saakulabye mu nnimiro ng'oli naye?”" 
John18:27 Petero n'addamu okwegaana, era amangu ago enkoko n'ekookolima." 
John18:28 Awo ne baggya Yezu ewa Kayafa ne bamutwala mu Purayitoriyo. Obudde bwali bwakakya. Bo bennyini tebaayingira mu Purayitoriyo, baleme kusoba, basobole okulya Pasika." 
John18:29 Pilato n'afuluma n'agenda gye bali, n'abagamba nti: “Nsonga ki gye muleeta okuvunaana omuntu ono?”" 
John18:30 Bo ne bamuddamu nti: “Singa omuntu ono tabadde mukozi wa bibi, tetwandimukukwasizza.”" 
John18:31 Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe mumutwale, mumulamule nga mugoberera amateeka gammwe.” Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti: “Ffe tetukkirizibwa kutta muntu n'omu.”" 
John18:32 Ekigambo kiryoke kituukirire bwe kityo Yezu kye yagamba ng'ategeeza enfa gy'alifaamu. 
John18:33 Pilato n'ayingira ate mu Purayitoriyo, n'ayita Yezu, n'amugamba nti: “Ggwe kabaka w'Abayudaaya?”" 
John18:34 Yezu n'addamu nti: “Ekyo okyogedde ku bubwo wekka, n'andiki balala be bakikugambye ku nze?”" 
John18:35 Pilato n'addamu nti: “Ate nze ndi Muyudaaya? Eggwanga lyo ne bakabona abakulu be bakuwaddeyo gye ndi. Wakola ki?” 
John18:36 Yezu n'addamu nti: “Obwakabaka bwange si bwa mu nsi eno. Singa obwakabaka bwange bubadde bwa mu nsi eno, abaweereza bange tebandiremye kulwana, nneme kuweebwayo mu Bayudaaya. Naye nno obwakabaka bwange si bwa mu nsi eno.”" 
John18:37 Pilato n'amugamba nti: “Awo nno oli kabaka?” Yezu n'addamu nti: “Oyogedde nti ndi kabaka. Nze kino kye nazaalirwa, era kino kye kyandeeta mu nsi, okujulira amazima; buli w'amazima, awulira eddoboozi lyange.”" 
John18:38 Pilato n'amugamba nti: “Amazima kye ki?” Bwe yamala okwogera ekyo, n'afuluma n'agenda eri Abayudaaya nate, n'abagamba nti: “Ono simulabamu nsonga n'emu." 
John18:39 Naye mulina empisa nze okubateera omu ku Pasika; kale nno mwagala mbateere kabaka w'Abayudaaya?” 
John18:40 Ne bayoogaana buggya nti: “Si ono, wabula Barabba.” Sso Barabba yali munyazi." 
John19:1 Awo Pilato n'akwata Yezu n'amuswanyuula. 
John19:2 Ate abaserikale ne bazinga omuge ogw'amaggwa ne bagumutikkira ku mutwe, ne bamwambaza omunagiro ogwa kakobe;" 
John19:3 ne bajja gy'ali nga bagamba nti: “Mirembe, Kabaka w'Abayudaaya.” Ne bamukuba empi." 
John19:4 Awo Pilato n'afuluma nate, n'abagamba nti: “Wuuno mmubaleetedde, mulyoke mutegeere nga simulabamu nsonga n'emu.”" 
John19:5 Yezu n'afuluma bw'atyo ng'alina omuge gw'amaggwa, n'omunagiro ogwa kakobe. Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Omuntu wuuno!”" 
John19:6 Bakabona abakulu n'abaweereza bwe baamulaba ne baleekaana nti: “Mukomerere ku musaalaba.” Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Mumutwale mmwe mmwennyini mumukomerere kubanga nze simusanzeeko musango.” 
John19:7 Abayudaaya ne bamuddamu nti: “Ffe tulina etteeka, okulabira ku tteeka eryo ateekwa okufa, kubanga yeefudde Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
John19:8 Pilato bwe yawulira ekigambo ekyo, ne yeeyongera okutya;" 
John19:9 n'adda ate mu Purayitoriyo n'agamba Yezu nti: “Oli waawa?” Naye Yezu n'atawuuna. 
John19:10 Pilato kwe kumugamba nti: “Tonnyega kantu? Tomanyi nga nnina obuyinza obw'okukuta era nga nnina n'obuyinza obw'okukukomerera ku musaalaba?” 
John19:11 Yezu n'amuddamu nti: “Tewandibadde na buyinza ku nze singa tebwakuweebwa kuva waggulu; olw'ekyo nno ampadde gy'oli y'alina omusango ogusinga.” 
John19:12 Okuva olwo Pilato n'ateganira ddala okumuta, naye Abayudaaya ne baleekaana nti: “Oyo bw'omuta nga tokyali mukwano gwa Kayisari; buli eyeeyita kabaka, aba ajeemedde Kayisari.”" 
John19:13 Pilato bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'afulumya Yezu, n'atuula ku ntebe ey'obulamuzi eyali mu kifo ekiyitibwa Lisosituroto, ate mu Lwebureeyi Gabbata." 
John19:14 Lwe lwali Olunaku olw'Okuteekateeka Pasika; essaawa yali nga ya mukaaga. N'agamba Abayudaaya nti: “Kabaka wammwe wuuno!” 
John19:15 Bo ne baleekaana nti: “Ggyawo, ggyawo, mukomerere ku musaalaba.” Pilato n'abagamba nti: “Kabaka wammwe gwe mba nkomerera ku musaalaba?” Bakabona abakulu ne baddamu nti: “Tetulina kabaka mulala wabula Kayisari.”" 
John19:16 Awo n'amuwaayo gye bali bamukomerere ku musaalaba. Ne bakwata Yezu ne bamutwala. 
John19:17 N'avaayo nga yeetisse omusaalaba gwe, n'alaga ku kifo ky'Akawanga, mu Lwebureeyi ekiyitibwa Golugota." 
John19:18 Eyo gye baamukomerera, era n'abalala babiri wamu naye, omu ku buli ludda, Yezu ng'ali wakati." 
John19:19 Pilato era n'awandiika ekipande n'akiteeka ku musaalaba. Kyali kiwandiikiddwako nti: YEZU OW'E NAZARETI, KABAKA W'ABAYUDAAYA." 
John19:20 Abayudaaya bangi ne basoma ekipande ekyo, kubanga ekifo Yezu we yakomererwa kyali kumpi n'ekibuga; ate kyali kiwandiikiddwa mu Lwebureeyi, mu Lulatini ne mu Lugereeki." 
John19:21 Bakabona abakulu ab'Abayudaaya ne bagamba Pilato nti: “Leka kuwandiika nti: ‘Kabaka w'Abayudaaya’ wabula nti: ‘Eyeeyita nti nze kabaka w'Abayudaaya.’ ” 
John19:22 Pilato n'addamu nti: “Kye mpandiise, nkiwandiise.”" 
John19:23 Naye abaserikale bwe baamala okukomerera Yezu ku musaalaba, ne bakwata ebyambalo bye ne babyawuzaamu emiteeko ena; buli muserikale omuteeko, ate n'ekkanzu ye. Ekkanzu ye teyalina lukindo, yali nduke bulusi yonna okuviira ddala waggulu." 
John19:24 Ne bagambagana nti: “Tuleme kugiyuzaamu, wabula tugikubeko akalulu, tulabe eneeba y'ani.” Ekiwandiiko kiryoke kituukirire ekigamba nti: “Ebyambalo byange baabigabana; olugoye lwange ne balukubako akalulu.” Ekyo abaserikale kye baakola." 
John19:25 Okumpi n'omusaalaba gwa Yezu waali wayimiriddewo nnyina ne muganda wa nnyina, Mariya muka Kulopa, ne Mariya Magudalena." 
John19:26 Yezu bwe yalaba nnyina n'omuyigirizwa gwe yali aganzizza ng'ayimiridde awo kumpi, n'agamba nnyina nti: “Mukazi, omwana wo wuuno!”" 
John19:27 Ate n'agamba omuyigirizwa nti: “Nnyoko wuuno!” Okuva mu kaseera ako omuyigirizwa n'amutwala ewuwe. 
John19:28 Oluvannyuma lw'ebyo, Yezu ng'ategedde nga byonna biwedde, olw'okutuukiriza Ebiwandiiko, n'agamba nti: “Ennyonta ennuma.”" 
John19:29 Awo waaliwo ebbakuli ejjudde enkaatu; ne batunga ekyangwe ekijjudde enkaatu ku lumuli, ne bakisembeza ku mumwa gwe." 
John19:30 Yezu bwe yamala okufuna enkaatu, n'agamba nti: “Kituukiridde;” n'awunzika omutwe n'awaayo omwoyo gwe." 
John19:31 Naye kubanga lwali lunaku lwa Kuteekateeka, emirambo obutasigala ku musaalaba ku Sabbaato, kubanga Sabbaato eyo lwali lunaku lukulu, Abayudaaya ne basaba Pilato abakomerere babamenye amagulu, babaggyewo." 
John19:32 Abaserikale ne bajja, ne bamenya amagulu ag'omubereberye n'ag'omulala eyali akomereddwa naye." 
John19:33 Bwe baatuuka ku Yezu, ne balaba nga yafudde dda, ne batamumenya magulu;" 
John19:34 naye omu ku baserikale n'amufumita effumu mu lubiriizi, amangu ago ne muvaamu omusaayi n'amazzi." 
John19:35 Eyalabirako ddala y'ayogera bino, n'okujulira kwe kwa mazima, era amanyi ng'ayogera mazima nammwe mulyoke mukkirize." 
John19:36 Kubanga ebyo byabaawo Ebiwandiiko biryoke bituukirire nti: “Talimenyebwa ggumba lye na limu;” 
John19:37 era n'Ekiwandiiko ekirala kigamba nti: “Balitunula kw'oyo gwe baafumita.” 
John19:38 Ebyo bwe byaggwa, Yozefu ow'e Arimateya, naye yali muyigirizwa wa Yezu, naye mu kyama olw'okutya Abayudaaya, n'asaba Pilato amukkirize aggyewo omubiri gwa Yezu. Pilato n'akkiriza. Awo n'ajja n'aggyawo omubiri gwe." 
John19:39 Ne Nikodemo, eyagenda olumu gy'ali ekiro, n'ajja ng'aleese ebyakaloosa ebitabule ebya mirra n'ekigaji, laatiri nga kikumi." 
John19:40 Ne baddira omubiri gwa Yezu ne baguzinga mu ssuuka awamu n'ebyakaloosa ng'empisa y'Abayudaaya mu kuziika bwe yali. 
John19:41 Mu kifo we yakomererwa waaliwo ennimiro, ate mu nnimiro nga mulimu entaana empya eyali teteekebwangamu muntu." 
John19:42 Omwo nno, olw'ensonga y'Olunaku lw'Abayudaaya olw'Okuteekateeka, ate ng'entaana yali awo kumpi, mwe baateeka Yezu." 
John20:1 Ku lusooka mu wiiki, Mariya Magudalena n'ajja ku ntaana mu matulutulu, enzikiza ng'ekyakutte, n'alaba ng'ejjinja liggyiddwawo ku ntaana;" 
John20:2 n'adduka, n'agenda eri Simoni Petero n'eri omuyigirizwa oli omulala Yezu gwe yali ayagala, n'abagamba nti: “Omukama mu ntaana bamuggyeemu, tetumanyi gye bamutadde.”" 
John20:3 Awo Petero n'afuluma n'omuyigirizwa oli omulala, ne balaga ku ntaana." 
John20:4 Bombi baagenda badduka, naye omuyigirizwa oli omulala n'asinza Petero embiro, n'amusooka okutuuka ku ntaana." 
John20:5 N'akutama alingizeemu, n'alaba essuuka nga ziri awo, naye n'atayingira." 
John20:6 Simoni Petero n'atuuka ng'ajja amugoberera; n'ayingira mu ntaana; n'alaba essuuka nga ziri awo; 
John20:7 n'ekiremba ekyali ku mutwe gwe, nga tekiri na ssuuka, wabula nga kizingiddwa ne kiteekebwa waakyo." 
John20:8 N'omuyigirizwa oli omulala eyali asoose okutuuka ku ntaana, n'ayingira, n'alaba, n'akkiriza;" 
John20:9 kubanga baali tebannamanya Kiwandiiko ekigamba nti yali wa kuzuukira mu bafu. 
John20:10 Abayigirizwa ne baddayo ewaabwe. 
John20:11 Naye Mariya yali ayimiridde ku ntaana wabweru ng'akaaba. Bwe yali akaaba, n'akutama alingize mu ntaana;" 
John20:12 n'alabamu bamalayika babiri abaali mu ngoye enjeru, nga batudde, omu emitwetwe n'omulala emirannamiro, mu kifo omubiri gwa Yezu mwe gwali guteekeddwa." 
John20:13 Ne bamugamba nti: “Mukazi, okaabira ki?” N'abagamba nti: “Kubanga Mukama wange bamututte, simanyi na gye bamutadde.”" 
John20:14 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'akebuka, n'alaba Yezu ng'ayimiridde, naye n'atamanya nti ye Yezu." 
John20:15 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Mukazi, okaabira ki? Onoonya ani?” Ye n'alowooza nti ye nnannyini nnimiro, n'amugamba nti: “Ssebo, oba wamuggyemu, mbuulira gye wamutadde, nze mmuggyeyo.”" 
John20:16 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Mariya.” N'akebuka, n'amugamba mu Lwebureeyi nti: “Rabbuni!”, kwe kugamba nti Muyigiriza." 
John20:17 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Tonneekwatako, kubanga sinnalinnya eri Taata; naye genda eri baganda bange obagambe nti: ‘Nninnya eri Kitange era Kitammwe, eri Katonda wange, era Katonda wammwe.’ ”" 
John20:18 Mariya Magudalena n'agenda n'agamba abayigirizwa be nti: “Omukama mmulabye.” N'abagamba nti yali amugambye ebintu ebyo. 
John20:19 Obudde bwe bwali buwungedde, ku olwo oluddirira Sabbaato, abayigirizwa we baali enzigi nga nsibe olw'okutya Abayudaaya, Yezu n'ajja n'abayimiriramu wakati, n'abagamba nti: “Emirembe gibeere ku mmwe.”" 
John20:20 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'abalaga ebibatu bye n'embiriizi. Awo abayigirizwa ne basanyuka okulaba Omukama." 
John20:21 Ye n'addamu okubagamba nti: “Emirembe gibeere ku mmwe; nga Taata bwe yantuma, nange bwe mbatuma.”" 
John20:22 Bwe yasirissa ebyo, n'abafuuwako omukka, n'abagamba nti: “Mufune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
John20:23 Yenna ebibi bye bye munaasonyiwanga, nga bisonyiyiddwa; yenna ebibi bye bye munaasibanga, nga bisibiddwa.”" 
John20:24 Toma, omu ku Kkumi n'Ababiri ayitibwa Omulongo, teyali na banne Yezu lwe yajja." 
John20:25 Abayigirizwa banne ne bamugamba nti: “Omukama tumulabye.” Ye n'abagamba nti: “Wabula nga ndabye mu bibatu bye obubonero bw'enninga, ne nzisa olunwe lwange mu nkovu z'enninga, ne nzisa n'omukono mu lubiriizi lwe, sijja kukkiriza.”" 
John20:26 Nga wayise ennaku munaana, era abayigirizwa be baali mu nnyumba, ne Toma nga mw'ali nabo. Enzigi zaali nzigale; Yezu n'ajja, n'abayimiriramu wakati, n'abagamba nti: “Emirembe gibeere nammwe.”" 
John20:27 Awo n'agamba Toma nti: “Olunwe lwo luyingize wano, laba n'ebibatu byange; leeta n'omukono gwo oguteeke mu lubiriizi lwange; leka butakkiriza, naye kkiriza.”" 
John20:28 Toma n'addamu nti: “Mukama wange, Katonda wange.”" 
John20:29 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Toma, okkirizza kubanga ondabyeko? Beesiimye abakkiriza nga tebalabyeko.”" 
John20:30 Era waaliwo n'obubonero obulala bungi Yezu bwe yakola mu maaso g'abayigirizwa be obutawandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino. 
John20:31 Buno buwandiikiddwa mulyoke mukkirize Yezu nga ye Kristu Omwana wa Katonda, ate olw'okukkiriza mufune obulamu mu linnya lye." 
John21:1 Oluvannyuma, Yezu era n'alabikira abayigirizwa ku nnyanja y'e Tiberiya. Yabalabikira bw'ati:" 
John21:2 Simoni Petero, Toma ayitibwa Omulongo, Natanayeli ow'e Kana mu Galilaaya, batabani ba Zebedaayo ko n'abalala babiri ku bayigirizwa be baali wamu;" 
John21:3 Simoni Petero n'abagamba nti: “Ŋŋenda kuvubako.” Ne bamugamba nti: “Naffe tugenda naawe.” Ne bagenda ne basaabala eryato; naye ekiro ekyo tebaakwasa kantu. 
John21:4 Obudde bwe bwali bukya, Yezu n'ayimirira ku lubalama; naye abayigirizwa nga tebamanyi nga ye Yezu." 
John21:5 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Abaana, mulinawo ku byennyanja?” Ne baddamu nti: “Nedda.”" 
John21:6 N'agamba nti: “Musuule akatimba ku ludda olwa ddyo olw'eryato, mujja kukwasa.” Ne bakasuula; olwo nga tebakyayinza na kukawalula olw'obungi bw'ebyennyanja." 
John21:7 Omuyigirizwa oli Yezu gwe yayagalanga n'agamba Petero nti: “Ye Mukama.” Simoni Petero bwe yawulira nti ye Mukama, ne yeebagika ekikanzu kye, kubanga yali bwereere, ne yeesuula mu nnyanja." 
John21:8 Abayigirizwa abalala ne bajjira mu lyato nga bawalula akatimba akaalimu ebyennyanja, kubanga tebaali wala n'olukalu, mpozzi emikono ng'ebikumi bibiri." 
John21:9 Bwe baagoba ku lukalu, ne balaba amanda, nga kuliko ebyennyanja, ko n'omugaati." 
John21:10 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Muleete ku byennyanja bye mwakakwasa kati.” 
John21:11 Simoni Petero n'asaabala mu lyato, n'awalula akatimba n'akakuba ettale. Kaali kajjudde ebyennyanja ebinene kikumi mu ataano mu bisatu. Nandibadde byali nkumu bityo, akatimba tekaayulika." 
John21:12 Yezu n'abagamba nti: “Mujje mulyeko.” Naye ku bayigirizwa ne kubula ageza okumubuuza nti: “Ggwe ani?” Baali bategedde nga ye Mukama. 
John21:13 Yezu n'ajja, n'akwata omugaati n'abawa, era n'ebyennyanja." 
John21:14 Ogwo gwe gwali omulundi ogwokusatu Yezu gwe yalabikira abayigirizwa ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu. 
John21:15 Bwe baamala okulya, Yezu n'agamba Simoni Petero nti: “Simoni mutabani wa Yowanna, onjagala okusinga bano?” N'amugamba nti: “Yee, Mukama; omanyi nga nkwagala.” N'amugamba nti: “Liisa obuliga bwange.”" 
John21:16 Era n'amugamba ogwokubiri nti: “Simoni, mutabani wa Yowanna, onjagala?” N'amugamba nti: “Yee, Mukama; omanyi nga nkwagala.” N'amugamba nti: “Lunda endiga zange.”" 
John21:17 Era n'amugamba ogwokusatu nti: “Simoni, mutabani wa Yowanna, onjagala?” Simoni Petero n'anakuwala olw'okumubuuza ogwokusatu nti: “Onjagala?”; n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ggwe omanyi byonna; omanyi nga nkwagala.” Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Liisa endiga zange." 
John21:18 Nkugambira ddala mazima nti bwe wali okyali muto, weesibanga n'olaga gye wayagalanga; naye ng'okaddiye, oligolola emikono gyo, omulala n'akusiba n'akutwala gy'otoyagala.”" 
John21:19 Ekyo yakimugamba okutegeeza enfa gy'aligulumizaamu Katonda. Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, n'amugamba nti: “Ngoberera.”" 
John21:20 Petero n'akebuka, n'alaba omuyigirizwa oli Yezu gwe yali ayagala ng'ajja agoberera, ye oli eyeewunzika ku kifuba kye ku mbaga eri enkulu n'amugamba nti: “Mukama, ani agenda okukuwaayo?”" 
John21:21 Petero bwe yamulaba, n'agamba Yezu nti: “Mukama, ng'ono aliba atya?”" 
John21:22 Yezu n'amugamba nti: “Obanga nze njagala abeerewo okutuusa lwe ndijja, ofaayo ki? Ggwe ngoberera.”" 
John21:23 We waava olugambo okubuna mu booluganda nti omuyigirizwa oyo teyali wa kufa. Sso Yezu teyamugamba nti teyali wa kufa, wabula nti: “Obanga nze njagala abeerewo okutuusa lwe ndijja, ofaayo ki?”" 
John21:24 Omuyigirizwa oyo ye wuuyo ayogera bino, era awandiise bino, era tumanyi ng'okujulira kwe kwa mazima." 
John21:25 Eriyo ate n'ebirala bingi Yezu bye yakola; nabyo singa byawandiikibwa kinnakimu, ndowooza ng'ensi teyandisobodde kuggweeramu bitabo byandiwandiikiddwa." 
Acts1:1 Ayi Tewofilo, mu kitabo ekyasooka nayogera ku byonna Yezu bye yatandika okukola n'okuyigiriza," 
Acts1:2 okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yatwalirwako mu ggulu, Abatume be yalonda ng'amaze okubawa ebiragiro bye mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts1:3 Abo, ng'amaze okubonaabona, yabeeyoleka mu ngeri nnyingi okubakakasa nga bw'ali omulamu; yabalabikiranga mu nnaku amakumi ana, n'ayogeranga nabo ebikwata ku bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Acts1:4 Bwe baali balya, n'abakuutira obutava mu Yeruzaalemu, wabula balindirire Taata kye yasuubiza, kye yayogerako nti: “Mwawulira mu kamwa kange, nti" 
Acts1:5 ye Yowanna yabatizanga na mazzi, naye mmwe oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezitali nnyingi mujja kubatizibwa mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Acts1:6 Bwe baali bakuŋŋaanye, kwe kumubuuza nti: “Mukama, kazzi mu bbanga eryo mw'oliddizaawo obwakabaka bwa Yisirayeli?”" 
Acts1:7 Ye n'abaddamu nti: “Si kyammwe okumanya ebbanga n'akadde Taata bye yassaawo n'obuyinza bwe. 
Acts1:8 Kyokka mulifuna amaanyi Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bw'alibajjako; ate mulibeera bajulirwa bange mu Yeruzaalemu ne mu Buyudaaya bwonna ne mu Samariya, n'okutuusa ensi gy'ekoma.”" 
Acts1:9 Awo, bwe yasirissa ebyo, bonna nga balaba, n'atwalibwa waggulu, ekire ne kimubaggya mu maaso." 
Acts1:10 Bwe baali bakyatunuulidde waggulu nga bw'agenda, abasajja babiri abambadde engoye enjeru ne bayimirira kumpi nabo," 
Acts1:11 ne babagamba nti: “Abasajja Abagalilaaya, ekibayimirizza wano nga mutunuulidde waggulu kiki? Yezu ono abaggyiddwako n'atwalibwa mu ggulu, bw'alijja bw'atyo nga bwe mumulabye ng'agenda mu ggulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Awo ne baddayo e Yeruzaalemu nga bava ku lusozi oluyitibwa olwa Oliva, oluli okumpi n'e Yeruzaalemu, olugendo nga lwa Sabbaato." 
Acts1:13 Bwe baayingira, ne bambuka mu kisenge ekya waggulu mwe baabeeranga: Petero ne Yowanna ne Yakobo, ne Andureya, Filippo ne Tomasi, Barutolomaawo ne Matayo, Yakobo owa Alufayo ne Simoni Omutakabanyi, ne Yuda mutabani wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abo bonna n'omutima gumu ne bessa mu kwegayirira, awamu n'abakazi ne Mariya nnyina Yezu ne baganda be." 
Acts1:15 Mu nnaku ezo, Petero n'ayimirira wakati mu booluganda (ekibiina ky'abantu baali bawera nga kikumi mu abiri) n'abagamba nti:" 
Acts1:16 “Basajja baganda bange, ekyawandiikibwa, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu kye yalanga ng'ayita mu Dawudi, ku Yuda eyakulembera abo abaakwata Yezu, kyali kiteekwa okutuukirira." 
Acts1:17 Yali amaze okubalirwa mu ffe, ng'agabanye n'ekitundu ku mulimu guno." 
Acts1:18 Naye ye yagula ennimiro mu mpeera ye ey'obwonoonefu, ne yesulinka ku ttaka, n'ayabikamu wakati, ebyenda bye ne biyiika byonna." 
Acts1:19 Ekyo ab'omu Yeruzaalemu bonna ne bakimanya, n'ennimiro eyo, mu lulimi lwabwe kwe kuyitibwa Akeridama, kwe kugamba nti ‘Ennimiro y'Omusaayi’." 
Acts1:20 Anti kyawandiikibwa mu Kitabo kya Zabbuli nti: “ ‘Ekisulo kye kifuuke matongo, wabulewo akisulamu;’ era nti: “ ‘n'omulimu gwe omulala agutwale.’" 
Acts1:21 “Kale nno, mu basajja bano, abaabeeranga naffe ebbanga lyonna Omukama Yezu mw'abeeredde mu ffe ng'ajja ng'agenda," 
Acts1:22 okuva ku batismu ya Yowanna okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yatuggyibwako n'atwalibwa mu ggulu, omu ku bano ateekwa okuba omujulirwa wamu naffe ow'okuzuukira kwe.”" 
Acts1:23 Ne bassaawo babiri: Yozefu, eyali amanyiddwa nga Barusabba era nga bamukazizzaako erya Yusito, ne Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Ne beegayirira, ne bagamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, ggwe amanyi emitima gya bantu bonna, ku abo bombi laga omu gw'olonze," 
Acts1:25 atwale ekifo ky'omulimu n'obutume Yuda kye yaleka amale agende mu kifo kye.” 
Acts1:26 Ne babakubako akalulu; akalulu ne kagwa ku Matiya, n'abalirwa mu Batume ekkumi n'omu." 
Acts2:1 Olunaku lwa Pentekooti bwe lwatuuka, bonna baali wamu mu kifo kimu." 
Acts2:2 Amangu ago ne wabaawo okuwuuma okuva mu ggulu nga kuli ng'okuyira okwa kikunta ow'amaanyi, ne kujjuza ennyumba yonna mwe baali batudde." 
Acts2:3 Ne balaba ennimi ng'ez'omuliro, ezeeyawuddemu, buli lumu ne lwetondeka ku buli kinnoomu ku bo." 
Acts2:4 Bonna ne bajjula Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ne batandika okwogera ennimi endala, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bwe yabawanga okwogera." 
Acts2:5 Mu Yeruzaalemu mwalimu Abayudaaya, abantu abasomi abaali bavudde mu mawanga gonna agali wansi w'eggulu." 
Acts2:6 Okuwuuma okwo bwe kwawulikika, ebbiina ne lyesomba, ne basamaalirira, kubanga buli omu yabawuliranga nga boogera mu lulimi lwe." 
Acts2:7 Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne beewuunya nga bagamba nti: “Naye bano bonna aboogera si Bagalilaaya?" 
Acts2:8 Kiyinzika kitya ffe okuwulira buli omu mu lulimi lwe? 
Acts2:9 Abapariti, Abamedi, Abeelami, abatuuze b'omu Mezopotamiya, mu Buyudaaya ne mu Kappadokiya, Ponto ne mu Aziya," 
Acts2:10 mu Firugiya ne mu Pamfiliya, mu Misiri ne mu bitundu ebya Libya ebitwalibwa Kureni, n'Abaroma abazze obugenyi, ssaako Abayudaaya n'ab'amawanga abasoma ekiyudaaya," 
Acts2:11 Abakureti n'Abawarabu, tubawulidde nga boogera mu nnimi zaffe ebikuuno bya Katonda.”" 
Acts2:12 Bonna ne bawuniikirira, ne basoberwa, ne bagambagana nti: “Kiri kitya kino?”" 
Acts2:13 Naye abalala ne baduula nga bagamba nti: “Bano batamidde mwenge musu.” 
Acts2:14 Awo Petero n'ayimirira ng'ali wamu n'ekkumi n'omu, n'akangula ku ddoboozi, n'abagamba nti: “Basajja Abayudaaya, nammwe mwenna abasula mu Yeruzaalemu, kino mukimanye, ebigambo byange mubitegere amatu." 
Acts2:15 Abantu bano si batamiivu nga mmwe bwe mulowooza, anti kati essaawa ziri ssatu zokka ez'oku makya." 
Acts2:16 Naye kino kye kiikyo Yoweli Omulanzi kye yagamba nti: 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma ekiribaawo, Omukama y'agamba, ndiyiwa Mwoyo wange ku bantu bonna, batabani bammwe ne bawala bammwe baliranga, n'abavubuka bammwe balirabikirwa, ate n'abakadde bammwe baliroota ebirooto;" 
Acts2:18 mu nnaku ezo abaweereza bange n'abazaana ndibayiwako Mwoyo wange ne balanga. 
Acts2:19 Ndiraga ebikuuno waggulu ku ggulu, n'obubonero wansi ku nsi, omusaayi, omuliro, n'ebire eby'omukka," 
Acts2:20 enjuba erifuuka enzikiza, n'omwezi gulifuuka musaayi, olunaku lw'Omukama nga terunnatuuka, olunaku olukulu olw'ekitalo." 
Acts2:21 Olwo, buli alikowoola erinnya ly'Omukama, aliwonyezebwa.’" 
Acts2:22 “Abasajja Abayisirayeli, muwulire ebigambo bino: Yezu ow'e Nazareti, omusajja Katonda gwe yakakasiza mu mmwe n'ebikolwa eby'amaanyi n'ebyewuunyo, n'obubonero Katonda bye yakolanga mu mmwe ng'ayita mu ye, nga nammwe bwe mumanyi," 
Acts2:23 ono eyaweebwayo nga Katonda bwe yali amaze okukiteesa n'okukimanya, mwamubonyaabonya ne mumutta n'emikono gy'ababi." 
Acts2:24 Naye Katonda yamuzuukiza ng'amuwonya obulumi bw'olumbe, kubanga kyali tekiyinzika lumbe kumwekomya." 
Acts2:25 Anti Dawudi yamwogerako bw'ati nti: “ ‘Omukama namusimbangako eriiso buli budde, kubanga andi ku ddyo nneme kunyeenyezebwa;" 
Acts2:26 Omutima gwange kyeguva gusanyuka n'olulimi lwange ne lujaguza, n'omubiri gwange guliwummulira mu ssuubi." 
Acts2:27 Kubanga omwoyo gwange toliguleka magombe, n'omutuukirivu wo tolimuleka kuvunda." 
Acts2:28 Wammanyisa amakubo ag'obulamu; olinzijuza essanyu mu maaso go’ 
Acts2:29 “Abasajja abooluganda, muleke njogere ku jjajjaffe Dawudi nga sitya; yafa n'aziikibwa, n'amalaalo ge gali mu ffe n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Acts2:30 Naye nno kubanga yali mulanzi, yali amanyi nti Katonda yamulayirira n'ekirayiro nti omwana owuwe amuva munda alituula ku ntebe ye." 
Acts2:31 Bw'atyo yalengera ebiri mu maaso, n'ayogera ku kuzuukira kwa Kristu nti teyalekebwa magombe era n'omubiri gwe tegwavunda." 
Acts2:32 Yezu ono Katonda yamuzuukiza, ffenna tuli bajulirwa b'ekyo." 
Acts2:33 Yezu nno ng'amaze okugulumizibwa ku gwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, ng'amaze okufuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu omusuubize okuva ewa Taata, n'alyoka atuyiira kino kye mulaba era kye muwulira." 
Acts2:34 Dawudi teyalinnya mu ggulu, sso ye yennyini yagamba nti: “ ‘Omukama yagamba mukama wange, nti: “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo," 
Acts2:35 okutuusa lwe ndifuula abalabe bo akatebe k'ebigere byo” ’ 
Acts2:36 Awo nno ennyumba ya Yisirayeli yonna emanyire ddala nti Yezu ono gwe mwakomerera Katonda yamufuula Mukama era Kristu.” 
Acts2:37 Bwe baawulira ebyo, emitima ne gimenyeka; kwe kugamba Petero n'Abatume abalala nti: “Basajja abooluganda, kale tukole ki?”" 
Acts2:38 Petero n'abagamba nti: “Mubonerere ate buli omu mu mmwe abatizibwe mu linnya lya Yezu Kristu, ebibi byammwe bisonyiyibwe; ate mujja kufuna ekirabo kya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts2:39 Anti mmwe mwasuubizibwa: mmwe n'abaana bammwe, n'abo bonna abali ewala, bonna Omukama Katonda waffe b'aliba ayise.”" 
Acts2:40 Era n'ebigambo ebirala bingi n'ababuulira n'okubakubiriza ng'agamba nti: “Mwewonye ezzadde lino ekkyamu.” 
Acts2:41 Abaasiima ebigambo bye, ne babatizibwa; ne kweyongerako emyoyo ng'enkumi ssatu ku lunaku olwo." 
Acts2:42 Ne banyiikiriranga enjigiriza y'Abatume n'okussa ekimu, n'okumenya omugaati, n'okwegayirira." 
Acts2:43 Entiisa n'ekwata buli muntu; Abatume ne bakola ebyewuunyo n'obubonero bungi. 
Acts2:44 Bonna abakkiriza baabanga wamu, n'ebyabwe byonna nga biba bya bonna." 
Acts2:45 Baatundanga ebyabwe n'ebintu, ne babigabira bonna, buli muntu nga bwe yeetaaganga." 
Acts2:46 Era buli lunaku baagendanga wamu mu Kiggwa kya Katonda, nga bamenya omugaati mu maka gaabwe; emmere yaabwe nga bagiriisa ssanyu n'omutima gumu." 
Acts2:47 Baagulumizanga Katonda, era ng'abantu bonna babaagala. Omukama n'abongerangako buli lunaku omuwendo gw'abalokoddwa." 
Acts3:1 Olumu Petero ne Yowanna baali bambuka mu Kiggwa ku ssaawa eyoomwenda ey'okusoma," 
Acts3:2 ne wabaawo omusajja eyava munda ya nnyina nga mulema, eyali asituddwa. Buli lunaku baamussanga ku mulyango gw'Ekiggwa oguyitibwa Omulungi, asabirize ku bayingira mu Kiggwa." 
Acts3:3 Bwe yalaba Petero ne Yowanna nga bayingira bati mu Kiggwa, n'abasabiriza." 
Acts3:4 Petero n'amwekaliriza, wamu ne Yowanna, n'amugamba nti: “Tutunuulire.”" 
Acts3:5 N'oli n'abasimba amaaso ng'asuubira ng'anaafunayo akantu. 
Acts3:6 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Ffeeza ne zaabu sibirina; naye nkuwa kye nnina; mu linnya lya Yezu ow'e Nazareti tambula.” 
Acts3:7 N'amukwata ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo n'amuyimusa; amangu ago ebigere bye n'obukongovvule ne binywera. 
Acts3:8 N'abaguka, n'ayimirira, n'atambula, n'ayingira nabo mu Kiggwa ng'atambula bw'abuukamu, n'atendereza Katonda." 
Acts3:9 Abantu bonna baamulaba ng'atambula, ng'atendereza Katonda." 
Acts3:10 Ne bamutegeerera ddala nga ye wuuyo eyatuulanga ku mulyango Omulungi ogw'Ekiggwa ng'asabiriza, ne beewuunya, ne bawuniikirira olw'ekyali kimutuseeko." 
Acts3:11 Yali akyekutte ku Petero ne Yowanna, abantu bonna ne bajja bunnambiro gye bali ku kisasi ekiyitibwa ekya Solomoni, nga bawuniikiridde." 
Acts3:12 Petero bwe yalaba, n'agamba abantu nti: “Basajja Abayisirayeli, lwaki kino mukyewuunya? Lwaki mututunuulira kyenkana nga ffe tutambuzizza ono n'amaanyi gaffe, oba olw'obutuukirivu bwaffe?" 
Acts3:13 Katonda wa Yiburayimu ne Yizaake ne Yakobo, Katonda wa bajjajjaffe, yagulumiza omuweereza we Yezu, mmwe gwe mwawaayo ne mumwegaana mu maaso ga Pilato, nga ye ayagala okumuta." 
Acts3:14 Naye mmwe mwegaana Oyo Omutuukirivu, Omutuufu, ne musaba omutemu abaweebwe;" 
Acts3:15 ne mutta Kagingo w'obulamu Katonda gwe yazuukizza mu bafu; ffe bajulirwa b'ekigambo ekyo. 
Acts3:16 Ate erinnya lye, olw'okukkiriza mu linnya lye, kyerivudde liwa amaanyi gwe mulabye era gwe mumanyi; okukkiriza okwo okuva mu ye kwe kuwadde ono okuddirawo ddala mu maaso gammwe mwenna." 
Acts3:17 “Kale nno, baganda bange, mmanyi ng'ekyo mwakikoza butamanya, ng'era abafuzi bammwe bwe baakola." 
Acts3:18 Kyokka Katonda bye yali alangiridde mu kamwa k'abalanzi bonna nti Kristu we yali wa kubonaabona, yabituukiriza bw'atyo." 
Acts3:19 Kale nno mubonerere, mweddemu, ebibi byammwe biryoke bisangulibwewo," 
Acts3:20 Omukama asindike bw'atyo obudde obw'okuweweerako okuva ewuwe, olwo abasindikire Kristu nga bwe yabategekera, oyo Yezu," 
Acts3:21 eggulu gwe lirina okugira nga likyamulina okutuusa obudde obw'okutuukiriza byonna Katonda bye yayogeza akamwa k'abalanzi be abatuukirivu okuva edda n'edda. 
Acts3:22 Musa yagamba nti: ‘Omukama Katonda wammwe alibasitusiza okuva mu baganda bammwe omulanzi nga nze; mumuwuliranga mu byonna by'alibagamba. 
Acts3:23 Ate era ekiribaawo, omuntu yenna ataliwulira mulanzi oyo, alikutulirwa ddala ku bantu be.’" 
Acts3:24 Era n'abalanzi bonna abaayogera okuva ku Samweli n'abaamuddirira, nabo ennaku zino baaziranga." 
Acts3:25 Mmwe baana b'abalanzi n'ab'ekiragaano Katonda kye yakuba ne bajjajjaffe, ng'agamba Yiburayimu nti ‘Mu zzadde lyo ebika byonna eby'ensi biriweebwa omukisa.’" 
Acts3:26 Katonda bwe yamala okuzuukiza Omwana we, yasooka kumutumira mmwe, abawe omukisa, buli muntu amuggye mu ngeri ze embi.”" 
Acts4:1 Baba bakyayogera eri abantu, ne bajjirwa bakabona n'omukuumi w'Ekiggwa n'Abasaddukaayo," 
Acts4:2 nga banyiikaavu nnyo kubanga baali bayigiriza abantu nga balangirira mu linnya lya Yezu okuzuukira kw'abafu. 
Acts4:3 Ne babakwata, ne babassa mu kkomera okutuusa enkeera, kubanga obudde bwali kawungeezi." 
Acts4:4 Kyokka bangi ku baali bawulidde ku bigambo ne bakkiriza; olwo omuwendo gw'abasajja ne guwera enkumi ttaano. 
Acts4:5 Enkeera abakulembeze baabwe, abakadde n'abawandiisi ne bakuŋŋaanira mu Yeruzaalemu," 
Acts4:6 wamu ne Anna kabona omukulu, ne Kayafa, ne Yowanna ne Alekisanduro, na bonna ab'omu kika kya bakabona abakulu." 
Acts4:7 Ne babasimba wakati, ne bababuuza nti: “Kale mmwe ebyo mubikola na maanyi ki, oba mu linnya ly'ani?”" 
Acts4:8 Petero ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'abagamba nti: “Mmwe abakulembeze b'abantu n'abakadde," 
Acts4:9 obanga tuwozesebwa olwa leero olw'ekikolwa ekirungi kye tukoledde omuntu omulwadde, nti yawonye atya," 
Acts4:10 mumanye mwenna abantu ba Yisirayeli, nti lwa linnya lya Yezu Kristu ow'e Nazareti, gwe mwakomerera ku musaalaba, naye Katonda gwe yazuukiza mu bafu, olw'okubeera oyo ono kyavudde ayimirira wano mu maaso gammwe nga yenna mulamu." 
Acts4:11 Oyo lye jjinja mmwe abazimbi lye mwagaana, naye erifuuse lukulwe mu nsonda." 
Acts4:12 Era mpaawo n'omu muva bulokofu, kubanga tewali linnya ddala wansi w'eggulu eryali lituumiddwa mu bantu mwe tulina kulokolerwa.”" 
Acts4:13 Bwe baalaba obuvumu bwa Petero ne Yowanna, sso nga bamanyi bwe bataali bayigirize, wabula abantu aba bulijjo, ne beewuunya. Ne bamanya nti baayitanga ne Yezu." 
Acts4:14 Naye bwe baalaba omuntu eyawonyezebwa ng'ayimiridde nabo awo, ne babulwa we bakiwakanyiza." 
Acts4:15 Ne babalagira okuva mu lukiiko, ne bateesa bokka na bokka," 
Acts4:16 ne bagamba nti: “Abantu bano tubakolere ki? Anti akabonero akenkukunala ke bakoze kalabiddwa bonna ab'omu Yeruzaalemu; tetuyinza kukagaana. 
Acts4:17 Kyokka kino obuteeyongera kucaakaala mu bantu, ka tubatiisetiise baleme kwongera kuyigiriza muntu n'omu mu linnya eryo.”" 
Acts4:18 Ne babayita; ne babakomereza obutayongera kuyigiriza mu linnya lya Yezu. 
Acts4:19 Petero ne Yowanna ne baddamu nti: “Mmwe muba musalawo oba kisaanye mu maaso ga Katonda okuwulira mmwe okusinga Katonda; 
Acts4:20 anti tetusobola butayogera bye twalaba ne bye twawulira.” 
Acts4:21 Bwe baamala okubatiisatiisa, ne babata, nga babuliddwa amagezi ag'okubabonereza olw'okubeera abantu; anti abantu bonna baali batenda Katonda olw'ekyali kikoleddwa." 
Acts4:22 Kubanga omuntu akabonero ak'okuwonya gwe kaali kakoleddwako yali wa myaka ana n'okusoba. 
Acts4:23 Bwe baabata, ne bagenda mu bannaabwe ne babanyumiza byonna bakabona abakulu bye baali babagambye." 
Acts4:24 Bannaabwe olwabiwulira, ne basitulira kumu eddoboozi lyabwe eri Katonda, ne bagamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, ggwe wuuyo eyakola eggulu n'ensi n'ennyanja na byonna ebizirimu," 
Acts4:25 ggwe wuuyo eyayogerera mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu mu kamwa ka Dawudi omuweereza wo nti: “ ‘Lwaki ab'amawanga beejuumuula, n'abantu bakola enkwe omutali nsa?" 
Acts4:26 Bakabaka b'ensi batala, n'abafuzi b'ensi bakuŋŋaana, okulwanyisa Omukama n'Omusiige we.’" 
Acts4:27 “Ggwe wamma, bombi Erode ne Ponsiyo Pilato beegatta wamu n'ab'amawanga n'Abayudaaya mu kibuga kino okulwanyisa Omuweereza wo Omutuukirivu Yezu, gwe wasiiga," 
Acts4:28 ne batuukiriza ebyo omukono gwo n'enteesa yo bye byali bitegese okubaawo. 
Acts4:29 Kaakano nno, ayi Mukama, tunuulira okutiisatiisa kwabwe, abaweereza bo obawe okwogera ekigambo kyo n'obuvumu bwonna," 
Acts4:30 ng'ogolola omukono gwo okuwonya n'okukola obubonero n'ebyewuunyo mu linnya ly'Omuweereza wo Omutuukirivu Yezu Kristu.” 
Acts4:31 Bwe baamala okwegayirira, ekifo mwe baali bakuŋŋaanidde ne kikankana; bonna ne bajjula Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ne boogera ekigambo kya Katonda n'obuvumu." 
Acts4:32 Ekibiina ky'abo abakkiriza kyali kya mutima gumu n'emmeeme emu; mpaawo n'omu yatwalanga by'alina ng'ebibye ku bubwe, wabula buli kintu nga bakitwala ng'ekya bonna." 
Acts4:33 Okuzuukira kwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu Abatume ne bakukakasa n'amaanyi mangi, era nga bonna eneema nkumu ezibaliko." 
Acts4:34 Mu bo temwali awamma n'omu, kubanga bonna abaalina ebibanja oba amayumba baabitundanga, ne baleeta omuwendo oguvuddemu," 
Acts4:35 ne bagussa ku bigere by'Abatume, ne bigabirwa buli omu nga bwe yeetaaganga." 
Acts4:36 Ne Yozefu, Abatume gwe baakazaako erya Barunaba, erivvuunulwa nti Omwana w'Ekikubagizo, eyali Omuleevi, omuzaaliranwa w'omu Kupuro," 
Acts4:37 n'atunda ennimiro gye yalina, omuwendo ogwavaamu n'aguleeta n'agussa ku bigere by'Abatume." 
Acts5:1 Omusajja omu erinnya lye Ananiya, wamu ne mukazi we Saffira, yatunda ekibanja," 
Acts5:2 naye ne yeesigalizaako ku muwendo ogwatundibwamu, nga ne mukazi we akimanyiiko. N'addira ekitundu ekimu n'akissa ku bigere by'Abatume." 
Acts5:3 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Ananiya, Sitaani lwaki ajjuzizza omutima gwo okulimba Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ne weesigalizaako ekitundu ku muwendo ogutundiddwa mu nnimiro?" 
Acts5:4 Bw'ebadde tennatundibwa, tebadde yiyo? Bw'emaze okutundibwa, tebadde mu buyinza bwo? Lwaki nno olowoozezza ekigambo ekyo mu mutima gwo? Tolimbye bantu, wabula Katonda.”" 
Acts5:5 Ananiya olwawulira ebigambo ebyo, n'agwa wansi, n'akalirawo. Ensisi ey'amaanyi n'ekwata bonna abaakiwulira." 
Acts5:6 Abavubuka ne bayimuka ne bamuggyawo, ne bamufulumya ne bamuziika." 
Acts5:7 Waali waakayita ebbanga nga lya ssaawa ssatu, ne mukazi we n'ayingira, nga tamanyi bifuddeyo." 
Acts5:8 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Mbuulira obanga ennimiro ogwo gwe muwendo gwe mwagitunze.” N'addamu nti: “Yee, gwe guugwo.”" 
Acts5:9 Petero n'amugamba nti: “Lwaki mwetabye wamu okukema Mwoyo w'Omukama? Wulira ebigere by'abo abaziise balo biri ku mulyango; naawe bajja kukufulumya.” 
Acts5:10 Amangu ago omukazi n'agwa ku bigere bye, n'akalirawo. Abavubuka bwe baayingira, ne bamusanga ng'afudde, ne bamufulumya ne bamuziika kumpi ne bba." 
Acts5:11 Ensisi ey'amaanyi n'ekwata Ekleziya yenna ne bonna abaawulira ebintu bino. 
Acts5:12 Abatume ne bakola obubonero n'ebyewuunyo bingi mu bantu. Bonna nga babeera wamu ku kisasi kya Solomoni. 
Acts5:13 Naye mu balala nga temuli aguma kubeegattako, kyokka ng'abantu babagulumiza." 
Acts5:14 Bangi abakkiriza, ebibiina by'abasajja n'abakazi, ne beegatta ku Mukama." 
Acts5:15 Baaleetanga n'abalwadde baabwe ku makubo, ne babagalamiza ku bitanda ne ku nnyinyo, Petero ng'abadde ayita, waakiri ekisiikirize kye kibatuukeko." 
Acts5:16 Era abantu bangi ne beesomba okuva mu bibuga ebyetoolodde Yeruzaalemu, nga baleeta abalwadde n'abakwatiddwa emyoyo emigwagwa, bonna ne bawonyezebwa." 
Acts5:17 Naye kabona omukulu n'ayimuka na bonna abaali naye, kwe kugamba nti ekibiina ky'Abasaddukaayo," 
Acts5:18 obuggya nga bubakutte, ne bakwata Abatume ne babasuula mu kkomera ery'olukale." 
Acts5:19 Naye malayika w'Omukama n'ajja ekiro n'aggula enzigi z'ekkomera, n'abafulumya, n'abagamba nti:" 
Acts5:20 “Mugende muyimirire mu Kiggwa muyigirize abantu ebigambo byonna eby'Obulamu buno.” 
Acts5:21 Nabo olwawulira ebyo, ne bagenda mu Kiggwa mu matulutulu, ne bayigiriza. Awo kabona omukulu n'ajja n'abo abaali naye, ne bayita olukiiko olukulu n'olukiiko lwonna olw'abakadde olwa Yisirayeli, ne batumya mu kkomera baleetebwe." 
Acts5:22 Naye abaserikale bwe baatuukayo, ne batabasangamu mu kkomera, ne baddayo, ne bagamba nti:" 
Acts5:23 “Ekkomera tusanze lisibiddwa bulungi, n'abakuumi nga bayimiridde ku nzigi, naye bwe tugguddewo, tetusanzeemu muntu.”" 
Acts5:24 Omukuumi w'Ekiggwa ne bakabona abakulu bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo, ne basoberwa ku bantu bano ne ku kinaava mu bino." 
Acts5:25 Awo omu we yajjira, n'ababuulira nti: “Abasajja be mwatadde mu kkomera baabali mu Kiggwa, bayimiridde bayigiriza abantu.”" 
Acts5:26 Omukuumi n'abaserikale ne bagenda, ne babaleeta, naye nga si na kukaka, anti baali batya abantu okubakuba amayinja." 
Acts5:27 Bwe baabatuusa, ne babayimiriza mu lukiiko. Kabona omukulu n'ababuuza," 
Acts5:28 n'abagamba nti: “Twabakuutira obutageza kuyigiriza mu linnya eryo, sso laba kati Yeruzaalemu kyonna mukibunyizza enjigiriza yammwe, ate mwagala n'okussaako omusaayi gw'omuntu oyo.”" 
Acts5:29 Petero n'abatume ne babaddamu nti: “Tuteekwa okuwulira Katonda okusinga abantu. 
Acts5:30 Katonda wa bajjajjaffe yazuukiza Yezu gwe mwatta nga mumuwanika ku muti. 
Acts5:31 Oyo Katonda yamugulumiza ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo ng'Omufuzi era Omulokozi, alyoke awe Yisirayeli okubonerera n'okusonyiyibwa ebibi." 
Acts5:32 Naffe ffe bajulirwa b'ebigambo ebyo, ko ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu Katonda gw'agabidde bonna abamuwulira.”" 
Acts5:33 Bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo, obusungu ne batwagga, ne balowooza okubatta." 
Acts5:34 Naye Omufarisaayo omukiise mu lukiiko, erinnya lye Gamalyeli, omuyigiriza w'amateeka, assibwamu abantu ekitiibwa, n'ayimirira mu lukiiko, n'alagira abasajja bafulumizibweko akabanga." 
Acts5:35 N'abagamba nti: “Basajja Abayisirayeli, mulowooze ku kye mugenda okukolera abantu bano." 
Acts5:36 Ebbanga si ddene emabega, waagenda ne wasitukawo Tewuda, eyeeyitanga omuntu ow'ekitalo, abasajja ng'ebikumi bina ne bamwegattako; naye yattibwa, na bonna abaali bamugoberera ne babuna emiwabo; temuli kyavaamu." 
Acts5:37 Oyo bwe yavaawo, ne wasitukawo Yuda Omugalilaaya, mu budde obw'okwewandiisa, n'asika abamu okumugoberera; n'oyo n'azikirira, na bonna abaali bamugoberera ne basaasaana." 
Acts5:38 Kale nno kyenva mbagamba nti abantu bano mubaveeko, mubaleke, kubanga entegeka eno n'omulimu guno obanga bya bantu, bijja kuzikirira." 
Acts5:39 Naye obanga biva wa Katonda, temujja kusobola kubizikiriza; ate mpozzi mujja kwesanga nga mulwanyisa Katonda.”" 
Acts5:40 Awo nabo ne bamukkiriza. Abatume ne babayita munda, ne babaswanyuula, ne babakuutira obutayogera n'akatono mu linnya lya Yezu, ne babata." 
Acts5:41 Ne bava mu maaso g'olukiiko nga basanyufu olw'okusaanira okutoowazibwa okubeera erinnya. 
Acts5:42 Ate buli lunaku mu Kiggwa n'awaka nga tebayosa kuyigiriza n'okulangirira Kristu Yezu. 
Acts6:1 Mu budde obwo, omuwendo gw'abayigirizwa bwe gwagenda gweyongera, Abagereeki ne batandika okwemulugunyiza Abeebureeyi, kubanga bannamwandu baabwe tebaafibwangako mu kugabana okwa bulijjo." 
Acts6:2 Awo Ekkumi n'Ababiri ne bakuŋŋaanya ekibiina ky'abayigirizwa, ne babagamba nti: “Si kituufu ffe okulekayo okuyigiriza ekigambo kya Katonda ne tudda mu kugaba emmere." 
Acts6:3 Kale nno, abooluganda, mwelondemu abasajja musanvu aboogerwako obulungi, abajjudde Mwoyo n'amagezi, be tuba tussa ku mulimu ogwo." 
Acts6:4 Ffe tujja kwemalira ku kwegayirira ne ku kuweereza ekigambo.” 
Acts6:5 Abantu bonna ne basiima kye baagamba, ne balonda Stefano omusajja ajjudde okukkiriza ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, ne Filippo, ne Purokoro, ne Nikanori, ne Temoni, ne Parumena, ne Nikolawo ow'e Antiyokiya eyali asomye ekiyudaaya," 
Acts6:6 ne babaleeta mu maaso g'Abatume; nga bamaze okwegayirira, ne babassaako emikono." 
Acts6:7 Ekigambo ky'Omukama ne kyeyongera okubuna, n'omuwendo gw'abayigirizwa ne gweyongera nnyo mu Yeruzaalemu; era ne bakabona bangi ne bagondera okukkiriza." 
Acts6:8 Stefano yajjula eneema n'amaanyi, n'akola ebyewuunyisa ebinene n'obubonero mu bantu." 
Acts6:9 Awo abamu mu sinaagooga eyayitibwanga ey'Abaateebwa mu Buddu, n'ey'Abakureni, n'ey'ab'e Alekisanduriya, n'abamu ab'omu Silisiya n'e Aziya, ne basituka ne bawakana ne Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Naye ne batasobola kuwakanya magezi na Mwoyo bye yayogezanga. 
Acts6:11 Awo ne bafukuutirira abantu, abaagamba nti: “Twamuwulira ng'ayogera ebigambo ebivuma Musa ne Katonda.”" 
Acts6:12 Ne basiikuula abantu, n'abakadde, n'abawandiisi, ne bamuzinda, ne bamukwata, ne bamuleeta mu lukiiko." 
Acts6:13 Ne bassaawo abajulizi ab'obulimba abaagamba nti: “Omusajja ono tata kwogera bigambo ku kifo kino ekitukuvu ne ku Tteeka; 
Acts6:14 twamuwulira ng'agamba nti: ‘Yezu ow'e Nazareti ajja kuzikiriza ekifo kino, akyuse n'empisa Musa ze yaleka atuwadde.’ ”" 
Acts6:15 Bonna abaali mu lukiiko bwe baamutunuulira, ne balaba ng'amaaso ge gali ng'amaaso ga malayika." 
Acts7:1 Kabona omukulu n'amugamba nti: “Bwe biri bityo?” 
Acts7:2 Ye n'addamu nti: “Basajja abooluganda, bakitange, mumpulirize. Katonda ow'ekitiibwa yalabikira jjajjaffe Yiburayimu ng'akyali mu Mezopotamiya, nga tannasenga mu Karani," 
Acts7:3 n'amugamba nti: ‘Leka ensi yo n'eŋŋanda zo, ogende mu nsi gye ndikulaga.’" 
Acts7:4 Awo kwe kuva mu nsi y'Abakaludeya n'abeera mu Karani. Kitaawe bwe yafa, Katonda n'amuggyayo, n'amuleeta mu nsi eno gye mulimu;" 
Acts7:5 naye teyamuwaamu busika, newandibadde obuweza ekigere ekimu; kyokka n'amusuubiza okubumuwa bubeerere ddala bubwe n'ezzadde lye eririmuddirira, newandibadde nga mu bbanga eryo teyalina mwana." 
Acts7:6 Katonda n'amugamba bw'atyo, nti ezzadde lye liriba ggwiira mu nsi eddala eririfugirayo obuddu ne liriyisa bubi emyaka ebikumi bina." 
Acts7:7 Omukama n'agamba nti: ‘Naye eggwanga lye baliweereza mu buddu ndirisalira omusango; oluvannyuma balivaayo, ne bampeereza mu kifo kino.’" 
Acts7:8 Awo n'amuwa endagaano y'okutayirirwa. Awo Yiburayimu n'azaala Yizaake, n'amutayirira ku lunaku olwomunaana; Yizaake n'azaala Yakobo, ne Yakobo n'azaala Bajjajjaffe Abakulu ekkumi n'ababiri." 
Acts7:9 “Bajjajjaffe Abakulu baakwatirwa Yozefu obuggya ne bamutunda mu Misiri. Naye Katonda n'abeera naye. 
Acts7:10 Yamuwonya ennaku ze zonna, n'amuwa okuganja n'amagezi eri Faraawo kabaka w'e Misiri; ye n'amufuula mufuzi mu Misiri ne ku nnyumba ye yonna." 
Acts7:11 Awo enjala n'egwa nnyingi mu nsi y'e Misiri ne mu Kanaani; obuyinike ne buba bungi; bajjajjaffe ne babulwa emmere. 
Acts7:12 Yakobo bwe yawulira nga mu Misiri eriyo ku ŋŋano, n'atumayo bajjajjaffe omulundi gwe omubereberye." 
Acts7:13 Ku mulundi ogwokubiri Yozefu ne yeeraga eri baganda be n'ekika kya Yozefu ne kimanyika ewa Faraawo. 
Acts7:14 Awo Yozefu n'atuma, n'ayita kitaawe Yakobo n'ab'oluganda lwe bonna; bonna wamu abantu nsanvu mu bataano;" 
Acts7:15 Yakobo n'aserengeta mu Misiri; n'afa, ne bajjajjaffe nabo ne bafa." 
Acts7:16 Ne batwalibwa e Sekemu, ne baziikibwa mu ntaana Yiburayimu gye yali aguze n'omuwendo gwa ffeeza ku baana ba Emmori mu Sekemu." 
Acts7:17 “Obudde obw'ekisuubizo Katonda kye yali alazaanyizza Yiburayimu bwe bwatuuka, abantu ne baala, ne babeera bangi mu Misiri," 
Acts7:18 okutuusa lwe waasitukawo kabaka omulala mu Misiri ataamanya ku Yozefu. 
Acts7:19 Ono n'asalira eggwanga lyaffe enkwe, n'akaka bajjajjaffe okubasuuza abaana baabwe abawere baleme kulama." 
Acts7:20 Mu budde obwo ne Musa we yazaalirwa, nga mulungi mu maaso ga Katonda, n'alerebwa emyezi esatu mu nnyumba ya kitaawe." 
Acts7:21 Bwe yamala okusuulibwa, muwala wa Faraawo n'amwetwalira n'amukuza ng'omwana we." 
Acts7:22 Musa n'agunjulwa mu magezi gonna ag'Abamisiri, nga wa maanyi mu bigambo ne mu bikolwa bye." 
Acts7:23 “Bwe yaweza emyaka ana, ekirowoozo ne kimujjira mu mwoyo eky'okulambula baganda be, abaana ba Yisirayeli." 
Acts7:24 Bwe yalaba omu ng'akolerwa bubi, n'amutaasa, n'awoolera eggwanga olw'oyo eyali anyigirizibwa, n'atta Omumisiri." 
Acts7:25 Ye yali alowooza nti baganda be bategedde nti Katonda anaabanunula n'omukono gwe, naye bo tebaategeera." 
Acts7:26 Olunaku olwaddirira, n'ajja gye bali nga balwana, n'agezaako okubatabaganya ng'agamba nti: ‘Basajja battu, muli ba luganda; lwaki mukoleragana obubi?’" 
Acts7:27 Naye oli eyali akolera munne obubi n'amusindika eri, n'amugamba nti: ‘Ani yakussaawo ng'omukulu era omulamuzi waffe?" 
Acts7:28 Oyagala kunzita nga bwe watta Omumisiri jjo?’ 
Acts7:29 Musa bwe yawulira ekigambo ekyo, n'adduka, n'awaŋŋangukira mu nsi y'e Midiyaani, gye yazaalira abaana babiri." 
Acts7:30 “Nga wayise emyaka ana, malayika n'amulabikira mu ddungu ku lusozi Sinayi, mu lulimi lw'omuliro mu kisaka." 
Acts7:31 Musa bwe yalaba, ne yeewuunya ekyo kye yali alabye; bwe yasembera okwekkaanya," 
Acts7:32 eddoboozi ly'Omukama ne lyogera nti: ‘Nze Katonda wa bajjajjaabo, Katonda wa Yiburayimu, Katonda wa Yizaake, Katonda wa Yakobo.’ Musa n'ajugumira, n'ataguma na kwetegereza." 
Acts7:33 Omukama n'amugamba nti: ‘Naanula engatto mu bigere byo, kubanga ekifo ky'oyimiriddemu ttaka ttukuvu." 
Acts7:34 Mazima ndabye okubonaabona kw'abantu bange mu Misiri, mpulidde emiranga gyabwe, ne nzikirira mbawonye. Kale nno, genda, nkutuma mu Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Musa oyo gwe baali bagaanyi nga bawoza mbu: ‘Ani yakussaawo ng'omukulu era omulamuzi waffe?’ Katonda gwe yatuma ng'omukulu era omununuzi n'omukono gwa malayika eyamulabikira mu kisaka. 
Acts7:36 Yabaggyayo ng'amaze okukola ebyewuunyo n'obubonero mu nsi y'e Misiri ne mu Nnyanja Emmyufu ne mu ddungu okumala emyaka amakumi ana. 
Acts7:37 Ye Musa eyagamba Abayisirayeli nti: ‘Katonda alibasibusiza omulanzi okuva mu baganda bammwe ali nga nze.’ 
Acts7:38 Ye wuuyo eyabeeranga n'ekibiina mu ddungu wamu ne malayika eyayogeranga naye ku lusozi Sinayi, era eyabeeranga ne bajjajjaffe, eyafuna ebigambo ebiramu okubituwa." 
Acts7:39 Bajjajjaffe baagaana okumugondera, ne bamusindiikiriza eri, mu mitima gyabwe ne baddayo mu Misiri." 
Acts7:40 Ne bagamba Aroni nti: ‘Tukolere balubaale batukulembere; ono Musa eyatuggya mu nsi y'e Misiri tetumanyi ky'abadde.’ 
Acts7:41 Ne bakola akayana mu nnaku ezo, ne batambirira ekifaananyi ekyo, ne basanyukira kye baali bakoze n'emikono gyabwe." 
Acts7:42 Katonda n'akyuka n'abawaayo mu kusinza nnamunkukumbo w'eggulu, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'abalanzi nti: “ ‘Si mwampeereza ebitambiro n'ebitone, emyaka amakumi ana mu ddungu, nnyumba ya Yisirayeli?" 
Acts7:43 Mwasitula weema ya Moloki, n'emmunyeenye ya lubaale Romufa, ebifaananyi bya balubaale bye mwakola mubisinze; kale nange nzija kubawaŋŋangusa n'okuyisa Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Bajjajjaffe baabeeranga ne Weema y'Obujulirwa mu ddungu; ng'oyo eyayogera ne Musa bwe yali amulagidde okugikola ng'agoberera enfaanana gye yali alabye. 
Acts7:45 Bajjajjaffe baamala okugifuna, ne bagireeta wamu ne Yoswa bwe baamala okulya ensi y'ab'amawanga Katonda be yagoberawo bajjajjaffe. Bwe kityo bwe kyali okutuusa mu biro bya Dawudi." 
Acts7:46 Ono yaganja mu maaso ga Katonda, n'asaba afunire Ennyumba ya Yakobo ekisulo." 
Acts7:47 Naye Solomoni ye yamuzimbira ennyumba. 
Acts7:48 Kyokka Ali Waggulu Ddala tasula mu nnyumba zizimbiddwa mikono, ng'omulanzi bw'agamba nti:" 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Eggulu ye nnamulondo yange, ate ensi ke katebe k'ebigere byange; nnyumba ki gye munanzimbira, Omukama y'agamba, Kifo ki mwe nnaawummulira?" 
Acts7:50 Kazzi bino byonna si mukono gwange gwe gwabikola?’ 
Acts7:51 “Mmwe ab'ensingo enkakanyavu, ab'emitima n'amatu ebitali bitayirire, bulijjo muwaganyalira Mwoyo Mutuukirivu. Nga bajjajjammwe bwe baali, nammwe bwe muli." 
Acts7:52 Mu balanzi bajjajjammwe ani gwe bataayigganya? Batta n'abo abaali balanze okujja kw'Omutuukirivu, kati mmwe gwe mwalyamu olukwe ne mumutemula;" 
Acts7:53 mmwe abaafuna Etteeka nga bwe lyaweebwa bamalayika, naye ne mutalikwata.”" 
Acts7:54 Olwawulira ebyo, ne batwagga emitima, ne bamulumira obujiji." 
Acts7:55 Naye ye ng'ajjudde Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, n'atunuulira eggulu enkaliriza, n'alaba ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ne Yezu ng'atudde ku gwa ddyo gwa Katonda;" 
Acts7:56 n'agamba nti: “Laba, ndaba eggulu libikkuse n'Omwana w'Omuntu ng'atudde ku gwa ddyo gwa Katonda.”" 
Acts7:57 Bo ne baleekaana n'eddoboozi ddene nga bazibiikiriza amatu gaabwe, bonna wamu ne bamugwira," 
Acts7:58 ne bamusuula ebweru w'ekibuga, ne bamukuba amayinja. Abaaliwo ng'abajulirwa ne bassa ebyambalo byabwe ku bigere by'omuvubuka ayitibwa Sawulo." 
Acts7:59 Stefano bwe baabanga bamukuba amayinja, eno nga ye yeegayirira, ng'agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama Yezu, twala omwoyo gwange.”" 
Acts7:60 N'afukamira, n'ayogera n'eddoboozi ddene nti: “Ayi Mukama, tobassaako musango guno.” Bwe yasirissa ebyo, ne yeebaka." 
Acts8:1 Sawulo n'akkirizaganya n'okuttibwa kwe. Ku olwo ekiyigganyizo ekinene ne kisitukira Ekleziya y'e Yeruzaalemu. Bonna, okuggyako Abatume, ne basaasaanira mu bitundu by'e Buyudaaya ne Samariya." 
Acts8:2 Abasajja abasomi ne baziika Stefano, ne bamukungubagira nnyo." 
Acts8:3 Ye Sawulo n'agezaako okuzikiriza Ekleziya; yayingiranga mu mayumba n'awalaawala abasajja n'abakazi, n'abassa mu kkomera." 
Acts8:4 Abaali basaasaanye ne bayitaayita nga bayigiriza ekigambo. 
Acts8:5 Filippo n'agenda mu kibuga ky'Abasamariya, n'ayigiriza abantu baayo Kristu." 
Acts8:6 Ebibiina bwe byalaba obubonero bwe yakolanga, ne biwuliriza n'emmeeme emu ebigambo bya Filippo bye yayigirizanga." 
Acts8:7 Kubanga emyoyo emigwagwa gyavanga mu bangi be gyali gikutte nga gireekaana n'eddoboozi ddene; n'abakonzimbye bangi n'abalema ne bawonyezebwa. 
Acts8:8 Ne wabaawo essanyu lingi mu kibuga ekyo. 
Acts8:9 Waaliwo omusajja, erinnya lye Simoni, emabegako eyali akoze obulaguzi mu kibuga omwo, ng'awuniikiriza ensi ya Samariya, nga yeeyita ow'ekitalo." 
Acts8:10 Bonna nga bamuwulira, okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukadde, nga bagamba nti: “Ono ge maanyi ga Katonda agayitibwa Amakulu.”" 
Acts8:11 Ne bamuwulirizanga, kubanga yali abeewuniikirizza ebbanga ddene n'obufuusa bwe." 
Acts8:12 Bwe bakkiriza nga Filippo amaze okuyigiriza ku bwakabaka bwa Katonda ne ku linnya lya Yezu Kristu, abasajja n'abakazi ne babatizibwa." 
Acts8:13 Mu bbanga eryo ne Simoni naye n'akkiriza. Bwe yamala okubatizibwa, n'asigala ne Filippo. Bwe yalaba obubonero n'ebyewuunyo eby'amaanyi ebikolebwa, n'awuniikirira." 
Acts8:14 Abatume abaali mu Yeruzaalemu bwe baawulira nga Samariya akkirizza ekigambo kya Katonda, ne babatumira Petero ne Yowanna," 
Acts8:15 abakkirirayo ne babasabira bafune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Acts8:16 anti mu bo mwali temunnabaamu n'omu gw'azzeeko, kubanga baali babatiziddwa bubatizibwa mu linnya lya Mukama Yezu." 
Acts8:17 Ne babassaako emikono, ne bafuna Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Acts8:18 Simoni bwe yalaba nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu aweebwa abatume bwe bassa emikono ku bantu, n'abawa ensimbi," 
Acts8:19 n'abagamba nti: “Nange mumpe obuyinza obwo, nange buli gwe nassangako emikono afune Mwoyo Mutuukirivu.”" 
Acts8:20 Naye Petero n'amugamba nti: “Ensimbi zo zizikirire wamu naawe, kubanga olowoozezza nti ekirabo kya Katonda kigulibwa nsimbi." 
Acts8:21 Mu bintu bino tolinaamu kitundu wadde omugabo, kubanga omutima gwo si mutereevu mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Acts8:22 Bonerera ekibi kyo kino, weegayirire Katonda, oboolyawo ekirowoozo ekyo ekiri mu mutima gwo ne kikusonyiyibwa." 
Acts8:23 Kubanga ndaba ng'oli mu bukaawu bw'endulwe ne mu nvuba z'obugwenyufu.” 
Acts8:24 Simoni n'ayanukula nti: “Munsabire ew'Omukama, ku ebyo byonna bye mwogeddeko wabulewo ekintuukirira.”" 
Acts8:25 Bwe baamala okukakasa n'okubuulira ekigambo ky'Omukama, ne baddayo e Yeruzaalemu nga bagenda bayigiriza Evangili mu byalo bingi eby'Abasamariya." 
Acts8:26 Awo malayika w'Omukama n'agamba Filippo nti: “Situka odde emaserengeta ng'okutte ekkubo erikkirira okuva e Yeruzaalemu okulaga e Gaza; lino ddungu.” 
Acts8:27 N'asituka n'agenda. Kati nno omusajja Omwesiyopiya, omulaawo, omukungu wa nnaabakyala Kandake ow'Abasiyoopiya eyali akuuma enkuluze ze zonna, yali azze mu Yeruzaalemu okusinza." 
Acts8:28 Yali addayo ng'atudde mu kigaali kye ng'asoma Yisaaya omulanzi.
