Acts25:20 Nze bwe nasoberwa ku ngeri y'okubuulirizaamu ku bino, ne mmubuuza obanga akkiriza okugenda e Yeruzaalemu n'okuwozesebwa eyo ku ebyo." 
Acts25:21 Ye Pawulo n'asaba akuumirwe mu busibe okutuusa Kabaka Omutiibwa lw'aliwa ensala ye. Ne mmulagira akuumibwe okutuusa lwe ndimuweereza ewa Kayisari.” 
Acts25:22 Agrippa n'agamba Festo nti: “Nange nandyagadde okuwulira ku musajja oyo yennyini.” Festo n'agamba nti: “Kale, enkya onoomuwulira.”" 
Acts25:23 Enkeera, Agrippa ne Berunike, ne bajja mu kitiibwa kinene, ne bayingira mu masengere nga bali n'abakulu b'abaserikale n'abakulu b'ekibuga. Festo n'alagira ne baleeta Pawulo." 
Acts25:24 Festo n'agamba nti: “Agrippa Kabaka, nammwe mwenna abasajja abakuŋŋaanye wano naffe, omusajja ono mumulabye, Abayudaaya bonna gwe bansaba e Yeruzaalemu na wano, nga baleekaana nti tasaanye kusigala nga mulamu." 
Acts25:25 Naye nze nasanga nga taliiko kye yakola kimugwanyiza kufa, naye kubanga yajulira Kabaka Omutiibwa, nange nakkiriza okumuweerezaayo." 
Acts25:26 Naye nno, siraba bikakafu ku ye bye mpandiikira mukama wange; kyenvudde mmuleeta mu maaso gammwe, naddala mu maaso go, Kabaka Agrippa, ng'amaze okubuuzibwa, nfune kye mpandiika." 
Acts25:27 Anti ndowooza nga tekiriimu makulu okuweereza omusibe n'ototegeeza bimuvunaanibwa.” 
Acts26:1 Agrippa n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Okkirizibwa okweyogerera.” Awo Pawulo n'agolola omukono n'awa empoza ye nti: 
Acts26:2 “Kabaka Agrippa, neesiimye okuba nga ŋŋenda kuwoleza mu maaso go olwa leero ebyo byonna Abayudaaya bye banvunaana," 
Acts26:3 kubanga omanyi bulungi empisa z'Abayudaaya zonna n'empaka zaabwe; kyenva nkwegayirira ompulirize n'obugumiikiriza. 
Acts26:4 “Engeri gye nayisangamu okuva mu buvubuka olubereberye mu ggwanga lyange ne mu Yeruzaalemu emanyiddwa Abayudaaya bonna. 
Acts26:5 Singa baagala, bandinjulidde, bamanyidde ddala nti okuva edda mbadde neeyisa ng'Omufarisaayo, nga ngoberera ekibiina ekisinga obukakali mu ddiini yaffe." 
Acts26:6 Kaakano nnyimiridde wano okuwoza olw'okubeera okusuubira mu ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza bajjajjaffe; 
Acts26:7 ebyo ebika byaffe ekkumi n'ebibiri bye bisuubira okufuna, kyebiva binyiikira okwegayirira ekiro n'emisana. Olw'okusuubira okwo, ayi Kabaka, Abayudaaya kwe basinzidde okumpawaabira." 
Acts26:8 Lwaki muzibuwalirwa okukkiriza nti Katonda azuukiza abafu? 
Acts26:9 “Wamma ggwe nange nasooka kulowooza nga nteekwa okukola ebingi okuwakanya erinnya lya Yezu ow'e Nazareti. 
Acts26:10 Ekyo nakikola e Yeruzaalemu, ne nzisa bangi abatuukirivu mu kkomera n'obuyinza okuva eri bakabona abakulu. Ate bwe baabanga battibwa, nange nga nkisemba." 
Acts26:11 Nababonerezanga mu sinaagooga zonna emirundi mingi, ne mbawaliriza okuvuma Katonda, ate bwe neeyongera okubakwatirwa obusungu, ne mbayigganya ne mu bibuga eby'ebweru." 
Acts26:12 “Bwe ntyo ne ŋŋenda e Damasiko nga nnina obuyinza n'olukusa okuva eri bakabona abakulu. 
Acts26:13 Mu ttuntu, ayi Kabaka, mu kkubo ne ndaba ekitangaala ekiva mu ggulu nga kyakaayakana n'okusinga enjuba, ne kyaka okunneetooloola n'abaali nange." 
Acts26:14 Ffenna ne tugwa ku ttaka; ne mpulira eddoboozi eriŋŋamba mu Lwebureeyi nti: ‘Sawulo, Sawulo, lwaki onjigganya? Ozibuwalirwa okusamba ekikato?’" 
Acts26:15 Ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Ggwe ani, Mukama?’ Omukama n'addamu nti: ‘Nze Yezu gw'oyigganya." 
Acts26:16 Kale golokoka, oyimirire ku bigere byo, kubanga nkulabikidde lwa nsonga eno, nkufuule omubaka n'omujulirwa w'ebyo by'olabye n'ebyo bye nnaakulaga." 
Acts26:17 Nzija kukutaasa ku b'eggwanga lyo ne ku b'amawanga gye nkutuma," 
Acts26:18 ozibule amaaso gaabwe, balyoke bave mu kizikiza badde mu kitangaala; bave mu buyinza bwa Sitaani badde mu bwa Katonda, bafune ekisonyiwo ky'ebibi byabwe n'omugabo wamu n'abo abatukuzibwa olw'okunzikiriza.’" 
Acts26:19 “Awo nno, ayi Kabaka Agrippa, saatenguwa kulabikirwa okwava mu ggulu." 
Acts26:20 Nasooka kuyigiriza ba mu Damasiko, ne nzizaako ab'omu Yeruzaalemu, ne mu Buyudaaya wonna, ne mu b'amawanga, babonerere, badde eri Katonda nga bakola ebikolwa ebigya mu kubonerera kwabwe." 
Acts26:21 Olw'ensonga eyo Abayudaaya kyebaava bankwatira mu Kiggwa, ne baagala okunzita." 
Acts26:22 Naye Katonda yambeera n'okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero, bwe ntyo nkyayigiriza bonna, omuto n'omukulu, nga sibabuulira kirala wabula ebyo abalanzi ne Musa bye baagamba nti birituukirira:" 
Acts26:23 nti Kristu yali wa kubonaabona, ate olw'okubeera omubereberye mu kuzuukira mu bafu, alirangirira ekitangaala eri abantu n'eri ab'amawanga.”" 
Acts26:24 Yali akyawoza, Festo n'ayogera mu ddoboozi ekkangufu nti: “Pawulo, olaluse. Okuyiga ebingi kukusudde eddalu.”" 
Acts26:25 Naye Pawulo n'agamba nti: “Oweekitiibwa Festo, sinnalaluka. Bye njogera ge mazima era bigambo bya magezi." 
Acts26:26 Kabaka bino abimanyi; mbimubuulira nga sitya; nkakasa nga mu ebyo tewali ky'amukisibwa, kino tekyakolebwa mu nkiso." 
Acts26:27 Kabaka Agrippa, okkiriza abalanzi? Mmanyi ng'okkiriza.”" 
Acts26:28 Agrippa n'agamba Pawulo nti: “Mu kabanga akatono ompooyawooya onfuule Omukristu!” 
Acts26:29 Pawulo n'addamu nti: “Oba akabanga katono, oba kanene, si nsonga; kino kye nsaba Katonda nti: si ggwe wekka, naye n'abo bonna abampuliriza olwa leero, bafuuke nga nze bwe ndi, mpozzi okuggyako enjegere zino.”" 
Acts26:30 Awo kabaka n'ayimuka, n'owessaza ne Berunike, era n'abalala bonna abaali batudde nabo." 
Acts26:31 Bwe badda ebbali, ne bagambagana nti: “Omusajja oyo tewali ky'akola kimugwanyiza kufa oba kusibibwa.”" 
Acts26:32 Agrippa n'agamba Festo nti: “Omusajja ono yanditeereddwa taba kubeera nga yajulira ewa Kayisari.” 
Acts27:1 Bwe kyamala okusalibwawo nti twali ba kuwunguka tugende mu Yitale, Pawulo n'abasibe abalala ne babakwasa senturiyo, erinnya lye Yuliyo, ow'ekibinja ekiyitibwa ekya Kabaka." 
Acts27:2 Ne tusaabala eryato lya Aduramuttiyo eryali ligenda okuwunguka nga liyitira ku myalo egiri ku lubalama lwa Aziya, ne tusimbula nga tuli ne Aristariko Omumasedoni ow'e Tessalonika." 
Acts27:3 Ku lunaku olwaddako ne tugoba e Sidoni. Yuliyo n'ayisa bulungi Pawulo, n'amukkiriza okugenda mu mikwano gye bamulabirire." 
Acts27:4 Ne tusitula okuva awo, ne tuvuga nga tuyita kumpi ne Kupuro; kubanga empewo zaali zituva mu maaso." 
Acts27:5 Bwe twamala okusala ennyanja y'e Silisiya ne Pamfiliya, ne tugoba e Mira eky'omu Lukiya." 
Acts27:6 Senturiyo n'asangawo eryato ly'e Alekisanduriya nga liraga mu Yitale, n'atusaabaza omwo." 
Acts27:7 Ne tumala ennaku nnyingi nga tugenda tuseeyeeya mpolampola, ne tugoba na kuwaliriza mu bulumba bwa Kunido, anti empewo nga tetuganya; ne tuvuga nga tuyita kumpi ne Kureti ku luuyi olwa Salumone." 
Acts27:8 Ne tugenda nga tukikiitana nga tugoba olubalama okutuusa lwe twagoba mu kifo ekiyitibwa Omwalo Omulungi, okumpi nakyo awali ekibuga Lasaya." 
Acts27:9 Ebbanga olwo nga liyiseewo ddene, nga n'okuwunguka kumaze okuba okw'akabi, n'okusiiba nakwo nga kumaze okuyita, Pawulo n'abalabula nti:" 
Acts27:10 “Basajja, ndaba ng'olugendo lujja kubeera lwa kabi n'okufiirwa kunene, si kwa bintu na lyato kyokka, naye n'obulamu bwaffe bwennyini.”" 
Acts27:11 Naye senturiyo yasinga kuwuliriza mugoba ne nnannyini lyato okusinga Pawulo bye yali agamba. 
Acts27:12 Kubanga omwalo gwali tegumalikamu budde bwa butiti, abasinga obungi ne bateesa basitule okuva awo, omukisa nga gubakutte bagobe e Fenikisi, omwalo gwa Kureti ogutunuulidde ebugwanjuba mu mambuka n'ebugwanjuba mu maserengeta, bamalire awo obudde obw'obutiti." 
Acts27:13 Empewo ez'emaserengeta bwe zaafuuwa empolampola, ne balowooza nti ky'ekyo kye babadde beetaaga; ne basitula ennanga, ne bavuga nga bakiiba Kureti nga bagoba olubalama." 
Acts27:14 Waayitawo ebbanga ttono, empewo ey'omuggundu eyitibwa Ewurakulo n'ebajjira ng'efuluma ku kizinga." 
Acts27:15 Eryato ne likwatibwa nga terisobola kugumira muyaga; kwe kulireka, ne tumala gakuŋŋunsibwa tutyo." 
Acts27:16 Ne tusindikibwa emmanga ku kizinga kye bayita Kulawuda, ne tuwaliriza nnyo okubakiriza akaato." 
Acts27:17 Bwe baamala okukalinnyisa, ne beetoolooza eryato emiguwa. Olw'okutya nti bayinza okutomera enjazi ku Siruti, ne bassa ebivuga eryato, ne bamala gakuŋŋunsibwa batyo." 
Acts27:18 Omuyaga nga gutusinzizza amaanyi, ku lunaku olwaddako, ne basooka okusuulako ebintu ebimu mu nnyanja;" 
Acts27:19 ku lunaku olwokusatu n'ebivuga eryato byennyini ne babikasuka n'emikono gyabwe. 
Acts27:20 Ne wayita ennaku nnyingiko, ng'enjuba n'emmunyeenye tebirabikako, ng'omuyaga mungi gukunta, essuubi ery'okuwona ne liviibwako." 
Acts27:21 Nga bamaze ebbanga ddene nga tewali mmere, Pawulo n'ayimirira wakati waabwe n'agamba nti: “Basajja, singa mwampuliriza ne mutava Kureti, tewandibaddewo kwonooneka na kufiirizibwa kuno." 
Acts27:22 Kale nno mbasaba mugume omwoyo; kubanga mpaawo bulamu bunaatokomoka, wabula lyato lyokka." 
Acts27:23 Kubanga malayika wa Katonda antwala era gwe mpeereza, yayimiridde we ndi ekiro kino," 
Acts27:24 n'agamba nti: ‘Pawulo, leka kutya, olina okuyimirira mu maaso ga Kayisari; laba, Katonda akuwadde abo bonna abasaabadde naawe.’" 
Acts27:25 Kale nno basajja, mugume omwoyo kubanga neesiga Katonda nga kinaaba bwe kityo nga bwe yakigambye." 
Acts27:26 Mazima tujja kusuulibwa ku kizinga ekimu.” 
Acts27:27 Mu kiro eky'ekkumi n'ebina, bwe twali tukuŋŋunsibwa ku nnyanja Aduriya, mu ttumbi, abagoba ne bakenga nga twali tusemberera olukalu." 
Acts27:28 Bwe baapima obuwanvu bw'amazzi, ne basangawo ebifuba ng'amakumi abiri. Ate bwe beeyongerayo mu maaso, ne bapima, ne basangawo kkumi na bitaano." 
Acts27:29 Olw'okutya nti twali tuyinza okutomera enjazi, ne basuula ennanga nnya ku luuyi lw'ekiwenda, ne basabirira obudde bukye." 
Acts27:30 Abagoba abamu baayagala okudduka mu lyato, ne bassa akaato ku nnyanja nga beekwasa nti bagenda kusuula nnanga ku luuyi lw'ensanda." 
Acts27:31 Pawulo n'agamba senturiyo n'abaserikale nti: “Abagoba bano bwe batasigala mu lyato temulina buwonero.” 
Acts27:32 Awo abaserikale ne basala emiguwa gy'akaato, ne bakaleka ne kagenda." 
Acts27:33 Obudde nga bukya, Pawulo n'abeegayirira bonna balye ku mmere, ng'agamba nti: “Luno olunaku lwa kkumi na nnya ng'emitima gibeewanise, awatali mmere, nga temulina ke mulidde;" 
Acts27:34 kale nno mbeegayiridde, mulye ku mmere; ejja kubazzaamu amaanyi, kasita tewajja kubeera luviiri na lumu luva ku mutwe gwa muntu n'omu ku mmwe.”" 
Acts27:35 Bwe yasirissa ebyo, n'akwata omugaati, ne yeebaza Katonda mu maaso ga bonna, n'agumenyamu, n'atandika okulya." 
Acts27:36 Olwo bonna ne baddamu omwoyo, nabo bennyini ne balya ku mmere." 
Acts27:37 Ffenna mu lyato twalimu abantu ebikumi bibiri mu nsanvu mu mukaaga. 
Acts27:38 Bwe baamala okukkuta emmere, ne bateewuluzaako ku lyato nga basuula eŋŋano mu nnyanja." 
Acts27:39 Obudde bwe bwakya, olukalu olwo ne batalutegeera; kyokka ne balengera ekyondo nga kiriko olubalama, ne bateesa okugobyako eryato bwe baba nga basobola." 
Acts27:40 Awo ne bakutula ennanga, ne bazireka mu nnyanja, era ne basumululirawo n'emiguwa egy'enkasi egoba, ne bawanika ettanga ery'omu maaso eri empewo, ne boolekera olubalama." 
Acts27:41 Bwe baayingirira ekyereero, eryato ne balitomeza, ensanda n'eyingira muli, n'esikkattira nga tekyenyeenya, ekiwenda ne kimenyekamu olw'amaanyi g'amayengo." 
Acts27:42 Abaserikale ne bateesa okutta abasibe, sikulwa nga wabaawo awuga n'abomba." 
Acts27:43 Naye senturiyo olw'okwagala okuwonya Pawulo, n'abagaana okutuukiriza ekirowoozo kyabwe. N'alagira abasobola okuwuga be baba basooka okwesuula mu nnyanja bagobe ettale," 
Acts27:44 abasigaddewo, abamu bagendere ku mbaawo, abalala ku bitundutundu by'eryato. Bonna bwe batyo ne batuuka ku lukalu nga bawonye." 
Acts28:1 Bwe twamala okuwona, ne tutegeera ng'ekizinga ekyo kiyitibwa Maluta." 
Acts28:2 Bannansi b'okwo ne batugirira ekisa ekitasangika; baakuma omuliro, ne batusembeza ffenna, kubanga enkuba yali etandiikiriza okutonnya n'obudde nga bunnyogoga." 
Acts28:3 Pawulo bwe yamala okukuŋŋaanya omuganda gw'obutittiriri, n'agusuula ku muliro; embalasaasa n'efubutukamu olw'ebbugumu, ne yeerippa ku mukono gwe." 
Acts28:4 Bannansi bwe baalaba ng'ekintu kirebeetera ku mukono gwe, ne bagambagana nti: “Mazima omusajja ono mutemu; newandibadde ng'awonye ennyanja, mu bwenkanya takkiriziddwa kulama.”" 
Acts28:5 Naye ye ekintu n'akikunkumulira mu muliro, n'atabaako kabi konna." 
Acts28:6 Ne bamulindirira okuzimbagatana oba okugwa eri afe amangu ago. Naye bwe baalwawo nga balindirira, ne balaba nga tewali kabi kamujjidde, ne beefukulula, ne bagamba nti yali lubaale." 
Acts28:7 Kati nno mu kitundu ekyo okuliraana n'ekifo ekyo mwalimu ebyalo by'omusajja omwami w'ekizinga, erinnya lye Pubuliyo, eyatukyaza ewuwe okumala ennaku ssatu, n'atulabirira n'ekisa." 
Acts28:8 Kati nno kitaawe wa Pubuliyo yali ku ndiri ng'akwatiddwa omusujja n'ekiddukano. Pawulo n'ayingira gy'ali, ne yeegayirira, n'amussaako emikono, n'amuwonya." 
Acts28:9 Ekyo bwe kyamala okukolebwa, ab'omu kizinga bonna abaalina endwadde nabo ne bajja ne bawonyezebwa." 
Acts28:10 Era ne batugulumiza n'ekitiibwa kinene. Ate bwe twali tusaabala, ne batikkako byonna bye twali twetaaga." 
Acts28:11 Oluvannyuma lw'emyezi esatu, ne tusaabalira mu lyato eryali limaze obudde obw'obutiti mu kizinga ekyo; eryato lyali ly'e Alekisanduriya, nga liriko akabonero k'Abalenzi Abalongo." 
Acts28:12 Bwe twatuuka e Sirakuzi, ne tumalawo ennaku ssatu." 
Acts28:13 Bwe twavaayo, ne tugenda nga tubalama, ne tugoba e Regiyo. Oluvannyuma lw'olunaku olusooka empewo y'emaserengeta n'efuuwa, ku lunaku olwokubiri ne tutuuka e Putewolo." 
Acts28:14 Eyo twasangayo abooluganda, ne batusaba okusigala nabo ennaku musanvu. Ne tutuuka bwe tutyo e Roma." 
Acts28:15 Abooluganda abali eyo bwe baatuwulira, ne bajja okutuukira ddala ku Mbuga ya Appiyo ne ku Migiini Esatu. Pawulo bwe yabalabako, ne yeebaza Katonda, n'addamu omwoyo." 
Acts28:16 Bwe twatuuka e Roma, Pawulo ye n'akkirizibwa okusula yekka, ng'aliko omuserikale amukuuma." 
Acts28:17 Ennaku essatu bwe zaayitawo, n'ayita abakulu b'Abayudaaya, ne bakuŋŋaana, n'abagamba nti: “Basajja abooluganda, nze newandibadde nga siriiko kibi kye nakolera bantu, era nga soonoonanga ku mpisa za bajjajjaffe, naye era nasibirwa e Yeruzaalemu ne mpeebwayo mu mikono gy'Abaroma." 
Acts28:18 Bwe baamala okumbuuza, ne baagala okunta, kubanga nali siriiko musango gunzisa." 
Acts28:19 Naye Abayudaaya ne bakikaayanako; ekyo kye kyansindika okujulira eri Kayisari, newandibadde nga saalina kintu kye nvunaana ggwanga lyange." 
Acts28:20 Olw'ekyo nno, kyenvudde njagala okubalaba n'okwogerako nammwe, kubanga lwa kubeera ssuubi lya Yisirayeli kyenvudde nsibibwa olujegere luno.”" 
Acts28:21 Bo ne bamugamba nti: “Ffe tetufunanga bbaluwa eva mu Buyudaaya ekwogerako, yadde omu ku booluganda abajja kuno akwogeddeko bubi." 
Acts28:22 Kale nno twandyagadde okuwulira ggwe ky'olowooza. Anti kye tumanyi ku kibiina kino kye kino, nti kyogerwako bubi.”" 
Acts28:23 Bwe baamala okumulagaanya olunaku, ne bajja bangi gy'ali mu nnyumba gye yali asulamu. N'abannyonnyola ebintu ng'abategeeza obwakabaka bwa Katonda okuva ku makya okutuusa akawungeezi, ng'afuba okubakkirizisa Yezu ng'ayima ku Tteeka lya Musa n'Abalanzi." 
Acts28:24 Abamu ne bakkiriza olw'ebyo bye yayogeranga, abalala ne batakkiriza." 
Acts28:25 Ne wabaawo obutakkaanya; ne baabuka; naye Pawulo ng'ayogedde kino nti: “Wamma Mwoyo Mutuukirivu yali mutuufu, bwe yagamba bajjajjammwe, ng'ayita mu mulanzi Yisaaya nti:" 
Acts28:26 “ ‘Genda eri abantu bano obagambe nti: okuwulira muliwulira, naye temulitegeera; okulaba muliraba, naye temulyetegereza." 
Acts28:27 Kubanga omutima gw'abantu bano gugubye, n'amatu gaabwe gazitoowererwa okuwulira, n'amaaso gaabwe bagazibirizza, sikulwa nga balaba n'amaaso gaabwe, ne bawulira n'amatu gaabwe, ne bategeera n'omutima gwabwe, ne beenenya, ne mbawonya.’" 
Acts28:28 Mutegeere nno ng'okulokoka kuno Katonda akusindise eri ab'amawanga; bajja kuwulira.” 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Pawulo n'amala emyaka ebiri miramba mu nnyumba ye gye yeepangisiriza, n'ayaniriza bonna abajjanga gy'ali," 
Acts28:31 ng'alangirira obwakabaka bwa Katonda n'okuyigiriza ebifa ku Mukama Yezu Kristu kyere awatali amuziyiza. 
Romans1:1 Nze Pawulo, omuweereza wa Kristu Yezu, eyayitibwa okuba Omutume, ne njawulibwa okulangirira Evangili ya Katonda," 
Romans1:2 gye yasuubiza okuva edda ng'ayita mu balanzi ne mu Biwandiiko ebitukuvu," 
Romans1:3 eyogera ku Mwana we, oyo mu bw'omuntu ava mu lulyo lwa Dawudi," 
Romans1:4 ate eyabalibwa nti Mwana wa Katonda mu maanyi ga Mwoyo ow'obutuukirivu ageeragira mu kuzuukira kwe mu bafu, Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe," 
Romans1:5 mwe twafunira omukisa gw'obutume, mu linnya lye tutuuse eri amawanga gonna obuwulize obuva mu kukkiriza;" 
Romans1:6 mu ago nammwe mwe mubalirwa, mmwe abaayitibwa mubeere aba Yezu Kristu." 
Romans1:7 Y'abo bonna abali e Roma, abaagalwa ba Katonda abaayitibwa mubeere abatuukirivu. Eneema ebeere nammwe n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Okusooka byonna, neebaza Katonda wange nga mpita mu Yezu Kristu ku lwammwe mwenna, kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kulangirirwa mu nsi yonna." 
Romans1:9 Kubanga Katonda gwe mpeereza mu mwoyo gwange, mu Vangili y'Omwana we, ye mujulirwa wange nti mbajjukira buli kadde bulijjo" 
Romans1:10 mu ssaala zange, nga mpanjaga nti: Katonda ng'abadde ayagadde, ku luno nsobole okubatuukako." 
Romans1:11 Anti neegomba okubalabako, ndyoke mbaweeko ku birabo eby'omwoyo okubagumya;" 
Romans1:12 kwe kugamba nti tugumyaŋŋane olw'okukkiriza okwa buli omu, okwammwe n'okwange." 
Romans1:13 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye ng'emirundi mingi nategeka okujja ewammwe, nga njagala mbeeko ebibala bye nkungula mu mmwe nga bwe nabikungula mu b'amawanga abalala, naye n'okutuusa kati nkyalemeseddwa." 
Romans1:14 Bonna mbalinako ebbanja: Abagereeki n'abagwira, abayigirize n'abatali bayigirize." 
Romans1:15 Kale njagala nammwe abali mu Roma okubayigiriza Evangili. 
Romans1:16 Ddala nze Evangili tenkwasa nsonyi, anti ge maanyi ga Katonda okulokola bonna abakkiriza: Omuyudaaya y'asooka, n'Omugereeki n'addako." 
Romans1:17 Kubanga mu yo obutuukirivu bwa Katonda mwe bwolekerwa mu kukkiriza okutwala mu kukkiriza; nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Omutuukirivu aliba mulamu olw'okukkiriza.” 
Romans1:18 Anti obusungu bwa Katonda bwayolekebwa okuva mu ggulu ku bikolwa by'abantu byonna eby'obukafiiri n'obutali butuukirivu nga basibira amazima ga Katonda mu butali buutuukirivu. 
Romans1:19 Kubanga ekisoboka okumanyika ku Katonda kyaboolekebwa; anti Katonda yakibooleka. 
Romans1:20 Okuviira ddala ensi lwe yatondebwa, enfaanana ye eterabika: bwe buyinza bwe obutaggwaawo n'obwakatonda bwe, baabitegeerera bulungi mu ebyo ebyakolebwa; awo nno tebalina buwampanyizo," 
Romans1:21 kubanga Katonda bwe baamumanya, tebaamussaamu kitiibwa nga Katonda, era tebaamwebaza, wabula badda mu kulowooza bitagasa, n'omutima gwabwe ogutategeera ne gujjako ekifu." 
Romans1:22 Baawozanga tuli bagezi, kazzi nga bafuuse basiru." 
Romans1:23 Ekitiibwa kya Katonda atafa ne bakiwaanyisa n'ebifaananyi by'omuntu afa, n'eby'ennyonyi n'ensolo n'ebyewalula." 
Romans1:24 Katonda kyeyava abaawaayo eri amaddu g'emitima gyabwe ne mu buseegu, ne mu kujaajaamya bennyini emibiri gyabwe mu bokka na bokka." 
Romans1:25 Abo amazima ga Katonda baagakyusa ne bagayita obulimba, ne badda mu kusinza ebitonde, ne balekerera Omutonzi oyo atenderezebwa emirembe gyonna. Amiina!" 
Romans1:26 Olw'okubeera ekyo Katonda kyeyava abawaayo mu kwegomba okusonyiwaza: anti abakazi baabwe enkozesa y'emibiri ey'obutonde baagiwanyisaamu n'eyo ekontana n'obutonde; 
Romans1:27 n'abasajja nabo baava ku nkozesa ey'emibiri ey'obutonde n'abakazi ne babugujja n'okukwatirwagana amaddu bokka na bokka, abasajja nga bakola eby'ensonyi ne basajja bannaabwe, ne bafuna mu bo bennyini empeera egya mu nsobi yaabwe." 
Romans1:28 Olw'obutafaayo kumanya Katonda, ne Katonda kyeyava abawaayo eri endowooza ezitajja n'enneeyisa etasaana," 
Romans1:29 ne bajjula buli bugwagwa bwonna, obugwenyufu, omululu gw'ebintu, n'ettima, ne bajjula obuggya, obutemu, empaka, obulimba, n'effutwa; ba ŋŋambo," 
Romans1:30 bawaayiriza, bakyawa Katonda, bavuma, beekuza, beepansi, bayiiyayiiya ebibi, batenguwa abazadde," 
Romans1:31 basiru, batiiratiira, tebalina kwagala, tebalina kisa." 
Romans1:32 Abo nandibadde ekiragiro kya Katonda bakimanyi nti abeeyisa bwe batyo basaanira kufa, tebakoma ku kya kubikola kyokka, naye bakkirizaganya n'abo ababikola." 
Romans2:1 Olw'ekyo nno, wattu ggwe buli muntu asala omusango, naawe tolina buwampanyizo, anti buli lw'osalira oli omusango, naawe oba ogwesalidde, manyanga ekyo ky'olamulamu oli naawe ky'okola." 
Romans2:2 Anti tumanyi ng'abakola eby'engeri eyo Katonda abasalira omusango mu bwenkanya. 
Romans2:3 Kale, wattu ggwe omuntu, asalira omusango abakola ebyo ate naawe ng'obikola, olowooza oliwona okulamulibwa Katonda?" 
Romans2:4 Oba weeyibaala ekisa kya Katonda ekingi, obukwatampola bwe n'okugumiikiriza kwe? Tomanyi ng'ekisa kya Katonda kigenderera kukutuusa ku kweddamu?" 
Romans2:5 Naye olw'obukakanyavu n'obuteenenya bw'omutima gwo, weesombera busungu bwa Katonda ku lunaku lw'alyolesezaako ennamula ye entuufu." 
Romans2:6 Kubanga buli muntu alimuweera ng'agerera ku bikolwa bye. 
Romans2:7 Abo, abakola obulungi n'obugumiikiriza nga balafuubanira ettendo, ekitiibwa n'obutafa, alibawa obulamu obutaggwaawo;" 
Romans2:8 naye abo abawalaza empaka, abatagondera mazima, wabula abagondera okukola obubi, ekibalindiridde busungu na bukambwe." 
Romans2:9 Ennaku n'obulumi biriba mu buli mutima gwa muntu akola obubi: Omuyudaaya nga y'asooka, Omugereeki n'addako." 
Romans2:10 Sso ekitiibwa, ettendo n'eddembe birifunibwa buli akola obulungi; Omuyudaaya nga y'asooka, Omugereeki n'addako." 
Romans2:11 Kubanga Katonda taliimu kusosola mu bantu. 
Romans2:12 Aboonoona nga tebalina tteeka balizikirira awatali tteeka; n'aboonoona nga balina Etteeka baliramulibwa Etteeka. 
Romans2:13 Kubanga si nti abawulira obuwulizi Etteeka be batuukirivu, wabula abatuukiriza Etteeka be balifuuka abatuukirivu." 
Romans2:14 Ab'amawanga abatalina Tteeka, mu buwangwa bwabwe bwe bakola ebyo eby'omu Tteeka, bo bennyini beebeerera etteeka, newandibadde nga tebalina Tteeka." 
Romans2:15 Bo booleka nti Etteeka kye lyagala kyawandiikibwa mu mitima gyabwe; emmeeme yaabwe ejulira wamu nabo; ebirowoozo byabwe bikubagana nga bibavunaana oba nga bibawolereza 
Romans2:16 ku lunaku olwo Katonda lw'aliramula ku bwa Yezu Kristu abantu bye baakisa, ng'Evangili yange bw'egamba." 
Romans2:17 Kale nno obanga oyitibwa Muyudaaya, eyeesiga Etteeka, eyeetendera mu Katonda," 
Romans2:18 amanyi ky'ayagala, kubanga oyigirizibwa Etteeka, eyeetwala ng'alowooza ekisinga obulungi," 
Romans2:19 eyeetwala nti ggwe okulembera bamuzibe, atangaaza abali mu nzikiza," 
Romans2:20 nti oli mugunjuzi w'ababuyabuya, omuyigiriza w'abato, alina mu Tteeka amagezi n'amazima," 
Romans2:21 ggwe agenda ayigiriza abalala, ate ggwe teweeyigiriza? Ggwe asomesa abalala nti tobbanga, ate ggwe obba?" 
Romans2:22 Ggwe agamba nti toyendanga, ate ggwe oyenda? Ggwe eyeenyinyala ebifaananyi bya balubaale, ate ggwe onyagulula ebiggwa?" 
Romans2:23 Ggwe eyeetendera mu Tteeka, ate ggwe onyoomoola Katonda ng'omenya Etteeka?" 
Romans2:24 Anti nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Erinnya lya Katonda livumibwa mu b'amawanga olw'okubeera mmwe.” 
Romans2:25 Bw'oba otuukiriza Etteeka, olwo okutayirirwa kugasa; naye bw'oba olimenya, okutayirirwa kwo kufuuka obutatayirirwa." 
Romans2:26 Oli atali mutayirire bw'akwata ebiragiro by'Etteeka, obutatayirirwa bwe tebubalibwa ng'okutayirirwa?" 
Romans2:27 Oli atuusa Etteeka, nandibadde mu mubiri gwe si mutayirire, agenda kukusalira omusango okukusinga ggwe alimenya sso ng'oli mutayirire, olirina ne mu buwandiike." 
Romans2:28 Oyo si Muyudaaya abeera obubeezi Omuyudaaya kungulu, n'okutayirirwa okwa nnamaddala tekuba kwa kungulu na kwa mubiri bubiri." 
Romans2:29 Wabula oyo Muyudaaya ddala aba Omuyudaaya munda, era okutayirirwa okwa nnamaddala kubeera kwa mu mutima na mu mwoyo, naye si mu nnukuta; ettendo lye teriva mu bantu, wabula mu Katonda." 
Romans3:1 Awo nno Omuyudaaya asinza ki? Oba kwo okutayirira kugasa ki? 
Romans3:2 Okusinga kwo asinga mu buli ngeri. Okusookera ddala, bo be baakwasibwa ebigambo bya Katonda." 
Romans3:3 Binaaba bitya abamu mu bo bamala bataba beesigwa? Bo olw'obutaba beesigwa kitta obwesigwa bwa Katonda? N'akatono! 
Romans3:4 Katonda ye k'abe w'amazima, ye buli muntu k'abe mulimba, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Obeere mutuufu mu bigambo byo, osinge bwe bakuwozesa.”" 
Romans3:5 Oba ffe obutaba batuukirivu kye kireetera Katonda okulaga obutuukirivu bwe, tunaagamba tutya? Nti Katonda si mutuufu okutulaga obusungu? - singa mbuuza ng'omuntu bwe yandibuuzizza." 
Romans3:6 N'akatono! Ggwe ate Katonda yandiramudde atya ensi? 
Romans3:7 Oba nze okulimba kireetera obutuukirivu bwa Katonda okuyitirira n'afuna ekitiibwa, lwaki nkyalamulibwa ng'omwonoonyi?" 
Romans3:8 Olwo lwaki tetukola bibi muveemu ebirungi – ng'abamu bwe batukonjera nti bwe tugamba. Abo nno gubasinga mu butuufu. 
Romans3:9 Awo nno kiki? Tubasinga? Nedda, n'akatono, anti navunaanye dda Abayudaaya n'Abagereeki nti bonna bali mu maanyi ga kibi," 
Romans3:10 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mpaawo mutuukirivu, teri, n'omu;" 
Romans3:11 tewali ategeera, tewali anoonya Katonda." 
Romans3:12 Bonna bawabye, bonna baweddemu ensa; mpaawo akola kirungi, newandibadde omu ati!" 
Romans3:13 Omumiro gwabwe ntaana eyasamye, beeyamba ennimi zaabwe okulimba. Obusagwa bw'enswera buli wansi w'emimwa gyabwe." 
Romans3:14 Akamwa kaabwe kajjudde ebikolimo n'obukaawu. 
Romans3:15 Ebigere byabwe byanguyira okuyiwa omusaayi; 
Romans3:16 mu makubo gaabwe mulimu kuzikirira na nnaku. 
Romans3:17 Tebamanyi kkubo lya ddembe. 
Romans3:18 Tebalinaamu kutya Katonda mu maaso gaabwe.” 
Romans3:19 Tumanyi nga byonna Etteeka bye ligamba libigamba abo abakwatibwa Etteeka, buli mumwa gulyoke gubunire, ensi yonna eryoke ebalibwe bw'eri ensobya mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Romans3:20 Kubanga tewali alifuuka mutuukirivu mu maaso ge olw'ebikolwa eby'omu Tteeka, kubanga okumanya ekibi kujja na Tteeka." 
Romans3:21 Kati nno obutuukirivu bwa Katonda bweyolekera ebweru w'Etteeka, newandibadde nga bwajulirwa Etteeka n'Abalanzi," 
Romans3:22 obutuukirivu bwa Katonda obuva ku kukkiriza Yezu Kristu ku bonna abakkiriza. Kubanga tewali njawulo," 
Romans3:23 anti bonna baayonoona, baabulwa mu bo ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans3:24 Bafuuka batuukirivu olw'eneema ye eyaweebwa obuwa, olw'okununulibwa mu Kristu Yezu," 
Romans3:25 Katonda gwe yassaawo abeere omutango mu musaayi gwe, omutango gwe tufunira mu kukkiriza. Kwali kwoleka butuukirivu bwa Katonda, kubanga mu kugumiikiriza kwa Katonda yasonyiwa ebibi ebyayita," 
Romans3:26 yagenderera ayoleke mu budde buno nti ye mutuufu era afuula oyo akkiriza Yezu Kristu n'aba omutuukirivu. 
Romans3:27 Kale okwetenda kwaffe kuluwa? Ekyo kirekebwa na bbali. Lwa tteeka ki? Olw'ebyo bye twakola? Nedda, wabula lwa tteeka lya kukkiriza." 
Romans3:28 Kubanga tugamba nti omuntu afuuka mutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza, awatali na bikolwa bya mu Tteeka." 
Romans3:29 Kazzi Katonda wa Bayudaaya bokka? Ab'amawanga si Katonda waabwe? 
Romans3:30 Yee, n'ab'amawanga Katonda waabwe, ndaba Katonda ye omu alifuula omutayirire omutuukirivu olw'okukkiriza n'atali mutayirire olw'okukkiriza." 
Romans3:31 Awo nno bwe tukkiriza ng'Etteeka tulidibizza? Nedda! N'okuba Etteeka tuba tukakasa kkakase. 
Romans4:1 Leero tunaagamba ki ku Yiburayimu jjajjaffe mu mubiri? 
Romans4:2 Oba Yiburayimu yafuuka mutuukirivu olw'ebikolwa bye, alina eky'okwewaanamu, naye si mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Romans4:3 Kubanga Ekitabo ekitukuvu kigamba kitya? Kigamba nti: “Yiburayimu yakkiriza Katonda, ekyo ne kimubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu.”" 
Romans4:4 Oli apakasa, empeera temubalirwa ng'ekirabo, wabula ng'ebbanja ly'alina okusasulibwa." 
Romans4:5 N'oyo atatuukiriza Tteeka naye ng'akkiriza oli, abo abatatya Katonda abafuula abatuukirivu, okukkiriza kwe kubalibwa ng'obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:6 Era nga ne Dawudi atenda omukisa omuntu Katonda gw'abala ng'omutuukirivu nga tasinzidde ku bikolwa, nti:" 
Romans4:7 “Beesiimye ab'omusango ogusonyiyiddwa, ab'ebibi ebikisiddwa;" 
Romans4:8 yeesiimye oyo Omukama gw'atavunaana kibi kye.” 
Romans4:9 Okwesiima okwo kwogerwa ku batayirire bokka oba ne ku batali batayirire? Tugamba nti okukkiriza kwabalirwa Yiburayimu ng'obutuukirivu. 
Romans4:10 Kwamubalirwa kutya? Ng'amaze okutayirirwa oba nga tannaba? Nga tannaba, si luvannyuma lwa kutayirirwa." 
Romans4:11 Yafuna akabonero ak'okutayirirwa ng'enkovu etegeeza obutuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza kwe yalina nga tannatayirirwa. Bw'atyo afuuke kitaawe w'abakkiriza bonna abakkiriza nga tebannatayirirwa, nabo bwe batyo babalirwenga obutuukirivu," 
Romans4:12 abeere era kitaabwe w'abatayirire, naye si abo abatayirirwa kyokka, naye era abagoberera ebisinde eby'okukkiriza, okwo jjajjaffe Yiburayimu kwe yalina nga tannatayirirwa." 
Romans4:13 Ekisuubizo Yiburayimu kye yasuubizibwa wamu n'ezzadde lye okusikira ensi, tekyamusuubizibwa lwa kubeera Tteeka, naye lwa kubeera butuukirivu obw'okukkiriza." 
Romans4:14 Oba abagoberera Etteeka be baliba abasika, okukkiriza kwa bwereere n'ekisuubizo temuli kantu." 
Romans4:15 Anti Etteeka liwakula busungu. Etteeka we litali tewaba kusobya. 
Romans4:16 Okusika kyekiva kisinziira ku kukkiriza, olwo ekisuubizo kiryoke kisinziire ku neema, kiweebwe ezzadde lye lyonna. Si abo bokka abagoberera Etteeka, naye era n'abo ab'okukkiriza ng'okwa Yiburayimu, anti ffenna ye kitaffe," 
Romans4:17 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Nkufudde kitaawe w'amawanga amangi;” era bw'ali mu maaso ga Katonda gwe yakkiriza, oyo awa obulamu afudde, ebitaliiwo n'abiyita ne bibaawo." 
Romans4:18 Yakkiriza ng'asuubira w'otandisuubiriridde nti alifuuka kitaawe w'amawanga amangi; nga bwe yali agambiddwa nti: “Ezzadde lyo bwe liriba lityo.” 
Romans4:19 Teyaddirira mu kukkiriza ne bwe yamanya nti omubiri gwe gwali kyenkana ng'ogufudde, anti yali nga wa myaka kikumi egy'obukulu, era nti n'olubuto lwa Saara lwali lufu." 
Romans4:20 Teyabuusabuusa ku ebyo Katonda bye yamusuubiza, wabula yeeyongera bweyongezi maanyi mu kukkiriza, ng'assaamu Katonda ekitiibwa." 
Romans4:21 Yali amanyidde ddala nga Katonda yali asobola bulungi okukola byonna bye yasuubiza. 
Romans4:22 Okukkiriza kwe kyekwava kumubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu. 
Romans4:23 Kyokka ekigambo ekyo: 'Kyekwava kumubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu' tekyawandiikibwa ku lulwe yekka," 
Romans4:24 naye ne ku lwaffe. Naffe kulitubalirwa ffe abakkiriza oyo eyazuukiza Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu mu bafu. 
Romans4:25 Ye eyaweebwayo okubeera ensobi zaffe n'azuukira tulyoke tufuuke batuukirivu. 
Romans5:1 Kale nno tumaze okufuuka abatuukirivu olw'okukkiriza, tulina emirembe ne Katonda waffe ku lwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu." 
Romans5:2 Mu ye mwe twayita ne tutuuka ku neema eno gye tulimu, era twetendera mu ssuubi ery'okugabana ku kitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans5:3 Si ekyo kyokka, twetendera ne mu nnaku zaffe, kubanga tumanyi ng'ennaku zireeta kugumiikiriza," 
Romans5:4 okugumiikiriza kuleeta kubanguka, ate okubanguka kuleeta ssuubi;" 
Romans5:5 okusuubira kwo tekutuswaza, anti ng'okwagala kwa Katonda kwayiibwa mu mitima gyaffe olwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu eyatuweebwa." 
Romans5:6 Kristu, obudde bwe bwatuuka, n'afiirira ffe abatatya Katonda n'obwaffe nga bwe twali nga tetweyinza." 
Romans5:7 Omuntu nno kizibu okufiirira omutuukirivu; sso nno waakiri omulungi wandibaawo ayeewaayo okumufiirira. 
Romans5:8 Naye ye Katonda yatwoleka nga bw'atwagala, anti twali tukyali boonoonyi, Kristu n'atufiirira." 
Romans5:9 Leero nno tumaze okufuulibwa abatuukirivu mu musaayi gwe, mu ye mwe tuliwonera obusungu." 
Romans5:10 Oba twali tukyali balabe, ne tutabagana ne Katonda olw'okufa kw'Omwana we, alabisa kati nga tumaze okutabagana, tugenda kulokolebwa obulamu bwe bwennyini." 
Romans5:11 Si kye kyokka, n'okwetenda twetenda mu Katonda ku lwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, oyo mwe tufunidde okutabagana kwaffe kati." 
Romans5:12 Kale nno ng'ekibi bwe kyayingira mu nsi muno nga kiyita mu muntu omu, n'okufa ne kujja nga kuyita mu kibi, okufa ne kubuna mu bantu bonna, kubanga bonna baayonoona…" 
Romans5:13 Ekibi kyaliwo mu nsi okutuusa etteeka lwe lyajja; naye ekibi tekibalibwa etteeka we litali. 
Romans5:14 Naye okufa kwakajjala okuviira ddala ku Adamu okutuuka ku Musa, ne mu abo ebibi byabwe ebitaali kumenya tteeka ng'okusobya kwa Adamu eyali ekifaananyi ky'oyo eyali ow'okujja." 
Romans5:15 Naye ekirabo tekigeranyizika ku nsobi; oba abantu enkuyanja baafa olw'okusobya kw'omuntu omu, eneema ya Katonda n'ekirabo byayitirira nnyo, olw'eneema y'omuntu omu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans5:16 N'ekirabo tekigeranyizika na kwonoona kw'omuntu omu. Kubanga okulamula okwaddirira okwonoona kw'omuntu omu kwamalira mu kumusinza musango, naye ekirabo ekyaddirira ensobi ennyingi kyaleeta butuukirivu." 
Romans5:17 Oba olw'ensobi y'omuntu omu okufa kwakajjala nga kufulumye mu omu, abalifuna omwero gw'eneema n'ekirabo ky'obutuukirivu balisingawo okukajjala mu bulamu nga bafuluma mu omu Yezu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Kale nno ng'ensobi y'omu bwe yaleetera abantu bonna okusalirwa omusango, bwe kityo era n'ekikolwa eky'omu eky'obutuukirivu bwe kyaleetera abantu bonna obutuukirivu obw'obulamu." 
Romans5:19 Anti ng'era olw'obutawulira bw'omuntu omu bangi bwe bafuuka aboonoonyi, bwe kityo era olw'obuwulize bw'omu bangi bwe balifuuka abatuukirivu." 
Romans5:20 Etteeka lyajja kwongera bwongezi nsobi; naye ekibi gye kyakomya okweyongera, n'eneema nayo gye yakomya okuyitirira." 
Romans5:21 Ng'ekibi bwe kyakajjala nga kiyita mu kufa, n'eneema bw'erikajjala etyo ng'eyita mu butuukirivu okuleeta obulamu obutaggwaawo ku lwa Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe." 
Romans6:1 Awo nno tugambe ki? Tusigale mu kibi eneema eryoke yeeyongere eyitirire? 
Romans6:2 N'akatono! Ffe ekibi abaakibeerera abafu tuyinza tutya okukibeeramu? 
Romans6:3 Temumanyi nga ffe ffenna abaabatizibwa mu Kristu Yezu, twabatizibwa mu kufa kwe?" 
Romans6:4 Ndaba mu batismu twaziikibwa wamu naye mu kufa; nga Kristu bwe yazuukira mu bafu olw'ekitiibwa kya Taata, naffe tulyoke tutambulire mu bulamu obuggya." 
Romans6:5 Obanga twagattibwa wamu naye mu nfa ye, era tuligattibwa wamu naye mu nzuukira ye." 
Romans6:6 Tumanyi nti omuntu owaffe omukadde yakomererwa naye ku musaalaba, omubiri gw'ekibi gulyoke guzikirizibwe, tuleme kuddayo kubeera baddu ba kibi." 
Romans6:7 Anti oli bw'afa, aba atakkuluziddwa ku kibi." 
Romans6:8 Oba tuli bafu ne Kristu, tukkiririza ddala nga tuliba balamu naye." 
Romans6:9 Anti tumanyi nti Kristu ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu, takyaddayo kufa; olumbe terukyamulinako buyinza." 
Romans6:10 Kubanga bwe yafa, ekibi yakifuukira mufu lumu n'amala; kati nga mulamu, mulamu ku lwa Katonda." 
Romans6:11 Nammwe nno mwebalire ddala ng'ekibi mukibeerera bafu, muli balamu ku bwa Katonda mu Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe." 
Romans6:12 Awo nno ekibi kireme kukajjala mu mubiri gwammwe ogw'okufa ne kibaleetera okugondera amaddu gaagwo. 
Romans6:13 Ebitundu by'omubiri gwammwe temubiwanga kibi bikozesebwe okukola obubi, naye mwewe Katonda ng'abantu abavudde mu kufa ne mudda mu bulamu, ate n'ebitundu byammwe eby'omubiri mubiwe Katonda bikozesebwe eby'obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:14 Ekibi tekigenda kubafuga, kubanga temutwalibwa Tteeka, wabula neema." 
Romans6:15 Awo nno ki? Tukole ebibi olw'okubeera nga tetutwalibwa Tteeka wabula neema? 
Romans6:16 N'akatono! Temumanyi nga bwe mwewa omuntu ng'abaddu nga mumuwulira, muba baddu b'oyo gwe muwulira: oba baddu b'ekibi ekitwala mu kufa, oba baddu b'obuwulize obutwala mu butuukirivu?" 
Romans6:17 Naye Katonda yeebale, nti newandibadde nga mmwe olumu mwali baddu b'ekibi, naye mwawulira n'omutima gwonna ekika ky'enjigiriza gye mwaweebwa." 
Romans6:18 Nga mumaze okutakkuluzibwa ku kibi, mufuuse baddu ba butuukirivu." 
Romans6:19 Njogera ng'abantu aba bulijjo bwe boogera olw'okubeera obunafu bw'omubiri gwammwe. Ebitundu by'omubiri gwammwe nga bwe mwabiwaayo mu buseegu ne mu bugwenyufu obuyitiridde, kale nno ebitundu by'omubiri ebyo mubizze ku kuweereza obutuukirivu, mutukuzibwe." 
Romans6:20 Bwe mwali mukyali baddu ba kibi, mwali ba ddembe nga temufugibwa butuukirivu." 
Romans6:21 Naye magoba ki ge mwaggya mu ebyo kati ebibakwasa n'ensonyi? Tebireeta kirala wabula lumbe. 
Romans6:22 Kale nno nga mumaze okutakkuluzibwa ku kibi, ne mufuuka baddu ba Katonda, amagoba gammwe kwe kutukuzibwa okuleeta obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans6:23 Anti empeera y'ekibi, lumbe; naye ekirabo kya Katonda, bulamu obutaggwaawo mu Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe." 
Romans7:1 Abooluganda, kazzi temumanyi – njogera eri abo abamanyi Etteeka – ng'etteeka omuntu limufuga ng'akyali mulamu?" 
Romans7:2 Bw'atyo omukazi etteeka limusiba ku bba ebbanga lyonna ng'akyali mulamu; naye kasita bba afa, ng'asumuluddwa ku tteeka erimusiba ku bba." 
Romans7:3 N'olw'ekyo bw'abeera n'omusajja omulala nga bba akyaliwo, bamuyita mwenzi; sso bba bw'afa, ng'atakkuluziddwa ku tteeka, era bw'afumbirwa omusajja omulala taba mwenzi." 
Romans7:4 Awo nno, abooluganda, nammwe mu mubiri gwa Kristu Etteeka mwalifuukira bafu, mulyoke mubeere ba mulala, b'oyo eyazuukira mu bafu, tulyoke tubalire Katonda ebibala." 
Romans7:5 Sso bwe twali tukyagoberera omubiri, amaddu gaffe amabi nga gamaze okusiikuulibwa Etteeka, gaakozanga ebitundu by'omubiri gwaffe ne bibala ebibala eby'olumbe." 
Romans7:6 Naye kati twatakkuluzibwa ku Tteeka, ne tubeerera bafu ekyo ekyatusibanga, kyetuva tusobola okuweereza mu ngeri empya mu mwoyo, naye si mu eri enkadde ey'ennukuta." 
Romans7:7 Kale tugambe ki? Nti Etteeka kibi? N'akatono! Naye ate teriba kubeera Tteeka, ekibi sandikimanye. Sandimanye kwegomba singa Etteeka teryaŋŋamba nti: “Teweegombanga.”" 
Romans7:8 Naye ekibi kyeyamba ekiragiro, ne kireeta mu nze buli kwegomba kwonna. Awatali Tteeka ekibi kiba kifu." 
Romans7:9 Nali mulamu olumu nga tewali Tteeka; naye ekiragiro bwe kyajja, ekibi ne kiramuka, ne nfa." 
Romans7:10 Ne neesanga ng'ekiragiro kyennyini ekyali kizze okumpa obulamu, kindeetedde kufa." 
Romans7:11 Kubanga ekibi kyeyamba akakisa k'ekiragiro ne kinnimba, ne kyeyamba ekiragiro okunzita." 
Romans7:12 Weewaawo Etteeka lyo ttukuvu, n'ekiragiro kitukuvu, kituukirivu era kirungi." 
Romans7:13 Awo nno ekirungi kye kyandeetera okufa? N'akatono! Wabula ekibi; ekyo kyandeetera okufa nga kiyita mu kiri ekirungi, kyo kiryoke kyeyoleke ng'ekibi, nga kiyita mu kiragiro kifuukire ddala ekibi okuyitirira." 
Romans7:14 Tumanyi bulungi ng'Etteeka kintu kya mwoyo; naye nze ndi wa mubiri, eyatundibwa eri ekibi." 
Romans7:15 Sitegeera bye nkola, kubanga sikola kye njagala, wabula nkola ebyo bye nkyawa." 
Romans7:16 Oba kye saagala kye nkola, olwo nange nzikiriza ng'Etteeka ddungi." 
Romans7:17 Leero nno si yali nze akikola, wabula ekibi ekisula mu nze." 
Romans7:18 Anti mmanyi nga mu nze, kwe kugamba nti mu mubiri gwange, temuli kirungi; kubanga okwagala okukola ekirungi mu nze mwe kuli, naye okukikola tekuliimu." 
Romans7:19 Anti ekirungi kye njagala si kye nkola, naye ekibi kye saagala kye nkola." 
Romans7:20 Oba kye saagala ate kye nkola, awo nno si nze nkikola, wabula ekibi ekisula mu nze." 
Romans7:21 Kati nno linfuukidde tteeka nti bwe njagala okukola ekirungi, ekibi kindi awo." 
Romans7:22 Munda muli Etteeka lya Katonda ndisanyukira," 
Romans7:23 naye nsanga mu bitundu by'omubiri gwange etteeka eddala erirwanyisa etteeka eriri mu mwoyo gwange, ne linfuula musibe wa tteeka ery'ekibi eriri mu bitundu by'omubiri gwange." 
Romans7:24 Nga ndabye nze! Ani alimponya omubiri guno ogusuliridde okufa? 
Romans7:25 Katonda yeebazibwe ku lwa Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe. Bwe kityo ku lwange mu mutima mpeereza Etteeka lya Katonda, naye mu mubiri mpeereza tteeka lya kibi." 
Romans8:1 Awo nno abo abali mu Yezu Kristu tebasalirwa musango. 
Romans8:2 Kubanga etteeka erya Mwoyo ow'obulamu mu Kristu Yezu lyantakkuluza ku tteeka ery'ekibi n'olumbe. 
Romans8:3 Etteeka kye litaasobola kukola olw'omubiri okulinafuya, Katonda yakikola ng'atuma Omwana we alina omubiri ddala nga guli ogw'ekibi ate olw'ekibi n'asalira ekibi omusango mu mubiri." 
Romans8:4 Bwe kityo ekiragiro ky'Etteeka kituukirizibwe mu ffe mu mpisa zaffe abatagoberera mubiri wabula omwoyo. 
Romans8:5 Abo mu bulamu bwabwe abagoberera omubiri, omutima gwabwe bagusimbye ku bya mubiri; naye abagoberera omwoyo, omutima gwabwe bagusimbye ku bya mwoyo." 
Romans8:6 Okussa omutima ku mubiri kireeta kufa, naye okussa omutima ku Mwoyo kireeta bulamu na ddembe." 
Romans8:7 Kubanga omutima ogusimbye ku mubiri gwa bulabe eri Katonda; anti tegugondera Tteeka lya Katonda, n'okusobola tegusobola." 
Romans8:8 Abagoberera omubiri tebasobola kusanyusa Katonda. 
Romans8:9 Naye mmwe temugoberera mubiri, wabula Mwoyo, bw'aba nga Mwoyo wa Katonda asula mu mmwe; oli atalina Mwoyo wa Kristu, oyo taba wuwe." 
Romans8:10 Naye oba Kristu ali mu mmwe, newandibadde ng'omubiri mufu olw'ekibi, omwoyo gwo mulamu olw'obutuukirivu." 
Romans8:11 Obanga Mwoyo w'oli eyazuukiza Yezu mu bafu asula mu mmwe, eyazuukiza Yezu Kristu mu bafu emibiri gyammwe gino egy'okufa nagyo aligiwa obulamu era ng'ayita mu Mwoyo we abasulamu." 
Romans8:12 Kale nno, abooluganda, tulina ebbanja, naye si na mubiri nti tuteekwa okugoberera amaddu g'omubiri," 
Romans8:13 kubanga bwe mugoberera omubiri, mujja kufa; naye mu Mwoyo bwe mutta ebikolwa eby'omubiri, mugenda kubeera balamu." 
Romans8:14 Kubanga abo bonna abatwalibwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, baana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:15 Kubanga temwafuna mwoyo gwa buddu okubazza mu kutya, naye mwafuna mwoyo gw'abaana abeebonanye, Katonda mwe tumukoowoolera nti: “Abba, Taata.”" 
Romans8:16 Anti Mwoyo ajulira munda wamu n'omwoyo gwaffe nti tuli baana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:17 Oba nno tuli baana, tuli basika, basika ba Katonda, era abasika awamu ne Kristu, singa tubonaabona wamu naye tulyoke tugulumizibwe wamu naye." 
Romans8:18 Nze ndaba ng'ennaku ez'omu budde buno toyinza kuzigeranya na kitiibwa kiritwolekebwa. 
Romans8:19 Anti ebitonde birindiridde n'amaddu okwolekebwa kw'abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:20 Kubanga ebitonde byassibwa mu kubeera entagasa, si lwa kweyagalira, naye lwa kubeera oli eyabifuula atyo, n'abissa mu kusuubira." 
Romans8:21 Anti n'ebitonde byennyini birinunulibwa mu buddu bw'okuvunda ne bifuna eddembe ly'abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:22 Tumanyi nga na kati ebitonde byonna bisinda, byenyoola mu kulumwa ng'oli azaala." 
Romans8:23 Si byo byokka naye naffe ffennyini, newandibadde nga tufunye ku bibala ebisooka ebya Mwoyo, tusinda muli munda nga tulindirira n'amaddu okwebonanyizibwa ng'abaana emibiri gyaffe bwe girinunulibwa." 
Romans8:24 Mu kusuubira tuti mwe twalokolerwa. Naye okusuubira ky'olabako si kusuubira; ate ani asuubira ky'alabako? 
Romans8:25 Oba nno tusuubira kye tutalabako, tukisuubira n'obugumiikiriza." 
Romans8:26 Ne Mwoyo era atuyamba mu bunafu bwaffe, anti tetumanyi kwegayirira nga bwe tugwanira; ye Mwoyo yennyini atusabira ng'asinda ebitalojjeka." 
Romans8:27 Awo oli ayeekebejja emitima gy'abantu ategeera bulungi ekiri mu mutima gwa Mwoyo, kubanga Mwoyo asabira abatuukirivu nga Katonda bw'ayagala." 
Romans8:28 Sso tumanyi nga Katonda mu byonna akolerera bulungi abo bonna abamwagala, abo abaayitibwa okusinziira ku nteekateeka ze." 
Romans8:29 Anti bonna abo be yamanya okuva mu masooka, yabateebeza okutwala ekifaananyi ky'Omwana we, abeere bw'atyo omuggulanda mu b'oluganda enkumu." 
Romans8:30 Be yateebeza bw'atyo, be bo be yayita; ate be yayita, be bo be yafuula abatuukirivu, ate be yafuula abatuukirivu be bo be yagulumiza." 
Romans8:31 Awo nno bino tukyabyogeddeko ki? Oba Katonda ali ku ludda lwaffe, ani anaatuwakanya?" 
Romans8:32 Olaba n'Omwana we yennyini teyamubalira, n'amuwaayo okubeera ffe, asobola atya byonna obutabituweerako?" 
Romans8:33 Ani alivunaana abalonde ba Katonda? Ye Katonda abafuula abatuukirivu. 
Romans8:34 Ani alibasalira omusango? Ye Kristu Yezu eyafa, ate nnyini n'azuukira mu bafu, oyo ali ku ddyo gwa Katonda, ate atusabira." 
Romans8:35 Kale nno ani alitwawukanya n'okwagala kwa Kristu? Nnaku, bwemi, kiyigganyizo, njala, oba kuyita busa, oba kabenje, oba kitala?" 
Romans8:36 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Olw'okubeera ggwe tuli mu kuttibwa olunaku lwonna, tuyisibwa ng'endiga ez'okutta.”" 
Romans8:37 Naye mu ebyo byonna tuwangulira waggulu mw'oyo eyatwagala. 
Romans8:38 Nkakasiza ddala nze nti newandibadde olumbe, newandibadde obulamu, newandibadde bamalayika, yadde abafuzi, newandibadde ebiriwo, yadde ebirijja, newandibadde amaanyi," 
Romans8:39 newandibadde obugulumivu, yadde okukka wansi, newandibadde ekitonde ekirala kyonna tekirisobola n'akatono kutuggya ku kwagala kwa Katonda okuli mu Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe." 
Romans9:1 Njogera mazima mu Kristu, sirimba; emmeeme yange enjulira mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Romans9:2 nti ennaku nnina nnyingi nnyo n'okunyolwa mu mutima okutasalako. 
Romans9:3 Neegomba nze mwene kiryose nkolimirwe, nkutulwe ku baganda bange ab'ekika, bwe tuli ab'olulyo olumu." 
Romans9:4 Bo Bayisirayeli, be baafuna okwebonanyizibwa ng'abaana, ekitiibwa n'ebiragaano, be baaweebwa Etteeka, n'okusinza n'ebisuubizo;" 
Romans9:5 be bannannyini bajjajja, mu lulyo lwabwe mu mubiri mwe mwasibuka Kristu, oyo Katonda assukkulumye byonna, atenderezebwe emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Togamba nti Katonda kye yagamba kyagwa butaka. Kubanga bonna ab'enda ya Yisirayeli si ba Yisirayeli," 
Romans9:7 na bonna si baana ba Yiburayimu olw'okubeera nti zzadde lye, wabula nti: “Mu Yizaake ezzadde lyo mwe linaafuniranga erinnya.”" 
Romans9:8 Kwe kugamba nti abaana b'omubiri si be baana ba Katonda, wabula abaana b'ebisuubizo be babalibwa ng'ezzadde." 
Romans9:9 Kubanga ekisuubizo kyagamba bwe kiti nti: “Ndidda mu bbanga nga lino, olwo Sara aliba alina omwana wa bulenzi.”" 
Romans9:10 Si oyo yekka, naye ne Rebekka bwe yali afunye olubuto olw'omusajja omu, ye jjajjaffe Yizaake," 
Romans9:11 ne bwe baali tebannazaalibwa, nga tebannabaako kirungi oba kibi kyonna kye bakola, enteekateeka ya Katonda ey'okulonda okusobola okugenda mu maaso, si lwa kubeera bikolwa wabula olw'okubeera oyo ayita," 
Romans9:12 Rebekka baamugamba nti: “Omukulu aliweereza omuto.” 
Romans9:13 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Nayagala Yakobo, Ezawu ne mmukyawa.”" 
Romans9:14 Awo nno tugambe ki? Nti Katonda ku ludda simwenkanya? N'akatono! 
Romans9:15 Anti yagamba Musa nti: “Gwe nnaagiriranga ekisa nnaamugiriranga ekisa, ne gwe nnaasaasiranga naye nnaamusaasiranga.”" 
Romans9:16 Awo nno tekiva ku kwagala kwa muntu, oba ku kufaabiina kwe, naye ku Katonda asaasira." 
Romans9:17 Kubanga Ekitabo ekitukuvu kigamba Faraawo nti: “Eno y'ensonga eyakunzisisaawo, njoleseze mu ggwe obuyinza bwange, erinnya lyange liryoke lirangirirwe mu nsi yonna.”" 
Romans9:18 Bw'atyo nno, asaasira gw'ayagadde, n'agugubya omutima gw'oyo gw'ayagadde." 
Romans9:19 Mujja kuŋŋamba nti: “Lwaki ate akyasanga ensobi? Ani anaamuwakanya okukola ky'ayagala?” 
Romans9:20 Ggwe ani omuntu obuntu ayanukula Katonda? Ekibumbe kigamba omubumbi nti: “Lwaki wankola bw'oti?” 
Romans9:21 Omubumbi si y'alina obuyinza ku bbumba? Mu kitole ky'ebbumba kye kimu tasobola kubumbamu kibya kimu eky'okukozesa mu by'ekitiibwa n'ekirala eky'okukozesa mu bitali bya kitiibwa? 
Romans9:22 Oba oli awo Katonda olw'okwagala okulaga obusungu bwe, n'okumanyisa amaanyi ge, aguumiikirizza nnyo ebibya eby'obusungu ebyakolerwa okuzikirira," 
Romans9:23 alyoke alage obugagga bw'ekitiibwa kye olw'ebibya by'okusaasira kwe bye yakolera ekitiibwa okuva edda," 
Romans9:24 naffe be yayita, si kuva mu Bayudaaya mwokka, naye ne mu b'amawanga." 
Romans9:25 Ng'era bw'agamba mu Ozeya nti: “Abatali bantu bange ndibayita abantu bange, n'oyo ataali mwagalwa, ndimuyita mwagalwa wange." 
Romans9:26 Ate mu kifo we baagambirwa nti: ‘Mmwe temuli baana bange,’ we baliyitirwa abaana ba Katonda omulamu.”" 
Romans9:27 Yisaaya ng'ayogera ku Yisirayeli aleekaana nti: “Omuwendo gw'abaana ba Yisirayeli ne bwe guliba ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja, abaasigalawo be baliwonawo.”" 
Romans9:28 Kubanga Omukama aliwa ensala ye ku nsi mu bwangu awatali kulwa. 
Romans9:29 Nga ne Yisaaya bwe yali amaze okukyogera nti: “Omukama w'Amagye taba kutulekerawo zzadde, twandifuuse nga Sodoma, twandifaananye nga Gomorra.”" 
Romans9:30 Kale nno tugambe ki? Ab'amawanga abataagobereranga butuukirivu baatuuka ku butuukirivu, bwe butuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza;" 
Romans9:31 sso Yisirayeli eyagoberera obutuukirivu obwesigamiziddwa ku Tteeka, teyasobola kutuukiriza Tteeka." 
Romans9:32 Lwaki? Kubanga tebaabunoonya mu kukkiriza, wabula mu bikolwa. Beesittala ku jjinja ery'okwesittalako," 
Romans9:33 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Laba, nteeka mu Siyoni ejjinja, omuntu kw'aneesittala; olwazi omuntu kw'aneekoona; buli yenna amukkiriza taliswazibwa.”" 
Romans10:1 Abooluganda, omutima gwange kye gwegomba era kye nsaba Katonda mu ssaala ku lwabwe kye kino, nti batuuke ku kulokoka." 
Romans10:2 Nange mbajulira nti batakabanira Katonda naye tebamanyi kukikola bulungi. 
Romans10:3 Kubanga olw'obutamanya butuukirivu buva wa Katonda, baageza okutuuka ku butuukirivu mu ngeri eyaabwe ku bwabwe, tebaagondera butuukirivu bwa Katonda." 
Romans10:4 Anti Kristu ye nkomerero y'Etteeka, buli yenna amukkiriza afuuke omutuukirivu." 
Romans10:5 Musa yawandiika nti omuntu atuukiriza obutuukirivu obuli mu Tteeka, oyo aliba abutuusizza, aliba mulamu olw'okubeera bwo." 
Romans10:6 Sso obutuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza bwo bugamba nti: “Togambanga mu mutima gwo nti: ‘Ani anaayambukayo mu ggulu?’ - kwe kugamba nti okunonayo Kristu. 
Romans10:7 Oba nti: ‘Ani alikka mu nnyanga?’ - kwe kugamba nti okuzuukiza Kristu mu bafu.” 
Romans10:8 Ekitabo ekitukuvu kigamba kitya? Kigamba nti: “Ekigambo kikuli kumpi, kiri mu kamwa ko ne mu mutima gwo” – kwe kugamba nti ekigambo ky'okukkiriza kye tuyigiriza." 
Romans10:9 Kubanga bw'oyatula n'akamwa ko nti Yezu ye Mukama, ate mu mutima gwo n'okkiriza nga Katonda yamuzuukiza mu bafu, olirokoka." 
Romans10:10 Omuntu bw'akkiriza n'omutima gwe, n'afuuka mutuukirivu; bw'ayatula n'akamwa ke, alokoka." 
Romans10:11 Anti Ekiwandiiko ekitukuvu kigamba nti: “Buli yenna amukkiriza taliswazibwa.” 
Romans10:12 Tewali nno njawulo, oba Muyudaaya oba Mugereeki, anti ng'Omukama wa bonna ye omu, agabira ebingi bonna abamukoowoola." 
Romans10:13 Anti: “Buli alikoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama aliwonyezebwa.” 
Romans10:14 Naye abantu balimukoowoola batya gwe batakkiriza, ate balimukkiriza batya gwe batawulirangako? Baliwulira batya awatali ayigiriza?" 
Romans10:15 Abantu baliyigiriza batya wabula beppo nga batumiddwa? Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ebigere by'abo abalangirira amawulire amalungi nga bisanyusa!” 
Romans10:16 Kyokka si bonna nti baagondera Evangili; anti Yisaaya agamba nti: “Ayi Mukama, ani yakkiriza bye yawulira okuva gye tuli?”" 
Romans10:17 Awo nno okukkiriza kuva mu kuwulira, ate ekiwulirwa kiva mu kigambo kya Kristu ky'ayogera." 
Romans10:18 Naye mbuuza, tebawuliranga? Okuwulira baawulira; manyanga: “Eddoboozi lyabwe lyatuuka mu nsi yonna, ebigambo byabwe ku nkingi z'ensi.”" 
Romans10:19 Era mbuuza, Yisirayeli teyamanya? Musa ye yasooka n'agamba nti: “Nzija kubakwasisa obuggya ku bantu abatali ggwanga; mbanyiize n'eggwanga essiru.”" 
Romans10:20 Ne Yisaaya n'agamba n'obuvumu nti: “Nazuulibwa abo abatannoonyangako; nalabibwa abo abatanneebuuzanga.” 
Romans10:21 Bw'atuuka ku Yisirayeli n'agamba nti: “Namala olunaku lwonna emikono gyange nga njanjululizza eri abantu abatampuliriza, abampakanya.”" 
Romans11:1 Awo nno mbuuza, Katonda yayabulira abantu be? N'akatono! Nze nzennyini ndi Muyisirayeli, muzzukulu wa Yiburayimu, ow'omu kika kya Benyamiini." 
Romans11:2 Katonda tasuuliriranga bantu be be yamanya okuva edda. Temumanyi Ebiwandiiko ebitukuvu kye byogera ku Eliya ng'alaajanira Katonda olw'Abayisirayeli, nti:" 
Romans11:3 “Ayi Mukama, abalanzi bo babasse, emyaliiro gyo bagisimbuddewo; nze nzekka nze nsigaddewo, ate nange bannoonya okunzita.”" 
Romans11:4 Katonda okumwanukula yamugamba atya? Yamugamba nti: “Neeterekeddewo abasajja kasanvu abatakubiranga Baali mavi.” 
Romans11:5 Bwe guli na kati; waliwo abaasigalawo, eneema be yeeroboza." 
Romans11:6 Oba nno neema, awo nno sibaalobozebwa lwa bikolwa, kubanga olwo eneema teyandibadde neema n'akamu." 
Romans11:7 Awo nno kiki? Yisirayeli yalemwa okufuna kye yali agoba; abalondemu be bakifunye; abasigaddewo baaguguba," 
Romans11:8 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Katonda yabawa omwoyo gw'otulo otungi, amaaso agataalabe, n'amatu agataawulire n'okutuusa ku lunaku luno olwa leero.”" 
Romans11:9 Dawudi naye n'agamba nti: “Olujjuliro lwabwe lubafuukire omutego, ekitimba, ekyesittazo, ekibonerezo;" 
Romans11:10 amaaso gaabwe gajjeko ekifu, baleme kulaba, n'emigongo gyabwe gibenduke ennaku zonna.”" 
Romans11:11 Awo nno mbuuza, beesittala ne bagwa? N'akatono! Kyokka olw'okusobya kwabwe okulokoka kwatuuka ku b'amawanga Yisirayeli alyoke akwatibwe obuggya." 
Romans11:12 Oba okusobya kwagaggawaza ensi, era bo okulemwa nga kyagaggawaza ab'amawanga, obugagga bulyenkana wa Yisirayeli yenna ng'akkiriza?" 
Romans11:13 Kati ab'amawanga mmwe ŋŋamba: Nga nkyali Mutume w'amawanga, omulimu gwange nagussangamu ekitiibwa," 
Romans11:14 nga njagala mu b'olulyo lwange nsiikuulemu obuggya, mbeeko abamu mu bo be ndokola." 
Romans11:15 Oba okubasuula kyaleeta okutabagana kw'ensi, okubakkiriza kiritegeeza ki? Si kuzza bulamu ababadde abafu?" 
Romans11:16 Ebibala ebisooka bwe biba ebitukuvu, n'obutta bwonna buba butukuvu; ekikolo bwe kiba ekitukuvu, n'amatabi gonna bwe gaba." 
Romans11:17 Naye singa amatabi agamu gawawaagulwako, ate ggwe oliva ey'oku ttale, ne bakuwaayira kuli mu kifo kyago, okugabana ku bugimu bw'oliva," 
Romans11:18 leka nno kwetendera ku matabi; bw'oba weetenda jjukira nti si ggwe owaniridde ekikolo, ekikolo kye kikuwaniridde." 
Romans11:19 Ojja kugamba nti: “Anti amatabi gaawawaagulwako nze bampaayireko.” 
Romans11:20 Kituufu. Gaawawaagulwako olw'obutakkiriza; ggwe wooli lwa kubeera kukkiriza. Awo nno leka kwetenda, tya buti." 
Romans11:21 Obanga Katonda amatabi agaakulirako teyagasaasira, nammwe tagenda kubasaasira." 
Romans11:22 Mutegeere nno ekisa kya Katonda ate n'obukambwe bwe. Bukambwe ku bali abaagwa, naye ku mmwe kisa kya Katonda singa musigala mu kisa kye, oba si ekyo nammwe mulitemwako." 
Romans11:23 Na bali nabo bwe bataligugubira mu butakkiriza bwabwe, baliwaayirwako, kubanga Katonda asobola bulungi okubawaayirako ogwokubiri." 
Romans11:24 Oba wasalibwa ku oliva ey'oku ttale kwe wakulira ne bakuwaayira ku oliva ennime, mu butonde ekitali kya bulijjo, nga kiriba kyangu amatabi agaakulirako okuddamu okuwaayirwa ku oliva yaago." 
Romans11:25 Abooluganda, saagala mubeere awo nga temumanyi kyama kino, sikulwa nga mweyita abagezi: okuguguba kwajjira kitundu butundu eky'Abayisirayeli, okutuusa ab'amawanga bonna lwe bannaggwayo okuyingira," 
Romans11:26 olwo nno Abayisirayeli bonna ne balyoka balokoka, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Omulokozi aliva mu Siyoni, aliggyawo mu Yakobo obukafiiri bwonna;" 
Romans11:27 eno y'eriba endagaano yange nabo, bwe ndiggyawo ebibi byabwe.”" 
Romans11:28 Weewaawo okusinziira ku Vangili balabe ba Katonda olw'okubeera mmwe; naye okusinziira ku kulondebwa kwabwe, bakyali baganzi olw'okubeera bajjajjaabwe." 
Romans11:29 Katonda bw'agaba oba bw'ayita, teyejjusa." 
Romans11:30 Nga mmwe luli bwe mwali mutawulira Katonda, ate kati n'abagirira ekisa olw'okubeera obutawulira bwa bali," 
Romans11:31 nabo kati tebawulira olw'okubeera ekisa ekibagiriddwa nabo balyoke basaasirwe. 
Romans11:32 Kubanga Katonda abantu bonna yabasibira mu butawulira alyoke bonna abasaasire. 
Romans11:33 Obugagga, amagezi n'okumanya kwa Katonda nga biwanvu kuzimiriza! By'ateesa nga tebyefumiitirizika, n'amakubo ge nga tegawenjeka!" 
Romans11:34 Ani yali ategedde Omukama by'alowooza? Ani yali amusalidde ku magezi? 
Romans11:35 Ani yali amutonedde nti ye kati amuddize? 
Romans11:36 Kubanga byonna byava mu ye, byayita mu ye era bidda wuwe. Atenderezebwe emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans12:1 Abooluganda, mbeegayiridde, olw'ekisa kya Katonda, muweereze emibiri gyammwe ng'ekitambiro ekiramu, ekitukuvu, Katonda ky'asiima, kwe kusinza kwammwe okw'omwoyo." 
Romans12:2 Muleme kuyisa ng'ensi eno bw'eyisa; mufuuke nga muzza buggya emitima gyammwe, lwe munaakakasa Katonda ky'ayagala, ekirungi, ekisaana, ekituufu." 
Romans12:3 Olw'eneema gye nafuna, ŋŋamba buli omu mu mmwe, aleme kwewanika okusinga bw'ali, wabula alowooze ku kubeera omwegendereza, buli omu ng'alabira ku kukkiriza Katonda kwe yamupimira." 
Romans12:4 Kubanga nga bwe tulina mu mubiri ebitundu ebingi, sso byonna nga tebikola kimu," 
Romans12:5 naffe bwe tuli, yadde tuli bangi, naye ffenna tuli mubiri gumu mu Kristu, ate buli kinnoomu abeera bitundu bya munne." 
Romans12:6 Nga bwe tulina ebitone ebyawufu ng'ogerera ku neema eyatuweebwa, tubyeyambe: Oba bulanzi, okusinziira ng'oli bw'akkiriza," 
Romans12:7 ow'okuweereza abeere ku kuweereza; omusomesa abeere ku gwa kusomesa," 
Romans12:8 abuulirira abeere ku gwa kubuulirira, aliko ky'agaba akiweese mutima gumu; alabirira asseeko omwoyo, agirira ekisa abanaku akikoze na ssanyu." 
Romans12:9 Okwagala kwammwe kubulemu obukuusa; ekibi mukikyawe, ekirungi mukinywerereko;" 
Romans12:10 mwagalane n'okwagala kw'ab'oluganda, musiŋŋane mu kuwaŋŋana ekitiibwa." 
Romans12:11 Temuddirira mu kwagala, mubugujje mu Mwoyo, muweereze Omukama." 
Romans12:12 Musanyukire mu bye musuubira, mu nnaku nga muguma, mwegayirire lutata." 
Romans12:13 Abatuukirivu abali mu bwetaavu, mubadduukirire; abagenyi mubaanirize." 
Romans12:14 Ababayigganya mubasabire emikisa; temubakolimira, mubasabire busabizi." 
Romans12:15 Musanyuke n'abasanyuka; mukaabe n'abakaaba. 
Romans12:16 Buli omu asse kimu ne munne, temwewanika, mukolagane n'abanaku, temweragaalaga bugezi." 
Romans12:17 Ekibi nga kibaddewo, temukisasuzangamu kibi, wabula omwoyo mugusse ku ekyo ekirungi eri buli muntu." 
Romans12:18 Nga bwe kisoboka, era nga bwe musobola, munoonye okubeera ab'emirembe n'abantu bonna." 
Romans12:19 Abooluganda, temuwooleranga ggwanga, wabula mubirekere obusungu bwa Katonda; anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Okuwoolera eggwanga kyange, nzija kusasula,” Omukama y'agamba." 
Romans12:20 Naye ggwe omulabe wo nga muyala, muwe ekyokulya; nga muyonta, muwe ekyokunywa. Bw'okola bw'otyo olituumira ku mutwe gwe amanda agengeredde." 
Romans12:21 Towangulibwanga kibi, wabula ekibi kiwangule na kirungi." 
Romans13:1 Buli muntu agondere abakulu abali mu buyinza, kubanga mpaawo buyinza butava eri Katonda, na bwonna obuliwo kati Katonda ye yabussaawo." 
Romans13:2 Awo nno awaganyalira abali mu buyinza awaganyalira Katonda kye yassaawo, era abo abawaganyala balisalirwa omusango okubasinga." 
Romans13:3 Abafuzi tebatiisa bantu balungi, wabula ababi. Oyagala obutatya ali mu buyinza? Kola bulungi, ajja kukusiima." 
Romans13:4 Anti muweereza wa Katonda olw'obulungi bwo. Naye bw'okola obubi, tya, kubanga ekitala takutte kya busa. Anti muweereza wa Katonda okulaga obusungu bwe ku oyo akola obubi." 
Romans13:5 Awo nno muteekwa okuwulira si lwa kutya busungu, naye olw'okubeera emmeeme yammwe ky'egamba." 
Romans13:6 Muwe emisolo lwa nsonga ye emu, kubanga bano baweereza ba Katonda olw'okutuukiriza omulimu ogwo bulijjo." 
Romans13:7 Bonna mubawe kye balina okuweebwa: ow'omusolo, musolo; ow'empooza, mpooza; ow'ekitiibwa, kitiibwa; ow'obukulu, bukulu." 
Romans13:8 Tewabangawo n'omu gwe mulinako bbanja, wabula mpozzi ery'okwagalana; kubanga ayagala munne, aba atuukirizza Etteeka;" 
Romans13:9 anti ebiragiro: Toyendanga, Tottanga, Tobbanga, Teweegombanga. Oba waliyo mpozzi n'ekiragiro ekirala, byonna bifunzibwa mu kiragiro kimu kino: “Oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.”" 
Romans13:10 Okwagala tekukolera munno bubi; okwagala nno kyekuva kubeera okutuukiriza Etteeka. 
Romans13:11 Mutegeere bulungi obudde buno; kaakati ke kaseera okuva mu tulo; anti okulokoka kuli kumpi naffe okusinga luli nga twakakkiriza; 
Romans13:12 ekiro kigenze, olunaku lusembedde. Tweyambule nno ebikolwa eby'ekizikiza, twambale ebyokulwanyisa eby'ekitangaala." 
Romans13:13 Tutambule na ssimbo nga mu budde obw'emisana; tuleme kudda mu biduula, mu kutamiira, si mu bitanda na mu kugwenyuka, si mu ndasano na mu kukwatiragana buggya," 
Romans13:14 wabula mwambale Mukama Yezu Kristu; muleme kumalira birowoozo ku mubiri nga munoonya bwe munaamatiza amaddu gaagwo. 
Romans14:1 Omunafu mu kukkiriza mumwanirize, naye si lwa kukaayana ku ndowooza zammwe." 
Romans14:2 Omu akkiririza mu kulya byonna, naye omunafu alya nva zokka." 
Romans14:3 Oyo alya aleme kunyooma atalya, n'oyo atalya aleme kulamula alya, anti naye Katonda yamwaniriza." 
Romans14:4 Ggwe ani okulamula omuweereza w'omulala? Oba ayimirira, oba agwa, ebyo bya mukama we; ajja kuyimirira, kubanga Omukama asobola okumuyimiriza." 
Romans14:5 Omu mu nnaku ayawulamu olw'enkizo, omulala zonna zimufaananira. Buli muntu abeere nga bwe yamatira mu mutima gwe." 
Romans14:6 Oli akuza olunaku, alukuza ku lwa Mukama; n'oli alya, alya ku lwa Mukama, kubanga yeebaza Katonda; n'oli alekayo okulya, alekayo ku lwa Mukama, naye yeebaza Katonda." 
Romans14:7 Mu ffe tewali abeerawo ku lulwe; era mu ffe tewali afa ku lulwe. 
Romans14:8 Oba tuli balamu, tuli balamu ku lwa Mukama; oba tufa, tufa ku lwa Mukama. Awo nno oba tuli balamu, oba tufudde, tuli ba Mukama." 
Romans14:9 Olw'okubeera ekyo Kristu kyeyava afa ate n'addamu okuba omulamu alyoke abeere Mukama w'abafu n'abalamu. 
Romans14:10 Kale ggwe lwaki olamula muganda wo? Ate ggwe, lwaki onyooma muganda wo? Anti ffenna tuliyimirira mu maaso g'entebe ya Katonda ey'obulamuzi." 
Romans14:11 Anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mazima nga nze ndi mulamu, Omukama y'agamba, buli vviivi lirinfukaamirira, na buli lulimi lulitenda Katonda.”" 
Romans14:12 Awo nno buli omu mu ffe aliwoza lulwe ewa Katonda. 
Romans14:13 Kale nno tulekere awo eby'ono okulamula oli, wabula tusalewo kino: obutateerawo muganda wo kimwesitazza oba kimusuula mu kibi." 
Romans14:14 Mmanyi era ndi mumativu mu Mukama Yezu nti mpaawo kikyafu ku bwakyo; wabula kikyafu ku oyo alowooza nti kikyafu. 
Romans14:15 Oba muganda wo akosebwa olw'emmere gy'olya, oba tokyatambulira mu kwagalana. Toleka mmere yo kuzikiriza oli Kristu gwe yafiirira." 
Romans14:16 Awo nno ekintu kyo ekirungi tokivumaganya ng'ekibi. 
Romans14:17 Kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebuli mu kulya oba mu kunywa, wabula mu butuukirivu, mu ddembe ne mu ssanyu mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Romans14:18 Aweereza Kristu mu ngeri eyo asanyusa Katonda n'abantu bamusiima. 
Romans14:19 Kale nno tunyiikirire ebireeta eddembe n'okuzimbagana. 
Romans14:20 Emmere ereme kukwonoonesa mulimu gwa Katonda. Kwo okuba byonna birongoofu, naye kibi omuntu okuleetera abalala okwesittala olw'emmere gy'alya." 
Romans14:21 Kirungi obutalya nnyama, obutanywa mwenge oba ekirala kyonna muganda wo ky'ayinza okwesittalako." 
Romans14:22 Ggwe obumativu bw'olina bukuumire wakati wo ne Katonda wo. Yeesiimye oyo atalinaamu kamukyekeera olw'ekyo kye yasiima. 
Romans14:23 Alimu okubuusabuusa bw'alya, gumusinga, kubanga teyabadde mumativu ku ky'akola, kubanga kyonna ekitava mu bumativu kiba kibi." 
Romans15:1 Ffe ab'amaanyi tuteekwa okugumiikiriza abanafu; tuleme kwesanyusa ffekka. 
Romans15:2 Buli omu mu ffe asanyuse munne lwa bulungi bwe, okumuzimba." 
Romans15:3 Anti Kristu teyeesanyusa yekka, naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa: “Ebivumo by'abakuvuma byagwa ku nze.”" 
Romans15:4 Anti byonna ebyasooka okuwandiikibwa byawandiikibwa kutuyigiriza; olw'okugumiikiriza n'olw'Ebiwandiiko okutugumya, tusuubire." 
Romans15:5 Katonda nnyini kugumiikiriza n'okukubagiza abawe mwenna mubeere kimu nga mulabira ku Kristu Yezu," 
Romans15:6 olwo n'akamwa kamu mutendereze Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu. 
Romans15:7 Awo nno buli omu akkirize munne nga Kristu bwe yabakkiriza olw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda. 
Romans15:8 Kubanga mbagamba nti Kristu yafuuka muweereza w'abatayirire okulaga amazima ga Katonda, akakase ebisuubizo ebyasuubizibwa bajjajjaffe," 
Romans15:9 n'ab'amawanga batendereze Katonda olw'ekisa kye, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Kyendiva nkugulumiza mu mawanga, ndiyimbira erinnya lyo ettendo.”" 
Romans15:10 Ate era awalala wagamba nti: “Amawanga, mujaguze n'abantu be;”" 
Romans15:11 ate nti: “Amawanga mwenna, mutendereze Omukama, nammwe abantu mwenna, mumugulumize.”" 
Romans15:12 Ate era ne Yisaaya n'agamba nti: “Ekikolo kya Yesse kirijja, oyo alisituka okufuga amawanga, mu ye amawanga mwe galisuubira.”" 
Romans15:13 Kale Katonda nnyini ssuubi abajjuze n'essanyu lyonna n'eddembe mu kukkiriza, mulyoke muyitirire mu ssuubi olw'amaanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Romans15:14 Baganda bange, nange nzennyini ndi mumativu ku mmwe, nti mubugaanye obulungi, mujjudde okumanya kwonna era musobola okubuuliragana." 
Romans15:15 Sso era abooluganda, mu bimu mbawandiikidde nga ndi mukalangafu nga njagala okubibajjukiza ku lw'eneema ya Katonda gye yampa" 
Romans15:16 okubeera omuweereza w'ebitukuvu owa Kristu Yezu mu b'amawanga, mpeereze ekitambiro ky'Evangili ya Katonda, ab'amawanga bafuuke ekitone ekisiimibwa, Mwoyo Mutuukirivu ky'atukuzizza." 
Romans15:17 Awo nno mu Kristu Yezu nnina kwe nsinziira okwetenda olw'ebyo bye nkola olwa Katonda. 
Romans15:18 Kubanga siguma kwogera ku kintu kyonna okuggyako ebyo Kristu by'akoze ng'ayita mu nze nsobole okuwangula obuwulize bw'ab'amawanga, mu bigambo ne mu bikolwa," 
Romans15:19 mu maanyi g'obubonero n'ebyewuunyo, mu maanyi ga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu; leero okuviira ddala e Yeruzaalemu n'okutuukira ddala okwetooloola Yilliriko, wonna nabunyaayo Evangili ya Kristu." 
Romans15:20 Ne nfuba bwe ntyo Evangili eno okugiyigiriza, naye nga siyigiriza gye baamala edda okuwulira ku Kristu, nneme kuzimbira ku ntandikwa ya mulala, wabula nga bwe kyawandiikibwa," 
Romans15:21 “Abo abaali batamubuulirwanga baliraba, abo abaali batawuliranga balitegeera.”" 
Romans15:22 Eyo y'ensonga eyanziyiza emirundi egiwera okujja ewammwe, n'okutuusa kati ekyanziyiza." 
Romans15:23 Naye kati mu bitundu bino nga bwe sikyalinamu kifo, ate nga n'emyaka giigino mingi nga neegomba okujja ewammwe," 
Romans15:24 bwe ndiba ndaga mu Sipaniya, nsuubira okuyita ewammwe mbalabeko; bwe ndimala okubeerako nammwe ne tusanyukamu akabanga, mulimperekerako okweyongerayo eri." 
Romans15:25 Kati nkyalagako Yeruzaalemu mbeeko kye nnyambamu abatuukirivu baayo. 
Romans15:26 Kubanga ab'omu Masedoniya ne mu Akayiya baasiima okubaako kye bakuŋŋaanyaawo olw'abatuukirivu abaavu abali e Yeruzaalemu. 
Romans15:27 Baalaba nga kisaana, era ggwe wamma babalinako ebbanja, kubanga ab'amawanga kati nabo baagabanye ku birungi eby'omwoyo bye balina, awo nno bano nabo balagirwa okubayamba mu by'omubiri." 
Romans15:28 Kale nno bwe ndimala omulimu ogwo, n'okutuusa ebyakuŋŋaanyizibwa, nzija kuyitira ewammwe nga ŋŋenda mu Sipaniya." 
Romans15:29 Mmanyi nga bwe ndijja ewammwe, ndijjira mu mukisa mujjuvu ogwa Kristu." 
Romans15:30 Awo nno, abooluganda, mbeegayiridde ku lwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu n'olw'okwagala kwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, munyiikire wamu nange okwegayirira Katonda nga munsabira," 
Romans15:31 ntaasibwe abatakkiriza ab'omu Buyudaaya; era n'obuyambi bwe ntwalira abatuukirivu e Yeruzaalemu busiimibwe," 
Romans15:32 Katonda ng'ayagadde, ndyoke ntuuke ewammwe nga ndi mu ssanyu, mpeereko nga tuli wamu." 
Romans15:33 Kale Katonda Kiwamirembe abeere nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
Romans16:1 Mbakwasizza mmwannyinaffe Febe, omudyakoni w'omu Ekleziya y'e Cenkureya;" 
Romans16:2 mumwanirize mu Mukama nga bwe kisaanira abatuukirivu; mumuyambe mu byonna by'anaaba abeetaazeeko, kubanga naye yayamba bangi nga nange mw'ontwalidde." 
Romans16:3 Mundabire Prisika ne Akwila, bakozi bannange mu Kristu Yezu," 
Romans16:4 abaawaayo ensingo zaabwe okuwonya obulamu bwange. Abo si nze nzekka abeebaza, naye n'Ekleziya zonna ez'omu mawanga zibeebaza." 
Romans16:5 Era mundabire n'Ekleziya akuŋŋaanira mu nnyumba zaabwe. Mundabire omwagalwa Epeneto, ekibala kya Aziya ekibereberye eri Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Mundabire Mariya eyakola ebingi mu mmwe. 
Romans16:7 Mundabire Anduroniko ne Yuniya, abooluganda era basibe bannange, abatendebwa mu Batume, abaali mu Kristu nze nga sinnaba." 
Romans16:8 Mundabire Ampuliyato, omwagalwa mu Mukama." 
Romans16:9 Mundabire Wurubano, mukozi munnaffe mu Kristu, era ne Sitako omwagalwa." 
Romans16:10 Mundabire Apelle eyakakata mu Kristu. Mundabire ab'ewa Arisitobulo. 
Romans16:11 Mundabire muganda wange Erodiyoni; mundabire abo mu Mukama ab'omu nnyumba ya Narikisso. 
Romans16:12 Mundabire Tirufayina ne Tirufoza abafaabiina mu Mukama. Mundabire mukwano gwange Perisi akoze ebingi mu Mukama. 
Romans16:13 Mundabire Rufo omwawufu mu Mukama; mundabire ne nnyina era mmange. 
Romans16:14 Mundabire Asunkurito, Fulegoni, Erime, Paturoba, Erume n'abooluganda bwe bali." 
Romans16:15 Mundabire Filologo, Yuliya, Nerewo ne mwannyina, ne Olimpa, n'abatuukirivu bonna bwe bali." 
Romans16:16 Mulamusaganye n'okunywegeragana okutukuvu. Ekleziya za Kristu zonna zibatumidde. 
Romans16:17 Abooluganda, mbeegayiridde mwekkaanye abo ababaleetera enjawukana n'okusobeza ne bakontana n'enjigiriza gye mwayiga; mubeewale." 
Romans16:18 Anti ab'engeri eyo tebaweereza Mukama waffe Kristu, wabula baweereza mbuto zaabwe, era balimbalimba ab'emitima emyangu n'ebigambo byabwe ebiweweevu ebisuutasuuta." 
Romans16:19 Anti obuwulize bwammwe bumanyiddwa bonna, bwe ntyo mbeenyumirizaamu; nandyagadde mubeere bagezi mu buli kirungi, abatakuusa awali ekibi." 
Romans16:20 Olwo Katonda Kiwamirembe ajja kubetentera mangu Sitaani wansi w'ebigere byammwe. Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeere nammwe. 
Romans16:21 Timotewo mukozi munnange, abatumidde, era ne Lukiyo ne Yasoni ne Sosipateri, baganda bange." 
Romans16:22 Nange Terisiyo awandiise ebbaluwa eno, mbalamusa mu Mukama." 
Romans16:23 Gayiyo, asuza nze n'Ekleziya yenna, abatumidde. Erasto, omuwanika w'ekibuga, abatumidde, ko n'owooluganda Kwarito." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Eri oyo asobola okubafuula ab'amaanyi, olw'Evangili yange n'enjigiriza ya Yezu Kristu, olw'okubikkulibwa kw'ekyama ekyakisibwa okuva edda n'edda," 
Romans16:26 kati ekyoleseddwa ne kimanyisibwa, n'abalanzi kye baawandiika, olw'ekiragiro kya Katonda ataggwaawo, ekimanyisiddwa amawanga gonna, okugatuusa ku buwulize obuva mu kukkiriza," 
Romans16:27 oyo nno Katonda, yekka omugezi, aweebwe ettendo mu Yezu Kristu emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Corinthians1:1 Pawulo, eyayitibwa okuba omutume wa Kristu Yezu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ko n'owooluganda Sositene;" 
1Corinthians1:2 ya Ekleziya wa Katonda ali mu Korinti, eri abo abaatukuzibwa mu Kristu Yezu, abaayitibwa okubeera abatuukirivu awamu n'abo bonna abakoowoola erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu buli wantu, Mukama waabwe era owaffe." 
1Corinthians1:3 Eneema ebeere nammwe n'emirembe gya Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:4 Bulijjo neebaza Katonda ku lwammwe olw'eneema ya Katonda eyabaweebwa mu Kristu Yezu," 
1Corinthians1:5 kubanga mu ye mugaggawaziddwa mu buli kintu: mu buli njogera ne mu buli magezi; 
1Corinthians1:6 anti ng'ebijulirwa ku Kristu byanywezebwa mu mmwe; 
1Corinthians1:7 bwe kityo mubeere nga temuliiko kirabo kya mwoyo ekibabulako nga muli mu kulindirira okwolekebwa kw'Omukama Yezu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ajja kubanyweza okutuusa ku nkomerero, nga temuliiko musango ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Katonda oyo mwesigwa eyabayita n'abagatta mu kubeera ekimu n'Omwana we Yezu Kristu, Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians1:10 Mbeegayiridde, abooluganda, mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, mussenga kimu; mu mmwe muleke kubaamu kwesalaasalamu, wabula mubeerere ddala ba mmeeme emu, ba ndowooza emu." 
1Corinthians1:11 Baganda bange, anti ab'ewa Kulowe bantegeezezza nti mu mmwe mulimu obugulumbo." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kye ntegeeza kye kino, nti buli omu mu mmwe agamba nti: “Nze ndi wa Pawulo,” oba nti: “Nze ndi wa Apollo,” oba nti: “Nze ndi wa Kefa,” oba nti: “Nze ndi wa Kristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Kristu yeetemyemu? Pawulo ye yakomererwa ku musaalaba okubeera mmwe? Mwabatizibwa mu linnya lya Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Neebaza Katonda nti mu mmwe saabatizaamu n'omu, okuggyako Krisipo ne Gayiyo," 
1Corinthians1:15 nti munaagamba nti mwabatizibwa mu linnya lyange. 
1Corinthians1:16 Nabatiza n'ab'omu nnyumba ya Stefana. Okuggyako abo, tewali mulala gwe nabatiza." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kristu tantumanga kubatiza, wabula okulangirira Evangili; si mu lulimi olw'ekigezi, sikulwa ng'omusaalaba gwa Kristu guggwaamu ensa." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ku bazikirira ekigambo ky'omusaalaba kiba busiru; naye ku ffe abalokoka, ge maanyi ga Katonda," 
1Corinthians1:19 anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Nzija kuzikiriza amagezi g'abagezi; ndiggyawo okutegeera kw'abalabalaba.” 
1Corinthians1:20 Omugezi ali ludda wa? Omuwandiisi ali ludda wa? Abawakanyi b'omu mulembe guno baluwa? Amagezi g'ensi eno Katonda tagafudde busiru? 
1Corinthians1:21 Obanga okusinziira ku magezi ga Katonda ensi teyamanya Katonda ng'eyita mu magezi gaayo, Katonda yayagala ng'ayita mu busiru bw'ekyo kye tuyigiriza alokole abo abakkiriza." 
1Corinthians1:22 Bo Abayudaaya basaba bubonero, ate Abagereeki banoonya magezi;" 
1Corinthians1:23 naye ffe tulangirira Kristu omukomerere, ku Abayudaaya kyesittazo, ate ku b'amawanga busiru;" 
1Corinthians1:24 naye ku abo abaayitibwa, Abayudaaya oba Abagereeki, ye Kristu obuyinza bwa Katonda, era amagezi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians1:25 Anti obusiru bwa Katonda bwa magezi okusinga abantu; obunafu bwa Katonda bwa maanyi okusinga abantu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Abooluganda, mulabe nga bwe mwayitibwa, mu mmwe abagezi, ku bw'omuntu, temwali bangi, n'ab'obuyinza tebaali bangi, n'abakungu tebaali bangi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Naye Katonda yalonda ababuyabuya mu nsi aswaze abagezi; abanafu mu nsi Katonda be yalonda aswaze ab'amaanyi. 
1Corinthians1:28 Abo mu nsi abataliiko bwe bali, abagayibwa, omutali nsa, Katonda be yalonda okuggyawo abalimu ensa," 
1Corinthians1:29 walyoke wabulewo n'omu eyeetendera mu maaso ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:30 Mu ye mwe mwava mulyoke mubeerewo mu Kristu Yezu, Katonda gwe yafuula amagezi gaffe, obutuukirivu bwaffe, okutukuzibwa kwaffe n'okununulibwa kwaffe." 
1Corinthians1:31 Awo nno nga bwe kyawandiikibwa, “Eyeetenda, yeetendere mu Mukama.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Abooluganda, nange bwe najja gye muli, sajja nga nnangirira ekyama kya Katonda mu njogera ya kikugu oba ya kigezi," 
1Corinthians2:2 kubanga nali nsazeewo obutamanya kirala kyonna mu mmwe wabula Yezu Kristu, oyo omukomerere." 
1Corinthians2:3 Nali mu mmwe mu buteeyinza, mu kutya ne mu kukankana okungi." 
1Corinthians2:4 Bye nayogeranga ne bye nayigirizanga tebyali mu bigambo bisukkirivu eby'amagezi, wabula mu kw'oleka Mwoyo n'amaanyi," 
1Corinthians2:5 okukkiriza kwammwe kuleme kwesigama ku magezi ga bantu, wabula ku maanyi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:6 Naye nga tuli mu bantu abakulu, tubabuulira magezi, si magezi ag'emirembe gyaffe oba ag'abafuzi ab'emirembe gyaffe abagenda basaanyizibwawo;" 
1Corinthians2:7 wabula tubabuulira amagezi ga Katonda ag'ekyama agaali gakisiddwa, Katonda ge yategeka okuva ddi nga n'emirembe teginnasooka, tutuuke ku kugulumizibwa." 
1Corinthians2:8 Mu bakungu b'ensi tewaali n'omu kino yakimanya; baba kukimanya tebandikomeredde Mukama ow'ekitiibwa. 
1Corinthians2:9 Naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ebintu eriiso bye litalabangako n'okutu bye kutawulirangako n'omutima gw'omuntu bye guteefumiitirizangako, ebyo Katonda bye yategekera abo abamwagala,”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Katonda yabitwoleka mu Mwoyo we; anti Mwoyo yeekebejja buli kintu, newandibadde munda mu Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:11 Ani amanyi ebiri mu muntu munda okuggyako omwoyo gw'omuntu ogumulimu? Bwe kityo nno n'ebiri munda mu Katonda tewali abitegeera okuggyako Mwoyo wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians2:12 Ffe tetwafuna mwoyo gwa nsi eno, wabula Mwoyo ava mu Katonda, tulyoke tutegeere ebirabo Katonda bye yatugabira." 
1Corinthians2:13 Awo nno bino tetubiyigiriza mu bigambo bya magezi ag'obuntu obuntu, wabula mu bigambo Mwoyo by'ayigiriza, eby'omwoyo ne tubinnyonnyola mu lulimi olwa Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Omuntu mu bw'omuntu takkiriza bya Mwoyo wa Katonda, kubanga ku ye byonna biba busiru; tayinza kubitegeera, kubanga bisobola kutegeerwa na Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:15 Sso omuntu owa Mwoyo asobola okwekenneenya byonna, naye ye tewali asobola kumwekenneenya." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ani amanyi Omukama by'alowooza munda ye nti amuyigirize? Naye ffe tulina endowooza ya Kristu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Nange nno, abooluganda, saayogera nammwe ng'abantu aba Mwoyo, wabula ng'abantu obuntu, abakyali abato mu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabagabiriranga mata, sso si mmere eŋŋumu, kubanga mwali temunnagisobola. Na kati temunnagisobola," 
1Corinthians3:3 era mukyali ba mubiri. Nga mu mmwe mukyalimu okukwatiragana obuggya n'obugulumbo, muba temukyali ba mubiri, nga mweyisa ng'abantu aba bulijjo?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Kubanga oli amala okuwoza: “Nze ndi wa Pawulo,” omulala nti: “Nze ndi wa Apollo,” olwo temuli bantu buntu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Apollo kye ki? Pawulo kye ki? Baweereza buweereza mwe mwayita okukkiriza buli omu ng'Omukama bwe yamuwa. 
1Corinthians3:6 Nze nasimba, Apollo n'afukirira, naye Katonda ye yawa okukula." 
1Corinthians3:7 Asimba n'afukirira bo si ba nsonga, wabula Katonda, awa okukula." 
1Corinthians3:8 Asimba n'afukirira bonna kye kimu; buli omu alifuna empeera okusinziira ku mulimu gwe yakola. 
1Corinthians3:9 Ffe tuli bakozi abayamba ku Katonda, mmwe muli nnimiro ya Mukama, kizimbe kye." 
1Corinthians3:10 Olw'eneema Katonda gye yampa nassaawo omusingi, okufaanana ng'omuzimbi omukugu bw'akola, okwo omulala kw'azimbira. Buli omu yeegendereze bw'aguzimbirako." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kubanga tewali asobola kuteekawo musingi mulala wabula ogwo ogwassibwawo, ye Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Singa ku musingi ogwo oli azimbirako ne zaabu, ffeeza, amayinja ag'omuwendo, embaawo, essubi, ebisusunku…" 
1Corinthians3:13 buli mulimu gwa kinnoomu gulyolekebwa, kubanga olunaku lw'Omukama luligulaga; anti gulyolekebwa n'omuliro; omuliro guligeza buli kika kya mulimu gwa kinnoomu." 
1Corinthians3:14 Omulimu oli gwe yazimbako bwe gulisigalawo, alifuna empeera;" 
1Corinthians3:15 singa omulimu gw'oli gulisirikka, alifiirwa, nandibadde nga ye yennyini aliwonyezebwa; naye kyenkana aliba ng'ayise mu muliro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Temumanyi nga muli kiggwa kya Katonda, nga ne Mwoyo wa Katonda asula mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Oli bw'alizikiriza ekiggwa kya Katonda, ne Katonda alimuzikiriza; kubanga ekiggwa kya Katonda kintu kitukuvu, ate ekiggwa ekyo ye mmwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Wabulewo eyeerimba; oba mu mmwe mulimu alowooza nti mugezi mu mulembe guno, afuuke musiru, alyoke afuuke omugezi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Kubanga mu maaso ga Katonda, amagezi g'ensi eno buba busiru. Anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Akwatira abagezi mu bukujjukujju bwabwe,”" 
1Corinthians3:20 n'awalala nti: “Omukama amanyi ebirowoozo by'abagezi, nti temuli kantu.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Awo nno muleme kwetendera mu bantu. Anti byonna byammwe," 
1Corinthians3:22 abeere Pawulo, oba Apollo, oba Kefa, oba ensi, oba obulamu, oba okufa, oba kati, oba gye bujja; ebyo byonna byammwe;" 
1Corinthians3:23 nammwe muli ba Kristu; ne Kristu wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians4:1 Omuntu bw'ati bwe yanditulowoozezzaako: ng'abaweereza ba Kristu, abawanika b'ebyama bya Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:2 Kati nno ekirindiriddwa mu bawanika, omuwanika yandisangiddwa nga mwesigwa." 
1Corinthians4:3 Nze mmwe okunnamula, oba okulamulibwa embuga ez'abantu obuntu, sikitwala ng'ekikulu; nange nzennyini seeramula." 
1Corinthians4:4 Kwo okubeera seemanyiiko musango; naye si kwe kugamba nti ndi mutuukirivu; Omukama y'annamula. 
1Corinthians4:5 Awo nno muleke kulamula ng'obudde tebunnatuuka; ng'Omukama tannatuuka oyo alyerula byonna ebikisiddwa mu nzikiza, n'amanyisa enteesa eziri mu mutima; olwo buli omu lw'alifuna ettendo eriva mu Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:6 Abooluganda, njogedde ebyo byonna ku nze ne ku Apollo, lwa kubeera mmwe, mulyoke mutuyigireko okugoberera ebyawandiikibwa, wabulewo mu mmwe eyeetenda olw'omu ne kireetera omulala okugayibwa." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ani akulabyemu eky'enjawulo? Kiki ky'olina ky'otaafuna bufunyi? Oba wakifuna bufunyi, lwaki wetenda ng'ataafuna kifune?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Kati mukkuse! Mwagaggawala dda! Mwafuna obwakabaka nga ffe tetuli nammwe! Singa nno muba bakabaka naffe ne tuba bakabaka awamu nammwe!
