1Corinthians4:9 Naye ndowooza Katonda ffe Abatume atwolese ng'abasemberayo ddala mu bonna; ng'abantu abasaliddwa ogw'okufa; kubanga tufuuse ekyokwerolera eri ensi, bamalayika n'abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tuli basiru olw'okubeera Kristu, naye mmwe muli bagezi mu Kristu; tuli banafu, naye mmwe muli ba maanyi; mmwe mussibwamu ekitiibwa, naye ffe tunyoomebwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Ne ku ssaawa ya leero tuli bayala, tulumwa ennyonta, tuyita bwereere, tukubibwa, tetulina we tusula;" 
1Corinthians4:12 tufaabiina nga tukola n'emikono gyaffe, bwe tuvumibwa, ffe tusabira mikisa; bwe tuyigganyizibwa, ffe tugumiikiriza;" 
1Corinthians4:13 bwe tuweebuulwa, ffe tukanya kuddaabiriza; tufuuse bikudumu bya nsi, ebisejja n'okutuusa kati." 
1Corinthians4:14 Bino sibiwandiise kubaswaza, wabula kubabuulirira ng'abaana bange abaagalwa." 
1Corinthians4:15 Mwandiba nga mulina ababasomesa mu Kristu nga kakumi, naye bakitammwe temulina bangi. Nze nabazaala nga kitammwe mwenna mu Kristu Yezu olw'Evangili." 
1Corinthians4:16 Kale nno mbeegayiridde, mundabireko." 
1Corinthians4:17 Kyenvudde mbatumira Timotewo, omwana wange omwagalwa era omwesigwa mu Mukama, okubajjukiza nga bwe mpisa mu Yezu Kristu, nga bwe njigiriza mu buli Ekleziya." 
1Corinthians4:18 Bwe nafaanana ng'atakyayise eyo gye muli, abamu ne beewanika." 
1Corinthians4:19 Nzija nno kujja mangu ewammwe, Omukama ng'ayagadde, olwo ndimanya si bigambo by'abo abeewanika, wabula amaanyi gaabwe." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebubeera mu bigambo bugambo, wabula mu maanyi." 
1Corinthians4:21 Kiki kye mwagala? Nzije ewammwe na muggo, oba na kwagala, mu mutima omukkakkamu?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Tuwulira, ate nga kikakafu, nti mu mmwe eriyo obuseegu, ate nno ekika ky'obuseegu ekitasangika na mu bakafiiri; anti waliwo omu alina muka kitaawe." 
1Corinthians5:2 Mmwe muli mu kwetenda! Temusaanye kubeera mu maziga? Eyakola ekyo abaggyibwemu. 
1Corinthians5:3 Nandibadde siriiyo eyo mu mubiri, naye gye ndi mu mwoyo, era omusango nagumusalidde dda" 
1Corinthians5:4 mu linnya ly'Omukama Yezu, oyo eyakola ekintu ng'ekyo. Bwe munaaba mukuŋŋaanye mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, nga nange ndi nammwe mu mwoyo, mu buyinza bwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu," 
1Corinthians5:5 muweeyo omuntu ow'engeri eyo eri Sitaani, omubiri gwe guzikirire, olwo omwoyo gwe guwonyezebwe ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Bye mwetendamu tebiriimu. Temumanyi nti ekizimbulukusa ekitono kiti kizimbulukusa obutta bwonna? 
1Corinthians5:7 Mwetukuzeeko ekizimbulukusa ekikadde, mubeere obutta obuggya, nga bwe mutaliimu kizimbulukusa. Kubanga Kristu, akaliga ka Pasika, atambiddwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Kale nno embaga tuleme kugirya n'ekizimbulukusa ekikadde, ekizimbulukusa eky'ettima n'obugwenyufu, naye tugirye n'omugaati ogutazimbulukuse mu bwesimbu n'amazima." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mu bbaluwa eri nabawandiikira ne mbagamba obuteetaba na bantu baseegu. 
1Corinthians5:10 Sitegeeza ggwe wamma buli muntu museegu mu nsi muno, oba ow'omululu gw'ebintu, oba omunyazi, yadde abasinza balubaale, mpozzi ng'ensi mwandigivuddeko buvi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Wabula nabawandiikira kubagaana kwetaba n'oyo ayitibwa owooluganda naye nga museegu, oba ow'omululu gw'ebintu, omuvumi, omutamiivu oba omubbi; ow'engeri eyo muleme kulya naye ku lujjuliro." 
1Corinthians5:12 Nze ab'ebweru mbalamula ntya? Nammwe abali mu mmwe si be mulina okulamula? 
1Corinthians5:13 Ab'ebweru Katonda y'abalamula. Omuntu ono omuseegu mumuggyire ddala mu mmwe. 
1Corinthians6:1 Omu mu mmwe ng'aliko ky'avunaana omulala, aguma atya okuwoleza mu maaso g'abatali batuukirivu mu kifo ky'okuwoleza mu batuukirivu?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Temumanyi nti abatuukirivu be baliramula ensi? Oba mmwe muliramula ensi, mmwe mutamala busongasonga obwo?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Temumanyi nga ffe tuliramula bamalayika? Leero nno alabisa bino eby'obulamu buno. 
1Corinthians6:4 Nga mulina ensonga ng'ezo, lwaki muzitwala eri abo Ekleziya b'enyooma?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Kino nkyogera kubakwasa nsonyi; ddala ddala mu mmwe temuli n'omu asobola kumala nsonga za ba luganda mu mmwe? 
1Corinthians6:6 Owooluganda n'awawaabira owooluganda ate nnyini mu batakkiriza? 
1Corinthians6:7 Ate mmwe okuwozaŋŋanya mwekka na mwekka nakyo kitegeeza bwe muwanguddwa. Lwaki temugumiikiriza nsobi? Lwaki temusiima waakiri ne mulyakulwa? 
1Corinthians6:8 Laba, nammwe muyisa bubi, ne mulyakula, ate nnyini abooluganda." 
1Corinthians6:9 Temumanyi nti abatali batuukirivu tebalisikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda? Muleme kuwubisibwa; abaseegu, oba abasinza balubaale, oba abenzi, oba abagwagwa, oba abakabawala n'ab'oluse lwabwe," 
1Corinthians6:10 oba ababbi, oba abalulunkanira ebintu, oba abatamiivu, oba abavumi, oba abanyazi, si ba kusikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:11 Abamu edda bwe mwali, naye kati mwanaazibwa, mwatukuzibwa, sso mwafuuka batuukirivu mu linnya ly'Omukama Yezu Kristu ne mu Mwoyo wa Katonda waffe." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola,” naye si byonna nti bingasa. “Byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola,” naye sigenda kufugibwa kintu na kimu." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Emmere yakolerwa lubuto, n'olubuto lwakolerwa mmere;” naye byombi Katonda alibizikiriza. Omubiri teguliiwo lwa buseegu, wabula lwa Mukama, n'Omukama lwa mubiri." 
1Corinthians6:14 Katonda yazuukiza Omukama, naffe alituzuukiza n'obuyinza bwe." 
1Corinthians6:15 Temumanyi ng'emibiri gyamwe bitundu bya Kristu? Awo nzirire ebitundu bya Kristu mbifuule ebitundu by'omukazi malaaya? Kikafuuwe! 
1Corinthians6:16 Temumanyi nti ayeegatta ne malaaya afuuka mubiri gumu naye? Anti yagamba nti: “Babiri balifuuka omubiri gumu.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Sso eyeegatta ku Mukama, afuuka mwoyo gumu naye." 
1Corinthians6:18 Mwewale obuseegu. Ekibi ekirala kyonna omuntu ky'akola kiba bweru wa mubiri gwe; naye akola eby'obuseegu, ekibi akikola mu mubiri gwe mwennyini." 
1Corinthians6:19 Temumanyi ng'omubiri gwammwe kiggwa kya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu abalimu, gwe mwafuna okuva ewa Katonda? Mmwe temwerinaako bwannannyini." 
1Corinthians6:20 Mwagulibwa n'omuwendo, kale nno mugulumize Katonda mu mubiri gwammwe." 
1Corinthians7:1 Ku bye mwampandiikirako nti: “Kirungi omusajja obutakwata ku mukazi.” 
1Corinthians7:2 Kyokka olw'okubeera obuseegu, buli musajja afune mukazi we, na buli mukazi afune bba." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omusajja asaanye atuukirize mukazi we ky'amubanja, n'omukazi akole bw'atyo eri bba." 
1Corinthians7:4 Kubanga omukazi omubiri gwe tagulinaako bwannannyini, wabula bba; n'omusajja omubiri gwe tagulinaako bwannannyini, wabula mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:5 Buli omu aleme kugaana munne; wabula mpozzi nga mumaze kukkaanya mumale ebbanga, mufune akadde akeegayirira; ate muddiŋŋane, Sitaani aleme kubakema olw'okulemererwa okwefuga." 
1Corinthians7:6 Kino sikyogera ng'etteeka, wabula nkirekera buli omu." 
1Corinthians7:7 Singa nno mmwenna mwali nga nze bwe ndi. Naye buli omu alina ekirabo kye ekyawufu okuva eri Katonda, omu abeera na kino, n'omulala n'abeera na kiri." 
1Corinthians7:8 Ku batannawasa ne bannamwandu, ŋŋamba nti singa basigalira awo nga nze bwe ndi kyandibakoze bulungi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Naye bwe baba tebasobola kwefuga, bawase, kubanga okuwasa kirungi okusinga okubabirirwa." 
1Corinthians7:10 Abafumbo mbalagira, naye si nze, wabula Omukama y'abalagira, nti omukyala tanobanga ku bba." 
1Corinthians7:11 Bw'anobanga, asigaliranga awo, oba addangayo n'atabagana ne bba. N'omusajja tayawukananga ne mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Bye ŋŋamba abalala nze mbyogera, si Mukama, nti obanga owooluganda alina omukazi atannakkiriza, omukazi ng'asiima basigale wamu, aleme kumugoba." 
1Corinthians7:13 N'omukazi bw'aba ne bba atannakkiriza, ng'omusajja asiima basigale wamu, aleme kwawukana naye." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kubanga omusajja atannakkiriza atukuzibwa olw'omukazi; n'omukazi atannakkiriza atukuzibwa olw'omusajja. Singa si bwe kityo bwe kiri, abaana bandibadde si batukuvu; sso mu mazima batukuvu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Atannakkiriza bw'ayagala okwawukana, agende. Bwe biba bwe bityo, owooluganda oba mwannyinaffe aba takyalina kiziyizo. Anti Katonda yatuyitira ddembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ggwe omukazi, omanyi otya ng'olirokola balo? Ggwe omusajja, omanyi otya ng'olirokola mukazi wo?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Buli omu ayise ng'Omukama bwe yamuteebeza, era mu mbeera gye yalimu Katonda lwe yamuyita. Kino kye ndagira mu Ekleziya zonna." 
1Corinthians7:18 Oli we yayitirwa yali mutayirire? Aleme kweggyako bubonero bwa kutayirirwa. Oli we yayitirwa teyali mutayirire? Aleme kunoonya kutayirirwa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Okutayirirwa temuli kantu, n'obutatayirirwa temuli kantu; ekikulu kukwata biragiro bya Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buli omu asigale mu mbeera mwe yayitirwa. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wali muddu we wayitirwa? Leka kweraliikirira; kyokka bw'osobola okuwona obuddu, weeyambise omukisa ogwo." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kubanga oyo Omukama gwe yayita nga muddu, kaakano mununule wa Mukama; kye kimu n'oli eyayitibwa nga si muddu, kaakano muddu wa Kristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mwagulibwa n'omuwendo, muleme kufuuka nno baddu ba bantu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Abooluganda, buli omu anywerere mu mbeera mwe yayitirwa, mw'aba asigala ne Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:25 Omukama taliiko kye yandagira ku batannafumbirwa, naye mpa endowooza yange nga nze olw'ekisa ky'Omukama eyaweebwa okuba omwesigwa." 
1Corinthians7:26 Okulabira ku bikalubo eby'ebiseera bino, ndowooza ekisinga omuntu asigale nga bw'ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wagattibwa n'omukazi? Tonoonya kusumululwa. Tonnawasa? Tonoonya wa kuwasa. 
1Corinthians7:28 Naye bw'oba owasizza, oba tokoze kibi; n'omuwala bw'afumbirwa, aba takoze kibi. Naye abo ennaku ez'omubiri zijja kubasanga; nandyagadde okuzibawonya." 
1Corinthians7:29 Abooluganda, kino kye ŋŋamba, nti akadde kasigadde katono, n'okuva kati abalina abakazi babe ng'abatalina;" 
1Corinthians7:30 abakaaba babe ng'abatakaaba; abasanyuka babe ng'abatasanyuka; abagula babe ng'abatalina kantu. 
1Corinthians7:31 Abakolagana n'ensi babe ng'abatakolagana nayo; kubanga enfaanana y'ensi eno eggwaawo. 
1Corinthians7:32 Njagala muleme kweraliikirira. Omusajja atali mufumbo yeeraliikirira bya Mukama; asala ga kusanyusa Katonda. 
1Corinthians7:33 Sso omusajja omufumbo yeeraliikirira bya nsi; asala ga kusanyusa mukazi we; 
1Corinthians7:34 oyo aba agabanyiziddwamu wabiri. Omukazi oba omuwala atali mufumbo yeeraliikirira bya Mukama, asala ga kubeera mutukuvu mu mubiri ne mu mwoyo; naye omukazi omufumbo yeeraliikirira bya nsi; asala ga kusanyusa bba." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ebyo mbyogedde lwa kubagasa, si kubatikka mugugu, wabula okubanguyiza ebintu, muweereze Omukama awatali kutaataaganyizibwa." 
1Corinthians7:36 Singa oli awulira nga tayisa bulungi mwogerezebwa we, ng'asikirizibwa gy'ali, era ng'alina kukikola, oyo akole nga bw'ayagala; bafumbiriganwe, tewali kibi." 
1Corinthians7:37 N'oli ateesa mu mutima gwe n'amalirira, nga tewali amuwalirizza, nga yeeteesezza bulungi, n'asalawo mu mutima gwe okumukuuma ng'omwogerezebwa we, akola bulungi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Awo nno, oli awasa omwogerezebwa we akola bulungi; naye oyo atamuwasizza aba akoze bulungi okusinga." 
1Corinthians7:39 Omukazi asibiddwa ku bba ebbanga lyonna nga bba akyali mulamu; naye bba bw'amala okufa, wa ddembe okufumbirwa yenna gw'ayagala, naye mu Mukama mwokka." 
1Corinthians7:40 Nze nga bwe ndaba, yandyesiimye okusinga singa asigalira awo; nange ndowooza nnina Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:1 Kati ate ku bifa ku mmere empongere balubaale: tumanyi nti ffenna tumanyi; naye nno okumanya kuleeta lwetumbu; wabula okwagala kwo kuzimba omuntu. 
1Corinthians8:2 Oli alowooza nti aliko ky'amanyi, aba tannamanya ng'omuntu bw'asaanye okumanya." 
1Corinthians8:3 Naye oli bw'ayagala Katonda, amanyibwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:4 Kati nno ku kulya emmere ewongeddwa balubaale: ffenna tumanyi nga lubaale mu butuufu taliiwo, era tewali Katonda mulala wabula omu ono." 
1Corinthians8:5 Newandibadde nga waggulu eyo ne mu nsi osanga be bayita balubaale, anti balubaale nkuyanja, n'abakama nkumu," 
1Corinthians8:6 naye ffe tumanyi Katonda omu, Taata, byonna mwe bisibuka, naffe mwe tuva, n'Omukama omu Yezu Kristu, byonna mwe byayita okubaawo, naffe mwe twayita okubaawo." 
1Corinthians8:7 Naye ebyo si bonna nti babimanyi. Naye abamu olw'okubeera nga n'okutuusa kati beemanyiizizza balubaale, balya emmere emponge nga ddala eyawongeddwa lubaale; kubanga omutima gwabwe munafu, ne gujjako ekibi." 
1Corinthians8:8 Emmere si y'etufuula abalungi ewa Katonda; bwe tutalya, tetuliiko kye tufiirwa, ne bwe tulya tetuliiko kye tweyongerako." 
1Corinthians8:9 Wabula mwekkaanye, sikulwa ng'eddembe lyammwe lifuuka ekyesittazo eri omunafu." 
1Corinthians8:10 Oli singa akulaba ggwe amanyi ng'olya ebiwonge mu kiggwa kya lubaale, bw'aba ow'omutima omunafu, taguma bugumi naye n'alya ebiwongere lubaale?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Bw'otyo ggwe amanyi oleetedde omunafu ono okuzikirira, owooluganda Kristu gwe yafiirira." 
1Corinthians8:12 Bwe musobya mutyo eri bannammwe, ne muttattana mutyo emitima gyabwe eminafu, mubeera Kristu gwe musobezza." 
1Corinthians8:13 Oba bwe guli, emmere ng'ereetera munnange okwesittala, sirirya nnyama omulundi n'ogumu, nneme kwesittaza munnange." 
1Corinthians9:1 Nze siri wa ddembe? Siri mutume? Saalaba ku Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe? Si mmwe mulimu gwange mu Mukama? 
1Corinthians9:2 Oba ku balala siri mutume, waakiri ku mmwe ndi mutume; mmwe kabonero akassiddwa ku butume bwange mu Kristu." 
1Corinthians9:3 Eno ye mpoza yange eri abo abanvunaana: 
1Corinthians9:4 Tetuli ba ddembe okulya oba okunywa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tetuli ba ddembe okutambulanga n'omukazi omubeezi ng'Abatume abalala ne baganda b'Omukama ne Kefa bwe bakola? 
1Corinthians9:6 Oba nze nzekka ne Barunaba ffe tutalina ddembe obutakola? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ani akola obuserikale ne yeesasulira? Ani asimba ennimiro y'emizabbibu n'atalya ku bibala byagyo? Ani alunda eggana n'atanywa ku mata ga ggana? 
1Corinthians9:8 Bino mbyogeza buyinza bwa muntu buntu? Etteeka nalyo si bwe ligamba? 
1Corinthians9:9 Anti kyawandiikibwa mu Tteeka lya Musa nti: “Ente ewuula eŋŋano, togisibanga mumwa.” Katonda agenderera nte zokka?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Takyogerera ffe ffenna? Kyawandiikibwa ku lwaffe, kubanga oli alima, yandirimye ng'asuubira, n'oli awuula eŋŋano yandiwudde ng'asuubira okugabanako akantu." 
1Corinthians9:11 Oba mu mmwe twasimbamu bya mwoyo, bwe tukungula ku byammwe eby'omubiri, kiba kinene?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Oba abalala bafuna ku byammwe, leero alabisa ffe? Naye eddembe eryo tetulikozesezza. Byonna tubigumiikiriza, tuleme kuteeka miziziko mu kkubo ly'Evangili." 
1Corinthians9:13 Temumanyi ng'abakola mu Kiggwa balya ku bitonebwa mu Kiggwa, n'abaweereza ku mwaliiro eby'oku mwaliiro kwe bagabana?" 
1Corinthians9:14 N'Omukama nno bw'atyo bwe yatereeza, nti abayigiriza Evangili, baneeyimiririzangawo ku Vangili." 
1Corinthians9:15 Naye nze seyambisizza n'erimu ku ddembe eryo; siwandiise biryoke binkolerwe. Kiryose nfe ne wataba anzigyako ttendo lyange. 
1Corinthians9:16 Bwe njigiriza Evangili, ekyo ku nze si ttendo, manyanga mulimu gwange; zinsanze nze bwe siyigiriza Vangili!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Singa kino nkikola nga njagala, nfuna empeera; bwe kiba tekivudde mu kwagala, guba mulimu bulimo ogwantumibwa." 
1Corinthians9:18 Awo nno empeera eyange y'eruwa? Ye eno, nti bwe njigiriza Evangili, njiyigiririze bwereere, ne seeyamba bye nandifunye olw'okuyigiriza Evangili." 
1Corinthians9:19 Newandibadde siriiko n'omu anneekomya, neefuula omuddu wa bonna, ndyoke mpangule bangi okusingawo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Eri Abayudaaya neefuula Muyudaaya, ndyoke mpangule Abayudaaya. Eri abatwalibwa Etteeka, neefuula atwalibwa Etteeka, sso nga sitwalibwa Tteeka, ndyoke mpangule n'abo abagoberera Etteeka." 
1Corinthians9:21 Eri abali ebweru w'Etteeka, neefuula ali ebweru w'Etteeka – si ng'atalina tteeka mu maaso ga Katonda, wabula ng'atwalibwa Etteeka lya Kristu – ndyoke mpangule abo abali ebweru w'Etteeka." 
1Corinthians9:22 Eri abanafu, nange mba munafu, ndyoke mpangule abanafu. Nafuuka byonna olwa bonna, nsobole okubaako be ndokola mu buli ngeri." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ebyo byonna mbikola lwa kubeera Vangili, ndyoke ngabane ku birungi byayo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Tetumanyi ng'abaddusi mu mpaka z'embiro bonna badduka, naye afuna ekirabo abeera omu? Nammwe mudduke mutyo, muwangule." 
1Corinthians9:25 Buli yeetaba mu mpaka, yeefuga mu byonna; sso bakola batyo balyoke bafune engule eggwaawo; naye ffe, tulwanirira engule etaggwaawo." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nange nno sidduka muwawa, sikuba bikonde ng'omulwanyi akuba ebbanga;" 
1Corinthians9:27 wabula omubiri gwange ngubonereza ne ngufuga, sikulwa nga nze mmaze okuyigiriza abalala, mpandulibwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Abooluganda, njagala mumanye, nti bajjajjaffe baali wansi w'ekire, era bonna baasomoka ennyanja," 
1Corinthians10:2 era nti bonna baabatizibwa mu Musa mu kire ne mu nnyanja," 
1Corinthians10:3 era nti bonna baalyanga ku mmere emu ey'omwoyo," 
1Corinthians10:4 era nti baanywanga ku kyokunywa kimu eky'omwoyo. Anti baanywanga ku lwazi olw'omwoyo olwabagobereranga; olwazi olwo yali Kristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Newandibadde bwe gutyo bwe guli, bangi mu bo Katonda teyabasanyukira, anti emirambo gyabwe gyabikkirira eddungu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ebyo byali bya kutulabula, tuleme kwegomba bibi nga bali bwe beegomba." 
1Corinthians10:7 Muleke na kusinza bitaliimu ng'abamu mu bo bwe baakola, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Abantu ne batuula wansi okulya n'okunywa, ne basituka okwesanyusa.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Tuleke kudda mu bya buseegu ng'abamu mu bo bwe baabikola ne bafaamu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu mu lunaku lumu. 
1Corinthians10:9 Tuleme kukema Mukama ng'abamu mu bo bwe baamukema, emisota ne gibazikiriza." 
1Corinthians10:10 Temwemulugunyanga ng'abamu mu bo bwe beemulugunya eyali azikiriza n'abazikiriza. 
1Corinthians10:11 Ebyo byonna byabajjira okubaako kye bituyigiriza, ne biwandiikibwa okutulabula ffe abaliwo enkomerero y'emirembe b'etuukiridde." 
1Corinthians10:12 Bwe kityo nno, alowooza ng'ayimiridde, yeekuume aleme kugwa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ebigezo ebibajjidde si bye bigezo ebitasangibwa buli muntu. Katonda mwesigwa, tayinza kubaleka kugezebwa mu bibayitiridde; na buli kigezo ekijja akiweerako ekkubo ery'okukivvuunuka, musobole okukigumira." 
1Corinthians10:14 Kale nno, abooluganda, mwewale okusinza balubaale." 
1Corinthians10:15 Njogera gye muli ng'abantu abategeera; mwetegereze mmwennyini bye njogera. 
1Corinthians10:16 Ekikompe eky'omukisa kye tuwa omukisa, tekiba musaayi gwa Kristu gwe tugabanako? Omugaati bwe tugumenya, teguba mubiri gwa Mukama gwe tugabanako?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Omugaati guli gumu, naye naffe abangi ffenna olw'okugabana ku mugaati ogumu ogwo, tufuuka mubiri gumu." 
1Corinthians10:18 Mulabire ku Yisirayeli ng'eggwanga. Abalya ku biwongebwa tebafuuka kimu ku mwaliiro? 
1Corinthians10:19 Bwe ŋŋamba ntyo mba ntegeeza ki? Mba ntegeeza nti emmere emponge kintu ekiri awo, oba nti lubaale w'ali ddala?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Nedda! Bye batambira, babiwongera myoyo mibi, si Katonda. Saagala nno mwetabe na myoyo mibi." 
1Corinthians10:21 Temuyinza kunywa kikompe kya Mukama ate ne munywa ne ku ky'emyoyo emibi; temusobola kugabana ku lujjuliro lwa Mukama, ate ne ku lw'emyoyo emibi." 
1Corinthians10:22 Twandisosonkerezza obuggya bwa Katonda? Ffe tumusinga amaanyi? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Byonna bikkirizibwa,” naye si byonna nti bingasa. “Byonna bikkirizibwa,” naye si byonna nti bizimba omuntu." 
1Corinthians10:24 Oli aleme kwefaako yekka, naye afe ne ku bulungi bwa munne." 
1Corinthians10:25 Mulye buli kitundibwa mu katale awatali mmeeme kubalumira kintu na kimu. 
1Corinthians10:26 Anti ensi ya Mukama na byonna ebigijjuza. 
1Corinthians10:27 Singa omu mu batakkiriza abayita okulya, nammwe ne mukkiriza okugendayo, mulye kyonna ky'abaleetera awatali mmeeme kubalumira kintu na kimu." 
1Corinthians10:28 Naye bwe wabeerawo agamba nti: “Eyo emmere mponge,” temulya olw'okubeera oyo akyogedde, n'olw'obutalumwa mmeeme –" 
1Corinthians10:29 ntegeeza emmeeme ye, si eyiyo. Lwaki eddembe lyange lyandikugiddwa emmeeme y'omulala entiitiizi?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Nze bwe ndya nga mmaze okwebaza, lwaki nandivunaaniddwa olw'ekyo kye mmaze okwebaza?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Awo nno oba mulya, oba munywa, na buli kirala kyonna kye mukola, mugendererengamu kitiibwa kya Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:32 Muleme kunyiiza Bayudaaya oba Bagereeki oba Ekleziya wa Katonda," 
1Corinthians10:33 nga nange bwe ngezaako okusanyusa bonna mu byonna, nga seefaako nzekka, wabula nga nfa ku bulungi bw'abangi, balyoke balokoke." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mulabire ku nze nga nze bwe ndabira ku Kristu. 
1Corinthians11:2 Mbatenda kubanga munzijukira mu byonna, n'empisa ez'okugoberera muzituusa nga bwe nazibayigiriza." 
1Corinthians11:3 Naye njagala kino mukitegeere, nti omutwe gwa buli musajja ye Kristu; omutwe gw'omukazi ye bba; omutwe gwa Kristu ye Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:4 Omusajja bw'abikka omutwe ng'asoma, obanga alanga, aswaza omutwe gwe." 
1Corinthians11:5 Sso omukazi bw'atabikka mutwe nga yeegayirira obanga alanga, aswaza omutwe gwe, guba nga ogumwereddwa." 
1Corinthians11:6 Oba omukazi omutwe tagubikka, n'enviiri azisalireko ddala. Oba omukazi okumusala enviiri, yadde okumumwa omutwe, kya nsonyi, omutwe nno agubikke." 
1Corinthians11:7 Omusajja ye tasaanye kwebikka mutwe, kubanga ye kye kifaananyi kya Katonda n'ekitiibwa kye; naye omukazi kitiibwa kya musajja." 
1Corinthians11:8 Kubanga omusajja si ye yakolebwa ng'ava mu mukazi, wabula omukazi ye yakolebwa ng'ava mu musajja." 
1Corinthians11:9 N'omusajja si ye yatonderwa omukazi, wabula omukazi ye yatonderwa omusajja." 
1Corinthians11:10 Awo nno omukazi, olw'abamalayika abali awo, kyava ateekwa okwoleka ku mutwe gwe obuyinza bba bw'amulinako." 
1Corinthians11:11 Sso ate mu Mukama omukazi teyeemalirira awatali musajja, era n'omusajja teyeemalirira awatali mukazi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Ng'omukazi bwe yakolebwa ng'ava mu musajja, era n'omusajja bw'abaawo ng'ava mu mukazi, anti byonna biva wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:13 Mmwe mmwennyini musalewo: kisaana omukazi okwegayirira Katonda nga tabisse mutwe? 
1Corinthians11:14 Ne mu buwangwa tolaba nti omusajja okukuza enviiri kiba kwefeebya," 
1Corinthians11:15 sso ng'omukazi eyaweebwa enviiri empanvu ku ye kiba kya kitiibwa? Enviiri empanvu zaamuweebwa okumubikka. 
1Corinthians11:16 Oba oli ayagala kino okukiwakanya, amanye nti ffe tetulinaayo mpisa ndala, era n'Ekleziya za Katonda nazo tezigirina." 
1Corinthians11:17 Mu bino bye nkuutira mmwe sibatenda, kubanga bwe mukuŋŋaana, temweyongera mu bulungi wabula mu bubi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ekisooka, bwe mukuŋŋaana awamu ng'Ekleziya, mpulira mbu mubeeramu okwetemamu. Ngira ate kino ne nkikkiriza," 
1Corinthians11:19 anti okwetemamu kuteekwa okubaawo mu mmwe, abatuufu ddala balyoke balabike." 
1Corinthians11:20 Bwe mukuŋŋaana, tekukyali kulya mbaga ya Mukama." 
1Corinthians11:21 Bwe muba mulya, buli omu asooka kweriira mmere ye, omu aba enjala emuluma, omulala aba atamidde." 
1Corinthians11:22 Abaffe, temulina ka wammwe gye muliira na kunywera? Nandiki Ekleziya wa Katonda gwe mugaya nga muswaza abatalina? Mbagambe ki? Mbatende? Mu kino sibatenda." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ekyo kye nafuna okuva ew'Omukama nange kye nababuulira, nti: Mukama Yezu mu kiro kye baamuweerayo, yakwata omugaati," 
1Corinthians11:24 ne yeebaza, n'agumenyamu, n'agamba nti: “ Kino mubiri gwange ku lwammwe; kino mukikolanga okunzijukira.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Mu ngeri ye emu, ekyeggulo nga kiwedde, yakwata ekikompe n'agamba nti: “Ekikompe kino ye Ndagaano empya mu musaayi gwange; buli lwe munaanywanga, kino mukikolanga okunzijukira.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Awo nno buli lwe mulya omugaati guno ne munywa ne ku kikompe, mulangirira okufa kw'Omukama okutuusa lw'alijja." 
1Corinthians11:27 Bwe kityo nno, buli anaalyanga omugaati guno oba n'anywa ku kikompe ky'Omukama nga tasaanidde, anazzanga omusango ku mubiri ne ku musaayi gw'Omukama." 
1Corinthians11:28 Awo nno buli muntu amalenga kwekebera, alyoke alye ku mugaati ogwo anywe ne ku kikompe." 
1Corinthians11:29 Anti alya n'anywa nga tamaze kwetegereza nti mubiri, alya era anywa musango." 
1Corinthians11:30 Kwe kulaba nga bangi mu mmwe balwadde era bayongobevu, n'abamu nga bafudde." 
1Corinthians11:31 Tuba kumala kwekebera, ggwe wamma tetwandiramuddwa." 
1Corinthians11:32 Bwe tulamulibwa, tubonerezebwa Omukama tuleme kusalirwa musango kutusinga wamu n'ensi eno." 
1Corinthians11:33 Awo nno, baganda bange, bwe mukuŋŋaana okulya, mulindenga bannammwe." 
1Corinthians11:34 Enjala gw'eruma aliire eka; muleme kwereetereza musango nga mubadde mukuŋŋaanye. Ensonga endala ndizitereeza nga nzize. 
1Corinthians12:1 Ku bikwata ku bitone Mwoyo by'awa, abooluganda, saagala mubeere nga temumanyi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mumanyi nga bwe mwali mukyali bakafiiri, mwawubisibwa ne mumala gatwalibwa mutyo mu maaso g'ebifaananyi bya balubaale bikasiru." 
1Corinthians12:3 Kale nno njagala mumanye nti tewali ayogerera mu Mwoyo wa Katonda ayinza ate kugamba nti: “Yezu avumirirwe,” era tewali ayinza kugamba nti: “Mukama Yezu,” wabula ng'ayogerera mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
1Corinthians12:4 Ebitone birimu enjawulo, naye nga Mwoyo ye omu;" 
1Corinthians12:5 n'empeereza zirimu enjawulo, naye ng'Omukama ye omu;" 
1Corinthians12:6 emirimo nagyo girimu enjawulo, naye nga Katonda ye omu, y'akola mu byonna mu buli kintu." 
1Corinthians12:7 Buli omu aweebwa okwolesebwa kwa Mwoyo olw'ensonga y'okugasa abalala. 
1Corinthians12:8 Omu aweebwa mu Mwoyo okwogera eby'amagezi, omulala kumanyisa, Mwoyo era nga ye omu." 
1Corinthians12:9 Omulala kukkiriza, mu Mwoyo ye omu; omulala kitone kya kuwonya, mu Mwoyo ye omu." 
1Corinthians12:10 Omulala kukola byewuunyo, omulala kulanga, omulala kwawula bika bya myoyo, omulala bika bya nnimi, omulala kuvvuunula nnimi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Mu bano bonna Mwoyo ye omu akola, agabira buli muntu nga bw'ayagala." 
1Corinthians12:12 Ng'omubiri bwe guba ogumu naye ne guba n'ebitundu bingi, ate n'ebitundu by'omubiri byonna sso newandibadde nga bingi, byonna wamu ne biba omubiri gumu, ne Kristu bw'ali." 
1Corinthians12:13 Olwa Mwoyo omu ffenna twabatizibwa mu mubiri gumu. Abayudaaya n'Abagereeki, abaddu n'ab'eddembe, ffenna twanywesebwa ku Mwoyo omu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Anti omubiri tegukolebwa kitundu kimu, naye bingi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Singa ekigere kigamba nti: “Kubanga siri mukono; awo nno sibalirwa ku mubiri,” ekyo tekikigaana n'akamu kubalirwa mu mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:16 Ye singa okutu kugamba nti: “Kubanga siri liiso, awo nno sibalirwa ku mubiri,” ekyo tekikugaana n'akamu kubalirwa ku mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:17 Singa omubiri gwonna gwali liiso, ate okuwulira kwandibadde wa? Singa omubiri gwonna gwali kutu, ate okuwunyiriza kwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Naye Katonda yatereeza ebitundu mu mubiri, buli kimu nga bwe yayagala." 
1Corinthians12:19 Singa byonna byali kitundu kimu, olwo omubiri gwandibadde wa?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Sso kati ebitundu bingi, naye ng'omubiri gumu." 
1Corinthians12:21 Eriiso teriyinza kugamba mukono nti: “Sikwetaaga;” n'omutwe teguyinza kugamba bigere nti: “Sibeetaaga.” 
1Corinthians12:22 Ate nno ebitundu by'omubiri ebisinga obunafu, bye bitarekeka." 
1Corinthians12:23 N'ebitundu by'omubiri bye tuyita ebitene, tubyetoolooza ekitiibwa ekiyitiridde; era ebitundu byaffe ebitali bikulu tubisukkulumya n'ekitiibwa ekiyitiridde" 
1Corinthians12:24 n'okusinga ebitundu byaffe ebikulu bwe byandyetaaze okusukkulumizibwa. Katonda bwe yatereeza bw'atyo omubiri, ekitundu ekitalina kitiibwa n'akiwa ekitiibwa ekisinga," 
1Corinthians12:25 omubiri guleme kwesalaasalamu, naye ebitundu byonna bikolerere ekimu okugasa kinnaakyo." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ekitundu ekimu bwe kirumwa, byonna birumirwa wamu; ekimu bwe kifuna ekitiibwa, n'ebitundu ebirala byonna bisanyukirako." 
1Corinthians12:27 Kati mmwe muli mubiri gwa Kristu, buli omu kitundu kyagwo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Katonda nno yassaawo mu Ekleziya, okusookera ddala Abatume, abookubiri be balanzi, abookusatu be bayigiriza, n'azzaako abakola ebyewuunyo, n'abawonya endwadde, n'abayambi, n'abakulembeze, n'aboogera ebika by'ennimi, n'abavvuunula ennimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonna batume? Bonna balanzi? Bonna bayigiriza? Bonna bakola ebyewuunyo? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonna balina ekitone eky'okuwonya? Bonna boogera ennimi? Bonna bayinza okuzivvuunula? 
1Corinthians12:31 Naye muluubirire ebitone ebisingira ddala. Kale nzija kubalaga ekkubo erikyasingira ddala obulungi. 
1Corinthians13:1 Singa njogera mu nnimi abantu ne bamalayika ze boogera, sso nga sirina kwagala, mba ng'ekide ekimala gavuga, obanga ensaazo ezimala gasaala." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ne bwe mba n'obuyinza obw'obulanzi, oba bwe mba nga nsobola okutegeera buli byama byonna na buli magezi, ne bwe mba n'okukkiriza kwonna nga nsobola n'okusigula ensozi, sso nga sirina kwagala, siba kantu." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ebyange byonna ne bwe mbiwaayo, ne bwe ndiwaayo omubiri gwange gwokebwe, sso nga sirina kwagala, sirina kye ŋŋanyulwamu." 
1Corinthians13:4 Okwagala kugumiikiriza, kwa kisa; okwagala tekukwatirwa buggya, tekwepanka wadde okwetenda," 
1Corinthians13:5 tekukolera bubi, tekwenoonyeza byakwo, tekukalaza, tekulowooleza bubi;" 
1Corinthians13:6 tekusanyukira bubi, naye kusanyukira mazima." 
1Corinthians13:7 Kugumira byonna, kukkiriza byonna, kusuubira byonna, kugumiikiriza byonna." 
1Corinthians13:8 Okwagala tekuliiko makoma; okulanga kuliggwaawo; zo ennimi zirisirikka, n'ago amagezi galiggwaawo." 
1Corinthians13:9 Amagezi gaffe tegatuukiridde, n'okulanga kwaffe tekutuukiridde;" 
1Corinthians13:10 ekituukiridde bwe kirijja, ekitatuukiridde kiriggwaawo." 
1Corinthians13:11 Bwe nali omuto, nayogeranga ng'omuto, nalowoozanga ng'omuto, nalamulanga ng'omuto. Naye bwe nasajjakula, ne nva ku by'obuto." 
1Corinthians13:12 Kati tulabira mu ndabirwamu, mu kwefaanaanyiriza; naye luli tulirabaganira ddala maaso ku maaso; kati mmanyi kitundu, naye luli ndimanyira ddala nga nze bwe mmanyiddwa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Kale nno okukkiriza n'okusuubira n'okwagala bisigalawo, ebisatu ebyo; naye ekisingira ddala bino kwe kwagala." 
1Corinthians14:1 Muluubirire kwagala; mwegombe ebitone bya Mwoyo, naddala eky'obulanzi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kubanga ayogera mu nnimi ayogera na Katonda si na bantu; anti mpaawo amutegeera, wabula ayogera byama mu Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians14:3 Sso alanga ayogera eri abantu eby'okubagasa, okubakubiriza n'okubakubagiza." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ayogera mu nnimi yeegasa yekka, sso alanga agasa Ekleziya wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:5 Njagala mwenna mwogere ennimi, naye ate okusingawo njagala mulange. Kubanga alanga akira ayogera mu nnimi, wabula mpozzi ng'ow'ennimi alina amunnyonnyola ekibiina ne kiggyamu omugaso." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kati, abooluganda, singa nzija gye muli nga njogera ennimi, mbagasa ki, wabula mpozzi nga mbabuulidde kye ntumiddwa okubabikkulira, oba okumanyisa, oba okulanga oba okuyigiriza." 
1Corinthians14:7 N'ebivuga ebitalina bulamu, ng'endere oba ennanga, bwe bitavuga na maloboozi gaawukanye bulungi, ani ayinza okutegeera ekifuuyiddwa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Eŋŋombe bw'evuga n'eddoboozi eritali kkakafu, ani aneetegeka okugenda okutabaala?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Bwe kiri ne ku mmwe; bwe mwogera olulimi ng'ebigambo tebitegeerekeka, omuntu anaategeera atya ekyogerwa? Munaaba mwogerera bbanga ssa." 
1Corinthians14:10 Kwo okuba ennimi ziri nnyingi mu nsi, era mpaawo lutalina makulu;" 
1Corinthians14:11 naye bwe mba simanyi byogerwa kye bitegeeza, nzija kubeera mugwira eri oyo ayogera nange, ate naye ajja kubeera mugwira gy'endi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ne ku mmwe bwe kiri. Awo nno bwe muba muluubirira ebitone bya Mwoyo, muluubirire kugaggawala mu ebyo ebinaazimba Ekleziya." 
1Corinthians14:13 Kale nno ayogera ennimi, yeegayirire afune ow'okuzivvuunula." 
1Corinthians14:14 Bwe neegayirira mu nnimi omwoyo gwange gwegayirira, naye omutima gwange teguliiko kye guganyulwamu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kati nkole ki? Nandyagadde neegayirire mu mwoyo neegayirire ne mu mutima, nandyagadde nnyimbe ettendo mu mwoyo nnyimbe ne mu mutima." 
1Corinthians14:16 Bw'onootendera Katonda mu mwoyo nga waliwo ali awo atannasomesebwa, ng'omaze okutendereza, anaasobola atya okwanukula nti: “Amiina,” ye bw'aba tategeera ky'ogamba?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Weewaawo ggwe Katonda omwebaza bulungi, naye omulala taggyamu mugaso." 
1Corinthians14:18 Katonda mmwebaza okuba nga njogera mu nnimi okubasinga mwenna. 
1Corinthians14:19 Naye mu kibiina kiryose njogere ebigambo ebitaano bye ntegeera obulungi olw'okuyigiriza abalala, okusinga ebigambo akakumi mu lulimi olutategeerekeka." 
1Corinthians14:20 Abooluganda, muleme kulowooza nga bato; mubeere bato mu kukola bibi, naye mu mutima mulowooze kikulu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu tteeka kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ndyogera n'abantu bano mu nnimi endala, ne mu njogera engwira, era ne ku olwo tebalimpuliriza, Omukama y'agamba.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Awo nno okwogera mu nnimi si kabonero akaliwo olw'abakkiriza, wabula olw'abatakkiriza; n'ekitone eky'obulanzi tekiriwo lwa batakkiriza, wabula lwa bakkiriza." 
1Corinthians14:23 Kale ng'Ekleziya yenna akuŋŋaanye, mwenna mumala mwogera mu nnimi, awo ne wayingira abatannasoma oba abatakkiriza, tebalibagamba nti mulaluse?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Sso singa bonna balanga, awo ne wayingira atakkiriza oba atannasoma, bw'ayingira, yeesanga abaliwo bonna bamusoomozezza, nga bamulamudde," 
1Corinthians14:25 nga n'ebikisiddwa mu mutima gwe munda byeruddwa; olwo aligwa wansi ku maaso ge, n'asinza Katonda nga bw'agamba nti: “Ddala Katonda ali mu mmwe.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Abooluganda, kiki eky'okukola? Bwe mukuŋŋaana, buli omu abaako n'ekintu: omu luyimba lwa kutendereza, omulala kya kuyigiriza, omulala kya kubikkulira banne, omundi kwogera nnimi, n'omulala kuzivvuunula; naye buli kimu kikolebwe lwa kugasa balala." 
1Corinthians14:27 Singa waliwo ow'okwogera mu nnimi, kino kikolebwe babiri oba abatasukka basatu, naye buli omu mu luwalo lwe, ate ng'omu avvuunula." 
1Corinthians14:28 Bwe watabaawo avvuunula, buli omu ku abo asirike mu lukuŋŋaana, ayogere munda yekka, ayogere ne Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:29 Abalanga nabo boogere babiri oba basatu, abalala nga bategereza." 
1Corinthians14:30 Atudde awo bw'abaako ne ky'abikuliddwa, eyasoose asirike." 
1Corinthians14:31 Mwenna kinnoomu muyinza okulanga, bonna bayige, bakubirizibwe." 
1Corinthians14:32 Omwoyo gw'obulanzi gwandibadde gufugibwa abalanzi bennyini. 
1Corinthians14:33 Kubanga Katonda si Katonda ow'okutabangula, wabula Katonda ow'emirembe. Nga mu Ekleziya zonna ez'abatuukirivu," 
1Corinthians14:34 abakazi basirike mu nkuŋŋaana. Kubanga tebakkirizibwa kwogera, wabula babeere bawulize nga n'Etteeka nalyo bwe ligamba." 
1Corinthians14:35 Oba baliko kye baagala okumanya, babuuze babbaabwe eka, kubanga kya nsonyi omukazi okwogera mu lukuŋŋaana." 
1Corinthians14:36 Ekigambo kya Katonda kyava mu mmwe, nandiki kyatuuka mu mmwe mwekka?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Eyeerowooza nga mulanzi, obanga alina ebitone bya Mwoyo, yandikkirizza bye mbawandiikidde nti Omukama ye yabiragira." 
1Corinthians14:38 Bino atabikkiriza, naye takkirizibwa." 
1Corinthians14:39 Kale nno, baganda bange, mwegombe okulanga, n'okwogera mu nnimi temukugaana." 
1Corinthians14:40 Naye nga byonna bikolebwa na kitiibwa mu butebenkevu. 
1Corinthians15:1 Abooluganda, mbajjukiza Evangili gye nabayigiriza, nammwe gye mwakkiriza era kwe munyweredde," 
1Corinthians15:2 mwe munaalokolerwa, bwe muba nga munyweredde ku eyo gye nabayigiriza, okuggyako mpozzi nga mukkiriza lwa busa." 
1Corinthians15:3 Nabatusaako nange kye nafuna, mu kusookera ddala nti Kristu yafa olw'ebibi byaffe ng'Ebiwandiiko bwe bigamba," 
1Corinthians15:4 n'aziikibwa, n'azuukizibwa ku lw'essatu ng'Ebiwandiiko bwe bigamba," 
1Corinthians15:5 n'alabikira Kefa; bwe yava awo n'alabikira ekkumi n'omu," 
1Corinthians15:6 ate n'alabikira n'abooluganda ebikumi bitaano n'okusoba ku mulundi gumu; abasinga obungi mu bo bakyaliwo n'okutuusa kati, newandibadde ng'abalala bagalamidde." 
1Corinthians15:7 Ate n'alabikira ne Yakobo, era n'abatume bonna." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ddaaki, n'alabikira nange, eyali ng'olubuto olutalindiriddwa kuzaalibwa." 
1Corinthians15:9 Anti nze nsembayo mu batume; sisaanidde na kuyitibwa mutume, kubanga nayigganya Ekleziya wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians15:10 Naye olw'eneema ya Katonda ndi kati ky'endi; n'eneema ye gye yampa teyafa busa; wabula ate natakabana ne nsinga na bali bonna, newandibadde nga teyali nze eyakola, wabula eneema ya Katonda eri nange." 
1Corinthians15:11 Oba nno nze njigiriza oba bali abalala, kye tuyigiriza ky'ekyo era nammwe kye mwakkiriza." 
1Corinthians15:12 Oba Kristu yalangirirwa nti yazuukizibwa mu bafu, lwaki abamu mu mmwe bagamba nti teri kuzuukira kwa bafu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Oba teri kuzuukira kw'abafu, ne Kristu nno teyazuukizibwa." 
1Corinthians15:14 Oba Kristu teyazuukizibwa, bye tuyigiriza bya bwereere, n'okukkiriza kwammwe kwa busa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ffe tusangiddwa nno nga tuli bajulirwa ba Katonda abalimba, anti twajulira Katonda nti yazuukiza Kristu, sso nga tamuzuukizanga, bwe kiba nti abafu tebazuukizibwa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Oba abafa tebazuukizibwa, ne Kristu teyazuukizibwa." 
1Corinthians15:17 Oba Kristu teyazuukizibwa, okukkiriza kwammwe kwa busa, n'okuba mukyali mu bibi byammwe." 
1Corinthians15:18 N'abo abagalamidde mu Kristu, baazikirira." 
1Corinthians15:19 Oba twassa essuubi lyaffe mu Kristu lwa bulamu buno bwokka, awo nno mu bantu bonna ffe tusingamu obunaku." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kwo okuba Kristu yazuukizibwa mu bafu, ebibala ebisooka eby'abo abagalamidde." 
1Corinthians15:21 Omuntu ye yaleeta olumbe, era omuntu y'aleese okuzuukira kw'abafu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Nga mu Adamu abantu bonna bwe bafa, bwe kityo ne mu Kristu bonna bwe baliddamu obulamu." 
1Corinthians15:23 Buli omu mu lubu lwe, Kristu nga bye bibala ebisooka, olwo ku majja ge ne kuddako abo aba Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:24 Olwo enkomerero n'eryoka etuuka, bw'alikwasa Katonda Taata obwakabaka ng'amaze okumenya buli bufuzi, na buli buyinza, na buli maanyi." 
1Corinthians15:25 Talema kufuga okutuusa ng'atadde abalabe be bonna wansi w'ebigere bye. 
1Corinthians15:26 Omulabe alisembayo okuwangulibwa lwe lumbe. 
1Corinthians15:27 Manyanga byonna Katonda yabissa wansi w'ebigere bye. Naye oli bw'agamba nti: “Byonna byassibwa wansi we,” kiba kya nkukunala nti Oli eyabissa wansi we taliiko." 
1Corinthians15:28 Byonna bwe birimala okussibwa wansi we, awo naye Mwana ne yessa wansi w'Oli eyassa byonna wansi we, bw'atyo Katonda abeere byonna mu byonna." 
1Corinthians15:29 Oba si bwe kityo bwe kiri, bagenderera ki okubatizibwa ku lw'abaafa? Lwaki baabatizibwa ku lw'abo oba ddala abafu tebalizuukizibwa?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ye lwaki nze okuba mu kabenje k'okufa buli kaseera? 
1Corinthians15:31 Abooluganda, ndayira okwenyumiriza kwe nnina mu mmwe mu Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe, nti buli lunaku ndi mu kufa." 
1Corinthians15:32 Mugaso ki gwe naggya mu kulwanagana n'agasolo mu Efezi, singa mba njogedde ng'omuntu bw'ayogera? “Oba abafu tebazuukizibwa, ka tulye, tunywe, anti enkya tujja kufa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Muleke kuwubisibwa: Okuyita n'ab'emize kyonoona empisa ennungi. 
1Corinthians15:34 Muve mu tulo, muyise bulungi; ekibi mukiveeko. Abamu mu mmwe Katonda tebamumanyi n'akatono. Kino nkyogedde kubakwasa nsonyi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Omu ajja kubuuza nti: “Naye abafu bazuukizibwa batya? Omubiri balijja na gwa ngeri ki?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Musiru ggwe! Ky'osiga tekimera wabula nga kimaze kufa. 
1Corinthians15:37 Ky'osiga, si gwe mubiri ogudda, wabula osiga nsigo busigo, oba ya ŋŋano oba empeke endala yonna," 
1Corinthians15:38 naye Katonda agiwa omubiri nga bw'ayagala, buli nsigo n'omubiri gwayo." 
1Corinthians15:39 Kubanga emibiri gyonna si gya ngeri ye emu. Waliwo ogw'omuntu, omulala ogw'ensolo, omulala ogw'ebinyonyi, n'omundi ogw'ebyennyanja." 
1Corinthians15:40 Waliwo emibiri egy'eby'eggulu, n'emibiri egy'eby'oku nsi; naye ekitiibwa ky'eby'eggulu kyawufu, n'ekitiibwa ky'eby'oku nsi nakyo kyawufu." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ekitiibwa eky'enjuba kirala, n'ekitiibwa eky'omwezi nakyo kirala, n'ekitiibwa eky'emmunyeenye nakyo kirala; n'emmunyeenye zaawukana mu bitiibwa." 
1Corinthians15:42 N'okuzuukira kw'abafu bwe kutyo, ekisigibwa kiba kivunda, ekizuukizibwa kiba tekivunda. Kisigibwa si kya kitiibwa, kizuukizibwa kya kitiibwa;" 
1Corinthians15:43 kisigibwa kinafu, kizuukizibwa kya maanyi;" 
1Corinthians15:44 kisigibwa mubiri bubiri, kizuukizibwa mubiri ogujjudde omwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:45 Bwe kityo kyawandiikibwa nti: “Omuntu omubereberye Adamu yafuuka omwoyo omulamu;” naye Adamu ow'oluvannyuma yafuuka omwoyo oguwa obulamu. 
1Corinthians15:46 Naye eky'omwoyo si kye kyasooka, wabula eky'omubiri, olwo ne kuddako eky'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:47 Omuntu eyasooka yava mu ttaka, wa mu ttaka; omuntu owookubiri yava mu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ng'ono ow'omu ttaka bwe yali, n'abo ab'omu ttaka bwe baba; era ng'ow'omu ggulu bw'ali, n'abo ab'omu ggulu bwe baba." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ffe nga bwe twatwala ekifaananyi ky'omuntu ow'oku nsi, bwe tulitwala n'ekifaananyi ky'omuntu ow'omu ggulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Abooluganda, kye ntegeeza kye kino: Omubiri n'omusaayi tebiyinza kusikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda; ekivunda tekisikira kitavunda." 
1Corinthians15:51 Mulabe, mbabuulira ekyama: Ffenna tetugenda kufa, naye ffenna tugenda kufuulibwa," 
1Corinthians15:52 mu kaseera buseera, okutemya n'okuzibula, ekkondeere evvannyuma olulivuga. Ekkondeere ligenda kuvuga, abafu ne bazuukizibwa nga si ba kuvunda, naffe tulifuulibwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Kubanga kino ekivunda kirina okwambala obutavunda; kino ekifa kiteekwa okwambala obutafa. 
1Corinthians15:54 Kino ekivunda bwe kirimala okwambala obutavunda, na kino ekifa nga kimaze okwambala obutafa, olwo ekigambo ekyawandiikibwa ne kiryoka kituukirira nti: “Olumbe lumiriddwa mu buwanguzi." 
1Corinthians15:55 Walumbe, obuwanguzi bwo buluwa? Walumbe, ekikato kyo kiruwa?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Anti ekikato ky'olumbe kye kibi; ate ekibi amaanyi gakiva mu Tteeka. 
1Corinthians15:57 Wamma Katonda yeebale atuwa obuwanguzi mu Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe. 
1Corinthians15:58 Kale nno baganda bange abaagalwa, mubeere banywevu, abatanyeenyezebwa, bulijjo nga mukola omulimu gw'Omukama ne muyitirira, nga mumanyi nti mu Mukama temukolera busa." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ku bikwata ku kusonda okwakolebwa abatuukirivu: Nammwe mukole nga bwe nagamba Ekleziya z'omu Galasiya. 
1Corinthians16:2 Buli lunaku olusooka mu wiiki, buli omu mu mmwe ayawuzengako atereke ebbali ky'aba asobodde, okusonda muleme kukukola nga mmaze okutuuka eyo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Bwe ndituuka eyo, ne ntuma abamu mu mmwe be muliba mukakasizza, n'ebbaluwa yammwe ey'okubanjula, batwale ebirabo byammwe e Yeruzaalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Bwe ndiba nange nsaanira ŋŋendereko, baligenda nange." 
1Corinthians16:5 Bwe ndiba mmaze okuyita mu Masedoniya, ŋŋenda kujjako ewammwe, kubanga ndiyitira mu Masedoniya." 
1Corinthians16:6 Nsuubira okusigalako ewammwe; oboolyawo ndimala n'eyo obudde obw'obutiti, olwo mmwe ne mumperekereko bwe ndiba ntuusizza okugenda wonna we ndiba ndaga." 
1Corinthians16:7 Saagala kubalabako luwunguko; nsuubira okumala nammwe akabanga Omukama ng'ayagadde. 
1Corinthians16:8 Nzija kusigala mu Efezi okutuusa ku Pentekooti. 
1Corinthians16:9 Omulyango munene ogunziguliddwawo wano ogw'omulimu ogwegasa; naye n'abampakanya nabo nnina bangi. 
1Corinthians16:10 Timotewo bw'atuukanga, mulabe ng'abeera mu mmwe awatali kutya; anti naye akola mulimu gwa Mukama nga nze gwe nkola." 
1Corinthians16:11 Wabulewo amugaya; mumuwerekereko mirembe amadda, asobole okudda gye ndi; anti ndi wano mmulinda wamu n'abooluganda." 
1Corinthians16:12 Ye muganda waffe Apollo namwekubako nnyo abakyalireko wamu n'abooluganda abalala, naye olwo yali tannafuna mwoyo gujja. Bw'alifuna akabanga, alijja." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mutunule, munywere mu kukkiriza, mugume, mubeere ba maanyi." 
1Corinthians16:14 Byonna bye mukola mubikozenga kwagala. 
1Corinthians16:15 Abooluganda, nnina kye nsaba: Mumanyi ng'ab'ennyumba ya Stefana be baasooka okusoma mu Akayiya, era nga bajjumbize mu kuyamba abatuukirivu," 
1Corinthians16:16 mugondere abantu ng'abo na bonna ababakwatirako ne bannaabwe bwe bakola. 
1Corinthians16:17 Nsanyuse olw'okujja kwa Stefana ne Forutunato ne Akayiko; bano bajjuulirizzaawo mmwe we mutali. 
1Corinthians16:18 Bampadde okuweeraweerako, era nammwe babakoze kye kimu. Abantu nga bano mubalagenga okusiima kwammwe." 
1Corinthians16:19 Ekleziya z'omu Aziya zibalamusizza. Akwila ne Prisika n'Ekleziya yenna akuŋŋaanira mu maka gaabwe babalamusizza nnyo mu Mukama. 
1Corinthians16:20 Abooluganda bonna babalamusizza. Mulamusaganye n'okunywegeragana okutukuvu. 
1Corinthians16:21 Nze Pawulo, okutumira kuno nkuwandiise n'omukono gwange gwennyini." 
1Corinthians16:22 Oli atayagala Mukama waffe avumirirwe! Marana tha. 
1Corinthians16:23 Eneema ya Mukama waffe ebeere nammwe. 
1Corinthians16:24 N'okwagala kwange kubeerenga nammwe mwenna mu Kristu Yezu. Amiina. 
2Corinthians1:1 Pawulo Omutume wa Kristu Yezu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda, ne Timotewo owooluganda. Ya Ekleziya wa Katonda ali mu Korinti, wamu n'abatuukirivu bonna ab'omu Akayiya yonna." 
2Corinthians1:2 Eneema ebeere nammwe, n'emirembe gya Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, Taata nnannyini kisa, Katonda nnyini kukubagizibwa kwonna, atenderezebwe." 
2Corinthians1:4 Oyo mu nnaku zaffe zonna atukubagiza, naffe ne tusobola okukubagiza abo bonna abali mu nnaku nga tweyamba okukubagizibwa ffe ffennyini kwe tukubagiziddwamu Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ng'okubonaabona kwa Kristu bwe tukugabanyeeko okuyitirira, era mu Kristu bwe tugabanye ku kukubagizibwa n'okusingawo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Bwe tuba mu nnaku, tubeeramu lwa kukubagizibwa na kulokoka kwammwe; bwe tukubagizibwa, ekigendererwa nti nammwe mufune okukubagizibwa, nammwe bwe mugumira ennaku nga ffe ze tulaba." 
2Corinthians1:7 Essuubi lye tulina ku lwammwe linywevu; anti tumanyi nga bwe mubonaabona. Nga bwe mugabana ku nnaku zaffe, mugabanye ne kukubagizibwa kwaffe." 
2Corinthians1:8 Abooluganda, tetwandyagadde mmwe butamanya ku nnaku ze twalaba mu Aziya; twazitoowererwa ekiyitiridde nga tetukyayinza na kuzigumira, n'obulamu ne tubuterebukamu." 
2Corinthians1:9 Mazima twawulira ng'abasaliddwa ogw'okufa, bwe tutyo tuleme kwesiga maanyi gaffe, naye twesige ye yekka azuukiza abafu." 
2Corinthians1:10 Yatuwonya mu kabenje akenkanidde awo obubi, na kati akyatuwonya, era tusuubirira mu ye nti ajja kwongera okutuwonya." 
2Corinthians1:11 Nammwe nno mutujune nga mutusabira, bwe tutyo bangi batwebalizeeko olw'eneema etuweereddwa olw'essaala z'abangi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ekitwewaanya kye kino, era n'emmeeme yaffe etujulira mu kino, nti tweyisa mu nsi, ate ne mu maaso gammwe, mu butuukirivu ne mu bwerufu obuva mu Katonda, si mu magezi ga nsi, wabula mu neema ya Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:13 Anti tetubawandiikira kirala wabula ekyo kye musobola okusoma n'okutegeera. 
2Corinthians1:14 Nsuubira nga mujja kutegeera byonna, era nga bwe mwategeddeko edda ebimu, nti muyinza okutwenyumirizaamu, nga naffe bwe tuyinza okubenyumirizaamu ku lunaku lw'Omukama Yezu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Olw'obwesige obwo, nayagala nsookere ewammwe eyo, omukisa mufune gwa mirundi ebiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nayagala mpitire eyo nga ŋŋenda mu Masedoniya; nga nvudde mu Masedoniya, nkomewo ewammwe ogwokubiri, nammwe mulyoke mumperekere nga ŋŋenda mu Buyudaaya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Nali nkyabusabuusa kino we nakiteeseza? Bye nteesa mbiteesa ng'omuntu obuntu, ne ŋŋamba “Yee” ate nga nze omu agamba “Nedda”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Katonda ow'amazima, ebigambo bye tubagamba tebibeeranga Yee oba Nedda." 
2Corinthians1:19 Anti Omwana wa Katonda Yezu Kristu gwe twabayigiriza, Siluvano, Timotewo nange, teyali Yee oba Nedda. Mu ye bulijjo mulimu Yee." 
2Corinthians1:20 Katonda bye yasuubiza byonna mu ye mwe bisanga Yee; kyetuva twanukula nti: “Amiina,” nga tuyita mu ye, Katonda alyoke afune ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians1:21 Katonda oyo y'anyweza ffe nammwe mu Kristu, n'atusiiga omuzigo," 
2Corinthians1:22 n'atussaako akabonero ke, n'atuwa ng'omusingo, ye Mwoyo ali mu mitima gyaffe." 
2Corinthians1:23 Mbalabidde Katonda ng'omujulirwa wange, ndayidde obulamu bwange: sajja Korinti lwa kwagala kubasaasira." 
2Corinthians1:24 Tetuli bakama abafuga okukkiriza kwammwe, wabula ffe tuli bayambi bammwe, mulyoke musange essanyu, anti mmwe muli banywevu mu kukkiriza." 
2Corinthians2:1 Muli nateesa obutajja wammwe gwa kubiri kubanakuwaza. 
2Corinthians2:2 Kubanga bwe mbanakuwaza, ate anansanyusa olwo anaaba ani, wabula mmwe be mba nnakuwaza?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Nawandiika nga bwe nakola, nga nzize nneme kunakuwazibwa ate abantu abandibadde bansanyusa. Mbeesiga mwenna, essanyu lyange ly'essanyu lyammwe mwenna." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nawandiika nga ndi munakuwavu nnyo, ng'omutima gunnennyise, mu maziga amayitirivu. Saagenderera kubanakuwaza, naye nayagala mutegeere nga bwe mbaagala okuyitirira." 
2Corinthians2:5 Oba waliwo eyannakuwaza, teyanakuwaza nze, naye – bwe mba siyitirizza mu bigambo – mwenna yabanakuwaza ekiwera." 
2Corinthians2:6 Ow'engeri eyo ekibonerezo ekyamuweebwa abangi kyali kimala bumazi. 
2Corinthians2:7 Kati ate musigalidde kumulaga busaasizi na kumugumya aleme kuggwaawo olw'ennaku okumuyitirirako. 
2Corinthians2:8 Mbeegayiridde mumukakasize ddala nga bwe mumwagala. 
2Corinthians2:9 Kyennava mbawandiikira nkakase era mmanye oba muli bawulize mu byonna. 
2Corinthians2:10 Oba waliwo gwe musonyiwa, nange mmusonyiye. Nange nga mbaddeko kye nsonyiwa, oba waliwo eky'okusonyiwa, nkisonyiwa ku lwammwe mu maaso ga Kristu," 
2Corinthians2:11 tuleme kulimbibwalimbibwa Sitaani; anti by'agenderera tetugamba nti tetubimanyi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Bwe najja e Turowa okuyigiriza Evangili ya Kristu, oluggi lwanzigulirwawo mu Mukama." 
2Corinthians2:13 Naye omutima tegwantereera kubanga muganda wange Tito saamusangayo. Kwe kubasiibula ne ndaga mu Masedoniya. 
2Corinthians2:14 Katonda yeebale, oyo mu Kristu atukulemberamu bulijjo mu lukumba olw'obuwanguzi, ate ayita mu ffe n'agenda ng'abunya wonna akawoowo ak'okumanyibwa kwe." 
2Corinthians2:15 Kubanga ffe kaloosa ka Kristu akaweerezebwa Katonda mu abo abalokoka ne mu abo abazikirira. 
2Corinthians2:16 Ku bamu kaba kuwunya kwa kufa okutwala mu kufa; ate ku balala kawoowo ka bulamu akatwala mu bulamu. Ani asaanira omulimu ogwenkana awo? 
2Corinthians2:17 Ffe obutaba ng'abangi bwe bakola, ekigambo kya Katonda tetugenda nga tukibunza tutyo ng'eky'okutunda, wabula ng'abantu abeesimbu, ng'abantu Katonda b'atumye, tukyogera mu Kristu mu maaso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tuttukizza buto okwetenda? Oba okufaanana ng'abalala naffe twetaaga bbaluwa ey'okutwanjula gye muli oba eva gye muli? 
2Corinthians3:2 Mmwe mwennyini mmwe bbaluwa yaffe; yawandiikibwa mu mitima gyaffe, emanyibwe era esomebwe abantu bonna." 
2Corinthians3:3 Mweragira ddala nti mmwe bbaluwa eva ewa Kristu gye twawandiika; etaawandiikibwa mu bwino, wabula eyawandiikibwa ne Mwoyo wa Katonda omulamu; si ku mpande za mayinja, wabula ku mpande z'emitima gyammwe egy'obuntu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Obwesige bwe tulina mu Katonda bwe butyo bwe buli obw'amaanyi ku bwa Kristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Si kubanga tulina ke tusobola ku bwaffe, tulyoke tugambe nti waliwo akava gye tuli, wabula obusobozi bwaffe butuviira wa Katonda," 
2Corinthians3:6 eyatusaanyiza okubeera abaweereza n'endagaano empya etali ya nnukuta mpandiike, wabula eya Mwoyo; anti ennukuta empandiike ereeta kufa, sso Mwoyo aleeta bulamu." 
2Corinthians3:7 Oba omulimu oguleeta olumbe, ogwayolebwa ku mayinja mu nnukuta gwalina ekitiibwa ekyenkana awo, nga n'abaana ba Yisirayeli tebasobola kutunuulira Musa mu maaso olw'okutemagana kwago, sso nga kwali kwa kaseera buseera," 
2Corinthians3:8 omulimu ogwa Mwoyo gunaalema gutya okusinzaawo ekitiibwa? 
2Corinthians3:9 Oba omulimu oguleeta omusango gwalina ekitiibwa, omulimu oguleeta obutuukirivu guteekwa okusinzaawo ddala ekitiibwa." 
2Corinthians3:10 Ddala ku nsonga eno, ekyali eky'ekitiibwa luli kyatuuka obutakyaba na kitiibwa olw'ekitiibwa kiri ekiyitirivu okukisinga." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ddala oba ekyaggwaawo kyajjira mu kitiibwa ekitaggwaawo, ekisigalawo kiteekwa nno okuba n'ekitiibwa ekisingawo." 
2Corinthians3:12 Nga bwe tulina essuubi eryenkana awo, tuli bagumu." 
2Corinthians3:13 Tetuli nga Musa eyeebikkanga ekiremba ku maaso abaana ba Yisirayeli baleme kutunuulira nkomerero ya kitiibwa ekyali kizimeera. 
2Corinthians3:14 Kati nno emitima gyabwe gyaguguba; n'okutuusa ku lunaku luno olwa leero, bwe basoma endagaano enkadde ekiremba kye kimu kisigala tekibikuddwa, anti kisobola kuggyibwawo Kristu yekka." 
2Corinthians3:15 N'okutuusa ku lunaku luno olwa leero Musa buli lw'asomebwa, ekiremba kibisse emitima gyabwe;" 
2Corinthians3:16 naye omuntu oludda ew'Omukama nga kiggyibwawo. 
2Corinthians3:17 Omukama oyo ye Mwoyo; ate Mwoyo w'Omukama w'abeera, wabeerawo ddembe." 
2Corinthians3:18 Sso ffenna n'amaaso gaffe agatali mabikkeko twakaayakana n'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama, tugenda tufuulibwa nga twekwanya ekifaananyi kye nga bwe tweyongera ekitiibwa ku kitiibwa. Anti ekyo kiva ku Mukama abeera Mwoyo." 
2Corinthians4:1 Katonda yamala okutukwasa omulimu guno olw'ekisa kye, tetuterebuka." 
2Corinthians4:2 Twemansulira ddala empisa eziswaza ez'enkiso; tetuliimu bukujjukujju oba okulimbisa Ekigambo kya Katonda; tweyogerako kyere mu mazima eri buli muntu mu maaso ga Katonda. 
2Corinthians4:3 Oba Evangili yaffe ekyabikkiddwa, ab'okuzikirira b'ebeerera embikke;" 
2Corinthians4:4 beebo abatakkiriza, lubaale w'ensi eno baazibye amaaso n'abagaana okulaba ekitangaala ky'Evangili y'ekitiibwa kya Kristu, abeera ekifaananyi kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ffe gwe tulangirira si ye ffe ffennyini, wabula Kristu Yezu nti ye Mukama; ate ffe nti tuli baweereza bammwe ku bwa Yezu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Kubanga Katonda eyalagira nti: “Ekitangaala kyake okuva mu kizikiza,” y'oyo eyaleeta ekitangaala mu mitima gyaffe, mwakiremu ekitangaala eky'okumanya ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ekitangalijjira mu maaso ga Yezu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ekkula lino tulitwalira mu bibya bya bbumba, kyerage lwatu nti amaanyi amasukkirivu ga Katonda, si gaffe." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tunyigirizibwa ku njuyi zonna, naye tetugonda; tusobezebwa, naye tetuterebuka;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tuyigganyizibwa, naye tetwabulirwa; tukubwa wansi naye tetuttibwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Bulijjo okufa okwa Yezu tuyita nakwo mu mubiri gwaffe, obulamu bwa Yezu busobole okulabikira mu mubiri gwaffe." 
2Corinthians4:11 Nga tukyali balamu, bulijjo tugenda tuweebwayo mu kufa olw'okubeera Yezu, obulamu bwa Yezu busobole okulabika mu mubiri gwaffe ogw'okufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Mu ffe nno kufa kwe kukola, naye mu mmwe bulamu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ng'omwoyo ogw'okukkiriza gwe tulina gwe gumu n'ogw'oyo eyawandiika nti: “Nakkiriza, kyennava njogera,” naffe tukkiriza, kyetuva twogera," 
2Corinthians4:14 nga tumanyi nti eyazuukiza Omukama Yezu naffe alituzuukiza wamu ne Yezu, n'atutwala wamu nammwe gy'ali." 
2Corinthians4:15 Byonna ebyo lwa kubeera mmwe, ennema gy'ekomya okusaasaana n'etuuka ku bangi, gy'eba eyongera n'okwaza okwebaza ku lw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:16 Kyetuva tutaterebuka; kuno kungulu ne bwe tukenena, muli munda tuzzibwa buggya buli lunaku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Zino ennaku entono ez'akadde kano zitutegekera ettu eritaggwaawo ery'ekitiibwa ekitageraageranyizika," 
2Corinthians4:18 kubanga tetufa ku bino ebirabika, wabula ku biri ebitalabika; anti bino ebirabika biyita buyisi, naye biri ebitalabika tebiggwaawo." 
2Corinthians5:1 Kubanga tumanyi nga weema yaffe ey'oku nsi gye tulimu bw'erimala okwabizibwa, tulinayo ekisulo ewa Katonda, ennyumba etaakolebwa na mikono, eteriggwaawo." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kuno tusinda, nga tuyaayaana twambazibwe ekisulo kyaffe eky'olubeerera eky'omu ggulu," 
2Corinthians5:3 nga tukyambadde, tuleme kusangibwa nga tuli bwereere." 
2Corinthians5:4 Nga tukyali mu weema eno, tusinda olw'okuzitoowererwa; si lwa kugamba nti tujja kwambulwa, wabula nti twambazibwe n'okusingawo, kino ekifa kimiribwe obulamu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Katonda eyatuwa Mwoyo abeere omusingo, ekyo ye yakitutegekera." 
2Corinthians5:6 Awo nno bulijjo tuli bagumu; tumanyi nti nga tukyali waka mu mubiri, Omukama tumwesuubye," 
2Corinthians5:7 kubanga tutambulira mu kukkiriza si mu kye tulabyeko. 
2Corinthians5:8 Tuli bagumu, naye ng'ekyandisinze, twabulire omubiri guno, tubeere eka n'Omukama." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ne bwe tuba awaka, ne bwe tuba ewala, tuluubirira kumusanyusa." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ffenna tuteekwa okulabika mu maaso g'entebe ya Kristu ey'obulamuzi, buli omu afune empeera ye olw'ebirungi oba ebibi bye yakola mu mubiri." 
2Corinthians5:11 Kubanga tumanyi okutya Omukama, tusendasenda abantu. Katonda amanyi kye tuli, ndowooza nammwe mukimanyi mu mmeeme yammwe." 
2Corinthians5:12 Tetwagala kuddamu kweyogerako gye muli, tubawa buwi kawenda ka kutwenyumirizaamu, musobole okuddamu abo abeetendera mu by'okungulu sso si mu biva mu mutima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Oba tugudde eddalu, lwa kubeera Katonda; oba tuli bantubalamu, lwa kubeera mmwe." 
2Corinthians5:14 Anti okwagala kwa Kristu kutuwujja, kubanga tukakasa nti oba omu yafa okubeera bonna awo nno abantu bonna baafa." 
2Corinthians5:15 Kyeyava afa okubeera bonna, abantu abalamu baleme kubeera balamu ku lwabwe, wabula ku lw'oyo olw'okubeera bo eyafa n'azuukizibwa." 
2Corinthians5:16 Naffe nno n'okuva kati, kyetuva tutabaako gwe tutunuulira mu bwa muntu buntu, newandibadde ng'olumu Kristu twamutunuulirako ng'omuntu obuntu, naye tetwaddamu kumutunuulira tutyo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Awo nno buli yenna ali mu Kristu, afuuse kitonde kiggya; ekitonde ekikadde kiweddewo, kati ekiggya kizze." 
2Corinthians5:18 Bino byonna biva mu Katonda, eyatabagana naffe mu Kristu, eyatuwa omulimu gw'okututabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:19 Kwe kugamba nti Katonda, mu Kristu yali ensi atabagana nayo, ebibi byayo nga takyagibibalira; naffe n'atukwasa obubaka obw'okutabaganya." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tuli babaka ba Kristu nno; Katonda bw'aba abakubiriza, ayita mu ffe. Tubeegayirira ku lwa Kristu, mutabagane ne Katonda." 
2Corinthians5:21 Olw'okubeera ffe, Katonda yaddira ataaliko kibi n'amufuula ekibi, oyo ataamanya kibi, olwo ffe mu ye tusobole okufuuka obutuukirivu bwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ng'abakozi ba Katonda abamuyambako, tubakubiriza eneema ya Katonda muleme kugifunira busa." 
2Corinthians6:2 Anti agamba nti: “Nakuwulira mu budde obw'omukisa, nakuyamba ku lunaku olw'obulokofu.” Kale nno buno bwe budde obw'omukisa, zino ze nnaku ez'obulokofu." 
2Corinthians6:3 Tetuteera n'omu ati kyesittazo mu kkubo lye, omulimu gwaffe guleme kusangibwako kiguvunaanisa." 
2Corinthians6:4 Naye mu byonna tweraga nga bwe tuli ddala abaweereza ba Katonda: mu bugumiikiriza obw'ekitalo, mu nnaku, mu bwetaavu, mu kweraliikirira," 
2Corinthians6:5 mu kukubibwa, mu makomera, mu butabanguko, mu mirimo, mu kusula nga ntunula, mu kusiiba," 
2Corinthians6:6 mu butukuvu, mu magezi, mu bukwatampola, mu kisa, mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, mu kwagalana okutaliimu bukuusa," 
2Corinthians6:7 mu kwogera amazima ne mu maanyi ga Katonda, ebyokulwanyisa eby'obutuukirivu nga bituli mu ddyo ne mu kkono;" 
2Corinthians6:8 mu kitiibwa ne mu kunyoomebwa, mu kwogerwako obubi ne mu kwogerwako obulungi. Batuyita bakalimbira, sso nga tuli ba mazima;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ne tuba nga be batamanyi, sso nga tumanyiddwa, ne tuba ng'abaafa, sso tuutuno tukyaliwo; ne tuba ng'ababonereze, sso tetuttibwa;" 
2Corinthians6:10 ne tuba ng'abanaku, sso bulijjo tusanyuka; ne tuba ng'abaavu, sso tugaggawaza bangi; ne tuba ng'abatalina kantu, sso tulina byonna." 
2Corinthians6:11 Twogera kyere gye muli, mmwe ab'e Korinti, n'omutima gwaffe tugubagguliddewo." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ffe tetubafunzizza, mmwe mufunzizza emitima gyammwe." 
2Corinthians6:13 Mbagamba ng'abaana bange, nti nammwe muggule emitima gyammwe." 
2Corinthians6:14 Muleke kukola bitajja nga mwambala ekikoligo kimu n'abatakkiriza. Obutuukirivu bwasiba ddi ekinywi n'obubi? Ekitangaala kyassa ddi ekimu n'enzikiza? 
2Corinthians6:15 Kristu yakkaanya ddi ne Beliyali? Akkiriza afaananya ki atakkiriza? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ekiggwa kya Katonda kikkaanya kitya ne balubaale! Kubanga ffe tuli kiggwa kya Katonda omulamu; ne Katonda bw'agamba nti: “Ndibasulamu, ne ntambulanga mu bo, ndibeera Katonda waabwe nabo balibeera bantu bange;" 
2Corinthians6:17 kale nno abantu abo mubaveemu, mweyawuleko, Omukama y'agamba; temukwatanga ku kitali kirongoofu, olwo ndibaaniriza." 
2Corinthians6:18 Nzija kubeera Kitammwe, nammwe mubeere batabani bange, bawala bange, Omukama Omuyinza wa buli kantu bw'agamba.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Abaagalwa, nga bwe tulina ebyatusuubizibwa bino, twetukuzeeko byonna ebyonoona omubiri n'omwoyo, tulafuubanire obutuukirivu obujjuvu mu kutya Omukama." 
2Corinthians7:2 Mubeere beerufu gye tuli; tetusobyanga muntu, tetukoleranga muntu bubi, tetulyakulanga muntu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Bino sibyogera lwa kubavunaana, anti nagambye dda nti mutuli ku mwoyo; tuli ffenna mu bulamu ne mu kufa." 
2Corinthians7:4 Mbeesiga nnyo, mbeenyumirizaamu nnyo; essanyu limpitirira mu nnaku zange ne nkubagizibwa." 
2Corinthians7:5 Bwe twajja e Masedoniya, tetwafuna kuweerako, ne tulaba ennaku buli wantu: ebweru nga ndasano, munda nga kutya." 
2Corinthians7:6 Naye Katonda akubagiza abanaku, yatukubagiza naffe n'okujja kwa Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Si na kujja kwe kyokka, naye n'olw'okukubagizibwa kwe yakubagizibwamu ewammwe, nga bwe yatunyumiza engeri gye mwegomba okundabako, nga bwe munnumirwa omutima, ggwe wamma ne nsanyuka bya kitalo." 
2Corinthians7:8 Nandibadde mu bbaluwa yange nabanakuwaza, sejjusa, newandibadde nga mu kusooka nejjusa; ndaba ng'ebbaluwa eyo yabanakuwaza, yadde akabanga kaali katono." 
2Corinthians7:9 Naye kati ndi musanyufu, si kubanga nabanakuwaza, naye olw'okubeera nti okunakuwala kwammwe kwavaamu okwenenya. Mwanakuwala nga Katonda bw'ayagala, ne tutabaako kye twabafiiriza." 
2Corinthians7:10 Anti okunakuwala nga Katonda bw'ayagala kireeta okwekomako okutuusa ku bulokofu, era tekuleetera oli kwejjusa; naye okunakuwala ng'ensi bw'ekutegeera kuleeta lumbe." 
2Corinthians7:11 Mulabe okunakuwala nga Katonda bw'ayagala bwe kubaleetedde mu bungi okussaako omwoyo, n'okwennyonnyolako, n'okunyiiga, n'okutya, n'okulumirwa omwoyo n'okubonereza. Mu buli kye mukoze mweraze ng'ekigambo temukirinaako musango." 
2Corinthians7:12 Awo nno newandibadde nga nabawandiikira ebbaluwa, teyawandiikibwa lwa kubeera oli eyasobya, oba oli gwe baasobya, wabula nti okutulumirwa kwe mutulumirwamu kuboolekebwe mu maaso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians7:13 N'olw'ensonga eyo tukubagiziddwa. Ku kukubagizibwa okwo tugasseeko n'okusanyuka olw'essanyu Tito lye yafuna, kubanga mwenna mwamukakkanya omutima." 
2Corinthians7:14 Obanga namulaga bwe mbenyumirizaamu, sikwatiddwa nsonyi; bye twabatendamu ewa Tito byeraze nga bituufu kyenkana nga buli kyonna kye twali tubagambye." 
2Corinthians7:15 Omutima gwe gweyongedde okubaagala ng'ajjukira nga mwenna bwe mwamuwulira, era nga bwe mwamwaniriza mu kutya n'okukankana." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nsanyuse, kubanga mbeesiga mu byonna." 
2Corinthians8:1 Abooluganda, ka tubabuulire eneema ya Katonda eyaweebwa Ekleziya z'e Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Ebizibu bye baalimu mu kulumwa, essanyu lyabwe eggitirivu, ssaako obwavu bwabwe obungi, byazaalukukamu obugagga obw'omutima gwabwe omugabi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Nga bwe nnyinza okubajulira, baawa okusinziira ku kye basobola, ate ne basussa ne ku busobozi bwabwe, ate nga beeyagalidde." 
2Corinthians8:4 Baatwegayirira nnyo nga batwesengereza tubawe omukisa nabo badduukirireko ku batuukirivu. 
2Corinthians8:5 Okusinga ne bwe twali tulindiridde, bo bennyini baasokera ku kwewa Katonda, ate oluvannyuma naffe ne batwewa ku lw'okwagala kwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kyetwava tusaba Tito nti nga bwe yali atandiseeko, omulimu guno ogw'ekisa agumalirize mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians8:7 Nga bwe musinga mu buli kintu: mu kukkiriza, mu kwogera, mu kumanya, mu kujjumbira okwa buli ngeri, ne mu kutwagala, mulabe nga ne mu kino nno eky'okugaba mmwe musinga." 
2Corinthians8:8 Kino nkyogera naye si ng'abalagira obulagizi, wabula njagala nga mulabye okujjumbira okw'abalala, nammwe okwagala kwammwe kubeere kwa nnamaddala." 
2Corinthians8:9 Anti mumanyi omutima omugabi ogwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, nti ye yali mugagga, naye yeefuula omwavu olw'okubeera mmwe, olw'obwavu bwe mulyoke mufuuke abagagga." 
2Corinthians8:10 Mbawa n'amagezi ku kino, nti mujja kuganyulwa singa omulimu gwe mwatandika omwaka guli, temugukola bukozi kyokka, wabula ate nga mugattako n'omutima ogwagala." 
2Corinthians8:11 Kale nno mumalirize okugukola, olwo ebbugumu ly'okwagala kwammwe lituukane n'ekyammwe eky'okugumaliriza nga musinziira ku kye mulina." 
2Corinthians8:12 Okwagala bwe kubaawo, kusiimibwa okusinziira ku oli ky'alina, naye si ku oli ky'atalina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Si kwe kugamba nti abalala bateewuluzibweko, ate mmwe muboneebone, wabula nti wabeerewo okwenkanankana." 
2Corinthians8:14 Kati ebibafikkiridde bidduukirire abatalina, nabo ebiriba bibafikkiridde olumu biribayamba; olwo okwenkanankana lwe kubaawo." 
2Corinthians8:15 Nga bwe baawandiika nti: “Eyakuŋŋaanya ennyingi teyamuyitirira, n'eyakuŋŋaanya entono teyajula.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Katonda yeebale eyawa mu mutima gwa Tito okubajjumbira. 
2Corinthians8:17 Bwe twamusaba, yakkiriza; ate naye olw'okubeera omujjumbize, ajja gye muli ku lulwe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tusindikiddeko n'owooluganda omulala atendebwa mu Ekleziya zonna olw'engeri gy'alangiriramu Evangili. 
2Corinthians8:19 Si ekyo kyokka, naye era yalondebwa Ekleziya atambulenga naffe ku mulimu guno ogw'ekisa gwe tuliko olw'ekitiibwa ky'Omukama n'okulaga omutima gwaffe ogwagala." 
2Corinthians8:20 Twayagala okwewala abantu okutwemulugunyaamu olw'engeri gye tukuttemu okusonda okunene kuti okwakolebwa. 
2Corinthians8:21 Kubanga tugeza okukola obulungi, si mu maaso ga Katonda kyokka, naye ne mu g'abantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ne ku bano tusindikiddeko owooluganda omulala, obujjumbize bwe bwe tugezezza emirundi n'emirundi ne tusanga nga bwa mazima mu ngeri nnyingi; leero kati omujjumbize n'okusingawo olw'obwesige obungi bw'abalinamu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tito ye munnange bwe tukola, annyambako erudda eyo mu mmwe; bo baganda baffe, be babaka Ekleziya be zisindise, kye kitiibwa kya Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kale nno, mu maaso g'Ekleziya mubooleke okwagala kwammwe n'obukakafu bw'okwenyumiriza kwe tubeenyumirizaamu." 
2Corinthians9:1 Seetaaga kubawandiikira ku by'okuyamba abatuukirivu," 
2Corinthians9:2 kubanga mmanyi bwe mukyagala; era ku kino mbadde mbatenda mu bantu b'omu Masedoniya, nga mbagamba nti Akayiya yo neetegefu n'okuva mu mwaka guli. Entakabana gye mutakabanyeemu ekakamudde bangi ddala." 
2Corinthians9:3 Naye ntumye abooluganda okwenyumiriza kwaffe kwe tubeenyumirizaamu kuleme kubeera kwa busa mu kintu kino. Nammwe mubeere beetegefu nga bwe nagamba," 
2Corinthians9:4 sikulwa ng'ab'omu Masedoniya bajja nange ne basanga nga temwetegese; mmwe nga siboogeddeeko, ekyo ffe kyandikubye ensonyi okuba nga twabeesiga." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kyennava nteesa okusaba abooluganda banneesookeyo gye muli; okusonda kwe mwetema bakutegekerewo; kubeere nga kutegeke ng'ekirabo ekiweeseddwa okwagala, sso si ekikake." 
2Corinthians9:6 Kino kikulu: asiga ekitono, alikungula kitono; asiga mu bungi, alikungula mu bungi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Buli muntu awe nga bwe yateesa mu mutima gwe; tawa ng'aganiriza, oba na kukakibwa, kubanga Katonda ayagala agaba nga musanyufu." 
2Corinthians9:8 Katonda ayinza okubawa buli mukisa gwonna mu buyitirivu, mulyoke bulijjo mubeere na byonna ebibamala, era musobole okuwa mu buyitirvu eby'okukola emirimo emirala gyonna emirungi." 
2Corinthians9:9 Nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti: “Yamansa n'agabira abaavu; obutuukirivu bwe busigalawo emirembe gyonna.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Oyo alabira omusizi ensigo n'omugati ogw'okulya agenda kubawa ensigo yammwe, n'ebibala byammwe eby'obutuukirivu abiwe okwala." 
2Corinthians9:11 Mujja kugaggawazibwa mu buli kintu musobole okugaba; ebyo binaayitanga ku ffe ne bifuuka okwebaza Katonda. 
2Corinthians9:12 Kubanga okukola omulimu guno tekugasa kufunira batuukirivu bibabulako kyokka, naye era kwongera abantu okwebaza Omukama." 
2Corinthians9:13 Okulaba kye mukoze ekyo, bajja kutendereza Katonda nga balabye bwe mukkiriza ne mwatula Evangili ya Kristu, n'engeri gye mulumiddwa omutima ne mubayamba, bo n'abalala bonna." 
2Corinthians9:14 N'essaala zaabwe ku lwammwe ziryoleka nga bwe babaagala olw'eneema empitirivu Katonda gy'abawadde. 
2Corinthians9:15 Katonda yeebale olw'ekirabo kye kino ekitanyumizika. 
2Corinthians10:1 Nze, Pawulo, nzennyini mbeegayiridde mu buteefu n'eggonjebwa ebya Kristu, nze omwetoowaze bw'emba nga tugasimbaganye, naye bwe mba ewala abagambisa amaanyi," 
2Corinthians10:2 mbeegayiridde nti nga ndi nammwe mumponye okukozesa amaanyi n'okwemanya bye njagala okukozesa eri abo abatuteebereza okuba nga tweyisa mu ngeri ya nsi. 
2Corinthians10:3 Weewaawo tukyali mu nsi, naye olutalo tetulwana lwa mu nsi," 
2Corinthians10:4 kubanga eby'okulwanyisa bye tukozesa mu lutabaalo lwaffe si bya mu nsi, wabula ebyo ebirina amaanyi ga Katonda okuzikiriza ebigo;" 
2Corinthians10:5 tumenya okuwakanawakana na buli ekigulumira okuziyiza okumanya Katonda; buli kirowoozo kyonna tukiwamba ne tukigondeza Kristu," 
2Corinthians10:6 nga twetegese okubonereza obutawulira bwonna amangu ddala nga mumaze okufuuka abawulize. 
2Corinthians10:7 Mutunuulire ekyo ekibali mu maaso: oyo eyeekakasa nti wa Kristu, addemu yejjukize nti wa Kristu, ate nti naffe bwe tuli." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ne bwe naddamu okwetenda ne mpitirizaamu olw'obuyinza Omukama bwe yatuwa olw'okubazimba, sso si olw'okubazikiriza, ekyo tekijja kunkwasa nsonyi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Sandyagadde kubeera ng'abakanga n'amabaluwa. 
2Corinthians10:10 Anti mbiwulira nti: “Sso ebbaluwa ze nzito, za maanyi; naye bw'aba awo, munafu n'ebigambo bye obigaya.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Oyo ayogera atyo ategeere nti bye twogera mu bbaluwa nga tetuli eyo, bye tukola nga tuli eyo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ffe tetuguma kwesimba ku abo wadde okwegeranya n'abo abeetenda. Naye bwe beefuula omu olugero lwa munne, ne beegeranya bokka na bokka, baba tebategeera." 
2Corinthians10:13 Ffe tetujja kwetenda kusukkiriza, wabula tujja kwekuumira mu lugero Katonda lwe yatuwa, nti tusobodde mmwe okubatuuka." 
2Corinthians10:14 Tetusukka we twapimirwa ng'abataabatuukako; ate nno ffe twasookera ddala okubatuukako, nga tujja n'Evangili ya Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Awo nno tetwetendera mu by'abalala bye baakola kisukkiridde. Naye okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kunaaba kunnywedde, omulimu gwaffe mu mmwe tusuubira okugugaziyiza ddala okusinziira ku bipimo byaffe," 
2Corinthians10:16 tuyigirize Evangili tusukke n'ewammwe, nga tetutaddeeko kwetenda olw'omulimu ogwakolebwa edda awalala." 
2Corinthians10:17 Eyeetenda, yeetendere mu Mukama." 
2Corinthians10:18 Kubanga eyeetenda yekka si y'asiimwa, wabula oyo Katonda gw'atenda." 
2Corinthians11:1 Singa nno mumaze gangumiikirizaako olw'obusiru bwange obutonotono; sso nno era muŋŋumiikiriza. 
2Corinthians11:2 Mbabubira n'okububira kwa Katonda, anti naboogereza ewa Kristu, njagala mbanjule ng'omuwala embeerera, omutukuvu, ew'omusajja omu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kyokka ntya nti ng'omusota bwe gwalimbalimba Eva n'obukujjukujju bwagwo, n'ebirowoozo byammwe byandiwugulwa ne muva ku kwemaliza Kristu mu mazima ne mu butukuvu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kubanga bwe wabaawo azze n'abayigiriza Kristu omulala gwe tutaabayigiriza, oba ne mufuna Mwoyo omulala ku gwe mwafuna, oba Evangili endala eteri eno gye mwayaniriza, olwo muba bangu okubikkiriza." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ndowooza nti nange siri mutene ku batume bali abakulu ddala. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ne bwe siba mukugu mu kuteregga mu lulimi, mu bye mmanyi siri mutene; kino twakibooleka bulungi mu buli ngeri mu byonna." 
2Corinthians11:7 Nze bwe neetoowaza mmwe mulyoke musukkulume olwo ne nkola obubi, okuba ng'Evangili nagiyigiriza awatali ke musasudde?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ekleziya endala nazinyaga bwe nakkiriza kye bansasulanga, mmwe ndyoke mbaweereze." 
2Corinthians11:9 Bwe nali eyo ewammwe nga ndi mu bwetaavu, mpaawo gwe nakaluubiriza, kubanga bye nali mbulwako abooluganda abaava e Masedoniya be baabiwanga. Mu byonna saayagala kubakaluubiriza, era siribakaluubiriza." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ng'amazima ga Kristu gali mu nze, okwetenda kuno kwe neetendamu tekugenda kusirisibwa mu Akayiya yonna." 
2Corinthians11:11 Lwaki? Kubanga sibaagala? Katonda amanyi nti mbaagala. 
2Corinthians11:12 Nzija kwongera okukola kye mbadde nkola, ndyoke ntwale omukisa gw'abo abanoonya omukisa gw'okuyisibwa nga ffe mu mulimu gw'okuyigiriza gwe beetendamu." 
2Corinthians11:13 Abo batume ba bulimba, bakozi abateesigibwa, abeefaananya ng'Abatume ba Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ggwe wamma mpaawo kwewuunya, ndaba ne Sitaani yennyini yeefaananya nga malayika w'ekitangaala." 
2Corinthians11:15 Tekyewuunyisa bwe baba nga n'abaweereza be beefaananya n'abaweereza b'obutuukirivu. Enkomerero yaabwe eribeera ng'ebikolwa byabwe. 
2Corinthians11:16 Nziramu okugamba: tewabangawo andowooza kubeera musiru; oba bwe mulowooza, kale mumpise ng'omusiru, mumpe bwe mutyo omukisa ogw'okwetendamu akatono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Bye ŋŋenda okwogera, sibyogera ku bwa Mukama, wabula ng'omusiru, nga nkakasa nti nnina kye nnyinza okwetendamu." 
2Corinthians11:18 Ndaba bangi beetenda mu by'ensi, nange ka neetende." 
2Corinthians11:19 Anti abasiru mubagumiikiriza n'essanyu, engeri gye muli abagezi." 
2Corinthians11:20 Anti mujja kugumiikiriza bwe wabaawo abafuga obuddu, abeeyambisa obweyambisa, oba abalyakula, abeewanikako oba abakuba empi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Kino kisonyiwaza okukyogera, naye twali banafu. Naye ekyo oli kye yeetendamu, – kati njogera ng'omusiru, - nze nange nkyetendamu." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bo Beebureeyi? Nange bwe ndi. Bo Bayisirayeli? Nange bwe ndi. Bo bazzukulu ba Yiburayimu? Nange bwe ndi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bo baweereza ba Kristu? Ka njogere ng'agudde eddalu, nze mbasinga: mbasinga mu bungi bw'emirimo, mu kusibibwa mu makomera, mu kukubibwa emiggo emiyitirivu; mirundi mingi katono nfe." 
2Corinthians11:24 Nakubwa Abayudaaya emirundi etaano ku buli mulundi nga balekayo embooko emu okuweza amakumi ana. 
2Corinthians11:25 Nakubibwa emiggo emirundi esatu; lumu bankuba amayinja; emirundi esatu ng'amaato ge nalimu gasaanawo; ekiro kimu n'olunaku lumu nga ndi ku nnyanja nteeyenga; 
2Corinthians11:26 eŋŋendo butabala; mbadde mu kabi ku migga, akabi mu batemu, akabi mu bantu b'eggwanga lyange, akabi mu b'amawanga; akabi mu kibuga; akabi mu ddungu; akabi ku nnyanja; akabi mu booluganda ab'obulimba;" 
2Corinthians11:27 mbadde mu kukola ne mu kutegana; mpise mu biro bingi nga nsula ntunula; nnumiddwa enjala n'ennyonta, nsiibye ne nsula emirundi mingi, nfuuyiddwa empewo, mpise obwereere." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ebirala ng'obitadde ebbali, kwe kweraliikirira okwa buli lukedde kwe neeraliikiriramu Ekleziya zonna." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ani aggwaamu amaanyi nze ne siggwaamu maanyi? Ani aleeterwa okugwa nze ne sinyiiga? 
2Corinthians11:30 Oba ndi wa kwetenda, nzija kwetendera mu ebyo ebiraga obunafu bwange." 
2Corinthians11:31 Katonda era Kitaawe w'Omukama Yezu, atenderezebwe emirembe gyonna, oyo amanyi sirimba." 
2Corinthians11:32 E Damasiko, owessaza wa kabaka Areta yakuuma ekibuga ky'e Damasiko ankwate," 
2Corinthians11:33 naye naserengesebwa mu kisero nga mpisibwa mu ddirisa ly'oku bbugwe, ne mmusumattuka." 
2Corinthians12:1 Nina okwetenda; kino temuli mugaso, naye era ka ntuuke ku Mukama bye yandaga ne bye yambikkulira." 
2Corinthians12:2 Mmanyi omuntu omu mu Kristu, emyaka kkumi n'ena emabega, eyasitulibwa n'atwalibwa mu ggulu eryokusatu. Oba yali mu mubiri oba si mu mubiri, simanyi; Katonda y'amanyi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Mmanyi ng'omuntu oyo, yasitulibwa n'atwalibwa mu kifo ky'okwesiima, oba yali mu mubiri, oba si mu mubiri, simanyi; Katonda y'amanyi," 
2Corinthians12:4 n'awulira ebigambo ebitayogerekeka, omuntu by'atakkirizibwa kwogera." 
2Corinthians12:5 Neetenda ku lw'omuntu ono, naye nze ku lwange sijja kwetenda okuggyako mpozzi obuteeyinza bwange." 
2Corinthians12:6 Bwe njagala okwetenda, sandibadde musiru, kubanga naaba njogera mazima. Naye sijja kukikola, wabulewo andowoozaako ebisinga ku ebyo by'andabamu oba by'ampulirako." 
2Corinthians12:7 Okunziyiza okwewanika olw'ebiyitirivu ebyambikkulirwa, naweebwa eriggwa mu mubiri gwange, malayika wa Sitaani ankube, nneme kwewanika." 
2Corinthians12:8 Nawanjagira Omukama emirundi esatu kinveeko; 
2Corinthians12:9 yanziramu kimu nti: “Eneema yange ekumala; amaanyi gange geeragira mu bunafu.” Awo nno nzija kweetendera mu bunafu bwange n'okusingawo ate nga ndi musanyufu, amaanyi ga Kristu galyoke gambeereko." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ku lwa Kristu kyenva nsanyukira mu bunafu bwange, mu bivumo, mu bizibu, mu biyigganyizo ne mu bubenje, kubanga bwe mba omunafu lw'emba ow'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Nasiriwadde! Mmwe mubinjagazizza, anti mmwe mwandibadde ab'okutenda. Anti ddala siri mutene mu maaso g'abo abatume abakulu, newandibadde nga siri kantu." 
2Corinthians12:12 Obubonero obulaga omutume yennyini bwakolebwa mu mmwe mu bugumiikiriza bwonna mu bubonero, ebyewuunyo n'ebikolwa eby'amaanyi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Kale mmwe muli bubi ki okusinga ekleziya endala? Mpozzi kimu kyokka, nze obutabaako kye mbakaluubirizaamu. Ensobi eno muginsonyiwe." 
2Corinthians12:14 Anti nzuuno neetegese okujja ewammwe omulundi ogwokusatu; era sijja kubaako kye mbakaluubirizaamu, kubanga ebyammwe si bye nnoonya, wabula mmwe. Anti abaana si be baterekera ababazaala, wabula abazadde be baterekera abaana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Naye nze nzennyini nzija kwewaayo nga ndi musanyufu, era nzija kuweebwayo olw'okubeera emyoyo gyammwe. Bwe mbaagala bwe ntyo, ate olwo mmwe ne mukendeeza mu ku njagala?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Weewaawo saabakaluubiriza nzennyini, naye nali mukalabakalaba, ne mbafunira mu bukujjukujju." 
2Corinthians12:17 Waliwo omu ku abo be nabatumira gwe nayitamu okubalyakula? 
2Corinthians12:18 Neegayirira Tito ajje, ne mutumirako n'owooluganda. Tito ye yabalyakula? Ffembi tetwali ba mutima gumu? Ekisinde tetwakwata kimu?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Kati nno obwedda mulowooza nti twewozaako gye muli? Tubadde twogera mu maaso ga Katonda mu Kristu, nga mu byonna, abaagalwa, tugenderera kubazimba." 
2Corinthians12:20 Naye ntya nti oboolyawo nnyinza okujja ne sibasanga nga bwe nandyagadde, nange ne mutansanga nga bwe mwandyagadde; oboolyawo ne wabaawo mpaka, buggya, busungu, kwefaako, kuwaayiriza, ŋŋambo, lunkulu, kutabangula." 
2Corinthians12:21 Era ntya nti oboolyawo bwe najja eyo Katonda yandintoowaza mu maaso gammwe, ne nkaabira abangi abayonoona edda naye nga tebanneenenya eby'obuseegu, obwenzi n'obugwenyufu bye baakola." 
2Corinthians13:1 Guno gwe mulundi ogwokusatu nga nzija gye muli. Buli kigambo kyonna kikakasibwa n'obujulizi bwa bajulizi babiri oba basatu. 
2Corinthians13:2 Abo, luli abaali boonoonye era n'abalala bonna, mbagamba kye kimu kati nga siri eyo, nga bwe nali mbagambye ku lukyala lwange olwokubiri, nti bwe naaba nzize nate, sijja kubasaasira." 
2Corinthians13:3 Mbu munoonya obukakafu oba Kristu anjogereramu; oyo si munafu ng'abakolako, wabula wa buyinza mu mmwe." 
2Corinthians13:4 Mu bunafu baamukomerera, naye kati mulamu olw'amaanyi ga Katonda; naffe weewaawo tuli banafu mu ye, naye naffe tuliba balamu gye muli wamu naye olw'amaanyi ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mwekebere mulabe oba muli mu kukkiriza. Mwegeze mwennyini. Temulaba nga Yezu Kristu ali mu mmwe? Okuggyako mpozzi ng'ekigezo kibalemye! 
2Corinthians13:6 Nsuubira nga mujja kuzuula nga ffe ekigezo tekyatulema. 
2Corinthians13:7 Omukama tumuwanjagira muleme kukola kibi, si lwa kwagala kulabika nti ekigezo twakisinga, wabula nti mukola ekituufu newandibadde nga tulabika ng'abaalemwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Tetusobola kulwanyisa mazima, wabula okukolerera amazima." 
2Corinthians13:9 Kubanga tusanyuka bwe tuba abanafu naye nga mmwe muli ba maanyi. Ekyo kye tusaba ne mu ssaala zaffe nti mweyongere mu bulungi. 
2Corinthians13:10 Mpandiise bino nga nkyali eno wala nammwe, nga nzize nneme kubeera mukambwe nga neeyambisa obuyinza Omukama bwe yampa okuzimba sso si okuzimbulula."
