2Corinthians13:11 Eky'enkomerero, abooluganda, mubeere basanyufu; mmwezze buggya, mugumyaŋŋane; mubeere ba ndowooza emu; mutuule mirembe, olwo ne Katonda w'okwagala n'eddembe alibeera nammwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mulamusagane n'okunywegeragana okutukuvu. Abatuukirivu bonna babatumidde. 
2Corinthians13:13 Eneema y'Omukama Yezu Kristu n'okwagala kwa Katonda n'okussa ekimu okwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bibeere nammwe mwenna. 
Galatians1:1 Pawulo, eyayitibwa okuba Omutume si bantu oba nga kiva mu muntu buntu, wabula mu Yezu Kristu ne Katonda Taata eyamuzuukiza mu bafu," 
Galatians1:2 era n'abooluganda bonna bwe tuli. 
Galatians1:3 Ya Ekleziya z'e Galasiya: Eneema ebeere nammwe, ko n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Taata ne Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 eyeewaayo okubeera ebibi byaffe okutuwonya emirembe gino emibi, nga Katonda era Taata bwe yayagala;" 
Galatians1:5 oyo agulumizibwe emirembe n'emirembe Amiina. 
Galatians1:6 Neewuunyizza okulaba nga mwabulidde mangu mutyo oli eyabayita mu neema ya Kristu, ate ne mudda eri evangili endala;" 
Galatians1:7 si kwe kugamba nti waliyo evangili endala, wabula waliwo abamu ababatabula, abaagala okwonoona Evangili ya Kristu." 
Galatians1:8 Ne bwe yandibadde ffe oba malayika avudde mu ggulu, singa abayigiriza evangili endala eyawukanye ku eyo gye twabayigiriza, avumirirwe." 
Galatians1:9 Nga bwe twagamba olulala, era bwe nziramu okugamba, nti oba waliwo abayigiriza evangili eyawukanye ku eyo gye mwafuna, avumirirwe." 
Galatians1:10 Kati nkolerera kusiimibwa bantu, oba Katonda? Nnoonya kusanyusa bantu? Oba nkyayagala kusanyusa bantu, sandibadde muweereza wa Kristu." 
Galatians1:11 Ka mbabuulire, abooluganda, Evangili gye nabayigiriza, si ya muntu." 
Galatians1:12 Saagifuna kuva ku muntu; saayigirizibwa buyigirizibwa, wabula yava mu Yezu Kristu bye yambikkulira." 
Galatians1:13 Anti mwawulira edda bwe neeyisanga nga ndi mu Kiyudaaya; nga bwe nayigganya Ekleziya wa Katonda ne mpitiriza, ne ngezaako okumuzikiriza." 
Galatians1:14 Neeyongera okukuguka mu Kiyudaaya ne nkubira wala bannange ab'eggwanga lyange bwe twaliwo mu budde obwo, nga ndi muyitirivu mu kutakabanira empisa za bajjajjange." 
Galatians1:15 Naye nno oyo eyanjawula okuva mu nda ya nnyabo, n'ampita n'eneema ye, bwe yasiima" 
Galatians1:16 okunjoleka Omwana we ndyoke mmuyigirize ab'amawanga, seeyuna muntu," 
Galatians1:17 era n'e Yeruzaalemu saayambukayo eri abo abansooka okuba abatume; nagenda bugenzi mu Arabiya, ate ne nkomawo e Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Oluvannyuma nga wayise emyaka esatu, kwe kwambuka e Yeruzaalemu okulaba Kefa, ne mmala naye ennaku kkumi na ttaano." 
Galatians1:19 Mu batume saalabayo mulala, mpozzi Yakobo muganda w'Omukama." 
Galatians1:20 Ndayira mu maaso ga Katonda nga bye mpandiika bino sirimba. 
Galatians1:21 Oluvannyuma ne ŋŋenda mu nsi ya Siriya ne mu Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Ekleziya za Kristu ez'omu Buyudaaya zaali tezimmanyi bwe nfaanana. 
Galatians1:23 Baali bawuliddeko buwulizi nti: “Olumu eyali atuyigganya, ate kati y'ayigiriza okukkiriza kwe yali ayagala okuzikiriza;”" 
Galatians1:24 ne bagulumiza Katonda olw'okubeera nze. 
Galatians2:1 Oluvannyuma lw'emyaka kkumi n'ena, naddamu okwambuka e Yeruzaalemu, wamu ne Barunaba, nga ntutte ne Tito." 
Galatians2:2 Nagendayo olw'okubikkulirwa kwe nali nfunye; ne mbanjulira Evangili gye nali mbuulira mu b'amawanga; twali ffekka n'abo abaali bafaanana okusingamu ekitiibwa; ekyaginnyanjuza, nti sikulwa nga nzirukira busa, oba nga mbadde nzirukira busa." 
Galatians2:3 Kale ne Tito yennyini bwe twali, nandibadde yali Mugereeki, tebaamuwaliriza kutayirirwa." 
Galatians2:4 Olw'okubeera abooluganda ab'obulimba, abaaleetebwa mu nkukutu ne batwerimbikamu okuketta balabe eddembe lye tulina mu Kristu Yezu, nga baagala okutuzza mu buddu," 
Galatians2:5 naffe tetwabagonderako n'akatono, nga twagala amazima g'Evangili gabakuumirwe." 
Galatians2:6 Abo abaali bafaanana okusinga ekitiibwa – sifaayo oba baani, anti Katonda teyeeguya muntu – kale nno abo abaali bafaanana okusinga ekitiibwa tebalina kye bannyongerako." 
Galatians2:7 Naye wabula, bo bwe baalaba nga nange nakwasibwa Evangili okugiyigiriza abatali batayirire, nga ne Petero bwe yali akwasiddwa Evangili olw'abatayirire," 
Galatians2:8 – ndaba eyakolera mu Petero mu butume bwe eri abatayirire ye yakolera ne mu nze nga ntumiddwa eri ab'amawanga, -" 
Galatians2:9 bwe baategeera eneema gye nali mpeereddwa, Yakobo ne Kefa ne Yowanna, abaali balabika okuba empagi, ne bakwata nze ne Barunaba mu ngalo n'emikono gyabwe egya ddyo okulaga nti tuli kimu, ffe tugende mu b'amawanga, bo mu batayirire." 
Galatians2:10 Wabula baatusaba okujjukiranga abaavu, ekintu nange kye nali njagala okukola." 
Galatians2:11 Naye Kefa bwe yatuuka mu Antiyokiya, ne mmukaliramu kubanga gwali gumusinga." 
Galatians2:12 Abamu abaava ewa Yakobo bwe baali tebanajja, yali alyanga n'ab'amawanga; naye bwe bajja, ne yeeseebulula, ne yeeyawulako olw'okutya abava mu batayirire." 
Galatians2:13 N'abayudaaya abalala ne bamulabirako okukuusa, ne Barunaba yennyini ne bamutwaliriza mu kukuusa." 
Galatians2:14 Bwe nalaba nga si balambulukufu mu bikwata ku mazima g'Evangili, kwe kwatulira Kefa mu maaso ga bonna nti: “Oba ggwe Omuyudaaya oyisa ng'ab'amawanga n'otoyisa Kiyudaaya, osobola otya okuwaliriza ab'amawanga okuyisa ng'Abayudaaya?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ffe mu buzaale Abayudaaya, abatali b'amawanga aboonoonyi," 
Galatians2:16 tumanyi ng'omuntu tafuuka mutuukirivu lwa kutuukiriza bikolwa bya mu Tteeka, wabula lwa kukkiriza Yezu Kristu, naffe twakkiriza Kristu Yezu, tufuuke tutyo abatuukirivu olw'okukkiriza Kristu, sso si lwa bikolwa Etteeka bye liragira; anti nga mpaawo n'omu afuuka mutuukirivu olw'okukola obukozi Etteeka bye liragira." 
Galatians2:17 Oba bwe tunoonya okufuuka abatuukirivu mu Kristu twesanga nga tukyali boonoonyi, awo nno Kristu muleesi wa kibi? N'akatono!" 
Galatians2:18 Oba nzimba buggya bye nazimbulula, mba nkakasa nti nali musobya." 
Galatians2:19 Naye nze nga mpita mu Tteeka, Etteeka nalifuukira mufu, ndyoke mbeere omulamu ku bwa Katonda." 
Galatians2:20 Nakomererwa ku musaalaba awamu ne Kristu; ndi mulamu naye nga si ku lwange, wabula ku lwa Kristu asula mu nze; ndi mulamu kaakano, naye nga lwa kukkiriza Omwana wa Katonda, eyanjagala, ne yeewaayo okubeera nze." 
Galatians2:21 Sigaya neema ya Katonda, kubanga singa obutuukirivu bwali buva mu Tteeka, Kristu yandibadde yafiira bwereere." 
Galatians3:1 Basiru mmwe Abagalasiya, ani abagulise, mmwe mu maaso gammwe Yezu omukomerere ku musaalaba be yalagibwa?" 
Galatians3:2 Kale mbabuuza kino kyokka: Mwoyo mwamufuna kubanga mwatuusa ebikolwa by'omu Tteeka, nandiki kubanga mwawulira n'okukkiriza?" 
Galatians3:3 Bwe mutyo bwemusiriwadde? Mmwe abaatandika ne Mwoyo ate mumaliriza na mubiri? 
Galatians3:4 Byonna ebyo bye mwabonaabonamu byali bya busa? - singa ddala byali bya busa. 
Galatians3:5 Eyabawa Mwoyo we era akola n'ebyewuunyo mu mmwe akozesa bikolwa bya mu Tteeka, oba kubanga mwawulira n'okukkiriza?" 
Galatians3:6 “Yiburayimu yakkiriza Katonda ne kimubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu.” 
Galatians3:7 Awo nno mulaba nti abakkiriza be baba abaana ba Yiburayimu. 
Galatians3:8 Ekiwandiiko ekitukuvu bwe kyalengera nga Katonda amawanga aligafuula matuukirivu lwa kukkiriza, ne kibuulirirawo Yiburayimu amawulire ag'essanyu nti: “Mu ggwe amawanga gonna galiweebwa omukisa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Abakkiriza nno ba mukisa wamu ne Yiburayimu eyakkiriza. 
Galatians3:10 Awo nno bonna abagendera ku bikolwa eby'Etteeka bakolimire; anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Buli yenna atanyweza byonna ebyawandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'Etteeka n'atabituusa, mukolimire.”" 
Galatians3:11 Awo nno Etteeka terisobola kufuula muntu mutuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda, kubanga “Omutuukirivu aliba mulamu olw'okukkiriza.”" 
Galatians3:12 Etteeka lyo teryesigamye ku kukkiriza, kubanga “Aliba abikoze, aliba mulamu olw'okubeera byo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristu yatununula mu kikolimo ky'Etteeka bwe yafuuka ekikolimo olw'okubeera ffe, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Buli yenna awanikibwa ku muti, mukolimire.”" 
Galatians3:14 Kristu Yezu yatununula, mu ye omukisa gwa Yiburayimu gujje ku b'amawanga, naffe olw'okukkiriza tufune Mwoyo eyasuubizibwa." 
Galatians3:15 Abooluganda, singa tulabira ku bibaawo bulijjo, endagaano y'omuntu bw'emala okukakasibwa, tewali muntu asobola kugisazaamu oba kugiwaayiramu birala." 
Galatians3:16 Ebisuubizo byasuubizibwa Yiburayimu n'ezzadde lye. Tagamba nti: “N'amazadde ge,” ng'amangi; naye mu bumu nti: “N'ezzadde lyo;” ezzadde eryo ye Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Kino nze kye ntegeeza, nti Etteeka eryajja nga wamaze okuyita emyaka ebikumi bina mu asatu teriyinza kudibya ndagaano Katonda gye yali amaze okukakasa, bye yasuubiza ne bifa busa." 
Galatians3:18 Oba obusika bugoba biri mu Tteeka, awo nno tebugoba kisuubizo; sso Katonda yabuwa Yiburayimu ng'agoba ebiri mu kisuubizo." 
Galatians3:19 Etteeka nno lyaki? Lyagattibwako olw'ebisobyo okutuusa ezzadde eryasuubizibwa ekisuubizo lwe lirijja. Lyateekebwateekebwa bamalayika nga bayita mu mutabaganya. 
Galatians3:20 Omutabaganya tatabaganya omu, sso Katonda ali omu." 
Galatians3:21 Awo nno Etteeka liggyawo Katonda bye yasuubiza? N'akatono. Singa wassibwawo Etteeka erisobola okuwa obulamu, ggwe wamma obutuukirivu bwandivuddenga mu Tteeka." 
Galatians3:22 Sso Ekiwandiiko ekitukuvu byonna kyabissa mu buyinza bwa kibi, olw'okukkiriza Yezu Kristu ekisuubizo kiryoke kibeere ky'abo abakkiriza." 
Galatians3:23 Kati nno okukkiriza kwali tekunnajja, ffenna twali tussiddwa mu kkomera ly'Etteeka, nga tukuumirwa mu nkomyo okutuusa akadde okukkiriza lwe kulibikkulibwa." 
Galatians3:24 Awo nno Etteeka lyatukuumira mu ggunjuliro okutuusa ku Kristu, tulyoke tufuulibwe abatuukirivu olw'okukkiriza." 
Galatians3:25 Naye kati okukkiriza nga kumaze okutuuka, tetukyafugibwa mukuumi," 
Galatians3:26 Kubanga mwenna olw'okukkiriza, muli baana ba Katonda mu Kristu Yezu." 
Galatians3:27 Anti mwenna nga bwe mwabatizibwa mu Yezu Kristu, mwambadde Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Tewakyali ono Muyudaaya, ono Mugereeki; tewakyali ono muddu, ono mwana wa ddembe; tewakyali ono musajja, ono mukazi; anti mmwe mwenna muli muntu omu mu Kristu Yezu." 
Galatians3:29 Oba muli ba Kristu, awo nno muli zzadde lya Yiburayimu, muli basika okusinziira ku kisuubizo." 
Galatians4:1 Kye ŋŋamba kye kino, nti omusika bw'aba akyali muto, yadde nga byonna ye nnyinibyo, aba talina ky'asinza muddu." 
Galatians4:2 Abakuza n'abalabirira ebintu bye be bamufuga okutuusa ebbanga kitaawe lye yamuteeseza. 
Galatians4:3 Naffe bwe tuli. Bwe twali tukyali bato, twali baddu b'amaanyi g'ebintu ensi mwe yakolebwa." 
Galatians4:4 Naye obudde bwe bwatuuka, Katonda n'atuma Omwana we, n'azaalibwa omukazi, nga naye atwalibwa Tteeka," 
Galatians4:5 alyoke anunule abo Etteeka be lyafuganga, tulyoke twebonanyizibwe ng'abaana." 
Galatians4:6 Kubanga nno muli baana, Katonda kyeyava asindika Mwoyo w'Omwana we mu mitima gyaffe, akoowoola nti: “Abba, Taata.”" 
Galatians4:7 Awo nno tokyali muddu, wabula mwana mu Katonda; ate kubanga oli mwana, oli na musika." 
Galatians4:8 Weewaawo luli Katonda nga temunnamumanya, mwaweerezanga buddu ebyo mu butonde ebitali Katonda n'akatono." 
Galatians4:9 Kale nno, mumaze okumanya Katonda, oba ka ŋŋambe nti nga mumaze okumanyibwa Katonda, muyinza mutya okudda ku bintu ebyo ebinafu omutali kantu, bye mwagala okuttukiza mubeere baddu baabyo?" 
Galatians4:10 Mukuza ennaku n'emyezi, obudde bw'omwaka n'emyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Mbatiiriridde, nti sikulwa nga nafaabiinira bwereere ku lwammwe." 
Galatians4:12 Abooluganda, mubeere nga nze, kubanga nange nafuuka nga mmwe; temunkolanga kibi." 
Galatians4:13 Luli obukosefu mu mubiri bwe bwandeetera okusookera ku mmwe okubatuusaako Evangili. 
Galatians4:14 Newandibadde embeera gye nalimu yabasobeza, kyokka temwannyooma wadde okunneekanasa; naye mwannyaniriza nga malayika wa Katonda, nga Kristu Yezu yennyini." 
Galatians4:15 Okunsanyukira okwo kwonna kuzze wa? Sibalimbamu, olwo singa kyali kisoboka, n'amaaso gammwe mwandigatunguddemu ne mugampa." 
Galatians4:16 Kati okubabuulira amazima kye kinfudde omulabe wammwe? 
Galatians4:17 Bagezaako okubettanira, naye si lwa bulungi; baagala kubaawukanya ku ffe, mulyoke mwettanire bo." 
Galatians4:18 Okwettanira olw'ensonga ennungi kintu kirungi, ne bwe mba nga siri eyo nammwe." 
Galatians4:19 Baana bange, nzizeemu nnumwe, mbazaale buggya okutuusa Kristu ng'atondeddwa mu mmwe?" 
Galatians4:20 Nandyagadde mbeere eyo nammwe kati nkyuse mu njogera gye njogeramu, kubanga kati mbabuusabusaamu." 
Galatians4:21 Mumbuulire, mmwe abaagala ate okufugibwa Etteeka: Etteeka temuliwuliranga?" 
Galatians4:22 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti: “Yiburayimu yalina abaana babiri: omu yamuzaala mu mukazi muzaana, omulala mu wa ddembe." 
Galatians4:23 Naye gwe yazaala mu muzaana, yazaalibwa mu butonde, sso gwe yazaala mu w'eddembe, yazaalibwa ng'ayita mu kisuubizo." 
Galatians4:24 Ekyo nno kifaayo kya makulu: Abakazi abo ababiri ze ndagaano ebbiri: emu esibuka ku lusozi Sinayi, y'ezaala abaana b'obuddu; ye Agari." 
Galatians4:25 Kati nno Agari lwe lusozi Sinayi mu Arabiya; luli nga Yeruzaalemu ow'omu budde buno kubanga ali mu buddu n'abaana be. 
Galatians4:26 Naye Yeruzaalemu ali waggulu ye wa ddembe, ye nnyaffe." 
Galatians4:27 Anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Sanyuka ggwe omugumba atazaalangako; yamira, leekaana, ggwe atazaalangako; kubanga abaana b'oyo eyayabulirwa bangi okusinga ab'oyo aliko bba.”" 
Galatians4:28 Kati ffe, abooluganda, ffe baana ab'ekisuubizo nga Yizaake bwe yali." 
Galatians4:29 Nga luli, oli eyazaalibwa mu butonde kyokka bwe yayigganya eyazaalibwa mu Mwoyo, na kaakano bwe guli." 
Galatians4:30 Kazzi ebiwandiiko bigamba bitya? “Goba omuzaana ne mutabani we; kubanga omwana w'omuzaana taliba musika wamu na mwana wa ddembe.” 
Galatians4:31 Awo nno, abooluganda, tetuli baana ba mukazi muzaana, naye b'oli ow'eddembe." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu yatusumulula tulyoke tubeere mu ddembe; awo nno munywere, muleme kwezza ate mu kikoligo kya buddu." 
Galatians5:2 Nze Pawulo mwene nze mbagamba, nti oba mutayirirwa, Kristu tajja kubagasa kantu." 
Galatians5:3 Nziramu okukakasa buli muntu eyeewaayo okutayirirwa, nti oyo abanjibwa okukwata Etteeka lyonna." 
Galatians5:4 Mmwe abaagala okufuulibwa abatuukirivu olw'Etteeka, mukutuddwa ku Kristu; mukongose ku neema." 
Galatians5:5 Sso ffe mu Mwoyo ku lw'okukkiriza, tulinda ebyo obutuukirivu bye busuubiza." 
Galatians5:6 Anti mu Kristu Yezu okutayirirwa n'obutatayirirwa byombi tebirina makulu, wabula okukkiriza okweyolekera mu kwagala." 
Galatians5:7 Mwali mudduse bulungi, ate ani oyo abaziyiza okugondera amazima?" 
Galatians5:8 Okubaseemyaseemya kuno si kw'oyo eyabayita. 
Galatians5:9 Ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa obutta bwonna. 
Galatians5:10 Neesiga Mukama nga temujja kugoberera ndowooza ndala; oyo abatabula, ne bw'anaaba ani, gulimusinga." 
Galatians5:11 Kale nno, abooluganda, oba nze nkyayigiriza okutayirirwa, lwaki bakyanjigganya? Bwe guba gutyo, n'ekyesittazo ky'omusaalaba kiggiddwawo." 
Galatians5:12 Nandyagadde abo ababatabangula beesonjolereko ddala! 
Galatians5:13 Abooluganda, mmwe mwayitirwa ddembe; kyokka eddembe eryo temulyeyambisa kukola bya mubiri, naye buli omu abeere muweereza wa munne mu kwagala." 
Galatians5:14 Anti Etteeka lyonna lifunzibwa mu kigambo kimu: “Oyagalanga munno nga ggwe wennyini bwe weeyagala.” 
Galatians5:15 Oba mulumagana, mulyaŋŋana mutyo, mwekkaanye sikulwa nga mumalaŋŋanawo." 
Galatians5:16 Kyenva ŋŋamba nti: mutambulire mu Mwoyo, olwo lwe mutaakole mubiri bye gwegomba." 
Galatians5:17 Anti omubiri bye gwegomba bikontana n'eby'omwoyo bye gwegomba; n'omwoyo bye gwegomba bikontana n'eby'omubiri bye gwegomba. Byombi, ekimu kirwanyisa kinaakyo, ne mutakola kye mwandyagadde kukikola." 
Galatians5:18 Bwe muba nga mutwalibwa Mwoyo, olwo temufugibwa Tteeka." 
Galatians5:19 Anti ebikolwa by'omubiri bimanyiddwa: obuseegu, obwenzi, obugwenyufu," 
Galatians5:20 okuwongera balubaale, okuloga, akaluyi, okuyomba, ebbuba, obusungu, obukodo, endasano, obutakkaanya," 
Galatians5:21 obuggya, obutemu, obutamiivu, ebiduula n'ebirala ebiringa ebyo. Mbalabula, era nga bwe nabalabula olulala, ebyo ababikola tebalisikira bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Galatians5:22 Kyo ekibala kya Mwoyo kibeera: kwagala, ssanyu, ddembe, kugumiikiriza, kisa, bulungi, bwesigwa," 
Galatians5:23 buteefu, bwetangize. Ebyo tebiriiko tteeka libiwakanya." 
Galatians5:24 Abo abeewa Kristu Yezu, omubiri gwabwe bagukomerera ku musaalaba ko n'amaddu gaagwo ne bye gwegomba." 
Galatians5:25 Oba nno tuli balamu lwa Mwoyo, tutambulire mu Mwoyo." 
Galatians5:26 Tuleke kwegomba kitiibwa kitaliimu n'okusosonkerezagana, n'okukwatiragana obuggya." 
Galatians6:1 Abooluganda, ng'omuntu akwatiddwa n'agwa mu nsobi, mmwe aba Mwoyo mumugolole n'eggonjebwa. Nammwe mwegendereze muleme kukemebwa." 
Galatians6:2 Buli omu asitulireko munne omugugu, bwe mutyo mutuukirize etteeka lya Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Kubanga oli bw'alowooza ng'aliko bw'ali sso nga taliiko bw'ali, oyo yeerimba." 
Galatians6:4 Buli omu yeekebere alabe nga bw'akola, olwo aneepima n'alaba ekimwewaanya, naye n'ateegeranya ku mulala." 
Galatians6:5 Anti buli omu obuzito alyetikka bubwe. 
Galatians6:6 Oyo asomesebwa ekigambo agabane byonna ebirungi by'alina n'oli asomesa. 
Galatians6:7 Muleke kuwubisibwa, Katonda teri ayinza kumukwenyakwenya, kubanga omuntu ky'aliba asize era ky'alikungula." 
Galatians6:8 Asiga mu mubiri gwe, mu mubiri gwe era mw'alikungula olumbe; asiga mu Mwoyo, mu Mwoyo mw'alikungula obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Galatians6:9 Tuleme kukoowa kukola bulungi, kubanga bwe tutaddirira, tujja kukungula ng'obudde butuuse." 
Galatians6:10 Kale nno ebbanga nga bwe tukyalirina, tukolere bulungi abantu bonna, naddala abo ab'omu maka g'okukkiriza." 
Galatians6:11 Mulabe bwe mbawandiikidde n'omukono gwange mu nnyukuta ennene. 
Galatians6:12 Bonna abo abaagala okweraga mu by'omubiri, be bo ababawaliriza okutayirirwa, baleme kuyigganyizibwa lwa musaalaba gwa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Sso n'abo abaatayirirwa Etteeka tebalikwata, naye baagala mmwe mutayirirwe, balyoke beetendere mu kituuse ku mibiri gyammwe." 
Galatians6:14 Kikafuuwe nze okwetenda, wabula beppo mu musaalaba gwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu; mu gwo ensi ekomereddwa ku nze, nange nga nkomereddwa ku yo." 
Galatians6:15 Okutayirirwa tekulina makulu, n'obutatayirirwa nabwo bwe butyo; ekikulu kwe kubeera ekitonde ekiggya." 
Galatians6:16 Eddembe n'okusaasirwa bibeere ku abo abagoberera etteeka lino, era ne ku Yisirayeli wa Katonda." 
Galatians6:17 N'okuva kati wabulewo antawaanya, kubanga enkovu za Yezu mpita nazo ku mubiri gwange." 
Galatians6:18 Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeerenga n'omwoyo gwammwe, abooluganda. Amiina." 
Ephesians1:1 Pawulo, Omutume wa Yezu Kristu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda. Y'abatuukirivu bonna abakkiriza mu Kristu Yezu." 
Ephesians1:2 Eneema ebeere nammwe ko n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu. 
Ephesians1:3 Katonda oyo era Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu atenderezebwe, eyatuwa mu Yezu Kristu buli mukisa ogw'omu ggulu ogwa Mwoyo." 
Ephesians1:4 Nga bwe yatweroboleza mu ye nga n'ensi tennabangibwawo, tubeere batuukirivu nga tetuliiko musango mu maaso ge." 
Ephesians1:5 Yatuteebeza mu kwagala kwe okwebonanyizibwa ng'abaana ng'ayita mu Yezu Kristu, nga bwe yateekateeka mu kwagala kwe," 
Ephesians1:6 aweese eneema ye ey'ekitiibwa ettendo, gye yatugemulira olw'ekisa mu Mwana we Omwagala." 
Ephesians1:7 Mu ye twanunulibwa mu musaayi gwe, ne tusonyiyibwa ebibi, okusinziira ku bungi bw'eneema ye," 
Ephesians1:8 gye yatuwa mu buyitirivu mu magezi gonna ne mu kumanya. 
Ephesians1:9 Kubanga yatuwa okumanya ekyama ky'okwagala kwe, nga kwe kusiima kwe, nga bwe yateesa atyo mu Kristu," 
Ephesians1:10 entegeka ey'okugoberera okutuusa ng'emirembe gyonna gituukiridde, byonna abigatte wamu mu Kristu, ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri mu nsi." 
Ephesians1:11 Mu ye naffe mwe yatweroboleza ng'obusika, nga bwe yatuteebeza ng'aggya ku ntegeka ye, oyo atuukiriza byonna ng'agoberera enteesa y'okwagala kwe." 
Ephesians1:12 Ffe abaasookera ddala okusuubira mu Kristu, twayitirwa okutendanga ekitiibwa kye." 
Ephesians1:13 Mu ye nammwe mwawulira ekigambo ky'amazima, Evangili y'okulokoka kwammwe, ne mumukkiriza, ne mussibwako akabonero ka Mwoyo Mutuukirivu omusuubize," 
Ephesians1:14 nga gwe musingo gw'obusika bwaffe, okutuusa nga tubufunye, ekitiibwa kye kifune ettendo." 
Ephesians1:15 Nange nno olw'okuwulira nga bwe mukkiriza Omukama Yezu n'engeri gye mwagalamu abatuukirivu bonna," 
Ephesians1:16 sisobola kulekera awo kwebaza ku lwammwe nga mbajjukira mu ssaala zange," 
Ephesians1:17 Katonda nnyini kitiibwa Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, abawe omutima ogutegeera, ababikkulire mumumanye;" 
Ephesians1:18 amulise amaaso g'omutima gwammwe, mutegeere essuubi lye yabayitira, n'obungi bw'ekitiibwa eky'obusika bwe bwe yawa abatuukirivu be," 
Ephesians1:19 n'obukulu bw'amaanyi ge amasukkirivu g'ayoleseza mu ffe abakkiriza, mu bikolwa by'obuyinza n'amaanyi ge," 
Ephesians1:20 bye yakola mu Kristu bwe yamuzuukiza mu bafu, n'amutuuza ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo mu ggulu," 
Ephesians1:21 ng'asukkulumye okusinga obukungu bwonna, n'obuyinza, n'amaanyi, n'obufuzi, na buli linnya eryali lituumiddwa, si mu mulembe guno gwokka, naye ne mu gulijja;" 
Ephesians1:22 byonna n'abissa wansi w'ebigere bye, yennyini n'amuwa okubeera omutwe gwa buli kintu ku lw'Ekleziya;" 
Ephesians1:23 gwe mubiri gwe, obujjuvu bw'oyo ajjuza byonna mu byonna." 
Ephesians2:1 Nammwe mwali bafu olw'ebyonoono n'ebibi byammwe 
Ephesians2:2 bye mwatambulirangamu luli nga mukyagoberera empisa y'ensi eno, nga mukyatwalibwa omukungu alina obuyinza obw'omu nsi eno, omwoyo ogwo ogukyakola na buli kati mu bajeemu." 
Ephesians2:3 Naffe ffenna edda twalinga kimu nabo, nga tutwalibwa amaddu g'omubiri gwaffe, nga tukola ebyo emibiri n'emitima gyaffe bye gyegomba; mu buzaale, nga tuli zzadde eryasunguwalirwa nga bwe kyali ku balala bonna." 
Ephesians2:4 Naye nno Katonda omugagga mu kusaasira, olw'okwagala kwe okunene kwe yatwagalamu," 
Ephesians2:5 ne bwe twali tukyali bafu olw'ebibi byaffe, yatuzzaamu obulamu wamu ne Kristu – eneema ye ye yabalokola, -" 
Ephesians2:6 naffe n'atuzuukiza wamu naye, n'atutuuza wamu naye mu ggulu mu Kristu Yezu," 
Ephesians2:7 alyoke mu mirembe egirijja ayoleke obugagga bw'eneema ye obusukkirivu ng'atugirira ekisa mu Kristu Yezu. 
Ephesians2:8 Anti eneema ye yabalokola mu kukkiriza, tekyava ku mmwe, kino kirabo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:9 Tekyava mu bikolwa byammwe; waleme kubaawo nno yeetenda. 
Ephesians2:10 Tuli mulimu gwe, yatutonda mu Kristu Yezu tukole ebikolwa ebirungi Katonda bye yatutegekera edda, mwe tuba tutambulira." 
Ephesians2:11 Awo no mujjukire ng'olumu mwali b'amawanga mu buzaale obw'omubiri, nga muyitibwa abatali batayirire abo abatayirire ab'okutayirirwa okwali okw'omubiri nga kukoleddwa bantu," 
Ephesians2:12 nti olwo mwali temulina Kristu, nga muli bweru wa kibiina kya Yisirayeli, nga muli bagwira eri endagaano z'ekisuubizo, nga temulina ssuubi mu mmwe, nga temulina Katonda mu nsi." 
Ephesians2:13 Sso kati mu Kristu Yezu, mmwe luli abaali beesuubye, mwasembezebwa kumpi olw'omusaayi gwa Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Anti ye lye ddembe lyaffe; ffembi atufudde omuntu omu, ng'ayita mu mubiri gwe n'amenyawo ekisenge eky'obulabe ekyatwawulangamu." 
Ephesians2:15 Yaggyawo Etteeka n'ebiragiro byalyo n'empisa zaalyo alyoke atondewo mu ye omuntu omuggya awabadde ababiri, n'azzaawo bw'atyo eddembe," 
Ephesians2:16 ffembi atutabaganye ne Katonda mu mubiri gumu nga yeeyamba omusaalaba, akomye bw'atyo obulabe obwaliwo." 
Ephesians2:17 Yajja n'ayigiriza eddembe mwe abaali beesuubye na bali abaali okumpi; 
Ephesians2:18 kati ffembi ng'ayita mu ye mu Mwoyo omu tusobola okutuuka ku Taata. 
Ephesians2:19 Awo nno, temukyali bagwira oba basuze busuze, naye muli bannansi wamu n'abatuukirivu n'ab'omu maka ga Katonda." 
Ephesians2:20 Mwazimbirwa ku mwaliiro gw'Abatume n'abalanzi; Kristu Yezu yennyini nga lye jjinja ery'entabiro. 
Ephesians2:21 Mu ye ekizimbe kyonna mwe kyegattira, ne kikula, ne kifuuka Ekiggwa ekitukuvu mu Mukama." 
Ephesians2:22 Mu ye nammwe mwe mwazimbirwa, ne mufuuka ekisulo kya Katonda mu Mwoyo." 
Ephesians3:1 Nze Pawulo omusibe wa Kristu Yezu, kyenva neegayirira ku lwammwe ab'amawanga." 
Ephesians3:2 Nsuubira nti temwalema kuwulirako nga bwe nakwasibwa ku lwammwe omulimu ogw'eneema ya Katonda," 
Ephesians3:3 ng'ekyama kye mbawandiikiddeko mu bikulembedde bwe kyambikkulirwa. 
Ephesians3:4 Bwe mubisoma musobola okulaba nga bwe nategeera ekyama kya Kristu," 
Ephesians3:5 ekitaamanyisibwa bantu mu mirembe giri nga Mwoyo bw'akimanyisizza kaakano Abatume be abatukuvu n'abalanzi," 
Ephesians3:6 nti n'abamawanga nabo bafuuse basika wamu naffe, nabo bitundu bya mubiri, abagabana ku bisuubizo mu Kristu Yezu olw'Evangili." 
Ephesians3:7 Eyo ye Vangili gye natumibwa okuweereza olw'ekirabo ky'eneema ya Katonda ekyampeebwa nga kiva mu kukola kw'amaanyi ge. 
Ephesians3:8 Nange, nze asemba mu batuukirivu bonna, eneema eno yampeebwa, ab'amawanga okubabuulira obugagga bwa Kristu obuteefumiitirizika," 
Ephesians3:9 n'okumanyisa abantu bonna ekyama kino nga bwe kigenda kikola. Kyali kikwekeddwa okuva ddi mu Katonda eyatonda byonna," 
Ephesians3:10 kati amagezi ga Katonda ag'engeri ennyingi galyoke gamanyisibwe abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza mu ggulu nga kino kiyita mu Ekleziya. 
Ephesians3:11 Kino yakikola ng'agoberera enteesa ye ey'emirembe gyonna gye yatuukiriza mu Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe," 
Ephesians3:12 omutuviira okuguma, ne tumusemberera nga tetutya olw'okumukkiriza." 
Ephesians3:13 Kale nno mbeegayiridde muleke kuterebuka olw'ennaku ze nnimu ku lwammwe; kye kitiibwa kyammwe. 
Ephesians3:14 Kyenva nno nfukamira mu maaso ga Taata," 
Ephesians3:15 oyo buli buzadde mu ggulu ne mu nsi kwe buggya erinnya," 
Ephesians3:16 ng'ayima ku bugagga bw'ekitiibwa kye, abawe ng'ayita mu Mwoyo we mweyongere munda yammwe amaanyi n'obuvumu," 
Ephesians3:17 ne Kristu abeere mu mitima gyammwe olw'okukkiriza; emirandira nga mugisimbye mu kwagala era nga kwe muzimbiddwa," 
Ephesians3:18 musobole okufuna amaanyi awamu n'abatuukirivu bonna okutegeera obugazi, obuwanvu, obugulumivu, n'okukka wansi," 
Ephesians3:19 mumanye n'okwagala kwa Kristu, okusukkiridde amagezi gonna, mulyoke mujjulire ddala mwenna Katonda mu bujjuvu bwe." 
Ephesians3:20 Oyo, ng'ayita mu buyinza obukolera mu ffe, akola n'ayitiriza n'okuyitiriza ku kye tuba tusabye oba tulowooza," 
Ephesians3:21 oyo aweebwe ekitiibwa mu Ekleziya ne mu Kristu Yezu mu mazadde gonna emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Ephesians4:1 Kale nno nze omusibe w'Omukama mbeegayiridde, muyise mu ngeri esaanira okuyitibwa kwe mwayitirwa," 
Ephesians4:2 n'obwetoowaze bwonna, n'obuteefu, n'obugumiikiriza, nga mulekeragana olw'okwagalana." 
Ephesians4:3 Mwefubirire okunyweza okussa ekimu okwa Mwoyo mu ddembe eribasiba awamu. 
Ephesians4:4 Omubiri guli gumu ne Mwoyo omu nga bwe mwayitibwa mu kusuubira okumu okw'okuyitibwa kwammwe; 
Ephesians4:5 Omukama omu, okukkiriza kumu, Batismu emu," 
Ephesians4:6 Katonda omu era Kitaawe wa bonna, assukkulumye byonna, akolera mu byonna, ali mu byonna." 
Ephesians4:7 Sso buli omu mu ffe yafuna eneema okusinziira nga Kristu bwe yagereka ebirabo bye. 
Ephesians4:8 Kyebava bagamba nti: “Bwe yalinnya waggulu, yatwala eggye ly'abasibe, n'awa abantu ebirabo.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Bwe bagamba nti: “Yalinnya,” baba ate bategeeza ki ekirala, wabula nti yakka wansi ekkuzimu mu ttaka." 
Ephesians4:10 Oyo eyakka ye omu eyayambuka n'atumbiira n'okuyisa eggulu lyonna alyoke ajjuze byonna. 
Ephesians4:11 Yawa abamu okuba Abatume, abalala ne baba balanzi, abandi bayigiriza ba Vangili, abalala basumba n'abayigisa," 
Ephesians4:12 olw'okutereeza obulamu bw'abatuukirivu basobole okukola omulimu gw'okuweereza n'okuzimba Omubiri gwa Kristu," 
Ephesians4:13 okutuusa ffenna awamu lwe tulifuuka omu mu kukkiriza ne mu kumanya Omwana wa Katonda, tutuuke ku kubeera omuntu omu atuukiridde, ne ku kwenkanankana Kristu mu bujjuvu bw'obukulu bwe;" 
Ephesians4:14 tuleme kubeera baana bato abeekubiira eno n'eri, abayuuyizibwa buli muyaga gwa njigiriza, n'abantu abakwenyakwenya n'obukodyo bwabwe obuwubisa." 
Ephesians4:15 Naye mu kwogera amazima mu kwagala tujja kugenda nga tukula mu buli ngeri nga tufuukamu oyo omutwe gwaffe, Kristu;" 
Ephesians4:16 mu ye omubiri gwonna mwe gugattirwa awamu ne gweyunga bulungi mu buli nnyingo eziguliisa, ate buli kitundu bwe kiba nga kikola bulungi, ne zigukuza, ne ziguwa zityo okugenda nga gwezimba mu kwagala." 
Ephesians4:17 Kale nno mbagamba, era ndayidde n'Omukama, temwongera kuyisa ng'ab'amawanga bwe bayisa mu ndowooza yaabwe etayamba." 
Ephesians4:18 Bakutte enzikiza mu ntegeera yaabwe; beesuubye obulamu bwa Katonda olw'obutamanya obubalimu, kubanga baagugubya emitima gyabwe." 
Ephesians4:19 Bafuuse bakakanyavu, bagwenyuse, balulunkanira buli ngeri ya bugwagwa." 
Ephesians4:20 Naye mmwe Kristu si bwe mwamuyiga mutyo. 
Ephesians4:21 Ndowooza nga mwamuwulirako era nga mwamuyigirizibwako, ng'amazima bwe gali mu Kristu." 
Ephesians4:22 Mweyambule nno omuntu omukadde ow'enneeyisa ey'edda, eyali ayonoonese olw'okugoberera amaddu agaamukwenyakwenyanga," 
Ephesians4:23 mudde buggya munda mu mutima gwammwe. 
Ephesians4:24 Mwambale omuntu omuggya eyatondebwa mu nfaanana ya Katonda mu butuufu ne mu butuukirivu obw'amazima. 
Ephesians4:25 Awo nno mulekere awo okulimbagana, buli omu abuulire munne amazima, anti tuli buli omu bitundu bya munne." 
Ephesians4:26 Musunguwale, kyokka temukola ekibi; temusuulanga njuba nga mukyasibye obusungu," 
Ephesians4:27 bwe mutyo ne mutawa Sitaani kyekwaso. 
Ephesians4:28 Abadde abba, alekere awo; wabula akabassane ng'akola emirimu emirungi n'emikono gye, afune bw'atyo kw'aggya okuyamba eyeetaaga." 
Ephesians4:29 Ebigambo ebibi tebifulumanga mu kamwa kammwe, wabula ebyo ebirungi, ebizimba, ebigwanira we bijjira, ebiyamba oyo abiwulira." 
Ephesians4:30 Temunakuwazanga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu wa Katonda nnyini kabonero akaabalambibwako olw'okubeera olunaku olw'okununulibwa. 
Ephesians4:31 Mu mmwe mubuliremu ddala akadubudubu, ennyiike, obusungu, okukaalaama, okuvuma, na buli ttima lyonna." 
Ephesians4:32 Buli omu abeere wa kisa eri munne, musaasiragane, musonyiwagane nga Katonda bwe yabasonyiwa mu Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Nga bwe muli abaana ba Katonda abaagalwa, mumufaanane." 
Ephesians5:2 Mutambulire mu kwagala nga mulabira ku Kristu nga bwe yatwagala ne yeewaayo okubeera ffe ng'ekitambiro kye yatambirira Katonda ekiwunya akawoowo ak'akaloosa. 
Ephesians5:3 Nga bwe kigwanira abatuukirivu, mu mmwe temumenyerwangamu bwenzi, buseegu n'okululunkanira ebintu." 
Ephesians5:4 Eby'ensonyi, okunyumya eby'obusiru, n'okubalaata, ebyo tebibagwanidde, wabula mu mmwe mubeeremu kwebaza." 
Ephesians5:5 Kino mukitegeere nti teri museegu yenna, oba mugwagwa, oba alulunkanira ebintu, kwe kugamba nti oyo asinza balubaale, alina busika mu bwakabaka bwa Kristu n'obwa Katonda." 
Ephesians5:6 Tebabaguyanga n'ebigambo ebitaliimu; ebintu ng'ebyo bye bireetera Katonda okusunguwalira abajeemu. 
Ephesians5:7 Muleke nno kwetaba nabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Anti edda luli mwali nzikiza nsa, sso kati muli kitangaala mu Mukama; muyise nno ng'abaana b'ekitangaala." 
Ephesians5:9 Anti ebibala by'ekitangaala birabikira mu bulungi bwonna, n'obutuufu, n'amazima." 
Ephesians5:10 Mufube okumanya ekisanyusa Omukama. 
Ephesians5:11 Ebikolwa eby'omu nzikiza ebyo omutali mugaso muleme kubyetabikamu; wabula ate mubyatuukirize bwatuukiriza. 
Ephesians5:12 Mazima bye bakola eyo mu nkiso bikwasa n'ensonyi okwogera. 
Ephesians5:13 Buli kyonna ekitangaala kye kikubako kyerulibwa, buli kyeruddwa kifuuka kitangaala." 
Ephesians5:14 Kyebava bagamba nti: “Zuukuka, ggwe eyeebase, zuukira mu bafu, Kristu ajja kukumulisa.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kale nno, abooluganda, mwegendereze engeri gye mutambulamu, si ng'abasiru, wabula ng'abagezi" 
Ephesians5:16 abamanyi okuggya omugaso mu budde buno, anti obudde bwe tulimu bubi." 
Ephesians5:17 Kale nno temuba basiru, wabula mutegeere Omukama ky'ayagala." 
Ephesians5:18 Muleke na kutamiira mwenge, kubanga obwo busaasaanyi, wabula mujjule Mwoyo Mutuukirivu." 
Ephesians5:19 Mwogeraganyenga mu zabbuli, amatendo n'ennyimba entukuvu, nga muyimba, nga mutendereza Omukama n'omutima gwammwe gwonna," 
Ephesians5:20 Katonda Taata nga mumwebaza byonna bulijjo na buli wantu mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu. 
Ephesians5:21 Buli omu agonderenga munne mu kutya Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Abakazi mugonderenga babbammwe nga bwe mugondera Omukama. 
Ephesians5:23 Kubanga omusajja gwe mutwe gw'omukazi nga Kristu bw'ali omutwe gw'Ekleziya, omubiri gwe era yennyini Omulokozi waagwo." 
Ephesians5:24 Era ng'Ekleziya bw'agondera Kristu, n'abakazi bwe batyo bagonderenga babbaabwe mu byonna." 
Ephesians5:25 Abasajja, mwagalenga bakazi bammwe, nga Kristu bwe yayagala Ekleziya ne yeewaayo okubeera ye," 
Ephesians5:26 alyoke amutukuze ng'amulongoosa mu kunaazibwa mu mazzi n'ekigambo," 
Ephesians5:27 alyoke mu kitiibwa yessizzeewo mu maaso ge Ekleziya ataliiko musango na lukanyanya newandibadde akantu akalala ak'engeri eyo, alyoke abeere mutukuvu nga taliiko kasobye." 
Ephesians5:28 N'abasajja bwe balagirwa okwagalanga bwe batyo bakazi baabwe kyenkana ng'emibiri gyabwe gyennyini. Anti ayagala mukazi we nga yeeyagadde yennyini. 
Ephesians5:29 Kubanga tewabanga akyawa mubiri gwe, naye aguliisa, n'agulabirira, nga Kristu bw'alyowa Ekleziya," 
Ephesians5:30 Kubanga tuli bitundu bya mubiri gwe. 
Ephesians5:31 Olw'ekyo omusajja kyaliva alirekanga kitaawe ne nnyina, ne yeegatta ku mukazi we; ababiri balifuuka omubiri gumu." 
Ephesians5:32 Ekyama kino kikulu, nze mu kyo ntegeezaamu Kristu n'Ekleziya." 
Ephesians5:33 Kale buli muntu mu mmwe ayagalenga mukazi we nga ye bwe yeeyagala yennyini, n'omukazi atyenga bba." 
Ephesians6:1 Mmwe abaana, muwulirenga bazadde bammwe mu Mukama; kubanga kino kituufu." 
Ephesians6:2 “Ossangamu kitaawo ne nnyoko ekitiibwa,” kye kiragiro ekisooka okubaako ekisuubizo:" 
Ephesians6:3 “Lw'onooba obulungi n'owangaala ku nsi.” 
Ephesians6:4 Nammwe abazadde mulekenga kunyiiza baana bammwe, naye mubagunjulenga mu mpisa ennungi ne mu bibuuliriro by'Omukama." 
Ephesians6:5 Mmwe abaddu, nga bwe muwulira Kristu, bwe muba muwuliranga ne bakama bammwe ab'oku nsi, mu kutya ne mu kukankana, nga temussaamu kantu;" 
Ephesians6:6 si lwa kulabibwa kyokka, kyenkana ng'abanoonya okutendebwa abantu, wabula nga bwe muli baweereza ba Kristu, mukole Katonda ky'ayagala n'omutima gwonna." 
Ephesians6:7 Muweerezenga nga mwagala ng'abaweereza Omukama, sso si abantu obuntu," 
Ephesians6:8 nga mumanyi nti buli omu, oba muddu oba si muddu, buli ky'aliba akoze empeera yaakyo aligifuna okuva ew'Omukama." 
Ephesians6:9 Nammwe bakama baabwe, abaweereza mubayisenga mu ngeri ye emu; muleke kubawerera, nga mumanyi nti Mukama waabwe era owammwe ali mu ggulu era ye taliimu kusosola." 
Ephesians6:10 Ekisembayo, mubeerenga ba maanyi mu Mukama n'obuyinza bw'amaanyi ge." 
Ephesians6:11 Mwambalenga mubune ebyokulwanyisa ebya Katonda, musobole okuziyiza obukodyo bwa Sitaani." 
Ephesians6:12 Kubanga tetulwanyisa mubiri na musaayi, naye tulwanyisa abakungu n'ab'obuyinza, tulwanyisa abafuga ensi ey'enzikiza eno, tulwanyisa emyoyo emibi egy'eyo waggulu." 
Ephesians6:13 Kale nno mukwatenga ebyokulwanyisa bya Katonda, lwe munaasobola okutala ku lunaku olw'akabi, nga mumaze okukola kyonna ekisoboka, musigale nga muli banywevu." 
Ephesians6:14 Muyimirirenga nno, nga mwesibye ebimyu, ge mazima, nga mwambadde n'ekizibawo eky'ekyuma, bwe butuukirivu," 
Ephesians6:15 nga munaanise n'engatto mu bigere okwetegekera okulangirira Evangili ey'eddembe. 
Ephesians6:16 Okusinga byonna, nga mukutte engabo, kwe kukkiriza, gye muneeyamba okuzikiza obusaale bw'omubi obwengeredde ng'omuliro." 
Ephesians6:17 Mukwate n'enkufiira eŋŋumu ey'obulokofu, n'ekitala ekya Mwoyo, kye kigambo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians6:18 Mwegayirirenga ebbanga lyonna mu Mwoyo, nga muweereza essaala n'okuwanjaga. Olwa kino temukoowa kutunula nga musabira abatuukirivu," 
Ephesians6:19 nange nga munsabira nfune ebigambo, njasamye akamwa kange n'obuvumu okumanyisa ekyama ky'Evangili" 
Ephesians6:20 gye natumirwa eno mu nvuba ng'omubaka, ngirangirire nga bwe nteekeddwa okwogera." 
Ephesians6:21 Nammwe okumanya bwe ndi ne bye nkola, ebyo byonna Tukiko owooluganda omwagalwa, omuweereza omwesigwa mu Mukama, anaabibabuulira." 
Ephesians6:22 Mmubasindikidde lwa nsonga eno, mumanye nga bwe tuli era abagumye emitima." 
Ephesians6:23 Eddembe, okwagala n'okukkiriza okuva ewa Katonda Taata n'Omukama Yezu Kristu bibeere n'abooluganda." 
Ephesians6:24 Eneema ebeere n'abo bonna abaagala Omukama Yezu Kristu n'okwagala okutagooka. 
Philippians1:1 Pawulo ne Timotewo, abaweereza ba Kristu Yezu. Ya batuukirivu bonna mu Kristu Yezu abali e Filippi, wamu n'abalabirizi n'abadyakoni." 
Philippians1:2 Eneema ebeere nammwe, ko n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Kitaffe n'ew'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians1:3 Neebaza Katonda wange buli lwe mbajjukira 
Philippians1:4 bulijjo mu ssaala zange zonna nga mbasabira mwenna, ne nsaba nga nnina essanyu," 
Philippians1:5 nga neebaza olw'okukwatira awamu omulimu gw'Evangili okuva olubereberye n'okutuusa kati. 
Philippians1:6 Era neesigira ddala nti eyatandika mu mmwe omulimu omulungi, ajja kugutuusa ku kumalirizibwa ku lunaku lwa Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians1:7 Kituufu nze mwenna okubateebeza ntyo, kubanga mundi ku mutima, kubanga mwagabana ku neema gye nafuna, ku busibe bwange ne ku kutaasa n'okukakasa Evangili." 
Philippians1:8 Katonda anjulira nga bwe mbalumirwa omwoyo mwenna n'okwagala kwa Kristu Yezu. 
Philippians1:9 Kino kye nsaba, nti okwagala kwammwe kweyongerenga bulijjo, ko n'okumanya n'okutegeera," 
Philippians1:10 mulyoke mulondengawo ebisinga obulungi, era mubeere batukuvu abataliiko musango ku luli Kristu lw'alijja," 
Philippians1:11 nga mujjudde ebibala nkumu eby'obutuukirivu ebiyita mu Yezu Kristu ku lw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda n'ettendo lye. 
Philippians1:12 Nandyagadde mumanye, abooluganda, nti ebyo ebintuuseeko byongedde bwongezi Vangili kugenda mu maaso." 
Philippians1:13 Era kati wonna mu Purayitoriyo n'awalala wonna, bategedde nti ndi mu nvuba lwa Kristu." 
Philippians1:14 Ate abasinga obungi mu booluganda, nze olw'okubeera mu nvuba, beeyongedde bweyongezi kuguma, era kati bayigiriza n'obuvumu obusingawo ekigambo kya Katonda okusinga luli, nga tebaliimu kutya." 
Philippians1:15 Abamu okuyigiriza batyo Kristu bakikoza buggya na kuluubirira; naye abalala bakikoza mutima mulungi. 
Philippians1:16 Bano bakikoza kwagala, nga balaba ndi wano lwa kutaasa Vangili," 
Philippians1:17 naye bali bayigiriza Kristu lwa kuluubirira, si na mutima mulambulukufu, wabula bagenderera kunnumya mu nvuba ze nnimu." 
Philippians1:18 Ye ddala kiki? Mu buli ngeri, oba oli yeekoza bwekoza oba akolera ddala mu mazima, Kristu y'aba ayigirizibwa, ekyo kye nsanyukira." 
Philippians1:19 Ddala nzija kwongera okusanyuka, kubanga mmanyi ng'olw'essaala zammwe n'okuyambibwa Mwoyo wa Yezu Kristu kino kijja kunviiramu obulokofu." 
Philippians1:20 Kino kye nninda n'amaddu era kye nsuubira, nti sijja kuswala n'akatono, wabula nti ku mulundi guno Kristu anaagulumizibwa n'obuvumu bwonna mu mubiri gwange nga bulijjo, mu bulamu oba mu kufa." 
Philippians1:21 Anti ku nze, obulamu ye Kristu, ate okufa gaba magoba." 
Philippians1:22 Naye nno ate oba nze okusigala nga nkyali mulamu mu mubiri kiwa omulimu gwange okubaako kye gugasa, olwo simanyi kye nnondawo." 
Philippians1:23 Nkwatiddwa ku njuyi zombi; neegomba nsomoke, mbeere ne Kristu, ekyo kye kisinga obulungi." 
Philippians1:24 Naye ate okugira nga nkyali mulamu mu mubiri ku lwammwe kye kisinga okwetaagibwa. 
Philippians1:25 Mmanyi era nkakasa nga nzija kugira nga nkyaliwo nammwe mwenna, musobole okweyongera era n'okwesiimira mu kukkiriza kwammwe," 
Philippians1:26 mweyongere okwetendera mu Kristu Yezu ku lwange bwe ndikomawo gye muli omulundi omulala. 
Philippians1:27 Kyokka muyise mu ngeri esaanidde Evangili ya Kristu, oba nga nzize ne mbalaba oba nga siri eyo, mbeere nga mpulira nga bwe muli abanywevu, ab'omwoyo ogumu n'emmeeme emu, nga muteganira wamu olw'okukkiriza kw'Evangili." 
Philippians1:28 Ababalumba baleme kubatiisa n'akatono; obwo bukakafu obuva ewa Katonda nti abo bazikiridde ate nga mmwe mulokoddwa. 
Philippians1:29 Mmwe mwaweebwa nti ku lwa Kristu muleme kukkiriza kyokka, naye n'okubonaabona muboneebone olw'okubeera ye." 
Philippians1:30 Muli ku lutalo lwe lumu nange lwe mwandaba ndiko era lwe mukyampulirako. 
Philippians2:1 Obanga mu Kristu mulimu ekiyinza okubagumya, ekibasindika okwagala, okussa ekimu mu Mwoyo, okwagalana n'okulumirwagana," 
Philippians2:2 mujjuulirize essanyu lyange nga muba n'endowooza emu, n'okwagala kumu, emmeeme emu n'omutima gumu." 
Philippians2:3 Mubuleko kye mukola nga kiva mu kwelowoozaako ne mu kwepanka; wabula mu bwetoowaze, buli omu atwale abalala nti be bamusinga." 
Philippians2:4 Buli omu abeere nga tafa ku bibye yekka, wabula ne ku by'abalala." 
Philippians2:5 Mu mmwe mubeere ba ndowooza ng'eyali mu Kristu Yezu: 
Philippians2:6 Oyo newandibadde nga mu ndabika yali Katonda, eky'okuba ekyenkanyi ne Katonda teyakiremerako," 
Philippians2:7 wabula yeemaliramu ddala, n'afaanana omuddu, n'afuuka ng'abantu bwe baba." 
Philippians2:8 Ng'amaze okufaanana abantu, yeetoowaza, n'awulira okutuusa okufa, okufa nno ku musaalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Ne Katonda kyeyava amusukkulumya, n'amuwa n'erinnya erikira amannya gonna," 
Philippians2:10 awali erinnya lya Yezu byonna bifukamirenga, eby'omu ggulu, eby'omu nsi n'ebiri wansi w'ensi," 
Philippians2:11 buli lulimi lwatulenga nti Yezu Kristu Mukama, Katonda Taata afune ekitiibwa." 
Philippians2:12 Kale nno, bannange abaagalwa, nga bwe mubadde abawulize bulijjo, si nga ndi eyo kyokka, naye kaakano n'okusingawo nga siri eyo, mufaabiinire okulokoka kwammwe mu kutya n'okukankana." 
Philippians2:13 Anti Katonda y'akola mu mmwe n'abawa okwagala n'okukola olw'ekyo kye yeeteesa mu kwagala kwe. 
Philippians2:14 Byonna mubikolenga awatali kwemulugunya na kulonzalonza," 
Philippians2:15 mubuleko kye babavunaana, nga temuliiko musango, muli baana ba Katonda abalungi, abataliiko bbala wakati mu bantu be mulimu, ezzadde ekkyamu eryonoonefu, mwe mwakaayakanira ng'ettawaaza mu nsi," 
Philippians2:16 nga munyweza ekigambo ky'obulamu. Olwo ku lunaku lwa Kristu, ndiba ne kye neetenderamu nti embiro sadduka za bwereere, saakolera busa." 
Philippians2:17 Ne bwe nnaaba mpeerezeddwayo ng'ekitone eky'okuyiwa ekigattiddwa ku kitambiro kyammwe n'ebitone eby'okukkiriza kwammwe, nandisanyuse ne njaganya nammwe mwenna." 
Philippians2:18 Nammwe era mwandisanyuse ne mujaganya nange. 
Philippians2:19 Nsuubira mu Mukama Yezu okusindika amangu Timotewo ajje eyo nziremu omwoyo nga ntegedde ebibafaako. 
Philippians2:20 Anti sirina mulala wano asobola kulumirwa ddala bibakwatako ng'oyo. 
Philippians2:21 Abalala bonna beenoonyeza byabwe, si ebyo ebya Yezu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Naye ono mmumanyi bulungi bw'afaanana, nga bwe yaweerezanga nange Evangili ng'omwana akola ne kitaawe." 
Philippians2:23 Ono nno nsuubira okumusindika amangu gye muli bwe nnaamala okulaba ebyange wano nga bwe bigenda. 
Philippians2:24 Nange neesize Omukama nti sijja kulwa kujja gye muli. 
Philippians2:25 Ndabye nga kyetaagisa okusindika amangu gye muli Epafuradito, owooluganda, bwe tukola, mutabaazi munnange, omubaka wammwe ate omuweereza mu bwetaavu bwange." 
Philippians2:26 Abadde abalumirwa mwenna omwoyo, era mweraliikirivu kubanga mwawulira bwe yali omulwadde." 
Philippians2:27 Kituufu, yalwala era kumpi kufa; kyokka Katonda yamusaasira; si ye yekka, nange yansaasira, anti nandiyimbye ennaku ku nnaku." 
Philippians2:28 Nfubye nnyo okulaba ng'oyo mmusindika mumulabeko, muddemu okusanyuka, nange nkendeeze ku kweraliikirira." 
Philippians2:29 Mumwanirize n'essanyu lyonna mu Mukama; abafaanana ng'oyo mubassengamu ekitiibwa. 
Philippians2:30 Yabula kata afe olw'okubeera omulimu gwa Kristu. Obulamu bwe yabussa mu kabi amalirize ebyali bikyabula ku bye mwali munkolera. 
Philippians3:1 Ekisembayo, baganda bange, musanyuke mu Mukama. Ebimu okuddamu okubibawandiikira, tekinkooya, ate nammwe kibayamba okuba n'emirembe." 
Philippians3:2 Mwerinde embwa, mwerinde abakozi b'obubi, mwerinde abakomola." 
Philippians3:3 Ffe batayirire aba nnamaddala, ffe abasinza Katonda mu Mwoyo, abeetendera mu Kristu Yezu, obwesige bwaffe obutatuli mu mubiri." 
Philippians3:4 Sso nze nandisobodde okwesiga omubiri. Oba waliwo alina ekimwesiza omubiri, nze nandibadde n'okwesiga okusingawo:" 
Philippians3:5 anti nze natayirirwa ku lunaku olwomunaana, ndi wa mu ggwanga lya Yisirayeli, wa mu kika kya Benyamiini, ndi Mwebureeyi eyazaalibwa Abeebureeyi, mu by'amateeka nali Mufarisaayo," 
Philippians3:6 ate ng'omutakabanyi, nayigganya Ekleziya; ku bikwata ku butuukirivu obw'omu Tteeka, siriiko kinvunaanibwa." 
Philippians3:7 Naye olw'okubeera Kristu, ebyo bye nayitanga amagoba, kati ndaba nga kwali kufiirwa." 
Philippians3:8 Ddala ddala ndaba nga kwali kufiirwa olw'ekigambo eky'okumanya Kristu Yezu Mukama wange ekitenkanika. Olw'okubeera ye byonna nabifiirwa; byonna mbiyita bisasiro ndyoke neewangulire Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 mbeere mu ye, nga sirina butuukirivu bwange ku bwange obuva mu Tteeka, wabula obwo obuva mu kukkiriza Kristu, obutuukirivu obuva ewa Katonda olw'okukkiriza." 
Philippians3:10 Njagala mmumanye, mmanye n'amaanyi agali mu kuzuukira kwe, ngabane ne ku kubonaabona kwe, mmufaanane mu kufa kwe," 
Philippians3:11 nange singa kisoboka ntuuke ku kuzuukira mu bafu. 
Philippians3:12 Si kwe kugamba nti kino nkifunye, oba nti ntuukiridde. Nedda, nnyongera bwongezi kufuba nkikwate nga Kristu Yezu bwe yankwata." 
Philippians3:13 Abooluganda, sigamba nti mmaze okukikwata, wabula kimu kyokka kye nkola: ebyangwa enkoto mbyerabidde, nduubirira bino ebindi mu maaso;" 
Philippians3:14 nfaabiina ntuuke ku mpeera ey'obuwanguzi, kwe kuyitibwa okwa waggulu Katonda kwe yatuyitira mu Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians3:15 Ffe ffenna ababalirwa mu bakuze ebirowoozo ogwo gwe mutima gwe tusaanye okuba nagwo. Oba waliwo kye mutalinaako mutima gutyo, Katonda ekyo ajja kukibabikkulira." 
Philippians3:16 Wabula kimu kyokka: tunywerere ku ekyo kye twafunye. 
Philippians3:17 Abooluganda, mubeere kimu mu kundabirako, era mulabire ku abo abayisa nga bwe twabawa ekyokulabirako." 
Philippians3:18 Kubanga abangi mu abo be nababuulirako emirundi emingi, era kati be mbabuulira nga nkaaba n'okukaaba, engeri gye bayisaamu ya balabe ba musaalaba gwa Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Enkomerero yaabwe kuzikirira; katonda waabwe lwe lubuto, ettendo lyabwe liri mu bibaswaza, n'ebirowoozo byabwe biggweeredde ku bya nsi." 
Philippians3:20 Sso ffe obutaka bwaffe buli mu ggulu, tulindirira nti Omulokozi gy'anaava, Omukama Yezu Kristu," 
Philippians3:21 oyo alifuula omubiri gwaffe guno ogutalina bwe guli n'agufaananya omubiri gwe ogw'ekitiibwa nga yeeyamba obuyinza obumusobozesa byonna okubissa wansi we. 
Philippians4:1 Kale nno, baganda bange abaagalwa, abannumya omwoyo, essanyu lyange, engule yange, munywerere mu Mukama, abaagalwa." 
Philippians4:2 Neegayirira Ewodiya, neegayirira ne Suntuke, bakkaanye mu Mukama." 
Philippians4:3 Nsaba naawe munnange omwesigwa bwe tukola omulimu, abakyala abo obayambe, kubanga twakolanga ffenna ku lw'Evangili wamu ne Kulementi ne bakozi bannaffe abalala amannya gaabwe agaawandiikibwa edda mu kitabo ky'obulamu." 
Philippians4:4 Musanyuke mu Mukama bulijjo; nziramu okubagamba: musanyuke. 
Philippians4:5 Abantu bonna balabe obuteefu bwammwe. Omukama ali kumpi. 
Philippians4:6 Temubaako kye mweraliikirira n'akatono, naye mu buli kintu bye mwetaaga mubyanjulirenga Katonda nga mwegayirira awamu n'okwebaza." 
Philippians4:7 Olwo eddembe lya Katonda erisukkiridde buli kutegeera, linaakuumanga emitima gyammwe n'emyoyo gyammwe mu Kristu Yezu." 
Philippians4:8 Ekisembayo, abooluganda, buli kya mazima, buli kya kitiibwa, buli kituufu, buli kitukuvu, buli kyegombebwa, buli kyogerwako obulungi, oba waliyo empisa ennungi, oba ekiweesa ettendo, ebyo bye muba mulowoozaako." 
Philippians4:9 Bye mwayiga ne mukwata, bye mwawulira ne bye mwalaba ku nze bye muba mukola, olwo Katonda ow'emirembe ajja kubeera nammwe." 
Philippians4:10 Nasanyuka nnyo mu Mukama okulaba nga muzzeemu buto okunnumirwa; mubadde ggwe wamma munnumirwa, naye nga mukyabuliddwa akadde." 
Philippians4:11 Obubulwa si bwe bunjogeza, kubanga nze nayiga okuba omumativu mu buli mbeera:" 
Philippians4:12 okudooba nkumanyi n'okuba n'ebingi nkumanyi; natendekebwa mu buli mbeera na mu buli kintu: okuba omukkufu n'okugenda enjala, okuba n'ebingi n'okuwamma." 
Philippians4:13 Byonna nnyinza okubisobola mu oyo ampa amaanyi. 
Philippians4:14 Ggwe wamma mwakola bulungi okuba nange mu nnaku zange. 
Philippians4:15 Mmwe mwennyini ab'e Filippi, mumanyi nga bwe nali nva e Masedoniya, luli nga naakatandika okuyigiriza Evangili, mpaawo Ekleziya ndala n'emu bwe twakolagana ebeeko k'empa nange mbeeko ke nfuna, wabula mmwe mwekka." 
Philippians4:16 Ne bwe nali e Tessalonika mwanziruukirira ogwasooka n'ogwokubiri. 
Philippians4:17 Eky'okumpa si kye nnoonya; wabula nnoonya magoba ageeyongera ku bugagga bwammwe. 
Philippians4:18 Leero nnina byonna, biyitiridde n'okuyitirira; nzijudde oluvannyuma lw'okufuna okuva ku Epafurodito ebintu bye mwampeereza; byali akawoowo ak'akaloosa, ekitambiro ekisanyusa Katonda." 
Philippians4:19 Katonda wange alibajjuza na byonna bye mwetaaga ng'asinziira ku bugagga bw'ekitiibwa kye mu Kristu Yezu. 
Philippians4:20 Katonda waffe era Taata agulumizibwe emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
Philippians4:21 Mundabire buli mutuukirivu mu Kristu Yezu. Abooluganda bwe tuli eno babatumidde. 
Philippians4:22 Abatuukirivu bonna babatumidde, naddala eb'ennyumba ya Kayisari." 
Philippians4:23 Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeere n'omwoyo gwammwe. 
Colossians1:1 Pawulo, Omutume wa Kristu Yezu olw'okusiima kwa Katonda, ne Timotewo owooluganda." 
Colossians1:2 Ya batuukirivu era abooluganda abakkiriza Yezu Kristu abali e Kolossi. Eneema ebeere nammwe ko n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Kitaffe. 
Colossians1:3 Bulijjo twebaza Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, buli lwe tubasabira," 
Colossians1:4 Kubanga twawulira ku kukkiriza kwammwe kwe mulina mu Yezu Kristu, n'okwagala kwe mulina ku batuukirivu bonna," 
Colossians1:5 olw'okubeera essuubi eribategekeddwa mu ggulu. Ebyo mwabiwulirako mu kigambo eky'amazima, ye Vangili," 
Colossians1:6 eyabatuukako, nga bwe yatuuka mu nsi yonna, n'ebala ebibala n'okutinta nnyini. Bwe kyali n'ewammwe okuva ku luli lwe mwayiga ne mutegeera eneema ya Katonda mu mazima," 
Colossians1:7 nga bwe mwagiyiga okuva ku Epafura muweereza munnaffe omwagalwa, eyakola mu kifo kyange n'obwesige, ng'omuweereza wa Kristu." 
Colossians1:8 Ye yatutegeeza ku kwagala kwe mulina mu Mwoyo. 
Colossians1:9 Kale nno okuva lwe twawulira, tetutadde kwegayirira nga tubasabira Katonda abajjuze okumanya ky'ayagala mu buli magezi n'okutegeera eby'omwoyo," 
Colossians1:10 mulyoke muyise nga bwe kisaanidde Omukama, nga mumusanyusa mu byonna; mubale ebibala mu buli mulimu mulungi, mukule mu kumanya Katonda;" 
Colossians1:11 mugumizibwe n'amaanyi gonna ag'obuyinza bwe obw'ekitiibwa, musobole okugumiikiriza byonna n'essanyu nga temwekaanya," 
Colossians1:12 nga mwebaza Katonda Taata olw'okutugwanyiza okugabana ku busika bw'abatuukirivu abali mu kitangaala," 
Colossians1:13 oyo eyatuggya mu buyinza bw'ekizikiza n'atuteeka mu bwakabaka bw'Omwana we omwagalwa," 
Colossians1:14 mu ye mwe twanunulirwa, kye kisonyiwo ky'ebibi byaffe." 
Colossians1:15 Ye kye kifaananyi kya Katonda atalabika; omuggulanda mu bitonde byonna; 
Colossians1:16 anti mu ye byonna mwe byatonderwa, ebiri mu ggulu n'ebiri mu nsi, ebirabika n'ebitalabika, ne nnamulondo, abafuzi, abakungu n'ab'obuyinza; byonna byatondebwa mu ye era ku lulwe." 
Colossians1:17 Ye yasooka byonna; mu ye byonna mwe binywerera awamu. 
Colossians1:18 Ye gwe mutwe gw'omubiri, Ekleziya; ye ge masooka, omuggulanda mu baafa, mu byonna abeere omubereberye." 
Colossians1:19 Mu ye obujjuvu bwa Katonda bwonna mwe bwasiima okubeera; 
Colossians1:20 ayite mu ye byonna okubitabaganya naye, ebiri mu nsi n'ebiri mu ggulu, ng'azzaawo emirembe n'omusaayi ogw'oku musaalaba gwe." 
Colossians1:21 Nammwe edda mwali mubooleddwa, nga mu mutima muli balabe olw'ebikolwa ebibi bye mwakolanga." 
Colossians1:22 Naye kati mu kufa kwe abatabaganyizza nga yeeyamba omubiri gwe ogufa, alyoke abanjuleyo nga muli batukuvu, temuliiko bbala, yadde ekibavunaanibwa mu maaso ge," 
Colossians1:23 kasita musigala mu kukkiriza, nga muli banywevu, temusagaasagana, nga tewali kibaggya ku ssuubi lye mwafuna mu Vangili gye mwawulira, ebuuliddwa buli kitonde ekiri wansi w'eggulu, era nze Pawulo gye nafuuka omuweereza waayo." 
Colossians1:24 Na kati nsanyukira mu nnaku ze ndaba olw'okubeera mmwe; bwe ntyo mu mubiri gwange ne mmaliriza ebikyabula ku kubonaabona kwa Kristu kwe yabonaabonamu olw'okubeera omubiri gwe, ye Ekleziya." 
Colossians1:25 Anti nafuulibwa muweereza w'Ekleziya olw'omulimu Katonda gwe yankwasa ku lwammwe ogw'okumanyisa mu bujjuvu ekigambo kya Katonda; 
Colossians1:26 kye kyama ekibadde ekikise ebiro n'amazadde, naye kati ekibikkuliddwa abatuukirivu be." 
Colossians1:27 Katonda yayagala okubamanyisa ng'ekyama kino bwe kiri ekigagga era eky'ekitiibwa mu ab'amawanga, ye Kristu mu mmwe, essuubi ery'ekitiibwa." 
Colossians1:28 Oyo gwe tulangirira, nga tukoma ku buli muntu, nga tuyigiriza buli muntu n'amagezi gonna, tulyoke buli omu tumwanjule nga mutuufu atuukiridde mu Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Ekyo kye nteganako, ne nfuba nga bw'annyamba n'amaanyi ge agakola mu nze n'obuyinza." 
Colossians2:1 Ggwe wamma njagala mumanye nga bwe mbalafuubanidde, mmwe n'ab'e Lawodikeya, n'abalala bonna abatandabangako," 
Colossians2:2 emitima mu bo gikubagizibwe, nga bayungiddwa wamu mu kwagala, batuuke ku kwagala obugagga bwonna obuva mu kubeera n'okutegeera okukakafu, basobole okumanya ekyama kya Katonda, ekya Kristu," 
Colossians2:3 omukwekeddwa enkuluze zonna ez'amagezi n'okumanya. 
Colossians2:4 Kino nkyogedde waleme kubaawo abalimbalimba n'akalimi akawoomerevu. 
Colossians2:5 Nandibadde siri eyo mu mubiri, naye mu mwoyo ndi wamu nammwe, era ndi musanyufu nga ndaba okukkiriza kwammwe mu Kristu bwe kuteredde ne bwe kuli okunywevu." 
Colossians2:6 Nga bwe mwafuna Kristu Yezu Omukama, awo nno mutambulirenga mu ye." 
Colossians2:7 Mu ye mwe muba musimba emirandira; ku ye kwe muba muzimbibwa, nga muli bakakafu mu kukkiriza kwe mwayigirizibwa, nga mujjudde mu buyitirivu okwebaza." 
Colossians2:8 Mwekkaanye, tewabaawo abezza nga yeeyamba ebya filozofiya n'obulimba omutali kantu ebisimbye ku mpisa z'abantu obuntu ne ku bintu ensi mwe yakolebwa, ebitasimbye ku Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Kubanga mu ye obwakatonda obujjuvu mwe buli mu mubiri; 
Colossians2:10 nammwe mu ye mwe mwatuukira ku bujjuvu bw'obulamu, oyo omutwe ogwa buli bufuzi bwonna n'obuyinza." 
Colossians2:11 Mu ye mwe mwatayiririrwa, si n'okutayirirwa okwakolebwa engalo, wabula nga mweggyako omubiri ogw'ennyama mu kutayirirwa okwa Kristu," 
Colossians2:12 ne muziikibwa wamu naye mu batismu, mwe mwazuukizibwa awamu naye mu kukkiriza kwe mwakkirizaamu amaanyi ga Katonda, oyo eyamuzuukiza mu bafu." 
Colossians2:13 Nammwe abaali abafu olw'ebibi n'olw'obutaba batayirire, Katonda yabazuukiza wamu ne Kristu, ffenna n'atusonyiwa ebibi byaffe." 
Colossians2:14 Yasazaamu ekiwandiiko ky'ebbanja ekyatukotoggeranga n'etteeka lyakyo; yakiggyawo ng'akikomerera ku musaalaba. 
Colossians2:15 Abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza yabambula ebyokulwanyisa n'abaswaza mu lujjudde, ng'abawangulira mu ye." 
Colossians2:16 Kale nno waleme kubaawo n'omu abanenya ku bikwata ku mmere oba yadde ku byokunywa, oba ku bidda ku mbaga enkulu, oba ku kuboneka kw'omwezi ne sabbaato." 
Colossians2:17 Ebyo kisiikirize busiikirize ekya kiri eky'okujja; ekituufu kyennyini kya Kristu. 
Colossians2:18 Tewabangawo abalyazaamaanya buwanguzi bwammwe, oyo ayeerimbika ku kwefeebya n'okusinza bamalayika, alowooleza mu kulabikirwa, ayeewaga awatali nsonga olw'endowooza ye ey'obuntu obuntu." 
Colossians2:19 Oyo tanyweredde ku Mutwe; sso omutwe gwe gusakirira omubiri nga guyita mu nnyingo n'ebinywa, olwo omubiri ne gusobola okukula nga Katonda y'agukuza." 
Colossians2:20 Ate oba olw'okufa awamu ne Kristu ebintu ensi mwe yakolebwa mwabibeerera bafu, lwaki nno mweyisa ng'abakyali ab'ensi? Lwaki mukyagondera by'eragira:" 
Colossians2:21 “Temukwatako, temulyako, temukomako,”" 
Colossians2:22 okusinziira ku mateeka n'enjigiriza eby'abantu? Bye boogerako nno byonna ebyo bintu ebiggwaawo nga bakyabyeyamba. 
Colossians2:23 Eby'engeri eyo bigenda ne birabika ng'omuli amagezi mu nsoma ey'okwekakamula, okwefeebya n'okukangavvula omubiri, naye tebirina kye bigasa ku kukoma ku masanyu g'omubiri." 
Colossians3:1 Kale nno, oba mwazuukizibwa ne Kristu, munoonye ebiri waggulu eyo Kristu gy'ali ng'atudde ku gwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Colossians3:2 Mufe ku bya waggulu, naye si ku bya ku nsi." 
Colossians3:3 Anti mwafa, n'obulamu bwammwe bukwekeddwa ne Kristu mu Katonda." 
Colossians3:4 Kristu nno obulamu bwammwe bw'alirabika, olwo nammwe ne mulabika wamu naye mu kitiibwa." 
Colossians3:5 Mutte buli kya nsi ekibalimu: obwenzi, obuseegu, amaddu, okwegomba okubi, n'okululunkanira ebintu, leero ekiba okusinza ebitaliimu." 
Colossians3:6 Olwa bino obusungu bwa Katonda kyebunaava bujja. 
Colossians3:7 Nammwe luli bino mwe mwatambuliranga bwe mwali mukyabirimu. 
Colossians3:8 Kati ebyo byonna mubisse ebbali: obusungu, ennyiike, okuwaayiriza, okuvuma n'enjogera embi eziva mu kamwa kammwe." 
Colossians3:9 Temulimbagananga, anti ng'obw'omuntu bwe mwalina edda n'empisa zaakwo mwabyeyambula" 
Colossians3:10 ne mwambala obw'omuntu obuggya, obugenda buzzibwa obuggya mu kumanya ne mu nfaanana y'Omutonzi waabwo." 
Colossians3:11 Awo tewaba ono Mugereeki, ono Muyudaaya, ono mutayirire ono si mutayirire, ono mugwira, ono si mugunjufu, ono muddu, ono mwana wa ddembe; wabula Kristu ye byonna mu byonna." 
Colossians3:12 Mmwe nno Katonda be yalonda, abatuukirivu ate abaganzi, mwambalenga omutima omusaasizi, ekisa, obwetoowaze, obuteefu, obugumiikiriza;" 
Colossians3:13 mulekeraganenga, era musonyiwaganenga nga wabaddewo alina ekigambo ku munne; ng'Omukama bwe yabasonyiwa, nammwe bwe muba mukola." 
Colossians3:14 Kungulu kwa bino byonna mwambalirengako okwagala, kye kifundikwa ekisibira byonna awamu mu butuukirivu." 
Colossians3:15 Eddembe lya Kristu libeere mu mitima gyammwe; anti ekyo kye mwayitirwa ng'omubiri ogumu; mwebazenga. 
Colossians3:16 Ekigambo kya Kristu kibukale mu mmwe mu bugagga bwakyo bwonna. Buli omu ayigirize munne, abuulirire munne mu magezi gonna. Muyimbirenga Katonda mu mitima gyammwe zabbuli, amatendo n'ennyimba entukuvu nga mwebaza." 
Colossians3:17 Buli kye mukola, kibeere mu bigambo oba mu bikolwa, mukikolenga mu linnya lya Mukama Yezu, nga mwebaza Katonda Taata nga muyita mu ye." 
Colossians3:18 Abakazi, mugondere babbammwe nga bwe kigwanidde mu Mukama." 
Colossians3:19 Abasajja, mwagale bakazi bammwe, temubakambuwaliranga." 
Colossians3:20 Abaana, muwulirenga bazadde bammwe mu buli kintu, kubanga ekyo kisanyusa Omukama." 
Colossians3:21 Abazadde, temunyiizanga baana bammwe, sikulwa nga baggwaamu omutima." 
Colossians3:22 Abaddu, muwulirenga mu buli kintu bakama bammwe ab'oku nsi, si lwa kulabibwa, kyenkana ng'abanoonya okutendebwa abantu, naye mukozenga mutima gumu nga mutya Omukama." 
Colossians3:23 Kyonna kye mukola, mukikozenga kwagala ng'abakolera Omukama, abatakolera bantu buntu," 
Colossians3:24 nga mumanyi nti mulifuna obusika ng'empeera yammwe okuva ew'Omukama, anti Omukama Kristu gwe muweereza." 
Colossians3:25 Akola obubi alisasulibwa olw'ensobi ze yakola, ate tewali kusosola." 
Colossians4:1 Abakama, abaddu bammwe mubayisenga bulungi mu bwenkanya, anti mumanyi nga nammwe mu ggulu mulinayo Omukama." 
Colossians4:2 Munyiikire okwegayirira; nga mwegayirira mutunule era mwebaze. 
Colossians4:3 Naffe mutusabire Katonda atuggulirewo oluggi ku lw'ekigambo, tusobole okulangirira ekyama kya Kristu ekyansibisa mu njegere," 
Colossians4:4 nkyolese nga njogera nga bwe nteeekeddwa okwogera. 
Colossians4:5 Mweyise na magezi n'abo abagwira, nga muggya omugaso mu budde buno." 
Colossians4:6 Enjogera yammwe ebeere ya ssimbo, ennungemu omunnyo, mulyoke mumanye engeri gye musaanye okwanukula buli omu." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko, owooluganda omwagalwa, omukozi omwesigwa, muweereza munnange mu Mukama, ajja kubategeeza byonna ebinfaako." 
Colossians4:8 Mmubasindikidde olw'ensonga eno, mumanye ebitufaako, akubagize n'emitima gyammwe," 
Colossians4:9 wamu ne Onesimo owooluganda omwagalwa era omwesigwa, omu ku mmwe. Bajja kubategeeza byonna ebifa eno." 
Colossians4:10 Aristariko, musibe munnange, abatumidde; ne Mariko muganda wa Barunaba, gwe mwaweerwako ebiragiro - bw'atuukanga eyo, mumwanirizanga;" 
Colossians4:11 ne Yezu gwe baakazaako erya Yusito. Bano be bokka abava mu batayirire mu abo bwe tukola omulimu gw'obwakabaka bwa Katonda; babadde kikubagizo gye ndi. 
Colossians4:12 Epafura, omu ku mmwe, omuweereza wa Kristu Yezu, abatumidde; ono bulijjo abalwanirira mu ssaala ze muleme kugwa, wabula mutuukirire bulungi era munywere ddala ku ekyo Katonda ky'ayagala." 
Colossians4:13 Nnyinza okumujulira nti abalumirwa nnyo, n'ab'e Lawodikeya n'ab'e Yiyerapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka omusawo omwagalwa ne Dema babatumidde. 
Colossians4:15 Mundabire abooluganda abali e Lawodikeya, ne Nimfa n'Ekleziya eri mu maka ge." 
Colossians4:16 Ebbaluwa eno bw'emalanga okusomebwa ewammwe, mugisome ne mu Ekleziya y'ab'e Lawodikeya, ate nammwe musome eva e Lawodikeya." 
Colossians4:17 Mugambe Arikippo nti: “Wekkaanye, laba nti omulimu gwe wafuna mu Mukama ogutuukiriza.”" 
Colossians4:18 Okulamusa kuno nze nkuwandiise nzennyini Pawulo mu mukono gwange. Mujjukire enjegere zange. Eneema ebeere nammwe. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Pawulo, Siluvano ne Timotewo. Ya Ekleziya w'ab'e Tessalonika, mu Katonda Taata n'Omukama Yezu Kristu. Eneema ebeere nammwe ko n'emirembe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Bulijjo Katonda tumwebaza ku lwammwe mwenna; tubajjukira butasalako mu ssaala zaffe," 
1Thessalonians1:3 nga tujjukira mu maaso ga Katonda waffe era Taata, omulimu ogukoleddwa okukkiriza kwammwe, okwewaayo kw'okwagala kwammwe n'obunywevu bw'essuubi lye mulina mu Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Abooluganda Katonda b'ayagala, tumanyi nga yabalonda;" 
1Thessalonians1:5 kubanga Evangili yaffe teyabatuukako mu bigambo byokka, naye ne mu maanyi ne mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu, wamu mu mutima omumativu ddala. Nammwe mumanyi bwe tweyisa nga tuli ewammwe olw'okubeera mmwe." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nammwe mwatufaanana ne mufaanana n'Omukama kubanga ekigambo mwakyaniriza mu nnaku ennyingi awamu n'essanyu eriva mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu; 
1Thessalonians1:7 ne mufuuka bwe mutyo ekyokulabirako eri abakkiriza bonna mu Masedoniya ne mu Akayiya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ekigambo kya Katonda kyava mu mmwe ne kigenda nga kivuga; si mu Masedoniya ne mu Akayiya mwokka, wabula ne wonna okukkiriza kwammwe mu Katonda kubunyeeyo, n'olwekyo ekyo tetwetaaga na kukyogerako kantu." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Eyo banyumya nga bwe mwatwaniriza, ne bwe mwakyuka ne mudda eri Katonda, ne muva ku balubaale, mulyoke muweereze Katonda omulamu ow'amazima," 
1Thessalonians1:10 era mulindirire Omwana we aliva mu ggulu, gwe yazuukiza mu bafu, Yezu atuwonya obusungu obulijja." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Abooluganda, nammwe mumanyi bulungi ng'okujja kwaffe ewammwe tekwafa busa." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Mumanyi nga bwe twabonaabona e Filippi, ne batuyisa bubi; kyokka olw'obwesige bwe twalina mu Katonda waffe, twabayigiriza n'obuvumu Evangili ya Katonda wakati mu kuwakanyizibwa okungi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Okubakubiriza kwe tukola gye muli tekuva mu bulimba, oba mu kugenderera bya buseegu oba eby'okubalabankanya," 
1Thessalonians2:4 wabula tukikola kubanga Katonda yatusiima n'atukwasa Evangili; naffe bwe twogera, tetugenderera kusanyusa bantu, wabula Katonda ageza emitima gyaffe." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Mumanyi bulungi nti tetubangako lwe twogera lwa kunyumiikiriza yadde okugendereramu eby'okufuna; Katonda ye mujulirwa waffe. 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tetwanoonyanga kutendebwa bantu, yadde mmwe mwennyini, nandibadde abalala." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Sso nno ke tuli abatume ba Kristu, twandisobodde okubaako kye tubasabayo. Naye ewammwe twali ba ddembe; twali ng'omuzadde agabirira abaana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Olw'okubaagala tutyo, twasiima si kubawa Vangili ya Katonda yokka, naye naffe ffennyini okubeewa, kubanga mwali mufuuse baganzi gye tuli." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Abooluganda, mujjukire okukola kwaffe n'okutegana; bwe twalinga tuyigiriza Evangili ya Katonda, twakolanga emisana n'ekiro tubulweko gwe tukaluubiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Mujja kutujulira, ne Katonda yennyini atujulira, nti tweyisa mu ngeri entuukirivu, entuufu era eteriiko musango eri mmwe abakkiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Mumanyi nti twabakubiriza kinnoomu mu mmwe nga kitaawe w'abaana bw'abakola, ne tubagumya nga tubeekubako" 
1Thessalonians2:12 muyise mu ngeri esaanidde Katonda abayita mu bwakabaka bwe ne mu kitiibwa kye. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Era twebaza Katonda obutasalako, kubanga bwe mwafuna ekigambo kya Katonda nga tukibabuulidde, temwakikkiriza ng'eky'abantu, naye era nga bwe kiri mu mazima: ng'ekigambo kya Katonda, kati ekikola mu mmwe abakkiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Abooluganda, mwafaananira ddala Ekleziya za Katonda mu Kristu Yezu ez'omu Buyudaaya; anti nammwe bannansi bannammwe baababonyaabonya mu ngeri ye emu nga bali Abayudaaya bwe baabakola," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abo abatta Omukama Yezu n'abalanzi, naffe abaatugobaganya; Katonda tebamusanyusa, bawakanya n'abantu bonna," 
1Thessalonians2:16 kubanga tebatuganya kuyigiriza ab'amawanga balyoke balokoke; bwe batyo bulijjo ekipimo ky'ebibi byabwe ne bakireegera ddala okutuusa gye kikoma. Naye kyaddaaki kati obusungu bw'Omukama bubajjidde. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Abooluganda, akabanga ako akatono ke twayawukana, - mu mubiri naye si mu mutima – twayagala ekisukkiridde n'okwegomba kungi okubalabirako ddala maaso ku maaso." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Kubanga twayagala okujjako ewammwe, - nze nzennyini Pawulo nakigezaako emirundi egiwerako, - naye Sitaani n'atuziyiza." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Okuggyako mmwe, tulinayo ssuubi ki eddala oba essanyu, oba engule gye tulyetenderamu mu maaso ga Mukama Yezu Kristu lw'alijja?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Mmwe kitiibwa kyaffe, mmwe ssanyu lyaffe." 
1Thessalonians3:1 N'olwekyo kyaddaaki nga tetukyayinza kugumiikiriza, kwe kuteesa okusigala ffekka e Atena," 
1Thessalonians3:2 ne tubatumira muganda waffe Timotewo, omuweereza wa Katonda ali ku mulimu gw'okuyigiriza Evangili ya Kristu, ajje abagumye era abanyweze mu kukkiriza kwammwe," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ebizibu bino bibuleko gwe binyeenya; anti nammwe mumanyi nti kino kye kitulindiridde. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Sso era bwe twali ewammwe, twabagambirawo nti ennaku twali ba kuziraba, ng'era bwe bibaddewo, nga nammwe bwe mumanyi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Nange nno nalaba sikyayinza kugumiikiriza, kwe kutuma gye muli, ntegeere okukkiriza kwammwe nga bwe kuli. Nali ntya nti sikulwa ng'omukemi yabakema omulimu gwaffe ne gufa busa." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kati Timotewo bw'akomyewo eno okuva ewammwe, atubuulidde amawulire amalungi ku kukkiriza kwammwe ne ku kwagala; era n'atugamba nti mukyatujjukira bulungi, nti bulijjo mwegomba okutulabako nga naffe bwe twegomba okubalaba." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ggwe wamma, abooluganda, olw'okukkiriza kwammwe, mutukubagizza mu bikalubo byonna ne mu bizibu bye tulimu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Kati naffe tuwulira ku bulamu, kubanga mugumye mutyo mu Mukama." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tunaayinza tutya okwebaza Katonda okubeera mmwe, olw'essanyu lino lyonna lye mutuleetedde mu maaso ga Katonda waffe?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Twegayirira nga twesengereza emisana n'ekiro, tusobole okuddamu okubalabako ate, tumalirize ebikyabula ku kukkiriza kwammwe." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Katonda yennyini oyo era Taata ne Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu baluŋŋamye olugendo lwaffe olutuleeta ewammwe. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Omukama abawe mweyongere era musukkulume mu kwagalana mwekka na mwekka ne mu kwagala abantu bonna, kyenkana nga naffe bwe tubaagala," 
1Thessalonians3:13 agumye bw'atyo emitima gyammwe mu butuukirivu, nga temuliiko musango mu maaso ga Katonda era Taata ku luli Mukama waffe lw'alijja wamu n'abatuukirivu be bonna." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ekisembayo, abooluganda, tubeegayiridde era tubakubiriza mu Mukama Yezu nti nga bwe mwatuyigirako bwe musaanye okuyisa okusanyusa Katonda, era kati nga bwe mukola, mweyongerere ddala okukola bwe mutyo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Anti mumanyi amateeka ge twabawa mu Mukama Yezu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Katonda kino ky'abaagaza, obutuukirivu bwammwe: mulekere ddala obuseegu;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 buli omu mu mmwe amanye okwewasiza omukazi mu butuukirivu ne mu kitiibwa," 
1Thessalonians4:5 naye si mu kutwalirizibwa kwa maddu ng'ab'amawanga abatamanyi Katonda; 
1Thessalonians4:6 wabulewo asobeza munne oba amulyakula mu by'obusuubuzi; kubanga Omukama awoolera eggwanga mu ebyo byonna, ng'era bwe twabagamba luli ng'atukakasiza ddala." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Kubanga Katonda teyatuyitira buseegu, wabula butuukirivu." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Oli nno agaya bino, tagaya muntu, wabula Katonda abawa Mwoyo we Omutuukirivu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Simwetaaga muntu kubawandiikira ku mpisa ya kwagalana kwe muteekwa okwagalanamu ng'ab'oluganda, anti Katonda yennyini yabayigiriza dda bwe musaanye okwagalana;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 ndaba mwagala abooluganda bonna wonna mu Masedoniya. Kye tubasaba nno, abooluganda, mwongere bwongezi." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Muluubirire okuba mu ddembe, okufa ku bibakwatako, n'okukola n'emikono gyammwe nga bwe twabagamba;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 bwe mutyo mulabikire bulungi ab'ebweru mu neeyisa yammwe, mubeere nga temujula kantu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Abooluganda, tetwagala muwubwe ku abo abeebase, muleke kunakuwala ng'abantu abalala abatalina ssuubi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Oba tukkiriza nga Yezu yafa n'azuukira, awo nno ne Katonda ng'ayita mu Yezu, abeebase alibakomyawo wamu naye." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Kino tukibagamba ng'Omukama bwe yakyogera nti: ffe abakyali abalamu, abakyasigaddewo okutuusa Omukama lw'alijja, si ffe tulisookayo bali abeebase." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Anti Omukama yennyini aliva mu ggulu n'akka ekiragiro bwe kiriyita, Ssabamalayika bw'alireekaana n'ekkondeere lya Katonda nga linyaanyaagira. Olwo abafu abali mu Kristu be balisooka okuzuukira;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 awo naffe abaliba bakyali abalamu, tulikuŋŋunsibwa mu bire wamu nabo okugenda okusisinkana Kristu mu bbanga. Olwo tulibeera n'Omukama ennaku zonna." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Kale nno buli omu agumye munne n'ebigambo ebyo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Abooluganda, temwetaaga muntu kubawandiikira ku bifa ku budde ne ku kaseera kennyini." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ndaba nammwe mumanyi ng'olunaku lw'Omukama lulijja ng'omubbi mu kiro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Baliba bakyawoza: “Kiri mulaala, kiri bulungi,” olwo okuzikirizibwa ne kubagwira ng'okulumwa bwe kugwira omukazi ow'olubuto, ate teriba kuwona." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Sso mmwe abooluganda, temuli mu nzikiza, olunaku olwo okubazinduukiriza ng'omubbi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Mmwe mwenna muli baana ba kitangaala, muli baana ba misana; tetuli ba kiro oba ba nzikiza." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Awo nno tuleme kwebaka ng'abalala bwe bakola; tutunule, nga tetuli batamiivu." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Anti abeebaka beebaka kiro, n'abatamiira batamiira kiro." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Naye ffe tuli ba misana, awo nno tuleme kuba batamiivu, twambale ekizibawo eky'okukkiriza n'okwagala, ate enkufiira nga lye ssuubi ery'okulokoka." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Kubanga ffe Katonda teyatuteebeza busungu, wabula okufuna obulokofu ku bwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 eyatufiirira tulyoke tubeere balamu naye, ne bwe tuba tutunula ne bwe tuba twebase." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Kale nno buli omu akubagize munne, buli omu azimbe munne nga bwe mubadde mukola." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Abooluganda, tubeegayiridde, ababafaabiinira, ababalabirira mu Mukama, abababuulirira mubategeere." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Olw'okubeera omulimu gwabwe, mubasseemu nnyo ekitiibwa era mubaagale; mubeere mirembe ne mu mmwe mwennyini." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Abooluganda, era tubakubiriza mukome ku balendera, muzze amaanyi mu baterebeterebe, abanafu mubayambe; bonna mubagumiikirize." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mulabe nti mu mmwe temuli awoolera ggwanga, wabula muluubirire bulijjo okukolera obulungi buli omu ne bonna." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mubeere basanyufu ennaku zonna. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Mwegayirire obutasalako; 
1Thessalonians5:18 mu byonna mwebaze, kubanga ekyo Katonda ky'abaagaza mu Kristu Yezu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Mwoyo muleke kumuzibiikiriza; 
1Thessalonians5:20 temugayanga mulimu gwa bulanzi; 
1Thessalonians5:21 kyokka byonna mubyekenneenye; ekirungi mukinywerereko; 
1Thessalonians5:22 mwesammule buli kibi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Katonda yennyini ow'emirembe abafuule batuukirivu mwenna. Mwenna nga bwe muli: omutima, emmeeme, n'omubiri, bibeere biramu ebitaliiko musango Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu lw'alijja." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Oyo abayita mwesigwa, era ajja kukikola." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Abooluganda, nammwe mutusabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mulamuse abooluganda bonna n'okunywegeragana okutukuvu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mbalayizza ddala Omukama nti ebbaluwa eno esomerwe abooluganda bonna. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeere nammwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Pawulo, Siluvano ne Timotewo. Ya Ekleziya w'ab'e Tessalonika mu Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Eneema ebeere nammwe n'emirembe ebiva ewa Katonda Taata n'Omukama Yezu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Abooluganda, tuteekwa okwebaza Katonda bulijjo ku lwammwe; era nga kisaanye, kubanga okukkiriza kwammwe kugenda kukula, n'okwagalana kwammwe okwa buli omu eri munne kugenda kweyongera." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Olw'ekyo naffe ffennyini tubeenyumirizaamu mu Ekleziya za Katonda eyo yonna olw'obugumiikiriza bwammwe n'okukkiriza mu biyigganyizo byammwe byonna ne mu nnaku ze mugumiikiriza. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Kw'olabira ensala ya Katonda entuukirivu mw'ayagalira musaanire obwakabaka bwa Katonda obubalabisa nammwe ennaku kati. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Anti ekyo kituufu Katonda okukola, okusasuza n'okubonaabona abo abababonyaabonya," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ate mmwe ababonaabona kati n'abawa ekiwummulo wamu naffe luli Omukama Yezu lw'alyolekebwa ng'ava mu ggulu wamu ne bamalayika ab'obuyinza mu muliro ogubumbujja," 
2Thessalonians1:8 n'awa ekibonerezo abo abatamanyi Katonda n'abalala abagaana okugondera Evangili ya Mukama waffe Yezu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Bagenda kuweebwa ekibonerezo eky'okuzikirira okw'emirembe gyonna, n'okugobebwa awali Omukama n'awali ekitiibwa ky'amaanyi ge," 
2Thessalonians1:10 bw'alijja ku lunaku lw'alijja okugulumizibwa mu batuukirivu be, n'okwewuunyizibwa mu bonna abakkiriza, kubanga mwakkiriza bye twabategeeza." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kyetuva tubasabira bulijjo, Katonda waffe abasaanyize embeera gye yabayitira; olw'amaanyi ge abayambe mutuukirize buli kirungi kye mweteesa na buli bye mukola mu kukkiriza," 
2Thessalonians1:12 erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu ligulumizibwe mu mmwe, nammwe mutendebwe mu ye olw'eneema ya Katonda waffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Abooluganda, tubeegayiridde, ku bidda ku kujja kwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu naffe okumukuŋŋaanirako," 
2Thessalonians2:2 muleke kutya mangu ago mu mitima na kubuguumirira olw'okulabikirwa omwoyo, oba ebigambo ebyogerwa, oba ebbaluwa gye bagamba mbu yava waffe, nga bigamba nti olunaku lw'Omukama lutuuse." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Baleme kubawubisa; kubanga lwo okutuuka walisookawo kwabulira ddiini n'okulabika kw'omubi, ow'okuzikirira," 
2Thessalonians2:4 awakanya era eyeepankira ku buli kyonna ekiyitibwa Katonda oba ekisinzibwa; alyewaŋŋamya mu Kiggwa kya Katonda, ne yeeyita Katonda." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Temujjukira nti bwe nali nkyali ewammwe eyo, nabagamba bwe ntyo?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Mumanyi nti waliwo ekikyamuziyizza okutuusa lw'alyolekebwa mu kadde ke. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Obugwenyufu bwekisizza, naye bwatandika dda okukola; oyo akyakwatiridde ajja kukola atyo okutuusa lw'aliggyibwawo." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Omubi olwo alirabika, naye Omukama alimuzikiriza n'omukka gw'akamwa ke, n'amusaanyaawo n'okulabika kwe n'amajja ge." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Okujja kw'omubi kulirabika n'ebikolwa bya Sitaani eby'amaanyi ko n'obubonero n'ebyewuunyo ebigingeginge," 
2Thessalonians2:10 na buli kubuzaabuza kubi ku abo ab'okuzikirira kubanga bagaana okwagala amazima balyoke balokoke. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Katonda kyava abasindikira okubuzibwabuzibwa okw'amaanyi bakkirize ekitali kituufu," 
2Thessalonians2:12 olwo abo bonna balyoke basalirwe omusango abo abatakkiriza mazima, wabula abasanyukira mu butali butuukirivu." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Wamma bulijjo tuteekwa okwebaza Katonda ku lwammwe, abooluganda Omukama b'ayagala, kubanga Katonda yabalonda mu kusookera ddala mulokoke nga mutukuzibwa Mwoyo n'olw'okuba nga mwakkiriza amazima." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Mu Vangili yaffe mwe yabayitira ku kino, mulyoke mugabane ku kitiibwa kya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Kale nno abooluganda, mugume, munywerere ku kye tuzze tubawa, bye twabayigiriza n'akamwa oba mu bbaluwa yaffe." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ne Katonda Kitaffe eyatwagala, mu neema ye eyatuleetera ekikubagizo ekitaggwaawo n'essuubi eddungi," 
2Thessalonians2:17 babagumye emitima, baginyweze mu buli ngeri ya mulimu mulungi na buli kigambo." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ekisembayo, abooluganda, mutusabire, ekigambo ky'Omukama kitolontoke, kifune ekitiibwa nga bwe kyakola eyo," 
2Thessalonians3:2 naffe tuwonyezebwe abantu ababi abagwagwa; anti okukkiriza tekuli mu bonna. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Katonda ye mwesigwa; ajja kubanyweza abawonye akabi. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tuli bakakafu ku mmwe mu Mukama nti mukola era mujja kukolanga bye twabalagira. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Omukama alambike emitima gyammwe mwagale Katonda, mulinde Kristu n'obugumiikiriza." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Abooluganda, mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, tubakuutira okweggya ku buli waaluganda adda mu kulendera, atagoberera mpisa ze mwatuyigirako." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Mumanyi mmwe mwennyini bwe muteekwa okulabira ku ffe; ffe bwe twali eyo ewammwe, tetwalenderanga bulendezi;" 
2Thessalonians3:8 tewali we twalyanga mmere ku bwereere; wabula twakolanga ne tutegana ekiro n'emisana tuleme kubaako gwe tukaluubiriza. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Si kubanga twali tetusaanidde mpeera, naye twayagala kubawa kyakulabirako nammwe mukole nga ffe." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ndaba ne bwe twali eyo ewammwe, ekyo kye twabakuutira, nti oba oli tayagala kukola, n'okulya aleme kulya." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Anti tuwulira mbu abamu mu mmwe balendera bulendezi, basobeza abalala, tebalina kye bakola." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tulagira ab'engeri eyo mu Mukama Yezu Kristu era tubakubiriza bagende nga bakola mu kasirise, beefunire bo bennyini kye banaalya." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Abooluganda, temukoowanga kukola bulungi." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Oba waliwo atawulira kigambo kye tubawandiikidde mu bbaluwa eno, oyo mumulambe, mumwesambe, alyoke aswale." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Naye temumuyisa ng'omulabe, wabula mumukomeko ng'owooluganda." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Omukama oyo kiwamirembe, abawe emirembe ennaku zonna ne mu buli ngeri. Omukama abeere nammwe mwenna." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Okulamusa kuno nzennyini Pawulo nkuwandiise n'omukono gwange; ke kabonero ku buli bbaluwa yange; bwe ntyo bwe mpandiika. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeere nammwe mwenna. 
1Timothy1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristu olw'ekiragiro kya Katonda Mulokozi waffe n'ekya Kristu Yezu essuubi lyaffe;" 
1Timothy1:2 ya Timotewo, mutabani wange ddala mu kukkiriza: Eneema, okusaasira n'ekisa okuva ewa Katonda Taata ne Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe." 
1Timothy1:3 Bwe nali ŋŋenda e Masedoniya, nakugamba osigale mu Efezi olagire abantu abamu baleke kuyigiriza njigiriza ndala," 
1Timothy1:4 n'okwemalira ku nfumo n'okunonooza endyo ezitaggwa; bino byongera bwongezi kubuusabuusa mu kifo ky'entegeka ya Katonda ey'okununula esimbye ku kukkiriza.
