1Timothy1:5 Sso ekigendererwa ekikulu ekiri mu kukubiriza kwe kwagala okuva mu mutima omutukuvu, emmeeme ennungi n'okukkiriza okwesimbu." 
1Timothy1:6 Abamu olw'okuva ku bino bawabidde mu nkaayana ezitaliimu kantu," 
1Timothy1:7 nga baagala okuba abayigiriza b'Etteeka, naye nga tebamanyi kye boogerako wadde ebyo bye bagenda bakakasa n'amaanyi." 
1Timothy1:8 Weewaawo tumanyi nti etteeka ddungi, singa oli alyeyamba ng'agoberera amateeka," 
1Timothy1:9 ng'amanyi nti etteeka teryateekebwawo lwa batuukirivu, wabula olw'ababi, n'abatawulira, n'abatatya Katonda, n'aboonoonyi, n'abatalina mpisa, n'aboonoonefu, n'abatemula bakitaabwe, n'abatemula bannyaabwe, n'abatta abantu," 
1Timothy1:10 n'abagwagwa, n'abakabawala n'ab'oluse lwabwe, n'abawamba abantu, n'abalimba, n'abawaayiriza, na buli kyonna ekikontana n'enjigiriza ennamu" 
1Timothy1:11 egenda n'Evangili ey'ekitiibwa eya Katonda eyaweebwa omukisa, eyo eyankwasibwa." 
1Timothy1:12 Neebaza oyo eyampa amaanyi, Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe, kubanga bwe yannonda ku mulimu guno, yantwala okuba omwesigwa," 
1Timothy1:13 newandibadde ng'edda namujolonga, ne mmuyigganya ne mmuvuma; wabula nasaasirwa, kubanga ebyo nabikolanga mu butamanya na mu butakkiriza." 
1Timothy1:14 Naye eneema ya Mukama waffe yanzijuzaamu okukkiriza n'okwagala ebiri mu Kristu Yezu. 
1Timothy1:15 Ekyogerwa ekyo kya mazima era kisaanye okukwatibwa kyonna, nti Kristu Yezu yajja mu nsi okulokola aboonoonyi; ate mu bo nze mubereberye." 
1Timothy1:16 Naye nasaasirwa olwa kino, nti Yezu Kristu asookere mu nze okwoleka obugumiikiriza bwe bwonna, mbeere ekyokulabirako eri abo abaali ab'okumukkiriza bafune obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
1Timothy1:17 Eri Kabaka Ssewannaku, atafa, atalabika, Katonda yekka, ebeere ettendo n'ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe." 
1Timothy1:18 Bino bye biragiro bye nkuwa, Timotewo mutabani wange, nga nsinziira ku bigambo abalanzi bye baayogera ku ggwe; nga bikufuuyiridde, olwane bulungi olutalo," 
1Timothy1:19 ng'olina okukkiriza n'emmeeme ennungi. Abamu olw'okugaana emmeeme yaabwe ky'ebagamba, baleetedde okukkiriza kwabwe okutokomoka;" 
1Timothy1:20 mu abo nga mwe muli ne Yimenewo ne Alekisanduro, be nawaayo eri Sitaani bayige obutavuma Katonda." 
1Timothy2:1 Ekisookera ddala nkubiriza nti okwegayirira, essaala, okusabira n'okwebaza biweerezebwe olw'abantu bonna," 
1Timothy2:2 olwa bakabaka n'olw'abo bonna abali mu buyinza, tusobole okubeera mu ddembe n'obuteefu, mu bulamu obusomi n'obuntubulamu." 
1Timothy2:3 Kino kirungi ate kisiimibwa Katonda Mulokozi waffe," 
1Timothy2:4 ayagala abantu bonna balokoke era batuuke ku kumanya amazima mu bujjuvu. 
1Timothy2:5 Kubanga Katonda ali omu, n'omutabaganya wa Katonda n'abantu ali omu, yennyini omuntu Kristu Yezu," 
1Timothy2:6 eyeewaayo ng'omutango olwa bonna; okujulirwa kwa kino okwaweebwa mu kaseera kaakwo akatuufu. 
1Timothy2:7 Ekyo kye nalonderwa ng'omulangirizi era omutume – kino nkyogera mu mazima, sirimba, - okuba omuyigiriza w'ab'amawanga mu kukkiriza ne mu mazima." 
1Timothy2:8 Awo nno njagala mu buli kifo abasajja beegayirire nga bawanise emikono gyabwe emitukuvu awatali busungu oba okuyomba. 
1Timothy2:9 Mu ngeri ye emu, n'abakazi beewoomye mu nnyambala ensaamusaamu, ey'obuwombeefu, ey'ekintukiramu, si na nviiri nnyonde, ne zaabu, n'amalulu n'engoye ez'ebbeeyi," 
1Timothy2:10 wabula beewoomye n'ebikolwa ebirungi nga bwe kisaanira abakazi abasomi. 
1Timothy2:11 Mu kuyigirizibwa, omukazi abeere ng'asirise, nga muwombeefu." 
1Timothy2:12 Sikkiriza mukazi n'omu kuyigiriza oba kukulira basajja; asaana asirike busirisi," 
1Timothy2:13 Kubanga Adamu ye yasooka okutondebwa ne Eva n'alyoka atondebwa; 
1Timothy2:14 ne Adamu si ye yalimbibwa, wabula omukazi ye yalimbibwa, n'afuuka omusobya." 
1Timothy2:15 Kyokka omukazi aliwonyezebwa ng'ayita mu kuzaala abaana, bw'alisigala mu kukkiriza, okwagala, obutuukirivu n'obwetangize." 
1Timothy3:1 Ekyogerwa kino kya mazima: Singa oli ayagala okubeera omulabirizi, aba yeegombye ekintu ekirungi." 
1Timothy3:2 Omulabirizi kyava ateekwa okuba nga taliiko kimuvunaanibwa, nga wa mukazi omu, amanyi okwefuga, muntumulamu, wa kitiibwa, ayaniriza abagenyi, asobola okuyigiriza," 
1Timothy3:3 si mutamiivu, si mukambwe, wabula muteefu, tayombayomba, talulunkanira ssente." 
1Timothy3:4 Ateekwa okuba ng'asobola okufuga amaka ge obulungi, abaana be ng'abakuuma nga bawulize, ba mpisa ddala." 
1Timothy3:5 Kubanga singa omuntu tasobola kufuga maka ge gennyini, anaasobola atya okulabirira Ekleziya wa Katonda?" 
1Timothy3:6 Aleme kubeera nga yaakakyuka, sikulwa nga yeewanika n'agwa ku kibonerezo kye kimu n'ekya Sitaani." 
1Timothy3:7 Yandibadde era ayogerwako bulungi ab'ebweru, sikulwa ng'afuuka ekivumo n'agwa mu mutego gwa Sitaani." 
1Timothy3:8 Abadyakoni nabo bwe batyo, babe ba kitiibwa, si bannimibbirye, si banywi ba mwenge mungi, abatalulunkanira kufuna;" 
1Timothy3:9 ekyama ky'okukkiriza nga bakikuuma n'emmeeme entukuvu. 
1Timothy3:10 Nabo basooke kugezebwa, bwe beeraga nti tebaliiko kibavunaanibwa, olwo baweereze ng'abadyakoni." 
1Timothy3:11 N'abakazi nabo babe ba kitiibwa, abatasala bigambo, wabula abamanyi okwefuga, nga beesigwa mu byonna." 
1Timothy3:12 Abadyakoni babe ba mukazi omu, abafuga obulungi abaana baabwe n'amaka gaabwe." 
1Timothy3:13 Abo abaweereza obulungi ng'abadyakoni, balyefunira erinnya eddungi n'obugumu mu mutima mu kukkiriza okuli mu Kristu Yezu." 
1Timothy3:14 Nsuubira okujja gy'oli mangu, naye bino mbikuwandiikidde," 
1Timothy3:15 nti singa ndwawo okutuuka, omanye engeri omuntu gy'asaanye okuyisaamu mu maka ga Katonda, anti ye Ekleziya wa Katonda omulamu, empagi era omusingi eby'okukkiriza." 
1Timothy3:16 Tewali kuwannaanya, ekyama ky'eddiini yaffe kikulu ddala, nti: Yayolekebwa mu mubiri, yakakasibwa obutuukirivu mu Mwoyo, yalabibwa bamalayika, yayigirizibwa mu mawanga, yakkirizibwa mu nsi, yalinnyisibwa mu kitiibwa." 
1Timothy4:1 Mwoyo agambira ddala kaati, nti mu biseera eby'oluvannyuma abamu balireka okukkiriza ne bawuliriza emyoyo gy'obulimba n'enjigiriza y'emyoyo emibi," 
1Timothy4:2 olw'obukuusa bw'abalimba, abo emmeeme zaabwe ezaasiriizibwa." 
1Timothy4:3 Bagaana obufumbo ne balagira okulekayo ebika by'emmere Katonda gye yatondera abo abakkiriza era abamanyi amazima bagirye nga beebaza. 
1Timothy4:4 Buli kyatondebwa Katonda kirungi; tewali kyandigaaniddwa bwe kiba nga kiriiriddwa n'okwebaza," 
1Timothy4:5 kubanga kitukuzibwa n'ekigambo kya Katonda n'essaala. 
1Timothy4:6 Bino bw'onoobigamba abooluganda, onooba muweereza mulungi owa Kristu Yezu, eyaliisibwa ebigambo by'okukkiriza n'eby'enjigiriza ennungi gye wagoberera." 
1Timothy4:7 Weewalire ddala enfumo omutali ddiini n'eŋŋambo ensirusiru. Weetendeke mu bulamu obusomi. 
1Timothy4:8 Kwo okutendeka omubiri kugasa, naye katono, naye byo eby'eddiini bigasa mu byonna, engeri gye birina kye bisuubiza mu bulamu buno ne mu bulamu obulijja." 
1Timothy4:9 Ekyogerwa kino kya mazima era kisaanye okukwatibwa kyonna. 
1Timothy4:10 Kino kye tukolerera era kye tulafuubanira, kubanga essuubi lyaffe twalissa mu Katonda omulamu, Omulokozi w'abantu bonna, naddala ow'abo abakkiriza." 
1Timothy4:11 Bino by'oba olagira n'okuyigiriza. 
1Timothy4:12 Tokkirizanga n'omu kukunyooma olw'obuvubuka, wabula abakkiriza bawe ekyokulabirako mu kwogera, mu mpisa, mu kwagala, mu kukkiriza ne mu butukuvu." 
1Timothy4:13 Okutuusa nga nzize, nyiikirira okusoma Ebiwandiiko ebitukuvu, okubuulirira n'okuyigiriza." 
1Timothy4:14 Togayaaliriranga kirabo ky'olina ekyakuweebwa mu kigambo ky'abalanzi ku olwo olukiiko lw'abakadde lwe lwakussaako emikono. 
1Timothy4:15 Kino ky'oba weefubirira, kino ky'oba weemalirako, bonna balabe bw'ogenda weeyongera." 
1Timothy4:16 Weefeeko era fa ne ku ky'oyigiriza, okinywerereko; bw'onookola bw'otyo ojja kwewonya, owonye n'abo abakuwuliriza." 
1Timothy5:1 Akusinga obukulu tomukangavvulanga, wabula mubuulirire nga bwe wandikoze kitaawo; abalenzi abavubuka bayisenga nga baganda bo," 
1Timothy5:2 abakazi abakulu nga bazadde bo, abakazi abato nga bannyoko mu butukuvu bwonna." 
1Timothy5:3 Bannamwandu bassengamu ekitiibwa, bwe baba nga bannamwandu aba namaddala." 
1Timothy5:4 Nnamwandu bw'aba n'abaana oba abazzukulu, abaana basooke bayige obuvunaanyizibwa bwabwe obutukuvu ku maka gaabwe, baddizeewo bazadde baabwe, kubanga kino kisiimibwa mu maaso ga Katonda." 
1Timothy5:5 Omukazi nnamwandu owa namaddala, asigadde ku bubwe yekka, essuubi lye alissa mu Katonda, era anyiikirira okwegayirira n'essaala ekiro n'emisana;" 
1Timothy5:6 naye oyo ali mu kwejalabya, oyo afudde akyali mulamu." 
1Timothy5:7 Kino ky'oba obakuutira, babe nga tebaliiko kibavunaanibwa." 
1Timothy5:8 Oli bw'aba talabirira ŋŋanda ze, naddala ab'omu maka ge, okukkiriza aba akusudde eri, era mubi n'okusinga atakkiriza." 
1Timothy5:9 Nnamwandu bw'aba nga takka wansi wa myaka nkaaga egy'obukulu, awandiikibwe, singa yali muka musajja omu;" 
1Timothy5:10 ateekwa okuba ng'amanyiddwa olw'ebikolwa bye ebirungi, nga yakuza bulungi abaana be, yayanirizanga abagenyi, yanaazanga ebigere by'abatuukirivu, yadduukiriranga abali mu bizibu, era nga yajjumbiranga buli mulimu mulungi." 
1Timothy5:11 Naye tokkiriza bannamwandu bato, kubanga bwe balaluka ku Kristu, olwo baagala okuddamu okufumbirwa," 
1Timothy5:12 bwe batyo ne bavunaanibwa okumenya obweyamo bwabwe obwasooka. 
1Timothy5:13 Si ekyo kyokka, bayiga n'okulendera, ne bagenda nga babuna amayumba; tebakoma ku kulendera kyokka, naye bazunza n'eŋŋambo, ne beeyingiza mu bitabakwatako n'okwogera bye batandyogedde." 
1Timothy5:14 Nze ŋŋamba nti bannamwandu abato bandifumbiddwa, bazaale abaana, balabirire amaka gaabwe, baleme kuwa mulabe mukisa gwa kutwogezaako bubi," 
1Timothy5:15 kubanga abamu bawabidde eri Sitaani. 
1Timothy5:16 Omukazi omukkiriza bw'aba alina eŋŋanda ze bannamwandu, abalabirire, Ekleziya aleme kubinikibwa mugugu, wabula asobole okuyamba abo bannamwandu aba namaddala." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakadde abakulembera obulungi bagwanira ekitiibwa kya mirundi ebiri, naddala abo abakola okubuulira ekigambo n'okuyigiriza;" 
1Timothy5:18 Kubanga Ebiwandiiko ebitukuvu bigamba nti: “Ente ewuula eŋŋano, togisibanga mumwa,” era nti: “Omukozi asaanira empeera ye.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Tokkirizanga musango guvunaanibwa mukadde okuggyako ng'alumiriziddwa obujulizi bwa bantu babiri oba basatu. 
1Timothy5:20 Ate abo abakola ebibi bakangavvule mu maaso ga bonna, abalala batye." 
1Timothy5:21 Mu maaso ga Katonda n'aga Kristu Yezu n'ag'abamalayika abalonde, nkukuutira okukuuma amateeka gano awatali kusosolamu, nga toliimu kyekubiira." 
1Timothy5:22 Toyanguyirizanga kussaako mikono, era teweetabanga mu kibi kya mulala; weekuumenga ng'oli mutukuvu." 
1Timothy5:23 Lekera awo okunywa amazzi gokka, wabula nywangako ne ku vviini entonotono olw'okubeera olubuto lwo n'olw'obulwadde bwo obutatadde." 
1Timothy5:24 Ebibi by'abantu abamu birabikirawo, era bibakulembeddemu okubalaza ku kibonerezo, naye ebibi by'abalala birabika luvannyuma." 
1Timothy5:25 Era bwe kityo n'ebikolwa ebirungi birabikirawo, naye ne bwe biba tebirabise, tebisobola kusigala nga byekisizza." 
1Timothy6:1 Bonna abali mu kikoligo ky'obuddu batwalenga bakama baabwe ng'abasaanidde okussibwamu ekitiibwa, erinnya lya Katonda n'enjigiriza yaffe bireme kuvumibwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Abalina bakama baabwe abakkiriza balemenga kubagaya olw'okwekwasa nti bonna ba luganda; wabula babaweereze bulungi n'okusingawo kubanga abo abaganyulwa mu kuweereza kwabwe bakkiriza era baagalwa. Yigiriza era kubiriza ebintu bino. 
1Timothy6:3 Singa oli ayigiriza ekirala n'atakkaanya na bigambo biramu ebya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu n'enjigiriza egendana n'obulamu obw'eddiini," 
1Timothy6:4 aba mwekuza, atalina ky'amanyi; omuwakuzi w'endasano n'enkaayana ku bigambo; ekiva mu kino, buggya, mpaka, kuvumagana, kulowoozaŋŋanako bubi" 
1Timothy6:5 n'obukuubagano mu bantu abagwagwawadde, abatakyalina mazima, eddiini abagitwala ng'ekkubo erituusa ku kufuna." 
1Timothy6:6 Mu ddiini ggwe wamma mulimu bingi eby'okufuna, naye eri oyo amanyi okumatira," 
1Timothy6:7 Kubanga tetulina kye twaleeta mu nsi, era tetulina kye tuyinza kuggya mu nsi;" 
1Timothy6:8 naye bwe tuba n'emmere n'engoye, tunaagira tumatira n'ebyo." 
1Timothy6:9 Naye abo abayaayaanira okugaggawala bagwa mu bikemo, mu mitego ne mu kwegomba kungi okutaliimu makulu era okw'akabenje, okubbika abantu mu kufaafaagana ne mu kuzikirira." 
1Timothy6:10 Anti okwagala ssente ye nsibuko y'obugwenyufu bwonna; era waliwo bangi olwa kino abawabye ne bava ku kukkiriza, ne beereetera okulumwa kungi." 
1Timothy6:11 Kale nno, ggwe omuntu wa Katonda, ebyo byonna bigaye; luubirira obutuukirivu, obulamu obusomi, okukkiriza, okwagala, obumalirivu n'obuteefu." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwana olutalo olulungi olw'okukkiriza, owangule obulamu obutaggwaawo bwe wayitirwa, n'oyatula obulungi ddala mu maaso g'abajulirwa enkumu." 
1Timothy6:13 Mu maaso ga Katonda awa byonna obulamu, n'aga Kristu Yezu oyo eyajulira mu maaso ga Ponsiyo Pilato n'ayatula bulungi ddala," 
1Timothy6:14 nkukubiriza, tuukiriza ekyo ekyakulagirwa awatali kasobye wadde ky'ovunaanibwa okutuusa ku kulabika kwa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu;" 
1Timothy6:15 okwo okujja okwolesebwa mu budde bwako obutuufu, oyo agulumizibwa era Omuyinza, Kabaka wa bakabaka, Omukama w'abakama;" 
1Timothy6:16 oyo yekka alina obutafa, asula mu kitangaala ekitasemberekeka, atalina muntu yali amulabye, wadde asobola kumulaba, ettendo libeere gy'ali n'obuyinza obw'emirembe n'emirembe, Amiina." 
1Timothy6:17 Ate abo abagagga mu nsi eno, bagambe baleme kwekuza, baleme kussa ssuubi lyabwe ku bugagga obuteesigika, naye wabula ku Katonda atugabira buli kintu mu bungi tulyoke tusanyuke." 
1Timothy6:18 Bakolenga ebirungi, babe bagagga mu bikolwa ebirungi, abagabi era abassa ekimu ne bannaabwe," 
1Timothy6:19 bwe batyo beetuumire obugagga ng'omusingi omulungi olw'obulamu obulijja, basobole okwefunira obulamu obwa nnamaddala." 
1Timothy6:20 Wattu Timotewo, kuuma ekyakukwasibwa. Weewalenga emboozi omubula ensa omutali ddiini, n'obuwakanyi kw'ekyo abeerimba kye bayita 'amagezi'." 
1Timothy6:21 Kubanga abamu mu kugaatula bawabye ku kukkiriza. Eneema ebeere naawe! 
2Timothy1:1 Pawulo, omutume wa Kristu Yezu olw'okwagala kwa Katonda n'okusinziira ku kisuubizo ky'obulamu obuli mu Kristu Yezu;" 
2Timothy1:2 ya Timotewo, mutabani omwagalwa: eneema, okusaasira n'eddembe okuva ewa Katonda Taata ne Kristu Yezu Mukama waffe." 
2Timothy1:3 Neebaza Katonda, oyo gwe mpeereza n'emmeeme entereevu nga bajjajjange bwe baakola, bwe nkujjukira obutasalako mu ssaala zange emisana n'ekiro." 
2Timothy1:4 Bwe nzijukira amaziga go, ne njagala okujja okukulaba nzijule essanyu." 
2Timothy1:5 Nzijukira n'okukkiriza kwo okwesimbu, okwo okwasookera mu jjajjaawo Loyi ne mu nnyoko Ewunisi, ate kati kwe nkakasa nti ne mu ggwe mwekuli." 
2Timothy1:6 Kyenva nkujjukiza okukoleeza obuto ekirabo kya Katonda kye wafuna ng'ossibwako emikono gyange. 
2Timothy1:7 Katonda teyatuwa mwoyo gwa butiitiizi, wabula Mwoyo ow'amaanyi, okwagala n'okwefuga." 
2Timothy1:8 Awo nno tokwatirwanga nsonyi kujulira Mukama oba nze omusibe we, wabula gabana ku bizibu olw'okubeera Evangili okusinziira ku maanyi ga Katonda" 
2Timothy1:9 eyatulokola, n'atuyita mu kuyitibwa okutukuvu, si lwa kubeera bikolwa byaffe ku bwaffe, wabula olw'okubeera entegeka ye n'eneema ye. Eneema eno yatuweebwa dda mu Kristu Yezu, ng'obudde tebunnabaawo," 
2Timothy1:10 naye yayolekebwa luno ku kulabika kwa Mulokozi waffe Kristu Yezu, eyaggyawo olumbe n'alaga obutafa n'obulamu ng'ayita mu Vangili," 
2Timothy1:11 gye nalonderwa ng'omulangirizi, omutume era omuyigiriza." 
2Timothy1:12 Kyenva mbonyaabonyezebwa bino byonna, naye sikwatibwa nsonyi kubanga gwe nakkiriza mmumanyi, era ndi mumativu nti asobola okunkuumira bye namukwasa okutuusa ku lunaku olwo." 
2Timothy1:13 Nywerera ku bigambo ebituufu bye wawulira okuva mu nze; bitwale ng'ekyokulabirako, osigale mu kukkiriza ne mu kwagala ebiri mu Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy1:14 Labirira ekintu ekyo eky'omuwendo ekyakukwasibwa mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu asula mu ffe. 
2Timothy1:15 Nga bw'omanyi, abalala bonna mu Aziya banjabulidde, omuli ne Fugelo ne Erumogeno." 
2Timothy1:16 Omukama abeere wa kisa eri amaka ga Onesiforo, kubanga ambeeredde kikubagizo bulijjo era takwatirwanga njegere zange nsonyi." 
2Timothy1:17 Wabula ng'atuuse e Roma yanyiikira okunnoonya okutuusa lwe yanzigukako. 
2Timothy1:18 Omukama amuwe asange ekisa ky'Omukama ku lunaku olwo. Omanyi bulungi engeri gye yampeerezaamu mu Efezi. 
2Timothy2:1 Awo nno, mwana wange, beera wa maanyi mu neema eri mu Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy2:2 Bye wawulira okuva mu nze mu maaso g'abajulirwa abangi, bikwase abantu abeesigwa abalisobola okubiyigiriza abalala." 
2Timothy2:3 Okubonaabona kugabaneko n'obuvumu ng'omutabaazi omulungi owa Kristu Yezu. 
2Timothy2:4 Omutabaazi, bw'aba ku lutabaalo, ate teyeeyingiza mu mitawaana gya bulamu bwa bulijjo, asobole okusanyusa oyo eyamuwandiisa mu butabaazi." 
2Timothy2:5 Era n'omuzannyi ayeenyigira mu mpaka, engule ey'obuwanguzi tagifuna okuggyako ng'agoberedde amateeka." 
2Timothy2:6 N'omulimi omunyiikivu ye yandisaanye okusooka okugabana ku makungula. 
2Timothy2:7 Weebuulirire ku bye njogedde, olwo Omukama alikuwa okutegeera mu buli kintu." 
2Timothy2:8 Jjukira Yezu Kristu, eyazuukira mu bafu, ava mu lulyo lwa Dawudi, eyo ye Vangili yange," 
2Timothy2:9 eyo gye mbonaabonera n'okutuusa okusibibwa enjegere ng'omubbi. Naye kyo ekigambo kya Katonda kasita tebakisibye. 
2Timothy2:10 N'olw'ekyo ŋŋumira buli kimu olw'okubeera abalondemu, nabo bafune okulokoka okuli mu Kristu Yezu era n'ekitiibwa eky'olubeerera." 
2Timothy2:11 Ekyogerwa kino kya mazima, nti: Oba twafa wamu naye, tulibeera wamu naye;" 
2Timothy2:12 bwe tugumiikiriza, tuliramula wamu naye. Bwe tumwegaana, naye alitwegaana." 
2Timothy2:13 Ffe bwe tutaba beesigwa, ye asigala mwesigwa, kubanga tasobola kwegaana ky'ali." 
2Timothy2:14 Bajjukize ebintu bino, obakuutire mu maaso ga Katonda balekere awo okukaayana ku bigambo. Kino tekiganyula, wabula kittattana buttattanyi abo abawuliriza." 
2Timothy2:15 Nyiikira okweraga mu maaso ga Katonda ng'omukozi atalina kimukwasa nsonyi, awa obulungi mu mazima ekigambo ky'amazima." 
2Timothy2:16 Weewale emboozi omubula ensa omutali ddiini, kubanga zongera bwongezi abantu ng'abo mu bukafiiri," 
2Timothy2:17 n'enjigiriza yaabwe egenda ebuna nga kookolo. Mu bo mwe muli Yimenewo ne Fileto," 
2Timothy2:18 abaayawukana ku mazima, abagenda bagamba nti okuzuukira kwabaawo dda, ne batabula okukkiriza kw'abamu." 
2Timothy2:19 Kyokka gwo omusingi omugumu ogwa Katonda gukyanywedde; guliko akabonero kano nti: “Omukama amanyi ababe,” era nti: “Buli omu akoowoola erinnya ly'Omukama yeewale obugwenyufu.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu nnyumba ennene mubaamu ebibya, si bya zaabu na ffeeza byokka, naye n'eby'emiti n'eby'ebbumba; ebimu bikozesebwa mirimu gya kitiibwa, ebirala mu mirimu egitali gya kitiibwa." 
2Timothy2:21 Singa oli yeetukuzaako ebitali bya kitiibwa, aba kibya eky'ekitiibwa, ekitukuziddwa, ekitegekeddwa okweyambisibwa nnannyinimu, ekisaanira buli mulimu omulungi." 
2Timothy2:22 Awo nno vva mu kwegomba okw'ekivubuka, weefubirire obutuukirivu, okukkiriza, okwagala n'eddembe, wamu n'abo abakowoola Omukama n'omutima omutukuvu." 
2Timothy2:23 Weewale ebibuuzo eby'ekisiru n'obutamanya; omanyi nti bireeta nnyombo. 
2Timothy2:24 Omuweereza w'Omukama teyandiyombye, wabula yandibadde wa kisa eri buli muntu, muyigiriza mulungi era omugumiikiriza," 
2Timothy2:25 agolola n'ekisa abamuwakanya, oboolyawo Katonda n'abawa okwenenya, ne basobola okumanya amazima," 
2Timothy2:26 era ne basobola okuddamu ak'obuntu, ne beetakkuluza mu mutego gwa Sitaani eyabawamba okubakozesa ky'ayagala." 
2Timothy3:1 Naye manya nti mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walibaawo ebiseera ebizibu: 
2Timothy3:2 abantu baliba beefaako bokka, baagazi ba ssente, beepansi, ba lunkulu, bavuma, tebawulira bazadde baabwe, ntasiima, omutali butuukirivu," 
2Timothy3:3 abataliimu kwagala, abatasonyiwa, abawaayiriza, abateefuga, abakambwe, abakyawa ekirungi," 
2Timothy3:4 ab'enkwe, nga badumi, beekuza, banoonyi b'amasanyu mu kifo ky'okunoonya Katonda;" 
2Timothy3:5 nga beeyisa ng'abasomi, sso ng'eddiini tebakkiriza maanyi gaayo. Abo beesambire ddala." 
2Timothy3:6 Abamu ku bano basensera amayumba ne bakwasa abakazikazi, abeebinise ebibi, abatwalibwa amaddu aga buli ngeri," 
2Timothy3:7 bulijjo abagezaako okuyiga naye abatasobola kutuuka ku kumanya mazima. 
2Timothy3:8 Nga Yanne ne Yambure bwe baawakanya Musa, na bano bwe bawakanya amazima, abantu abagwagwawadde, okulabira ku kukkiriza, abatakyabalibwa." 
2Timothy3:9 Naye tebajja kutuuka wala, kubanga obusiru bwabwe bujja kweraga abantu bonna, nga bwe kyali ku bali ababiri." 
2Timothy3:10 Naye ggwe ogoberedde enjigiriza yange, enneeyisa, ekigendererwa, okukkiriza, obugumiikiriza, okwagala, okuguma," 
2Timothy3:11 okuyigganyizibwa, okubonaabona, nga bwe byantuukako mu Antiyokiya, Yikoniyo ne Lisitura; ebyo bye bibonoobono bye nagumira. Kyokka Omukama yamponya mu bino byonna." 
2Timothy3:12 Go amazima gali nti buli alyagala okuba omusomi mu Kristu Yezu, aliyigganyizibwa." 
2Timothy3:13 Naye abantu ababi n'abalimba balyeyongera bubi, nga balimba nabo nga bwe balimbibwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Naye ggwe sigala kw'ekyo kye wayiga n'omatira, ng'omanyi baani be wakiyigako," 
2Timothy3:15 era ng'okuva mu buto omanyi Ebiwandiiko Ebitukuvu, ebisobola okukuwa amagezi ag'okulokoka okuva mu kukkiriza Kristu Yezu." 
2Timothy3:16 Ebiwandiiko byonna ebitukuvu byafuuyirirwa Katonda, era bigasa mu kuyigiriza, mu kusimba ensonga, mu kugolola, ne mu kutendeka mu butuukirivu," 
2Timothy3:17 olwo omuntu wa Katonda alyoke abeere ng'ajjuuliridde, ng'atendekeddwa okukola buli mulimu mulungi." 
2Timothy4:1 Nkukuutirira ddala mu maaso ga Katonda n'aga Kristu Yezu aliramula abalamu n'abafu ku lunaku lw'okulabika kwe n'olw'obwakabaka bwe," 
2Timothy4:2 langirira ekigambo, kinyiikirire we kisanyusiza ne we kitasanyusiza, nnyonnyola, komako, gumya wabula ng'oyigiriza n'obugumiikiriza bwonna." 
2Timothy4:3 Kubanga akadde kalijja abantu nga tebakyagumiikiriza njigiriza nnamu, wabula, olw'ebyo bo bye baagala, balyetuumira abayigiriza aboogera ebisanyusa amatu gaabwe," 
2Timothy4:4 ne balekera awo okuwuliriza amazima, ne badda ku nfumo." 
2Timothy4:5 Naye ggwe ba mukalangufu obudde bwonna, gumiikiriza ebizibu, kola ogw'okuyigiriza Evangili, tuukiriza obuweereza bwo." 
2Timothy4:6 Kubanga nze ka ŋŋambe nti naweebwayo dda ng'ekitone eky'okuyiwa, n'akadde kange katuuse nsitule." 
2Timothy4:7 Olutalo olulungi ndulwanye, embiro nzimalirizza, okukkiriza nkukuumye." 
2Timothy4:8 N'okuva kati engule ey'obutuukirivu entegekeddwa, eyo Omukama, omulamuzi omwenkanya, gy'alimpa ku lunaku olwo, ate si nze nzekka, naye n'abo bonna abaagadde okulabika kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Yanguwa onneegatteko mangu," 
2Timothy4:10 Kubanga Dema, olw'okwagala ensi eno, yanjabulira n'alaga e Tessalonika, ye Kuresike n'agenda e Galasiya, ate Tito e Dalumatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekka y'ali nange; ddira Mariko ojje naye, kubanga angasa nnyo mu kuweereza." 
2Timothy4:12 Nsindise Tukiko e Efezi. 
2Timothy4:13 Bw'obanga ojja, oleetanga omunagiro gwe naleka ne Karupo mu Turowa, n'emizingo, naddala egy'amaliba." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekisanduro omuweesi w'ekikomo yankola akabi kanene; Omukama alimusasula ng'ebikolwa bye bwe bigwanira. 
2Timothy4:15 Naawe mwegendereze, kubanga awakanya nnyo bye twogera." 
2Timothy4:16 Bwe nali neewozaako ogwasooka, tewali yajja kumpolereza; buli omu yanjabulira. Kale, kino kireme kubavunaanibwa!" 
2Timothy4:17 Naye Omukama yali nange, n'ampa amaanyi, okulangirira Evangili kutuuke ku bujjuvu nga kuyita mu nze, ab'amawanga bonna bagiwulire. Ne mponyezebwa bwe ntyo mu kamwa k'empologoma." 
2Timothy4:18 Omukama alimponya buli kabi konna n'antuusa mirembe mu bwakabaka bwe obw'omu ggulu. Oyo aweebwe ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
2Timothy4:19 Prisika ne Akwila n'ab'omu maka ga Onesiforo bandabire. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto yasigala mu Korinti, ate Turofimo ne mmuleka mu Mileto." 
2Timothy4:21 Gezaako okutuuka eno ng'obudde obw'obutiti tebunnaba. Ewubulo, Pudeni, Lino, Kulawudiya n'abooluganda bonna babatumidde." 
2Timothy4:22 Omukama abeere n'omwoyo gwo! Eneema ebeere nammwe mwenna! 
Titus1:1 Pawulo, omuweereza wa Katonda, era Omutume wa Yezu Kristu, olw'okutuusa abalonde b'Omukama ku kukkiriza ne ku kumanya amazima agatuusa ku butuukirivu," 
Titus1:2 olw'okusuubira obulamu obutaggwaawo Katonda oyo atalimba bwe yasuubiza okuva edda n'edda," 
Titus1:3 ate akadde bwe kaatuuka, n'amanyisa ekigambo kye nga kirangirirwa, omulimu gwennyini ogwankwasibwa mu kiragiro ekyava ewa Katonda Mulokozi waffe." 
Titus1:4 Ya Tito, mutabani wange olw'okukkiriza okutugatta awamu; eneema, okusaasira, n'emirembe okuva ewa Katonda Taata n'Omukama Kristu Yezu Mulokozi waffe." 
Titus1:5 Eno ye nsonga eyakundesa mu Kureti nti otereeze ebyali bisigalidde, olondere abakadde mu buli kibuga, nga bwe nali nkulagidde." 
Titus1:6 Bw'abaawo, abeere omuntu ataliiko kimuvunaanibwa, nga wa mukazi omu, ng'alina abaana abakkiriza, abataliiko musango gwa busaasaanyi oba ogw'obutawulira." 
Titus1:7 Ate ye omulabirizi, asaanye abeere nga taliiko musango ng'omuweereza wa Katonda, nga si wa lunkulu, tasunguwala mangu, si mutamiivu, si mukambwe, talulunkanira kufuna," 
Titus1:8 wabula ng'ayaniriza abagenyi, ayagala ekirungi, mwegendereza, muntumulamu, musomi, amanyi okwefuga," 
Titus1:9 anywerera ddala ku kigambo eky'amazima nga bwe kyayigirizibwa, alyoke asobole okugumya abalala n'enjigiriza ennamu n'okukkirizisa abo abagiwakanya." 
Titus1:10 Bangi kati ab'eddalu, aboogera omutali nsa, abalimba, naddala abava mu batayirire." 
Titus1:11 Bateekwa okusirisibwa, kubanga batabangudde amaka mangi nga bayigiriza ebintu bye batandiyigirizza olw'okugoba amagoba omutali." 
Titus1:12 N'omu ku bo, ate omulanzi waabwe, yajulira nti: “Abakureti bulijjo balimba, bisolo bigwagwa, ngajaba zikaliira.”" 
Titus1:13 Kye yajulira kino kya mazima; awo nno bakangavvule babe balamu mu kukkiriza," 
Titus1:14 ne batadda mu kuwuliriza nfumo za Kiyudaaya na biragiro bya bantu abaava ku mazima. 
Titus1:15 Ku balongoofu byonna biba birongoofu, naye ku abo aboonoonefu, abatakkiriza, teri kitukuvu, anti nga n'emitima gyabwe n'emmeeme zaabwe byayonooneka." 
Titus1:16 Bagamba nti bamanyi Katonda, naye mu bye bakola byennyini mwe bamwegaanira; abo beenyinyalwa, si bawulize, abatagwanidde kintu kirungi na kimu." 
Titus2:1 Ggwe nno yigiriza ebyo ebituukana n'enjigiriza ennamu. 
Titus2:2 Kubirizanga abasajja abakulu babe bantu abamanyi okwefuga, ab'ekitiibwa, abantubalamu, abalamu mu kukkiriza, mu kwagala ne mu bugumiikiriza." 
Titus2:3 Era bw'otyo ne ku bakazi abakulu, babe ba kitiibwa mu neeyisa yaabwe, abatasala bigambo, nga si bafugwa mwenge, wabula abayigiriza ekirungi;" 
Titus2:4 olwo basobole okuyigiriza abakazi abakyali abato okwagala babbaabwe n'okwagala abaana baabwe; 
Titus2:5 babe abantubalamu, abatukuvu, abakozi b'emirimu awaka, ab'ekisa, abagondera babbaabwe, ekigambo kya Katonda kireme kwogerwako bubi." 
Titus2:6 Era bw'otyo bw'oba okubiriza n'abasajja abakyali abato okumanya okwefuga. 
Titus2:7 Mu byonna beera ekyokulabirako eky'ebikolwa ebirungi. Ng'oyigiriza beera ow'ebirowoozo ebiruŋŋamu era ebigumu," 
Titus2:8 ow'ebigambo ebiramu ebitasobola kuvunaanibwa; olwo abo abakuwakanya baswale olw'obutaba na kibi kye bayinza kutwogerako. 
Titus2:9 Abaddu bakubirize okugonderanga bakama baabwe, nga bagezaako okubasanyusa mu buli kintu, nga tebabaanukula," 
Titus2:10 abateetoolatoola, wabula balage obwesigwa obulungi obwa namaddala, balyoke mu buli ngeri baweese enjigiriza ya Katonda Mulokozi waffe ekifaananyi ekirungi." 
Titus2:11 Anti eneema ya Katonda yalabika ereetere abantu bonna okulokoka. 
Titus2:12 Etuyigiriza okwegaana buli kikaafiiri n'amaddu g'ensi, tubeere abamanyi okwefuga, ab'empisa, abatuukirivu era abasomi mu nsi eno," 
Titus2:13 nga bwe tulinda essuubi ery'omukisa n'okulabika kwa Katonda waffe omukulu era Omulokozi Kristu Yezu," 
Titus2:14 eyeewaayo olw'okubeera ffe alyoke atununule mu buli bubi bwonna, ate yeetukulize abantu ababe ku bubwe, abatakabanira okukola ekirungi." 
Titus2:15 Bino nno by'oba oyogera; kubiriza, komako n'obuyinza bwonna. Wabulewo n'omu akunyooma." 
Titus3:1 Bajjukize okugondera abaami n'abali mu buyinza, okuba abawulize, abeetegefu okukola buli kirungi," 
Titus3:2 nga tebawaayiriza, tebayombayomba, bateefu, ab'eggonjebwa eri buli muntu." 
Titus3:3 Olumu naffe twali basiru, nga tetuwulira, nga tuwubisiddwa, nga tufuuse baddu ba bika ebitali bimu ebya maddu n'amasanyu; mu bulamu bwaffe nga tuli ba kitimatima na buggya; nga tukyayiddwa ate naffe nga tukyawaganye;" 
Titus3:4 naye ekisa n'okwagala kwa Katonda Mukama waffe bwe byalabika," 
Titus3:5 n'atulokola, si lwa kubeera bikolwa byaffe bye twali tukoze eby'obutuukirivu, naye lwa kubeera kisa kye, ng'ayita mu kunaazibwa okw'okuzaalibwa ogwokubiri n'okuzzibwa obuggya mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Titus3:6 gwe yatuyiira mu bungi ng'ayita mu Yezu Kristu Mulokozi waffe; 
Titus3:7 eneema ye ng'emaze okutufuula abatuukirivu, tulyoke tufuuke basika abalina essuubi ery'obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Titus3:8 Ekyogerwa kino kya mazima. Njagala bino obikkaatirize, abo abakkirizza Katonda bafeeyo ku kukola ebikolwa ebirungi; ebintu ebyo birungi era biyamba abantu." 
Titus3:9 Naye weewale endasano ez'ekisiru, n'okunonooza endyo, okuyomba n'okukaayana ku Tteeka, kubanga bino tebiganyula era temuli kantu." 
Titus3:10 Omuntu aleeta enjawukana ng'omaze okumulabula ogusooka n'ogwokubiri, mulekere ddala." 
Titus3:11 Manya nti ow'engeri eyo mukyamu era mwonoonyi, yeesalidde yekka omusango." 
Titus3:12 Nga mmaze okukusindikira Aritema oba Tukiko, sala gonna onsisinkane e Nikopoli, kubanga nsazeewo obudde obw'obutiti okubumala eyo." 
Titus3:13 Fuba nnyo okuyamba Zena munnamateeka ne Apollo mu lugendo lwabwe, era laba nga tebajula kantu." 
Titus3:14 Abantu baffe balina okuyiga okukola emirimo emirungi, basobole okudduukirira mu bwetaavu obwa mangu, baleme kubeera ntagasa." 
Titus3:15 Bonna be ndi nabo eno bakutumidde. Ndabira abo abatwagala mu kukkiriza. Eneema ebeere nammwe mwenna. 
Philemon1:1 Pawulo, omusibe wa Kristu Yezu, ne muganda waffe Timotewo. Ya mukozi munnaffe Filemoni omwagalwa," 
Philemon1:2 ne mwannyinaffe Affiya, mutabaazi munnaffe Arikippo, n'Ekleziya asisinkana mu nnyumba yo." 
Philemon1:3 Enneema ebeere nammwe, n'eddembe lya Katonda Kitaffe n'Omukama Yezu Kristu." 
Philemon1:4 Bulijjo neebaza Katonda buli lwe nkujjukira mu ssaala zange," 
Philemon1:5 kubanga mpulira ku kwagala kw'oyagalamu abatuukirivu bonna, n'okukkiriza kw'okkirizaamu Omukama Yezu." 
Philemon1:6 Nsaba nti okussa ekimu kw'olina mu kukkiriza kukole mu ggwe, omanye na buli kirungi kye tulina mu Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 Okwagala kwo kwansanyula bya kitalo era ne kunkubagiza, kubanga olw'okubeera ggwe, emitima gy'abatuukirivu giweweddeko." 
Philemon1:8 Newandibadde mu Kristu nandigumye okukulagira ky'osaanye okukola," 
Philemon1:9 naye olw'okubeera okwagala, nkuwanjagira buwanjagizi; nze Pawulo, omukadde ate kati omusibe wa Kristu Yezu," 
Philemon1:10 nkuwanjagira olw'omwana wange gwe nazaala nga ndi mu njegere zino, ntegeeza Onesimo." 
Philemon1:11 Mu kusooka yali takugasa, naye kati atugasa ffembi, nze naawe." 
Philemon1:12 Mmukusindikidde akomewo, oyo kyenkana omutima gwange gwennyini." 
Philemon1:13 Nandyagadde mmusigaze, ggwe w'otoli annyambe nga ndi mu njegere olw'Evangili," 
Philemon1:14 naye saayagala kukola kantu nga ggwe tokkirizza, ky'okola ekirungi kireme kubeera ng'eky'etteeka, wabula kibeere ekivudde mu kwetuma." 
Philemon1:15 Ndowooza yakuggyibwako akaseera, alyoke akuddizibwe nkomeredde," 
Philemon1:16 nga takyali muddu, wabula ng'asinga n'omuddu, owooluganda omwagalwa, omuganzi gye ndi, ate asingawo n'obuganzi gy'oli ng'omuntu ate ne mu Mukama." 
Philemon1:17 Kale nno bw'oba ng'ontwala nga munno, mwanirize nga bwe wandyanirizza nze." 
Philemon1:18 Bw'aba ng'aliko kye yakusobyamu, oba ng'oliko ky'omubanja, kibalire ku nze." 
Philemon1:19 Nze Pawulo, kino nkiwandiise n'omukono gwange gwennyini nti ndikisasula, ne bwe siiyogere ku bbanja ggwe ly'onninako." 
Philemon1:20 Kale nno, owooluganda, njagala ombeerere wa mugaso mu Mukama, omutima gwange oguwe guweweereko mu Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Nkuwandiikidde nga neesize obuwulize bwo, nga mmanyi nti ojja kukola ate osinzeewo ne ku kye nsaba." 
Philemon1:22 Ate mu kaseera ke kamu, ntegekeraawo ekisenge, kubanga nsuubira nti olw'essaala zammwe nnyinza okubaddizibwa." 
Philemon1:23 Epafura, musibe munnange mu Kristu Yezu, akutumidde;" 
Philemon1:24 era ne bannange bwe tukola: Mariko, Aristariko, Dema ne Luka." 
Philemon1:25 Eneema ya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ebeere n'omwoyo gwammwe. 
Hebrews1:1 Edda Katonda yayogeranga ne bajjajjaffe emirundi mingi ate mu ngeri ezitali zimu ng'ayita mu balanzi; 
Hebrews1:2 ddaaki mu nsangi zino ez'oluvannyuma n'ayogera naffe mu Mwana gwe yawa okusikira byonna; mu oyo mwe yatondera ensi. 
Hebrews1:3 Ye kwe kutangalijja kw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda, ye nfaanana ye yennyini, awanirira obutonde bwonna n'amaanyi g'ekigambo kye. Bwe yamala abantu okubatukuzaako ebibi, n'atuula ku gwa ddyo gw'Oweekitiibwa ali waggulu," 
Hebrews1:4 ng'amaze okusukkulumizibwa n'okusinga bamalayika kyenkana ng'erinnya lye yasikira bwe libasukkiridde ekitiibwa. 
Hebrews1:5 Kale malayika ani Katonda gwe yali agambye nti: “Ggwe oli Mwana wange, olwa leero nkuzadde”? Oba era nti: “Ndibeera Kitaawe, naye alibeera mwana wange”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ate era bw'aba ayingiza Omwana we omuggulanda mu nsi, agamba nti: “Bamalayika ba Katonda bonna bamusinze.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Ku bamalayika agamba nti: “Oyo afuula bamalayika be empewo, n'abaweereza be abafuula ennimi z'omuliro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Sso ku Mwana, agamba nti: “Nnamulondo yo, ayi Katonda, ya mirembe na mirembe; ddamula w'obwakabaka bwo ddamula wa butuukirivu." 
Hebrews1:9 Wayagala obutuukirivu n'okyawa obugwenyufu. Katonda nno, Katonda wo, kyavudde akusiiga omuzigo, omuzigo ogw'essanyu okusinga ne banywanyi bo.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Ate nti: “Ayi Mukama, mu kusookera ddala wabangawo ensi, n'eggulu mulimu gwa mikono gyo." 
Hebrews1:11 Ebyo birizikirira, naye ggwe osigalawo;" 
Hebrews1:12 birikaddiwa ng'olugoye, olibizingako ng'omunagiro, birikyuka ng'ekyambalo, naye ggwe osigala ggwe omu, n'emyaka gyo tegiriiko kkomo.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Naye malayika ani gwe yali agambye nti: “Tuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa abalabe bo lwe ndibafuula akatebe k'ebigere byo”?" 
Hebrews1:14 Gyonna egyo si myoyo egikola ogw'obuweereza egy'atumibwa olw'abo ab'okusikira obulokofu? 
Hebrews2:1 Awo nno ffe tuteekwa okussa omwoyo ku ebyo bye twawulira, sikulwa nga tubyebengulako." 
Hebrews2:2 Obanga kale biri bamalayika bye baalangirira byali bisiba ng'etteeka, nga buli kubimenya n'obutabigondera bibonerezebwa mu ngeri esaanide," 
Hebrews2:3 leero ffe tunaawonera wa bwe twekolera ne tugayaalirira ekigambo eky'okulokoka ekikulu kityo? Kwasooka kulangirirwa Mukama, ne kututegeezebwa bali abaamuwulira." 
Hebrews2:4 Ne Katonda yakakasa bye boogedde ng'akola obubonero, ebyewuunyo n'ebyamagero ebitali bimu, n'ebitone bya Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bye yagabanga nga bwe yayagalanga." 
Hebrews2:5 Ensi erijja gye twogerako bamalayika Katonda si be yagikwasa. 
Hebrews2:6 Waliwo awajulizibwa, omu ng'agamba nti: “Omuntu ye ani gw'ojjukira, oba omwana w'Omuntu ye ani gw'ossaako omwoyo?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wamubuzaako katono okuba nga bamalayika; wamutikkira ekitiibwa n'ettendo; 
Hebrews2:8 byonna n'obissa wansi w'ebigere bye.” Byonna bwe yabissa wansi we, tewali kye yalekayo ky'atassa mu buyinza bwe. Weewaawo kati tetulaba nga byonna biri mu buyinza bwe." 
Hebrews2:9 Naye tulaba Yezu, oyo eyamala akabanga ng'atoowaziddwa n'akirwa bamalayika, kati atikkiddwa engule ey'ekitiibwa n'ettendo ebyamuviira mu kubonaabona ne mu kufa; ye olw'eneema ya Katonda yateekwa okulega ku lumbe ku lwa buli muntu." 
Hebrews2:10 Kubanga kyali kisaana, olw'okutuusa abaana abangi mu kitiibwa, oyo byonna gwe bibeererawo ku lulwe era abeesaawo byonna, oli eyali ow'okubakulembera abatuuse ku kulokoka kwabwe, okumufuula omutuukirivu ng'ayita mu kubonaabona." 
Hebrews2:11 Anti oli atukuza n'abo b'atukuza bonna basibuka ku kikolo kimu; kyava takwatibwa nsonyi kubayita baganda be," 
Hebrews2:12 ng'agamba nti: “Ndirangirira erinnya lyo mu baganda bange, ndikutendereza mu kibiina wakati.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Era nti: “Mu ye mwe ndissa obwesige bwange.” Era nti: “Nzuuno, nze n'abaana abange Katonda be yampa.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Kubanga abaana abo baali ba luse lumu, omubiri n'omusaayi, naye lwe luse lumu olwo kwe yagabana, alyoke azikirize oyo eyalina obuyinza obw'okufa, anti ye Sitaani," 
Hebrews2:15 asumulule abo abaali mu buddu obulamu bwabwe bwonna olw'okutya okufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Mu mazima bamalayika si be yafaako, wabula yafa ku bazzukulu ba Yiburayimu." 
Hebrews2:17 Kyeyava agwanira okufaanana baganda be mu byonna, alyoke afuuke kabona omukulu omusaasizi era omwesigwa mu ebyo ebidda ku Katonda, addaabirize olw'ebibi by'abantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Kubanga yennyini yayita mu kugezebwa, kati asobola bulungi okuyamba abalala abali mu kugezebwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Kale nno, abooluganda abatuukirivu, abagabana ku kuyitibwa okumu okw'omu ggulu, mwetegereze Yezu omutume era kabona omukulu ow'enzikiriza yaffe." 
Hebrews3:2 Yali mwesigwa eri oyo eyamuteekawo, nga Musa bwe yali omwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda yonna." 
Hebrews3:3 Kyokka ye yasaanira okuba n'ekitiibwa ekisinga ekya Musa, ng'era omuzimbi w'ennyumba bw'aba n'ekitiibwa okusinga ennyumba yennyini." 
Hebrews3:4 Anti buli nnyumba ebaako agizimba ggwe wamma, naye byonna eyabizimbawo ye Katonda." 
Hebrews3:5 Musa yali mwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda yonna, kyokka ng'omuweereza, akakase ebyali bigenda okwogerwa." 
Hebrews3:6 Naye Kristu yali mwesigwa mu nnyumba ya Katonda ng'omwana. Ffe nnyumba ye kasita tusigala bulijjo nga tunyweredde mu bwesige n'okwenyumiriza essuubi lyaffe bye lituwa. 
Hebrews3:7 Kale nno, nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bw'agamba: “Olwa leero singa muwulira eddoboozi lye," 
Hebrews3:8 muleke kugugubya mitima gyammwe nga mu kujeema, ku lunaku olw'ekikemo mu ddungu," 
Hebrews3:9 bajjajjammwe gye bankemera, nga bangeza, sso baalaba bye nkola mu myaka amakumi ana." 
Hebrews3:10 Kyennava nsunguwalira ezzadde eryo, ne ŋŋamba nti: ‘Bulijjo bawaba mu mitima gyabwe; tebamanyi makubo gange.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Kyennava ndayira mu busungu bwange nti: ‘Tebaliyingira n'akamu mu kiwummulo kyange.’ ” 
Hebrews3:12 Kale nno, abooluganda, mwekkaanye mu mmwe muleme kubaamu alina mutima mubi, ogutakkiriza, n'abaleetera okugwa nga muva ku Katonda omulamu." 
Hebrews3:13 Wabula munywezagane buli lukya, ebbanga lyonna ng'olunaku lukyali 'olwa leero', mu mmwe wabulewo aguguba olw'okusendebwasendebwa ekibi." 
Hebrews3:14 Ffenna tugabana ku Kristu, kasita obwesige bwe twalina mu masooka tubunywererako okutuusa ku nkomerero." 
Hebrews3:15 Bwe bagamba nti: “Olwa leero singa muwulira eddoboozi lye, muleke kugugubya mitima gyammwe, nga ku luli olw'okujeema,”" 
Hebrews3:16 baki abo abaawulira ate ne bajeema? Si be bo abaali bamaze okuva e Misiri nga bakulemberwa Musa? 
Hebrews3:17 Abaamusunguwaza okumala emyaka amakumi ana baki? Si be bo abaakola ekibi emirambo gyabwe ne gisigala nga gigudde mu ddungu? 
Hebrews3:18 Ate b'ani be yalayirira obutayingiza mu kiwummulo kye? Si be bo abaagaana okumuwulira? 
Hebrews3:19 Tulaba nno nga tebaasobola kuyingira olw'obutakkiriza. 
Hebrews4:1 Kale nno twegendereze, wabulewo n'omu mu mmwe agambibwa nti alemereddwa okukituukako, sso ng'ekisuubizo ekyasuubiza okuyingira mu kiwummulo kikyaliwo." 
Hebrews4:2 Naffe amawulire amalungi gaatuyigirizibwa kyenkana nga bali; naye ekigambo kye baawulira mpaawo kye kyabagasa, kubanga mu baakiwulira tekyasangamu kukkiriza." 
Hebrews4:3 Naye ffe abakkiriza tuyingira mu kiwummulo, nga bwe yagamba nti: “Kyennava ndayira mu busungu bwange nti: ‘Tebaliyingira n'akamu mu kiwummulo kyange.’ ” Sso emirimo gye gyonna gyaggwa luli ensi lwe yabangibwawo." 
Hebrews4:4 Kubanga n'awalala ayogera ku lunaku olwomusanvu nti: “Katonda n'awummula emirimo gye gyonna ku lunaku olwomusanvu.” 
Hebrews4:5 Era naawo agamba nti: “Tebaliyingira n'akamu mu kiwummulo kyange.” 
Hebrews4:6 Nga bwe waliwo nno abakyasobola okuyingiramu, kubanga bali be baali bagambye amawulire amalungi baalemwa okuyingira olw'obutawulira," 
Hebrews4:7 Katonda kwe kussaawo olunaku olulala nti: “Olwa leero,” ng'ayogerera mu Dawudi oluvannyumako, mu bigambo ebyajuliziddwa edda nti: “Olwa leero, singa muwulira eddoboozi lye, muleke kugugubya mitima gyammwe.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Singa Yoswa yali abatuusizza mu kiwummulo, Katonda teyandyogedde ku lunaku lulala olw'oluvannyumako." 
Hebrews4:9 Awo nno okuwummula kwa Sabbaato kukyaliwo ku lw'abantu ba Katonda," 
Hebrews4:10 anti oli aba ayingidde mu kiwummulo kya Katonda, awummula emirimu gye, nga Katonda bwe yakola ku gigye." 
Hebrews4:11 Tusale gonna nno okuyingira mu kiwummulo omwo, wabulewo agwa olw'ekyokulabirako ky'obutawulira ng'obwo." 
Hebrews4:12 Anti ekigambo kya Katonda kiramu, kikola, kisala n'okusinga ekitala ekirina obwogi ku njuyi zombi; kiyingirira ddala okutuusa okwawula omutima n'omwoyo, ennyingo n'obusomyo, kyekenneenya ebigendererwa n'ebirowoozo by'omutima." 
Hebrews4:13 Mu maaso ge mpaawo kitonde na kimu kikisiddwa, byonna byanike, biri mu kyangaala mu maaso g'oyo gye tugenda okuwoleza." 
Hebrews4:14 Tumaze okuba ne kabona omukulu atyo, eyasenserera eggulu, Yezu Omwana wa Katonda, tunyweze enzikiriza yaffe." 
Hebrews4:15 Kubanga tetulina kabona atatukwatirwa kisa mu bunafu bwaffe, naye tulina oyo eyagezebwa mu byonna nga ffe, kyokka n'atakola kibi." 
Hebrews4:16 Awo nno tusembere eri nnamulondo y'eneema nga tuli bagumu, tusaasirwe, twefunire eneema ey'okutuyamba nga tubadde mu bwetaavu." 
Hebrews5:1 Buli kabona omukulu aggyibwa mu bantu n'assibwawo ku lw'abantu ku bidda eri Katonda, aweereze ebitone n'ebitambiro olw'ebibi." 
Hebrews5:2 Asobola okukwata n'ekisa abatalina kye bamanyi n'abawaba, anti nga naye yennyini mu buli wantu muyabayaba." 
Hebrews5:3 Kyava talema kutambira lwa bibi bye yennyini nga bw'akola olw'ebibi by'abantu abalala. 
Hebrews5:4 Tewali yeewa kitiibwa ekyo, wabula ayitibwa Katonda nga bwe kyali ku Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Ne Kristu bw'atyo si ye yeegulumiza okufuuka kabona omukulu; wabula oli eyamugamba nti: “Oli Mwana wange, olwa leero nkuzadde;”" 
Hebrews5:6 era nga bw'agamba n'awalala nti: “Ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki.” 
Hebrews5:7 Ebbanga lye yamala ng'ali mu mubiri, yaweereza okwegayirira n'okuwanjaga mu kuleekaana n'amaanyi ne mu maziga eri oyo eyalina obuyinza okumuwonya olumbe; yawulirwa kubanga yatya Katonda." 
Hebrews5:8 Nandibadde yali Mwana, yayiga obuwulize ng'ayita mu ebyo bye yabonaabonamu." 
Hebrews5:9 Ng'amaze okumalirizibwa mu bujjuvu, bonna abaamugondera yabafuukira nsulo ya kulokoka okw'emirembe gyonna," 
Hebrews5:10 ne Katonda n'amulangirira nti ye kabona omukulu mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Ku nsonga eno tulina bingi eby'okwogera ate nga bizibu okunnyonnyola, kubanga kati mukaluubirirwa okuwulira." 
Hebrews5:12 Kati obudde we butuuse mazima mwandibadde bayigiriza, naye laba mukyetaagisa okuddamu okuyigirizibwa ekigambo kya Katonda okuviira ddala ku bisooka. Mwetaaga mata si mmere ŋŋumu." 
Hebrews5:13 Mu mazima, oli akyali ku mata taba mukugu mu kigambo kya butuukirivu, kubanga akyali muwere." 
Hebrews5:14 Naye emmere eŋŋumu ye y'abakuza; ey'abo, olw'ebyo bye bayiseemu, emitima gyabwe egitendekeddwa mu kwawula ekirungi ku kibi." 
Hebrews6:1 Awo nno tuve ku bino ebisookerwako bye twayiga ku Kristu, tulinnyuke ku by'ekikulu nga tetuzzeemu ate ku bye twasokerako eby'okwekomako ku bikolwa ebifu era n'okukkiriza Katonda," 
Hebrews6:2 okunnyonnyola batismu, okussibwako emikono, okuzuukira kw'abafu, n'okulamulibwa okutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews6:3 Kino tulikikola nga Katonda ayagadde. 
Hebrews6:4 Kubanga kizibu okukomyawo nate abo olumu abaamulisibwa, ne balega ku kirabo eky'omu ggulu, ne bagabana ku Mwoyo Mutuukirivu," 
Hebrews6:5 ne balega ku bulungi bw'ekigambo kya Katonda n'amaanyi ag'emirembe egirijja," 
Hebrews6:6 ate ne bagwa, okubazza omulundi omulala ne beenenya, anti baba ku bwabwe bakomerera Mwana wa Katonda ku musaalaba na kumusekerera." 
Hebrews6:7 Ettaka erinywa enkuba eritonnyako bulijjo, ne lizza ebimera ebigasa abalirima, lifuna omukisa okuva ewa Katonda." 
Hebrews6:8 Naye bwe lizza amaggwa n'amatovu, teririna kye ligasa, ligwanye kuvumirirwa. Enkomerero yaalyo kubeera kwokebwa muliro." 
Hebrews6:9 Abaagalwa, lwa kwogera tutyo, naye ku mmwe tukakasa nga muli ba kufuna ebirungi ebisingawo eby'okulokoka." 
Hebrews6:10 Kubanga Katonda si gw'ogamba nti si mwenkanya, eyeerabira omulimu gwe mukoze, n'okwagala kwe mulaga mu linnya lye, nga muweereza abatuukirivu era nga bwe mukyabaweereza." 
Hebrews6:11 Twegomba nti buli omu mu mmwe alage obunyiikivu bwe bumu okutuusa ku nkomerero okulaba nga bye musuubira bituukirizibwa," 
Hebrews6:12 ne mutabeera awo nga mugayadde, wabula abalabira ku abo olw'okukkiriza kwabwe n'obugumiikiriza abasikira ebisuubizo." 
Hebrews6:13 Katonda bwe yali asuubiza Yiburayimu, olw'obutabaawo amukira gwe yandirayidde, kyeyava yeerayirira yennyini nti:" 
Hebrews6:14 “Ddala nzija kukuwa omukisa, nkuwe n'okwala.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Bw'atyo Yiburayimu olw'okugumiikiriza yafuna ekyamusuubizibwa. 
Hebrews6:16 Abantu bo balayira oyo abasingako obukulu; abantu bwe baba mu mpaka zaabwe, ekirayiro kye kikakasa eky'enkomerero." 
Hebrews6:17 Ne Katonda bwe yayagala okukakasa abalisikira ebisuubizo nga ky'ateesa bwe kitakyuka, yayingizaawo ekirayiro;" 
Hebrews6:18 bwe kityo mu bibiri ebitakyuka Katonda mw'atayinza kulimbira, ffe abanoonya obwewogomo tulyoke tugumizibwe n'amaanyi, tunyweze essuubi erituweereddwa." 
Hebrews6:19 Essuubi eryo ye nnanga y'omwoyo gye tulina ennywevu etesagaasagana; essuubi eriyingirira ddala munda emabega w'olutimbe," 
Hebrews6:20 Yezu eyatukulemberamu gye yayingira ku lwaffe, ng'amaze okufuuka kabona omukulu emirembe gyonna mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Ono Melekisedeki, kabaka w'e Saalemu, kabona wa Katonda Ali Waggulu ddala, yasisinkana Yiburayimu ng'adda eka ng'amaze okugoba bakabaka, n'amuwa omukisa;" 
Hebrews7:2 ne Yiburayimu n'amwawulizaako ekitundu eky'ekkumi ku bintu byonna. Okusooka, erinnya lye livvuunulibwa nti 'kabaka ow'obutuukirivu', era litegeeza kabaka w'e Saalemu, kwe kugamba nti 'kabaka ow'emirembe'." 
Hebrews7:3 Talina kitaawe, talina nnyina, talina lulyo, talina lunaku lwe yasookerako yadde enkomerero y'obulamu bwe. Ali ng'Omwana wa Katonda; asigala kabona ennaku zonna." 
Hebrews7:4 Mulabe bw'ali omukulu! Oyo Kitaffe Omukulu Yiburayimu gwe yawa n'ekyekkumi eky'omunyago gwe. 
Hebrews7:5 Ate n'abaana ba Leevi bwe baafunanga obwakabona baalagirwanga okuggya ekyekkumi ku bantu ng'Etteeka bwe ligamba. Kwe kugamba nti bakiggya nno ku baganda baabwe, sso nga nabo bazzukulu ba Yiburayimu." 
Hebrews7:6 Sso ono atali wa lulyo lwabwe, yaggya ekyekkumi ku Yiburayimu, n'amuwa n'omukisa, Yiburayimu eyali asuubiziddwa." 
Hebrews7:7 Tewali kuwannaanya nti omuto y'afuna omukisa ew'omukulu. 
Hebrews7:8 Wano abafuna ekyekkumi be bantu abafa; naye wali, afuna aba akakasibwa ng'akyali mulamu." 
Hebrews7:9 Oyinza okugamba nti Leevi oyo yennyini afuna ekyekkumi naye yakiweera mu Yiburayimu," 
Hebrews7:10 Kubanga yali akyali mu ntumbwe za jjajjaawe Yiburayimu Melekisedeki lwe yamusisinkana. 
Hebrews7:11 Singa obwakabona bwa Leevi bwali bumala okutuusa ku kutuukirira mu bujjuvu, - anti mu bwo Etteeka mwe lyaweerwa abantu, - ate kiki ekyandireesezza kabona omulala ow'omu lubu lwa Melekisedeki atamenyerwa mu lubu lwa Aroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Obwakabona bwe bukyuka, n'etteeka ggwe wamma lirina kukyuka." 
Hebrews7:13 Anti ono gwe boogerako mu bino wa kika kirala omutavanga n'omu yali aweerezza ku mwaliiro. 
Hebrews7:14 Kimanyiddwa bulungi nga Mukama waffe yasibuka mu Yuda, ekika Musa ky'atayogerangako ku bikwata ku bakabona." 
Hebrews7:15 Ekyatangaaza byonna kwe kusitukawo kabona omulala ali mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 eyafuuka kabona, si lwa bulombolombo bwa mu Tteeka obwesiba ku ndyo z'abantu, wabula olw'amaanyi ag'obulamu obutalisaanyizibwawo." 
Hebrews7:17 Anti ye gwe bajulira nti: “Ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna; mu lubu lwa Melekisedeki.” 
Hebrews7:18 Ekiragiro nno eky'edda kyadibizibwa, kubanga kyali kinafu nga tekirina kye kiyamba -" 
Hebrews7:19 anti Etteeka tewali kye lyamaliriza - naye waaleetebwawo essuubi erisingawo, mwe tuyima okusemberera Katonda." 
Hebrews7:20 Ate nno ekyo tekyajja nga tekuli kirayiro. Abo edda baafuukanga bakabona nga tekuli kirayiro," 
Hebrews7:21 naye ono ye yaliko n'ekirayiro, okuva ew'oyo eyamugamba nti: “Omukama yalayira, era tagenda kwejjusa: ggwe oli kabona emirembe gyonna.”" 
Hebrews7:22 Olwa kino Yezu yafuuka omuyima ow'endagaano ekira. 
Hebrews7:23 Era bakabona ab'edda baali bangi, anti ng'olumbe terubaganya kusigalawo." 
Hebrews7:24 Sso ono kubanga asigalawo emirembe gyonna, n'obwakabona bw'alina bwa mirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews7:25 Awo nno abayita ku ye okusembera eri Katonda kyava aba n'obuyinza okubalokola ennaku zonna, anti nga bulijjo waali mulamu okubawolereza." 
Hebrews7:26 Twali twetaaga okuba ne kabona ow'engeri eyo, omutuukirivu, ataliiko musango, ataliiko bbala, ayawuliddwa ku boonoonyi, asukkulumye okukira eggulu," 
Hebrews7:27 ateetaaga kukola nga bakabona bali bwe baakolanga, buli lunaku okuweereza ebitambiro, ekisooka olw'ebibi bye, ate ne ky'aweereza ku lwa bantu. Ye ekyo yakikola omulundi gumu n'amala bwe yeeweereza yennyini." 
Hebrews7:28 Etteeka be lifuula bakabona abakulu baba bantu bayabayaba; naye ekigambo ky'ekirayiro ekyaddirira Etteeka kyalonda Omwana eyafuulibwa atuukiridde emirembe gyonna. 
Hebrews8:1 Mu bye tugambye, ekikulu kye kino, nti tulina kabona omukulu ow'engeri eyo, atudde ku ddyo wa nnamulondo y'Oweekitiibwa mu ggulu," 
Hebrews8:2 omuweereza mu Kitukuvu mu Weema eya nnamaddala, etassibwawo muntu buntu, wabula Omukama." 
Hebrews8:3 Manyanga buli kabona omukulu assibwawo kuweereza bitone na bitambiro; awo nno n'ono alina okubaako ky'aweereza. 
Hebrews8:4 Ate ddala aba kubeera ku nsi, teyandibadde kabona n'akamu, anti nga kuliko bakabona abaweereza ebitambiro ng'Etteeka bwe ligamba." 
Hebrews8:5 Sso bo omulimu gwabwe guba gwa kufaanaanyiriza na kubeera bisiikirize eby'ebyo ebibeererawo ddala mu ggulu. Kubanga Musa bwe yali agenda okusimbawo Weema yalabulirwawo nti: “Wekkaanye, byonna obikolanga ng'ogoberera ekifaananyi ekikulagiddwa ku lusozi.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Naye kati Kristu yafuna omulimu mu bukulu bwagwo ogusingira ddala egy'edda, anti endagaano gy'alimu ng'omutabaganya nnungi okusinga kubanga enyweredde ku bisuubizo ebikira obulungi." 
Hebrews8:7 Singa eyasooka temwali nsobi, eyookubiri teyandyetaagiddwa." 
Hebrews8:8 Naye Katonda yasangamu ensobi bw'agamba nti: “Laba, ennaku zijja, Omukama y'agamba, lwe ndikola endagaano empya n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli, n'ennyumba ya Yuda;" 
Hebrews8:9 teriba ng'endagaano gye nakola ne bajjajjaabwe ku lunaku lwe nabakwata ku mukono okubaggya mu nsi y'e Misiri, kubanga tebaasigala ku ndagaano. Nange kyennava sibafaako, Omukama y'agamba." 
Hebrews8:10 Eno y'endagaano gye ndikola n'ennyumba ya Yisirayeli oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo, Omukama y'agamba: Amateeka gange ŋŋenda kugassa munda mu myoyo gyabwe, ngawandiike ku mitima gyabwe. Ndibeera Katonda waabwe, nabo balibeera bantu bange." 
Hebrews8:11 Buli omu talyetaaga kuyigiriza munne, oba buli omu okugamba muganda we nti: ‘Manya Omukama,’ kubanga bagenda kummanya bonna, okuva ku asembayo obuto okutuuka kw'asinga obukulu," 
Hebrews8:12 kubanga ndibasonyiwa emisango gyabwe, n'ebibi byabwe siriddayo kubijjukira”" 
Hebrews8:13 Bw'ayogera ku kiggya, aba adibizza ekyasooka. Ekiba kidibiziddwa nga kigenda kikaddiwa kiba kisigalidde kusaanawo." 
Hebrews9:1 Endagaano eyasooka yalina emikolo gyayo egy'okusinza n'Ekitukuvu kyayo ku nsi. 
Hebrews9:2 Weema yali essiddwawo; mu kitundu kyayo eky'omu maaso nga we wali ekikondo ky'ettawaaza, emmeeza, n'Emigaati egy'Okwolesebwa. Ekitundu ekyo nga kiyitibwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Hebrews9:3 Eri emabega w'olutimbe olwokubiri we waali Weema eyayitibwanga Awatukuvu Ennyo. 
Hebrews9:4 Waaliyo Omwaliiro ogwa zaabu ogw'obubaani n'Essanduuku ey'Endaagaano, yonna nga mbikke zaabu ku njuyi zonna. Omwo mwalimu ekibya kya zaabu omwali manu n'omuggo gwa Aroni ogwayanya, ate n'empande z'Endagaano." 
Hebrews9:5 Kungulu ku Ssanduuku nga kuliko bakerubi ab'ekitiibwa, nga babikkiridde Entebe y'Obusaasizi. Bino tetujja kubyogerako mu bujjuvu." 
Hebrews9:6 Ebyo nga bimaze okutereezebwa bityo, bakabona bayingira bulijjo mu Weema esooka okukola emirimu gyabwe egy'okuweereza." 
Hebrews9:7 Naye mu Weema eyookubiri, kabona omukulu yekka y'ayingiramu, ate omulundi gumu mu mwaka, ate nga talemye kutwalirako musaayi gw'aweereza ku lulwe ne ku lw'abantu be olw'ebyo bye batanwamu." 
Hebrews9:8 Mu kino Mwoyo Mutuukirivu atutegeeza nti ekkubo eriyingiza mu Kitukuvu terinnaggulibwa kasita Weema eyasooka eba ng'ekyaliwo. 
Hebrews9:9 Kino kabonero eri obudde buno, nti okusinziira ku nkola eno, ebitone n'ebitambiro ebiweerezebwamu tebisobola kutukuza mitima gy'abaweereza." 
Hebrews9:10 Wabula bidda ku mmere, ku byakunywa ne ku by'okunaaba okw'engeri ez'enjawulo, ebyalinga amateeka agadda ku mubiri obubiri okutuusa obudde obw'okutereeza ebintu obuggya." 
Hebrews9:11 Naye Kristu yatuuka, kabona omukulu ow'ebirungi ebirijja, ng'ayita mu Weema esinga ekitiibwa n'okumalirizibwa obulungi, etaakolebwa na mikono gya muntu, etabalirwa mu bitonde butonde," 
Hebrews9:12 n'ayingira mu Kitukuvu omulundi gumu n'amala, nga kyatutte si musaayi gwa mbuzi oba ogw'obuyana, wabula omusaayi ogugwe kennyini, n'atufunira okununulibwa okutaggwaawo." 
Hebrews9:13 Oba ng'omuntu ajaajaamiziddwa okumumansira n'omusaayi gw'ente n'embuzi n'evvu ly'ente ennyana kutukuza ne kulongoosa omubiri," 
Hebrews9:14 leero alabisa omusaayi gwa Kristu eyeeweereza Katonda ku bwa Mwoyo Ataggwaawo ng'ekitambiro ekitaliiko bbala, gunaalema gutya okutukuza emitima gyaffe okugiggya ku bikolwa ebifu giryoke giweereze Katonda omulamu?" 
Hebrews9:15 Awo nno ye mutabaganya ow'endagaano empya, abantu abaayitibwa basobole okufuna obusika obutaggwaawo obwasuubizibwa, anti waliwo eyafa abanunule mu bisobyo by'omu ndagaano eyasooka." 
Hebrews9:16 Awali ekiraamo, okufa kw'eyalaama kuteekwa kumala kukakasibwa." 
Hebrews9:17 Kubanga ekiraamo kitandika okukola luvannyuma lwa kufa, kubanga tekikola ng'eyalaama akyali mulamu." 
Hebrews9:18 Kwe kulaba nga n'ekyasooka tekyatongozebwa watali musaayi. 
Hebrews9:19 Anti Musa bwe yamala okusomera abantu bonna buli kyalagirwa mu Tteeka, n'addira omusaayi gw'obuyana n'ogw'embuzi, n'akwata n'amazzi, ebyoya by'endiga ebimyule ne yissopo, n'amansa ku kitabo kyennyini ne ku bantu bonna" 
Hebrews9:20 nga bw'agamba nti: “Guno gwe musaayi gw'endagaano Katonda gye yabalagira.” 
Hebrews9:21 Eweema n'ebibya byonna ebyeyambisibwanga mu kuweereza, nabyo n'abimansaako omusaayi." 
Hebrews9:22 Mu Tteeka nno byonna kyenkana bitukuzibwa na musaayi, era awatali musaayi kuyiika, tewaba kusonyiyibwa." 
Hebrews9:23 Oba nno ebyo ebifaananyi ebya biri eby'omu ggulu byali biteekwa okutukuzibwa mu ngeri eyo, eby'omu ggulu nno byali biteekwa okutukuzibwa n'ekitambiro ekikira bino obulungi." 
Hebrews9:24 Anti Yezu teyayingira mu Kitukuvu ekyakolebwa n'emikono, ekifaananyi kya kiri namaddala, wabula yayingira mu ggulu mwennyini alabike mu maaso ga Katonda ku lwaffe." 
Hebrews9:25 Tali eyo okwetambira olutata, nga kabona omukulu bw'akola ng'ayingira mu Kitukuvu buli mwaka n'omusaayi ogutali gugwe kennyini;" 
Hebrews9:26 singa bwe guli, yanditeekeddwa okubonaabona olutata okuviira ddala ensi lwe yabangibwawo. Naye kati yalabika omulundi gumu n'amala, kati ng'omulembe gunaatera okufundikira, alyoke aggyewo ekibi nga yeetambira yennyini." 
Hebrews9:27 Nga bwe kyateesebwa abantu okufa omulundi ogumu ne waddawo okulamulibwa," 
Hebrews9:28 ne Kristu bw'atyo, ng'amaze okutambirwa olumu, yeetikka ebibi by'abangi; bw'alirabika ogwokubiri, teriba nsonga ya kibi, wabula okulokola abo abamulindiridde." 
Hebrews10:1 Etteeka kye lirina bisiikirize busiikirize eby'ebirungi ebirijja, sso si byo ddala; awo nno terisobola n'akatono abo abaweereza kubafuula batuukirivu olw'ebitambiro bye bimu ebiddiŋŋanwa buli mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Singa bwe guli, singa tebyalekera awo dda okuweerezebwa? Anti ng'abaweereza bamaze okutukuzibwa omulundi gumu, tebandizzeeyo kumanya kibi mu mwoyo gwabwe." 
Hebrews10:3 Sso ekibaawo, mu bitambiro bino mulimu okujjukiza ekibi buli mwaka." 
Hebrews10:4 Kubanga omusaayi gw'ente ennume n'embuzi tegusobola kuggyawo bibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Kristu yennyini ng'ajja mu nsi kyeyava agamba nti: “Ebitambiro n'ebitone tewabyagala, sso nze wantegekera omubiri;" 
Hebrews10:6 ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro olw'ekibi tebyakusanyula. 
Hebrews10:7 Nze kwe kugamba nti: ‘Nzuuno nzize, ayi Katonda, okukola ggwe ky'oyagala,’ nga bwe kyampandiikibwako mu muzingo gw'ekitabo.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Agamba waggulu nti: “Ebyonziira n'ebitone, ebitambiro ebyokye n'ebitambiro olw'ekibi tewabyagala era tebyakusanyula,” – sso bino biweerezebwa ng'Etteeka bwe liragira." 
Hebrews10:9 Awo n'agattako nti: “Nzuuno nzize okukola ky'oyagala.” Aggyawo ekyasooka alyoke azzeewo ekyokubiri. 
Hebrews10:10 Olw'okubeera okwagala okwo, twatukuzibwa, omubiri gwa Yezu Kristu bwe gwaweerezebwa omulundi gumu nga gwe gwamala." 
Hebrews10:11 Buli lunaku buli kabona abeera wo ku mulimu ng'aweereza lutata ebitambiro bye bimu, ebitasobola kuggyawo bibi n'akatono." 
Hebrews10:12 Sso Kristu yaweereza ekitambiro kimu olw'ebibi ate eky'ennaku zonna, n'atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Hebrews10:13 Okuva olwo alindirira okutuusa abalabe be lwe balifuulibwa akatebe k'ebigere bye. 
Hebrews10:14 Mu kweweereza okwo okumu kwokka, abo bonna b'atukuza yabafunira obutuukirivu obw'emirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews10:15 Ne Mwoyo Mutuukirivu atukakasa, kubanga ng'amaze okugamba nti:" 
Hebrews10:16 “Eno ye ndagaano gye ndikuba n'abo oluvannyuma lw'ennaku ezo, Omukama y'agamba; amateeka gange nzija kugassa ku mitima gyabwe, ngawandiike mu myoyo gyabwe,” agattako nti:" 
Hebrews10:17 “Siriddayo kujjukira bibi byabwe yadde ebisobyo byabwe.” 
Hebrews10:18 Kale nno awali okusonyiyibwa kwa bino waba tewakyali kitambiro olw'ekibi. 
Hebrews10:19 Kale nno, abooluganda, tulina obwesige nti tuyinza okuyingira mu Kitukuvu olw'omusaayi gwa Kristu," 
Hebrews10:20 nga tuyitira mu kkubo eriggya era eddamu lye yatuggulira eriyita mu lutimbe, gwe mubiri gwe." 
Hebrews10:21 Tumaze okuba nno ne kabona omukulu akulira ennyumba ya Katonda," 
Hebrews10:22 tusembere nno n'emitima egijjudde amazima n'okukkiriza okukakafu, egimaze okumansibwako ne giggyibwamu emmeeme embi, n'emibiri egimaze okunaazibwa n'amazzi amalongoofu." 
Hebrews10:23 Tunywereze ddala awatali kuddirira essuubi ly'enzikiriza yaffe, anti eyatusuubiza mwesigwa." 
Hebrews10:24 Buli omu asse omwoyo na ddala ku ky'okukoleezaŋŋanamu okwagalana n'okukola ebikolwa ebirungi. 
Hebrews10:25 Tuleme kugayaalirira kukuŋŋaana, ng'abamu bwe bamanyidde okukola, wabula tugumyaŋŋane, naddala kati, anti mulaba olunaku lujja lusembera." 
Hebrews10:26 Tumala tukola ebibi nga tugenderedde sso ate nga tumaze okumanya amazima, waba tewakyali kitambiro lwa bibi," 
Hebrews10:27 wabula okulindirira mu kutya okulamulibwa n'omuliro ogw'obusungu ogw'okusenkenya abalabe. 
Hebrews10:28 Omuntu amenye etteeka lya Musa afa awatali kuddirwamu kasita wabaawo obujulizi bw'ababiri oba abasatu. 
Hebrews10:29 Mulowooza ekibonerezo kiryenkana wa obubi ekirigwanira oyo alinnyirira Omwana wa Katonda n'omusaayi gw'endagaano ogwamutukuza n'agunyooma n'avuma ne Mwoyo ow'eneema? 
Hebrews10:30 Anti tumanyi eyagamba nti: “Okuwoolera eggwanga kwange, nze ndisasula,” era nti: “Omukama aliramula abantu be.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Kya ntiisa okugwa mu mikono gya Katonda omulamu. 
Hebrews10:32 Mujjukire ebiro ebyasooka nga mwakafuna ekitangaala, olutalo olunene olw'ebibonoobono lwe mwavvuunuka." 
Hebrews10:33 Oluusi nga muvumibwa mu lujjudde n'okubalabya ennaku, olulala nga mubeera wamu n'abo abayisibwa batyo." 
Hebrews10:34 Anti nammwe mwalumirwa abaali mu nvuba, ne mukkiriza n'essanyu okunyagibwako ebyammwe, kubanga mwali mumanyi nti mmwe mulinayo ebisinga obulungi eby'okusigalawo." 
Hebrews10:35 Temusuula nno bwesige bwe mulina; empeera yaabwo nnene. 
Hebrews10:36 Okugumiikiriza mukwetaagira ddala; lwe munaatuukiriza Katonda ky'ayagala ne mufuna kye yasuubiza. 
Hebrews10:37 “Kubanga wasigadde akabanga katono oli ow'okujja ajje, tajja kulwa." 
Hebrews10:38 Kyokka omutuukirivu wange aliba mulamu olw'okukkiriza. Naye bw'akuba akaddannyuma, omutima gwange tegumusanyukira.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Naye ffe tetuli mu abo abakuba akaddannyuma ne tuzikirira, naye mu abo abakkiriza ne tusigaza emyoyo gyaffe." 
Hebrews11:1 Okukkiriza kwe kunywerera ku ebyo ebisuubirwa, kwe kubeera abakakafu ku ebyo ebitalabika." 
Hebrews11:2 Okukkiriza kuno kwe kutendesa ab'edda. 
Hebrews11:3 Olw'okukkiriza kyetuva tutegeera nti ensi yatondebwa ekigambo kya Katonda, mu bitalabika ne mukolwamu ebirabika." 
Hebrews11:4 Olw'okukkiriza, Abeli, - ono yadde nga yafa dda, era akyayogera, - kyeyava aweereza Katonda ekitambiro ekirungi okusinga ekya Kayini, mu kyo n'asiimibwa nti mutuukirivu; Katonda kino n'akikakasa ng'asiima ebitambiro bye." 
Hebrews11:5 Olw'okukkiriza, Enoki kyeyava atwalibwa n'atalaba ku lumbe; teyazuulibwa, kubanga Katonda yamutwala. Yali tannaba kutwalibwa, yasooka kukakasibwa nti yali asanyusa Katonda." 
Hebrews11:6 Bwe wataba kukkiriza, tekiyinzika kusanyusa Katonda. Oli asembera eri Katonda ateekwa okukkiriza nga Katonda w'ali, era ng'aweera empeera abo abamunoonya." 
Hebrews11:7 Nowa bwe baamulabula ku ebyo ebyali bitannalabikako, olw'okukkiriza kyeyava alabuka n'akola ekyombo okuwonya amaka ge; olw'ekyo ensi yagisalira omusango okugisinga, n'asikira bw'atyo obutuukirivu obufunibwa olw'okukkiriza." 
Hebrews11:8 Yiburayimu olw'okukkiriza kyeyava agonda bwe yayitibwa okulaga mu nsi gye yali agenda okufuna ng'obusika; yamala gagenda nga tamanyi gy'alaga. 
Hebrews11:9 Olw'okukkiriza kyeyava abeera mu nsi gye yasuubizibwa, ng'ali ku ggwanga; n'abeera eyo mu weema ne Yizaake ne Yakobo basika banne bwe baali basuubira ekimu." 
Hebrews11:10 Kubanga yali alindirira ekibuga eky'omusingi omugumu Katonda yennyini kye yabanga n'azimba. 
Hebrews11:11 Olw'okukkiriza, Saara kyeyava asobola okufuna olubuto, yadde nga yali ayise ku budde, kubanga eyali asuubizza yamutwala nti mwesigwa." 
Hebrews11:12 Olw'okubeera ekyo, mu muntu omu eyali kyenkana ng'afudde, ne musibukamu abali ng'emmunyeenye z'eggulu mu bungi, ng'omusenyu oguli ku lubalama lw'ennyanja ogutabalika." 
Hebrews11:13 Bano bonna baafiira mu kukkiriza nga tebafunye byali bisuubiziddwa, wabula nga baabirengerera wala, ne babyaniriza, nga bakkiriza nti ku nsi bagwira, bayise." 
Hebrews11:14 Aboogera bwe batyo balaga kyere nti banoonya obutaka. 
Hebrews11:15 Singa baali balumirwa eri ewaabwe gye baali bavudde, ebbanga ery'okuddayo baali balirina." 
Hebrews11:16 Naye ekituufu kye kino, nti bo baayagala eri mu ggulu esinga obulungi. Ne Katonda kyava taswala kweyita Katonda waabwe, anti yabategekera ekibuga." 
Hebrews11:17 Yiburayimu luli lwe yagezebwa, olw'okukkiriza kyeyava atambira Yizaake; oyo eyali asuubiziddwa yeevaamu okutambira omwana omu yekka," 
Hebrews11:18 oyo eyali ayogeddwako nti: “Mu Yizaake ezzadde lyo mwe linaafuniranga erinnya.” 
Hebrews11:19 Muli yali akakasa nti Katonda ayinza okuzuukiza omuntu mu bafu. Awo nno ng'otunuulidde amakulu agali mu kino, Yizaake yaddamu n'amufuna." 
Hebrews11:20 Olw'okukkiriza, Yizaake kyeyava awa omukisa Yakobo ne Ezawu ogw'ebyo ebyali bikyali mu maaso." 
Hebrews11:21 Olw'okukkiriza, Yakobo ng'afa, kyeyava awa omukisa abaana ba Yozefu kinnoomu, n'asinza, n'akutama ku mutwe gw'omuggo gwe." 
Hebrews11:22 Olw'okukkiriza, Yozefu ng'afa, kyeyava ayogera ku Kuva kw'abaana ba Yisirayeli mu Misiri n'awa n'ebiragiro ku magumba ge." 
Hebrews11:23 Olw'okukkiriza, Musa kyeyava akwekebwa bazadde be emyezi esatu ng'amaze okuzaalibwa, nga balaba mubalagavu, ne batatya kiragiro kya kabaka." 
Hebrews11:24 Musa bwe yakula, olw'okukkiriza kyeyava yeegaana okuyitibwa mutabani wa muwala wa Faraawo," 
Hebrews11:25 n'asiima okubonyaabonyezebwa wamu n'abantu ba Katonda okusinga okuba mu ssanyu ly'ekibi eriyita obuyisi. 
Hebrews11:26 Okuvumibwa olw'Omusiige yakuyita obugagga obukira enkuluze ya Misiri yonna, kubanga eriiso yali alitadde ku mpeera." 
Hebrews11:27 Olw'okukkiriza kyeyava ava mu Misiri ng'obusungu bwa kabaka tabutya; yagumiikiriza ng'ali ng'alaba oyo atalabika. 
Hebrews11:28 Olw'okukkiriza kyeyava akuza Pasika n'amansira n'omusaayi, eyali azikiriza omuggulanda aleme kubakwatako." 
Hebrews11:29 Olw'okukkiriza kyebaava basomoka Ennyanja Emmyufu kyenkana ng'olukalu; naye Abamisiri bwe baagezaako, ne basaanawo." 
Hebrews11:30 Olw'okukkiriza, bbugwe wa Yeriko kyeyava agwa nga bamaze okumwetooloolera ennaku musanvu." 
Hebrews11:31 Olw'okukkiriza, malaaya Rakabu kyeyava tasaanawo n'abo abaajeema, kubanga yayaniriza bulungi abakessi." 
Hebrews11:32 Era nkyayongerako ki? N'obudde bumbula okunyumya ku Gidewoni, Baraki, Samusoni, Yefuta, Dawudi, Samweli n'abalanzi." 
Hebrews11:33 Abo olw'okukkiriza abaawangula obwakabaka, abassaawo obutuukirivu, abaafuna ebisuubizo, abaggala emimwa gy'empologoma," 
Hebrews11:34 abaazikiza omuliro ogubumbujja, abaasumattuka obwogi bw'ebitala, abaali abanafu ne bafuuka ab'amaanyi, abafuuka abazira mu ntalo; amagye amalumbaganyi abaagaleetera okudduka." 
Hebrews11:35 Abakazi baddamu ne bafuna abaabafaako nga bazuukira. Abalala bakkiriza okubonyaabonyezebwa, ne bagaana okuteebwa, basobole okuzuukira ogwokubiri mu bulamu obusingawo obulungi." 
Hebrews11:36 Abalala baagumiikiriza okujolongebwa, ne bakubwa enkoba n'okusibibwa enjegere mu makomera." 
Hebrews11:37 Baakubibwa amayinja, ne basalwamu ebitundu bibiri, ne battibwa n'ebitala; baabungeeta nga bali mu maliba ag'endiga n'ag'embuzi, ne bawamma, ne balaba ennaku, ne bayisibwa bubi;" 
Hebrews11:38 Abo, sso nga n'ensi baali bagiyitiriddeko obulungi, baabungira mu malungu ne mu nsozi, mu mpuku ne mpampagama z'ensi." 
Hebrews11:39 Bano newandibadde nga n'okukkiriza kwabwe kubajulira bulungi, tebaafuna kyali kisuubiziddwa," 
Hebrews11:40 anti Katonda yali atutegekedde ffe okufuna ekisingawo obulungi, anti bo tebaali ba kutuuka ku butuukirivu nga tebali naffe." 
Hebrews12:1 Tumaze okuba n'ekire ekinene eky'abajulirwa ekitwetoolodde wonna, awo nno naffe tusuule eri buli kiziyizo, naddala ekibi ekitwezinzeeko, ate tudduke n'obugumiikiriza embiro ezituteereddwawo," 
Hebrews12:2 amaaso nga tugasimbye ku Yezu omutandisi w'okukkiriza kwaffe era akutuusa ku kumalirizibwa mu bujjuvu; oyo olw'essanyu eryali limuteereddwawo, yagumira omusaalaba, n'anyooma okuswala, atudde ku gwa ddyo gwa nnamulondo ya Katonda." 
Hebrews12:3 Mulowooze ku oyo eyagumira obukyayi aboonoonyi bwe baamulaga, nammwe muleme kuggwamu maanyi mu mutima gwammwe na kuterebuka." 
Hebrews12:4 Mu lutalo lwammwe n'ekibi temunnafunvubira kutuuka ku kuyiwa musaayi. 
Hebrews12:5 Mwerabidde ebigambo ebyo ebigumya bye babagamba ng'abaana nti: “Mwana wange, togayanga ŋŋunjula ya Mukama; toggwangamu maanyi bw'akukomangako." 
Hebrews12:6 Kuba Omukama gw'ayagala amugunjula, aswanyuula buli mwana we gw'afuna”?" 
Hebrews12:7 Olw'okubeera okugunjulwa mugume. Katonda abayisa ng'abaana; mwana ki kitaawe gw'atagunjula? 
Hebrews12:8 Oba temugunjulwa mutyo, nga bonna bwe baakolebwa, awo nno muli baana ba mu bwenzi, temuli baana ddala." 
Hebrews12:9 Ekirala, twalina bakitaffe ab'omu mubiri okutugunjula, era twabassangamu ekitiibwa, alabisa nno Kitaffe ow'emyoyo! Tetuumugondere okusingawo ne tuba balamu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Bakitaffe mu mubiri batugunjulira ebbanga ttono nga bakikola ku lwa bulungi bwabwe, naye ye atugunjula lwa kutugasa, tusobole okugabana ku butuukirivu bwe." 
Hebrews12:11 Weewaawo, okugunjula kwonna bwe kubeera kukolebwa, mulimu ng'okulumwa, si ssanyu; naye oluvannyuma abo ababa bayise mu kubangulwa kuno, kubaleetera ebibala eby'eddembe n'eby'obutuukirivu." 
Hebrews12:12 Kale nno emikono egiragaye n'entegetege ezifambye mubizzeemu amaanyi. 
Hebrews12:13 Mugolole amakubo g'ebigere byammwe; ekitundu ekirema kireme kusowokera ddala, wabula kiwone buwonyi." 
Hebrews12:14 Muluubirirenga okuba mu ddembe n'abantu bonna, era n'obutuukirivu, anti we butali, mpaawo aliraba Katonda." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwekkaanye wabulewo afiirwa eneema ya Katonda; wabulewo omulandira gw'obukaawu ogututunuka ne guleeta akabi, bangi ne boonooneka olw'okubeera gwo." 
Hebrews12:16 Wabulewo omuseegu oba omwonoonefu nga Ezawu, eyatunda obukulu bw'obuggulanda bwe olw'olulya olumu luti." 
Hebrews12:17 Nammwe mumanyi ng'oluvannyuma bwe yayagala okusikira omukisa, yagaanibwa, kubanga teyasanga mukisa gwa kweddamu, ne bwe yagunoonya mu maziga." 
Hebrews12:18 Anti temuzze eri lusozi olukwatikako, eri omuliro ogubumbujja, eri ekizikiza ne kazigizigi, eri kikuŋŋunta," 
Hebrews12:19 eri okunyaanyaagira kw'eŋŋombe n'eddoboozi ly'ekigambo eryaleeteranga abaaliwuliriza okuwanjaga likome okwo okwogera. 
Hebrews12:20 Kubanga bali tebaasobola kugumira ekyo kye baalagirwa nti: “Ne bwe kinaaba kisolo ne kikwata ku lusozi, kya kukubibwa mayinja.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Ggwe wamma ekyalabika kyali kitiisa, ne Musa n'agamba nti: “Ntidde, nkankana.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Naye mmwe muzze eri olusozi Siyoni, eri ekibuga kya Katonda omulamu, Yeruzaalemu eky'omu ggulu, eri bamalayika enkumi n'enkumi, ku lukuŋŋaana olw'embaga enkulu," 
Hebrews12:23 ku lukuŋŋaana lw'abaggulanda bonna abaawandiikibwa edda mu ggulu, eri Katonda omulamuzi wa byonna, eri emyoyo gy'abatuukirivu abawedde okutuukirizibwa," 
Hebrews12:24 eri Yezu omutabaganya ow'endagaano empya, n'eri omusaayi ogwamansibwa ogwogera obulungi n'okusinga ogwa Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwekkaanye, temumugaana oyo ayogera. Oba kale bali tebaawona bwe baagaana okuwulira oli eyali alabula ku nsi, ffe tunaawonera wa bwe tunaagaana oyo alabula ng'ayima mu ggulu?" 
Hebrews12:26 Luli eddoboozi lye lyayuuguumya ensi; naye kati asuubizza nti: “Era n'omulundi omulala sijja kuyuuguumya nsi yokka, naye n'eggulu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Ebigambo 'era n'omulundi omulala' bitegeeza ng'ebintu ebiyuuguumizibwa bijja kuggyibwawo, anti nga bino bintu buntu bitonde, walyoke wasigalewo biri byokka ebitayuuguumizibwa." 
Hebrews12:28 Kale nno nga bwe tufuna obwakabaka obutayuuguumizibwa, twebaze, ate mu kwebaza tuweereze Katonda mu ngeri emusanyusa, n'ekitiibwa ko n'okumutya," 
Hebrews12:29 Kubanga Katonda waffe muliro ogusenkenya. 
Hebrews13:1 Okwagalana ng'ab'oluganda kweyongere mu maaso. 
Hebrews13:2 Temwerabiranga kwaniriza bagenyi; abamu mu kukola batyo baayaniriza bamalayika nga tebategedde. 
Hebrews13:3 Abali mu kkomera mubajjukire, kyenkana ng'abali nabo mu kkomera; era n'abo abayisibwa obubi, anti nammwe mukyali mu mubiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Obufumbo bussibwemu ekitiibwa mu bonna, ekitanda ky'abafumbo kireme kujaajaamizibwa, anti Katonda aliramula abakaba n'abenzi." 
Hebrews13:5 Mwesammule omululu gwa ssente, mumatire ne kye mulina; anti Katonda yennyini yagamba nti: “Sirikuleka, sirikwabulira.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Naffe nno kyetuva twogeza buvumu nti: “Omukama ye muyambi wange, sijja kutya; omuntu obuntu anankola ki?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Mujjukire abakulembeze bammwe abaababuulira ekigambo kya Katonda; mulabe ebyava mu ngeri gye baayisaamu, nammwe mugoberere okukkiriza kwabwe." 
Hebrews13:8 Yezu Kristu nga bwe yali jjo, y'omu leero n'emirembe gyonna." 
Hebrews13:9 Temuwubisibwa njigiriza ezitali zimu engwira. Kubanga kirungi omutima okufuna amaanyi nga gava mu neema, sso si mu mmere; abo abagoberera obulombolombo bw'emmere mpaawo kye baggyeemu." 
Hebrews13:10 Tulina omwaliiro abaweereza Weema kwe batakkirizibwa kulya. 
Hebrews13:11 Kubanga ennyama y'ebisolo ereetebwa kabona omukulu mu Kitukuvu ng'ekitambiro olw'ekibi eyokerwa bweru wa lusiisira. 
Hebrews13:12 Ne Yezu naye yabonaabonera bweru wa wankaaki alyoke atukuze abantu n'omusaayi gwe. 
Hebrews13:13 Naffe nno tugende gy'ali ebweru w'olusiisira nga twetisse ebivumo ebimuvumibwa. 
Hebrews13:14 Kubanga kuno tetulinaako kibuga kya lubeerera, wabula tuluubirira kiri ekijja." 
Hebrews13:15 Bulijjo tuyite ku ye okuweereza Katonda ekitambiro eky'okumutenda, kye kibala ky'emimwa egyatula erinnya lye." 
Hebrews13:16 Temwerabiranga kukolera bulungi bantu n'okuyambagana mu byetaago; ebitambiro eby'engeri eyo bisanyusa Katonda. 
Hebrews13:17 Muwulirenga abakulembeze bammwe, mubagondere, anti bakola ogw'okukuuma emyoyo gyammwe ng'abantu abaliwoza omulimu gwabwe. Mubaleke omulimu bagukoze ssanyu, sso si nga batokooterera, kubanga ekyo mmwe tekyandibagasizza." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutusabire; twekakasa ng'emmeeme yaffe ntereevu; twagala kweyisa bulungi mu buli kintu. 
Hebrews13:19 Mbasaba nga mbeesengereza kino mukikole nsobole okubaddizibwa amangu. 
Hebrews13:20 Katonda ow'emirembe, eyaggyayo Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe mu bafu, omusumba omukulu ow'endiga olw'omusaayi gw'endagaano eteggwaawo," 
Hebrews13:21 abawe musobole okukola buli kirungi mutuukirize mutyo ky'ayagala; akole mu ffe buli ekimusanyusa mu maaso ge, ng'ayita mu Yezu Kristu; oyo aweebwe ekitiibwa emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Hebrews13:22 Abooluganda, mbeegayiridde, ebigambo bino bye mbabuuliridde mumale gabikkiriza, anti mbawandiikidde mu bufunze." 
Hebrews13:23 Mutegeere ng'owooluganda Timotewo yateebwa; bw'alyanguwa okujja, ndijja naye okubalaba." 
Hebrews13:24 Mundabire bonna ababakulembera n'abatuukirivu bonna. Bo okuva mu Yitale babatumidde. 
Hebrews13:25 Eneema ebeere nammwe mwenna. 
James1:1 Yakobo, omuweereza wa Katonda n'owa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu. Ya bika ekkumi n'ebibiri ebisaasaanye mu mawanga. Mirembe." 
James1:2 Baganda bange, bwe mugwirwanga ebizibu ebitali bimu, mubeerenga basanyufu," 
James1:3 anti mumanyi nti okukkiriza kwammwe bwe kugezebwa, kibaviiramu okugumiikiriza." 
James1:4 Okugumiikiriza okwo kutuuse ku mulimu ogutukiridde, mulyoke mutuukirire, mubeere abajjuuliridde, abatalina kibabulako." 
James1:5 Oba mu mmwe mulimu eyeetaaga amagezi, asabe Katonda, oyo awa bonna nga taganiriza oba okwekansulula, gajja kumuweebwa." 
James1:6 Kyokka asaba asabe n'okukkiriza nga tabuusabuusa n'akatono; abuusabuusa aba ng'amayengo g'ennyanja empewo g'esunda n'egazza eno n'eri. 
James1:7 Omuntu ow'engeri eyo aleme kulowooza ng'anaabaako k'afuna ew'Omukama," 
James1:8 oyo omuntu, nnampawengwa, atalina w'anyweredde mu buli kintu." 
James1:9 Owooluganda omutene asaana yeetendere mu kitiibwa ky'afuna," 
James1:10 n'omugagga mu kutoowazibwa kwe, kubanga ajja kuyita ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo." 
James1:11 Anti enjuba evaayo n'ebbugumu lyayo n'ekaza omuddo; ekimuli kyakyo ne kigwa, n'obulungi bwakyo ne buggwaawo, n'omugagga bw'aliggweerera atyo mu by'aliko." 
James1:12 Omuntu agumira ebigezo yeesiimye; kubanga bw'aliwangula okugezebwa, alifuna engule ey'obulamu Katonda gye yasuubiza abamwagala." 
James1:13 Tewabanga aba akemeddwa agamba nti: “Katonda y'ankema,” kubanga Katonda takemwa bwonoonefu era ye taliiko gw'akema." 
James1:14 Wabula omuntu akemebwa, bw'atwalirizibwa n'asendebwasendebwa okwegomba kwe." 
James1:15 Okwegomba bwe kumala okuba olubuto, ne kuzaala ekibi; ekibi bwe kikula, ne kizaala olumbe." 
James1:16 Awo nno, baganda bange abaagalwa, muleme kuwubisibwa." 
James1:17 Buli kiweebwa ekirungi na buli kirabo ekituukiridde kiva waggulu, kiva wa Taata owa buli kitangaala, ataliiko kufuukafuuka, oba ekisiikirize ekiva mu kukyukakyuka." 
James1:18 Yaggya mu ye n'atuzaala n'ekigambo ky'amazima, tubeere ng'ebibala ebibereberye mu bitonde bye." 
James1:19 Baganda bange abaagalwa, kino mukimanye. Buli muntu asaana ayanguyire okuwulira, naye aleme kubeera mwangu kwogera na kusunguwala." 
James1:20 Kubanga obusungu bw'omuntu tebukola bya butuukirivu bwa Katonda. 
James1:21 Kale nno muleke eri buli bugwagwa na buli bugwenyufu bwonna, mu bwetoowaze mwanirize ekigambo ekyabasigibwamu ekisobola okulokola emyoyo gyammwe." 
James1:22 Kyokka mubeere abassa ekigambo mu nkola, naye si abakoma ku kuwulira obuwulizi; okwo kubeera kwerimba." 
James1:23 Kubanga singa oli akoma ku kuwulira kwokka n'atassa mu nkola, abeera ng'omusajja eyeeraba mu ndabirwamu amaaso ge nga bwe gaakula," 
James1:24 ng'amaze okweraba, n'agenda, ate amangu ago ne yeerabira bw'afaanana." 
James1:25 Sso eyeetegereza etteeka ettuufu, etteeka ery'eddembe, n'anywera, n'ataba awulira ate ne yeerabira, naye n'assa mu nkola n'atuukiriza, oyo alyeesiima mu by'akola." 
James1:26 Oli alowooza nga musomi, sso nga tatangira lulimi lwe, oyo aguya mutima gwe; eddiini ye temuli nsa." 
James1:27 Mu maaso ga Katonda era Taata eddiini ennongoofu, eteriiko bbala, y'eno: okulambula bamulekwa ne bannamwandu mu nnaku zaabwe n'okwekuuma ensi eno ereme kutwonoona." 
James2:1 Baganda bange, nga bwe mukkiriza Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu, Mukama ow'Ekitiibwa, muleme kubaamu kusosola." 
James2:2 Singa bwe muba mukuŋŋaanye, wayingirayo omuntu ayambadde empeta eza zaabu n'engoye amakula, ne wayingirayo n'omwavu ayambadde ebiziina," 
James2:3 mumala mufa ku oli ayambadde engoye amakula, ne mumugamba nti: “Ggwe tuulira wano,” omwavu ye ne mumugamba nti: “Yimirira eri,” oba nti: “Tuula awo wansi ku muziziko gw'ebigere byange,”" 
James2:4 olwo temusosolaganye, temufuuse balamuzi ab'endowooza embi?" 
James2:5 Muwulirize, baganda bange abaagalwa: Abo abaavu mu nsi Katonda si be yalonda babe abagagga mu kukkiriza, basikire obwakabaka Katonda bwe yasuubiza abamwagala?" 
James2:6 Naye mmwe omwavu temumussizzaamu kitiibwa. Abagagga si be babanyigiriza? Si be babawalaawala okubatwala mu mbuga? 
James2:7 Si be bo abavuma erinnya eddungi lye muyitibwa? 
James2:8 Bwe mutuukiriza Etteeka ery'obwakabaka, nga bwe kiri mu Biwandiiko nti: “Oyagalanga munno nga bwe weeyagala,” muba mukoze bulungi." 
James2:9 Naye bwe musosola mu bantu, muba mukoze kibi; Etteeka ligubasalira nti mulimenye." 
James2:10 Oli aba akutte Etteeka lyonna amala agwa mu kamu ku lyo, aba amenye lyonna." 
James2:11 Anti eyagamba nti: “Toyendanga,” era ye yagamba nti: “Tottanga.” Bw'oba toyenda, naye n'otta, Etteeka oba olimenye." 
James2:12 Mwogere, era muyise ng'abantu abagenda okulamulibwa mu tteeka ery'eddembe." 
James2:13 Atalaga kisa aliramulibwa awatali kisa; sso ekisa kiwangula okulamulibwa. 
James2:14 Baganda bange, oli okugamba nti alina okukkiriza, sso nga talina bikolwa, kigasa ki? Okukkiriza kwe kuyinza okumulokola?" 
James2:15 Muganda wo oba mwannyoko bw'aba ayita bwereere, talina kaakulya aka buli lunaku," 
James2:16 omu mu mmwe amala abagamba nti: “Mugende mirembe, mubugume, mukkute,” awatali kubawa ebyo omubiri bye gwetaaga, kigasa ki?" 
James2:17 N'okukkiriza bwe kubeera, bwe kutabeera na bikolwa, kubeera kufu." 
James2:18 Naye oli ayinza okugamba nti: “Ggwe olina okukkiriza, nze nnina ebikolwa.” Kale ndaga okukkiriza kwo okutalina bikolwa, nange nkulage okwange nga nkola ebikolwa." 
James2:19 Ggwe okkiriza nga Katonda ali omu; okola bulungi. Naye n'amasitaani gakkiriza ne gakankana n'okukankana. 
James2:20 Musiru ggwe, oyagala okumanya ng'okukkiriza okutaliiko bikolwa temuba kantu?" 
James2:21 Kitaffe Yiburayimu teyayitibwa mutuukirivu bwe yatambira Yizaake omwana we ku mwaliiro? 
James2:22 Olabye nno, okukkiriza kwagenderanga wamu n'ebikolwa. Ebikolwa bye byafuulanga okukkiriza okutuukiridde." 
James2:23 Olwo Ebiwandiiko ne bituukirira ebigamba nti: “Yiburayimu yakkiriza Katonda; ekyo ne kimubalirwa ng'obutuukirivu,” n'ayitibwa na mukwano gwa Katonda." 
James2:24 Mulabye nno, nti omuntu okufuuka omutuukirivu kiva ku bikolwa, si ku kukkiriza kwokka." 
James2:25 Kye kimu era ne Rakabu, malaaya, si bikolwa bye byamuyisa omutuukirivu bwe yayaniriza ababaka ate n'abafulumiza mu kkubo eddala?" 
James2:26 Ng'omubiri awatali mwoyo bwe guba omufu, n'okukkiriza awatali bikolwa bwe kubeera okufu." 
James3:1 Baganda bange, abessa ku gw'okuyigiriza muleme kubeera bangi, kubanga mumanyi nga ffe abayigiriza tuliramulibwa n'obukaali obusingawo." 
James3:2 Anti ffenna tusobya mu bingi; oli atasobya mu bigambo, oyo musajja atuukiridde, ayinza n'okufuga omubiri gwe gwonna n'aguwuliza." 
James3:3 Bwe tussa amalobo mu kamwa k'embalaasi zitugondere, tusobola okufuga omubiri gwazo."
