James3:4 Mulabire ku maato; newandibadde nga manene gatya, nga gavugibwa mpewo za maanyi, naye galambikibwa enkasi egoba entono ne gadda omugoba gy'aba ayagadde." 
James3:5 N'olulimi bwe luli. Ku mubiri katundu katono, naye lulina ebinene bingi bye lwetenderamu. Tunuulira akaliro, kenkana wa akookya ekibira ekinene?" 
James3:6 N'olulimi muliro; olulimi nsi nnamba ey'obugwenyufu mu bitundu by'omubiri gwaffe. Luleeta ebbala ebbi ku mubiri gwonna; luteekera omuliro obutonde bwonna; lwo lwennyini Geyenna y'erukoleeza. 
James3:7 Buli kika kya nsolo n'eky'ennyonyi, eky'ebyewalula n'eky'ebitonde mu nnyanja omuntu asobola okukifuga, era kifugwa muntu." 
James3:8 Naye mpaawo muntu asobola kufuga lulimi; olulimi kabi akatatuulira awo, lujjudde obusagwa namutta." 
James3:9 Lwe tweyamba okutendereza Omukama era Taata, sso era lwe tweyamba okuvumirira abantu abaatondebwa mu nfaanana ya Katonda." 
James3:10 Mu kamwa ke kamu mwe muva okutendereza n'okuvumirira. Baganda bange, kino si bwe kyandibadde." 
James3:11 Ensulo emu eyinza okufumbukula amazzi agawooma n'agakaawa? 
James3:12 Baganda bange, omukunyu gubalako oliva, yadde omuzabbibu gubalako entontogolo z'omukunyu? N'amazzi ag'omunnyu bwe gatayinza kuwa mazzi gawooma." 
James3:13 Ani mu mmwe omugezi, ategeera? Oyo ayoleke mu ngeri ennungi gy'ayisaamu ayoleke mu ggonjebwa n'amagezi ebikolwa bye." 
James3:14 Naye obanga mu mitima gyammwe mukyalinamu obuggya obuka n'omulugube ogw'okwekkusa, muleke kwepanka; muba mulimba amazima." 
James3:15 Amagezi ago si geego agakka nga gava waggulu; ga nsi, si ga mwoyo, ga Sitaani." 
James3:16 Awali obuggya n'omulugube gw'okwekkussa, awo wabaawo kutabukatabuka na buli bikolwa omutali nsa." 
James3:17 Go amagezi agava waggulu, okusookera ddala, gaba matukuvu, ga ddembe, galekera, ga kisa, gajjudde obusaasizi n'ebibala ebirungi, tegeekubiira, tegeeryanya." 
James3:18 Ebibala by'obutuukirivu bisigwa mu ddembe abo abaleesi b'emirembe. 
James4:1 Entalo ziva wa, n'empaka ziva wa eziri mu mmwe? Teziva ku kino: amaddu gammwe agatabaala mu bitundu by'omubiri gwammwe?" 
James4:2 Mubaako kye mwegomba ne mutakifuna; ne mutemula ne mukwatibwa ensaalwa naye ne wataba kye mutuukako; olwo ne mulwana, ne mukola entalo. Temulina kubanga temusaba." 
James4:3 Musaba, naye ne mutafuna, kubanga musaba bubi, nga mugenderera kubimalira ku maddu gammwe." 
James4:4 Mmwe abatali beesigwa! Temumanyi ng'omukwano n'ensi eno gwa bulabe ne Katonda? Buli yenna ateesa okuba mukwano gw'ensi, yeefuula mulabe wa Katonda." 
James4:5 Mulowooza Ebiwandiiko byogera bya busa bwe bigamba nti: “Ayayaanira n'obuggya Mwoyo gwe yatusindikira asule mu ffe”? 
James4:6 Kyokka eneema gy'awa ekirawo. Kyava agamba nti: “Katonda alwanyisa abeekuza, naye abeetoowaze abagirira ekisa.”" 
James4:7 Kale nno Katonda mumugondere; Sitaani mumulwanyise, ajja kubadduka." 
James4:8 Musembere eri Katonda, naye ajja kubasemberera. Mmwe aboonoonyi, munaabe engalo zammwe zirongooke; mutukuze emitima gyammwe, mmwe bannampawengwa." 
James4:9 Munakuwale, mukungubage, mukaabe. Enseko zammwe zifuuke amaziga n'essanyu lifuuke ekyobeera." 
James4:10 Mwetoowaze mu maaso ga Katonda, ajja kubagulumiza." 
James4:11 Abooluganda, muleke kwogera bubi ku bannammwe; ayogera obubi ku wooluganda aba amulamula, aba ayogedde bubi ku Tteeka; Etteeka ly'aba alamudde. Bw'oba olamudde Etteeka, oba tokola kye ligamba, wabula oba mulamuzi." 
James4:12 Awa Etteeka ali omu era ye mulamuzi, y'oyo asobola okuwonya oba okuzikiriza. Ggwe ani olyoke olamule munno?" 
James4:13 Mulabe eno, mmwe mugamba nti: “Leero oba enkya tujja kugenda mu kibuga kino oba kiri, tumaleyo omwaka nga tusuubula, twefunireyo amagoba”;" 
James4:14 sso nno temumanyi na bya nkya. Obulamu bwammwe kye ki? Anti buli ng'olufu olulabika akabanga obubanga ne luggwaawo. 
James4:15 Sso mwandigambye nti: “Omukama ng'ayagadde, bwe tunaaba abalamu, tunaakola kino oba kiri.”" 
James4:16 Naye kati mwetendera mu kwekuluntaza kwammwe. Okwetenda okwo kwonna kubi. 
James4:17 Buli amanyi ekirungi eky'okukola, n'atakikola, aba akoze ekibi." 
James5:1 Mulabe eno, mmwe abagagga, mwekaabireko nga musindogoma olw'ennaku ezijja okubagwira." 
James5:2 Obugagga bwammwe buvunze n'ebyambalo byammwe ennyenje zibiridde. 
James5:3 Zaabu wammwe ne ffeeza bitalazze; obutalagge obwo bwe bulibalumiriza; bulirya emibiri gyammwe. Mweterekedde omuliro mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma. 
James5:4 Mulabe, empeera y'abapakasi abaalima ennimiro zammwe gye mwesigaliza, ereekaana; omulanga gw'abaabalimira gutuuse mu matu g'Omukama w'Amagye." 
James5:5 Ku nsi mubadde mu kwesanyusa na mu kwejalabya; mu budde obw'okusanjaga mmwe mwali mukkusa mitima gyammwe. 
James5:6 Mwasalidde omutuukirivu omusango, ne mumutta; tabalwanyisa." 
James5:7 Kale nno, abooluganda, mugumiikirize okutuusa Omukama lw'alijja. Mulabe, omulimi agumiikiriza n'alindirira ebibala by'ettaka eby'omuwendo okutuusa lw'abifuna mu mwaka ogusooka oba ogusembayo." 
James5:8 Nammwe nno mugumiikirize, mugumye emitima gyammwe, anti amajja g'Omukama gasembedde." 
James5:9 Abooluganda, muleke ono okwemulugunyiza oli, sikulwa nga mulamulibwa; laba omulamuzi ali awo ku miryango." 
James5:10 Abooluganda, ng'ekyokulabirako eky'okubonaabona n'obugumiikiriza, mulabire ku balanzi abaayogera mu linnya ly'Omukama." 
James5:11 Twesiimisa abo abaaguma. Mwawulira Yobu bwe yaguma, era mwalaba enteekateeka y'Omukama, ng'Omukama bw'ali ow'ekisa, omusaasizi." 
James5:12 Naye okusinga byonna, baganda bange, temulayiranga ggulu oba ensi, oba okulayira mu ngeri endala yonna; wabula bwe mugamba nti: “Yee”, mutegeeze yee, bwe mugamba nti: “Nedda”, mutegeeze nedda, sikulwa nga musalirwa omusango." 
James5:13 Mu mmwe mulimu ali mu bulumi? Yeegayirire. Mulimu omusanyufu? Ayimbe ennyimba ezitendereza. 
James5:14 Mu mmwe mulimu omulwadde? Atumye abakadde b'Ekleziya; bano bamusabire nga bamusiiga omuzigo mu linnya ly'Omukama. 
James5:15 Essaala ey'okukkiriza erirokola omulwadde n'Omukama n'amuzza engulu; bw'aliba akoze ebibi, birimusonyiyibwa." 
James5:16 Mwatuliragane nno ebibi byammwe ate musabiragane, mulyoke muwonyezebwe. Essaala y'omutuukirivu eteddirira ekola n'amaanyi." 
James5:17 Eliya yali muntu wa nkula ye emu nga ffe, yeegayirira n'asaba enkuba ereme kutonnya, nayo n'emala emyaka esatu n'emyezi mukaaga nga tetonnya ku nsi." 
James5:18 Ate n'addamu ne yeegayirira, eggulu ne litonnyesa enkuba, n'ettaka ne lireeta ekibala kyalyo." 
James5:19 Baganda bange, singa omu mu mmwe awaba n'aleka okukkiriza, wamala wabaawo amukomyawo," 
James5:20 oyo ategeere nti buli akomyawo omwonoonyi okuva mu ngeri ze enkyamu, aba alokodde omwoyo gwe mu kufa, era aba abisse ku nnamunkukumbo w'ebibi." 
1Peter1:1 Petero Omutume wa Yezu Kristu. Yaabo abalondemu abali ku ggwanga abasaasaanye mu Ponto, Galasiya, Kappadokiya, Aziya ne mu Bisiniya," 
1Peter1:2 Katonda Taata be yalobozaamu okuva edda n'abatukuza mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu bagondere Yezu Kristu era bamansibweko omusaayi gwe. Eneema ebeere nammwe n'emirembe gyeyongere obungi. 
1Peter1:3 Katonda Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu agulumizibwe! Mu kisa kye ekingi yatuwa okuzaalibwa obuggya tufune essuubi eddamu olw'okuzuukira kwa Yezu Kristu mu bafu; 
1Peter1:4 tufune obusika obutagooka, obutaliiko bbala, obutafuma, obwabaterekerwa mu ggulu." 
1Peter1:5 Amaanyi ga Katonda gabakuumye mu kukkiriza, mulyoke mufune obulokofu obulyolekebwa ku nkomerero y'obudde." 
1Peter1:6 Ekyo kimala okubaleetera essanyu, yadde nga mukyalina okuyita mu kugezebwa okumala akaseera n'ebigezo eby'enjawulo," 
1Peter1:7 bigeze ensa eri mu kukkiriza kwammwe okw'omuwendo okusinga ne zaabu, newandibadde ng'alongoosebwa mu muliro, naye era aggwaawo, kusobole okugulumizibwa, okutendebwa n'okussibwamu ekitiibwa luli Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu lw'alirabika." 
1Peter1:8 Temumulabangako, sso mumwagala; na buli kati temunnamulaba, sso mumukkiriza ne mujaganya n'essanyu eritayogerekeka ery'ekitiibwa," 
1Peter1:9 ne mufuna ekigendererwa ky'okukkiriza kwammwe, anti kwe kulokoka kw'emyoyo gyammwe." 
1Peter1:10 Abalanzi abaalanga eneema gye mwali mujja okufuna, baanoonyereza ne beekebejja okulokoka kuno." 
1Peter1:11 Baanoonyereza obudde n'ebiseera Mwoyo wa Kristu eyabalimu lwe yali ow'okulaga ebibonoobono bya Kristu n'ekitiibwa ekiribiddirira. 
1Peter1:12 Baabikkulirwa ne bategeera ng'omulimu baali tebakola beeweereze, wabula baweereze mmwe okubatuusaako ebyo kati ababayigiriza Evangili bye bababuulirira ku bwa Mwoyo Mutuukirivu eyatumibwa ng'ava mu ggulu, ebintu ne bamalayika bye beegomba okutunulako." 
1Peter1:13 Kale nno mwesibe mubeere beetegefu mu myoyo gyammwe, temubaamu butamiivu; essuubi lyammwe lyonna mulimalire ku neema gye mulifuna luli Yezu Kristu lw'alirabika." 
1Peter1:14 Ng'abaana abawulize, muleme kudda mu by'amaddu ge mwagobereranga luli edda olw'obutamanya." 
1Peter1:15 Nga Katonda eyabayita bw'ali omutukuvu, nammwe mubeere batukuvu mu buli ngeri yonna gye muyisaamu," 
1Peter1:16 anti kyawandiikibwa nti: “Mubeere batukuvu, kubanga nange ndi mutukuvu.”" 
1Peter1:17 Oba Katonda mumukowoola nti Taata, oyo alamula buli muntu nga teyeekubiira ng'asinziira ku by'akola, mweyise n'obwegendereza mu budde buno nga muli eyo ku ggwanga." 
1Peter1:18 Mumanyi nga mwanunulibwa okuva mu ngeri ezitaliimu kantu ze mwaggya ku bajjajjammwe, si na bintu ebiggwaawo nga zaabu oba ffeeza," 
1Peter1:19 wabula n'omusaayi gwa Kristu ogw'omuwendo ng'ogw'akaliga akataliiko bbala oba ekizigiro. 
1Peter1:20 Yamanyibwa dda nga n'ensi tennabangibwawo, kyokka yayolesebwa ku lwammwe mu biseera ebivannyuma." 
1Peter1:21 Mwayita mu ye ne mutuuka ku kukkiriza Katonda, oyo eyamuzuukiza mu bafu n'amugulumiza; olw'okubeera ekyo, mukkiriza Katonda ne musuubira mu ye." 
1Peter1:22 Olw'okugondera amazima, emyoyo gyammwe mwagitukuza, ne musobola okwagalana ng'abooluganda, mwagalanire ddala nga muggyira ddala mu mutima." 
1Peter1:23 Mwazaalibwa buggya, nga temuzaalibwa zzadde eriggwaawo, wabula ezzadde eritaggwaawo, kye kigambo kya Katonda ekiramu ekisigalawo." 
1Peter1:24 “Anti abantu bonna muddo, n'ekitiibwa kyabwe kyonna kiri ng'ekimuli ky'omuddo.” Omuddo gukala, n'ekimuli ne kigwa," 
1Peter1:25 sso ekigambo ky'Omukama kisigalawo emirembe gyonna. Ekigambo ekyo ge mawulire amalungi agaababuulirwa. 
1Peter2:1 Mwessammule buli ngeri embi yonna na buli bulimba, obukuusa, obuggya, na buli kuwaayiriza." 
1Peter2:2 Ng'amabujje agaakazaalibwa, muyayaanire mata meereere ag'omwoyo gabayambe okutuusa ku kulokoka," 
1Peter2:3 olw'okubanga mulezeeko ne mulaba Omukama nga mulungi. 
1Peter2:4 Musembere gy'ali, ejjinja eddamu, abantu lye baagaana, sso mu maaso ga Katonda eddondobe era ery'omuwendo;" 
1Peter2:5 mmwe ng'amayinja amalamu muzimbibwemu ennyumba ey'omwoyo, obwakabona obutukuvu, muweereze ebitambiro eby'omwoyo ebisanyusa Katonda mu Yezu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Kyova osanga mu Biwandiiko nti: “Laba, nteeka ejjinja mu Siyoni, ejjinja ery'entabiro, eddondobe, ery'omuwendo; oli alimukkiriza, taliswala.”" 
1Peter2:7 Ku mmwe nno abakkiriza, jjinja lya kitiibwa; naye eri abatakkiriza, “Ejjinja lyennyini abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lyafuuka lukulwe mu nsonda.”" 
1Peter2:8 Era “Ejjinja abantu kwe beekoona, lwe lwazi kwe beesittala.” Beesittala kubanga tebagondera kigambo nga bwe baali basuubirwa okukola." 
1Peter2:9 Sso mmwe muli luse olulondobe, obwakabona obw'obwakabaka, eggwanga ettukuvu, abantu ba Katonda ab'obwebange, okulangirira ebyamagero by'oyo eyabayita n'abaggya mu kizikiza n'abatuusa mu kitangaala kye ekyewuunyizibwa." 
1Peter2:10 Edda temwali bantu abali awo, naye kati muli bantu ba Katonda; edda mwali temugiriddwa kisa, naye kati mugiriddwa ekisa." 
1Peter2:11 Abaagalwa, mbeegayiridde, nga mmwe abagenyi era abali ku ggwanga, mwetangirenga mu ebyo byonna omubiri bye gwegomba, ebirwanyisa omwoyo gwammwe." 
1Peter2:12 Mweyisenga bulungi nga muli mu b'amawanga; bwe banaaboogerangako ng'ababi, beerabireko bennyini ku bikolwa byammwe ebirungi batendereze Katonda ku lunaku olw'okulambulirwako." 
1Peter2:13 Olw'okubeera Katonda, mugonderenga buli bufuzi bwa bantu, abeere kabaka nga bwali asinga obukulu," 
1Peter2:14 oba abaamasaza, kubanga y'abatuma okujja okubonereza abakola obubi, n'okutenda abakola obulungi." 
1Peter2:15 Katonda ekyo ky'ayagala, anti bwe muyisa obulungi, musirisa obutamanya bw'abasiru." 
1Peter2:16 Mweyise ng'ab'eddembe, nga temwekwasa ddembe eryo kukola bubi, wabula mubeere ng'abaweereza ba Katonda." 
1Peter2:17 Abantu bonna mubawenga ekitiibwa; abooluganda mubaagalenga; Katonda mumutyenga; kabaka mumussengamu ekitiibwa. 
1Peter2:18 Abaweereza, mugonderenga bakama bammwe, mubaweerenga ddala ekitiibwa. Si abo bokka abalungi, abateefu, naye n'abakalubo." 
1Peter2:19 Okugumiikiriza ku bwa Katonda ennaku oli z'alaba awatali nsonga, ekyo eba neema." 
1Peter2:20 Bwe muyisa obubi ne bababonereza, ne mukigumiikiriza, mulimu kitiibwa ki? Naye singa muyisa obulungi, sso ne mubonerezebwa, naye ne mukigumiikiriza, ekyo Katonda akisiima." 
1Peter2:21 Ndaba ekyo kye kyabayisa; Kristu yabonaabona ku lwammwe n'abalekera ekyokulabirako, musimbe mu kisinde kye." 
1Peter2:22 Ye teyakola kibi na kimu, mu kamwa ke temwasangibwamu bulimba;" 
1Peter2:23 bwe yavumibwa, teyavuma kwesasuza; bwe yabonaabona, teyawerera muntu; wabula yeereka mu mikono gy'oli alamula mu butuufu." 
1Peter2:24 Ebibi byaffe yabyetikka yennyini mu mubiri gwe ku muti, naffe ekibi tukibeerere bafu, tubeere balamu tukole eby'obutuukirivu. Ebiwundu bye bye byabawonya." 
1Peter2:25 Anti mwali muwabye ng'endiga; naye kati mukomyewo eri omusumba era omulabirizi w'emyoyo gyammwe. 
1Peter3:1 Kye kimu, nammwe abakazi, mugonderenga babbammwe, abatakkiriza kigambo nga balabye abakyala baabwe nga bwe bayisa, bawangulwe nga temulina na kye mubagambye," 
1Peter3:2 bwe banaalaba bwe muli ab'eggonjebwa n'empisa entukuvu. 
1Peter3:3 Obulungi bwammwe buleme kubeeranga mu bya kungulu, mu kuyonda nviiri, obunyere obwa zaabu n'okwambala ebyambalo," 
1Peter3:4 wabula bubeerenga ekyo ekikusike mu mutima n'ebyokwewoomya ebitayonooneka, anti gwe mutima ogw'eddembe, omuteefu; ebyo biba bya muwendo nnyo mu maaso ga Katonda." 
1Peter3:5 N'obwedda abakyala abatuukirivu, abaasuubiranga mu Katonda, bwe batyo bwe beewoomyanga nga bagondera babbaabwe," 
1Peter3:6 nga Saara bwe yawuliranga Yiburayimu, ng'amuyita mukama we. Nammwe muli bawala be bwe mukola ekirungi, nga temuleka kintu na kimu kubatiisa." 
1Peter3:7 Nammwe abasajja, muyisenga na bwegendereza bakazi bammwe, nga mumanyi nti bo ng'abakazi luse lunafu okubasinga, nga mubassaamu ekitiibwa, anti nabo ba kusikira nammwe ekirabo ky'obulamu; mukole mutyo okwegayirira kwammwe kuleme kusanga kiziyizo." 
1Peter3:8 Ekisembayo, mubeerenga ba ndowooza emu, abalumirwagana; mwagalenga abooluganda; mubeerenga ba kisa, beetoowaze." 
1Peter3:9 Ekibi temukisasuzanga kibi, wadde okuvuma okukusasuza okuvuma; wabula oli mumusabirenga mukisa; anti ekyo kye mwayitirwa, nammwe musikire omukisa." 
1Peter3:10 Kubanga “eyeegomba ennaku ennyingi ez'okwesiima, oli ayagala obulamu, olulimi lwe alutangire obugwenyufu, n'emimwa gye agiziyize okwogera eby'obulimba." 
1Peter3:11 Ave ku kibi, akole ekirungi; anoonye eddembe era aligoberere." 
1Peter3:12 Kubanga amaaso g'Omukama gatunuulira abatuukirivu, n'amatu ge gawuliriza essaala zaabwe. Naye amaaso g'Omukama agavulumulira abayisa obubi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Oba mutakabana okukola obulungi, ate ani anaabakola akabi?" 
1Peter3:14 Bwe mubonaabonamu olw'obutuukirivu, mwesiimye. Temubatyanga era temweraliikiriranga." 
1Peter3:15 Naye mu mitima gyammwe Omukama Kristu mumutwalenga nti mutukuvu. Mwetegekenga bulijjo okwanukula obulungi buli yenna eyeebuuza ensonga kwe musinziira okusuubira mutyo, wabula mumwanukuzenga buntubulamu n'ekitiibwa." 
1Peter3:16 Emmeeme yammwe mugikuumenga nga ntereevu, ababavuma bwe balaba bwe muyisa obulungi mu Kristu, baswale." 
1Peter3:17 Kubanga kisinga okubonaabona olw'okuyisa obulungi, Katonda bw'aba nga yaayagadde, okusinga okubonaabona olw'okuyisa obubi." 
1Peter3:18 Ne Kristu naye yafa omulundi gumu n'amala olw'okubeera ebibi; omutuukirivu n'afiirira abatali batuukirivu, atuzze bw'atyo eri Katonda. Mu bw'omuntu bwe baamutta, naye mu Mwoyo n'afuulibwa mulamu," 
1Peter3:19 n'agendera mu Mwoyo omwo okuyigiriza emyoyo egyali gikyali mu kkomera," 
1Peter3:20 egy'abo luli abataawulira, naye Katonda n'abakwasa n'obugumiikiriza mu budde bwa Nowa, mu biseera ekyombo we kyazimbirwa, omwawonera abantu abatono bati, abantu munaana, abaawonera mu mazzi." 
1Peter3:21 Kale nno batismu efaananako n'ekyo, ebawonya mmwe, si na kubaggyako kko lya ku mubiri, wabula ng'okwegayirira Katonda abawe emmeeme entereevu olw'okuzuukira kwa Yezu Kristu," 
1Peter3:22 eyagenda mu ggulu, atudde ku ddyo ogwa Katonda, nga bamalayika bonna, abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza bassiddwa wansi we." 
1Peter4:1 Kristu yamala okubonaabona mu mubiri gwe, nammwe mubagalire ekirowoozo ekyo ng'ekyokulwanyisa, kubanga oli abonaabona mu mubiri gwe, ebibi aba abivuddeko," 
1Peter4:2 ebbanga ly'obulamu bwe erisigadde abeere nga tagoberera maddu ga mubiri, wabula agoberere Katonda ky'ayagala." 
1Peter4:3 Ebbanga lye mumaze nga muyisa ng'abakafiiri bwe bayisa limala, nga mugoberera obugwenyufu, amaddu, obutamiivu, ebiduula, okujanjaala n'ekitakkirizibwa eky'okusinza ebitaliimu." 
1Peter4:4 Kati bo beewuunya okulaba nga temukyabeegattako mu ddalu ly'obusaasaanyi; kwe kudda mu kubavuma. 
1Peter4:5 Naye baliwoza ew'oyo eyeetegese okulamula abalamu n'abafu. 
1Peter4:6 Abafu abo newandibadde nga ku nsi baalamulibwa ng'omuntu yenna bw'alamulibwa, naye kubanga nabo wa kubalamula, kyebaava babuulirwa Evangili, basobole okutuuka ku bulamu bwa Katonda mu mwoyo." 
1Peter4:7 Enkomerero ya byonna esembedde; awo nno omutima gubabe wamu nga muli bakalangufu olw'okwegayirira. 
1Peter4:8 Naye ekisingira ddala obukulu, mwagalanenga awatali kusalawo, kubanga okwagalana kubikka ku bibi bingi." 
1Peter4:9 Mwanirizaganye bulungi awatali kwemulugunya. 
1Peter4:10 Buli omu yafuna ekitone, akikozesenga ku lwa munne nga bwe kigwanira abawanika abalungi ab'ebitone bya Katonda eby'enjawulo:" 
1Peter4:11 ayogera, ayogere ng'awa obubaka bwa Katonda; aweereza, aweereze ng'akola ku lwa maanyi Katonda g'awa, Katonda alyoke agulumizibwe mu byonna ku bwa Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe, nnyini kitiibwa n'okufuga emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
1Peter4:12 Abaagalwa, muleme kwewuunya olw'okusiyiikibwa okw'okubageza okuliwo kati mu mmwe; muleme kukutwala ng'ekintu ekitali kya bulijjo." 
1Peter4:13 Wabula musanyuke nti nammwe mugabanye ku kubonaabona kwa Kristu, olwo mulyoke musanyuke, mujaguze ekitiibwa kye bwe kiryolekebwa." 
1Peter4:14 Bwe babavuma okubeera erinnya lya Kristu, mwesiimye, kubanga olwo Mwoyo ow'ekitiibwa, Mwoyo wa Katonda, aba ku mmwe." 
1Peter4:15 Naye mu mmwe muleme kubaamu abonaabona kubanga mutemu, mubbi, mukozi wa bubi, oba mutabuzitabuzi." 
1Peter4:16 Kyokka oli bw'abonaabona kubanga Mukristu, ekyo kireme kumuswaza, wabula agulumize Katonda olw'okubeera ow'erinnya eryo." 
1Peter4:17 Kubanga obudde butuuse okulamula kutandikire ku b'omu nnyumba ya Katonda. Oba kusookedde ku ffe, enkomerero y'abo abatakkiriza Vangili ya Katonda eriba etya?" 
1Peter4:18 Anti “oba omutuukirivu okulokolebwa kiriba kizibu, abatatya Katonda n'aboonoonyi balirabika wa?”" 
1Peter4:19 Kale nno abo ababonaabona kubanga Katonda bw'ayagadde, emyoyo gyabwe bagikwase Katonda omwesigwa nga bakola ebirungi." 
1Peter5:1 Nkubiriza abakadde abali mu mmwe, nze nga mukadde munnammwe omujulirwa w'ebibonoobono bya Kristu, era aligabana ku kitiibwa ekijja okwolekebwa," 
1Peter5:2 mulabirirenga eggana lya Katonda eryabakwasibwa, si na buwaze, wabula lwa kwagala nga Katonda yennyini bwe yandikoze. Temugobererangamu magoba agaswaza, wabula mukoze kwagala," 
1Peter5:3 buli omu ku baamukwasibwa n'atalaga buyinza; wabula mubeere kyakulabirako eri eggana. 
1Peter5:4 Omusumba Omukulu bw'alirabika, mufune engule ey'ekitiibwa etafuma." 
1Peter5:5 Nammwe abavubuka, muwulirenga abakadde. Mwambale buli omu okwetoowaliza munne, anti Katonda alwanyisa abeekuza, naye abeetoowaze abagirira ekisa." 
1Peter5:6 Mwetoowalize omukono gwa Katonda ogw'amaanyi, mu bbanga ttono alyoke abagulumize." 
1Peter5:7 Byonna ebibeeraliikiriza mubimukasukire, kubanga abafaako." 
1Peter5:8 Mubeere bakalangufu, mutunule, kubanga Sitaani omulabe wammwe ayitaayita ng'empologoma ewuluguma ng'enoonya gw'eneekavvula." 
1Peter5:9 Mumuziyize nga muli banywevu mu kukkiriza. Mutegeere ng'ennaku ezibalaba z'eziraba n'abooluganda lwammwe bonna abali ku nsi. 
1Peter5:10 Nga mumaze okubonaabonamu akabanga, Katonda nnyini kisa kyonna, eyatuyita okugabana ku kitiibwa ekitaggwaawo mu Yezu Kristu, ye ajja kubazzaawo, abanyweze, abagumye." 
1Peter5:11 Oyo obukulu bubeere bubwe emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina. 
1Peter5:12 Neeyambye Siluvano owooluganda omwesigwa okubawandiikira mu bimpimpi nga mbeegayirira, n'okukakasa nga bwe nkakasa, nti bino y'eneema ya Katonda. Muginywereremu." 
1Peter5:13 Oyo ali mu Babiloni, eyalondebwa nga mmwe, abatumidde; era ne mutabani wange Mariko." 
1Peter5:14 Mulamusaganye n'okunywegera okw'okwagala. Emirembe gibeere nammwe mwenna abali mu Kristu. 
2Peter1:1 Simoni Petero, omuweereza era Omutume wa Yezu Kristu. Y'abo abaafuna okukkiriza okwenkana n'okwaffe omuwendo, kwe twafunira mu butuukirivu bwa Katonda waffe era Omulokozi Yezu Kristu." 
2Peter1:2 Eneema ebeere nammwe n'emirembe gyeyongere obungi nga bwe mweyongera mu kumanya Katonda ne Yezu Mukama waffe. 
2Peter1:3 Amaanyi g'obwakatonda bwe gaatuwa byonna bye twetaaga mu bulamu ne mu kubeera abasomi, nga tumanyisibwa oyo eyatuyita mu kitiibwa kye kyennyini ne mu butuukirivu bwe," 
2Peter1:4 mwe yatuweera ebisuubizo eby'ettendo era ebikulu. Olw'ebyo musobole okuwona obwonoonefu obuli mu nsi olw'amaddu, mugabane ku bwakatonda." 
2Peter1:5 Olw'ensonga eyo mufube ku kukkiriza kwammwe mwongereko empisa ennungi, ku mpisa ennungi mwongereko okumanya," 
2Peter1:6 ku kumanya mwongereko okwetangira, ku kwetangira mwongereko obusomi," 
2Peter1:7 ku busomi mwongereko okuyisaŋŋanya ng'ab'oluganda, ku kuyisaŋŋanya ng'ab'oluganda mwongereko okwagala." 
2Peter1:8 Ebyo byonna bwe munaaba mubifunidde ddala mu bungi, bijja kubawonya, okumanya kwe mumanyiimu Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ne kutaba kwa busa oba obutabala bibala." 
2Peter1:9 Oli atabirina, muzibe, alabira kumpi, yeerabidde nti ebibi bye yali akoze byamutukuzibwako." 
2Peter1:10 Awo nno, abooluganda, mufube okuyitibwa kwammwe n'okulondebwa bibeere binywevu. Bwe mukola bwe mutyo, temuligwa mulundi n'ogumu." 
2Peter1:11 Olwo muliweebwa mu bungi okuyingira mu bwakabaka obutaggwaawo obwa Mukama era Mulokozi waffe Yezu Kristu. 
2Peter1:12 Olw'ekyo neetegese okubajjukizanga ebyo bulijjo, newandibadde nga mubimanyi, n'okunywera munyweredde ku mazima ge mulina." 
2Peter1:13 Nga nkyali mu kasiisira kano, ndowooza nga mulimu gwange okubabagulizangako nga mbajjukiza;" 
2Peter1:14 anti mmanyi ng'obw'okwabulira akasiisira kange bunaatera okutuuka nga Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu bwe yakindaga. 
2Peter1:15 Kyokka nzija kufuba nga bwe nsobola okulaba nti bwe ndiba mmaze okugenda, ebyo munaabyejjukanyanga bulijjo." 
2Peter1:16 Anti bwe twabamanyisa amaanyi ga Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu n'okujja kwe, tetwagoberera nfumo njiyirize, anti ffe ffennyini twalabira ddala ekitiibwa kye." 
2Peter1:17 Anti bwe yafuna ettendo n'ekitiibwa okuva ewa Katonda Taata, yawulira eddoboozi eryamujjira nga liva ew'Ekitiibwa Ekitenkanika nga limugamba nti: “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa gwe neesiimiramu.”" 
2Peter1:18 Naffe eddoboozi lino eryava mu ggulu twaliwulira, kubanga twali wamu naye ku lusozi olutukuvu." 
2Peter1:19 Kati tulina ekigambo abalanzi kye baagamba ekyongedde okukakasibwa. Munaaba mukoze bulungi okukifaako, ne kiba ng'omumuli ogwakira mu kizikiza okutuusa obudde lwe bunaakya emmunyeenye ey'oku makya n'evaayo mu mitima gyammwe." 
2Peter1:20 Mu kusookera ddala, mwenna mutegeere nga tewali na kimu ekyalangwa mu Biwandiiko ebitukuvu omuntu ky'amala gannyonnyola nga bw'ayagala." 
2Peter1:21 Anti tewabanga kirangwa kyava mu bantu ku bwabwe, wabula abantu ba Katonda abatuukirivu baayogeranga nga Mwoyo Mutuukirivu y'abasindise." 
2Peter2:1 Abalanzi ab'obulimba ne mu ggwanga baalingamu; ne mu mmwe mujja kubeerangamu abayigiriza ab'obulimba, abalireetamu endowooza ez'akabi, ne beegaana ne Nnyinibuyinza eyabagula, ne beereetera okuzikirira okw'amangu." 
2Peter2:2 Bangi baligoberera eby'obugwenyufu, ne bavumaganya ekkubo ery'amazima." 
2Peter2:3 Mu kululunkana kwabwe balisala gonna okubagula n'ebigambo byabwe eby'obulimba; kyokka omusango gwabwe gwabasinga dda, n'okuzikirira kwabwe tekwebase." 
2Peter2:4 Ne bamalayika bwe baayonoona, Katonda teyabasonyiwa; yabasulinka wansi eyo mu magombe, n'abasiba eyo mu nzikiza, bakuumirwe eyo okutuusa ku kulamulibwa." 
2Peter2:5 N'ensi ey'edda teyagisonyiwa; yatalizaako Nowa yekka, omuyigiriza w'obutuukirivu, n'abantu abalala musanvu, bwe yaleeta omujjuzi ku nsi y'abatatya Katonda." 
2Peter2:6 Ebibuga Sodoma ne Gomorra yabifuula evvu, n'abisalira ogw'okusaanawo, bonna abatatya Katonda balyoke bategeererenga okwo." 
2Peter2:7 Kyokka yawonyaawo Loti, omusajja omutuukirivu, eyali yeetamiddwa engeri ez'ekigwenyufu ez'abantu abo omutali mpisa." 
2Peter2:8 Anti omusajja oyo omutuukirivu, bwe yali mu bo, yakabirirwa buli lunaku mu mwoyo gwe omulungi olw'ebikolwa byabwe ebibi bye yalabanga ne bye yawuliranga." 
2Peter2:9 Abantu abasomi Katonda amanyi okubaggya mu bizibu, abatali batuukirivu bo amanyi okubalindiriza ekibonerezo okutuusa ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa." 
2Peter2:10 Naddala abo abagoberera amaddu g'omubiri agoonoona, era abatassa kitiibwa mu bakama baabwe. Abantu abo ba lunkulu, abatalina gwe bassaamu kitiibwa, tebatya na kuvuma bali ab'ekitiibwa." 
2Peter2:11 Bamalayika basinga mu maanyi n'obuyinza, sso bo tebabawawaabira yadde okubavunaana ekigambo mu maaso g'Omukama." 
2Peter2:12 Naye bano nno abamala gavuma ne buli kye batategeera ng'ensolo omutali magezi, bitondetonde bityo, abaazaalirwa okukwatibwa battibwe; balizikirira wamu nabyo nga bizikirira," 
2Peter2:13 bagwe mu kabi nga ye mpeera y'akabi ke bakola. Bo bakiyita ssanyu okubinuka emisana; mabala mabi, ebizigiro; ne bwe babeera nga balya nammwe, baba mu kubinuka mu bulimba bwabwe." 
2Peter2:14 Balina amaaso agajjudde obukaba; ekibi tebakikkuta; baseemyaseemya ab'emyoyo egitali minywevu. Emitima gyabwe gyakuguka mu kuluvuwala. Bantu bakolimire. 
2Peter2:15 Baleka ekkubo eggolokofu ne bawaba. Bakutte ekkubo lya Balaamu mutabani wa Bewori eyayagala okufuna ng'akola ebibi. 
2Peter2:16 Sso yakangavvulwa olw'ebisobyo bye; endogoyi etayogera yayogera mu ddoboozi ly'omuntu, n'ekoma ku ddalu ly'omulanzi." 
2Peter2:17 Abo nzizi omutali tuzzi; kalenge kibuyaga gw'akuŋŋunsa, abaterekeddwa ekizikiza ekikunivu." 
2Peter2:18 N'ebigambo byabwe omutali eby'okwewanika bakema abaakadduka ku abo abakyali mu nsobi, nga babaseemyaseemya n'amaddu ag'omubiri n'obugwenyufu." 
2Peter2:19 Babasuubiza eddembe, sso nga bo obugwenyufu bubeefuze. Anti oli ekintu bwe kimuwangula, afuuka muddu waakyo." 
2Peter2:20 Abo abadduka obwonoonefu bw'ensi oluvannyuma lw'okumanya Mukama waffe era Omulokozi Yezu Kristu, bumala bubazingako nate, ne bubawangula, embeera yaabwe ey'oluvannyuma efuuka mbi n'okukira eyasooka." 
2Peter2:21 Ekyandibasingidde bwe butamanya kkubo lya butuukirivu, okusinga okumala okulitegeera ate ne bakuba enkyukira, ne baleka ekiragiro ekitukuvu ekyabakwasibwa." 
2Peter2:22 Abo olugero luno lubatuukirako bulungi, nti: “Embwa edda ku by'esesemye,” era nti n'embizzi oluginaaza, edda mu kwevulunga mu bitoomi." 
2Peter3:1 Abaagalwa, eno ye bbaluwa eyookubiri gye mbawandiikidde; mu zombi ŋŋenderedde kukakamula birowoozo byammwe ebyesimbu nga mbajjukiza" 
2Peter3:2 nti mwandijjukidde ebyo ebyayogerwa edda abalanzi abatuukirivu, n'ebiragiro by'Omukama era Omulokozi Abatume bammwe bye baabawa." 
2Peter3:3 Ekisookera ddala, mutegeere nga mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walijjayo abaduuze, abajjirira okuduula, abagoberera amaddu gaabwe gokka," 
2Peter3:4 nga bagamba nti: “Bye yasuubiza nti ajja biruwa? Bajjajja kasooka bagalamira byonna bikyali nga bwe byali ku masooka g'okutondebwa.”

2Peter3:6 era nti ensi eyo eyaliwo yabikkibwa mu mujjuzi n'amazzi ago n'ezikirira. 
2Peter3:7 N'ekigambo ekyo kyennyini, eggulu n'ensi ebiriwo kati byazzibwawo ne kibikuuma okutuusa lwe biryokebwa omuliro ku lunaku olw'okulamulibwa n'okuzikirira kw'abantu abatatya Katonda." 
2Peter3:8 Abaagalwa, waliwo ekigambo kiikino kimu kye mutasaanye kwerabira, nti ew'Omukama olunaku olumu luli ng'emyaka olukumi, n'emyaka olukumi giri ng'olunaku olumu." 
2Peter3:9 Omukama bw'asuubiza, talwa kutuukiriza ky'asuubizza, ng'abamu bwe bamuvunaana nti aludde. Wabula akyakwatiriddeko olw'okubeera mmwe nga tayagala wabeerewo bazikirira, wabula nti bonna batuuke ku kwenenya." 
2Peter3:10 Lwo olunaku lw'Omukama lulijja ng'omubbi; olwo eggulu liriggwaawo mu kubwatuka, ebintu eggulu mwe lyakolebwa ne bisaanuuka mu muliro; ensi na byonna ebigiriko birisirikka." 
2Peter3:11 Oba byonna bino biriseebengerera, mmwe abantu nga kibagwanidde okuyisa obulamu obutukuvu, obw'ekisomi," 
2Peter3:12 nga mulinda mutyo era nga bwe mwanguyaako okutuuka kw'olunaku lw'Omukama, eggulu lwe liryaka ne liseebengerera ne bye lyakolwamu lwe birisaanuuka olw'omuliro." 
2Peter3:13 Tulinda eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya omuli obutukuvu, nga bwe yatusuubiza." 
2Peter3:14 Awo nno, abaagalwa, nga bwe mulinda ebyo, mufube abasange mu ddembe nga temuliiko bbala na musango." 
2Peter3:15 Mukama waffe okugira ng'akyakwatiriddeko, mukitwale ng'omukisa gwammwe okulokoka. N'owooluganda omwagalwa Pawulo bw'atyo bwe yabawandiikira mu magezi ge yaweebwa," 
2Peter3:16 ebyo n'abyogerako, era nga bw'abyogerako mu bbaluwa ze zonna. Mu bbaluwa ezo osangamu oluusi ebizibu okutegeera, abatali bayigirize n'abatali banywevu bye batabulatabula ne beereetera okuzikirira, nga bwe bakola Ebiwandiiko ebirala." 
2Peter3:17 Awo nno, mmwe abaagalwa, mutegedde nga bukyali; mwerinde, muleme kutwalirizibwa bukyamu bw'abantu omutali mpisa ne muva awammwe we munyweredde."
