Jude1:1 Yuda, omuweereza wa Yezu Kristu era muganda wa Yakobo, y'abo abaayitibwa, abaagalwa mu Katonda Taata, era abaakuumirwa Yezu Kristu;" 
Jude1:2 okusaasira, emirembe n'okwagala byeyongere obungi." 
Jude1:3 Abaagalwa, newandibadde nga nayagala nnyo okubawandiikira ku bifa ku kulokoka kwaffe ffenna kwe tugabana, naye mpaliriziddwa okubawandiikira mbakubirize okulwanirira n'obuvumu okukkiriza okwaweebwa abatuukirivu olumu nga lwe lwamala." 
Jude1:4 Kubanga waliwo abantu abamu abeerimbise mu mmwe mu nkukutu, abo okuva edda abaalambibwa okusingibwa omusango; abatatya Katonda, eneema ya Katonda waffe abagifuula obugwagwa, ne bagaana ne Yezu Kristu, yekka Nnyinibuyinza era Omukama." 
Jude1:5 Njagala okubajjukiza, newandibadde nga byonna mwabimanya, nti Omukama bwe yamala okununula eggwanga mu nsi y'e Misiri olumu n'amala, oluvannyuma bonna abatakkiriza yabazikiriza." 
Jude1:6 Ne bamalayika abataakuuma bukulu bwabwe, ne baleka ebifo byabwe, yabasiba mu nzikiza mu njegere ez'emirembe gyonna, ng'abakuumira okulamulibwa ku lunaku luli olukulu." 
Jude1:7 Mu ngeri ye emu Sodoma ne Gomorra n'ebibuga ebyali byetooloddewo, nabyo ebyessa mu bugwagwa ne mu bukaba obutali bwa butonde, bituweereddwa ng'ekyokulabirako eky'abo abali ku kibonerezo eky'omu muliro ogw'emirembe gyonna." 
Jude1:8 Mu ngeri ye emu, na bano abali mu birooto baweebuula emibiri gyabwe, ne banyooma obukulu, ne bavuma ab'ebitiibwa ab'omu ggulu." 
Jude1:9 Sso nga ne Mikayeli Ssaabamalayika, bwe yali yeezooba ne Sitaani ng'akaayana ku mubiri gwa Musa, teyaguma kumulamula mu ngeri yandimuvumye; yagamba bugambi nti: “Omukama akukomeko.”" 
Jude1:10 Naye bo bano byonna bye batategeera bavuma bivume; naye ate ebyo bye bamanyi okusinziira mu butonde ng'ensolo ezitalina magezi bwe zibimanya, mwe bazikiririra." 
Jude1:11 Zibasanze! Ekkubo bakutte lya Kayini; olw'okufuna empeera, bawondedde bunnambiro ensobi ya Balaamu, ne bazikiririra mu bujeemu bwa Kora." 
Jude1:12 Bano bali nga mabala ku mbaga zammwe ez'okussa ekimu; bajja okulya nammwe awatali na kafansonyi, nga beefaako bokka. Bali ng'ebire omutali mazzi empewo by'ekuŋŋuusa; miti okutali bibala ku nkomerero y'omwaka, egifudde emirundi ebiri n'okusindulwa ne gisindulwa;" 
Jude1:13 mayengo ga nnyanja agaswakidde, babimba jjovu lya nsonyi zaabwe; mmunyeenye mmomboze, abaterekeddwa okubeera mu kizikiza ekikunivu eky'emirembe gyonna." 
Jude1:14 Enoki ow'olulyo olwomusanvu okuva ku Adamu abo be yayogerako nti: “Omukama wuuno azze n'enkumi n'enkumi z'abatuukirivu be," 
Jude1:15 okujja okusalira omusango bonna, n'okuvunaana bonna abatatya Katonda olw'enneeyisa yaabwe yonna embi enkafiiri, n'olw'ebigambo byonna ebitasanyusa aboonoonyi abo ababi bye bamuvumyemu.”" 
Jude1:16 Abantu abo batolooma, beemulugunya; bagoberera maddu gaabwe gokka, ba kamwa akoogera eby'okwewaana, abasuutasuuta abantu okubaako kye beefunira." 
Jude1:17 Naye mmwe, abaagalwa, mujjukire ebigambo Abatume ba Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu bye baalanga," 
Jude1:18 bwe baabagamba nti: “Mu nnaku ez'oluvannyuma walijjayo abaduuze abagoberera amaddu gaabwe amakafiiri.” 
Jude1:19 Be bo abaleeta okweyawulayawulamu; ba ndowooza ya nsi, tebaliimu Mwoyo." 
Jude1:20 Naye mmwe, abaagalwa, mwezimbire ku kukkiriza kwammwe okutukuvu ddala; mwegayirire mu Mwoyo Mutuukirivu;" 
Jude1:21 mwekuumire mu kwagala Katonda; mulindirire ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yezu Kristu ekibatuusa mu bulamu obutaggwaawo. 
Jude1:22 Mubeere ba kisa eri abamu ababuusabuusa; 
Jude1:23 abalala mubawonye mu muliro nga mubasikayo; abandi mubakwate na kisa, naye nga mutya, nga mukyayira ddala ekyambalo ekijamawaziddwa omubiri." 
Jude1:24 Eri oyo asobola okubawonya okugwa, ate n'okubayimiriza mu maaso g'ekitiibwa kye nga temuliiko bbala era nga muli basanyufu," 
Jude1:25 eri Katonda yekka omulokozi waffe, mu Yezu Kristu Mukama waffe, ebeere ekitiibwa n'obukulu, n'okufuga, n'obuyinza emirembe gyonna nga teginnabaawo, na kaakano, na bulijjo. Amiina." 
Revelation1:1 Okubikkulirwa kwa Yezu Kristu, Katonda kwe yamuwa ategeeze abaweereza be ebyali biteekeddwa okugwawo amangu. Yabitegeeza Yowanna omuweereza we ng'amutumira malayika we;" 
Revelation1:2 Yowanna y'oyo ajulira ekigambo kya Katonda n'ebyo Yezu Kristu bye yajulira, na byonna bye yalaba." 
Revelation1:3 Yeesiimye oyo asoma ebigambo bino ebirangiddwa, n'abo beesiimye abawulira ne bakuuma byonna ebiwandiikiddwamu; anti obudde buli kumpi." 
Revelation1:4 Nze Yowanna, eri Ekleziya omusanvu eziri mu Aziya: Eneema ebeere nammwe ko n'emirembe okuva eri Oyo aliwo, eyaliwo era ajja, era n'okuva eri emyoyo omusanvu egiri awo mu maaso ga nnamulondo ye," 
Revelation1:5 n'okuva eri Yezu Kristu, Omujulirwa omwesigwa, omuggulanda w'abaafa, era afuga bakabaka b'ensi. Oyo atwagala, eyatusumulula mu bibi byaffe n'omusaayi gwe," 
Revelation1:6 n'atufuula obwakabaka, bakabona ab'okuweereza Katonda era Taata, aweebwe ekitiibwa n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina." 
Revelation1:7 Wuuyo ajjira mu bire; buli liiso lijja kumulaba, na buli eyamufumita. Ebika by'ensi byonna biritema emiranga olw'okubeera ye. Bwe kiriba kityo. Amiina." 
Revelation1:8 “Nze Alufa ne Omega,” Omukama Katonda y'agamba, oyo aliwo, eyaliwo era alijja, Omuyinza wa buli kantu." 
Revelation1:9 Nze Yowanna, muganda wammwe, agabana nammwe mu Yezu Kristu ku kubonaabona, ku bwakabaka ne ku kugumiikiriza, nali mu kizinga ekiyitibwa Patumo olw'okubeera ekigambo kya Katonda n'olw'okujulira Yezu." 
Revelation1:10 Nali nkwatiddwa Mwoyo ku Lunaku lw'Omukama, ne mpulira emabega wange eddoboozi eddene, kyenkana ng'ery'ekkondeere," 
Revelation1:11 nga ligamba nti: “Wandiika mu kitabo by'olaba, okiweereze Ekleziya omusanvu: e Efezi, e Simiruna, e Perugamo, e Tiyatira, e Sarudi, e Filadelufiya n'e Lawodikeya.”" 
Revelation1:12 Ne nkebuka ndabe eddoboozi eriŋŋamba. Bwe nakebuka, ne ndaba ebikondo by'ettawaaza musanvu ebya zaabu." 
Revelation1:13 Wakati mu bikondo by'ettawaaza nga waliwo afaanana ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, ng'ayambadde ekizibawo ekikka okutuuka ku bigere, nga yeesibye omusipi ogwa zaabu mu kifuba;" 
Revelation1:14 omutwe gwe n'enviiri ze nga byeru ng'ebyoya by'endiga ebyeru, ng'omuzira; amaaso ge nga gali ng'olulimi olw'omuliro;" 
Revelation1:15 ebigere bye nga bifaanana ng'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekizigule ekimaze okutukuzibwa mu kabiga, n'eddoboozi lye nga liri ng'ery'amazzi amangi." 
Revelation1:16 Mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo yalinamu emmunyeenye musanvu; mu kamwa ke nga muvaamu ekitala ekyogi ku njuuyi zombi; amaaso ge nga gali ng'enjuba eyaka n'amaanyi. 
Revelation1:17 Bwe namulaba, ne ngwa ku bigere bye nga ndi ng'omufu; kyokka ye n'anzisaako omukono gwe ogwa ddyo, n'agamba nti: “Totya, nze Mubereberye, nze Muvannyuma;" 
Revelation1:18 nze Mulamu. Nali nfudde, ate kati laba ndi mulamu emirembe n'emirembe, era nnina ebisumuluzo by'olumbe n'amagombe." 
Revelation1:19 Kale nno wandiika by'olaba kati n'ebyo ebinaatuuka gye bujja. 
Revelation1:20 Ekyama ekiri mu mmunyeenye omusanvu z'olabye mu mukono gwange ogwa ddyo n'ebikondo bya zaabu omusanvu kye kino: emmunyeenye omusanvu be bamalayika b'Ekleziya omusanvu, ate ebikondo omusanvu ze Ekleziya omusanvu." 
Revelation2:1 “Malayika w'Ekleziya mu Efezi muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba oyo akutte emmunyeenye omusanvu mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo, atambulira wakati w'ebikondo omusanvu eby'ettawaaza ebya zaabu, nti:" 
Revelation2:2 Mmanyi by'okola, okufaabiina kwo n'okugumiikiriza kwo, nga bw'otosobola kuginya babi, abo abaali beeyita abatume sso nga si bwe bali, wabula nga wabageza n'obasanga nga balimba;" 
Revelation2:3 mmanyi ng'ogumiikiriza, ng'okwatiriddeko olw'okubeera erinnya lyange era tonnakoowa." 
Revelation2:4 Sso nnina kye nkuvunaana: Okwagala kwe walina mu masooka wakuleka. 
Revelation2:5 Kale nno jjukira gye wava okugwa, weenenye; okole ebyo bye wakolanga olubereberye. Bw'oteenenye, nzija kujja gy'oli, nzigye ekikondo ekyo eky'ettawaaza mu kifo kyakyo, wabula mpozzi nga weenenyezza." 
Revelation2:6 Kyokka oliko kino kimu: Wakyawa ebikolwa by'abagoberezi ba Nikolawo, nange bye nkyawa." 
Revelation2:7 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo by'agamba Ekleziya. Aliba awangudde, ndimuwa okulya ku muti ogw'obulamu oguli mu nnimiro ya Katonda ey'okwesiima.’" 
Revelation2:8 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Simiruna muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba Omubereberye ate ow'Oluvannyuma, eyali afudde ate n'addamu obulamu, nti:" 
Revelation2:9 Mmanyi ennaku zo n'obwavu bwo, sso oli mugagga; mmanyi abeeyita Abayudaaya sso nga si bwe bali, wabula sinaagooga ya Sitaani." 
Revelation2:10 Ebibonoobono ebigenda okukugwira tobitya. Abamu mu mmwe Sitaani wuuyo ajja okubasuula mu kkomera, mugezebwe; mujja kubonaabona okumala ennaku kkumi. Ba mwesigwa okutuusa okufa, olwo ndikuwa engule ey'obulamu." 
Revelation2:11 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo by'agamba Ekleziya. Aliba awangudde, okufa okwokubiri tekulimukolako kabi.’" 
Revelation2:12 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Perugamo muwandiikire nti: ‘Bwati bw'agamba oyo alina ekitala ekyogi ku njuuyi zombi, nti:" 
Revelation2:13 Mmanyi nga gy'osula nnamulondo ya Sitaani gy'eri; teweegaana kukkiriza kwo ne luli mu nnaku z'omujulirwa wange Antipa, musajja wange omwesigwa, eyattirwa eyo ewammwe, eyo Sitaani gy'asula." 
Revelation2:14 Sso nninayo obutonotono bwe nkuvunaana: Olinayo eyo abakwata enjigiriza ya Balaamu eyayigiriza Balaki okusuula Abayisirayeli mu kyesittazo balye ebiwonge bakole n'obwenzi. 
Revelation2:15 Naawe era olinayo abakwata enjigiriza ya Nikolawo. 
Revelation2:16 Gira nno naawe weenenye. Bw'otookole otyo, nzija kujja gy'oli mbalwanyise n'ekitala eky'akamwa kange." 
Revelation2:17 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo by'agamba Ekleziya. Aliba awangudde, ndimuwa manu enkusike, ndimuwa n'akayinja akeeru akawandiikiddwako erinnya eriggya eritalina mulala alimanyi wabula oyo yekka akafunye.’" 
Revelation2:18 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Tiyatira muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba Omwana wa Katonda, alina amaaso agali ng'olulimi lw'omuliro n'ebigere bye ebiri ng'ekyuma eky'ekikomo ekizigule, nti:" 
Revelation2:19 Mmanyi by'okola, okwagala kwo, okukkiriza kwo n'obugumiikiriza bwo; ate by'okola ennaku zino bisingako obulungi ku byasooka." 
Revelation2:20 Kyokka nnina kino kye nkuvunaana: waleka omukazi Yezebeli, eyeeyita omulanzi, n'ayigiriza era n'awubisa abaweereza bange, ne bakola obwenzi n'okulya ebiwongeddwa balubaale." 
Revelation2:21 Namuwa obudde obw'okweddamu, naye tayagala kwenenya bwenzi bwe." 
Revelation2:22 Kale nno nzija kumuteeka ku ndiri; abo abaayenda naye nzija kubalabya ennaku ez'ekitalo, mpozzi nga beenenyezza ebikolwa bye." 
Revelation2:23 N'abaana be nzija kubatta n'olumbe; Ekleziya zonna olwo zinaategeera nga nze wuuyo eyeekenneenya emmeeme n'omutima, nga buli omu nzija kumuwa nga ngerera ku by'akoze." 
Revelation2:24 Naye mmwe abalala mwenna abali mu Tiyatira, abatagoberera njigiriza, abataamanya bye bagamba nti bikisiddwa nnyo bya Sitaani, sijja kubongerako mugugu mulala." 
Revelation2:25 Kyokka kye mulina ekyo mukinyweze okutuka lwe ndijja. 
Revelation2:26 Aliba awangudde, n'anywerera ku bikolwa byange okutuusa ku nkomerero, ndimuwa obuyinza obw'okufuga amawanga." 
Revelation2:27 Alibafuga ne ddamula ow'ekyuma, n'abaasaayasa ng'ayasa ebibya eby'ebbumba, nga nange bwe nafuna bwe ntyo obuyinza okuva ewa Kitange;" 
Revelation2:28 ndimuwa emmunyeenye ey'oku makya. 
Revelation2:29 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba Ekleziya.’" 
Revelation3:1 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Sarudi muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba Oyo alina emyoyo gya Katonda omusanvu n'emmunyeenye omusanvu, nti: By'okola mbimanyi. Olina erinnya nti oli mulamu, sso ng'oli mufu." 
Revelation3:2 Tunula, nyweza ebikyasigaddewo, ebisuliridde okufa, kubanga by'okola sibisanze nga bituufu mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Revelation3:3 Jjukira kye wafuna ne kye wawulira; kikuume, weenenye. Bw'otootunule, nzija kujja ng'omubbi; tolimanya kabanga ke ndikujjiramu." 
Revelation3:4 Sso era okyalinamu mu Sarudi amannya g'abamu abatonotono, abatayonoonanga byambalo byabwe; balitambula nange mu byambalo ebyeru, kubanga basaanye." 
Revelation3:5 Aliba awangudde, alyambazibwa ebyambalo ebyeru, n'erinnya lye sigenda kulisangula mu kitabo kya bulamu; erinnya lye ndiryatula mu maaso ga Kitange ne mu ga bamalayika be." 
Revelation3:6 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba Ekleziya.’" 
Revelation3:7 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Filadelufiya muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba Omutuukirivu, Omutuufu ddala, alina ekisumuluzo kya Dawudi, aggulawo ne wataba aggalawo, aggalawo ne wataba aggulawo, nti:" 
Revelation3:8 By'okola mbimanyi. Kale nno ntadde mu maaso go omulyango omuggule ogutalina n'omu asobola kuguggala; mmanyi nti newandibadde ng'amaanyi olina matono, naye era wanyweza ekigambo kyange, teweegaana linnya lyange." 
Revelation3:9 Kale nno nzija kuddira ab'omu sinaagooga ya Sitaani, abeeyita Abayudaaya sso nga si bwe bali, wabula abalimba; laba, nzija kubaddira bajje bavunname ku bigere byo, bategeere nti nakwagala." 
Revelation3:10 Kubanga waguma nga bwe nagamba, nange nzija kukuwonya akadde ak'okugezebwa akagenda okubaawo ku nsi yonna, okugeza abo abali ku nsi." 
Revelation3:11 Nzija mangu; ky'olina kinyweze, wabulewo atwala engule yo." 
Revelation3:12 Aliba awangudde, ndimufuula empagi mu kiggwa kya Katonda wange; taliddayo kufuluma bweru, era ndimuwandiikako n'erinnya lya Katonda wange n'erinnya ly'ekibuga kya Katonda wange, Yeruzaalemu omuggya akkirira ng'ava mu ggulu ewa Katonda wange; ndimuwandiikako n'erinnya lyange eriggya." 
Revelation3:13 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba Ekleziya.’" 
Revelation3:14 “Ne malayika w'Ekleziya mu Lawodikeya muwandiikire nti: ‘Bw'ati bw'agamba Oyo Amiina, Omwesigwa, Omujulirwa omutuufu ddala, Ensibuko y'ebyo Katonda bye yatonda, nti:" 
Revelation3:15 Mmanyi by'okola; tonnyogoga ate tobuguma; waakiri singa nno onnyogoga, oba singa obuguma." 
Revelation3:16 Naye kubanga oli wa kasuususu, nga tonnyogoga ate tobuguma, ŋŋenda kukusesema mu kamwa kange." 
Revelation3:17 Kubanga ogamba nti: “Ndi mugagga, nnina bingi, mpaawo kye njula,” n'otomanya nti oli munkuseere, akwasa ennaku, mwavu, muzibe wa maaso, oli bukunya." 
Revelation3:18 Nkuwa amagezi weegulire ewange zaabu alongooseddwa mu muliro olyoke ogaggawale, n'engoye enjeru oyambale, obwereere bwo obukuswaza buleme kulabika, n'omuzigo osiige amaaso go olyoke olabe." 
Revelation3:19 Nze be njagala mbakomako ne mbabonereza. Kale nno weekakamule, weenenye." 
Revelation3:20 Nzuuno nnyimiridde ku mulyango nkonkona; aliba awulidde eddoboozi lyange n'aggulawo oluggi, ndiyingira ewuwe ne ndya naye ekijjulo, nga tuli ffembi wamu." 
Revelation3:21 Aliba awangudde, ndimuwa n'atuula nange ku nnamulondo, nga nange bwe nawangula ne ntuula ne Kitange ku nnamulondo ye." 
Revelation3:22 Alina okutu, awulire Mwoyo ky'agamba Ekleziya.’ ”" 
Revelation4:1 Oluvannyuma, ne ndaba: laba, mu ggulu omulyango omuggule! Eddoboozi eryali lyogedde nange okusooka, eryali lyogera nga liri ng'ekkondeere, ne ligamba nti: “Yambuka eno, nkulage ebitalirema kutuuka ng'ebyo biwedde.”" 
Revelation4:2 Amangu ago ne nkwatibwa Mwoyo; laba, mu ggulu waali wateekeddwayo nnamulondo; nga waliwo atudde ku nnamulondo!" 
Revelation4:3 Eyali atuddeko mu ndabika ng'ali ng'ejjinja lya yasipi ne saridiyo, yali yeetooloddwa musoke mu ndabika eyali ng'ejjinja lya simaragido." 
Revelation4:4 Okwebungulula nnamulondo waaliwo nnamulondo abiri mu nnya, nga ku nnamulondo kutuddeko abakadde abiri mu bana abambadde engoye enjeru, nga ku mitwe gyabwe kuliko engule eza zaabu." 
Revelation4:5 Mu nnamulondo nga mufubutukamu ebimyanso, amaloboozi n'okubwatuka kw'eggulu; mu maaso ga nnamulondo nga waliwo ettawaaza musanvu ezaaka, gy'emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda." 
Revelation4:6 Mu maaso ga nnamulondo nga waliwo ekyali ng'ennyanja ey'ekirawuli, ng'ejjinja ettangaavu. Ate mu makkati n'okwetooloola nnamulondo waaliwo ebiramu bina ebijjudde amaaso wonna mu maaso n'emabega." 
Revelation4:7 Ekiramu ekisooka kyali kifaanana ng'empologoma; ekiramu ekyokubiri kyali kifaanana ng'akate akalume, ekiramu ekyokusatu kyalina obwenyi ng'obw'omuntu; ate ekiramu ekyokuna nga kiri ng'empungu ebuuka." 
Revelation4:8 Ebiramu ebyo ebina, buli kimu nga kirina ebiwaawaatiro mukaaga; nga birina amaaso kungulu wonna ne munda, nga byogera emisana n'ekiro awatali kuweera nti: “Mutuukirivu, mutuukirivu, mutuukirivu, Omukama Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu, eyaliwo, aliwo era ajja.”" 
Revelation4:9 Ebiramu ebyo bwe byabanga biwa ekitiibwa n'ettendo era nga byebaza oyo atudde ku nnamulondo, omulamu emirembe n'emirembe," 
Revelation4:10 nga n'abakadde abiri mu abana beeyala mu maaso g'oyo atudde ku nnamulondo, ne bamusinza oyo omulamu emirembe n'emirembe; engule zaabwe nga bazikasuka mu maaso ga nnamulondo nga bwe bagamba nti:" 
Revelation4:11 “Osaanidde, ayi Mukama era Katonda waffe, okufuna ekitiibwa n'ettendo n'obuyinza, kubanga ggwe watonda ebintu byonna; olw'okwagala kwo, byabeerawo era ne bitondebwa.”" 
Revelation5:1 Awo mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oli atudde ku nnamulondo ne ndabamu ekitabo ekiwandiikiddwa munda ne kungulu nga kisibiddwa n'envumbo musanvu. 
Revelation5:2 Ne ndaba malayika ow'amaanyi ng'alangirira n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Ani asaanidde okwanjuluza ekitabo n'okubembula envumbo zaakyo omusanvu?” 
Revelation5:3 Mu ggulu, ku nsi ne wansi w'ensi ne wabula asobola okubikkula ekitabo yadde okukitunulamu." 
Revelation5:4 Nze ne nkaaba nnyo nga ndaba wabuzeewo eyasangibwa ng'asaanidde okubikkula ekitabo yadde okukitunulamu. 
Revelation5:5 Omu ku bakadde kwe kuŋŋamba nti: “Leka kukaaba; laba Empologoma ey'omu kika kya Yuda, Ekikolo kya Dawudi, awangudde okubikkula ekitabo n'okubembula envumbo zaakyo omusanvu.”" 
Revelation5:6 Ne ndaba nga mu makkati ga nnamulondo n'ebiramu ebina ne mu bakadde wayimiriddewo Akaliga; kaali ng'akaali kattiddwako, nga kalina amayembe musanvu, n'amaaso musanvu, gye myoyo omusanvu egya Katonda egitumibwa mu nsi yonna." 
Revelation5:7 Akaliga ne kajja, ne kaggya ekitabo mu mukono ogwa ddyo ogw'oyo atudde ku nnamulondo." 
Revelation5:8 Bwe kaamala okukwata ekitabo, ebiramu ebina n'abakadde abiri mu abana ne beeyala mu maaso g'Akaliga, buli omu ng'akutte entongooli n'ebikopo ebya zaabu ebijjudde obubaani, anti ze ssaala z'abatuukirivu." 
Revelation5:9 Ne bayimba oluyimba oluggya, nga bagamba nti: “Osaanidde okufuna ekitabo n'okubembula envumbo zaakyo; kubanga wattibwa n'onunulira Katonda abantu n'omusaayi gwo okuva mu buli kika na buli lulimi, mu buli bantu na buli ggwanga," 
Revelation5:10 n'obafuula obwakabaka ne bakabona okuweereza Katonda waffe, era balifuga ku nsi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Awo ne ntunula, ne mpulira eddoboozi lya bamalayika enkumu abeetoolodde nnamulondo, ebiramu n'abakadde, omuwendo gwabwe nga bukadde na bukadde, nkumi na nkumi," 
Revelation5:12 nga boogera n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Akaliga akattibwa kasaanidde okuba n'obuyinza, n'obugagga, n'amagezi n'amaanyi, n'ettendo, n'ekitiibwa n'okugulumizibwa.”" 
Revelation5:13 Ebitonde byonna ebiri mu ggulu ne ku nsi, ne wansi w'ensi n'ebiri mu nnyanja, leero byonna ebibirimu, ne mpulira nga bireekaana nti: “Atudde ku nnamulondo n'Akaliga, bombi basaanidde okufuna okugulumizibwa, n'ettendo, ekitiibwa, n'obuyinza emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation5:14 Ebiramu ebina ne bigamba nti: “Amiina,” n'abakadde ne beeyala, ne basinza." 
Revelation6:1 Ate ne ndaba Akaliga bwe kabembula emu ku nvumbo omusanvu; ne mpulira ekimu ku biramu nga kyogera mu ddoboozi ng'ery'eraddu nti: “Jjangu!” 
Revelation6:2 Bwe natunula, laba embalaasi enjeru; eyali agyebagadde yalina omusaale; n'aweebwa engule, n'afuluma nga yeekaaliisa agende ng'awangula." 
Revelation6:3 Bwe kaabembula envumbo eyookubiri, ne mpulira ekiramu ekyokubiri nga kigamba nti: “Jjangu!”" 
Revelation6:4 Ne wafubutukayo embalaasi endala ey'akawemba; eyali agyebagadde n'aweebwa okuggya eddembe mu nsi, abantu battiŋŋane. N'aweebwa ekitala ekinene." 
Revelation6:5 Bwe kaabembula envumbo eyookusatu, ne mpulira ekiramu ekyokusatu nga kigamba nti: “Jjangu!” Bwe natunula, laba embalaasi enzirugavu; eyali agyebagadde yalina minzaani mu mukono gwe." 
Revelation6:6 Ne mpulira ekiri ng'eddoboozi eryogerera wakati mu biramu ebina nga ligamba nti: “Ekigero ky'eŋŋano kimu kya dinaari emu, ebigero bya sayiri bisatu bya dinaari emu; naye evviini n'omuzigo tobikolako kabi.”" 
Revelation6:7 Bwe kaabembula envumbo eyookuna, ne mpulira eddoboozi ery'ekiramu ekyokuna nga ligamba nti: “Jjangu!”" 
Revelation6:8 Bwe natunula, laba embalaasi ensiiwuufu; eyali agyebagadde nga bamuyita Walumbe, amagombe nga gagenda gamugoberera. Baaweebwa obuyinza ku kyokuna eky'ensi, bagende nga batta nga beeyamba ekitala, enjala, kawumpuli n'ebisolo eby'oku nsi." 
Revelation6:9 Bwe kaabembula envumbo eyookutaano, ne ndaba wansi w'omwaliiro emyoyo gy'abo abattibwa olw'okubeera ekigambo kya Katonda n'olw'okubeera okujulira kwe baali bakoze." 
Revelation6:10 Baali baleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Ayi Nnyinibuyinza, ggwe omutuukirivu era ow'amazima, bunaaba ddi n'olamula n'okuwoolera eggwanga olw'omusaayi gwaffe ku abo bonna abali mu nsi?”" 
Revelation6:11 Awo buli omu n'aweebwa ekyambalo ekyeru, ne balagirwa okugira nga balindako akaseera katono okutuusa baweereza bannaabwe era baganda baabwe ab'okutta nga bo nga bamaze okuggwaayo." 
Revelation6:12 Bwe kaabembula envumbo eyoomukaga, bwe natunula, laba ne wabaawo musisi ow'amaanyi, enjuba n'eddugala okufaanana ekikutiya ekikole mu byoya by'endiga; n'omwezi gwonna ne gufuuka ng'omusaayi." 
Revelation6:13 N'emmunyeenye ez'eggulu ne ziwandagala ku nsi ng'omukunyu bwe gukunkumula entontogolo zaagwo nga gunyeenyezeddwa kikuŋŋunta ow'amaanyi. 
Revelation6:14 Eggulu ne libulawo ng'omuzingo gw'ekitabo oguzingiddwako; n'ensozi zonna n'ebizinga ne bijjulukuka mu bifo byabyo. 
Revelation6:15 Olwo bakabaka b'ensi, abakungu, n'abagabe b'amagye, abagagga ne bakirimaanyi, leero buli muntu, omuddu n'omwana ow'eddembe, ne beekukuma mu mpuku ne mu mayinja ag'omu nsozi." 
Revelation6:16 Ne bagamba ensozi n'amayinja nti: “Mutugweko, mutukweke amaaso g'atudde ku nnamulondo n'obusungu bw'Akaliga," 
Revelation6:17 anti olunaku olukulu olw'obusungu bwabwe lumaze okutuuka, ani anaasobola okulugumira?”" 
Revelation7:1 Oluvannyuma lwa kino, nalaba bamalayika bana, nga bayimiridde ku nsonda ennya ez'ensi nga banyigiriza empewo ez'ensi zireme kukuntira ku nsi, ku nnyanja newandibadde ku muti n'ogumu." 
Revelation7:2 Ate ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'ayambuka ava ebuvanjuba, ng'alina akabonero ka Katonda omulamu; n'akoowoola n'eddoboozi eddene ng'alangiriza bamalayika abana abaali bafunye obuyinza okukola akabi ensi n'ennyanja," 
Revelation7:3 n'abagamba nti: “Muleke kukola kabi nsi na nnyanja newandibadde emiti, tumale okussa ku baweereza ba Katonda waffe akabonero ku byenyi byabwe.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ne mpulira omuwendo gw'abo abassibwako akabonero nga bawera akasiriivu kamu mu obukumi buna mu enkumi nnya, abaggyiddwa mu buli kika ky'abaana ba Yisirayeli:" 
Revelation7:5 Akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri abassibwako akabonero okuva mu kika kya Yuda, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Rubeni, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Gaadi," 
Revelation7:6 akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Aseri, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Nafutali, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Manasse," 
Revelation7:7 akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Simewoni, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Leevi, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Yissakari," 
Revelation7:8 akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Zebuluni, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri okuva mu kika kya Yozefu, akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri abassibwako akabonero okuva mu kika kya Benyamiini." 
Revelation7:9 Oluvannyuma, bwe natunula, laba ebbiina eddene eritalina muntu n'omu asobola kulibala, nga bava mu mawanga gonna ne mu bika byonna ne mu bantu n'ennimi zonna, nga bayimiridde mu maaso ga nnamulondo ne mu maaso g'Akaliga, bambadde engoye enjeru n'ensansa nga zibali mu ngalo," 
Revelation7:10 nga baleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Katonda waffe awaŋŋamye ku nnamulondo era n'Akaliga be bannannyini kulokola.” 
Revelation7:11 Bamalayika bonna baali bayimiridde nga beebunguludde nnamulondo n'abakadde n'ebiramu ebina, ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe mu maaso ga nnamulondo, ne basinza Katonda" 
Revelation7:12 nga bagamba nti: “Amiina! Katonda waffe agulumizibwe, afune ekitiibwa n'amagezi, yeebazibwe, afune ettendo, obuyinza n'amaanyi emirembe n'emirembe. Amiina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Awo omu ku bakadde n'ayogera n'ambuuza nti: “Abo abambadde engoye enjeru be baani era bava wa?” 
Revelation7:14 Ne muddamu nti: “Ssebo, ggwe omanyi.” N'aŋŋamba nti: “Abo be baayita mu kubonaabona okunene; baayoza engoye zaabwe ne bazaamula mu musaayi gw'Akaliga." 
Revelation7:15 “Kyebava babeera mu maaso ga nnamulondo ya Katonda ne bamuweereza mu Kiggwa kye emisana n'ekiro. N'oyo atudde ku nnamulondo alibanjululizaako weema ye. 
Revelation7:16 Tebaliddayo kulumwa njala, oba okulumwa ennyonta, yadde enjuba oba ebbugumu eddala lyonna okubookya." 
Revelation7:17 Kubanga Akaliga mu makkati ga nnamulondo, ke kanaabafuganga; kalibatuusa ku nsulo z'amazzi ag'obulamu; ne Katonda alisangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe.”" 
Revelation8:1 Akaliga ate ne kabembula envumbo eyoomusanvu, ne wabaawo akasiriikiriro mu ggulu nga ka kitundu kya ssaawa." 
Revelation8:2 Ne ndaba ate bamalayika omusanvu, abayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda; ne baweebwa amakondeere musanvu." 
Revelation8:3 Ne malayika omulala n'ajja, n'ayimirira ku mwaliiro ng'alina ekyoterezo ekya zaabu; n'aweebwa obubaani bungi abugatte awamu n'essaala z'abatuukirivu bonna ku mwaliiro ogwa zaabu mu maaso ga nnamulondo." 
Revelation8:4 Omukka gw'obubaani ne guva mu mukono gwa malayika ne gwambuka ewa Katonda awamu n'essaala z'abatuukirivu. 
Revelation8:5 Malayika n'addira ekyoterezo n'akijjuzaamu omuliro ng'aguggya ku mwaliiro, n'akikasuka ku nsi. Ne wabaawo okubwatuka, amaloboozi n'ebimyanso, n'okukankana kwa musisi." 
Revelation8:6 Bamalayika omusanvu abaalina amakondeere omusanvu ne beeteekateeka okugafuuwa. 
Revelation8:7 Malayika omubereberye n'afuuwa ekkondeere: ne wabaawo omuzira n'omuliro nga byetabudde n'omusaayi, ne bikanyugibwa ku nsi; ekyokusatu eky'ensi ne kibengeya, n'ekyokusatu eky'emiti ne kiggya, n'omuddo gwonna omubisi ne guggya." 
Revelation8:8 Ate malayika owookubiri n'afuuwa ekkondeere: ekintu ekiri ng'olusozi olunene olwaka omuliro ne kikasukibwa mu nnyanja," 
Revelation8:9 ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'ennyanja ne kifuuka omusaayi, ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'ebitonde ebiramu eby'omu nnyanja ne kifa, n'ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'amaato ne kitokomoka." 
Revelation8:10 Ne malayika owookusatu n'afuuwa ekkondeere: emmunyeenye eyaka ng'ekitawuliro n'eva mu ggulu, n'egwa ku kitundu ekyokusatu eky'emigga n'enzizi." 
Revelation8:11 Emmunyeenye eyo eyitibwa Mususa. Ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'amazzi ne kifuuka mususa; abantu bangi ne bafa olw'amazzi ago, kubanga gaali gakaaye." 
Revelation8:12 Ate malayika owookuna n'afuuwa ekkondeere, ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'enjuba ne kikubwa, n'ekyokusatu eky'omwezi, n'ekyokusatu eky'emmunyeenye; bwe kityo ekyokusatu eky'ekitangaala kyazo ne kizikira; olunaku ne luzikirako ekitundu ekyokusatu, era n'ekiro bwe kityo." 
Revelation8:13 Ate ne ndaba, ne mpulira empungu, eyali ebuukira mu bbanga, ng'egamba n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Zibasanze, zibasanze, zibasanze abali ku nsi bamalayika abasatu abasigadde bwe banaafuuwa amakondeere!”" 
Revelation9:1 Ne malayika owookutaano n'afuuwa ekkondeere: ne ndaba ng'emmunyeenye eyavudde edda mu ggulu n'egwa ku nsi eweebwa ekisumuluzo ky'obuya bw'ennyanga. 
Revelation9:2 N'aggulawo obuya bw'ennyanga, omukka ne guva mu buya kyenkana ng'ogw'omu kabiga akanene; enjuba n'empewo ne biddugala olw'omukka ogwava mu buya." 
Revelation9:3 Mu mukka omwo ne mufubutukamu enzige, ne zigwa ku nsi, ne ziweebwa obuyinza okwenkana obuyinza bw'enjaba ez'oku nsi." 
Revelation9:4 Ne ziragirwa obutakola kabi ku muddo ogw'omu nsi yadde ku buli kimera kyonna ne ku buli muti, wabula ku bantu bokka abatalina kabonero ka Katonda mu kyenyi kyabwe;" 
Revelation9:5 ne zigaanibwa okubatta, wabula ne ziweebwa okubabonyaabonya okumala emyezi etaano; mu kubonyaabonya nga zirumya ng'enjaba bw'ekola ng'erumye omuntu." 
Revelation9:6 Mu nnaku ezo abantu balinoonya olumbe naye ne batalusanga; balyegomba okufa, naye olumbe ne lubeesamba." 
Revelation9:7 Enzige ezo zaafaanananga ng'embalaasi ezitaze okulwana; ku mitwe gyazo nga zirina ekiri ng'engule eza zaabu, ate obwenyi bwazo nga bufaanana ng'obwenyi bw'abantu." 
Revelation9:8 Enviiri zaazo nga ziri ng'enviiri z'abakazi, amannyo gaazo nga gali ng'amannyo g'empologoma." 
Revelation9:9 Zaalina amagamba agali ng'ebizibawo ku kifuba eby'ekyuma; okuwuuma kw'ebiwaawaatiro byazo nga kuli ng'okw'ebigaali by'embalaasi ebingi ebigenda okulumba. 
Revelation9:10 Zaali zirina emikira ng'egy'enjaba, nga kuliko amayindu; obuyinza bwazo obw'okukolera abantu obubi okumala ebbanga ery'emyezi etaano buziri mu mikira gyazo." 
Revelation9:11 Zaalina kabaka azifuga, ye malayika w'omu nnyanga. Mu Lwebureeyi ayitibwa Abaddoni, ate mu Lugereeki Apolluwoni." 
Revelation9:12 Ekikolimo ekimu kiwedde, ate wakyaliyo ebikolimo bibiri eby'okujja." 
Revelation9:13 Ate malayika owoomukaga n'afuuwa ekkondeere, ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu mayembe ana ag'omwaliiro ogwa zaabu oguli awo mu maaso ga Katonda," 
Revelation9:14 nga ligamba malayika owoomukaga eyali alina ekkondeere nti: “Sumulula bamalayika abana abaasibibwa ku mugga omunene Ewufuraati.” 
Revelation9:15 Awo Bamalayika abana ne basumululwa, abaali awo nga bategekeddwa essaawa yonna, olunaku lwonna, omwezi gwonna, omwaka gwonna okutta ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'abantu." 
Revelation9:16 Omuwendo gw'abalwanyi ab'eggye eryebagazi gwali obukumi bubiri emirundi kakumi; omuwendo gwabwe naguwulira. 
Revelation9:17 Embalaasi bw'enti bwe naziraba mu kulabikirwa kwange: abeebagazi baalina ebizibawo eby'okukifuba ebimyufu ng'omuliro, ebya bululu omukwafu, n'ebya kyenvuyenvu ng'ebibiriiti; emitwe gy'embalaasi nga giri ng'egy'empologoma; mu kamwa kaazo nga mufubutukamu omuliro n'omukka n'ebibiriiti." 
Revelation9:18 Mu bibonoobono bino ebisatu ekyokusatu eky'abantu kyattibwa omuliro, omukka n'ebibiriiti ebyavanga mu kamwa k'embalaasi." 
Revelation9:19 Anti obuyinza bw'embalaasi ezo bwalinga mu kamwa kaazo ne mu mikira gyazo; emikira gyazo nga gifaanana ng'emisota, nga kuliko n'emitwe; gino gye gyeyambanga okulumya." 
Revelation9:20 Abantu abalala bonna abatattibwa bibonoobono bino, baagaana okwenenya ebikolwa by'emikono gyabwe, wadde okulekayo okusinza emyoyo emibi, n'ebifaananyi bya balubaale ebya zaabu, n'ebya ffeeza, n'eby'ekikomo, n'eby'amayinja, n'eby'emiti, ebitayinza kulaba oba okuwulira oba okutambula." 
Revelation9:21 Era tebeenenya butemu bwabwe, bulogo bwabwe, bwenzi bwabwe na bubbi bwabwe." 
Revelation10:1 Ne ndaba malayika omulala ow'amaanyi ng'akkirira ava mu ggulu, ayambadde ekire, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko musoke, amaaso ge nga gali ng'enjuba, amagulu ge nga gali ng'empagi z'omuliro." 
Revelation10:2 Mu mukono gwe yalinamu akatabo nga kabikkule; ekigere kye ekya ddyo n'akisimba ku nnyanja, ate ekya kkono ku lukalu." 
Revelation10:3 N'aleekaana n'eddoboozi eddene kyenkana ng'empologoma ewuluguma; bwe yaleekaana, eraddu omusanvu ne zoogera." 
Revelation10:4 Eraddu omusanvu bwe zaamala okwogera, nali ŋŋenda nti okuwandiika, ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Eraddu omusanvu bye zigambye bisirikire, tobiwandiika.”" 
Revelation10:5 Malayika gwe nalaba ng'ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu, n'asitulira omukono gwe eri eggulu," 
Revelation10:6 n'alayira Oyo abeera omulamu emirembe n'emirembe, eyatonda eggulu ne byonna ebiririmu, n'ensi na byonna ebigirimu, n'ennyanja, na byonna ebigirimu, nti: “Tekyaliyo kadde kalala;" 
Revelation10:7 wabula mu nnaku ezo malayika owoomusanvu bw'alikoowoola, olwo ekyama kya Katonda kigenda kutuukirizibwa, nga bwe yakirangirira eri abaweereza be abalanzi.”" 
Revelation10:8 Ate eddoboozi lye nali mpulidde okuva mu ggulu ne lyogera nange nate, nga ligamba nti: “Genda okwate ekitabo ekibikkule ekiri mu ngalo za malayika ayimiridde ku nnyanja ne ku lukalu.”" 
Revelation10:9 Ne ŋŋenda eri malayika, ne mmugamba okumpa akatabo. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Kakwate, kalye. Kajja kukukaayirira mu lubuto lwo, naye mu kamwa kajja kuwoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki.”" 
Revelation10:10 Malayika ne mmuggya akatabo mu ngalo, ne nkalya; mu kamwa ne kawoomerera ng'omubisi gw'enjuki, naye bwe namala okukalya, ne kankaayirira mu lubuto." 
Revelation10:11 Ne baŋŋamba nti: “Oli wa kuddamu buto okulanga eri amawanga mangi, n'abantu bangi, n'ennimi nkumu ne bakabaka bangi.”" 
Revelation11:1 Awo ne mpeebwa olumuli olufaanana omuggo ogupima, ne baŋŋamba nti: “Situka opime Ekiggwa kya Katonda n'omwaliiro n'abasinzizaamu;" 
Revelation11:2 naye oluggya oluli ebweru w'Ekiggwa luleke, tolupima, kubanga lwaweebwa ab'amawanga, bajja kulinnyirira ekibuga ekitukuvu okumala emyezi amakumi ana mu ebiri." 
Revelation11:3 Nzija kutuma abajulirwa bange babiri bamale ennaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga nga balanga, nga bambadde ebikutiya." 
Revelation11:4 Abo gye miti gy'oliva ebiri, bye bikondo by'ettawaaza ebibiri ebiyimirira mu maaso g'Omukama w'ensi." 
Revelation11:5 Bwe wabaawo ayagala okubakolera obubi, omuliro guva mu kamwa kaabwe ne guwemmenta abalabe baabwe. Buli yenna ayagala okubakolera obubi, wa kufa." 
Revelation11:6 Abo balina obuyinza okusiba eggulu enkuba n'etetonnya ennaku zonna ze banaamala nga balangirira; ate balina n'obuyinza obw'okufuula amazzi omusaayi, n'okukuba ensi na buli kibonoobono emirundi gyonna gye baagala." 
Revelation11:7 Bwe banaamala okujulira, ekisolo ekinaava mu nnyanga kijja kubaggulako olutalo, kibawangule, kibatte." 
Revelation11:8 Emirambo gyabwe girisigala awo ku luguudo lw'ekibuga ekikulu, mu kugereesa ekiyitibwa Sodoma oba Misiri, eyo ne Mukama waabwe gye yakomererwa." 
Revelation11:9 Okumala ennaku ssatu n'ekitundu abantu okuva mu mawanga, ebika, ennimi n'ensi balyerolera emirambo gyabwe, era emirambo egyo tebaligiganya kuziikibwa mu ntaana." 
Revelation11:10 Abantu ab'omu nsi balyekulisa okubeera bo, ne basanyuka ne baweerezagana ebirabo, kubanga abalanzi abo ababiri baalabisa ennaku abantu abali ku nsi.”" 
Revelation11:11 Nga wayise ennaku ssatu n'ekitundu omukka ogw'obulamu okuva ewa Katonda ne gubayingiramu, ne bayimirira ku bigere byabwe; entiisa ey'amaanyi n'ekwata abo abaabalaba." 
Revelation11:12 Ne bawulira eddoboozi eddene nga liva mu ggulu nga libagamba nti: “Mwambuke eno!” Ne bagendera mu kire, ne balinnya mu ggulu abalabe baabwe nga balaba." 
Revelation11:13 Mu kabanga ako ne wasituka musisi ow'amaanyi, ekitundu eky'ekkumi eky'ekibuga ne kigwa; abantu kasanvu ne battibwa mu musisi oyo, abaasigalawo ne batya, ne batendereza Katonda ow'eggulu." 
Revelation11:14 Ekikolimo ekyokubiri kiwedde; ekyokusatu kijja kujja mangu. 
Revelation11:15 Ne malayika owoomusanvu n'afuuwa ekkondeere; mu ggulu ne wasituka amaloboozi agoogerera waggulu nga gagamba nti: “Obwakabaka bw'ensi bufuuse bwakabaka bwa Mukama waffe ne Kristu we, ajja kulamula emirembe n'emirembe.”" 
Revelation11:16 Abakadde abiri mu abana abatudde ku ntebe zaabwe mu maaso ga Katonda ne bagwa wansi ku maaso gaabwe, ne basinza Katonda" 
Revelation11:17 nga bagamba nti: “Tukwebaza, ayi Mukama Katonda, Omuyinza wa buli kantu, aliwo era eyaliwo, kubanga weddizza obuyinza bwo obukulu n'olamula." 
Revelation11:18 Amawanga gaasunguwala, naye naawe obusungu bwo butuuse, era n'akadde k'abafu balamulibwe, oweere empeera abaweereza bo, abalanzi n'abatuukirivu, n'abatya erinnya lyo, abatene n'abanene, osaanyeewo abo abasaanyaawo ensi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Awo Ekiggwa kya Katonda eky'omu ggulu ne kiggulwawo, Ssanduuku ye ey'Endagaano ye n'erabika munda mu Kiggwa kye. Ne wasituka ebimyanso, amaloboozi, okubwatuka, musisi, n'omuzira ogw'amaanyi." 
Revelation12:1 Ate akabonero akanene ne kalabika mu ggulu: Omukazi ayambadde enjuba, ng'omwezi guli wansi w'ebigere bye, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko engule ya mmunyeenye kkumi na bbiri." 
Revelation12:2 Yali lubuto, n'aleekaana mu kulumwa; yali akabiriddwa ng'azaala." 
Revelation12:3 Era mu ggulu ne walabikayo akabonero akalala: Ssessota omunene owa kawemba ng'alina emitwe musanvu n'amayembe kkumi, ku buli mutwe nga kuliko omuge." 
Revelation12:4 Akawuuwo nga kawalula ekitundu ekyokusatu eky'emmunyeenye ez'omu ggulu; ne kazikuba ku nsi. Ssessota oyo n'ayimirira mu maaso g'omukazi eyali okumpi okuzaala, alye omwana omukazi olunaamala okumuzaala." 
Revelation12:5 Omukazi n'azaala omwana wa bulenzi, nga ye w'okufuga amawanga gonna ne ddamula ow'ekyuma; ye omwana we n'asitulibwa n'atwalibwa ewa Katonda ku nnamulondo ye." 
Revelation12:6 Omukazi n'addukira mu ddungu eyo Katonda gye yali amutegekedde ekifo, bamulabiririre eyo ebbanga lya nnaku lukumi mu bibiri mu nkaaga." 
Revelation12:7 Awo mu ggulu ne wasituka olutalo olunene, Mikayeli ne bamalayika be nga balwanyisa ssessota; ssessota ne bamalayika be ne balwana," 
Revelation12:8 naye ne bawangulibwa, ne babulwa akafo akalala konna we bayinza okubeera mu ggulu." 
Revelation12:9 Ssessota omunene n'akanyugibwa wansi, y'oyo omusota ogw'edda oguyitibwa Omuloopi oba Sitaani, eyalimbalimba ensi yonna; yakanyugibwa wansi, ne bamalayika be ne bakanyugibwa wamu naye." 
Revelation12:10 Mu ggulu ne mpulirayo eddoboozi ery'omwanguka nga ligamba nti: “Kati obulokofu butuuse, ko n'obuyinza, n'obufuzi bwa Katonda n'obufuzi bwa Kristu we, anti eyakonjeranga baganda baffe ewa Katonda ekiro n'emisana, akasukiddwa wansi." 
Revelation12:11 Bamuwangudde n'omusaayi gw'Akaliga n'olw'ekigambo kye baajulira, kubanga obulamu bwabwe tebaabufaako n'okutuukira ddala okufa." 
Revelation12:12 Wamma eggulu sanyuka, nammwe mwenna abalisulamu! Wabula zibasanze mmwe ensi n'ennyanja! Kubanga Sitaani akkiridde eyo mu mmwe n'obusungu obw'ekitalo, kubanga amanyi nti akabanga asigazizza katono.”" 
Revelation12:13 Ssessota bwe yalaba akasukiddwa mu nsi, n'agoba omukazi eyazaala omwana ow'obulenzi." 
Revelation12:14 Naye omukazi n'aweebwa ebiwaawaatiro bibiri eby'empungu ennene, abuuke alage mu ddungu, mu kifo kye gy'ajja okulabiririrwa okumala ekiseera n'ebiseera n'ekitundu ky'ekiseera nga ssessota tamulabako." 
Revelation12:15 Omusota ne gusesema mu kamwa kaagwo amazzi kyenkana mugga mulamba gawondere omukazi, gumutwalire mu mugga." 
Revelation12:16 Kyokka ettaka ne liyamba omukazi, ne lyasamya akamwa kaalyo, ne limira omugga ssessota gwe yali afumbukudde mu kamwa ke." 
Revelation12:17 Ssessota n'asunguwalira omukazi, n'agenda okulumba abalala abasigadde mu zzadde lye, abo abakwata ebiragiro bya Katonda, abajulira Yezu." 
Revelation12:18 Awo ssessota n'ayimirira ku lubalama lw'ennyanja. 
Revelation13:1 Ne ndaba ekisolo; kyali kifubutuka mu nnyanja; kyalina amayembe kkumi n'emitwe musanvu, nga ku buli jjembe kuliko omuge, ate ku mitwe nga kuliko amannya g'ebivumo ebivuma Katonda." 
Revelation13:2 Ekisolo ekyo kye nalaba kyali kifaanana ng'engo, ebigere byakyo nga biri ng'eby'eddubu, ate omumwa nga guli ng'ogw'empologoma. Ssessota n'akiwa amaanyi ge, nnamulondo ye n'obuyinza bwe obw'ekitalo." 
Revelation13:3 Ogumu ku mitwe gyakyo gwaliko olubale olwali kata lukitte, naye olubale olwali kata lukitte nga luwonye; ensi yonna yali egoberera ekisolo nga yeewuunya." 
Revelation13:4 Ne basinza ssessota kubanga yali awadde ekisolo obuyinza, ne basinza n'ekisolo nga bagamba nti: “Ani yenkana ekisolo? Ye ani anaasobola okulwana nakyo?”" 
Revelation13:5 Ekisolo ne kiweebwa akamwa akeewaana n'okuvuma Katonda; ne kiweebwa obuyinza obw'okukola kityo okumala ebbanga lya myezi amakumi ana mu ebiri. 
Revelation13:6 Ne kyasamya akamwa okuvuma Katonda, okuvuma erinnya lye n'okuvuma ekisulo kye n'abo abasula mu ggulu." 
Revelation13:7 Ne kikkirizibwa okulumba abatuukirivu n'okubawangula; ne kiweebwa obuyinza okufuga buli kika, buli bantu, buli lulimi na buli ggwanga." 
Revelation13:8 Bonna ababeera mu nsi bagenda kukisinza, abo bonna okuviira ddala ensi lwe yabangibwawo amannya gaabwe agatawandiikibwanga mu kitabo ky'obulamu eky'Akaliga akattibwa." 
Revelation13:9 Oba oli alina okutu, awulire:" 
Revelation13:10 Ow'okutwalibwa mu busibe, agende mu busibe; atta n'ekitala, naye wa kuttibwa na kitala. Wano abatuukirivu we basabirwa okulaga obugumiikiriza n'okukkiriza." 
Revelation13:11 Ate ne ndaba ekisolo ekirala nga kifubutuka mu ttaka; kyalina amayembe abiri ng'akaliga, ate nga kyogera nga ssessota." 
Revelation13:12 Ne kiraga obuyinza bwonna obw'ekisolo ekyasooka mu maaso gaakyo, ne kireetera ensi n'abagibeeramu okusinza ekisolo kiri ekyalina olubale olwali kata lukitte naye ne luwona." 
Revelation13:13 Ne kikola obubonero, ng'okuyita omuliro mu ggulu ne gukka ku nsi ng'abantu balaba." 
Revelation13:14 Ne kiwubisa abali mu nsi n'obubonero obunene bwe kyali kiweereddwa okukola mu maaso g'ekisolo; ne kibalagira okukola ekifaananyi ky'ekisolo ekyali kifunye olubale lw'ekitala naye ne kirama. 
Revelation13:15 Ate ne kiweebwa obuyinza okussiza omukka mu kifaananyi ky'ekisolo, ekifaananyi ky'ekisolo kyogere, kireetere bonna abagaana okusinza ekifaananyi ky'ekisolo okuttibwa." 
Revelation13:16 Era ne kireetera abantu bonna, abatene n'abanene, abagagga n'abaavu, abaana b'eddembe n'abaddu okulambibwako ku mukono ogwa ddyo ne mu kyenyi," 
Revelation13:17 wabulewo asobola okugula oba okutunda wabula oyo alina akabonero k'ekisolo oba erinnya lyakyo, oba omuwendo gw'erinnya lyakyo." 
Revelation13:18 Wano weetaagisaawo obulabalaba: oli ategeera abalirire omuwendo gw'ekisolo; omuwendo ogwo gwa muntu; omuwendo guli lukaaga mu nkaaga mu mukaaga 
Revelation14:1 Ate bwe natunula, laba Akaliga! Kaali kayimiridde ku lusozi Siyoni, ate ng'akasiriivu kamu mu obukumi buna mu enkumi nnya abaali balina erinnya lyako n'erinnya lya Kitaawe waako nga gawandiikiddwa mu byenyi byabwe baali awo nako." 
Revelation14:2 Ate ne mpulira eddoboozi okuva mu ggulu nga liri ng'ery'amazzi amangi, era ng'ery'eraddu ey'amaanyi; eddoboozi lye nawulira nga liri ng'ery'abasunyi b'ennanga abaali basuna entongooli zaabwe." 
Revelation14:3 Baali bayimba oluyimba oluggya mu maaso ga nnamulondo n'ag'ebiramu ebina n'ag'abakadde. Naye tewaali mulala yali ayinza kuluyiga, wabula abo bokka akasiriivu akamu mu obukumi obuna mu enkumi ennya abaali banunuliddwa okuva mu nsi." 
Revelation14:4 Beebo abateegwagwawazanga na bakazi, anti babeererevu; beebo abagenda bagoberera Akaliga buli we kalaga; be babereberye mu bantu abaanunulirwa Katonda n'Akaliga." 
Revelation14:5 Mu kamwa kaabwe temusangibwamu bulimba; tebaliiko musango. 
Revelation14:6 Ate ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'abuuka mu bbanga, ng'alina evangili ey'emirembe gyonna ey'okubuulira abo abali ku nsi, buli ggwanga, buli kika, buli lulimi na buli bantu." 
Revelation14:7 Yali ayogera n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Mutye Omukama, mumusseemu ekitiibwa, kubanga obudde bwe butuuse obw'okulamula. Muvunnamire oyo eyakola eggulu n'ensi, ennyanja n'ensulo z'amazzi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ne malayika omulala owookubiri n'agoberera ng'agamba nti: “Agudde, agudde Babiloni ow'ekitalo, oyo eyanywesa amawanga gonna omwenge gw'obugwagwa bwe.”" 
Revelation14:9 Malayika omulala owookusatu n'abaddirira ng'ayogera n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Singa wanaabaawo avunnamira ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, n'afuna akabonero kaakyo ku kyenyi kye oba ku mukono gwe," 
Revelation14:10 ajja kunywa omwenge gw'obusungu bwa Katonda nga gufukiddwa mu kikompe ky'obusungu bw'Omukama, nga temuli katabikiddwamu. Ajja kubonyaabonyezebwa n'omuliro n'ebibiriiti mu maaso g'abamalayika abatuukirivu ne mu maaso g'Akaliga." 
Revelation14:11 Erikka ery'ebibonoobono byabwe lirinyooka emirembe n'emirembe; abasinza ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, na buli eyalambibwako akabonero k'erinnya lyakyo, tebaliweerako emisana n'ekiro.”" 
Revelation14:12 Wano abatuukirivu abakuuma ebiragiro bya Katonda ne basigala nga bakkiriza Yezu we basabibwa okubeera abagumiikiriza. 
Revelation14:13 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eriva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Wandiika nti: ‘Beesiimye abafu n'okuva kati abafiira mu Mukama; Mwoyo agamba nti beesiimidde ddala; bawummulire ddala ku kutegana kwabwe, anti ebikolwa byabwe bibagoberera.’ ”" 
Revelation14:14 Bwe natunula, laba ekire ekyeru! Ku kire kwali kutuddeko eyali afaanana ng'Omwana w'Omuntu, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliko engule eya zaabu, ate mu mukono gwe nga mulimu ekiwabyo ekyogi." 
Revelation14:15 Awo malayika omulala n'afuluma mu Kiggwa, n'alangiriza n'eddoboozi eddene oli atudde ku kire nti: “Wuuba ekiwabyo kyo, okungule, kubanga obudde butuuse obw'okukungula; kubanga eby'okukungula eby'ensi byengedde.”" 
Revelation14:16 N'oli eyali atudde ku kire n'awuuba ekiwabyo kye mu nsi, ensi n'ekungulibwa." 
Revelation14:17 Ne malayika omulala n'afuluma mu Kiggwa eky'omu ggulu nga naye alina ekiwabyo ekyogi. 
Revelation14:18 Ne malayika omulala eyalina obuyinza ku muliro, n'ava eri ku mwaliiro, n'alagiriza n'eddoboozi eddene nti: “Wuuba ekiwabyo kyo ekyogi osale ebirimba by'emizabbibu egy'omu nsi, kubanga emizabbibu gyayo gyengedde.”" 
Revelation14:19 Awo malayika n'awuuba ekiwabyo ekyogi mu nsi, n'akuŋŋaanya emizabbibu gy'ensi, n'agikasuka mu ssogolero eddene ery'obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation14:20 Okusamba mu ssogolero kwali bweru wa kibuga; omusaayi ne gukulukuta okuva mu ssogolero, nga mu butumbiivu gukoma ku matandiiko g'embalaasi; ne gukulukuta sitadiyo lukumi mu lukaaga." 
Revelation15:1 Ate ne ndaba akabonero akalala mu ggulu akanene, akeewuunyisa: Bamalayika musanvu, baali balina ebibonoobono musanvu, by'ebisemba, kubanga obusungu bwa Katonda bwali bwa kumalirizibwa na bino." 
Revelation15:2 Era ne ndaba ekyali ng'ennyanja ey'ekirawuli omuli n'omuliro, n'abo abaawangula ekisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo n'omuwendo gw'erinnya lyakyo nga bayimiridde ku nnyanja ey'ekirawuli nga basuna ennanga za Katonda mu mikono gyabwe." 
Revelation15:3 Baali bayimba oluyimba lwa Musa omuweereza wa Katonda n'olw'Akaliga, nga bagamba nti: “By'okola nga binene, nga byewuunyisa, ayi Mukama Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu! Amakubo go matuufu, ga mazima, ayi Kabaka w'amawanga!" 
Revelation15:4 Ani ataatye n'okussaamu ekitiibwa erinnya lyo, ayi Mukama? Kubanga wekka ggwe mutuukirivu. Amawanga gonna galijja ne geeyala mu maaso go, olw'ebikolwa ebingi eby'obutuukirivu bwo ebyoleseddwa.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ebyo nga biwedde, ne ntunula: Ekiggwa ky'Eweema ey'Endagaano mu ggulu ne kiggulibwawo." 
Revelation15:6 Bamalayika musanvu abaalina ebibonoobono omusanvu ne bafuluma mu Kiggwa. Baali bambadde engoye ezitukula ezitangalijja, ebifuba byabwe nga bisibiddwa n'emisipi egya zaabu." 
Revelation15:7 Ekimu ku biramu ebina ne kiwa bamalayika omusanvu ebibya musanvu ebya zaabu ebijjudde obusungu bwa Katonda oyo omulamu emirembe n'emirembe. 
Revelation15:8 Ekiggwa ne kijjula omukka gw'ekitiibwa kya Katonda n'obuyinza bwe, nga tewali asobola kuyingira mu Kiggwa okutuusa ng'ebibonoobono omusanvu ebya bamalayika omusanvu bimaliriziddwa." 
Revelation16:1 Awo mu Kiggwa ne mpuliramu eddoboozi eddene nga ligamba bamalayika omusanvu nti: “Mugende mufuke mu nsi ebibya omusanvu eby'obusungu bwa Katonda.” 
Revelation16:2 Malayika omubereberye n'agenda n'afuka ekibya kye mu nsi; amabwa amabi ag'obulabe ne gajja ku bantu abaali balina akabonero k'ekisolo n'abo abaali basinza ekifaananyi kyakyo. 
Revelation16:3 Ne malayika owookubiri n'afuka ekibya kye mu nnyanja, n'efuuka ng'omusaayi gw'omuntu afudde; buli kiramu kyonna ekyali mu nnyanja ne kifa." 
Revelation16:4 Ne malayika owookusatu n'afuka ekibya kye mu migga ne mu nzizi z'amazzi, wonna ne wafuuka musaayi." 
Revelation16:5 Ne mpulira malayika w'amazzi ng'agamba nti: “Oli mutuukirivu mu nnamula yo eno, ayi ggwe aliwo, eyaliwo, ayi Omutuukirivu." 
Revelation16:6 Kubanga baayiwa omusaayi gw'abatuukirivu n'ogw'abalanzi; naawe obawadde omusaayi banywe; ekyo kye kibagwanidde!” 
Revelation16:7 Ate ne mpulira omwaliiro nga gugamba nti: “Kye kiikyo, ayi Mukama Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu; ennamula yo ya mazima era ntuukirivu.”" 
Revelation16:8 Ne malayika owookuna n'afuka ekibya kye ku njuba, n'eweebwa obuyinza okwokya abantu n'omuliro." 
Revelation16:9 Abantu ne bookebwa olw'ebbugumu lyayo eringi, ne bavuma erinnya lya Katonda eyalina obuyinza ku bibonoobono ebyo, ne batabonerera bamutendereze." 
Revelation16:10 Ne malayika owookutaano n'afuka ekibya kye ku nnamulondo y'ekisolo, obwakabaka bwakyo ne bufuuka nzikiza; abantu ne beerumaaluma ennimi zaabwe olw'ennaku." 
Revelation16:11 Ne bavuma Katonda w'eggulu olw'obulumi n'ebiwundu byabwe, ne bateenenya bikolwa byabwe." 
Revelation16:12 Ne malayika owoomukaga n'afuka ekibya kye mu mugga guli omunene Ewufuraati, amazzi gaagwo gonna ne gakalira okukolera bakabaka b'ebuvanjuba ekkubo." 
Revelation16:13 Ne ndaba nga mu kamwa ka ssessota ne mu kamwa k'ekisolo ne mu kamwa k'omulanzi ow'obulimba mufubutukamu emyoyo esatu emigwagwa nga gifaanana ng'ebikere. 
Revelation16:14 Gy'egyo emyoyo emibi egigenda gikola obubonero, egigenda mu bakabaka b'ensi yonna okubakunga balwane ku lunaku olukulu olwa Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu." 
Revelation16:15 – “Laba, nzija ng'omubbi! Yeesiimye oyo atunula, akuumira okumpi ebyambalo bye aleme kugenda bwereere, ensonyi ze zireme kulabibwa.” -" 
Revelation16:16 Ne babakuŋŋaanyiza mu kifo, mu Lwebureeyi ekiyitibwa Arumageddoni." 
Revelation16:17 Ne malayika owoomusanvu n'afuka ekibya kye mu bbanga; eddoboozi eddene ne liva mu Kiggwa ku nnamulondo nga ligamba nti: “Kiwedde!” 
Revelation16:18 Awo ne wabaawo ebimyanso, amaloboozi, okubwatuka ne musisi ow'amaanyi, atabangawo bukya bantu babeera ku nsi, musisi oyo yali munene bulala." 
Revelation16:19 Ekibuga Ekikulu ne kyeyubuluzaamu ebitundu bisatu; ebibuga by'omu mawanga ne bisaanawo. Katonda n'ajjukira Babiloni, ekibuga ekinene, okukinywesa ekikompe ky'omwenge gw'obusungu bwe." 
Revelation16:20 Buli kizinga ne kidduka, n'ensozi nga tezikyasangika." 
Revelation16:21 Amayinja g'omuzira agazitowa okwenkana talenta, ne gagwa ku bantu nga gava mu ggulu; abantu ne bavuma Katonda olw'ekibonoobono ky'omuzira; ekibonoobono kino kyali kinene nnyo." 
Revelation17:1 Awo omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abaalina ebibya omusanvu n'ajja n'ayogera nange, n'aŋŋamba nti: “Jjangu, nzija kukulaga okulamulibwa kw'omukazi omwenzi kkungwa atudde ku mazzi amangi," 
Revelation17:2 bakabaka b'ensi gwe baayendako, n'omwenge ogw'obukaba bwe abantu b'oku nsi gwe baatamiira.”" 
Revelation17:3 Awo n'anzigya awo n'antwalira mu Mwoyo mu ddungu. Ne ndaba omukazi atudde ku kisolo ekimyufu ekyali kibunye kungulu kwonna amannya agavuma Katonda, nga kirina emitwe musanvu n'amayembe kkumi." 
Revelation17:4 Omukazi yali ayambadde ebyakakobe n'ebimyufu, nga yeetonye n'ebya zaabu, amayinja ag'omuwendo n'amalulu, mu mukono gwe ng'alinamu ekikompe ekya zaabu ekijjudde ebyenyinyalwa n'obwonoonefu bw'obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation17:5 Ku kyenyi kye nga kuwandiikiddwako erinnya ery'amakulu amakusike: 'Babiloni ow'Ekitalo, Nnyina wa bamalaaya n'ebyenyinyalwa by'ensi'." 
Revelation17:6 Ne ndaba omukazi oyo atamidde omusaayi gw'abatuukirivu n'ogw'abajulizi ba Yezu. Bwe namulaba, ne mmwewuunya ne ssekwewuunya yenna." 
Revelation17:7 Malayika n'aŋŋamba nti: “Weewuunyiza ki? Kale nzija kukubuulira amakulu amakusike ag'omukazi n'ekisolo ekimusitudde ekirina emitwe omusanvu n'amayembe ekkumi. 
Revelation17:8 “Ekisolo ky'olabye, kyaliwo, kati tekikyaliwo; kijja kuva mu nnyanga, kigende kizikirizibwe; abali ku nsi abalina amannya agataawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya bulamu okuva ensi lwe yabangibwawo, bagenda kwewuunya bwe baliraba ekisolo, kubanga kyaliwo, tekikyaliwo, ate kigenda kujja." 
Revelation17:9 Wano weetaagisa okuba n'omwoyo ogw'amagezi. Emitwe omusanvu bwe busozi omusanvu omukazi oli kw'atudde. 
Revelation17:10 Era be bakabaka omusanvu, ku bo abataano baagwa, omu w'ali, omulala tannajja; bw'alijja, ajja kumalawo akabanga katono." 
Revelation17:11 Ate ekisolo ekyaliwo kati nga tekikyaliwo, ky'ekyomunaana, nga naye kigenda na biri omusanvu, nakyo kigenda mu kuzikirira." 
Revelation17:12 Ate amayembe ekkumi ge walabye, be bakabaka ekkumi abatannafuna bwakabaka. Kyokka bagenda kufuna obuyinza obw'obwakabaka ebbanga lya ssaawa emu wamu n'ekisolo." 
Revelation17:13 Bonna bassa kimu era bawa ekisolo obuyinza bwabwe n'okufuga. 
Revelation17:14 Bajja kulwanyisa Akaliga; Akaliga kagenda kubawangula kubanga ko ye Mukama w'abakama, ye Kabaka wa bakabaka, ate abo abali nako baayitibwa, balondemu era beesigwa.”" 
Revelation17:15 Ate n'aŋŋamba nti: “Amazzi g'olabye, omukazi omwenzi kw'atudde, be bantu n'ebibiina n'amawanga n'ennimi." 
Revelation17:16 Ate amayembe ekkumi g'olabye, go n'ekisolo birikyawa omukazi omwenzi. Bagenda kumwaya, bamuleke bwereere, balye ennyama ye, bamwokye n'omuliro asirikke." 
Revelation17:17 Kubanga Katonda y'atadde mu mitima gyabwe okutuukiriza ky'ateesa nga bassa kimu n'okuwa ekisolo obuyinza bwabwe n'obwakabaka okutuusa ebigambo bya Katonda lwe birimala okutuukirizibwa. 
Revelation17:18 Ate omukazi gwe walabye, kye kibuga ekinene ekirina obuyinza ku bakabaka b'ensi.”" 
Revelation18:1 Oluvannyuma, ne ndaba malayika omulala ng'akkirira ng'ava mu ggulu, ng'alina obuyinza bungi; ensi yonna n'etangaala olw'ekitiibwa kye." 
Revelation18:2 N'aleekaana n'eddoboozi ery'amaanyi nti: “Agudde, agudde Babiloni ow'ekitalo! afuuse kisulo kya myoyo migwagwa, ekkomera lya buli mwoyo mubi, ekkomera lya buli kinyonyi ekitali kirongoofu ekyakyayibwa;" 
Revelation18:3 kubanga amawanga gonna gaanywa omwenge gw'obusungu bw'obwenzi bwe; ne bakabaka b'ensi baayenda naye, n'abasuubuzi b'omu nsi baagaggawalira ku kwejalabya kwe okungi.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eddala eriva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti: “Bantu bange, mumuveemu, muleme kwetaba mu bibi bye n'okugabana bwe mutyo ku bibonoobono bye." 
Revelation18:5 Anti ebibi bye byetuumye okutuukira ddala ku ggulu, n'Omukama ajjukidde ebibi bye." 
Revelation18:6 Mumukole nga bwe yabakola; mmwe musinzeewo n'emirundi ebiri ku ebyo bye yakola; mu kikompe mwe yatabulira mmwe mumutabuliremu emirundi ebiri okusinga. 
Revelation18:7 Gye yakoma okwegulumiza n'okwejalabya, nammwe gye muba mukoma okumubonyaabonya n'okumukaabya. Ye alowooza mu mutima gwe nti: ‘Ndi wano nze nnaabakyala, siri nnamwandu, n'okukungubaga sirikumanyaako.’" 
Revelation18:8 Awo nno ebibonoobono birimujjira ku lunaku lumu: kawumpuli, ebiwoobe n'enjala, era alyokebwa omuliro, kubanga Katonda amulamula wa maanyi.”" 
Revelation18:9 Bakabaka b'ensi abaayendanga naye ne beejalabya naye bakungubaga ne bakuba ebiwoobe nga balaba omukka ng'ateta; 
Revelation18:10 bayimiridde walako olw'entiisa y'ebibonoobono bye, ne bagamba nti: “Nga kitalo, nga kitalo, ggwe ekibuga eky'ekitalo! Ayi Babiloni, ekibuga eky'amaanyi! Mu ssaawa busaawa ekibonerezo kyo kikujjidde.”" 
Revelation18:11 N'abasuubuzi b'ensi bamukaabira ne bamukungubagira, kubanga tewakyali agula migugu gyabwe;" 
Revelation18:12 emigugu egya zaabu, ffeeza, amayinja ag'omuwendo, amalulu, engoye empeweevu n'eza kakobe, ne liiri, n'emmyufu, emiti gyonna egy'akawoowo, n'ebintu byonna eby'amasanga, n'ebintu byonna ebikole mu miti egy'emiwendo, n'ekikomo, n'ekyuma, n'eby'ejjinja, ne maabo," 
Revelation18:13 budalasiini, ebirungo, obubaani, mirra, envumbo, n'omuzigo ogw'akawoowo, obuwunga obuse, eŋŋano, ente, endiga, embalaasi, ebigaali, n'abaddu, kwe kugamba, abantu." 
Revelation18:14 “Ebibala omwoyo gwo bye gwegombanga bikuleseewo; n'eby'omuwendo byonna n'ebitiibwa byo bikufudde, tebikyaddayo kulabikako.”" 
Revelation18:15 Abasuubuzi b'ebyo abaagaggawalira ku ye bamuyimiridde walako olw'entiisa ey'ebibonoobono, nga bakaaba, nga bakungubaga," 
Revelation18:16 nga bagamba nti: “Nga kitalo, nga kitalo, ekibuga eky'ekitalo, ekyayambalanga engoye empeweevu, eza kakobe n'emmyufu, nga kyewoomezza ne zaabu n'amayinja g'omuwendo n'amalulu!" 
Revelation18:17 Mu ssaawa busaawa obugagga buno bwonna busaanyiziddwawo!” Abakulu b'amaato, abalunnyanja, abagoba b'amato, na bonna abakolera ku nnyanja, bayimiridde walako" 
Revelation18:18 nga batunuulira omukka nga kiteta, ne baleekaana nti: “Kibuga ki ekyali kyenkanye ekibuga kino obukulu?”" 
Revelation18:19 Ne beeyiira enfuufu ku mutwe nga bwe bakaaba n'okukungubaga, nga bagamba nti: “Nga kitalo, nga kitalo eky'ekibuga eky'ekitalo! Bonna abaalina amaato ku nnyanja mwe baagaggawalira ku bugagga bwakyo; mu ssaawa busaawa kifuuse matongo." 
Revelation18:20 Kale, ggulu, jaguza olw'ekyo ky'afuuse, nammwe abatuukirivu, abatume n'abalanzi, kubanga Katonda amulamudde ku lwammwe.”" 
Revelation18:21 Malayika omu ow'amaanyi, n'abaka ejjinja eriri ng'olubengo olunene, n'alikasuka mu nnyanja, nga bw'alaamiriza nti: “Babiloni, ekibuga eky'ekitalo bwe kirikanyugibwa n'amaanyi wansi, tekiriddayo kusangibwa." 
Revelation18:22 Amaloboozi g'abasunyi b'ennanga, ag'abayimbi, ag'abalere n'abakondeere tegaliddayo kuwulirwa mu ggwe; omukugu mu buli bukugu taliddayo kusangibwa mu ggwe; n'eddoboozi ly'olubengo teririddayo kuwulikika mu ggwe;" 
Revelation18:23 n'ekitangaala ky'ettawaaza tekiriddayo kwakira mu ggwe; n'eddoboozi ly'awasizza n'omugole teririddayo kuwulikika mu ggwe. Kubanga abaasuubulanga naawe be baali abakungu mu nsi; amawanga gonna gaagulikibwa obulogo bwo. 
Revelation18:24 Mu ye mwe mwasangibwa omusaayi ogw'abalanzi n'abatuukirivu n'ogwa bonna abaali battiddwa mu nsi.” 
Revelation19:1 Oluvannyuma, ne mpulira mu ggulu ekiri ng'eddoboozi ery'amaanyi ery'ebbiina eddene, nga ligamba nti: “Alleluuya! obulokofu, ekitiibwa n'obuyinza bya Katonda waffe." 
Revelation19:2 Kuba ennamula ye y'amazima era ntuukirivu; y'alamudde omwenzi ono kkungwa, eyayonoona ensi yonna n'obwenzi bwe; amwesasulizzaako olw'omusaayi gw'abaweereza be be yatta.”" 
Revelation19:3 Ate ne baddamu nti: “Alleluuya! Erikka lye lirittunka emirembe n'emirembe.” 
Revelation19:4 Abakadde abiri mu abana ne beeyala, ko n'ebiramu ebina, ne bavunnamira Katonda atudde ku nnamulondo nga bagamba nti: “Amiina. Alleluuya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Ate eddoboozi ne liva ku nnamulondo nga ligamba nti: “Mugulumize Katonda, mwenna abaweereza be; mwenna abamutya, abatene n'abanene.”" 
Revelation19:6 Ne mpulira ekiri ng'eddoboozi ly'ebbiina eddene, ng'okuwuuma okw'amazzi amangi, ng'okubwatuka kwa laddu ez'amaanyi, nga ligamba nti: “Alleluuya! Omukama Katonda, Omuyinza wa buli kantu afuga." 
Revelation19:7 Tusanyuke, tujaguze, tumuwe ekitiibwa, kubanga embaga y'Akaliga etuuse, ne mugole we yeetegese dda." 
Revelation19:8 Ateekwa okwambala engoye empeweevu, ezitangalijja, ezitukula;” - anti engoye ezo bye bikolwa ebirungi eby'abatuukirivu." 
Revelation19:9 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Wandiika kino: Beesiimye abayitiddwa ku mbaga y'Akaliga.” Ate n'aŋŋamba nti: “Bino bigambo bya Katonda, bya mazima.”" 
Revelation19:10 Ne ngwa ku bigere bye okumusinza. N'aŋŋamba nti: “Togeza. Nange ndi muweereza munno, era munne wa baganda bo alina okujulira kwa Yezu. Katonda gw'oba osinza.” Kubanga okujulira kwa Yezu gwe mwoyo gw'obulanzi." 
Revelation19:11 Ne ndaba eggulu nga libikkuse; laba, embalaasi enjeru! Eyali agyebagadde nga bamuyita Mwesigwa, wa Mazima, alamula era alwanira mu butuukirivu." 
Revelation19:12 Amaaso ge nga gali ng'olulimi lw'omuliro; ku mutwe gwe ng'alina emige nkumu; ng'alina erinnya erimuwandiikiddwako eritaliiko mulala alimanyi wabula ye yekka. 
Revelation19:13 Yali yeesuuliddeko omunagiro ogwannyikibwa mu musaayi, erinnya lye nga bamuyita 'Kigambo wa Katonda'." 
Revelation19:14 Amagye ag'omu ggulu gaali gamugoberera nga geebagadde embalaasi enjeru, nga gayambadde engoye enjeru ezitukula." 
Revelation19:15 Mu kamwa ke nga muvaamu ekitala ekyogi eky'okukubisa amawanga; ajja kugafuga ne ddamula ow'ekyuma; alisamba essogolero ly'omwenge gw'obusungu bwa Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu. 
Revelation19:16 Ku munagiro gwe ne ku kisambi kye yalinako erinnya eriwandiikiddwa nti 'Kabaka wa bakabaka, Omukama w'abakama'." 
Revelation19:17 Ne ndaba malayika omu ng'ayimiridde mu njuba, alaamiriza n'eddoboozi eddene ennyonyi zonna ezaali zibuuka mu bbanga nti: “Mujje, mukuŋŋaane ku kyeggulo kya Katonda," 
Revelation19:18 mulye ennyama ya bakabaka, n'ennyama y'abagabe, n'ennyama ya bakirimaanyi, n'ennyama y'embalaasi n'abeebagazi baazo, n'ennyama ya bonna: ey'abaana ab'eddembe n'ey'abaddu, ey'abatene n'abanene.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ne ndaba ekisolo ne bakabaka b'ensi n'amagye gaabwe nga bakuŋŋaanye okulwanyisa oli atudde ku mbalaasi wamu n'eggye lye. 
Revelation19:20 Ekisolo ne kiwambibwa, era wamu nakyo omulanzi ow'obulimba eyakola obubonero mu maaso gaakyo bwe yalimbisa abantu abaali bafunye akabonero k'ekisolo n'abaasinza ekifaananyi kyakyo. Abo bombi ne bakasukibwa nga balamu mu nnyanja ey'omuliro ogw'ebibiriiti ebyaka." 
Revelation19:21 Abasigaddewo ne battibwa n'ekitala ky'oyo atudde ku mbalaasi ekyali kiva mu kamwa ke; ennyonyi zonna ne zekkutira ennyama yaabwe. 
Revelation20:1 Ate era ne ndaba malayika ng'akkirira ng'ava mu ggulu, ng'alina mu mukono gwe ekisumuluzo ky'ennyanga n'olujegere olunene." 
Revelation20:2 N'awamba Ssessota, omusota ogwo ogw'edda, Omuloopi era Sitaani, n'amusibira emyaka lukumi," 
Revelation20:3 n'amukanyuga mu nnyanga, n'aggalawo omulyango, n'amusibiramu n'envumbo aleme kwongera kulimba mawanga okutuusa ng'emyaka olukumi giyiseewo. Oluvannyuma lw'egyo aliteebwa okumala akabanga." 
Revelation20:4 Ate ne ndaba nnamulondo, abazituddeko nga beebo abaaweebwa obuyinza okulamula. Era ne ndaba emyoyo gy'abantu abaatemebwako emitwe olw'okujulira Yezu n'olw'okubeera ekigambo kya Katonda. Beebo abataasinza kisolo n'ekifaananyi kyakyo, era abataafuna kabonero kaakyo mu kyenyi oba ku mikono gyabwe. Ne baddamu ne babeera balamu, ne balamula wamu ne Kristu emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:5 Abafu abalala tebaalamuka okutuusa emyaka olukumi nga giwedde; okwo kwe kuzuukira okusooka. 
Revelation20:6 Yeesiimye era mutuukirivu oyo agabana ku kuzuukira okusooka! Bano okufa okwokubiri tekubalinaako buyinza, wabula bagenda kubeera bakabona ba Katonda na bakabona ba Kristu; baliramula naye emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:7 Emyaka olukumi nga gimaze okuyita, Sitaani alisumululwa mu kkomera lye," 
Revelation20:8 n'afuluma, n'alimbalimba amawanga agali mu nsonda ennya ez'ensi, ge ga Gogi ne Magogi, n'agakuŋŋaanya okulwana; obungi baliba ng'omusenyu gw'ennyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Baazinda wonna ku nsi, ne bazingiza olusiisira lw'abatuukirivu n'ekibuga ekyagalwa. Kyokka omuliro gwava mu ggulu ne gubawemmenta," 
Revelation20:10 n'omukemi eyali abalimbyerimbye n'akanyugibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro n'ebibiriiti, ekisolo n'omulanzi ow'obulimba gye baali; eyo gye balibonyaabonyezebwa emisana n'ekiro emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation20:11 Awo ne ndaba nnamulondo ennene, enjeru, nga kuliko atuddeko; eggulu n'ensi ne bidduka okuva mu maaso ge, naye ne wabula ekifo ew'okubibeeza." 
Revelation20:12 Ne ndaba abafu, abanene n'abatene, nga bayimiridde mu maaso ga nnamulondo, ebitabo ne bibikkulwa. Ekitabo ekirala ne kibikkulibwa, kye kitabo ky'obulamu; abafu ne balamulibwa ku ebyo ebyali biwandiikiddwa mu bitabo, ku ebyo bye baali bakoze." 
Revelation20:13 Ennyanja n'ereeta abafu be yalina; olumbe ne luleeta abafu baalwo, n'amagombe ne galeeta abaago; buli omu n'alamulibwa ku bye yakola." 
Revelation20:14 Amagombe n'olumbe ne bisuulibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro. Okwo kwe kufa okwokubiri, ennyanja ey'omuliro." 
Revelation20:15 Oyo ow'erinnya eritaasangibwa nga liwandiikiddwa mu kitabo ky'obulamu, yakanyugibwa mu nnyanja ey'omuliro." 
Revelation21:1 Awo ne ndaba eggulu eriggya n'ensi empya; anti eggulu eryasooka n'ensi eyasooka byali bigenze, n'ennyanja nga tekyaliwo." 
Revelation21:2 Ne ndaba ekibuga ekitukuvu, Yeruzaalemu ekiggya, nga kikkirira kiva mu ggulu ewa Katonda, nga kitegekeddwa ng'omugole ayambaziddwa olwa bba." 
Revelation21:3 Ne mpulira eddoboozi eddene eriva mu nnamulondo nga ligamba nti: “Mulabe, ekisulo kya Katonda kiikino kiri mu bantu; ajja kusula mu bo, nabo balibeera bantu be, ne Katonda yennyini alibeera nabo." 
Revelation21:4 Alibasangula buli zziga mu maaso gaabwe, nga tewakyali kufa yadde ennaku, nandibadde okukuba emiranga yadde obulumi, kubanga olwo eby'edda nga biwedde.”" 
Revelation21:5 Awo eyali atudde ku nnamulondo n'agamba anti: “Laba byonna mbizza buggya.” Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Wandiika kino, kubanga ebigambo bino byesigika era bya mazima.”" 
Revelation21:6 Era n'aŋŋamba nti: “Kiwedde! Nze Alufa ne Omega, Amasooka n'Enkomerero. Oli alumwa ennyonta ndimuwa amazzi okuva mu luzzi olw'amazzi ag'obulamu ku bwereere." 
Revelation21:7 Aliba awangudde, alisikira bino, nange ndibeera Katonda we naye n'aba mwana wange." 
Revelation21:8 Naye abatiitiizi, abatali beesigwa, abeenyinyalwa, abatemu, abenzi, abalogo, abasamize na bonna abalimba, omugabo gwabwe guliba mu nnyanja ey'omuliro n'ebibiriiti; okwo kwe kufa okwokubiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Omu ku bamalayika omusanvu abaalina ebibya ebijjudde ebibonoobono omusanvu eby'oluvannyuma, n'ajja n'ayogera nange, n'agamba nti: “Jjangu, nkulage omugole, mukyala w'Akaliga.”" 
Revelation21:10 N'anzigya awo n'antwalira mu mwoyo ku lusozi olunene oluwanvu, n'annengeza ekibuga ekitukuvu, Yeruzaalemu, nga kikkirira kiva mu ggulu ewa Katonda," 
Revelation21:11 nga kirina ekitiibwa kya Katonda, okutangalijja kwakyo nga kuli ng'okw'ejjinja ery'omuwendo yasipi, nga kitukula ng'ejjinja ettangaavu." 
Revelation21:12 Kyali kiriko bbugwe omunene omuwanvu, nga kuliko emiryango kkumi n'ebiri, nga ku miryango kuliko bamalayika kkumi na babiri, era nga ku miryango kuliko amannya ag'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri eby'abaana ba Yisirayeli agawandiikiddwako;" 
Revelation21:13 ebuvanjuba ng'eriyo emiryango esatu, emambuka emiryango esatu, emaserengeta emiryango esatu n'ebugwanjuba emiryango esatu." 
Revelation21:14 Bbugwe w'ekibuga ng'atudde ku mayinja kkumi n'abiri ag'omu musingi, ku go nga kuliko amannya kkumi n'abiri ag'Abatume ekkumi n'ababiri ab'Akaliga." 
Revelation21:15 Eyali ayogera nange yalina olumuli olupima olwa zaabu, olw'okupima ekibuga n'emiryango gyakyo ne bbugwe." 
Revelation21:16 Ekibuga kyali kya njuuyi nnya ezenkanankana, obuwanvu bwakyo nga bwenkana n'obugazi bwakyo; n'apima ekibuga n'olumuli, zaali sitadiyo akakumi kamu mu enkumi bbiri; obuwanvu, obugazi n'obusimba nga byenkana." 
Revelation21:17 N'apima ne bbugwe waakyo, ng'aweza emikono kikumi mu ana mu ena mu kipimo ky'omuntu, kwe kugamba ekya malayika." 
Revelation21:18 Bbugwe yali azimbiddwa n'ejjinja lya yasipi, naye ekibuga kyennyini nga kya zaabu omwereere omutangaavu ng'ekirawuli." 
Revelation21:19 Emyaliiro gy'ekibuga nga giwundiddwa n'amayinja ag'omuwendo aga buli ngeri. Omwaliiro ogusooka nga gwa yasipi, ogwokubiri nga gwa saffiro, ogwokusatu nga gwa akyate, ogwokuna nga gwa simaragido," 
Revelation21:20 ogwokutaano nga gwa oniki, ogwomukaaga nga gwa sarudiyo, ogwomusanvu nga gwa kirusolito, ogwomunaana nga gwa berullo, ogwomwenda nga gwa topaziyo, ogw'ekkumi nga gwa kirusopurazo, ogw'ekkumi n'ogumu nga gwa yasinto, ogw'ekkumi n'ebiri nga gwa ametisito." 
Revelation21:21 Ate emiryango ekkumi n'ebiri gyali gya malulu, buli mulyango nga gukoleddwa mu ddulu limu. Enguudo z'omu kibuga nga za zaabu omwereere omutangaavu ng'ekirawuli." 
Revelation21:22 Saalabamu Kiggwa, kubanga ekiggwa kyamu ye Mukama Katonda Omuyinza wa buli kantu n'Akaliga." 
Revelation21:23 Ekibuga tekyetaaganga njuba, yadde omwezi okukyakira, kubanga ekitiibwa kya Katonda kye kyali kikitangaaza; ate ettawaaza yaamu ke Kaliga." 
Revelation21:24 Amawanga galitambulira mu kitangaala kyakyo, n'abafuzi b'ensi balireeta amakula gaabwe mu kyo." 
Revelation21:25 Emiryango tegiriggalwanga emisana lyonna, anti eyo teriba kiro." 
Revelation21:26 Balireetanga mu kyo amakula n'obugagga bw'amawanga. 
Revelation21:27 Temuliyingiramu kikyafu na kimu, wadde oyo akola ebyenyinyalwa n'eby'obulimba; wabula abo bokka abawandiike mu kitabo ky'obulamu eky'Akaliga." 
Revelation22:1 Ate malayika n'andaga omugga gw'amazzi ag'obulamu, ogutukula ng'ejjinja ettangaavu, nga gukulukuta guva mu nnamulondo ya Katonda n'ey'Akaliga." 
Revelation22:2 Wakati w'oluguudo lw'ekibuga n'omugga, ku ludda olw'eno ne ku ludda olw'eri olw'omugga, nga kuliko emiti egy'obulamu egibala emirundi kkumi n'ebiri buli mwaka, buli mwezi omulundi gumu; ebikoola byagyo nga bya kuwonya amawanga." 
Revelation22:3 Temukyabeeramu kivumirire, wabula nnamulondo ya Katonda n'ey'Akaliga ze zinaabeerangamu; abaweereza be balimusinzanga," 
Revelation22:4 balirabanga amaaso ge, n'erinnya lye liribabeeranga mu byenyi byabwe." 
Revelation22:5 Ekiro tekiribeerawo mulundi mulala; tebalyetaaga kitangaala kya ttawaaza oba eky'enjuba, kubanga Omukama Katonda waabwe y'alibamulisanga; baliramula emirembe n'emirembe." 
Revelation22:6 Ate n'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigambo bino byesigika era bya mazima. Omukama Katonda w'emyoyo gy'abalanzi, y'atumye malayika we okutegeeza abaweereza be ebiteekwa okutuuka amangu." 
Revelation22:7 “Nzuuno nzija mu bbanga ttono.” Yeesiimye akwata ebigambo ebirangiddwa mu kitabo kino. 
Revelation22:8 Nze Yowanna nze nawulira era ne ndaba ebintu bino. Bwe namala okubiwulira n'okubiraba, ne neeyala ku bigere bya malayika eyali abindaga mmusinze." 
Revelation22:9 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Togeza! Nange ndi muweereza munno, munne w'abaganda bo abalanzi n'abo abakwata ebigambo ebirangiddwa mu kitabo kino. Sinza Katonda.”" 
Revelation22:10 N'aŋŋamba nti: “Ebigambo ebirangiddwa mu kitabo kino tobisirikira, kubanga obudde buli kumpi." 
Revelation22:11 Omwonoonyi ayongere okwonoona, omwonoonefu ayongere okweyonoona; ayisa obulungi ayongere okuyisa obulungi, n'omutuukirivu ayongere okuba omutuukirivu." 
Revelation22:12 Nzuuno nzija mu bbanga ttono nga ndeeta n'empeera yange gye nnaasasula buli omu nga ngerera ku bikolwa bye. 
Revelation22:13 Nze Alufa ne Omega, Omubereberye era Omuvannyuma, Amasooka n'Enkomerero.”" 
Revelation22:14 Beesiimye abo abayoza ebyambalo byabwe bakkirizibwe ku muti ogw'obulamu, era bakkirizibwe okuyingira mu kibuga nga bayita mu miryango." 
Revelation22:15 Ebweru eriyo mbwa, balogo, benzi, batemu, basamize na buli ayagala n'akola eby'obulimba." 
Revelation22:16 “Nze Yezu nkutumidde malayika wange ojulire bino ku lwa Ekleziya. Nze kikolo era akalokolerwa ka Dawudi, emmunyeenye y'oku makya eyakaayakana.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mwoyo n'Omugole bagamba nti: “Jjangu!” N'oyo awulira, agambe nti: “Jjangu!” Alumwa ennyonta ajje; ayeegomba afune ku mazzi ag'obulamu ku bwereere." 
Revelation22:18 Ndabula buli awulidde ebigambo ebirangiddwa mu kitabo kino, nti singa oli abyongerako, naye Katonda alimwongerako ebibonoobono ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:19 Ate singa oli aggyako ku bigambo ebirangiddwa mu kitabo kino, Katonda aliggyawo omugabo gwe ku muti ogw'obulamu ne mu kibuga ekitukuvu ebiwandiikiddwa mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:20 Oyo akakasa ebirangiddwa bino agamba nti: “Mazima nzija mu bbanga ttono.” Amiina. Jjangu, Mukama Yezu!"
